items.name: Jump Back: The Best of The Rolling Stones
items.descriptionZh: 《Jump Back: The Best of The Rolling Stones》是滚石乐队1993年发行的精选集，收录了他们1964年至1992年的经典曲目。这张专辑风格横跨摇滚、布鲁斯和雷鬼，展现了乐队狂放不羁的核心特色，是入门滚石音乐的绝佳选择。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Jump Back: The Best of The Rolling Stones’ is a 1993 compilation featuring classics from 1964 to 1992. Spanning rock, blues, and reggae, it captures the band’s rebellious spirit and serves as a perfect introduction to their legacy.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集是为了庆祝滚石乐队成立30周年而发行，但乐队当时并未参与曲目选择，而是由唱片公司主导。有趣的是，专辑名称“Jump Back”源自他们1971年的一首非专辑单曲，原本是B面歌曲，却被选为标题曲。
items.storiesEn: Released for the band’s 30th anniversary, the compilation was curated by the record label rather than the band. Interestingly, the title ‘Jump Back’ comes from a 1971 non-album B-side, which was chosen as the album’s namesake.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在英国和美国均获得白金认证，巩固了滚石乐队作为全球最伟大摇滚乐队之一的地位，影响了后世的摇滚精选集发行模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: Certified platinum in the UK and US, it cemented the Rolling Stones’ status as one of the greatest rock bands, influencing how rock compilations are curated.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队成立于1962年，是英国摇滚的象征。由米克·贾格尔、基思·理查兹等人领衔，他们以粗粝的布鲁斯摇滚和叛逆形象闻名，被誉为“世界最伟大的摇滚乐队”，活跃至今已逾六十年。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1962, the Rolling Stones are icons of British rock. Led by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards, they are known for gritty blues-rock and a rebellious image, often called ‘the greatest rock band in the world,’ active for over six decades.

items.name: Jalamanta
items.descriptionZh: 《Jalamanta》是Brant Bjork的首张个人专辑，发行于1999年。风格融合了迷幻摇滚、沙漠摇滚和放克，充满了慵懒的节奏和充满氛围感的吉他。核心特色是它随性、迷幻的加州沙漠气息，如同一次听觉上的公路旅行。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Jalamanta’ is Brant Bjork’s debut solo album, released in 1999. Blending psychedelic rock, desert rock, and funk, it features laid-back grooves and atmospheric guitars, embodying the free-spirited vibe of the California desert.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常即兴。Brant Bjork在家中用简单的四轨录音机录制了大部分内容，甚至有些歌曲是一次性完成的。专辑名“Jalamanta”是他自创的词，灵感来自他在沙漠中的冥想体验，意为“火焰之母”。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a highly improvisational manner. Brant Bjork used a simple four-track recorder at home, with some tracks completed in one take. The title ‘Jalamanta’ is a coined word inspired by his desert meditations, meaning ‘mother of fire.’
items.artistIntroZh: Brant Bjork是美国音乐人、制作人，曾是Kyuss和Fu Manchu等知名沙漠摇滚乐队的鼓手。他以独特的迷幻风格和低沉的嗓音著称，是沙漠摇滚场景的关键人物之一，个人作品充满实验性和自由精神。
items.artistIntroEn: Brant Bjork is an American musician and producer, formerly drummer for Kyuss and Fu Manchu. Known for his psychedelic style and deep vocals, he is a key figure in the desert rock scene, with solo work marked by experimentation and freedom.

items.name: No Security
items.descriptionZh: 《No Security》是滚石乐队1998年发行的现场专辑，收录了1997-1998年“Bridges to Babylon”巡演的实况。风格延续了他们经典的布鲁斯摇滚和硬摇滚，特色是现场即兴发挥和与观众的强烈互动，展现了乐队巅峰期的舞台魅力。
items.descriptionEn: ‘No Security’ is a 1998 live album by the Rolling Stones, recorded during the ‘Bridges to Babylon’ tour. It features their classic blues-rock and hard rock, highlighting improvisation and audience interaction, capturing the band’s peak stage energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“No Security”取自巡演中一首歌的歌词，也暗指当时巡演安保的混乱状况。录制时，乐队特意选择了不同场馆的录音，包括一些小型场地，以捕捉更亲密的现场氛围。
items.storiesEn: The title ‘No Security’ comes from a lyric on tour, also hinting at chaotic security situations. The band selected recordings from various venues, including smaller ones, to capture a more intimate live atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为滚石乐队90年代的现场记录，这张专辑展现了他们持续创新的能力，影响了后来现场专辑的选曲和制作标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a live document of the Stones in the 90s, it showcases their enduring creativity and influenced the curation and production of subsequent live albums.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队是英国传奇摇滚乐队，成立于1962年。他们以米克·贾格尔的舞台魅力和基思·理查兹的吉他 riff 闻名，音乐风格从布鲁斯摇滚到雷鬼，跨越数十年，是全球唱片销量最高的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are a legendary British rock band formed in 1962. Famous for Mick Jagger’s stage presence and Keith Richards’ guitar riffs, their music spans blues-rock to reggae, with decades of influence and among the best-selling artists worldwide.

items.name: A Classical
items.descriptionZh: 《A Classical》是滨崎步2013年发行的古典混音专辑，将她经典的流行歌曲重新编排为管弦乐版本。风格融合了流行与古典，特色是宏大的弦乐和钢琴编曲，展现了滨崎步音乐的另一面，充满优雅与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: ‘A Classical’ is Ayumi Hamasaki’s 2013 classical remix album, reimagining her pop hits with orchestral arrangements. Blending pop and classical, it features grand strings and piano, revealing an elegant and emotional side of her music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是为了庆祝滨崎步出道15周年而制作。她亲自参与了编曲方向的讨论，希望用古典乐重新诠释自己的作品，让老歌焕发新生。录制时，她与东京爱乐乐团合作，过程充满挑战但极具艺术性。
items.storiesEn: Produced for her 15th anniversary, Ayumi Hamasaki personally discussed arrangement directions to reinterpret her songs with classical music. Recording with the Tokyo Philharmonic Orchestra was challenging yet highly artistic, bringing new life to her classics.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在日本公信榜古典榜夺冠，推动了J-Pop与古典乐跨界融合的趋势，影响了后来日本流行歌手的类似尝试。
items.historicalImpactEn: Topping Japan’s Oricon classical charts, it boosted J-Pop and classical crossover trends, influencing similar projects by later Japanese pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步是日本流行天后，1998年出道，被誉为“平成歌姬”。她以多元音乐风格、时尚形象和歌词中的自省主题闻名，唱片销量超过5000万张，是日本音乐史上最成功的女性歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki is a Japanese pop diva, debuting in 1998, known as the ‘Empress of Heisei.’ Renowned for diverse music styles, fashion, and introspective lyrics, she has sold over 50 million records, one of Japan’s most successful female artists.

items.name: Signed and Sealed in Blood
items.descriptionZh: 《Signed and Sealed in Blood》是Dropkick Murphys 2013年发行的第八张录音室专辑。风格融合了凯尔特民谣与朋克摇滚，特色是激昂的风笛、手风琴和快节奏的吉他，充满了工人阶级的豪迈与酒吧狂欢的热烈氛围。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Signed and Sealed in Blood’ is Dropkick Murphys’ 2013 eighth studio album. Blending Celtic folk and punk rock, it features lively bagpipes, accordion, and fast guitars, embodying working-class pride and pub revelry.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于波士顿的Q Division Studio，乐队邀请了多位好友客串，包括Bruce Springsteen的乐队成员。主打歌《The Boys Are Back》的MV拍摄于波士顿的酒吧，乐队和粉丝一起狂欢，场面十分混乱而有趣。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Q Division Studio in Boston, the band invited friends, including members of Bruce Springsteen’s band. The music video for ‘The Boys Are Back’ was shot in a Boston pub, featuring a chaotic, fun party with fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在Billboard 200上排名第10，是乐队商业上最成功的作品之一，进一步巩固了凯尔特朋克在全球的流行度。
items.historicalImpactEn: Peaking at No. 10 on Billboard 200, it became one of the band’s most commercially successful albums, further popularizing Celtic punk worldwide.
items.artistIntroZh: Dropkick Murphys是美国凯尔特朋克乐队，1996年成立于波士顿。他们以激进的政治歌词、现场表演的狂热能量和融合爱尔兰传统音乐元素而闻名，是工人阶级文化的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Dropkick Murphys are an American Celtic punk band formed in Boston in 1996. Known for politically charged lyrics, high-energy live shows, and Irish traditional music elements, they represent working-class culture.

items.name: Dear…
items.descriptionZh: 《Dear…》是天舞团The Grace的首张正规专辑，融合了流行、R&B与舞曲元素，展现了成员们出色的演唱实力与和声魅力。专辑以“致亲爱的你”为主题，收录了多首情感丰富的歌曲，既有动感十足的舞曲，也有温柔抒情的慢歌，充分体现了组合的多面性。
items.descriptionEn: Dear… is the first full-length album by The Grace, blending pop, R&B, and dance elements, showcasing the members' outstanding vocal abilities and harmonious charm. With the theme 'To My Dear,' the album includes emotionally rich tracks, ranging from energetic dance numbers to tender ballads, fully reflecting the group's versatility.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员们经常在深夜的录音室里即兴合唱，尤其是主唱Lina和Stephanie的和声练习常常持续到凌晨。制作人曾透露，主打歌《One More Chance, OK?》的副歌部分录了超过50个版本，才找到最完美的情感表达。
items.storiesEn: During the album recording, members often had impromptu choir sessions in the studio late at night, especially lead vocalists Lina and Stephanie, whose harmony practices often lasted until dawn. The producer revealed that the chorus of the title track 'One More Chance, OK?' was recorded over 50 times before finding the perfect emotional expression.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是SM娱乐旗下女子组合中少有的全 Vocal 实力派专辑，为后续二代女团的技术流路线树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a rare all-vocal powerhouse release among SM Entertainment's girl groups, setting a benchmark for the technical vocal route of subsequent second-generation girl groups.
items.artistIntroZh: The Grace（天舞团）是韩国SM娱乐于2005年推出的女子组合，由Lina、Dana、Sunday和Stephanie四名成员组成。以出色的唱功和舞台表现力著称，被誉为“SM的 Vocal 女王团”，在亚洲乐坛拥有独特地位。
items.artistIntroEn: The Grace is a female group formed by SM Entertainment in 2005, consisting of four members: Lina, Dana, Sunday, and Stephanie. Known for their exceptional vocal skills and stage presence, they are hailed as 'SM's Vocal Queens' and hold a unique position in the Asian music scene.

items.name: Led Zeppelin
items.descriptionZh: 《Led Zeppelin》是齐柏林飞艇乐队1969年发行的首张同名专辑，奠定了硬摇滚和重金属的基石。专辑融合了布鲁斯摇滚、民谣与迷幻元素，以吉米·佩奇极具冲击力的吉他 riff 和罗伯特·普兰特高亢的嗓音为标志，充满原始的力量与即兴的狂野。
items.descriptionEn: Led Zeppelin is the debut self-titled album by Led Zeppelin, released in 1969, laying the foundation for hard rock and heavy metal. Blending blues rock, folk, and psychedelic elements, it is marked by Jimmy Page's powerful guitar riffs and Robert Plant's soaring vocals, full of raw energy and wild improvisation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑仅用36小时便录制完成，大部分歌曲都是乐队在巡演中即兴创作。录制时，吉米·佩奇用一把借来的电吉他弹奏了《Good Times Bad Times》的经典 riff，而鼓手约翰·博纳姆在《Dazed and Confused》中故意打碎了一面鼓，录音师不得不紧急修复设备。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just 36 hours, with most songs improvised during the band's tour. Jimmy Page played the classic riff of 'Good Times Bad Times' on a borrowed electric guitar, while drummer John Bonham deliberately broke a drumhead during 'Dazed and Confused,' forcing the engineer to urgently repair the equipment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为硬摇滚和重金属的开山之作，全球销��超过800万张，彻底改变了摇滚乐的面貌。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely regarded as the pioneering work of hard rock and heavy metal, with over 8 million copies sold worldwide, fundamentally changing the landscape of rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: 齐柏林飞艇（Led Zeppelin）是1968年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由吉他手吉米·佩奇、主唱罗伯特·普兰特、贝斯手约翰·保罗·琼斯和鼓手约翰·博纳姆组成。他们是史上最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一，以重型吉他音色和神秘主义歌词著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin is a British rock band formed in London in 1968, consisting of guitarist Jimmy Page, vocalist Robert Plant, bassist John Paul Jones, and drummer John Bonham. They are one of the most influential rock bands in history, known for their heavy guitar sound and mystical lyrics.

items.name: Long. Live. ASAP
items.descriptionZh: 《Long. Live. ASAP》是ASAP Rocky的首张录音室专辑，将哈莱姆区的街头说唱与迷幻电子、合成器流行元素巧妙结合。专辑以流畅的 flow、复古的采样和前卫的制作著称，展现了ASAP Rocky对时尚与音乐融合的独特审美，氛围迷离而奢华。
items.descriptionEn: Long. Live. ASAP is ASAP Rocky's debut studio album, cleverly blending Harlem street rap with psychedelic electronic and synth-pop elements. Known for its smooth flow, vintage samples, and avant-garde production, the album showcases ASAP Rocky's unique aesthetic of merging fashion and music, creating a hazy yet luxurious atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，ASAP Rocky 与制作人 Clams Casino 在洛杉矶的录音室里连续工作72小时不眠不休。主打歌《F**kin' Problems》的副歌部分原本由 Drake 演唱，但 Drake 在最后一刻改变了自己的部分，导致 Rocky 不得不重新录制整段副歌。
items.storiesEn: During the album recording, ASAP Rocky and producer Clams Casino worked continuously for 72 hours without sleep in a Los Angeles studio. The chorus of the lead single 'F**kin' Problems' was originally sung by Drake, but Drake changed his part at the last minute, forcing Rocky to re-record the entire chorus.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了“云说唱”（Cloud Rap）流派的主流化，并确立了ASAP Rocky作为时尚偶像与音乐跨界先锋的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped mainstream the 'Cloud Rap' genre and established ASAP Rocky as a fashion icon and pioneer of music-fashion crossover.
items.artistIntroZh: ASAP Rocky（本名Rakim Mayers）是美国说唱歌手、音乐制作人及时尚设计师，1988年出生于纽约哈莱姆区。他是ASAP Mob团体核心成员，以慵懒的 flow、前卫的穿搭和实���性的音乐风格闻名，被誉为当代嘻哈文化的革新者。
items.artistIntroEn: ASAP Rocky (born Rakim Mayers) is an American rapper, music producer, and fashion designer, born in 1988 in Harlem, New York. As a core member of the ASAP Mob collective, he is known for his laid-back flow, avant-garde fashion, and experimental music style, hailed as an innovator of contemporary hip-hop culture.

items.name: ZZ Top's First Album
items.descriptionZh: 《ZZ Top's First Album》是ZZ Top的首张专辑，融合了南部摇滚、布鲁斯和布吉摇滚，充满粗犷的德州风味。专辑以比利·吉本斯标志性的吉他音色、低沉的人声和紧凑的节奏为特色，歌词多围绕公路、女人和酒，直白而充满活力。
items.descriptionEn: ZZ Top's First Album is the debut album by ZZ Top, blending Southern rock, blues, and boogie rock with a rugged Texas flavor. Characterized by Billy Gibbons' iconic guitar tone, low vocals, and tight rhythms, the lyrics revolve around roads, women, and whiskey—straightforward and full of energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队预算极其有限，吉他手比利·吉本斯使用了一把仅值50美元的二手吉他。录音师回忆，贝斯手达斯迪·希尔在录制《(Somebody Else Been) Shakin' Your Tree》时，因为太兴奋而把贝斯琴弦弹断了三次，最后只能用一把借来的贝斯完成。
items.storiesEn: During the album recording, the band had a very limited budget, and guitarist Billy Gibbons used a second-hand guitar worth only $50. The engineer recalled that bassist Dusty Hill broke his bass strings three times while recording '(Somebody Else Been) Shakin' Your Tree' out of excitement, finally finishing with a borrowed bass.
items.artistIntroZh: ZZ Top是一支美国摇滚乐队，1969年成立于德克萨斯州休斯顿，由吉他手兼主唱比利·吉本斯、贝斯手达斯迪·希尔和鼓手弗兰克·比尔德组成。他们以标志性的长胡须、墨镜和蓝调摇滚风格闻名，是南部摇滚的象征。
items.artistIntroEn: ZZ Top is an American rock band formed in Houston, Texas in 1969, consisting of guitarist/vocalist Billy Gibbons, bassist Dusty Hill, and drummer Frank Beard. Known for their iconic long beards, sunglasses, and blues-rock style, they are a symbol of Southern rock.

items.name: Live on Ten Legs
items.descriptionZh: 《Live on Ten Legs》是珍珠酱乐队2011年发行的现场专辑，收录了2003年至2010年间全球巡演的精华曲目。专辑以高能量的现场演绎、即兴段落和主唱埃迪·维德的激情呐喊为特色，完美捕捉了乐队在舞台上无可匹敌的爆发力与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: Live on Ten Legs is a live album by Pearl Jam, released in 2011, featuring highlights from their global tours between 2003 and 2010. The album is characterized by high-energy live performances, improvisational passages, and lead vocalist Eddie Vedder's passionate shouts, perfectly capturing the band's unmatched explosive power and emotional tension on stage.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Ten Legs”源于乐队五名成员在舞台上总共十条腿的玩笑。录制过程中，吉他手迈克·麦克雷迪在西班牙的一场演出中即兴弹奏了一段长达12分钟的独奏，观众疯狂到把舞台围栏都挤倒了。这张专辑的混音师特意保留了那次演出的现场噪音，以还原真实感。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Ten Legs' comes from the joke that the five band members have ten legs total on stage. During recording, guitarist Mike McCready improvised a 12-minute solo at a show in Spain, driving the crowd so wild that they knocked down the stage barriers. The album's mixing engineer deliberately kept the live noise from that performance to preserve authenticity.
items.artistIntroZh: 珍珠酱乐队（Pearl Jam）是美���西雅图的一支摇滚乐队，1990年成立，是90年代垃圾摇滚（Grunge）运动的代表之一。成员包括主唱埃迪·维德、吉他手杰夫·阿门特、迈克·麦克雷迪等。他们以社会政治议题歌词和激烈的现场演出著称，全球销量超过6000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Pearl Jam is an American rock band from Seattle, formed in 1990, and a leading figure of the 1990s grunge movement. Members include vocalist Eddie Vedder, guitarist Jeff Ament, and Mike McCready. Known for their socially and politically charged lyrics and intense live performances, they have sold over 60 million albums worldwide.

items.name: All That Remains
items.descriptionZh: 《All That Remains》是美国重金属乐队Fozzy的第三张录音室专辑，延续了其标志性的硬摇滚与重金属融合风格，充满强劲的吉他 riff 和富有感染力的旋律。专辑展现了乐队从翻唱向原创作品的转型，核心特色在于力量感十足的节奏与主唱Chris Jericho极具辨识度的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: "All That Remains" is the third studio album by American heavy metal band Fozzy, continuing their signature fusion of hard rock and heavy metal with powerful guitar riffs and infectious melodies. It marks the band's transition from covers to original material, characterized by energetic rhythms and lead vocalist Chris Jericho's distinctive voice.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Chris Jericho同时活跃于WWE摔角界，经常在巡演和比赛间隙进棚录音。吉他手Rich Ward曾透露，部分歌曲的灵感来自乐队成员在巡演大巴上的即兴 jam，其中《Enemy》的副歌就是在一次深夜行车中偶然哼唱而成。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, lead vocalist Chris Jericho was simultaneously active in WWE wrestling, often entering the studio between tours and matches. Guitarist Rich Ward revealed that some songs were inspired by impromptu jams on the tour bus, with the chorus of "Enemy" being hummed during a late-night drive.
items.artistIntroZh: Fozzy是一支美国重金属乐队，由主唱Chris Jericho和吉他手Rich Ward于1999年创立。早期以翻唱流行金属经典闻名，后逐渐转向原创，以充满张力的现场表演和硬朗的音乐风格在金属界赢得一席之地。
items.artistIntroEn: Fozzy is an American heavy metal band founded in 1999 by vocalist Chris Jericho and guitarist Rich Ward. Initially known for covers of pop-metal classics, they later shifted to original music, earning a reputation for high-energy live shows and a hard-hitting sound.

items.name: 25 Years of Disco-Pop
items.descriptionZh: 《25 Years of Disco-Pop》是德国流行乐队Modern Talking的精选纪念专辑，收录了他们最经典的迪斯科流行金曲。专辑以合成器主导的明快节奏、浪漫旋律和标志性的高亢嗓音为特色，完美再现了80年代欧陆迪斯科的黄金魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "25 Years of Disco-Pop" is a retrospective compilation album by German pop band Modern Talking, featuring their most iconic disco-pop hits. Driven by synthesizer-heavy upbeat rhythms, romantic melodies, and signature soaring vocals, it perfectly captures the golden era of 1980s Euro-disco.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是为庆祝乐队成立25周年而发行，但有趣的是，Modern Talking在1987年曾因成员矛盾解散，直到1998年才重组。精选集中特意收录了重组后的作品，与早期经典形成时空对话。制作人Dieter Bohlen曾在采访中笑称，这些歌的旋律灵感很多来自他开车时哼唱的小调。
items.storiesEn: Released to celebrate the band's 25th anniversary, the album has an interesting backstory: Modern Talking disbanded in 1987 due to member conflicts and only reunited in 1998. The compilation deliberately includes post-reunion tracks, creating a dialogue across time. Producer Dieter Bohlen once joked that many melody ideas came from humming while driving.
items.historicalImpactZh: Modern Talking定义了80年代欧陆迪斯科的标杆，其音乐风格深刻影响了后来的欧洲流行舞曲，专辑销量超过1.2亿张。
items.historicalImpactEn: Modern Talking defined the standard of 1980s Euro-disco, profoundly influencing later European pop dance music, with album sales exceeding 120 million copies.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国双人流行组合，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders于1984年成立。凭借《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》等全球热门单曲，成为史上最成功的欧陆迪斯科组合之一，以浪漫旋律和标志性假声闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo formed in 1984 by Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders. With global hits like "Brother Louie" and "Cheri Cheri Lady," they became one of the most successful Euro-disco acts of all time, known for romantic melodies and signature falsetto vocals.

items.name: Gris-Gris
items.descriptionZh: 《Gris-Gris》是美国音乐人Dr. John的处女作专辑，融合了新奥尔良节奏蓝调、巫毒仪式音乐、迷幻摇滚和爵士元素，营造出一种神秘而迷幻的南方哥特氛围。专辑以其晦涩的歌词、独特的打击乐编排和浓厚的仪式感成为迷幻音乐的里程碑之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Gris-Gris" is the debut album by American musician Dr. John, blending New Orleans R&B, voodoo ritual music, psychedelic rock, and jazz to create a mysterious, hallucinatory Southern gothic atmosphere. With its cryptic lyrics, unique percussion arrangements, and strong ritualistic feel, it became a landmark in psychedelic music.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Dr. John（本名Mac Rebennack）刚从一场严重的枪击事故中恢复，手指受伤迫使他从吉他手转型为主唱。专辑中的许多打击乐部分由他在新奥尔良街头结识的民间音乐家演奏，甚至有一位真正的巫毒教祭司参与了念咒录音。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Dr. John (born Mac Rebennack) was recovering from a severe gunshot wound that damaged his finger, forcing him to switch from guitarist to lead vocalist. Many percussion parts were played by folk musicians he met on New Orleans streets, and a real voodoo priestess participated in chanting sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是迷幻放克和南方哥特摇滚的先驱之作，对后来的The Doors、Tom Waits等艺术家产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a pioneer of psychedelic funk and Southern gothic rock, profoundly influencing later artists like The Doors and Tom Waits.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. John是美国传奇音乐人，生于新奥尔良，以融合布鲁斯、放克、爵士和巫毒主题的独特风格闻名。其舞台形象融合了巫毒教祭司与南方绅士的装扮，职业生涯跨越60余年，荣获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. John was an American legendary musician born in New Orleans, known for blending blues, funk, jazz, and voodoo themes. His stage persona combined voodoo priest and Southern gentleman, with a career spanning over 60 years and multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Illustrious
items.descriptionZh: 《Illustrious》是美国东海岸说唱歌手Big Noyd的第三张个人专辑，延续了其硬核街头叙事风格。专辑以厚重的节拍、冷峻的钢琴采样和直白的街头歌词为核心特色，展现了皇后区地下说唱的真实质感，客座艺人包括Prodigy等Mobb Deep成员。
items.descriptionEn: "Illustrious" is the third solo album by American East Coast rapper Big Noyd, continuing his hardcore street narrative style. It features heavy beats, cold piano samples, and straightforward street lyrics, showcasing the authentic grit of Queens underground rap, with guest appearances including Prodigy and other Mobb Deep members.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Big Noyd正因法律纠纷处于半隐退状态，大部分歌曲在朋友的地下室录音室完成。他与Mobb Deep成员Prodigy合作的《Recognize》原本是为对方专辑准备的曲目，因Prodigy觉得更适合Noyd的风格而让给了他，成为专辑中最受好评的单曲。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Big Noyd was semi-retired due to legal issues, with most songs recorded in a friend's basement studio. The track "Recognize" featuring Prodigy was originally intended for Prodigy's album, but he felt it suited Noyd's style better and gave it to him, making it the album's most acclaimed single.
items.artistIntroZh: Big Noyd是美国东海岸说唱歌手，来自纽约皇后区，是Mobb Deep音乐圈的核心成员之一。以硬核街头叙事和粗粝的嗓音著称，虽然个人商业成就有限，但在地下说唱界享有崇高声誉。
items.artistIntroEn: Big Noyd is an American East Coast rapper from Queens, New York, and a core member of the Mobb Deep collective. Known for hardcore street narratives and a gritty voice, he enjoys high respect in underground hip-hop despite limited commercial success.

items.name: Remapping the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Remapping the Human Soul》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High的第五张正规专辑，也是他们加入Woollim娱乐后的首张作品。专辑以宏大的管弦乐编曲、哲学性歌词和细腻的情感表达为核心特色，探讨人性、社会与存在主义主题，被誉为韩国嘻哈的史诗级作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Remapping the Human Soul" is the fifth studio album by Korean hip-hop group Epik High, and their first under Woollim Entertainment. Featuring grand orchestral arrangements, philosophical lyrics, and delicate emotional expression, it explores themes of humanity, society, and existentialism, hailed as an epic work in Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题灵感来自主创Tablo在牛津大学读书时对意识哲学的思考。录制过程中，Tablo曾因过度疲劳晕倒在录音室，醒来后继续工作。专辑中《Fan》这首歌的歌词直接引用了尼采的哲学语句，并邀请了多位古典音乐家参与管弦乐录制，制作预算远超当时韩国嘻哈专辑的平均水平。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by Tablo's studies in philosophy of consciousness at Oxford University. During recording, Tablo once collapsed from exhaustion in the studio but resumed working after waking up. The song "Fan" directly quotes Nietzsche's philosophical statements, and the orchestral parts involved multiple classical musicians, with a production budget far exceeding the average for Korean hip-hop albums at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是韩国嘻哈史上最具艺术性的作品之一，打破了嘻哈音乐在韩国主流文化中的刻板印象，提升了嘻哈歌词的文学性和思想深度。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most artistic works in Korean hip-hop history, the album broke stereotypes of hip-hop in Korean mainstream culture and elevated the literary and intellectual depth of rap lyrics.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国三人嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz于2003年成立。以诗意深刻的歌词、实验性音乐风格和社会议题探讨著称，是韩国独立嘻哈界的标志性团体，曾多次获得韩国音乐大奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean three-member hip-hop group formed in 2003 by Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for poetic and profound lyrics, experimental music, and social commentary, they are iconic figures in Korean independent hip-hop, winning numerous Korean music awards.

items.name: Octopus
items.descriptionZh: 《Octopus》是The Human League在1995年发行的专辑，风格转向电子流行与舞曲的融合，充满合成器音效与节奏感强烈的编曲。核心特色在于其明亮、略带忧郁的旋律，以及主唱Phil Oakey标志性的嗓音，呈现了乐队在90年代对电子音乐的重新探索。
items.descriptionEn: Octopus is a 1995 album by The Human League, blending electronic pop with dance rhythms, featuring prominent synthesizers and strong beats. Its core lies in bright, slightly melancholic melodies and Phil Oakey's iconic vocals, showcasing the band's 90s re-exploration of electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Octopus》时，乐队经历了成员变动，原本的六人组缩减为三人核心。为了找回早期声音，他们重新使用了模拟合成器，并在录音室中尝试即兴创作。专辑同名曲的鼓点部分是在一次深夜即兴中诞生的，制作人后来称那是“意外之喜”。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Octopus, the band underwent lineup changes, reducing to a core trio. To recapture their early sound, they reused analog synthesizers and experimented with improvisation in the studio. The drum beat for the title track emerged during a late-night jam, later described by the producer as a 'happy accident'.
items.artistIntroZh: The Human League是1977年成立于英国谢菲尔德的电子流行乐队，最初以先锋合成器音乐闻名。80年代凭借《Don't You Want Me》等单曲取得全球成功，是合成器流行和新浪潮运动的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Human League is an English electronic pop band formed in Sheffield in 1977, initially known for pioneering synth music. They achieved global success in the 80s with hits like 'Don't You Want Me' and are key representatives of synth-pop and new wave.

items.name: Got to Be There
items.descriptionZh: 《Got to Be There》是Michael Jackson在1972年发行的个人首张录音室专辑，风格以灵魂乐和流行芭乐为主。核心特色是年仅13岁的Jackson展现出的超越年龄的成熟嗓音，以及充满情感的演唱方式，奠定了其作为童星歌手的坚实基础。
items.descriptionEn: Got to Be There is Michael Jackson's debut solo studio album, released in 1972, featuring soul and pop ballads. Its core is Jackson's remarkably mature voice at age 13 and his emotive delivery, laying a solid foundation for his child star career.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Michael Jackson还在The Jackson 5中活动，只能利用���队巡演间隙进录音室。主打歌《Got to Be There》原本是为另一歌手准备，但制作人听到Michael的试唱后立刻决定留给他。录制过程非常高效，整张专辑仅用几周便完成。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album, Michael Jackson was still active in The Jackson 5, only able to enter the studio during tour breaks. The title track 'Got to Be There' was originally intended for another singer, but the producer immediately decided to keep it for Michael after hearing his demo. The recording was highly efficient, completed in just a few weeks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑开启了Michael Jackson作为独立艺人的职业生涯，为日后成为全球巨星打下基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album launched Michael Jackson's career as a solo artist, laying the groundwork for his future global superstardom.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。5岁开始演艺生涯，作为The Jackson 5成员出道，后成为史上最成功的个人艺人之一，以《Thriller》等专辑影响全球流行文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop'. Starting his career at age 5 with The Jackson 5, he became one of the most successful solo artists ever, influencing global pop culture with albums like Thriller.

items.name: Opium fürs Volk
items.descriptionZh: 《Opium fürs Volk》是德国朋克乐队Die Toten Hosen在1996年发行的专辑，风格融合了朋克摇滚、硬核和旋律性元素。核心特色是尖锐的社会批判歌词，直指政治腐败、消费主义与媒体操控，同时保持了高能量的演奏和合唱式的副歌。
items.descriptionEn: Opium fürs Volk is a 1996 album by German punk band Die Toten Hosen, blending punk rock, hardcore, and melodic elements. Its core is sharp social critique targeting political corruption, consumerism, and media manipulation, while maintaining high-energy performances and chant-like choruses.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队主唱Campino曾因歌词过于激进与制作人发生争执，但最终坚持保留了大部分原词。专辑封面设计灵感来自德国表现主义电影，拍摄时使用了大量红色烟雾，导致录音室地板被永久染色。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead singer Campino clashed with the producer over the aggressive lyrics, but ultimately insisted on keeping most of them. The album cover was inspired by German expressionist films; the photo shoot used heavy red smoke, permanently staining the studio floor.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在德国获得多白金销量��被视为90年代德语朋克摇滚的里程碑之作，影响了一代德国青年反叛文化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved multi-platinum status in Germany, regarded as a milestone of 90s German punk rock, influencing a generation of German youth counterculture.
items.artistIntroZh: Die Toten Hosen是1982年成立于德国杜塞尔多夫的朋克乐队，以德语演唱和激进政治立场著称。他们长期活跃于欧洲朋克场景，是德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一，拥有大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Die Toten Hosen is a German punk band formed in Düsseldorf in 1982, known for singing in German and radical political stances. Long active in the European punk scene, they are one of Germany's most successful rock bands with a massive loyal fanbase.

items.name: Chasing the Grail
items.descriptionZh: 《Chasing the Grail》是Fozzy在2010年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以重金属和硬摇滚为主，融合了传统重金属的 riff 与现代旋律。核心特色是主唱Chris Jericho（也是WWE摔角明星）充满力量的嗓音，以及专辑中关于神话、冒险的主题叙事。
items.descriptionEn: Chasing the Grail is Fozzy's fourth studio album, released in 2010, featuring heavy metal and hard rock with traditional metal riffs and modern melodies. Its core is lead singer Chris Jericho's powerful vocals (also a WWE wrestling star) and the album's mythological, adventure-themed narratives.
items.storiesZh: 由于Chris Jericho的摔角巡演日程，专辑录制被分割成多个短时段，有时甚至在巡演大巴上的移动录音室完成。吉他手Rich Ward曾透露，专辑中一首歌的 solo 是在后台等待上场时即兴录制的。
items.storiesEn: Due to Chris Jericho's wrestling tour schedule, the album recording was split into many short sessions, sometimes completed in a mobile studio on the tour bus. Guitarist Rich Ward revealed that a solo on the album was improvised and recorded backstage while waiting to go on stage.
items.artistIntroZh: Fozzy是美国重金属乐队，1999年由主唱Chris Jericho和吉他手Rich Ward创立。乐队早期以翻唱为主，后转向原创，凭借融合摔角明星效应与扎实音乐功底，在全球金属圈获得一定知名度。
items.artistIntroEn: Fozzy is an American heavy metal band founded in 1999 by vocalist Chris Jericho and guitarist Rich Ward. Initially a cover band, they later shifted to original music, gaining recognition in the global metal scene through Jericho's wrestling fame and solid musicianship.

items.name: Born to Die
items.descriptionZh: 《Born to Die》是Lana Del Rey在2012年发行的首张主流厂牌专辑，风格融合了巴洛克流行、梦幻流行和嘻哈元素。核心特色是其复古好莱坞式的美学、低沉慵懒的嗓音，以及歌词中对美国梦、爱情与颓废的浪漫化描绘，营造出独特的电影感氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Born to Die is Lana Del Rey's major-label debut album, released in 2012, blending baroque pop, dream pop, and hip hop elements. Its core is a retro Hollywood aesthetic, her low, languid vocals, and lyrics romanticizing the American Dream, love, and decadence, creating a unique cinematic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，Lana Del Rey因在《Saturday Night Live》的表演走音而遭受大量网络嘲讽，导致她几乎取消发行计划。但制作人说服她坚持，后来专辑首周空降英国专辑榜冠军。录制期间，她坚持使用老式麦克风，并在录音室里点蜡烛营造复古情绪。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, Lana Del Rey faced massive online mockery after an off-key performance on Saturday Night Live, nearly causing her to cancel the release. The producer convinced her to continue, and the album later debuted at No.1 on the UK Albums Chart. During recording, she insisted on using vintage microphones and lit candles in the studio to create a retro mood.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Born to Die》定义了2010年代初的“复古流行”潮流，影响了一大批歌手的美学风格，并让Lana Del Rey成为文化现象级人物。
items.historicalImpactEn: Born to Die defined the 'retro-pop' trend of the early 2010s, influencing the aesthetics of numerous artists and making Lana Del Rey a cultural phenomenon.
items.artistIntroZh: Lana Del Rey是美国歌手、词曲作者，本名Elizabeth Grant，1985年生于纽约。以电影化的歌词、复古风格和忧郁气质闻名，2010年代初期迅速崛起，成为另类流行音乐的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Lana Del Rey is an American singer-songwriter, born Elizabeth Grant in 1985 in New York. Known for her cinematic lyrics, vintage style, and melancholic persona, she rose rapidly in the early 2010s to become an iconic figure in alternative pop music.

items.name: Loose Ends
items.descriptionZh: 《Loose Ends》是吉米·亨德里克斯去世后发行的合辑，收录了他1968至1970年间未发表的录音室作品。风格融合了迷幻摇滚、布鲁斯和实验性即兴，展现了亨德里克斯在吉他音色与录音技术上的大胆探索，音质粗糙但极具原始能量。
items.descriptionEn: Loose Ends is a posthumous compilation of Jimi Hendrix's unreleased studio recordings from 1968 to 1970. Blending psychedelic rock, blues, and experimental improvisation, it showcases his bold exploration of guitar tones and recording techniques, with raw sound quality yet immense primal energy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的母带曾长期散落在不同收藏家手中，部分曲目如《Little Miss Strange》的原始混音版本直到1990年代才被正式修复。录制时亨德里克斯经常即兴拆卸吉他拾音器，试图获得更独特的反馈音效。
items.storiesEn: The master tapes were scattered among various collectors for years; the original mix of tracks like 'Little Miss Strange' wasn't officially restored until the 1990s. During sessions, Hendrix often improvised by dismantling guitar pickups to achieve more distinctive feedback effects.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为亨德里克斯去世后早期发行的合辑之一，它让乐迷得以一窥其未竟的创作实验，对后世吉他手理解其即兴逻辑具有文献价值。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the early posthumous compilations, it offered fans a glimpse into his unfinished creative experiments and holds documentary value for later guitarists understanding his improvisational logic.
items.artistIntroZh: 吉米·亨德里克斯（1942-1970）被誉为摇滚史上最伟大的电吉他手之一。他颠覆性的演奏技巧和舞台表现力重新定义了吉他的可能性，尽管职业生涯仅持续四年，却深刻影响了摇滚、布鲁斯和放克音乐的发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Jimi Hendrix (1942–1970) is hailed as one of the greatest electric guitarists in rock history. His revolutionary playing techniques and stage presence redefined the guitar's possibilities; though his career lasted only four years, he profoundly influenced rock, blues, and funk.

items.name: Lost & Found 1961–1962
items.descriptionZh: 《Lost & Found 1961–1962》收录了海滩男孩在正式出道前录制的早期小样和未发行曲目，风格以冲浪摇滚和嘟·喔普为主，和声稚嫩但充满青春朝气，是研究乐队早期音乐根源的珍贵档案。
items.descriptionEn: Lost & Found 1961–1962 collects early demos and unreleased tracks recorded by The Beach Boys before their official debut. Stylistically rooted in surf rock and doo-wop, the harmonies are raw yet brimming with youthful energy, offering a precious archive of the band's early musical roots.
items.storiesZh: 这些录音最初保存在乐队成员布莱恩·威尔逊的阁楼里，部分磁带已严重受潮。1990年修复时，工程师不得不使用特制干燥剂处理。其中一首《Surfin' Safari》的早期版本显示，他们曾尝试加入手风琴伴奏。
items.storiesEn: These recordings were originally stored in Brian Wilson's attic, some tapes severely damaged by moisture. During restoration in 1990, engineers had to use special desiccants. An early version of 'Surfin' Safari' shows they once experimented with accordion accompaniment.
items.artistIntroZh: 海滩男孩成立于1961年，以精妙的和声与冲浪摇滚闻名。在布莱恩·威尔逊的带领下，他们逐渐从阳光少年转向复杂的艺术探索，成为美国1960年代最具影响力的流行乐队之一，对后世和声编配影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1961, The Beach Boys are renowned for their intricate harmonies and surf rock sound. Led by Brian Wilson, they evolved from sunny teen pop to complex artistic exploration, becoming one of the most influential American pop bands of the 1960s with lasting impact on vocal arrangement.

items.name: A Trick of the Tail
items.descriptionZh: 《A Trick of the Tail》是创世纪乐队在核心成员彼得·加布里埃尔离队后的首张专辑，风格转向更流畅的前卫摇滚，融合了交响乐元素与奇幻歌词。菲尔·柯林斯首次担任主唱，音乐结构精妙，旋律优美。
items.descriptionEn: A Trick of the Tail is Genesis's first album after the departure of core member Peter Gabriel. The style shifts toward smoother progressive rock, blending symphonic elements with fantastical lyrics. Phil Collins debuts as lead vocalist, with intricate structures and beautiful melodies.
items.storiesZh: 由于加布里埃尔突然离队，乐队曾考虑解散。鼓手菲尔·柯林斯在试唱《Squonk》时意外获得全票通过，从此从幕后走到台前。录制期间，键盘手托尼·班克斯使用了一台早期合成器，需要手动调线才能改变音色。
items.storiesEn: After Gabriel's sudden departure, the band considered disbanding. Drummer Phil Collins unexpectedly won unanimous approval when he auditioned vocals for 'Squonk,' stepping from behind the kit to the front. During sessions, keyboardist Tony Banks used an early synthesizer that required manual patching to change sounds.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑成功证明了创世纪在没有加布里埃尔的情况下仍能保持艺术水准，开启了乐队商业上最成功的阶段，也确立了菲尔·柯林斯作为主唱的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album successfully proved Genesis could maintain artistic quality without Gabriel, launching their most commercially successful era and establishing Phil Collins as lead vocalist.
items.artistIntroZh: 创世纪乐队成立于1967年，是前卫摇滚运动的代表之一。历经多次成员变动，他们在1970至1980年代创作了一系列概念专辑，以复杂的编曲和戏剧化表演著称，对后世前卫音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1967, Genesis is a flagship band of the progressive rock movement. Through numerous lineup changes, they created a series of concept albums in the 1970s–1980s, known for complex arrangements and theatrical performances, profoundly influencing later progressive music.

items.name: Killers
items.descriptionZh: 《Killers》是铁娘子乐队的第二张录音室专辑，延续了早期英国重金属新浪潮的迅猛风格，双吉他旋律凌厉，贝斯线条突出。主唱保罗·迪安诺的嗓音尖锐而富有攻击性，歌词多涉��战争、死亡与神秘主题。
items.descriptionEn: Killers is Iron Maiden's second studio album, continuing the aggressive sound of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal. Twin guitar harmonies are sharp, bass lines prominent. Vocalist Paul Di'Anno's voice is piercing and aggressive, with lyrics often touching on war, death, and mystery.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由德里克·里格斯设计，首次引入了乐队吉祥物“埃迪”的完整形象。录制时乐队预算紧张，吉他手戴夫·默里不得不借用自己的音箱。其中《Murders in the Rue Morgue》的灵感来自爱伦·坡的同名小说。
items.storiesEn: The album cover by Derek Riggs introduced the band's mascot 'Eddie' in full form. With a tight budget, guitarist Dave Murray had to borrow his own amplifier for recording. 'Murders in the Rue Morgue' was inspired by Edgar Allan Poe's story of the same name.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了铁娘子在重金属领域的地位，其封面艺术和音乐风格成为NWOBHM运动的标志性符号，影响了后来无数重金属乐队的视觉与音乐方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Iron Maiden's status in heavy metal; its cover art and musical style became iconic symbols of the NWOBHM movement, influencing countless later heavy metal bands in both visual and musical directions.
items.artistIntroZh: 铁娘子乐队1975年成立于伦敦，是英国重金属新浪潮中最成功的代表之一。以双吉他攻势、史诗般的歌曲结构和标志性吉祥物“埃迪”闻名，至今已发行超过40张专辑，全球销量过亿。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in London in 1975, Iron Maiden is one of the most successful representatives of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal. Known for dual-guitar attacks, epic song structures, and mascot 'Eddie,' they have released over 40 albums and sold over 100 million copies worldwide.

items.name: I-Magination
items.descriptionZh: 《I-Magination》是奥井雅美的第11张原创专辑，风格以J-Pop为主，融合了电子舞曲和摇滚元素。歌词充满励志与幻想色彩，编曲层次丰富，展现了她在声乐技巧和音乐制作上的成熟掌控力。
items.descriptionEn: I-Magination is Masami Okui's 11th original album, primarily J-Pop blended with electronic dance and rock elements. Lyrics are uplifting and fantastical, arrangements richly layered, showcasing her mature control over vocal techniques and music production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《I-Magination》的MV拍摄于一个废弃的游乐园，奥井雅美在旋转木马上演唱时差点因设备故障摔下来。录制过程中，她坚持使用模拟合成器以获得更温暖的音色，并亲自参与了所有歌曲的编曲。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the title track 'I-Magination' was shot in an abandoned amusement park; Masami Okui nearly fell off a carousel due to equipment malfunction. During recording, she insisted on using analog synthesizers for warmer tones and personally participated in arranging all songs.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美是日本著名的女性歌手兼词曲作者，1968年出生。自1990年代出道以来，她为多部动漫演唱主题曲，以高亢有力的嗓音和充满活力的舞台表演著称，被誉为“动漫歌曲女王”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a renowned Japanese singer-songwriter, born in 1968. Since her debut in the 1990s, she has performed theme songs for numerous anime, known for her powerful, soaring vocals and energetic stage presence, hailed as one of the 'Queens of Anime Songs.'

items.name: Walking on a Thin Line
items.descriptionZh: 《Walking on a Thin Line》是德国另类摇滚乐队Guano Apes的第三张录音室专辑，融合了硬摇滚、放克和电子元素。主唱Sandra Nasić极具爆发力的嗓音在充满张力的吉他Riff和律动感十足的节奏中游走，营造出一种危险而迷人的边缘感。整张专辑既保留了乐队早期的狂放不羁，又展现了更成熟的旋律把控力。
items.descriptionEn: Walking on a Thin Line is the third studio album by German alternative rock band Guano Apes, blending hard rock, funk, and electronic elements. Vocalist Sandra Nasić's explosive voice navigates through tense guitar riffs and rhythmic grooves, creating a dangerous yet captivating edge. The album retains the band's early wildness while showcasing more mature melodic control.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满实验性，乐队在德国汉堡的录音室里尝试了大量即兴创作。吉他手Henning Rümenapp曾透露，主打歌《You Can't Stop Me》的副歌部分是在一次深夜录音时，大家即兴哼唱的旋律被意外录下，最终成为全曲最亮眼的部分。此外，专辑封面由主唱Sandra亲自设计，灵感来自她某次梦境中的扭曲线条。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was highly experimental, with the band improvising extensively in a Hamburg studio. Guitarist Henning Rümenapp revealed that the chorus of the lead single 'You Can't Stop Me' was accidentally recorded during a late-night jam session, and later became the highlight of the song. The album cover was designed by vocalist Sandra, inspired by twisted lines from one of her dreams.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Guano Apes商业上最成功的作品之一，在欧洲多国进入排行榜前十，巩固了他们作为德国另类摇滚代表乐队的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is one of Guano Apes' most commercially successful works, charting in the top ten in several European countries and cementing their status as representatives of German alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Guano Apes是一支成立于1994年的德国另类摇滚乐队，以女主唱Sandra Nasić狂野而富有穿透力的嗓音著称。他们的音乐融合了摇滚、放克和电子元素，1997年凭借单曲《Open Your Eyes》一举成名。乐队在2005年解散前共发行了三张专辑，影响了一代欧洲摇滚乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Guano Apes is a German alternative rock band formed in 1994, known for vocalist Sandra Nasić's wild and piercing voice. Their music blends rock, funk, and electronic elements. They rose to fame in 1997 with the single 'Open Your Eyes' and released three albums before disbanding in 2005, influencing a generation of European rock fans.

items.name: Innuendo
items.descriptionZh: 《Innuendo》是英国传奇摇滚乐队Queen的第十四张录音室专辑，也是主唱Freddie Mercury生前参与的最后一张作品。专辑风格横跨前卫摇滚、弗拉门戈和硬摇滚，同名曲《Innuendo》长达六分半钟，以华丽的编曲和史诗般的吉他独奏展现了乐队巅峰期的创造力。整张专辑充满了对生命、死亡与艺术的深刻思考。
items.descriptionEn: Innuendo is the fourteenth studio album by legendary British rock band Queen, and the last to feature lead vocalist Freddie Mercury during his lifetime. The album spans progressive rock, flamenco, and hard rock. The epic title track 'Innuendo' runs over six and a half minutes, showcasing the band's peak creativity with lavish arrangements and a monumental guitar solo. The album is deeply reflective on life, death, and art.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Innuendo》时，Freddie Mercury的健康状况已严重恶化，但他坚持在录音室里全情投入。吉他手Brian May回忆，Freddie在录制《The Show Must Go On》时，几乎无法站立，却用尽最后力气唱出高亢的副歌，在场所有人无不落泪。专辑中的弗拉门戈段落由Brian May和John Deacon在西班牙吉他手即兴伴奏下完成，是一次意外的风格突破。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Innuendo, Freddie Mercury's health had severely deteriorated, but he insisted on giving his all in the studio. Guitarist Brian May recalled that while recording 'The Show Must Go On,' Freddie could barely stand but mustered the strength to belt out the soaring chorus, moving everyone present to tears. The flamenco section in the title track was improvised with a Spanish guitarist, marking an unexpected stylistic breakthrough.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Innuendo》被公认为Queen最被低估的杰作之一，在Freddie Mercury去世后，这张专辑成为他艺术勇气的最后见证，影响深远。
items.historicalImpactEn: Innuendo is widely regarded as one of Queen's most underrated masterpieces. After Freddie Mercury's death, it became a lasting testament to his artistic courage and has had a profound influence.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是1970年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由主唱Freddie Mercury、吉他手Brian May、鼓手Roger Taylor和贝斯手John Deacon组成。他们以华丽的舞台表演、复杂的和声和融合多种风格的曲风闻名，代表作包括《Bohemian Rhapsody》和《We Will Rock You》。截至今日，Queen全球唱片销量超过3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), Roger Taylor (drums), and John Deacon (bass). Known for their extravagant stage shows, complex harmonies, and genre-blending style, their iconic hits include 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'We Will Rock You.' Queen has sold over 300 million records worldwide.

items.name: Lovers Live
items.descriptionZh: 《Lovers Live》是英国灵魂乐与爵士乐队Sade的首张现场专辑，收录了2001年巡回演出的精华。Sade Adu慵懒而优雅的嗓音在温暖的爵士、灵魂乐和轻柔放克氛围中流淌，现场演绎比录音室版本更具情感冲击力。这张专辑完美捕捉了乐队现场表演的亲密感与戏剧性张力。
items.descriptionEn: Lovers Live is the first live album by British soul and jazz band Sade, capturing highlights from their 2001 tour. Sade Adu's languid yet elegant voice flows through warm jazz, soul, and gentle funk atmospheres, delivering more emotional impact than the studio versions. The album perfectly captures the intimacy and dramatic tension of the band's live performances.
items.storiesZh: 这张现场专辑录制于全球巡演的多站演出，但大部分素材取自巴黎和伦敦的场次。Sade Adu在舞台上极少与观众互动，却能用她独特的肢体语言和眼神传递情感。据乐队成员回忆，在演唱《By Your Side》时，全场观众自发点亮打火机，Sade一度感动到哽咽，这段录音被完整保留下来。
items.storiesEn: The live album was recorded across multiple stops of the world tour, but most material came from shows in Paris and London. Sade Adu rarely interacts with the audience on stage, yet conveys emotion through her unique body language and gaze. Band members recall that during 'By Your Side,' the entire audience lit lighters, moving Sade to tears—the recording of that moment was kept intact.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Sade唯一一张官方现场专辑，《Lovers Live》为乐迷提供了无法复制的现场体验记录，巩固了乐队在灵魂乐领域的经典地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Sade's only official live album, Lovers Live provides an irreplicable record of their live experience, cementing the band's classic status in soul music.
items.artistIntroZh: Sade是一支成立于1982年的英国乐队，以主唱Sade Adu的名字命名。他们的音乐融合了灵魂乐、爵士、轻柔放克和成人当代风格，以Sade Adu低沉而丝滑的嗓音著称。乐队全球唱片销量超过7500万张，曾获格莱美奖，代表作包括《Smooth Operator》和《No Ordinary Love》。
items.artistIntroEn: Sade is a British band formed in 1982, named after lead vocalist Sade Adu. Their music blends soul, jazz, soft funk, and adult contemporary, known for Sade Adu's low, silky voice. The band has sold over 75 million records worldwide, won Grammy Awards, and their hits include 'Smooth Operator' and 'No Ordinary Love.'

items.name: Strings to a Web
items.descriptionZh: 《Strings to a Web》是德国重金属乐队Rage的第十八张录音室专辑，延续了他们标志性的力量金属与速度金属风格，并加入了大量交响乐元素。专辑以宏大的管弦乐编排为背景，配合主唱Peavy Wagner高亢的嗓音和凌厉的吉他连复段，营造出史诗般的战争与神话氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Strings to a Web is the eighteenth studio album by German heavy metal band Rage, continuing their signature power and speed metal style with extensive symphonic elements. Set against grand orchestral arrangements, the album features vocalist Peavy Wagner's soaring voice and sharp guitar riffs, creating an epic atmosphere of war and mythology.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Rage与捷克国家交响乐团合作的成果，录制过程极具挑战。乐队在布拉格录制管弦乐部分时，指挥家要求每个乐段都精确到毫秒，与金属乐队的节奏完美同步。主唱Peavy回忆，有一次交响乐团突然即兴加入了一段原本没有的旋律，大家觉得效果惊人，最终决定保留在成品中。
items.storiesEn: The album was a collaboration with the Czech National Symphony Orchestra, making the recording process highly challenging. While recording the orchestral parts in Prague, the conductor demanded millisecond precision to synchronize with the metal band's rhythms. Vocalist Peavy recalled one instance where the orchestra spontaneously improvised an extra melody, which sounded so amazing that it was kept in the final mix.
items.artistIntroZh: Rage是一支成立于1984年的德国重金属乐队，由主唱兼贝斯手Peavy Wagner领衔。他们以速度金属和力量金属为核心，常融入古典音乐元素，与多支交响乐团合作。Rage是德国重金属界的长青树，至今已发行超过二十张专辑，在全球金属乐迷中享有崇高声誉。
items.artistIntroEn: Rage is a German heavy metal band formed in 1984, led by vocalist/bassist Peavy Wagner. Their core style is speed and power metal, often incorporating classical elements and collaborating with symphony orchestras. A stalwart of the German metal scene, Rage has released over twenty albums and enjoys a high reputation among metal fans worldwide.

items.name: ...Where the Shadows Lie
items.descriptionZh: 《...Where the Shadows Lie》是芬兰旋律死亡/力量金属乐队Battlelore的首张专辑，以J.R.R.托尔金的中土世界为创作主题。音乐融合了力量金属的激昂旋律、死亡金属的粗粝嘶吼以及芬兰民谣的悠扬元素，双主唱（清嗓与死嗓）的交替演绎为史诗故事增添了戏剧张力。
items.descriptionEn: ...Where the Shadows Lie is the debut album by Finnish melodic death/power metal band Battlelore, themed around J.R.R. Tolkien's Middle-earth. The music blends the soaring melodies of power metal, the harsh growls of death metal, and Finnish folk elements. The dual vocalists (clean and death growls) alternate to add dramatic tension to the epic storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于芬兰赫尔辛基的一家小型录音室，预算极其有限。乐队成员白天打工，晚上通宵录音。吉他手兼主创Jussi Rautio曾表示，为了还原托尔金笔下的黑暗森林氛围，他们在录音室里用铁链拖地、敲击金属片来制造诡异音效。专辑封面由芬兰知名奇幻画家绘制，但最初被乐队拒绝，后来在唱片公司要求下才勉强采用。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small studio in Helsinki, Finland, on a very tight budget. Band members worked day jobs and recorded all night. Guitarist and main songwriter Jussi Rautio said that to recreate the dark forest atmosphere of Tolkien's world, they dragged chains across the floor and struck metal sheets in the studio. The cover art was painted by a well-known Finnish fantasy artist, but the band initially rejected it, only accepting it at the label's insistence.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是托尔金题材金属音乐的先驱之作，为后续众多中土世界主题的金属乐队开辟了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a pioneering work in Tolkien-themed metal music, paving the way for many subsequent Middle-earth-inspired metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Battlelore是一支成立于1999年的芬兰旋律死亡/力量金属乐队，以托尔金的中土世界传说为唯一创作核心。他们以双主唱、重键盘和民谣元素为特色，在欧洲金属界独树一帜。至今已发行七张专辑，是全球托尔金乐迷和金属乐迷心中的 cult 乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Battlelore is a Finnish melodic death/power metal band formed in 1999, exclusively themed around J.R.R. Tolkien's Middle-earth legends. Known for dual vocals, heavy keyboards, and folk elements, they stand out in the European metal scene. The band has released seven albums and is a cult favorite among Tolkien fans and metalheads worldwide.

items.name: Electroretard
items.descriptionZh: 《Electroretard》是Melvins在2001年发行的一张实验性专辑，融合了 sludge metal、noise rock 和 avant-garde 元素。专辑以扭曲的吉他音色、缓慢而沉重的节奏以及极具冲击力的声效为特色，展现了乐队对声音边界的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Electroretard is an experimental album by Melvins released in 2001, blending sludge metal, noise rock, and avant-garde elements. It features distorted guitar tones, slow heavy rhythms, and impactful sound effects, showcasing the band's exploration of sonic boundaries.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是Melvins为Ipecac Recordings录制的，但录制过程中鼓手Dale Crover的鼓组被意外损坏，导致部分曲目不得不使用电子鼓完成。乐队成员曾开玩笑说，专辑名“Electroretard”是对电子音乐的一种戏谑。
items.storiesEn: This album was originally recorded for Ipecac Recordings, but during the sessions, drummer Dale Crover's drum kit was accidentally damaged, forcing some tracks to be completed with electronic drums. Band members joked that the title 'Electroretard' was a playful jab at electronic music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Melvins实验性阶段的代表作之一，影响了后来的 sludge 和 noise rock 乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as a key work in Melvins' experimental phase, influencing later sludge and noise rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Melvins是一支来自美国的摇滚乐队，成立于1983年，以融合 sludge metal、punk 和 avant-garde 风格而闻名。他们被认为是 grunge 和 sludge metal 的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Melvins are an American rock band formed in 1983, known for blending sludge metal, punk, and avant-garde styles. They are considered pioneers of grunge and sludge metal.

items.name: Ōoku
items.descriptionZh: 《Ōoku》是奥井雅美在2008年发行的概念专辑，以日本江户时代的大奥为背景，融合了 J-pop、摇滚和交响乐元素。专辑通过华丽的编曲和戏剧性的演唱，描绘了权力与情感的交织。
items.descriptionEn: Ōoku is a concept album by Masami Okui released in 2008, set in the Edo-period Ōoku (inner palace). It blends J-pop, rock, and symphonic elements, using lavish arrangements and dramatic vocals to depict the interplay of power and emotion.
items.storiesZh: 奥井雅美为了创作这张专辑，专门研究了江户时代的历史资料，并邀请了多位古典音乐家参与录音。专辑中的一首曲目原本计划用尺八（日��竹笛）演奏，但因��音棚时间冲突改为合成器。
items.storiesEn: To create this album, Masami Okui researched Edo-period history and invited several classical musicians to participate. One track was originally planned to feature a shakuhachi (Japanese bamboo flute), but was switched to a synthesizer due to studio scheduling conflicts.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美是日本著名的女性歌手和词曲作者，出生于1968年。她以演唱动画主题曲而闻名，如《少女革命》和《秀逗魔导士》等，声音充满力量与情感。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a renowned Japanese singer and songwriter born in 1968. Known for anime theme songs like Revolutionary Girl Utena and Slayers, her voice is powerful and emotional.

items.name: A Different Kind of Truth
items.descriptionZh: 《A Different Kind of Truth》是Van Halen在2012年发行的第12张录音室专辑，也是他们与主唱David Lee Roth自1984年后的首次合作。专辑回归了70年代末80年代初的硬摇滚风格，充满吉他 riffs 和活力四射的演唱。
items.descriptionEn: A Different Kind of Truth is Van Halen's 12th studio album, released in 2012, marking their first collaboration with lead singer David Lee Roth since 1984. The album returns to the hard rock style of the late 70s and early 80s, with guitar riffs and energetic vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Eddie Van Halen 使用了一把特制的吉他，名为“Frankenstrat”，这把吉他曾在他早期专辑中使用。此外，部分歌曲的灵感来自乐队1970年代的未发表小样，经过重新编排后收录。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Eddie Van Halen used a custom guitar called 'Frankenstrat,' which he had used on earlier albums. Some songs were inspired by unreleased demos from the 1970s, reworked and included on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Van Halen在David Lee Roth回归后的唯一一张录音室专辑，标志着乐队经典阵容的短暂重聚，对硬摇滚复兴有一定影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This is the only studio album by Van Halen after David Lee Roth's return, marking a brief reunion of the classic lineup and contributing to the hard rock revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Van Halen是一支美国硬摇滚乐队，成立于1972年，以其精湛的吉他技巧和舞台表演而闻名。主唱David Lee Roth和吉他手Eddie Van Halen是乐队的核心人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Van Halen is an American hard rock band formed in 1972, known for virtuosic guitar work and stage performance. David Lee Roth and Eddie Van Halen are the band's core figures.

items.name: Thug Brothers
items.descriptionZh: 《Thug Brothers》是Layzie Bone在2006年发行的说唱专辑，风格以中西部G-funk和硬核说唱为主。专辑节奏沉重，歌词聚焦街头生活和帮派文化，展现了Layzie Bone作为Bone Thugs-n-Harmony成员的个人风格。
items.descriptionEn: Thug Brothers is a rap album by Layzie Bone released in 2006, featuring Midwest G-funk and hardcore rap. With heavy beats and lyrics focused on street life and gang culture, it showcases Layzie Bone's personal style as a member of Bone Thugs-n-Harmony.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Layzie Bone与多位地下说唱歌手合作的项目，录制过程中他曾因歌词内容与制作人产生分歧，但最终保留了大部分原始版本。专辑封面由他的兄弟设计，灵感来自他们童年的涂鸦。
items.storiesEn: This album was a collaboration project with several underground rappers. During recording, Layzie Bone had disagreements with the producer over lyrical content, but most original versions were kept. The cover was designed by his brother, inspired by childhood graffiti.
items.artistIntroZh: Layzie Bone（本名Steven Howse）是美国说唱歌手，Bone Thugs-n-Harmony成员���一。他以其流畅的Flow和快速的说唱风格而闻名，个人作品多聚焦街头主题。
items.artistIntroEn: Layzie Bone (born Steven Howse) is an American rapper and member of Bone Thugs-n-Harmony. Known for his smooth flow and rapid delivery, his solo work often focuses on street themes.

items.name: Thug Brothers
items.descriptionZh: 《Thug Brothers》是Young Noble在2006年发行的说唱专辑，延续了Outlawz的硬核西海岸风格。专辑以社会批判和街头叙事为核心，结合了G-funk和匪帮说唱的经典元素。
items.descriptionEn: Thug Brothers is a rap album by Young Noble released in 2006, continuing the hardcore West Coast style of Outlawz. Centered on social critique and street narratives, it blends classic G-funk and gangsta rap elements.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于亚利桑那州的一间地下室录音棚，Young Noble 曾透露部分曲目是在一天内完成的即兴创作。专辑中有一首致敬2Pac的歌曲，录制时他一度情绪失控。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a basement studio in Arizona. Young Noble revealed that some tracks were improvised and completed in a single day. One song paying tribute to 2Pac caused him to become emotional during recording.
items.artistIntroZh: Young Noble（本名Rufus Cooper III）是美国说唱歌手，Outlawz成员之一。他以其硬核风格和对社会议题的关注而知名，深受已故说唱歌手2Pac的影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Young Noble (born Rufus Cooper III) is an American rapper and member of Outlawz. Known for his hardcore style and focus on social issues, he is heavily influenced by the late rapper 2Pac.

items.name: Thriller 25
items.descriptionZh: 《Thriller 25》是迈克尔·杰克逊为纪念其经典专辑《Thriller》发行25周年而推出的特别版本。这张专辑在原作基础上加入了全新的混音、未发行曲目以及当代艺人的合作，融合了流行、放克、迪斯科和摇滚元素。核心特色在于其跨越时代的制作水准与极具感染力的节奏，既保留了原版的辉煌，又注入了21世纪的新鲜活力。
items.descriptionEn: Thriller 25 is a special edition released by Michael Jackson to commemorate the 25th anniversary of his classic album Thriller. It features new remixes, previously unreleased tracks, and collaborations with contemporary artists, blending pop, funk, disco, and rock. Its core characteristic lies in its timeless production and infectious rhythms, preserving the original glory while injecting fresh 21st-century energy.
items.storiesZh: 在制作这张专辑时，迈克尔·杰克逊邀请了多位当红艺人参与合作，包括Akon、Fergie和Kanye West。其中，Akon为《Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'》的混音版贡献了全新的演唱部分，而Kanye West则重新制作了《Billie Jean》。有趣的是，迈克尔本人对混音过程极为投入，经常在录音室工作到深夜，亲自调整每一段编曲细节。此外，专辑中还收录了一首未发行的曲目《For All Time》，这首歌曲原本录制于《Thriller》原版时期，直到25年后才首次公开。
items.storiesEn: During the production of this album, Michael Jackson invited several popular artists to collaborate, including Akon, Fergie, and Kanye West. Akon contributed new vocals to the remix of 'Wanna Be Startin' Somethin',' while Kanye West reworked 'Billie Jean.' Interestingly, Michael was deeply involved in the remixing process, often staying in the studio until late at night to fine-tune every arrangement detail. Additionally, the album includes an unreleased track, 'For All Time,' which was originally recorded during the Thriller sessions but was not released until 25 years later.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为史上最畅销专辑的纪念版，《Thriller 25》进一步巩固了迈克尔·杰克逊作为流行之王的地位，并推动了经典专辑再版与混音文化的商业成功。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a commemorative edition of the best-selling album of all time, Thriller 25 further solidified Michael Jackson's status as the King of Pop and boosted the commercial success of classic album reissues and remix culture.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（1958-2009）是美国流行歌手、词曲作者和舞蹈家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他的音乐融合了多种风格，包括流行、放克、摇滚和灵魂乐。其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）以及极具视觉冲击力的音乐视频，使他成为20世纪最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, songwriter, and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop.' His music blended pop, funk, rock, and soul. With his distinctive voice, iconic dance moves (such as the moonwalk), and visually groundbreaking music videos, he became one of the most influential artists of the 20th century.

items.name: Live!! Final Attack at Budokan
items.descriptionZh: 《Live!! Final Attack at Budokan》是日本重金属乐队Sex Machineguns于2003年发行的现场专辑，记录了他们在日本武道馆的告别演出。这张专辑以极速的吉他演奏、高亢的嗓音和疯狂的舞台互动为特色，融合了速度金属、力量金属与朋克元素。核心特色在于其爆炸性的现场能量和乐队标志性的幽默感，展现了日本地下金属乐的极致狂热。
items.descriptionEn: Live!! Final Attack at Budokan is a live album by Japanese heavy metal band Sex Machineguns, released in 2003, capturing their farewell performance at Nippon Budokan. The album features lightning-fast guitar playing, high-pitched vocals, and wild stage interaction, blending speed metal, power metal, and punk elements. Its core characteristic is the explosive live energy and the band's signature humor, showcasing the extreme fervor of Japanese underground metal.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出原本是乐队宣布解散前的最后一场大型演唱会。在演出过程中，吉他手兼主唱Anchang多次激动落泪，但依然以惊人的速度完成了高难度曲目。有趣的是，乐队在安可环节突然翻唱了日本童谣《故乡》，引发全场大合唱，将原本悲壮的氛围瞬间变得温情。此外，由于现场过于狂热，多名观众在pogo时撞坏了护栏，但无人受伤。
items.storiesEn: This performance was originally the band's final major concert before their disbandment. During the show, guitarist and vocalist Anchang broke down in tears several times but still managed to perform high-speed, technically demanding songs. Interestingly, during the encore, the band suddenly covered the Japanese folk song 'Furusato,' sparking a massive sing-along that transformed the originally solemn atmosphere into a warm one. Additionally, due to the intense crowd energy, several barriers were broken during the mosh pit, but no one was injured.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为日本速度金属领域的里程碑式现场录音，对后来日本金属乐队的现场表现力产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a milestone live recording in the Japanese speed metal scene, profoundly influencing the stage performance of later Japanese metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Sex Machineguns是日本一支以高速吉他演奏和幽默风格著称的重金属乐队，成立于1996年。乐队以吉他手兼主唱Anchang为核心，音乐风格融合了速度金属、力量金属和朋克，歌词常带有戏谑和讽刺色彩。他们在日本地下金属圈拥有极高人气，以其疯狂的现场演出闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Sex Machineguns is a Japanese heavy metal band formed in 1996, known for their fast guitar playing and humorous style. Centered around guitarist and vocalist Anchang, their music blends speed metal, power metal, and punk, with lyrics often featuring satire and jest. They enjoy immense popularity in the Japanese underground metal scene and are famous for their wild live performances.

items.name: Lonesome Crow
items.descriptionZh: 《Lonesome Crow》是德国摇滚乐队Scorpions的首张录音室专辑，发行于1972年。这张专辑展现了一种迷幻、前卫的硬摇滚风格，带有浓厚的布鲁斯和迷幻氛围。核心��色在于其冗长的即兴演奏段落、沉重的吉他音色以及主唱Klaus Meine尚未完全定型的高亢嗓音，为乐队后来的重金属风格奠定了实验性基础。
items.descriptionEn: Lonesome Crow is the debut studio album by German rock band Scorpions, released in 1972. The album showcases a psychedelic, progressive hard rock style with a strong blues and psychedelic atmosphere. Its core characteristics are extended improvisational passages, heavy guitar tones, and lead singer Klaus Meine's not-yet-fully-formed high-pitched vocals, laying an experimental foundation for the band's later heavy metal sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程颇为艰难。由于乐队当时预算有限，他们不得不在一间简陋的地下室录音室进行录制，设备也十分陈旧。吉他手Rudolf Schenker回忆说，录音时经常因为电压不稳而中断，有时甚至需要用手动方式调整磁带速度。此外，专辑封面最初设计是一只孤独的乌鸦，但后来因为印刷错误，乌鸦看起来像一只变形的鸡，这个意外反而成为了乐迷们津津乐道的趣闻。
items.storiesEn: The recording process of this album was quite challenging. Due to the band's limited budget, they had to record in a shabby basement studio with outdated equipment. Guitarist Rudolf Schenker recalled that recording sessions were often interrupted by unstable voltage, and sometimes they had to manually adjust tape speed. Additionally, the album cover originally featured a lone crow, but a printing error made the crow look like a deformed chicken—this accident became a fun anecdote among fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions是德国最著名的重金属乐队之一，成立于1965年。他们的音乐风格从早期的迷幻硬摇滚逐渐演变为重金属，以其标志性的高亢嗓音、双吉他旋律和充满力量的抒情曲闻名。乐队在全球售出超过1亿张唱片，代表作包括《Wind of Change》和《Rock You Like a Hurricane》。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions are one of Germany's most famous heavy metal bands, formed in 1965. Their music evolved from early psychedelic hard rock to heavy metal, known for their signature high-pitched vocals, twin-guitar melodies, and powerful ballads. The band has sold over 100 million records worldwide, with iconic songs including 'Wind of Change' and 'Rock You Like a Hurricane.'

items.name: Franz Ferdinand
items.descriptionZh: 《Franz Ferdinand》是苏格兰独立摇滚乐队Franz Ferdinand的同名首张专辑，发行于2004年。这张专辑融合了后朋克、新浪潮和车库摇滚元素，以尖锐的吉他Riff、跳跃的贝斯线和冷峻的鼓点为核心特色。其音乐充满舞蹈节奏与艺术气息，歌词机智而俏皮，被公认为21世纪初英国独立摇滚复兴运动的标志性作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Franz Ferdinand is the self-titled debut album by Scottish indie rock band Franz Ferdinand, released in 2004. The album blends post-punk, new wave, and garage rock, characterized by sharp guitar riffs, bouncing basslines, and crisp drumming. Its music is danceable and artistic, with witty and playful lyrics, widely regarded as a landmark work of the early 2000s British indie rock revival.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的热门单曲《Take Me Out》的吉他Riff实际上是主唱Alex Kapranos在排练时即兴弹奏出来的，当时其他成员觉得这个旋律太“古怪”，但最终决定保留。录制过程中，乐队为了追求一种“粗糙但精致”的声音，故意使用老式模拟设备，甚至将麦克风放在破旧的地毯上以获得特殊的音色。专辑封面设计灵感来自俄罗斯构成主义艺术，由乐队成员亲自参与构思，最终选择了黑白红三色的几何图案。
items.storiesEn: The guitar riff for the hit single 'Take Me Out' was actually improvised by lead singer Alex Kapranos during a rehearsal. The other band members initially thought the melody was too 'weird' but eventually decided to keep it. During recording, the band deliberately used vintage analog equipment to achieve a 'rough but polished' sound, even placing microphones on worn-out carpets for a unique tone. The album cover was inspired by Russian Constructivist art, with the band members contributing to the concept, ultimately choosing a geometric pattern in black, white, and red.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑推动了21世纪初的英国后朋克复兴浪潮，并激励了随后一大批独立摇滚乐队，如Arctic Monkeys和The Killers。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album fueled the early 2000s post-punk revival in the UK and inspired a wave of subsequent indie rock bands, such as Arctic Monkeys and The Killers.
items.artistIntroZh: Franz Ferdinand是一支苏格兰独立摇滚乐队，成立于2002年。他们的音乐以简洁有力的吉他节奏、艺术化的歌词和充满活力的现场表演著称。乐队名字来源于奥匈帝国大公弗朗茨·斐迪南，其首张专辑在全球获得巨大成功，赢得了多项音乐奖项，包括水星奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Franz Ferdinand is a Scottish indie rock band formed in 2002. Known for their sharp guitar rhythms, artistic lyrics, and energetic live performances, the band took its name from Archduke Franz Ferdinand of Austria-Hungary. Their debut album achieved global success, winning multiple awards including the Mercury Prize.

items.name: Blur
items.descriptionZh: 《Blur》是英国摇滚乐队Blur的第五张录音室专辑，发行于1997年。这张专辑标志着乐队从早期的Britpop风格向更独立、实验性的方向转变，融合了低保真、噪音摇滚和另类摇滚元素。核心特色在于其粗糙的吉他音色、模糊的人声处理以及充满自省和讽刺意味的歌词，展现了乐队在英伦摇滚巅峰期后的艺术突破。
items.descriptionEn: Blur is the fifth studio album by English rock band Blur, released in 1997. This album marks the band's shift from their earlier Britpop style toward a more independent, experimental direction, blending lo-fi, noise rock, and alternative rock elements. Its core characteristics are raw guitar tones, distorted vocal processing, and introspective, sardonic lyrics, showcasing the band's artistic breakthrough after the peak of Britpop.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满了紧张与实验精神。主唱Damon Albarn和吉他手Graham Coxon在音乐方向上产生了激烈分歧，Coxon希望探索更嘈杂的吉他实验，而Albarn则倾向于更传统的歌曲结构。最终，两人达成了妥协：乐队决定前往冰岛雷克雅未克的一间偏远录音室进行录制，希望通过孤独的环境激发灵感。在冰岛期间，他们几乎与世隔绝，每天在极夜中工作，这种氛围深深影响了专辑的阴郁基调。专辑中歌曲《Song 2》的著名“Woo-Hoo”吼叫是Coxon在排练时随意喊出的，没想到成为了乐队最知名的标志之一。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was filled with tension and experimentation. Lead singer Damon Albarn and guitarist Graham Coxon had a heated disagreement over musical direction—Coxon wanted to explore noisier guitar experiments, while Albarn preferred more traditional song structures. Eventually, they compromised: the band decided to record at a remote studio in Reykjavik, Iceland, hoping the isolation would spark creativity. During their stay, they were almost completely cut off from the outside world, working daily under the polar night, which deeply influenced the album's melancholic tone. The famous 'Woo-Hoo' shout in 'Song 2' was something Coxon yelled out randomly during rehearsal, which unexpectedly became one of the band's most recognizable signatures.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是Blur艺术转型的关键作品，打破了Britpop的刻板印象，对后来英国另类摇滚的发展产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a pivotal artistic transformation for Blur, breaking the Britpop stereotype and significantly influencing the development of later British alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Blur是一支英国摇滚乐队，成立于1988年。他们是1990年代英伦摇滚运动的核心代表之一，以其机智的歌词��多样的音乐风格和鲜明的英国特色闻名。乐队成员包括主唱Damon Albarn、吉他手Graham Coxon、贝斯手Alex James和鼓手Dave Rowntree。他们共发行了9张录音室专辑，代表作包括《Parklife》和《Song 2》。
items.artistIntroEn: Blur are an English rock band formed in 1988. They were one of the central figures of the 1990s Britpop movement, known for their witty lyrics, diverse musical styles, and distinctly British character. The band members include lead singer Damon Albarn, guitarist Graham Coxon, bassist Alex James, and drummer Dave Rowntree. They have released nine studio albums, with iconic works including 'Parklife' and 'Song 2.'

items.name: 100th Window
items.descriptionZh: 《100th Window》是Massive Attack在2003年发行的第四张录音室专辑，延续了Trip-hop的幽暗美学，但更偏向冰冷、实验性的电子氛围。专辑以沉重的低音、扭曲的声效和疏离的人声为特色，营造出一种末世感与内省情绪，是乐队转型期的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2003, '100th Window' is Massive Attack's fourth studio album, continuing their trip-hop aesthetic but leaning toward colder, experimental electronic atmospheres. Featuring heavy bass, distorted effects, and detached vocals, it creates a sense of apocalypse and introspection, marking a transitional period for the band.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战：核心成员Daddy G因故缺席，大部分创作由Robert Del Naja和制作人Neil Davidge完成。Del Naja在录音室中沉迷于新数字技术，甚至用电脑程序生成部分旋律。专辑名源于《易经》的“百窗”意象，象征从不同视角观察世界。
items.storiesEn: The recording was challenging: core member Daddy G was absent, leaving Robert Del Naja and producer Neil Davidge to handle most of the work. Del Naja became obsessed with new digital technology, even using computer programs to generate some melodies. The album title references the 'hundred windows' concept from the I Ching, symbolizing multiple perspectives on the world.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Trip-hop在21世纪初的重要转折点，影响了后来一批氛围电子音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as a key turning point for trip-hop in the early 2000s, influencing a generation of ambient electronic artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Massive Attack是英国布里斯托尔的传奇Trip-hop乐队，成立于1988年。他们以黑暗、迷幻的电子音乐和深刻的社会议题歌词闻名，被誉为Trip-hop三巨头之一，代表作包括《Mezzanine》和《Blue Lines》。
items.artistIntroEn: Massive Attack is a legendary trip-hop band from Bristol, UK, formed in 1988. Known for their dark, psychedelic electronic music and socially conscious lyrics, they are considered one of the 'holy trinity' of trip-hop, with iconic albums like 'Mezzanine' and 'Blue Lines'.

items.name: Tapestry
items.descriptionZh: 《Tapestry》是美国创作歌手Carole King于1971年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了软摇滚、民谣和流行。专辑以其真诚、温暖的旋律和直击人心的歌词著称，展现了King作为作曲家的深厚功力，成为70年代早期歌手-词曲作者运动的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1971, 'Tapestry' is Carole King's second studio album, blending soft rock, folk, and pop. Known for its sincere, warm melodies and emotionally direct lyrics, it showcases King's mastery as a songwriter and stands as a pinnacle of the early 1970s singer-songwriter movement.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在洛杉矶的A&M录音室录制，仅用了不到两周时间。King邀请了众多好友参与，包括James Taylor和Joni Mitchell。其中《You've Got a Friend》是King为Taylor量身定做，后来Taylor的翻唱版也大获成功。专辑封面上的King坐在窗边，手持刺绣作品，营造出亲切的居家氛围。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at A&M Studios in Los Angeles in under two weeks, the album featured many friends, including James Taylor and Joni Mitchell. 'You've Got a Friend' was written by King specifically for Taylor, whose cover later became a hit. The album cover shows King sitting by a window with embroidery, creating a cozy, homey feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tapestry》是史上最畅销的专辑之一，全球销量超2500万张，获得四项格莱美奖，彻底改变了女性音乐人在行业中的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Tapestry' is one of the best-selling albums of all time, with over 25 million copies sold worldwide, winning four Grammy Awards and fundamentally changing the role of female musicians in the industry.
items.artistIntroZh: Carole King是美国传奇歌手、词曲作者，1942年出生于纽约。她与搭档Gerry Goffin创作了无数经典金曲，后以个人身份发行《Tapestry》奠定巨星地位。她被誉为“女性创作歌手的先驱”，2013年获得格莱美终身成就奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Carole King is a legendary American singer and songwriter, born in New York in 1942. She wrote countless classic hits with partner Gerry Goffin before achieving superstardom with 'Tapestry'. Hailed as a pioneer of female singer-songwriters, she received a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award in 2013.

items.name: Let England Shake
items.descriptionZh: 《Let England Shake》是PJ Harvey于2011年发行的第八张录音室专辑，以战争与英国历史为主题。风格上融合了民谣、另类摇滚和实验元素，Harvey用高亢、近乎诡异的嗓音吟唱，配以乌克丽丽和自动竖琴等非传统乐器，营造出既美丽又不安的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2011, 'Let England Shake' is PJ Harvey's eighth studio album, focusing on war and English history. Stylistically, it blends folk, alternative rock, and experimental elements. Harvey's high, almost eerie vocals are accompanied by unconventional instruments like ukulele and autoharp, creating a beautiful yet unsettling sonic experience.
items.storiesZh: Harvey为创作这张专辑进行了大量历史研究，阅读了一战、二战及近代冲突的文献。她与长期合作者John Parish在英格兰多塞特郡的一个小教堂里录制，使用便携设备捕捉自然声音。专辑名源于一句歌词，灵感来自Harvey对英国在战争中的矛盾情感。
items.storiesEn: Harvey conducted extensive historical research for the album, reading about WWI, WWII, and modern conflicts. She recorded with longtime collaborator John Parish in a small church in Dorset, England, using portable equipment to capture natural sounds. The title comes from a lyric inspired by Harvey's ambivalent feelings about England's role in war.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑赢得了2011年水星奖，被广泛认为是21世纪最优秀的政治概念专辑之一，影响了后来一批关注社会议题的独立音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the 2011 Mercury Prize and is widely regarded as one of the finest political concept albums of the 21st century, influencing a wave of socially conscious indie musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: PJ Harvey（全名Polly Jean Harvey）是英国另类摇滚音乐人，1969年出生于多塞特郡。她以多变的音乐风格、强烈的舞台表现和深刻的歌词著称，曾两次获得水星奖，是唯一一位获此殊荣的女艺人。代表作包括《Rid of Me》和《Stories from the City, Stories from the Sea》。
items.artistIntroEn: PJ Harvey (full name Polly Jean Harvey) is an English alternative rock musician, born in Dorset in 1969. Known for her versatile musical style, powerful stage presence, and profound lyrics, she is the only female artist to win the Mercury Prize twice. Key works include 'Rid of Me' and 'Stories from the City, Stories from the Sea'.

items.name: Simple Plan
items.descriptionZh: 《Simple Plan》是加拿大流行朋克乐队Simple Plan于2008年发行的同名第三张录音室专辑。风格延续了乐队的招牌流行朋克路线，充满活力十足的吉他riff、朗朗上口的副歌和青少年焦虑主题。专辑比前作更成熟，融合了流行摇滚元素，旋律更加流畅。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2008, 'Simple Plan' is the Canadian pop-punk band's self-titled third studio album. It continues their signature pop-punk style with energetic guitar riffs, catchy choruses, and themes of teenage angst. The album shows a more mature sound, incorporating pop rock elements with smoother melodies.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在洛杉矶录制，由Dave Fortman（曾与Evanescence合作）担任制作人。乐队成��表示希望创作一张更直接、更个人化的专辑，因此以乐队名命名。录制过程中，主唱Pierre Bouvier曾因声带问题短暂休息，但最终顺利完成了专辑。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Los Angeles with producer Dave Fortman (known for working with Evanescence), the band aimed to create a more direct and personal album, hence the self-titled name. During recording, lead singer Pierre Bouvier took a short break due to vocal cord issues but eventually completed the album smoothly.
items.artistIntroZh: Simple Plan是加拿大流行朋克乐队，1999年成立于蒙特利尔。他们以充满青春活力的音乐和直白的歌词闻名，代表作包括《Welcome to My Life》和《Perfect》。乐队在全球售出超过1000万张专辑，是2000年代流行朋克浪潮的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Simple Plan is a Canadian pop-punk band formed in Montreal in 1999. Known for their youthful energy and straightforward lyrics, their hits include 'Welcome to My Life' and 'Perfect'. With over 10 million albums sold worldwide, they were a key part of the 2000s pop-punk wave.

items.name: Temper Temper
items.descriptionZh: 《Temper Temper》是英国金属核乐队Bullet for My Valentine于2013年发行的第四张录音室专辑。风格上延续了乐队的金属核路线，融合激流金属的猛烈与旋律死亡金属的吉他solo，但整体更偏向商业化，增加了更多的清嗓演唱和副歌旋律。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2013, 'Temper Temper' is the fourth studio album by Welsh metalcore band Bullet for My Valentine. It continues their metalcore style, blending thrash metal aggression with melodic death metal guitar solos, but leans more commercial with increased clean vocals and melodic choruses.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在洛杉矶录制，由Don Gilmore（曾与Linkin Park合作）制作。乐队主唱Matt Tuck表示，他们希望尝试更简洁、更具爆发力的歌曲结构。专辑名《Temper Temper》灵感来自乐队在巡演中经历的紧张关系和情绪波动，反映了成员之间的磨合过程。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Los Angeles with producer Don Gilmore (known for working with Linkin Park), frontman Matt Tuck said the band wanted to experiment with more concise, explosive song structures. The title 'Temper Temper' was inspired by the tensions and emotional fluctuations experienced during touring, reflecting the band's internal dynamics.
items.artistIntroZh: Bullet for My Valentine是英国威尔士的金属核乐队，1998年成立。他们以高速的吉他演奏、凶狠的鼓点和旋律性副歌��称，是21世纪初金属核运动的代表之一。代表作包括《Tears Don't Fall》和《Your Betrayal》，全球专辑销量超过300万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Bullet for My Valentine is a Welsh metalcore band formed in 1998. Known for fast guitar work, aggressive drumming, and melodic choruses, they were a leading force in the early 2000s metalcore movement. Hits include 'Tears Don't Fall' and 'Your Betrayal', with over 3 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: See You in the Next Life
items.descriptionZh: 《See You in the Next Life》是Suede在2004年发行的一张精选集，收录了乐队黄金时期的经典曲目。风格以英伦摇滚为主，融合华丽摇滚与独立流行，旋律优美而充满戏剧性，歌词忧郁又浪漫，展现了主唱Brett Anderson标志性的颓废嗓音和乐队独特的艺术气质。
items.descriptionEn: "See You in the Next Life" is a 2004 compilation album by Suede, featuring their greatest hits from the golden era. The style is Britpop with glam rock and indie pop influences, characterized by beautiful melodies, dramatic arrangements, melancholic yet romantic lyrics, and Brett Anderson's iconic decadent vocals.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的标题曲《See You in the Next Life》原本是Brett Anderson为已故父亲所作，录制时他几度哽咽。专辑封面使用了乐队早期巡演时的后台照片，由摄影师Pennie Smith拍摄，她曾为The Clash拍摄经典封面。选曲过程充满争议，成员们对曲目顺序争执不下，最终由制作人拍板决定。
items.storiesEn: The title track "See You in the Next Life" was originally written by Brett Anderson for his deceased father, and he choked up several times during recording. The cover art features a backstage photo from the band's early tours, shot by photographer Pennie Smith, who also shot the iconic cover for The Clash. The tracklist selection was contentious, with band members arguing over the order until the producer made the final call.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Suede的告别精选集，它标志着英伦摇滚黄金时代的落幕，影响了后续独立乐队对专辑整体性的追求。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Suede's farewell compilation, it marked the end of the Britpop golden era and influenced subsequent indie bands' pursuit of album coherence.
items.artistIntroZh: Suede（山羊皮）是英国90年代最具影响力的英伦摇滚乐队之一，由主唱Brett Anderson和吉他手Bernard Butler创立。他们以华丽、颓废的风格和充满诗意的歌词著称，首张专辑即获水星奖，是英伦摇滚运动的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: Suede is one of the most influential Britpop bands of the 1990s, founded by vocalist Brett Anderson and guitarist Bernard Butler. Known for their glamorous, decadent style and poetic lyrics, their debut album won the Mercury Prize, making them pioneers of the Britpop movement.

items.name: Black Sabbath
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Sabbath》是英国重金属乐队Black Sabbath的同名首张专辑，1970年发行。风格被公认为重金���的奠基之作，以阴暗、沉重的吉他riff、缓慢的节奏和主唱Ozzy Osbourne的诡异嗓音为特色，歌词涉及邪恶、死亡与超自然主题，营造出前所未有的恐怖氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Black Sabbath" is the self-titled debut album by British heavy metal band Black Sabbath, released in 1970. It is widely regarded as the foundational work of heavy metal, characterized by dark, heavy guitar riffs, slow tempos, and Ozzy Osbourne's eerie vocals, with lyrics about evil, death, and the supernatural, creating an unprecedented atmosphere of horror.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲的灵感来源于吉他手Tony Iommi的一次噩梦，他梦见一个黑色身影在窗外徘徊。录制时，乐队仅用两天就完成了所有歌曲，因为预算极低。贝斯手Geezer Butler曾因房间闹鬼而要求换房，后来发现是隔壁乐队在排练。专辑封面上的神秘女子其实是当时的唱片公司秘书。
items.storiesEn: The title track was inspired by guitarist Tony Iommi's nightmare about a black figure lurking outside his window. The band recorded all songs in just two days due to a tiny budget. Bassist Geezer Butler once requested a room change because he thought it was haunted, only to discover it was a neighboring band rehearsing. The mysterious woman on the cover was actually the record label's secretary.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被公认为第一张重金属专辑，彻底改变了摇滚乐的走向，直接催生了整个重金属流派，影响无数乐队如Metallica、Slayer等。
items.historicalImpactEn: Universally recognized as the first heavy metal album, it fundamentally altered rock music's trajectory, directly spawning the entire heavy metal genre and influencing countless bands like Metallica and Slayer.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Sabbath（黑色安息日）是英国重金属传奇乐队，1968年成立于伯明翰。成员包括Ozzy Osbourne（主唱）、Tony Iommi（吉他）、Geezer Butler（贝斯）和Bill Ward（鼓）。他们以阴暗、沉重的音乐风格定义了重金属，是摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath is a legendary British heavy metal band formed in Birmingham in 1968. Members include Ozzy Osbourne (vocals), Tony Iommi (guitar), Geezer Butler (bass), and Bill Ward (drums). Their dark, heavy sound defined heavy metal, making them one of the most influential bands in rock history.

items.name: Evernight
items.descriptionZh: 《Evernight》是芬兰旋律死亡/力量金属乐队Battlelore的第四张录音室专辑，2007年发行。风格融合了旋律死亡金属的凶狠与力量金属的宏大，大量使用键盘和女声营造奇幻氛围，歌词取材于托尔金的《精灵宝钻》，充满了史诗般的战斗与魔法元素。
items.descriptionEn: "Evernight" is the fourth studio album by Finnish melodic death/power metal band Battlelore, released in 2007. The style blends the aggression of melodic death metal with the grandeur of power metal, heavily utilizing keyboards and female vocals to create a fantasy atmosphere, with lyrics drawn from Tolkien's "The Silmarillion," full of epic battles and magic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Kaisa Jouhki和吉他手Jyri Vahvanen因音乐理念分歧发生激烈争吵，导致录音中断三天。最终在制作人调和下，两人决定将各自的想法分曲目呈现。键盘手Miika Kokkola在录制《House of Heroes》时即兴加入了一段芬兰民谣旋律，意外成为专辑亮点。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, vocalist Kaisa Jouhki and guitarist Jyri Vahvanen had a heated argument over musical direction, causing a three-day halt. The producer mediated and they agreed to feature each other's ideas on separate tracks. Keyboardist Miika Kokkola improvised a Finnish folk melody during "House of Heroes," which unexpectedly became an album highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Battlelore是一支来自芬兰的旋律死亡/力量金属乐队，1999年成立于拉赫蒂。乐队以托尔金奇幻文学为主题，男女双主唱和大量键盘编曲是其标志。他们以充满史诗感的金属乐在欧陆金属圈独树一帜，已发行多张专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Battlelore is a Finnish melodic death/power metal band formed in Lahti in 1999. Known for their Tolkien fantasy theme, dual male-female vocals, and heavy keyboard arrangements, they have carved a unique niche in the European metal scene with their epic sound, releasing multiple albums.

items.name: Harvest
items.descriptionZh: 《Harvest》是加拿大唱作人Neil Young的第四张录音室专辑，1972年发行。风格以民谣摇滚和乡村摇滚为主，旋律温暖而忧伤，歌词充满对自然、爱情和人生的反思。标志性的口琴和原声吉他伴奏，加上弦乐和钢棒吉他的点缀，营造出辽阔而孤独的北美乡村氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Harvest" is the fourth studio album by Canadian singer-songwriter Neil Young, released in 1972. The style is folk rock and country rock, with warm yet melancholic melodies and lyrics reflecting on nature, love, and life. Signature harmonica and acoustic guitar, complemented by strings and pedal steel guitar, create a vast and lonely North American rural atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Harvest》的灵感来自Neil Young在农场的一次日落漫步。录制时，他因背部受伤不得不卧床，于是将卧室改造成临时录音室。著名歌曲《Heart of Gold》的伴奏中，他邀请了Linda Ronstadt和James Taylor担任和声。专辑封面拍摄于他受伤期间，由妻子Pegi Young拍摄。
