items.storiesEn: The title track "Harvest" was inspired by a sunset walk on Neil Young's farm. During recording, he was bedridden due to a back injury, so he turned his bedroom into a makeshift studio. For the famous song "Heart of Gold," he invited Linda Ronstadt and James Taylor to sing harmonies. The cover photo was taken by his wife Pegi Young during his recovery.
items.historicalImpactZh: 成为70年代民谣摇滚的标杆之作，获多白金销量，深刻影响了后来的乡村摇滚和另类乡村音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: Became a benchmark for 1970s folk rock, achieving multi-platinum sales and profoundly influencing later country rock and alternative country music.
items.artistIntroZh: Neil Young是加拿大传奇唱作人、音乐家，1945年生于多伦多。他是Buffalo Springfield和Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young的成员，以独特的嗓音、深刻的歌词和对多种风格的探索闻名，被誉为“民谣摇滚教父”。
items.artistIntroEn: Neil Young is a legendary Canadian singer-songwriter and musician, born in Toronto in 1945. A member of Buffalo Springfield and Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young, he is renowned for his distinctive voice, profound lyrics, and stylistic versatility, earning the title "Godfather of Folk Rock."

items.name: Cooleyhighharmony
items.descriptionZh: 《Cooleyhighharmony》是美国R&B组合Boyz II Men的首张录音室专辑，1991年发行。风格以新杰克摇摆和灵魂乐为主，融合了细腻的和声与流行旋律，展现了他们无与伦比的声乐技巧。专辑以浪漫情歌和励志歌曲为主，充满了90年代初的R&B黄金时代气息。
items.descriptionEn: "Cooleyhighharmony" is the debut studio album by American R&B group Boyz II Men, released in 1991. The style is new jack swing and soul, blending intricate harmonies with pop melodies, showcasing their unparalleled vocal prowess. The album features romantic ballads and inspirational songs, capturing the golden age of early 1990s R&B.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称来自费城一所高中的名字，成员们曾在那里表演。录制时，制作人Michael Bivins要求他们反复录制和声部分，直到完美无瑕，导致主唱Wanya Morris一度失声。热门单曲《Motownphilly》的MV拍摄于他们高中母校，许多同学担任了群演。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from the name of a high school in Philadelphia where the members once performed. During recording, producer Michael Bivins made them re-record harmonies repeatedly until flawless, causing lead singer Wanya Morris to lose his voice temporarily. The music video for hit single "Motownphilly" was filmed at their high school alma mater, with many classmates appearing as extras.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑销量超过900万张，定义了90年代R&B和声组合的标准，为后来的Boyz II Men及类似团体铺平道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling over 9 million copies, the album defined the standard for 1990s R&B vocal groups, paving the way for Boyz II Men and similar ensembles.
items.artistIntroZh: Boyz II Men是美国传奇R&B和声组合，1988年成立于费城。成员包括Nathan Morris、Wanya Morris、Shawn Stockman和Michael McCary。他们以精湛的和声、浪漫的抒情曲风著称，拥有多首冠军单曲，是90年代最成功的R&B团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Boyz II Men is a legendary American R&B vocal group formed in Philadelphia in 1988. Members include Nathan Morris, Wanya Morris, Shawn Stockman, and Michael McCary. Known for their masterful harmonies and romantic ballads, they have scored numerous chart-topping hits and are one of the most successful R&B groups of the 1990s.

items.name: Burn
items.descriptionZh: 《Burn》是Deep Purple在1974年发行的经典硬摇滚专辑，标志着乐队进入马克三世阵容。专辑以同名曲《Burn》开场，融合了强劲的吉他Riff、华丽的键盘独奏和充满力量的鼓点，展现了乐队在硬摇滚与早期重金属之间的精湛平衡。核心特色在于其戏剧性的编曲和David Coverdale极具穿透力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: Burn is a classic hard rock album by Deep Purple, released in 1974, marking the band's Mark III lineup. It opens with the title track, blending powerful guitar riffs, ornate keyboard solos, and forceful drumming, showcasing a masterful balance between hard rock and early heavy metal. Its core feature lies in the dramatic arrangements and David Coverdale's piercing vocals.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Burn》时，Deep Purple正处于阵容变动的关键时期——原主唱Ian Gillan和贝斯手Roger Glover离队，新主唱David Coverdale和贝斯手Glenn Hughes加入。专辑在法国的一家录音室录制，期间乐队成员常在深夜即兴演奏，其中《Mistreated》的灵感便来自一次深夜的蓝调即兴。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Burn, Deep Purple was in a critical lineup transition—original vocalist Ian Gillan and bassist Roger Glover had left, replaced by David Coverdale and Glenn Hughes. The album was recorded in a French studio, where band members often jammed late into the night; the track 'Mistreated' was inspired by one such bluesy improvisation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Burn》巩固了Deep Purple在70年代硬摇滚领域的地位，其同名曲被视为硬摇滚史上的里程碑之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Burn solidified Deep Purple's status in 1970s hard rock, with its title track regarded as a milestone in hard rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是英国传奇硬摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，与Led Zeppelin、Black Sabbath并称重金属音乐三大先驱。他们以精湛的器乐演奏和不断演变的风格著称，代表作包括《Smoke on the Water》和《Highway Star》。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple is a legendary British hard rock band formed in 1968, considered one of the 'Big Three' pioneers of heavy metal alongside Led Zeppelin and Black Sabbath. They are known for their virtuosic instrumental skills and evolving style, with classics like 'Smoke on the Water' and 'Highway Star'.

items.name: BBC Sessions
items.descriptionZh: 《BBC Sessions》是The Who在2000年发行的现场录音合辑，收录了乐队1965年至1973年间为BBC广播节目录制的珍贵片段。专辑风格横跨摩登摇滚、迷幻摇滚和硬摇滚，核心特色在于其未经修饰的原始能量和乐队即兴发挥的现场魅力，展现了The Who从早期单曲到经典专辑曲目的演变。
items.descriptionEn: BBC Sessions is a live compilation by The Who released in 2000, featuring rare recordings from BBC radio programs between 1965 and 1973. The style spans mod rock, psychedelic rock, and hard rock, with its core feature being the unpolished raw energy and live improvisational charm, showcasing the band's evolution from early singles to classic album tracks.
items.storiesZh: 这些录音大多录制于BBC的Maida Vale录音室，乐队经常在录制前几分钟才决定曲目。有趣的是，鼓手Keith Moon在一次录制中因过度兴奋砸坏了录音室的麦克风，但BBC工程师反而称赞这种“破坏性表演”带来了独特的音效。
items.storiesEn: Most of these recordings were made at BBC's Maida Vale studios, where the band often decided the setlist just minutes before recording. Interestingly, drummer Keith Moon once smashed a studio microphone in a fit of excitement, but BBC engineers praised the 'destructive performance' for its unique sound.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who是英国��滚乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一，成立于1964年。他们以充满破坏性的现场表演、摇滚歌剧《Tommy》和标志性专辑《Who's Next》闻名，是摩登文化与硬摇滚的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who is one of the most influential rock bands in history, formed in 1964. They are famous for their destructive live performances, the rock opera Tommy, and the iconic album Who's Next, and are key figures in mod culture and hard rock.

items.name: Years of Refusal
items.descriptionZh: 《Years of Refusal》是Morrissey在2009年发行的第九张个人录音室专辑，风格融合了另类摇滚、独立流行和华丽摇滚。核心特色在于Morrissey标志性的讽刺歌词与夸张的戏剧化演唱，搭配强劲的吉他音墙和管弦乐编曲，主题围绕拒绝、衰老与反叛。
items.descriptionEn: Years of Refusal is Morrissey's ninth solo studio album, released in 2009, blending alternative rock, indie pop, and glam rock. Its core feature lies in Morrissey's trademark ironic lyrics and dramatic vocal delivery, backed by powerful guitar walls and orchestral arrangements, with themes of refusal, aging, and rebellion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Morrissey曾因声带问题一度暂停，但恢复后反而���求录音师保留他沙哑嗓音的原始版本。此外，专辑封面原本计划使用一张更挑衅的照片，但因唱片公司反对而改为现用的黑白肖像。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Morrissey paused due to vocal cord issues, but upon recovery, he insisted the engineer keep the raw, raspy versions of his vocals. Additionally, the cover art originally planned to use a more provocative photo, but was replaced with the current black-and-white portrait due to label objections.
items.artistIntroZh: Morrissey是英国歌手、词曲作家，前The Smiths乐队主唱，被誉为独立音乐界最具标志性的人物之一。他以忧郁的歌词、独特的嗓音和反叛姿态闻名，个人生涯代表作包括《Viva Hate》和《You Are the Quarry》。
items.artistIntroEn: Morrissey is a British singer and songwriter, former lead vocalist of The Smiths, regarded as one of the most iconic figures in independent music. He is known for his melancholic lyrics, distinctive voice, and rebellious stance, with solo classics such as Viva Hate and You Are the Quarry.

items.name: Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…
items.descriptionZh: 《Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…》是Tupac Shakur在1993年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以西海岸嘻哈为主，融合了G-Funk、硬核说唱和社会意识内容。核心特色在于Tupac充满激情的叙事性歌词，直面贫困、种族歧视和街头暴力，同时展现了他在旋律与节奏上的天赋。
items.descriptionEn: Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.… is Tupac Shakur's second studio album, released in 1993, primarily West Coast hip-hop fused with G-Funk, hardcore rap, and social commentary. Its core feature is Tupac's passionate, narrative-driven lyrics confronting poverty, racism, and street violence, while showcasing his melodic and rhythmic talent.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Tupac刚刚经历了一场枪击事件，他将愤怒和痛苦转化为创作能量。其中《Keep Ya Head Up》的灵感来自他妹妹的鼓励，而《I Get Around》则是在录音室即兴创作，仅用一天完成录制。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Tupac had just survived a shooting, channeling his anger and pain into creativity. 'Keep Ya Head Up' was inspired by encouragement from his sister, while 'I Get Around' was improvised in the studio and recorded in just one day.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Tupac作为社会意识说唱领袖的地位，其深刻内容影响了随后一代嘻哈艺术家。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Tupac's status as a leader of socially conscious rap, deeply influencing the next generation of hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur是美国传奇说唱歌手、演员和社会活动家，被誉为史上最伟大的嘻哈艺术家之一。他以深刻的歌词、激进的姿态和悲剧性的早逝闻名，代表作包括《All Eyez on Me》和《Me Against the World》。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur was an American legendary rapper, actor, and social activist, regarded as one of the greatest hip-hop artists of all time. He is known for his profound lyrics, militant stance, and tragic early death, with classics such as All Eyez on Me and Me Against the World.

items.name: Raw and Live
items.descriptionZh: 《Raw and Live》是Sex Pistols在2004年发行的现场专辑，收录了乐队1977年多场演出的实况录音。风格为纯粹的原汁原味朋克摇滚，核心特色在于其混乱、暴烈且充满挑衅性的现场能量，吉他失真、主唱Johnny Rotten的嘶吼与观众的互动融为一体。
items.descriptionEn: Raw and Live is a live album by the Sex Pistols released in 2004, featuring recordings from multiple 1977 shows. The style is pure, unadulterated punk rock, with its core feature being the chaotic, violent, and provocative live energy, blending distorted guitars, Johnny Rotten's snarls, and audience interaction.
items.storiesZh: 这些录音大多来自乐队1977年英国巡演，当时Sex Pistols正处于舆论风暴中心。在曼彻斯特的一场演出中，观众因过度激动而冲上舞台，导致设备被毁，但乐队反而即兴演奏了一段长达15分钟的噪音，被收录在专辑中。
items.storiesEn: Most recordings are from the band's 1977 UK tour, when the Sex Pistols were at the center of a media storm. At a Manchester show, the crowd stormed the stage in excitement, destroying equipment, but the band instead improvised a 15-minute noise jam, which was included on the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Sex Pistols是英国朋克摇滚的先驱乐队，成立于1975年。他们以反叛的姿态、粗粝的音乐和争议性歌词颠覆了70年代音乐界，代表作《Never Mind the Bollocks》被视为朋克运动的圣经。
items.artistIntroEn: The Sex Pistols are the pioneering British punk rock band formed in 1975. They revolutionized the 1970s music scene with their rebellious attitude, raw sound, and controversial lyrics, with Never Mind the Bollocks regarded as the bible of the punk movement.

items.name: No Protection
items.descriptionZh: 《No Protection》是Massive Attack在1995年发行的混音专辑，由Mad Professor操刀，将Trip-hop的幽暗氛围推向极致。核心特色在于对原专辑《Protection》的解构与重塑，融入更多Dub、雷鬼元素，音效迷离而深邃，营造出潮湿、阴郁的听觉空间。
items.descriptionEn: "No Protection" is a 1995 remix album by Massive Attack, crafted by Mad Professor, pushing their trip-hop darkness to extremes. Its core feature lies in deconstructing and reshaping the original "Protection" album, incorporating more dub and reggae elements for a hazy, deep soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于一次即兴合作。Mad Professor在录音室里即兴混音，Massive Attack成员几乎完全放权，任由他自由发挥。整个录制过程仅用两周，Mad Professor甚至用一台老式模拟调音台完成所有处理，保留了大量原始录音的瑕疵与呼吸感。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from an impromptu collaboration. Mad Professor improvised in the studio, with Massive Attack granting him near-complete freedom. The entire recording took just two weeks, using an old analog mixing desk, preserving many raw imperfections and breaths.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Trip-hop史上最著名的混音专辑之一，它重新定义了混音专辑的艺术价值，证明混音可以成为独立且具有开创性的作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the most famous remix albums in trip-hop history, it redefined the artistic value of remix albums, proving remixes can be independent and groundbreaking works.
items.artistIntroZh: Massive Attack是英国布里斯托尔的一支电子音乐团体，成立于1988年，被誉为Trip-hop音乐的奠基人之一。他们的音乐融合了灵魂、雷鬼、嘻哈与电子元素，以低沉、迷幻的节拍和阴郁氛围著称，深刻影响了90年代以来的另类音乐场景。
items.artistIntroEn: Massive Attack is an English electronic music group from Bristol, formed in 1988, hailed as one of the pioneers of trip-hop. Their music blends soul, reggae, hip-hop, and electronic elements, known for deep, hypnotic beats and dark atmospheres, profoundly influencing alternative music since the 1990s.

items.name: Push the Sky Away
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Push the Sky Away》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds在2013年发行的第15张录音室专辑，风格转向极简、内省的民谣摇滚。核心特色在于其空灵的钢琴、细腻的弦乐与Nick Cave低沉念白式的演唱，歌词充满诗意的神秘感和超现实意象。
items.descriptionEn: "Push the Sky Away" is the 15th studio album by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, released in 2013, shifting towards minimalist, introspective folk rock. Its core features are ethereal piano, delicate strings, and Nick Cave's low, spoken-word vocals, with lyrics full of poetic mystery and surreal imagery.
items.storiesZh: 录制地点选在法国南部的一个老别墅，乐队成员围坐一圈现场录音，营造出亲密的室内乐感。Nick Cave在创作过程中深受互联网随机信息的启发，将维基百科上的奇怪条目和新闻片段融入歌词，例如《Higgs Boson Blues》灵感来自对大型强子对撞机的遐想。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in an old villa in southern France, the band sat in a circle for live takes, creating an intimate chamber music feel. Nick Cave was inspired by random internet information, weaving strange Wikipedia entries and news snippets into lyrics, like "Higgs Boson Blues" from musings on the Large Hadron Collider.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds是一支澳大利亚另类摇滚乐队，成立于1983年，由主唱Nick Cave领衔。他们的音乐横跨后朋克、哥特摇滚、民谣与蓝调，以戏剧化的表演和黑暗、诗意的歌词闻名，是当代音乐界最具影响力的艺术团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds is an Australian alternative rock band formed in 1983, led by vocalist Nick Cave. Their music spans post-punk, gothic rock, folk, and blues, known for theatrical performances and dark, poetic lyrics, making them one of the most influential artistic groups in contemporary music.

items.name: The King of Limbs
items.descriptionZh: 《The King of Limbs》是Radiohead在2011年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格融合实验电子、氛围音乐与爵士节奏。核心特色在于其循环重复的节拍、碎片化的采样和复杂的多节奏结构，整体氛围神秘而内省，相比前作更为抽象和简约。
items.descriptionEn: "The King of Limbs" is Radiohead's eighth studio album, released in 2011, blending experimental electronic, ambient music, and jazz rhythms. Its core features are looping beats, fragmented samples, and complex polyrhythms, creating a mysterious, introspective atmosphere that is more abstract and minimalist than previous works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制极为保密，乐队在牛津郡的自家工作室完成大部分工作。吉他手Jonny Greenwood使用大量模块合成器和自制乐器，鼓手Phil Selway则采用非传统打击乐编排。专辑名称源自英格兰威尔特郡一棵拥有千年历史的紫杉树，象征坚韧与重生。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in utmost secrecy, mostly at the band's own studio in Oxfordshire. Guitarist Jonny Greenwood used extensive modular synthesizers and homemade instruments, while drummer Phil Selway employed unconventional percussion arrangements. The title comes from a thousand-year-old yew tree in Wiltshire, symbolizing resilience and rebirth.
items.artistIntroZh: Radiohead是英国牛津的一支另类摇滚乐队，成立于1985年，被公认为当代最具创新精神的乐队之一。他们的音乐从早期英伦摇滚逐渐转向实验电子、艺术摇滚，以深刻的歌词、复杂的编曲和对音乐边界的不断探索而著称，代表作包括《OK Computer》和《Kid A》。
items.artistIntroEn: Radiohead is an English alternative rock band from Oxford, formed in 1985, widely regarded as one of the most innovative bands of the contemporary era. Their music evolved from early Britpop to experimental electronic and art rock, known for profound lyrics, complex arrangements, and constant boundary-pushing, with iconic albums like "OK Computer" and "Kid A".

items.name: Große Freiheit
items.descriptionZh: 《Große Freiheit》是德国乐队Unheilig在2010年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格为黑暗摇滚与新德意志硬派（Neue Deutsche Härte）的融合。核心特色在于其宏大的合成器铺底、沉重的吉他riff与主唱Der Graf低沉磁性的嗓音，歌词充满对自由、生命与死亡的哲学思考。
items.descriptionEn: "Große Freiheit" is the seventh studio album by German band Unheilig, released in 2010, blending dark rock with Neue Deutsche Härte. Its core features are grand synthesizer pads, heavy guitar riffs, and the deep, magnetic voice of frontman Der Graf, with lyrics exploring philosophy on freedom, life, and death.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称取自汉堡圣保利区著名的娱乐街“大自由街”，象征突破束缚的精神。录制期间，主唱Der Graf在巡演大巴上完成了大部分歌词创作，灵感来自旅途中的孤独与对人生意义的追问。专辑中的热门单曲《Geboren um zu leben》在德国单曲榜上停留了超过100周。
items.storiesEn: The album title is taken from Hamburg's famous entertainment street "Große Freiheit" in St. Pauli, symbolizing a spirit of breaking boundaries. During recording, frontman Der Graf wrote most lyrics on the tour bus, inspired by loneliness on the road and questions about life's meaning. The hit single "Geboren um zu leben" stayed on the German singles chart for over 100 weeks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在��国获得11白金认证，成为2010年代德国最畅销的摇滚专辑之一，奠定了Unheilig在德语黑暗摇滚界的霸主地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album earned 11× platinum certification in Germany, becoming one of the best-selling rock albums of the 2010s, cementing Unheilig's dominance in German dark rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Unheilig是一支德国黑暗摇滚乐队，成立于1999年，由主唱Der Graf领衔。他们的音乐融合了电子、摇滚与哥特元素，以深沉的旋律和富有哲思的德语歌词著称。乐队在2010年代达到商业巅峰，成为德语地区最成功的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Unheilig is a German dark rock band formed in 1999, led by vocalist Der Graf. Their music blends electronic, rock, and gothic elements, known for deep melodies and philosophical German lyrics. The band reached commercial peak in the 2010s, becoming one of the most successful musical acts in German-speaking regions.

items.name: Rock the Rebel/Metal the Devil
items.descriptionZh: 《Rock the Rebel/Metal the Devil》是丹麦乐队Volbeat在2007年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格融合重金属、摇滚乐与乡村摇滚（Rockabilly）。核心特色在于其强劲的节奏、双吉他交织的旋律以及主唱Michael Poulsen独特的低沉咆哮与清嗓交替唱法，充满活力与叛逆精神。
items.descriptionEn: "Rock the Rebel/Metal the Devil" is the second studio album by Danish band Volbeat, released in 2007, blending heavy metal, rock 'n' roll, and rockabilly. Its core features are powerful rhythms, twin guitar melodies, and frontman Michael Poulsen's unique alternation between deep growls and clean vocals, full of energy and rebellious spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制在丹麦哥本哈根完成，制作人Jacob Hansen采用了大量复古模拟设备，以捕捉乐队现场演出的粗粝感。主打歌《The Garden's Tale》的灵感来自主唱Poulsen童年时在祖父母花园中听到的民间故事，歌词中甚至穿插了丹麦语段落，成为乐队早期标志性曲目。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Copenhagen, Denmark, producer Jacob Hansen used extensive vintage analog gear to capture the band's raw live energy. The lead single "The Garden's Tale" was inspired by folk tales singer Poulsen heard in his grandparents' garden as a child, even featuring Danish verses, becoming an early signature track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在丹麦获得白金认证，并帮助Volbeat打入国际市场，被视为丹麦重金属复兴的重要推手之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved platinum status in Denmark and helped Volbeat break into international markets, regarded as a key driver of the Danish heavy metal revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Volbeat是一支丹麦重金属乐队，成立于2001年，由主唱兼吉他手Michael Poulsen创立。他们的音乐风格独特，将重金属的冲击力与摇滚、乡村摇滚的旋律性巧妙结合，创造出被称为“重金属乡村摇滚”的混合风格。乐队在欧洲和北美拥有大量忠实乐迷，是当代最成功的丹麦摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Volbeat is a Danish heavy metal band formed in 2001 by vocalist/guitarist Michael Poulsen. Their unique style blends the punch of heavy metal with the melody of rock and rockabilly, creating a hybrid often called "heavy metal rockabilly." The band has a massive fanbase in Europe and North America, making them one of the most successful Danish rock bands of the modern era.

items.name: Give Up
items.descriptionZh: 《Give Up》是The Postal Service于2003年发行的唯一录音室专辑，融合了独立摇滚与电子流行，以温暖的合成器音色和细腻的旋律著称。核心特色在于Ben Gibbard的忧郁嗓音与Jimmy Tamborello的精准节拍结合，营造出一种怀旧而清新的氛围，成为2000年代独立电子音乐的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: Give Up is the sole studio album by The Postal Service, released in 2003. It blends indie rock with electronic pop, characterized by warm synthesizers and delicate melodies. The core feature is the fusion of Ben Gibbard's melancholic vocals with Jimmy Tamborello's precise beats, creating a nostalgic yet fresh atmosphere that became iconic in 2000s indie electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的诞生源于两人通过邮寄磁带合作的方式——Ben在华盛顿州西雅图录好人声，将磁带寄到洛杉矶的Jimmy处进行编曲，因此乐队得名“邮政服务”。录制期间，Ben甚至在邮局工作以维持生计，而制作人Chris Walla（Death Cab for Cutie成员）在混音时意外加入了自行车铃声，成为专辑的彩蛋。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from a collaboration via mailed tapes—Ben recorded vocals in Seattle, Washington, and sent them to Jimmy in Los Angeles for arrangement, hence the band name 'The Postal Service'. During recording, Ben even worked at a post office to make ends meet. Producer Chris Walla (of Death Cab for Cutie) accidentally added a bicycle bell sound during mixing, which became an Easter egg on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Give Up》是独立电子流行风格的奠基之作，推动了独立音乐与电子元素的融合，对后来的乐队如Owl City产生深远影响。专辑中的《Such Great Heights》被多部影视作品使用，成为千禧年后的文化符号。
items.historicalImpactEn: Give Up is a foundational work of indie electronic pop, driving the fusion of indie music and electronic elements, profoundly influencing later acts like Owl City. The track 'Such Great Heights' was used in multiple films and TV shows, becoming a cultural icon of the post-millennium era.
items.artistIntroZh: The Postal Service是美国独立电子二人组，由Ben Gibbard（主唱/吉他）和Jimmy Tamborello（电子制作）组成，成立于2001年。他们以邮寄磁带的方式合作闻名，仅发行过一张专辑《Give Up》，却成为独立音乐史上的经典。
items.artistIntroEn: The Postal Service is an American indie electronic duo formed in 2001, consisting of Ben Gibbard (vocals/guitar) and Jimmy Tamborello (electronic production). Known for their mail-tape collaboration, they released only one album, Give Up, which became a classic in indie music history.

items.name: Field Commander Cohen: Tour of 1979
items.descriptionZh: 《Field Commander Cohen: Tour of 1979》是Leonard Cohen于2001年发行的现场专辑，记录了1979年巡演的精华。风格以民谣摇滚为主，融合了爵士与布鲁斯元素，Cohen低沉而富有磁性的嗓音在即兴对话与诗歌朗诵中展现现场魅力，核心特色是亲密的氛围与深刻的叙事性。
items.descriptionEn: Field Commander Cohen: Tour of 1979 is a live album by Leonard Cohen, released in 2001, capturing highlights from his 1979 tour. Stylistically rooted in folk rock with jazz and blues influences, Cohen's deep, magnetic voice shines through improvisational banter and poetic recitations, creating an intimate atmosphere with profound storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 1979年巡演正值Cohen事业低谷期，他决定以更粗糙、更即兴的方式表演。录制过程中，Cohen经常在歌曲间插入幽默自嘲的独白，比如调侃自己的年龄和创作瓶颈。专辑名源自他在舞台上的绰号“野战指挥官”，由观众所起。
items.storiesEn: The 1979 tour came during a low point in Cohen's career, prompting him to adopt a rawer, more improvisational performance style. During recordings, Cohen often inserted humorous, self-deprecating monologues between songs, joking about his age and creative blocks. The album title comes from the nickname 'Field Commander' given by audiences.
items.artistIntroZh: Leonard Cohen（1934-2016）是加拿大传奇创作歌手、诗人与小说家。以其深邃的歌词、低沉的男中音和融合民谣、摇滚与宗教主题的风格闻名，代表作包括《Hallelujah》与《Suzanne》。他被誉为“摇滚界的诗人”，影响跨越音乐与文学领域。
items.artistIntroEn: Leonard Cohen (1934-2016) was a legendary Canadian singer-songwriter, poet, and novelist. Known for his profound lyrics, deep baritone voice, and style blending folk, rock, and religious themes, his iconic works include 'Hallelujah' and 'Suzanne'. He is hailed as the 'poet of rock,' influencing both music and literature.

items.name: The Essential Toni Braxton
items.descriptionZh: 《The Essential Toni Braxton》是Toni Braxton于2007年发行的精选集，收录了她1990年代至2000年代初的经典作品。风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合流行与成人抒情元素，核心特色是Braxton极具穿透力的嗓音与情感充沛的演绎，展现了她作为R&B天后的辉煌历程。
items.descriptionEn: The Essential Toni Braxton is a compilation album by Toni Braxton, released in 2007, featuring her classic hits from the 1990s to early 2000s. Stylistically rooted in R&B and soul with pop and adult contemporary elements, the core feature is Braxton's powerful, piercing vocals and emotionally charged performances, showcasing her reign as an R&B diva.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Braxton正经历个人财务危机与健康问题，她曾因心脏病住院。专辑的曲目顺序由她亲自挑选，意图呈现从早期《Love Shoulda Brought You Home》到后期《He Wasn't Man Enough》的情感成长轨迹。录音师回忆，她在录制《Un-Break My Heart》时一度泪流满面。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Braxton was facing personal financial troubles and health issues, having been hospitalized for heart disease. She personally curated the track order to reflect her emotional growth from early hits like 'Love Shoulda Brought You Home' to later ones like 'He Wasn't Man Enough.' The recording engineer recalled her breaking into tears while recording 'Un-Break My Heart.'
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton是美国R&B天后，生于1967年。以醇厚而富有爆发力的嗓音著称，1990年代凭借《Un-Break My Heart》等金曲全球走红，获得7座格莱美奖。她也是百老汇演员与真人秀明星，被誉为“R&B界永恒的女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton is an American R&B diva, born in 1967. Known for her rich, explosive vocals, she rose to global fame in the 1990s with hits like 'Un-Break My Heart,' winning seven Grammy Awards. She is also a Broadway actress and reality TV star, hailed as the 'eternal queen of R&B.'

items.name: Phaedra
items.descriptionZh: 《Phaedra》是Tangerine Dream于1974年发行的里程碑式专辑，开创了柏林电子学派。风格以实验性电子音乐为主，大量运用合成器、序列器与磁带循环，营造出深邃、迷幻的太空氛围。核心特色是即兴创作与电子音色的探索，被视为氛围音乐与电子太空摇滚的先驱。
items.descriptionEn: Phaedra is a landmark album by Tangerine Dream, released in 1974, pioneering the Berlin School of electronic music. Stylistically experimental electronic, it heavily features synthesizers, sequencers, and tape loops, creating a deep, psychedelic space atmosphere. The core feature is improvisational composition and exploration of electronic timbres, regarded as a pioneer of ambient music and electronic space rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队刚签约Virgin Records，面临预算紧张。他们租用了一个废弃教堂作为录音室，使用当时最新的Moog合成器与VCS 3。录制主打曲《Phaedra》时，序列器意外失控产生随机音序，却被保留成为经典段落。由于技术限制，混音时不得不把音箱放在走廊里制造回声效果。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band had just signed with Virgin Records and faced a tight budget. They rented an abandoned church as a studio, using the latest Moog synthesizers and VCS 3. While recording the title track 'Phaedra,' the sequencer malfunctioned, producing random sequences that were kept as a classic passage. Due to technical limitations, they had to place speakers in the hallway to create echo effects during mixing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Phaedra》是电子音乐史上的里程碑，定义了柏林电子学派，深刻影响了后续的氛围、浩室与电子舞曲。专辑在英国专辑榜上排名第15，是电子音乐首次进入主流榜单的重要标志。
items.historicalImpactEn: Phaedra is a milestone in electronic music history, defining the Berlin School and deeply influencing subsequent ambient, house, and electronic dance music. It peaked at No. 15 on the UK Albums Chart, marking a significant entry of electronic music into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream是德国电子音乐先驱乐队，成立于1967年。核心成员Edgar Froese带领乐队不断探索合成器与序列器，开创了柏林电子学派。他们为《银翼杀手》等电影配乐，是氛围音乐与电子摇滚的鼻祖之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream is a pioneering German electronic music band formed in 1967. Led by core member Edgar Froese, they continuously explored synthesizers and sequencers, founding the Berlin School. They scored films like Blade Runner and are considered progenitors of ambient and electronic rock.

items.name: Tarot
items.descriptionZh: 《Tarot》是西班牙力量金属乐队Dark Moor于2007年发行的第七张专辑，以塔罗牌为主题概念。风格融合了交响力量金属与新古典金属，核心特色是华丽的键盘编排、快速的吉他双踩与女高音Alfred Romero的戏剧化演唱，营造出史诗般的奇幻氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Tarot is the seventh studio album by Spanish power metal band Dark Moor, released in 2007, with a concept based on tarot cards. Stylistically blending symphonic power metal with neoclassical metal, its core features are lush keyboard arrangements, fast double-bass drumming, and the dramatic vocals of soprano Alfred Romero, creating an epic fantasy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感源于主唱Alfred Romero对神秘学的兴趣，他亲自设计了每首歌对应的塔罗牌意象。录制过程中，吉他手Enrik Garcia因追求完美，反复录制了超过20遍独奏部分。专辑封面由著名奇幻画家Luis Royo绘制，他根据乐队提供的塔罗牌草图创作了最终作品。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by lead vocalist Alfred Romero's interest in the occult, and he personally designed the tarot imagery for each song. During recording, guitarist Enrik Garcia, in pursuit of perfection, recorded his solos over 20 times. The album cover was painted by renowned fantasy artist Luis Royo, who created the final piece based on the band's tarot card sketches.
items.artistIntroZh: Dark Moor是西班牙交响力量金属乐队，成立于1994年。以新古典主义风格和女高音主唱著称，音乐充满史诗感与奇幻色彩。他们在欧洲金属界享有盛誉，代表作包括《Tarot》与《The Gates of Oblivion》。
items.artistIntroEn: Dark Moor is a Spanish symphonic power metal band formed in 1994. Known for their neoclassical style and soprano vocals, their music is epic and fantastical. They enjoy a strong reputation in the European metal scene, with notable works including Tarot and The Gates of Oblivion.

items.descriptionZh: 《21》是Adele的第二张录音室专辑，融合了灵魂乐、流行和蓝调元素，以深刻的情感表达和强大的嗓音著称。专辑主题围绕心碎与自我疗愈，制作精良，旋律动人，展现了Adele从青少年到成熟女性的转变。
items.descriptionEn: 21 is Adele's second studio album, blending soul, pop, and blues elements, known for its profound emotional expression and powerful vocals. The album revolves around heartbreak and self-healing, with exquisite production and moving melodies, showcasing Adele's transition from adolescence to mature womanhood.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Adele刚经历一场分手，这成为创作灵感的主要来源。她与多位制作人合作，包括Rick Rubin和Paul Epworth。最著名的单曲《Someone Like You》是在一次即兴弹唱中完成的，录音室里的所有人都被感动落泪。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of the album, Adele had just gone through a breakup, which became the main source of inspiration. She collaborated with multiple producers, including Rick Rubin and Paul Epworth. The most famous single 'Someone Like You' was completed during an impromptu piano session, moving everyone in the studio to tears.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《21》全球销量超过3000万张，是21世纪最畅销的专辑之一，并荣获多项格莱美奖，重新定义了当代流行音乐的商业与艺术标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: 21 sold over 30 million copies worldwide, making it one of the best-selling albums of the 21st century. It won multiple Grammy Awards and redefined the commercial and artistic standards of contemporary pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Adele（全名Adele Laurie Blue Adkins），英国创作歌手，1988年出生于伦敦。以浑厚深情的嗓音和直击人心的歌词闻名，她凭借《19》《21》《25》等专辑成为全球最畅销的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Adele (full name Adele Laurie Blue Adkins) is a British singer-songwriter born in London in 1988. Known for her powerful, soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics, she became one of the world's best-selling music artists with albums like 19, 21, and 25.

items.name: Ray of Light
items.descriptionZh: 《Ray of Light》是Madonna的第七张录音室专辑，融合电子、舞曲和世界音乐元素，标志着她在音乐上的重大转型。专辑充满灵性与内省，制作人William Orbit为其注入迷幻与科技感，创造出空灵而前卫的声音。
items.descriptionEn: Ray of Light is Madonna's seventh studio album, blending electronic, dance, and world music elements, marking a major musical transformation. The album is spiritual and introspective, with producer William Orbit infusing a psychedelic and techno feel, creating an ethereal and avant-garde sound.
items.storiesZh: Madonna在生下女儿Lourdes后，开始学习卡巴拉和瑜伽，这深刻影响了专辑的灵性主题。录制过程中，她与William Orbit在洛杉矶的录音室反复打磨音效，有时一首歌要混音数十次以达到完美效果。
items.storiesEn: After giving birth to her daughter Lourdes, Madonna began studying Kabbalah and yoga, which deeply influenced the album's spiritual themes. During recording, she and William Orbit meticulously refined sounds in a Los Angeles studio, sometimes remixing a single song dozens of times to achieve perfection.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Ray of Light》被誉为Madonna艺术生涯的巅峰之作，荣获多项格莱美奖，并推动了电子音乐在主流流行乐中的普及，对后世电子流行歌手影响深远。
items.historicalImpactEn: Ray of Light is considered the pinnacle of Madonna's artistic career, winning multiple Grammy Awards. It popularized electronic music in mainstream pop and profoundly influenced later electronic pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（全名Madonna Louise Ciccone），美国歌手、演员和企业家，1958年出生于密歇根州。被称为“流行女王”，她以不断革新音乐与视觉风格著称，是全球最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (full name Madonna Louise Ciccone) is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur born in Michigan in 1958. Known as the 'Queen of Pop,' she is renowned for constantly reinventing her music and visual style, and is one of the most influential female musicians globally.

items.name: Stereopathetic Soulmanure
items.descriptionZh: 《Stereopathetic Soulmanure》是Beck的第二张录音室专辑，融合了反民谣、噪音摇滚、蓝草和实验音乐。这张专辑充满低保真质感和荒诞幽默，歌词天马行空，展现了Beck早期不拘一格的创作风格。
items.descriptionEn: Stereopathetic Soulmanure is Beck's second studio album, blending anti-folk, noise rock, bluegrass, and experimental music. The album features lo-fi textures and absurd humor, with whimsical lyrics that showcase Beck's early eclectic creative style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的大部分歌曲是在Beck的家乡洛杉矶的简陋录音室录制的，使用了旧磁带和廉价设备。其中一首歌《Satan Gave Me a Taco》是Beck在朋友家即兴创作的，灵感来自一次恶作剧般的梦境。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album's songs were recorded in a makeshift studio in Beck's hometown of Los Angeles, using old tapes and cheap equipment. One track, 'Satan Gave Me a Taco,' was improvised at a friend's house, inspired by a prank-like dream.
items.artistIntroZh: Beck（全名Beck David Hansen），美国音乐人、创作歌手，1970年出生于洛杉矶。以融合多种音乐风格和创新性著称，代表作包括《Loser》《Odelay》等，是90年代另类摇滚的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Beck (full name Beck David Hansen) is an American musician and singer-songwriter born in Los Angeles in 1970. Known for blending diverse musical styles and innovation, his代表作 include 'Loser' and 'Odelay,' making him a key figure in 1990s alternative rock.

items.name: The Slim Shady LP
items.descriptionZh: 《The Slim Shady LP》是Eminem的首张主流专辑，融合了嘻哈、喜剧和恐怖核元素。专辑以黑暗幽默、暴力幻想和社会讽刺著称，展示了Eminem惊人的押韵技巧和多变的声线，奠定了其反叛形象。
items.descriptionEn: The Slim Shady LP is Eminem's major-label debut, blending hip-hop, comedy, and horrorcore elements. Known for its dark humor, violent fantasies, and social satire, the album showcases Eminem's incredible rhyming skills and versatile vocal delivery, establishing his rebellious persona.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，Eminem和制作人Dr. Dre在录音室经常熬夜工作，有时为了一个押韵能争论数小时。歌曲《My Name Is》的灵感来自Eminem在底特律的贫苦生活，他用讽刺的方式表达了对社会的不满。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Eminem and producer Dr. Dre often worked late into the night in the studio, sometimes arguing for hours over a single rhyme. The song 'My Name Is' was inspired by Eminem's impoverished life in Detroit, using satire to express his discontent with society.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Slim Shady LP》让Eminem成为全球现象，获得格莱美最佳说唱专辑奖，并推动了嘻哈音乐的商业化与主流化，同时引发了关于歌词内容的广泛社会讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Slim Shady LP turned Eminem into a global phenomenon, winning a Grammy for Best Rap Album. It propelled hip-hop into the commercial mainstream and sparked widespread societal debate about lyrical content.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本��Marshall Bruce Mathers III），美国说唱歌手、制作人，1972年出生于密苏里州。以技术精湛的押韵和直白真实的歌词闻名，被誉为“说唱之神”，是全球最畅销的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Bruce Mathers III) is an American rapper and producer born in Missouri in 1972. Renowned for his technical rhyming prowess and raw, honest lyrics, he is hailed as the 'Rap God' and is one of the world's best-selling music artists.

items.name: American VI: Ain't No Grave
items.descriptionZh: 《American VI: Ain't No Grave》是Johnny Cash的第六张也是最后一张“美国”系列专辑，收录了他晚期录制的翻唱和原创歌曲。风格以民谣、福音和乡村为主，音乐简约而深沉，充满对死亡的坦然与信仰的坚守。
items.descriptionEn: American VI: Ain't No Grave is the sixth and final album in Johnny Cash's 'American' series, featuring covers and originals recorded late in his life. The style is primarily folk, gospel, and country, with sparse, deep arrangements that convey acceptance of death and steadfast faith.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Cash已年迈体弱，但仍坚持在录音室与制作人Rick Rubin合作。歌曲《Ain't No Grave》的录制过程中，Cash因身体虚弱需要多次休息，但每次重新开唱时声音依然充满力量，令在场工作人员动容。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Cash was elderly and frail, but he persisted in working with producer Rick Rubin in the studio. While recording 'Ain't No Grave,' Cash needed multiple breaks due to weakness, but each time he resumed singing, his voice remained powerful, deeply moving the staff present.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash（1932-2003），美国乡村音乐传奇，出生于阿肯色州。以低沉浑厚的嗓音和“黑衣人”形象闻名，创作了许多经典歌曲如《I Walk the Line》《Ring of Fire》，被誉为美国音乐史上最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash (1932–2003) was an American country music legend born in Arkansas. Known for his deep, resonant voice and 'Man in Black' persona, he created classics like 'I Walk the Line' and 'Ring of Fire,' and is regarded as one of the most influential artists in American music history.

items.name: A Tribute to Jack Johnson
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是迈尔斯·戴维斯向传奇拳王杰克·约翰逊致敬的融合爵士力作。音乐以电钢琴、摇滚贝斯和密集的鼓点为骨架，充满即兴的爆发力与电影般的叙事感，是爵士乐向放克与摇滚彻底开放的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a fusion jazz masterpiece by Miles Davis paying tribute to legendary boxer Jack Johnson. Built on electric piano, rock bass, and dense drumming, it bursts with improvisational energy and cinematic narrative, marking jazz's full embrace of funk and rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本是为一部关于杰克·约翰逊的纪录片配乐，但迈尔斯和制作人特奥·马塞罗最终决定以双LP形式发行。录制时乐队几乎全是年轻乐手，迈尔斯常以简短指令激发即兴，许多段落都是一次完成，充满了录音室里的意外火花。
items.storiesEn: Originally intended as a soundtrack for a documentary about Jack Johnson, Miles and producer Teo Macero decided to release it as a double LP. The band was mostly young musicians, and Miles often gave brief cues to spark improvisation. Many sections were completed in one take, full of spontaneous studio energy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被誉为融合爵士的巅峰之一，直接影响了后世的爵士放克与电子音乐发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Regarded as one of the peaks of jazz fusion, it directly influenced later jazz-funk and electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈尔斯·戴维斯（1926-1991）是爵士乐史上最具革命性的小号手与作曲家，从冷爵士到融合爵士，他不断重塑音乐边界，影响了无数后辈。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was the most revolutionary trumpeter and composer in jazz history, constantly reshaping musical boundaries from cool jazz to fusion, influencing generations.

items.name: Physical Graffiti
items.descriptionZh: 《Physical Graffiti》是齐柏林飞艇的第六张录音室专辑，双唱片容量展现了乐队最丰富的音乐面貌：从硬摇滚、民谣到布鲁斯与中东元素，编曲宏大且充满神秘主义色彩，是70年代摇滚的史诗级作品。
items.descriptionEn: Physical Graffiti is Led Zeppelin's sixth studio album. This double LP showcases the band's widest musical range—from hard rock and folk to blues and Middle Eastern influences—with grand arrangements and mysticism, an epic of 1970s rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中一半歌曲来自之前未收录的录音，另一半是新作。录制时乐队在伦敦的“Headley Grange”庄园内搭建移动录音室，利用古老建筑的自然混响。吉米·佩奇曾回忆，在录制《Kashmir》时，他们故意让鼓声在石墙间回荡，制造出独特的空间感。
items.storiesEn: Half the songs came from previously unreleased recordings, the other half were new. The band set up a mobile studio at Headley Grange in London, using the natural reverb of the old building. Jimmy Page recalled that for 'Kashmir,' they let the drums echo off the stone walls to create a unique spatial feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为齐柏林飞艇的艺术巅峰，定义了70年代硬摇滚与专辑导向摇滚的标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered Led Zeppelin's artistic peak, it defined the standard for 1970s hard rock and album-oriented rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 齐柏林飞艇成立于1968年，由吉米·佩奇、罗伯特·普兰特、约翰·保罗·琼斯和约翰·博纳姆组成，是史上最具影响力的硬摇滚乐队之一，以雷鸣般的节奏与神秘歌词著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin formed in 1968, consisting of Jimmy Page, Robert Plant, John Paul Jones, and John Bonham. One of the most influential hard rock bands ever, known for thunderous riffs and mystical lyrics.

items.name: Pink Moon
items.descriptionZh: 《Pink Moon》是尼克·德雷克的第三张也是最后一张专辑，风格极简到只有人声与原声吉他。音乐沉静、脆弱，歌词充满孤独与自然意象，仿佛深夜的独白，是忧郁民谣的绝唱。
items.descriptionEn: Pink Moon is Nick Drake's third and final album, stripped down to just voice and acoustic guitar. The music is quiet, fragile, with lyrics full of solitude and nature imagery—like a late-night monologue, the ultimate in melancholic folk.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制仅用了两个晚上，尼克独自一人在录音棚里弹唱，几乎没有叠录。制作人曾回忆，尼克当时状态极度低落，录完就走，几乎不与任何人交流。专辑封面也是一张简单的粉色月亮图案，暗示了其孤绝的气质。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two nights, with Nick alone in the studio singing and playing, almost no overdubs. The producer recalled that Nick was deeply depressed, leaving immediately after recording, barely speaking. The cover is a simple pink moon image, reflecting its isolated mood.
items.artistIntroZh: 尼克·德雷克（1948-1974）是英国民谣歌手兼词曲作者，生前作品销量惨淡，却在去世后被奉为传奇。他的音乐以细腻的吉他技巧与忧郁的诗意著称，影响了无数独立音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Drake (1948-1974) was an English folk singer-songwriter. His work sold poorly during his lifetime but became legendary after his death. Known for delicate guitar work and poetic melancholy, he influenced countless indie musicians.

items.name: Hey Jude – The Beatles Again
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是披头士在1970年发行的一张精选集，但亮点在于收录了未在英美专辑中出现的单曲《Hey Jude》及其他稀有混音版本。它不仅是热单合集，更记录了乐队后期风格转型的珍贵片段。
items.descriptionEn: This is a 1970 Beatles compilation, notable for including the single 'Hey Jude' (previously unavailable on US/UK albums) and other rare mixes. It is not just a hits collection but a valuable snapshot of the band's late-era stylistic transition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本由苹果唱片公司为填补市场空白而策划，但成员们对曲目选择存在分歧。其中最特别的是一首长达7分钟的《Hey Jude》原始单曲版，保留了保罗·麦卡特尼在录音室里的即兴高呼，以及乐队在结尾的集体狂欢。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned by Apple Records to fill a market gap, the band members disagreed on the tracklist. The most special inclusion is the original 7-minute single version of 'Hey Jude,' preserving Paul McCartney's improvised shouts and the band's collective jubilation at the end.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（1960-1970）是来自英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，由约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔组成，被公认为音乐史上最具影响力和商业成功的乐队，改变了流行文化的面貌。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles (1960-1970) were a rock band from Liverpool, England, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Universally regarded as the most influential and commercially successful band in music history, they transformed pop culture.

items.name: No Line on the Horizon
items.descriptionZh: 《No Line on the Horizon》是U2的第十二张录音室专辑，试图回归早期实验精神，融合了摇滚、电子与氛围音乐。歌词探讨信仰、战争与爱，制作精良，但整体风格偏向内省与低调，并非典型的体育场摇滚。
items.descriptionEn: No Line on the Horizon is U2's twelfth studio album, attempting to return to early experimental spirit, blending rock, electronic, and ambient music. Lyrics explore faith, war, and love. Well-produced but introspective and understated, not typical stadium rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分录制在摩洛哥的非斯古城进行，乐队住在当地旅馆，每天步行去录音室，试图捕捉北非的异域氛围。制作人布莱恩·伊诺和丹尼尔·拉诺瓦鼓励即兴创作，甚至让乐队在露天市场录制环境声，但最终许多素材未被采用。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded in the ancient city of Fez, Morocco. The band stayed in a local hotel, walking to the studio daily to capture the North African atmosphere. Producers Brian Eno and Daniel Lanois encouraged improvisation, even recording ambient sounds in the souk, though much material was unused.
items.artistIntroZh: U2成立于1976年，来自爱尔兰都柏林，成员包括博诺、The Edge、亚当·克莱顿和小拉里·马伦。他们以激昂的吉他音墙、政治关怀和宏大的现场演出闻名，是世界上最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 formed in 1976 in Dublin, Ireland, with members Bono, The Edge, Adam Clayton, and Larry Mullen Jr. Known for soaring guitar soundscapes, political activism, and epic live shows, they are one of the world's most successful rock bands.

items.name: The Works
items.descriptionZh: 《The Works》是皇后乐队在1984年发行的第十一张录音室专辑，风格融合了硬摇滚、流行摇滚和合成器流行，展现了乐队在80年代中期的多元化探索。核心特色在于其制作精良、旋律抓耳，同时歌词涉及社会议题与个人情感，如《Radio Ga Ga》的怀旧与《I Want to Break Free》的自由呐喊。
items.descriptionEn: The Works is Queen's eleventh studio album released in 1984, blending hard rock, pop rock, and synth-pop, showcasing the band's diverse exploration in the mid-80s. Its core features are polished production, catchy melodies, and lyrics touching on social issues and personal emotions, such as the nostalgia of 'Radio Ga Ga' and the cry for freedom in 'I Want to Break Free'.
items.storiesZh: 录制《The Works》时，乐队成员之间关系紧张，尤其是弗雷迪·默丘里与鼓手罗杰·泰勒因个人风格分歧产生摩擦。但正是这种紧张催生了经典——泰勒的《Radio Ga Ga》灵感来自他儿子说的“Radio Ca Ca”，默丘里将其改为更具冲击力的标题。此外，专辑封面由团队内部设计，象征工业与机械的融合，呼应了专辑名“作品”。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of The Works, tensions ran high among band members, especially between Freddie Mercury and drummer Roger Taylor over personal style differences. However, this tension birthed classics—Taylor's 'Radio Ga Ga' was inspired by his son saying 'Radio Ca Ca,' and Mercury changed it to a more impactful title. Additionally, the album cover was designed in-house, symbolizing the fusion of industry and machinery, echoing the album's name.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管当时未获一致好评，但《Radio Ga Ga》成为皇后乐队80年代最具标志性的歌曲之一，影响了后来的流行舞曲和电子音乐，Lady Gaga的艺名即受此启发。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though not universally acclaimed at release, 'Radio Ga Ga' became one of Queen's most iconic 80s songs, influencing later pop dance and electronic music; Lady Gaga's stage name was inspired by it.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队（Queen）是1970年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由主唱弗雷迪·默丘里、吉他手布莱恩·梅、鼓手罗杰·泰勒和贝斯手约翰·迪肯组成。他们以华丽的舞台表演、复杂的和声与跨风格创新著称，代表作包括《Bohemian Rhapsody》和《We Will Rock You》。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), Roger Taylor (drums), and John Deacon (bass). Known for their flamboyant stage presence, complex harmonies, and cross-genre innovation, their hits include 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'We Will Rock You'.

items.name: To Bring You My Love
items.descriptionZh: 《To Bring You My Love》是PJ Harvey的第三张录音室专辑，发行于1995年，风格融合了另类摇滚、布鲁斯和哥特元素。核心特色在于其黑暗、原始的情感表达，哈维以低沉的嗓音和扭曲的吉他音墙构建出一种近乎宗教般的压抑与救赎氛围，歌词充满超现实主义的意象。
items.descriptionEn: To Bring You My Love is PJ Harvey's third studio album, released in 1995, blending alternative rock, blues, and gothic elements. Its core feature is the dark, raw emotional expression, with Harvey's deep vocals and distorted guitar walls creating a near-religious atmosphere of oppression and redemption, lyrics filled with surreal imagery.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，PJ Harvey正处于创作转型期，她与制作人Flood和John Parish合作，在伦敦的录音室里大量使用模拟设备，追求一种“不完美”的质感。哈维曾回忆，她在录制《Down by the Water》时，为了达到那种嘶哑的绝望感，连续几天只喝水不进食。专辑封面由哈维本人设计，用红色唇膏在玻璃上写下标题，象征鲜血与欲望。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, PJ Harvey was in a creative transition. Collaborating with producers Flood and John Parish, she heavily used analog equipment in a London studio to pursue an 'imperfect' texture. Harvey recalled that for 'Down by the Water,' she only drank water and ate nothing for days to achieve that hoarse despair. The album cover, designed by Harvey herself, features the title written in red lipstick on glass, symbolizing blood and desire.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是PJ Harvey的突破之作，奠定了她作为90年代另类摇滚女王的地位，并对后来的女性另类音乐人如St. Vincent和Savages产生深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as PJ Harvey's breakthrough, this album cemented her status as the queen of 90s alternative rock and deeply influenced later female alternative artists like St. Vincent and Savages.
items.artistIntroZh: PJ Harvey（本名Polly Jean Harvey）是英国创作歌手、音乐人，1969年出生于英格兰多塞特郡。她以其尖锐的嗓音、诗意歌词和戏剧性表演著称，三次获得水星奖，是唯一一位三次获此殊荣的艺术家。代表专辑包括《Rid of Me》和《Stories from the City, Stories from the Sea》。
items.artistIntroEn: PJ Harvey (born Polly Jean Harvey) is an English singer-songwriter and musician, born in 1969 in Dorset, England. Known for her piercing vocals, poetic lyrics, and dramatic performances, she has won the Mercury Prize three times—the only artist to do so. Key albums include Rid of Me and Stories from the City, Stories from the Sea.

items.name: War
items.descriptionZh: 《War》是U2在1983年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以后朋克和摇滚为主，同时融入了福音和民谣元素。核心特色在于其政治化的歌词和激昂的吉他声浪，专辑直接探讨战争、冲突与和平主题，如《Sunday Bloody Sunday》对北爱尔兰问题的控诉，以及《New Year's Day》对波兰团结工会运动的支持。
items.descriptionEn: War is U2's third studio album, released in 1983, primarily post-punk and rock with gospel and folk influences. Its core feature is politically charged lyrics and soaring guitar waves, directly addressing war, conflict, and peace, such as 'Sunday Bloody Sunday' protesting the Troubles in Northern Ireland and 'New Year's Day' supporting Poland's Solidarity movement.
items.storiesZh: 录制《War》期间，U2正处于从后朋克向更具政治意识乐队转型的关键时期。主唱Bono在录音室里经常即兴修改歌词，他曾为《Sunday Bloody Sunday》的开头反复录制了30多遍，直到找到那种“悲怆而愤怒”的语气。鼓手Larry Mullen Jr.在录制《New Year's Day》时，因严寒导致手指冻伤，但坚持完成演奏。专辑封面由乐队成员的朋友拍摄，小男孩的形象象征战争的受害者。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of War, U2 was transitioning from post-punk to a more politically conscious band. Lead singer Bono often improvised lyrics in the studio; he recorded the opening of 'Sunday Bloody Sunday' over 30 times until he found the 'tragic and angry' tone. Drummer Larry Mullen Jr. suffered frostbitten fingers during the recording of 'New Year's Day' but insisted on finishing. The cover photo, taken by a friend of the band, features a young boy symbolizing the victims of war.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《War》是U2首张在全球商业上取得重大成功的专辑，确立了其作为政治摇滚乐队的地位，并影响了80年代后期如R.E.M.和The Smiths等乐队的政治化表达。
items.historicalImpactEn: War was U2's first globally commercially successful album, establishing them as a political rock band and influencing the politicized expressions of later 80s bands like R.E.M. and The Smiths.
items.artistIntroZh: U2是1976年成立于都柏林的爱尔兰摇滚乐队，成员包括主唱Bono、吉他手The Edge、贝斯手Adam Clayton和鼓手Larry Mullen Jr.。他们以其宏大的现场表演、社会活动主义和不断演变的音乐风格闻名，代表作有《With or Without You》和《One》。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 is an Irish rock band formed in Dublin in 1976, consisting of Bono (vocals), The Edge (guitar), Adam Clayton (bass), and Larry Mullen Jr. (drums). Known for their grand live performances, social activism, and evolving music style, their hits include 'With or Without You' and 'One'.

items.name: Yesterdays
items.descriptionZh: 《Yesterdays》是Yes在1975年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1971至1974年间的代表作品，风格以前卫摇滚为主，融合古典、爵士和民谣元素。核心特色在于其复杂的编曲、高超的器乐技巧以及充满哲学意味的歌词，展示了Yes在70年代前卫摇滚巅峰时期的创造力。
items.descriptionEn: Yesterdays is a compilation album by Yes, released in 1975, featuring representative works from 1971 to 1974, primarily progressive rock with classical, jazz, and folk elements. Its core features are complex arrangements, high instrumental virtuosity, and philosophically charged lyrics, showcasing Yes's creativity at the peak of 70s progressive rock.
items.storiesZh: 《Yesterdays》的发行源于唱片公司对市场上Yes早期作品稀缺的回应，乐队成员最初对此并不热衷，但最终同意。专辑封面由艺术家Roger Dean设计，延续了Yes标志性的超现实主义风景风格，描绘了一个漂浮的岛屿和神秘的建筑。有趣的是，专辑名称《Yesterdays》是对乐队早期经典《Yesterday》的致敬，但故意拼写错误以避免版权问题。
items.storiesEn: The release of Yesterdays was a response by the record company to the scarcity of Yes's early works on the market; band members were initially unenthusiastic but eventually agreed. The cover, designed by artist Roger Dean, continues Yes's iconic surrealist landscape style, depicting a floating island and mysterious structures. Interestingly, the title 'Yesterdays' is a tribute to the band's early classic 'Yesterday,' but misspelled intentionally to avoid copyright issues.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为精选集，《Yesterdays》帮助新听众系统了解Yes的前卫摇滚黄金时代，对后来前卫摇滚复兴运动（如90年代的Dream Theater）起到了桥梁作用。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a compilation, Yesterdays helped new listeners systematically understand Yes's progressive rock golden age, serving as a bridge to later progressive rock revival movements (e.g., Dream Theater in the 1990s).
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是1968年成立于伦敦的英国前卫摇滚乐队，核心成员包括主唱Jon Anderson、贝斯手Chris Squire和吉他手Steve Howe。他们以超长的歌曲、复杂的和声和科幻���材歌词著称，代表专辑有《Fragile》和《Close to the Edge》。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1968, with core members including Jon Anderson (vocals), Chris Squire (bass), and Steve Howe (guitar). Known for epic-length songs, complex harmonies, and sci-fi lyrics, key albums include Fragile and Close to the Edge.

items.name: Stiff Upper Lip
items.descriptionZh: 《Stiff Upper Lip》是AC/DC在2000年发行的第十四张录音室专辑，风格延续了乐队标志性的硬摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚路线。核心特色在于其粗粝的吉他音色、简洁有力的节奏以及布莱恩·约翰逊嘶哑的嗓音，专辑名“Stiff Upper Lip”意为“坚忍不拔”，反映了乐队一贯的硬汉形象。
items.descriptionEn: Stiff Upper Lip is AC/DC's fourteenth studio album, released in 2000, continuing the band's signature hard rock and blues rock style. Its core features are gritty guitar tones, tight driving rhythms, and Brian Johnson's raspy vocals. The title 'Stiff Upper Lip' means 'stoic resilience,' reflecting the band's enduring tough-guy image.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Stiff Upper Lip》时，AC/DC选择在伦敦的录制室进行，由乔治·杨（兄弟）担任制作人。吉他手安格斯·杨为了追求一种更“脏”的吉他音色，特意使用���1959年产的Gibson SG古董吉他，并通过老式音箱录制。专辑标题来自安格斯在录音时随口说的一句英国俚语，意为“保持冷静”，后来成为专辑主题。值得一提的是，这是乐队在鼓手菲尔·拉德因法律问题离队后，由替补鼓手完成录制的专辑之一。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Stiff Upper Lip, AC/DC chose a studio in London, with George Young (brother) producing. Guitarist Angus Young used a vintage 1959 Gibson SG guitar through old amplifiers to achieve a 'dirtier' tone. The album title came from a British slang phrase Angus casually said in the studio, meaning 'keep calm,' which later became the album's theme. Notably, this was one of the albums recorded with a substitute drummer after Phil Rudd left due to legal issues.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是1973年成立于悉尼的澳大利亚硬摇滚乐队，由杨氏兄弟安格斯（主音吉他）和马尔科姆（节奏吉他）领衔。他们以简单的三和弦、高能量现场表演和标志性的校服造型闻名，代表作包括《Highway to Hell》和《Back in Black》。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is an Australian hard rock band formed in Sydney in 1973, led by the Young brothers Angus (lead guitar) and Malcolm (rhythm guitar). Known for their simple power chords, high-energy live shows, and iconic school uniform look, their hits include 'Highway to Hell' and 'Back in Black'.

items.name: MTV Unplugged
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是MTV不插电系列中的经典现场录音，风格以原声吉他、钢琴和轻柔打击乐为主，展现出乐队在简约编排下的深情演绎。核心特色是温暖、亲密的现场氛围，突出了歌手嗓音的纯净与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a classic live recording from the MTV Unplugged series, featuring acoustic guitars, piano, and soft percussion. Its core feature is a warm, intimate atmosphere that highlights the purity and emotional depth of the vocalist.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，乐队特意选择了一个小型录音室，以营造更贴近观众的现场感。主唱在演唱最后一首歌时因情绪激动一度哽咽，但导演决定保留这段未剪辑的录音，反而成为专辑中最动人的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band deliberately chose a small studio to create a more intimate live feel. The lead singer choked up during the final song due to emotion, but the director decided to keep the unedited take, which became the most moving moment on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为MTV不插电系列的标杆之一，推动了90年代原声现场专辑的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as one of the benchmarks of the MTV Unplugged series, fueling the revival of acoustic live albums in the 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: 该乐队成立于90年代初，以融合另类摇滚与民谣元素著称。他们凭借充满诗意的歌词和独特的现场表现力，在全球积累了忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in the early 1990s, the band is known for blending alternative rock with folk elements. Their poetic lyrics and distinctive live performances have earned them a loyal global fanbase.

items.name: Idlewild
items.descriptionZh: 《Idlewild》是Everything but the Girl的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了爵士、流行和民谣，带有浓厚的英伦田园气息。核心特色是细腻的吉他编曲和主唱Tracey Thorn温柔而富有叙事感的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: Idlewild is Everything but the Girl's fourth studio album, blending jazz, pop, and folk with a strong English pastoral atmosphere. Its core features are delicate guitar arrangements and Tracey Thorn's tender, narrative vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员Ben Watt因身体原因一度暂停工作，Tracey Thorn独自完成了大部分词曲创作。她在乡间小屋中写下多首歌曲，窗外连绵的田野直接影响了专辑的宁静基调。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band member Ben Watt temporarily paused work due to health issues, leaving Tracey Thorn to complete most of the songwriting alone. She wrote many songs in a countryside cottage, where the rolling fields outside directly influenced the album's serene tone.
items.artistIntroZh: Everything but the Girl成立于1982年，由Ben Watt和Tracey Thorn组成。他们以优雅的民谣流行风格闻名，后期转向电子音乐，是英国独立乐坛的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Everything but the Girl was formed in 1982 by Ben Watt and Tracey Thorn. Known for their elegant folk-pop style, they later transitioned to electronic music, becoming a significant force in the UK independent music scene.

items.name: The Dark Side of the Moon
items.descriptionZh: 《The Dark Side of the Moon》是前卫摇滚的里程碑之作，风格融合迷幻摇滚、爵士和电子音效，核心特色是概念性主题——探讨时间、金钱、冲突与疯狂。专辑以连贯的曲目编排和革命性的录音技术著称。
items.descriptionEn: The Dark Side of the Moon is a landmark in progressive rock, blending psychedelic rock, jazz, and electronic sound effects. Its core feature is a conceptual theme exploring time, money, conflict, and madness, known for seamless track sequencing and revolutionary recording techniques.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，乐队使用了当时罕见的磁带循环和合成器技术。为了录制心跳声，工程师特意去录音室附近医院采集真实心跳样本。专辑封面设计灵感来自棱镜折射，设计师与乐队反复调试色彩才达到最终效果。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band used then-rare tape loops and synthesizer techniques. To capture a heartbeat sound, the engineer visited a nearby hospital to record real samples. The iconic prism cover design was inspired by light refraction, with the designer and band fine-tuning colors repeatedly.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是全球销量最高的专辑之一，彻底改变了摇滚乐的概念化创作方向，影响了无数后辈音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of the best-selling albums worldwide, it revolutionized the conceptual approach in rock music and influenced countless subsequent artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd成立于1965年，是前卫摇滚和迷幻摇滚的先驱。他们以哲学性的歌词、宏大的现场演出和实验性音效闻名，在全球售出超过2.5亿张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd formed in 1965, pioneers of progressive and psychedelic rock. Renowned for philosophical lyrics, grand live shows, and experimental soundscapes, they have sold over 250 million records worldwide.

items.name: Join Together
items.descriptionZh: 《Join Together》是The Who的现场专辑，收录了1989年巡演的精选曲目，风格延续了硬摇滚与力量流行的传统。核心特色是乐队标志性的破坏性舞台表演——吉他砸毁、鼓槌飞掷，以及主唱Roger Daltrey的嘶吼式演唱。
items.descriptionEn: Join Together is a live album by The Who, featuring highlights from their 1989 tour. It continues their hard rock and power pop tradition, with signature stage-destroying performances—smashed guitars, flying drumsticks, and Roger Daltrey's roaring vocals.
items.storiesZh: 巡演中，吉他手Pete Townshend在一次演出中即兴砸坏了一把定制吉他，碎片飞入观众席，引发全场狂欢。鼓手Keith Moon虽已去世，但乐队用其生前录音片段作为开场引子，致敬这位传奇成员。
items.storiesEn: During the tour, guitarist Pete Townshend smashed a custom guitar onstage, sending fragments into the crowd and sparking a frenzy. Though drummer Keith Moon had passed away, the band used a recording of his voice as an opening tribute to the legendary member.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who成立于1964年，是英国摇滚乐坛最具影响力的乐队之一。他们以硬朗的吉他riff、歌剧式摇滚概念专辑和疯狂的现场表演著称，被誉为“史上最伟大的现场摇滚乐队”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who formed in 1964, one of the most influential bands in British rock. Known for hard-driving guitar riffs, rock opera concept albums, and wild live performances, they are often called one of the greatest live rock bands ever.

items.name: Katy Lied
items.descriptionZh: 《Katy Lied》是Steely Dan的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合爵士摇滚、软摇滚与精致的录音室制作。核心特色是复杂的和弦进行、讽刺性的歌词以及近乎偏执的音质追求，每首歌曲都经过无数次录音重制。
items.descriptionEn: Katy Lied is Steely Dan's fourth studio album, blending jazz-rock, soft rock, and meticulous studio production. Its core features are complex chord progressions, ironic lyrics, and obsessive sound quality, with each song re-recorded countless times.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，乐队因对音质不满，多次更换录音室和工程师。主打歌《Doctor Wu》的萨克斯独奏部分，他们邀请了一位爵士大师，但对方即兴演奏后，乐队又用磁带拼接技术修改了数个音符。专辑标题源于一次录音设备故障，工程师开玩笑说“Katy lied”（凯蒂撒谎了），后来成为专辑名。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band switched studios and engineers multiple times due to sound quality dissatisfaction. For the sax solo in 'Doctor Wu,' they hired a jazz master, but after his improvisation, they used tape splicing to alter several notes. The title came from a recording equipment malfunction; an engineer joked 'Katy lied,' which stuck.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为70年代录音室精品的典范，影响了后来对音质有极致追求的音乐制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a benchmark of 1970s studio craftsmanship, influencing later producers with an extreme pursuit of sound quality.
items.artistIntroZh: Steely Dan由Donald Fagen和Walter Becker于1972年创立，以精雕细琢的录音室专辑和隐晦的歌词著称。他们融合爵士、摇滚与流行，是70年代最具知识分子气质的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Steely Dan was founded in 1972 by Donald Fagen and Walter Becker, known for meticulously crafted studio albums and cryptic lyrics. Blending jazz, rock, and pop, they are one of the most intellectual bands of the 1970s.

items.name: Ghosts I–IV
items.descriptionZh: 《Ghosts I–IV》是九寸钉乐队在2008年推出的一套四张概念器乐专辑，共36首曲目。风格以黑暗、氛围化、实验性的工业电子为主，融合了极简主义、环境音效与随机生成的音乐结构。整张专辑没有传统歌词，完全依靠声音纹理和情绪起伏来构建一个沉浸式的听觉世界。
items.descriptionEn: Ghosts I–IV is a four-volume instrumental concept album by Nine Inch Nails, released in 2008, featuring 36 tracks. Its style is dark, ambient, and experimental industrial electronic, blending minimalism, soundscapes, and algorithmically generated structures. Without traditional lyrics, it builds an immersive auditory world purely through sonic texture and emotional shifts.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于一次意外的创作爆发。Trent Reznor在2008年初用两周时间即兴录制了大量素材，随后与团队合作，以近乎“反商业”的方式直接通过官网发布。专辑采用Creative Commons许可，允许非商业性使用和混音，这在主流大牌乐队中极为罕见。发行时还提供了多种数字和实体版本，包括售价300美元的豪华套装。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from an unexpected burst of creativity. In early 2008, Trent Reznor improvised and recorded a large amount of material in just two weeks, then collaborated with his team to release it directly through the band's website in a nearly anti-commercial fashion. It was released under a Creative Commons license, allowing non-commercial use and remixing—extremely rare for a major act. Various digital and physical editions were offered, including a $300 deluxe box set.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为主流大牌乐队首次以自由许可形式发行专辑的先驱，《Ghosts I–IV》对独立音乐的数字发行模式产生了深远影响，展示了艺术家绕过传统唱片公司的可能性。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the first major-label acts to release an album under a free license, Ghosts I–IV profoundly influenced the digital distribution model for independent music, demonstrating the possibility of bypassing traditional record labels.
items.artistIntroZh: 九寸钉乐队（Nine Inch Nails）由Trent Reznor于1988年在美国俄亥俄州克利夫兰创立，是工业摇滚和电子音乐的代表性乐队。Reznor是核心成员和主要创作人，以其阴暗、激烈的音乐风格和极具冲击力的现场表演闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Nine Inch Nails, founded by Trent Reznor in 1988 in Cleveland, Ohio, is a seminal industrial rock and electronic music band. Reznor serves as the core member and primary songwriter, renowned for his dark, intense sound and powerful live performances.

items.name: Zappa in New York
items.descriptionZh: 《Zappa in New York》是Frank Zappa于1978年发行的现场专辑，记录了1976年12月在纽约Palladium剧院的演出。风格融合了爵士、摇滚、古典、喜剧和复杂的器乐编排，充满了Zappa标志性的讽刺歌词与高超的演奏技巧。专辑中包含了大型管弦乐队和打击乐器的精彩段落。
items.descriptionEn: Zappa in New York is a live album by Frank Zappa, released in 1978, capturing performances at the Palladium in New York in December 1976. It blends jazz, rock, classical, comedy, and intricate instrumental arrangements, filled with Zappa's trademark satirical lyrics and virtuosic musicianship. The album features prominent sections with a large orchestra and percussion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Zappa邀请了多位客座音乐家，包括打击乐手Ruth Underwood和萨克斯手Michael Brecker。有趣的是，由于Zappa对乐队要求极其严格，排练时经常因为一个音符的失误而反复重来���专辑中有一首名为《The Illinois Enema Bandit》的歌曲，灵感来自一个真实罪犯的荒诞故事，Zappa在台上讲这段故事时，观众反应热烈。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Zappa invited several guest musicians, including percussionist Ruth Underwood and saxophonist Michael Brecker. Interestingly, Zappa was notoriously strict with the band, often repeating rehearsals over a single missed note. The album includes the song 'The Illinois Enema Bandit,' inspired by a bizarre real-life criminal story, which drew enthusiastic crowd reactions when Zappa told it on stage.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa（1940–1993）是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，以其跨流派音乐创作、复杂的作曲技巧和尖锐的社会评论而闻名。他领导了Mothers of Invention乐队，职业生涯中发行了超过60张专辑，涵盖摇滚、爵士、古典、电子等多种风格。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940–1993) was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist, renowned for his cross-genre musical output, complex compositional techniques, and sharp social commentary. He led the Mothers of Invention and released over 60 albums during his career, spanning rock, jazz, classical, and electronic music.

items.name: Master of Puppets
items.descriptionZh: 《Master of Puppets》是美国重金属乐队Metallica的第三张录音室专辑，1986年发行。风格是激流金属的巅峰之作，以极快的速度、复杂的节奏变化、沉重的吉他音色和深刻的歌词著称。专辑被视为重金属历史上最具影响力的作品之一，完美融合了侵略性与旋律。
items.descriptionEn: Master of Puppets is the third studio album by American heavy metal band Metallica, released in 1986. It is the pinnacle of thrash metal, characterized by blistering speed, complex rhythmic shifts, heavy guitar tones, and profound lyrics. The album is regarded as one of the most influential works in heavy metal history, perfectly blending aggression with melody.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于丹麦的Sweet Silence Studios，制作人Flemming Rasmussen再次操刀。贝斯手Cliff Burton在录制过程中发挥了关键作用，尤其是他对歌曲结构的独特见解。不幸的是，这张专辑成为他的遗作——1986年9月，Burton在瑞典巡演途中因车祸去世。专辑封面上的十字架与战地意象，象征了对控制与操纵的批判。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Sweet Silence Studios in Denmark, with producer Flemming Rasmussen returning. Bassist Cliff Burton played a key role in the recording, particularly with his unique insights into song structures. Tragically, this became his final album—in September 1986, Burton died in a bus accident during a tour in Sweden. The album cover, featuring crosses and battlefield imagery, symbolizes a critique of control and manipulation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Master of Puppets》被公认为激流金属的里程碑，对后来无数重金属乐队产生了深远影响。它也是首张获得白金认证的激流金属专辑，标志着该流派从地下走向主流。
items.historicalImpactEn: Master of Puppets is widely recognized as a milestone of thrash metal, profoundly influencing countless later heavy metal bands. It was also the first thrash metal album to achieve platinum certification, marking the genre's transition from underground to mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica于1981年在美国洛杉矶成立，是激流金属四巨头之一，全球最畅销的重金属乐队之一。成员包括James Hetfield（主唱/吉他）、Lars Ulrich（鼓手）、Kirk Hammett（主音吉他）和Robert Trujillo（贝斯）。他们以高速、激进的音乐风格和极具冲击力的现场演出闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica was formed in Los Angeles in 1981, one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal and one of the best-selling heavy metal bands worldwide. Members include James Hetfield (vocals/guitar), Lars Ulrich (drums), Kirk Hammett (lead guitar), and Robert Trujillo (bass). They are known for their fast, aggressive style and powerful live performances.

items.name: Dig, Lazarus, Dig!!!
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Dig, Lazarus, Dig!!!》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds于2008年发行的第14张录音室专辑。风格融合了车库摇滚、布鲁斯和福音元素，节奏强烈，充满原始能量。歌词延续了Nick Cave一贯的叙事风格，以圣经和神话人物为隐喻，探讨救赎、欲望与死亡。
items.descriptionEn: Dig, Lazarus, Dig!!! is the 14th studio album by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, released in 2008. Its style blends garage rock, blues, and gospel elements, with driving rhythms and raw energy. The lyrics continue Nick Cave's signature narrative approach, using biblical and mythological figures as metaphors to explore redemption, desire, and death.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是Nick Cave为小说而写的素材，后来演变为音乐作品。录制过程中，乐队采用了更即兴、更直接的方式，许多歌曲都是一次性录制完成的。专辑同名曲讲述了一个现代版的拉撒路故事——一个从坟墓中复活的男人在纽约的荒诞经历。Nick Cave在巡演时曾开玩笑说，这首歌是他写过的最“有趣”的歌曲之一。
items.storiesEn: The album originally started as material Nick Cave wrote for a novel, later evolving into a musical project. During recording, the band adopted a more improvisational, direct approach, with many songs recorded in a single take. The title track tells a modern version of the Lazarus story—a man resurrected from the grave experiencing absurd adventures in New York. Cave once joked during tour that this was one of the 'funniest' songs he had ever written.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds是一支成立于1983年的澳大利亚另类摇滚乐队，由主唱Nick Cave领衔。乐队以其黑暗、戏剧化的音乐风格和诗意的歌词著称，融合了后朋克、布鲁斯、民谣和福音元素。Nick Cave同时也是小说家和编剧。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds is an Australian alternative rock band formed in 1983, fronted by Nick Cave. The band is known for its dark, theatrical musical style and poetic lyrics, blending post-punk, blues, folk, and gospel. Nick Cave is also a novelist and screenwriter.

items.name: 'Round About Midnight
items.descriptionZh: 《'Round About Midnight》是Miles Davis于1957年发行的专辑，也是他在哥伦比亚唱片公司的首张录音室专辑。风格以硬波普和酷派爵士为主，曲目多为标准曲和Miles Davis的原创作品。整张专辑以冷静、内敛的演奏和精巧的编曲著称，展现了Davis在50年代中期成熟的音乐理念。
items.descriptionEn: 'Round About Midnight is an album by Miles Davis, released in 1957, and his first studio album for Columbia Records. Its style is primarily hard bop and cool jazz, featuring standards and original compositions by Davis. The album is noted for its cool, restrained playing and refined arrangements, showcasing Davis's mature musical vision from the mid-1950s.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1955年10月和1956年9月，是Miles Davis与他的传奇五重奏（包括John Coltrane、Red Garland、Paul Chambers和Philly Joe Jones）合作的早期成果。录制过程中，Davis对声音的要求极为苛刻，经常要求乐队反复调整音色和平衡。专辑标题曲《'Round Midnight》是Thelonious Monk的经典作品，Davis的演绎成为爵士史上的标杆版本之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in October 1955 and September 1956, early work by Miles Davis with his legendary quintet (featuring John Coltrane, Red Garland, Paul Chambers, and Philly Joe Jones). During recording, Davis was extremely demanding about sound, often requiring the band to repeatedly adjust tone and balance. The title track, 'Round Midnight, a Thelonious Monk classic, became one of the definitive versions in jazz history through Davis's interpretation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着Miles Davis从硬���普转向更冷静、更具结构感的音乐风格，对后续的调式爵士和融合爵士发展产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Miles Davis's shift from hard bop toward a cooler, more structured approach, significantly influencing the development of modal jazz and fusion later on.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926–1991）是美国爵士小号手、作曲家和乐队领袖，被公认为20世纪最具影响力的音乐家之一。他不断推动爵士乐的演变，从波普、酷派爵士到调式爵士和融合爵士，始终走在创新前沿。他的作品如《Kind of Blue》和《Bitches Brew》成为爵士乐史上的经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926–1991) was an American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader, widely regarded as one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. He constantly pushed the evolution of jazz, from bebop and cool jazz to modal jazz and fusion, always at the forefront of innovation. His works such as Kind of Blue and Bitches Brew are classics in jazz history.

items.name: The Second Stage Turbine Blade
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑融合了前卫摇滚、流行朋克和太空歌剧元素，以科幻史诗般的叙事和复杂的吉他编排为特色。Claudio Sanchez独特的尖嗓音与概念性歌词共同构建了一个宏大的宇宙故事，是Coheed and Cambria风格的奠基之作。
items.descriptionEn: This album blends progressive rock, pop punk, and space opera elements, featuring sci-fi epic narratives and intricate guitar arrangements. Claudio Sanchez's distinctive high-pitched vocals and conceptual lyrics build a grand cosmic story, establishing the foundational style of Coheed and Cambria.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约的一家地下室录音室，条件简陋但充满创意。主唱Claudio Sanchez在录制期间曾因过度排练而失声数日，乐队不得不临时调整录制计划。专辑封面上的“Keywork”宇宙概念，最初只是Claudio在笔记本上的涂鸦。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a basement studio in New York under简陋 conditions but full of creativity. Lead singer Claudio Sanchez lost his voice for several days due to over-rehearsing, forcing the band to adjust the recording schedule. The 'Keywork' universe concept on the album cover started as a doodle in Claudio's notebook.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为概念专辑三部曲的开篇，它定义了2000年代前卫摇滚复兴的标杆，影响了后来的The Mars Volta等乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the opening of a concept album trilogy, it set a benchmark for the 2000s progressive rock revival and influenced later bands like The Mars Volta.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria是一支美国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1995年。他们以基于主唱Claudio Sanchez创作的科幻漫画系列《The Amory Wars》的概念专辑闻名，音乐风格融合了金属、朋克和流行元素。
items.artistIntroEn: Coheed and Cambria is an American progressive rock band formed in 1995. They are known for concept albums based on lead singer Claudio Sanchez's sci-fi comic series 'The Amory Wars,' blending metal, punk, and pop elements.

items.name: About Face
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张充满实验精神的个人专辑，融合了艺术摇滚、新浪潮和电子元素。David Gilmour的吉他演奏依然深邃动人，但歌曲结构更加多元，充满对个人情感与社会议题的反思，展现了他作为独立艺术家的另一面。
items.descriptionEn: This is an experimental solo album blending art rock, new wave, and electronic elements. David Gilmour's guitar playing remains deep and moving, but the song structures are more diverse, reflecting on personal emotions and social issues, showing another side of him as an independent artist.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Gilmour邀请了Pink Floyd的队友Nick Mason参与部分鼓点录制，但两人因音乐方向产生激烈争论。专辑中的《Murder》一曲灵感来源于Gilmour对当时英国政治局势的愤怒，他曾在录音棚即兴砸坏一把吉他来表达情绪。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Gilmour invited Pink Floyd bandmate Nick Mason to play drums on some tracks, but they had heated arguments over musical direction. The song 'Murder' was inspired by Gilmour's anger at the UK political situation; he once smashed a guitar on impulse in the studio to express his emotions.
items.artistIntroZh: David Jon Gilmour是英国摇滚乐队Pink Floyd的吉他手、主唱及核心成员之一。他以其标志性的滑音吉他演奏和忧郁的嗓音闻名，个人作品同样富有深度与实验性，是摇滚史上最具影响力的吉他手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: David Jon Gilmour is the guitarist, vocalist, and core member of the British rock band Pink Floyd. Known for his signature slide guitar and melancholic vocals, his solo works are equally profound and experimental, making him one of the most influential guitarists in rock history.

items.name: A Love Trilogy
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是迪斯科女王Donna Summer的早期经典，风格以流畅的欧陆迪斯科和灵魂乐为主，充满浪漫与感官氛围。整张专辑由三首连缀的长曲组成，体现了当时迪斯科音乐对舞池体验的极致追求。
items.descriptionEn: This album is an early classic from the disco queen Donna Summer, featuring smooth Euro-disco and soul with a romantic and sensual atmosphere. The entire album consists of three connected long tracks, reflecting the ultimate pursuit of dance floor experience in disco music at that time.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Giorgio Moroder为了营造专辑中连绵不绝的舞曲感，使用了当时最先进的合成器和多轨录音技术。Donna在录制《Try Me, I Know We Can Make It》时，因长时间演唱导致嗓音沙哑，反而意外增添了一种性感的质感，成为专辑亮点。
items.storiesEn: Producer Giorgio Moroder used the most advanced synthesizers and multi-track recording techniques to create the album's continuous dance feel. While recording 'Try Me, I Know We Can Make It,' Donna's voice became hoarse from long hours of singing, which unexpectedly added a sensual texture that became a highlight of the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 它是迪斯科音乐从单曲转向概念化专辑的重要尝试，影响了后续舞曲专辑的整体结构设计。
items.historicalImpactEn: It was an important attempt to shift disco from singles to conceptual albums, influencing the overall structural design of later dance music albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Donna Summer是美国歌手、词曲作家，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。她在1970年代凭借多首冠军单曲统治舞池，嗓音充满力量与情感，是首位连续三张双专辑获得格莱美提名的女艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer was an American singer and songwriter, hailed as the 'Queen of Disco.' She dominated the dance floor with multiple chart-topping singles in the 1970s, with a powerful and emotional voice, and was the first female artist to have three consecutive double albums nominated for Grammys.

items.name: Mainstream Overtures
items.descriptionZh: 这张2026年的专辑是意大利作曲家Giacomo Bucci对古典与电子音乐融合的最新探索。作品以巴洛克式的复杂对位为骨架，包裹着现代合成器的脉冲音色，创造出一种既古老又未来的听觉迷宫，充满了学院派的严谨与先锋的叛逆。
items.descriptionEn: This 2026 album is Italian composer Giacomo Bucci's latest exploration of fusing classical and electronic music. The works are structured with Baroque-style complex counterpoint, wrapped in modern synthesizer pulse tones, creating an auditory maze that is both ancient and futuristic, full of academic rigor and avant-garde rebellion.
items.storiesZh: Bucci为了录制这张专辑，特意改造了一台19世纪的管风琴，为其加装MIDI控制器。专辑中一首曲目的打击乐部分，是在米兰一座废弃火车站的铁轨上录制完成的，利用火车经过的真实震动作为节奏基底。
items.storiesEn: To record this album, Bucci specially modified a 19th-century pipe organ by installing a MIDI controller. The percussion part of one track was recorded on the tracks of an abandoned train station in Milan, using the real vibrations of passing trains as the rhythmic foundation.
items.artistIntroZh: Giacomo Bucci是意大利当代作曲家与声音艺术家，以打破古典与电子音乐界限而闻名。他曾在米兰音乐学院学习作曲，后投身电子音乐实验，作品常被用于现代舞剧场和艺术展览。
items.artistIntroEn: Giacomo Bucci is an Italian contemporary composer and sound artist, known for breaking the boundaries between classical and electronic music. He studied composition at the Milan Conservatory before diving into electronic music experiments, and his works are often used in modern dance theater and art exhibitions.

items.name: Medusa
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张翻唱专辑，Annie Lennox以其深邃而富有张力的嗓音重新诠释了十首经典歌曲，风格涵盖灵魂、爵士与流行。她的演绎既保留了原曲的精髓，又注入了个人化的情感与戏剧性，展现出惊人的音乐掌控力。
items.descriptionEn: This is a cover album where Annie Lennox reinterprets ten classic songs with her deep and powerful voice, spanning soul, jazz, and pop. Her renditions retain the essence of the originals while injecting personal emotion and theatricality, showcasing astonishing musical control.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Medusa》源于Lennox对希腊神话中女妖形象的迷恋，象征女性力量的复杂与美丽。录制《No More 'I Love You's'》时，她要求乐队使用老式模拟设备，以捕捉更温暖的音色。她还曾因对某首歌曲的编曲不满意，在录音室将乐谱撕碎重写。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Medusa' stems from Lennox's fascination with the Gorgon figure in Greek mythology, symbolizing the complexity and beauty of female power. While recording 'No More I Love You's,' she insisted the band use vintage analog equipment to capture a warmer sound. She once tore up the sheet music and rewrote it in the studio because she was unsatisfied with the arrangement of a song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑获得了格莱美最佳流行演唱专辑奖，巩固了Annie Lennox作为顶尖独唱艺术家的地位，并推动了90年代翻唱专辑的艺术水准。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album won the Grammy Award for Best Pop Vocal Album, cementing Annie Lennox's status as a top solo artist and raising the artistic standard of cover albums in the 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Annie Lennox是苏格兰歌手、词曲作家及社会活动家，原为Eurythmics乐队主唱。她以其独特的低音嗓音、中性形象和强烈的舞台表现力著称，是1980年代以来最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Annie Lennox is a Scottish singer, songwriter, and social activist, originally the lead vocalist of Eurythmics. She is known for her distinctive low-register voice, androgynous image, and powerful stage presence, and is one of the most influential female musicians since the 1980s.

items.name: Elena Yerevan - My Guitar
items.descriptionZh: 《My Guitar》是亚美尼亚吉他手Elena Nikoghosyan以艺名Elena Yerevan发行的首张个人专辑。风格融合了古典吉他技巧、中东旋律和现代氛围音乐，核心特色是细腻的指弹与充满异域风情的即兴，营造出静谧而深邃的听觉空间。
items.descriptionEn: "My Guitar" is the debut solo album by Armenian guitarist Elena Nikoghosyan, under the alias Elena Yerevan. Its style blends classical guitar technique, Middle Eastern melodies, and modern ambient music, characterized by delicate fingerpicking and exotic improvisation, creating a serene and profound soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于埃里温一间百年老宅改装的录音棚，Elena坚持使用一把1930年代手工制作的西班牙吉他，因为琴弦老化，录音师不得不反复调整麦克风位置。某次夜录时，窗外突然传来街头艺人的杜杜克笛声，Elena即兴将其融入曲中，成为专辑的点睛之笔。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a studio converted from a century-old house in Yerevan. Elena insisted on using a handmade Spanish guitar from the 1930s; due to its aged strings, the engineer had to constantly reposition the microphones. During a late-night session, a street musician's duduk drifted through the window, and Elena improvised it into the track, which became the album's highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Elena Nikoghosyan，艺名Elena Yerevan，亚美尼亚古典吉他手与作曲家。自幼学习古典吉他，后赴莫斯科音乐学院深造。她擅长将高加索民间音乐与现代氛围音乐结合，作品常在欧洲独立音乐电台播放，被誉为“亚美尼亚吉他女神”。
items.artistIntroEn: Elena Nikoghosyan, known as Elena Yerevan, is an Armenian classical guitarist and composer. She began studying classical guitar as a child and later furthered her studies at the Moscow Conservatory. Known for blending Caucasian folk music with modern ambient, her work is frequently played on European indie radio stations, earning her the title "Goddess of Armenian Guitar."

items.name: The Vintage Virgin
items.descriptionZh: 《The Vintage Virgin》是瑞典音乐人Sebastian Karlsson的第二张个人专辑，风格以复古合成器流行和轻摇滚为主，核心特色是80年代音色与现代制作手法的碰撞，旋律朗朗上口，歌词充满青春怀旧气息。
items.descriptionEn: "The Vintage Virgin" is the second solo album by Swedish musician Sebastian Karlsson. Its style is primarily retro synth-pop and light rock, characterized by a collision of 80s analog sounds with modern production, featuring catchy melodies and lyrics steeped in youthful nostalgia.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感来自Sebastian在跳蚤市场淘到的一台故障Roland Juno-60合成器。他花了三个月修复这台设备，并坚持用它录制所有键盘部分。录音期间，他因误触老式混响踏板导致整首歌曲的混响失控，意外创造出一种迷幻效果，被他保留在最终版本中。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by a faulty Roland Juno-60 synthesizer Sebastian found at a flea market. He spent three months repairing it and insisted on recording all keyboard parts with it. During recording, he accidentally triggered a vintage reverb pedal, causing the reverb to go wild on an entire track; he kept the accidental psychedelic effect in the final mix.
items.artistIntroZh: Sebastian Karlsson，瑞典歌手、词曲作者及制作人。2000年代初以流行偶像出道，后转向独立音乐，擅长复古电子与合成器流行。他的音乐常被形容为“ABBA��上了MGMT”，在斯堪的纳维亚独立乐坛拥有固定听众群。
items.artistIntroEn: Sebastian Karlsson is a Swedish singer, songwriter, and producer. He debuted as a pop idol in the early 2000s before transitioning to indie music, specializing in retro electronic and synth-pop. His music is often described as "ABBA meets MGMT," earning a loyal following in the Scandinavian indie scene.

items.name: Queen II
items.descriptionZh: 《Queen II》是英国摇滚乐队Queen的第二张录音室专辑，风格以华丽摇滚、前卫摇滚和硬摇滚为主。核心特色是戏剧化的多声部编曲、Brian May的层叠吉他音墙以及Freddie Mercury的华丽唱腔，整体概念性强，分为“白面”与“黑面”两章。
items.descriptionEn: "Queen II" is the second studio album by British rock band Queen. Its style is a blend of glam rock, progressive rock, and hard rock, characterized by dramatic multi-part harmonies, Brian May's layered guitar walls, and Freddie Mercury's flamboyant vocals. The album is highly conceptual, divided into "White Side" and "Black Side."
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由摄影师Mick Rock拍摄，灵感来自Marlene Dietrich的电影剧照。由于预算紧张，乐队只能在拍摄现场用纸板搭建背景。Freddie在录制《The March of the Black Queen》时因过度用力而失声，休息三天后才完成最终人声。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was photographed by Mick Rock, inspired by a still from a Marlene Dietrich film. Due to a tight budget, the band built the background with cardboard on set.
