items.historicalImpactEn: As Pulp's starting point, it laid the groundwork for their later transformation, though it was not a commercial success at the time.
items.artistIntroZh: Pulp是1980年代成立于英国谢菲尔德的另类摇滚乐队，主唱Jarvis Cocker以讽刺、戏剧化的歌词和独特的舞台表演著称。他们在1990年代中期凭借专辑《Different Class》成为不列颠流行运动的核心力量之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pulp is an alternative rock band formed in Sheffield, UK, in the 1980s. Frontman Jarvis Cocker is known for his sarcastic, theatrical lyrics and stage presence. They became a key force in the Britpop movement with their 1995 album 'Different Class'.

items.name: Miles Davis and Horns
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张由Miles Davis早期硬波普与西海岸爵士录音组成的合辑，收录了他与Horns（管乐组）合作的曲目。风格上融合了蓝调、摇摆与波普，小号与萨克斯的对话充满活力，展现了Davis在组建第一支经典五重奏前的探索期。
items.descriptionEn: This is a compilation of Miles Davis' early hard bop and West Coast jazz recordings with horn sections. Blending blues, swing, and bop, the trumpet and saxophone dialogues are vibrant, showcasing Davis' explorations before forming his first classic quintet.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑并非Davis原计划的作品，而是唱片公司从1951至1954年间的单曲和未发行素材中拼凑而成。其中部分曲目由Sonny Rollins和Charlie Parker等传奇乐手参与，但Davis本人对这张合辑的编排方式并不满意。
items.storiesEn: This album wasn't originally planned by Davis; the label compiled it from singles and unreleased material between 1951-1954. Tracks feature legends like Sonny Rollins and Charlie Parker, but Davis was unhappy with the compilation's arrangement.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926-1991）是美国爵士小号手、作曲家与乐队领袖，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐家之一。他不断革新爵士乐风格，从波普、冷爵士、硬波普到融合爵士，每一阶段都引领潮流。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader, one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. He constantly revolutionized jazz, from bebop and cool jazz to hard bop and fusion.

items.name: L.A. Woman
items.descriptionZh: 这是The Doors的第六张也是最后一张录音室专辑（主唱Jim Morrison生前参与的最后一张）。风格以布鲁斯摇滚和迷幻摇滚为主，充满黑暗、性感的氛围，如经典曲目《Riders on the Storm》和《L.A. Woman》展现了乐队粗粝而即兴的一面。
items.descriptionEn: The Doors' sixth and final studio album with Jim Morrison. Dominated by blues rock and psychedelic rock, it exudes a dark, sensual atmosphere. Classics like 'Riders on the Storm' and 'L.A. Woman' showcase the band's raw, improvisational side.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间Morrison因酗酒和法律问题状态不佳，但乐队选择在他洛杉矶的公寓里即兴排练，反而催生了更松弛的创作氛围。专辑同名曲的吉他音色是Robby Krieger用一把旧Gibson通过小音箱直接录制的结果。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Morrison struggled with alcoholism and legal issues, but the band rehearsed improvisationally in his LA apartment, creating a relaxed vibe. The guitar sound on the title track came from Robby Krieger playing an old Gibson through a small amp.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为The Doors的回归之作，也是Morrison的绝唱，巩固了他们在摇滚史上的传奇地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a comeback and Morrison's swan song, it cemented The Doors' legendary status in rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: The Doors于1965年在洛杉矶成立，成员包括Jim Morrison（主唱）、Robby Krieger（吉他）、Ray Manzarek（键盘）和John Densmore（鼓）。他们以诗意、迷幻的歌词和Morrison的舞台魅力成为1960年代最具争议与影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in Los Angeles in 1965, The Doors consisted of Jim Morrison, Robby Krieger, Ray Manzarek, and John Densmore. Known for poetic, psychedelic lyrics and Morrison's stage charisma, they became one of the most controversial and influential rock bands of the 1960s.

items.name: Flashpoint
items.descriptionZh: 这是The Rolling Stones的现场专辑，收录了1989-1990年“Steel Wheels/Urban Jungle”世界巡演的实况录音。风格涵盖他们经典的布鲁斯摇滚、硬摇滚与节奏蓝调，曲目横跨1960至1980年代，展现了乐队作为“世界最伟大摇滚乐队”的舞台能量。
items.descriptionEn: A live album from The Rolling Stones' 1989-1990 'Steel Wheels/Urban Jungle' world tour. It spans their classic blues rock, hard rock, and R&B, with tracks from the 1960s to the 1980s, showcasing their legendary stage energy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值乐队内部关系缓和期，吉他手Ronnie Wood和键盘手Chuck Leavell的加入为现场增添了新活力。巡演中他们还在东京巨蛋进行了首次日本大型演出，并邀请了Eric Clapton等嘉宾。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a period of eased tensions within the band. The addition of Ronnie Wood and Chuck Leavell brought new energy. The tour included their first major Japanese shows at the Tokyo Dome, with guests like Eric Clapton.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones成立于1962年，是英国摇滚乐的代表性乐队，核心成员Mick Jagger（主唱）和Keith Richards（吉他）是永恒的创作搭档。他们以叛逆形象、布鲁斯根基和长达六十余年的舞台生涯定义了摇滚乐的粗粝与自由。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1962, The Rolling Stones are iconic in British rock. Core members Mick Jagger and Keith Richards are a legendary songwriting duo. Their rebellious image, blues roots, and six-decade career define rock's raw freedom.

items.name: The Dio Years
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张Black Sabbath的精选+新歌合辑，聚焦主唱Ronnie James Dio时期的作品（1980-1982及1992年）。风格上融合了重金属的沉重 riff 与 Dio 极具戏剧性的高亢嗓音，包含经典如《Heaven and Hell》《Neon Knights》以及三首新录音。
items.descriptionEn: A compilation and new song collection focusing on the Ronnie James Dio era (1980-1982 & 1992). It blends heavy metal riffs with Dio's dramatic, soaring vocals, including classics like 'Heaven and Hell', 'Neon Knights', and three new recordings.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源于Dio在Black Sabbath的时期，原本计划只是再版，但乐队决定录制三首新歌，其中《The Devil Cried》是Dio与Tony Iommi在1990年代后首次合作。Dio当时健康状况已不佳，但仍坚持完成了录音。
items.storiesEn: The title refers to Dio's tenure in Black Sabbath. Originally a reissue, the band decided to record three new songs. 'The Devil Cried' was Dio and Tony Iommi's first collaboration since the 1990s. Dio's health was poor, but he insisted on completing the recordings.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑重新点燃了Dio时期乐迷的热情，并促成了2007年以“Heaven & Hell”名义进行的巡演。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album rekindled fan interest in the Dio era and led to the 2007 tour under the name 'Heaven & Hell'.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Sabbath是英国重金属鼻祖，1968年成立于伯明翰，核心成员Tony Iommi（吉他）以黑暗 riff 开创了重金属流派。Ronnie James Dio（1942-2010）是美国传奇重金属歌手，以强大的嗓音和奇幻歌���著称，曾短暂加入Sabbath并留下经典作品。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath, formed in Birmingham in 1968, are pioneers of heavy metal, with Tony Iommi's dark riffs defining the genre. Ronnie James Dio (1942-2010) was a legendary American heavy metal singer known for his powerful voice and fantasy lyrics, leaving a classic mark during his brief tenure.

items.name: Bookends
items.descriptionZh: 《Bookends》是西蒙与加芬克尔在1968年发行的概念专辑，以细腻的民谣摇滚风格描绘了人生的成长与衰老。专辑核心围绕“生命之书”的隐喻，从青春期的迷茫到中年的反思，音乐编排精致，和声优美，充满诗意与哲思。
items.descriptionEn: Bookends is a 1968 concept album by Simon & Garfunkel, featuring delicate folk-rock that traces the arc of life from youth to old age. Centered on the metaphor of a 'book of life,' the album blends poetic lyrics, lush harmonies, and introspective arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，保罗·西蒙曾因创作压力一度搁置专辑，直到制作人建议将老歌《Mrs. Robinson》加入才突破瓶颈。专辑封面由摄影师理查德·阿维顿拍摄，两位成员在纽约街头背对镜头，营造出时光流逝的孤独感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Paul Simon shelved the album due to creative pressure until the producer suggested adding the older track 'Mrs. Robinson.' The cover photo by Richard Avedon shows the duo walking away from the camera on a New York street, evoking a sense of time passing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为1960年代概念专辑的典范，影响了后世众多民谣摇滚艺术家，如尼克·德雷克和艾略特·史密斯。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a landmark concept album of the 1960s, it influenced later folk-rock artists such as Nick Drake and Elliott Smith.
items.artistIntroZh: 西蒙与加芬克尔是1960年代美国最成功的民谣摇滚二人组，由保罗·西蒙和亚特·加芬克尔组成。他们以完美的和声与深刻的歌词著称，代表作《寂静之声》《斯卡布罗集市》等成为时代经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Simon & Garfunkel were a legendary American folk-rock duo of the 1960s, consisting of Paul Simon and Art Garfunkel. Known for their flawless harmonies and profound lyrics, their hits like 'The Sound of Silence' and 'Scarborough Fair' became timeless anthems.

items.name: Stalingrad
items.descriptionZh: 《Stalingrad》是德国重金属乐队Accept在2012年发行的概念专辑，以二战斯大林格勒战役为主题。音乐风格硬朗、史诗感强烈，融合了传统重金属的强劲 riff 与交响元素，歌词充满战争残酷与人性反思。
items.descriptionEn: Stalingrad is a 2012 concept album by German heavy metal band Accept, centered on the World War II Battle of Stalingrad. The music is hard-hitting and epic, blending traditional heavy metal riffs with orchestral elements, with lyrics reflecting war's brutality and human cost.
items.storiesZh: 主唱马克·托伦蒂诺在创作期间大量阅读战役史料，甚至参观了斯大林格勒（今伏尔加格勒）的战争博物馆。专辑录制时，吉他手沃尔夫·霍夫曼坚持使用老式模拟设备，以营造更原始、粗粝的音色。
items.storiesEn: Vocalist Mark Tornillo extensively researched the battle's history and even visited the war museum in Volgograd (formerly Stalingrad). During recording, guitarist Wolf Hoffmann insisted on using vintage analog equipment to achieve a rawer, grittier sound.
items.artistIntroZh: Accept是德国老牌重金属乐队，成立于1976年，以其标志性的双吉他旋律和强劲节奏著称。乐队在1980年代达到巅峰，对欧洲重金属发展影响深远，2010年重组后依然保持高水准创作。
items.artistIntroEn: Accept is a veteran German heavy metal band formed in 1976, known for their twin-guitar melodies and powerful rhythms. They peaked in the 1980s, heavily influencing European heavy metal, and have maintained high-quality output since their 2010 reunion.

items.name: Smack This!
items.descriptionZh: 《Smack This!》是美国另类金属乐队Godsmack在2002年发行的精选+现场专辑，收录了乐队前三张专辑的热门歌曲及多首未发行现场版。风格以沉重的吉他音墙、愤怒的歌词和充满攻击性的节奏为特色，展现了新金属的爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: Smack This! is a 2002 compilation and live album by American alternative metal band Godsmack, featuring hits from their first three albums plus unreleased live tracks. The style is characterized by heavy guitar walls, angry lyrics, and aggressive rhythms, showcasing nu-metal's explosive energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Smack This!》是乐队对媒体批评的幽默反击——曾有乐评人嘲讽他们“只会砸东西”。录制现场版时，主唱苏利·厄尔纳因过度嘶吼导致声带出血，但坚持完成演出，事后被医生警告休息。
items.storiesEn: The album title Smack This! was a humorous retort to critics who accused the band of just 'smashing things.' During live recordings, frontman Sully Erna suffered vocal cord bleeding from excessive screaming but insisted on finishing the set, later being ordered by doctors to rest.
items.artistIntroZh: Godsmack是美国另类金属乐队，1995年由主唱苏利·厄尔纳创立。乐队以沉重的吉他音色和富有攻击性的现场表演闻名，代表作《I Stand Alone》《Awake》等多次获得格莱美提名，是新金属浪潮的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Godsmack is an American alternative metal band founded in 1995 by frontman Sully Erna. Known for their heavy guitar sound and aggressive live shows, hits like 'I Stand Alone' and 'Awake' earned multiple Grammy nominations, making them key figures in the nu-metal wave.

items.name: Von hier an blind
items.descriptionZh: 《Von hier an blind》是德国摇滚乐队Wir sind Helden在2005年发行的第二张专辑，融合了流行摇滚、新浪潮和德式幽默。歌词以犀利的社会观察和俏皮的比喻著称，音乐节奏明快，旋律朗朗上口，充满柏林独立气息。
items.descriptionEn: Von hier an blind is the 2005 second album by German rock band Wir sind Helden, blending pop rock, new wave, and German wit. The lyrics are known for sharp social observations and playful metaphors, while the music is upbeat with catchy melodies, carrying a Berlin indie vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制在柏林一座废弃的工厂中进行，乐队故意选用老式麦克风捕捉“不完美”的声音。主唱朱迪丝·霍勒曼在写《Gekommen um zu bleiben》时，灵感来自地铁里看到的一对争吵情侣的对话片段。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a disused factory in Berlin, with the band deliberately using vintage microphones to capture 'imperfect' sounds. Singer Judith Holofernes wrote 'Gekommen um zu bleiben' after overhearing a couple arguing on the subway.
items.artistIntroZh: Wir sind Helden是2000年代德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一，2003年凭借首张专辑《Die Reklamation》一炮而红。乐队以机智的德语歌词、独立的音乐风格和充满魅力的现场演出著称，被誉为“德国流行摇滚的希望”。
items.artistIntroEn: Wir sind Helden were one of Germany's most successful rock bands of the 2000s, rising to fame with their 2003 debut Die Reklamation. Known for witty German lyrics, an independent sound, and charismatic live shows, they were hailed as the hope of German pop-rock.

items.name: Gracias por la música
items.descriptionZh: 《Gracias por la música》是ABBA在1980年发行的西班牙语精选专辑，收录了乐队经典歌曲的西班牙语版本。风格延续了ABBA标志性的流行迪斯科与华丽编排，歌词由专业翻译家精心改编，保留了原曲的情感与韵律。
items.descriptionEn: Gracias por la música is a 1980 Spanish-language compilation by ABBA, featuring Spanish versions of their classic hits. The style retains ABBA's signature pop-disco and lavish arrangements, with lyrics carefully adapted by professional translators to preserve the original emotion and rhythm.
items.storiesZh: ABBA为了开拓拉丁美洲市场，专门请来语言专家将歌词逐句翻译并调整押韵。录制时，成员们因不熟悉西班牙语发音而闹出不少笑话，比如阿格妮莎把“corazón”唱成了“corazón”（重音错误），不得不重录多次。
items.storiesEn: To break into the Latin American market, ABBA hired language experts to translate and rhyme the lyrics line by line. During recording, the members struggled with Spanish pronunciation—Agnetha once sang 'corazón' with the wrong stress, requiring multiple retakes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是ABBA拓展非英语市场的重要尝试，推动了拉丁美洲流行音乐与国际接轨，并影响了后来拉丁流行音乐人如夏奇拉。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a key attempt by ABBA to expand into non-English markets, helping Latin American pop music connect globally and influencing later Latin pop artists like Shakira.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行组合，1972年成立，由阿格妮莎、比约恩、本尼和安妮-弗里德组成。他们以华丽的舞台服装、完美的和声和迪斯科流行曲风统治1970年代乐坛，代表作《Dancing Queen》等已成为全球文化符号。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha, Björn, Benny, and Anni-Frid. They dominated the 1970s music scene with flamboyant costumes, perfect harmonies, and disco-pop anthems like 'Dancing Queen,' which became global cultural icons.

items.name: I Am...
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am...》是Nas于1999年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合了东岸嘻哈、灵魂乐和爵士元素。这张专辑展现了Nas从街头诗人向成熟艺术家的转型，歌词深刻探讨了种族、社会不公与个人成长，制作精良，被认为是其职业生涯中期的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "I Am..." is Nas's fourth studio album, released in 1999, blending East Coast hip-hop, soul, and jazz. It marks his transition from street poet to a mature artist, with profound lyrics addressing racial injustice, social issues, and personal growth. The polished production makes it a mid-career masterpiece.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原计划为双CD概念专辑，名为《I Am... The Autobiography》，但因大量歌曲提前泄露，Nas被迫重新录制并删减曲目，最终仅保留14首。泄露事件让Nas一度心灰意冷，但也促使他创作出更内省的作品。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally planned as a double-disc concept album titled "I Am... The Autobiography," but after many tracks leaked early, Nas was forced to re-record and cut the tracklist down to 14 songs. The leak discouraged him but also pushed him to create more introspective material.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Nas在90年代末嘻哈界的地位，并影响了后来一批注重叙事和灵魂采样风格的rapper。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Nas's status in late-90s hip-hop and influenced a generation of rappers who prioritized storytelling and soul samples.
items.artistIntroZh: Nas（本名Nasir Jones）是美国东岸嘻哈代表人物，1973年生于纽约皇后区。1994年以首张专辑《Illmatic》震撼乐坛，被誉为史上最伟大说唱歌手之一。他擅长用细腻的笔触描绘街头生活与社会现实，作品兼具艺术性与思想深度。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas (born Nasir Jones) is a legendary East Coast rapper from Queens, New York. His 1994 debut "Illmatic" shook the hip-hop world, earning him a reputation as one of the greatest MCs of all time. He is known for his vivid storytelling and social commentary.

items.name: 4 Way Street
items.descriptionZh: 《4 Way Street》是Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young于1971年发行的现场双专辑，记录了乐队1970年巡演的精华。风格横跨民谣摇滚、乡村摇滚和硬摇滚，以多声部和声与即兴演奏为特色，展现了四位成员在舞台上的化学反应与张力。
items.descriptionEn: "4 Way Street" is a live double album by Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young, released in 1971, capturing highlights from their 1970 tour. Spanning folk rock, country rock, and hard rock, it features intricate harmonies and improvisation, showcasing the band's chemistry and tension on stage.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队内部关系紧张，Neil Young经常与其他人分开演出。现场录音中甚至能听到成员间的互相调侃和即兴争吵，但正是这种真实感让专辑充满生命力。专辑封面照片是在纽约某酒店走廊随手拍摄的。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, internal tensions were high—Neil Young often performed separately from the others. The live recordings capture banter and even spontaneous arguments, but this rawness gives the album its vitality. The cover photo was casually taken in a hotel hallway in New York.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张现场专辑被视为70年代民谣摇滚现场录音的典范，影响了后来的不插电演出和乐队现场专辑制作。
items.historicalImpactEn: This live album is considered a benchmark for 1970s folk-rock live recordings, influencing later unplugged performances and live album productions.
items.artistIntroZh: Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young是美国超级民谣摇滚组合，由David Crosby、Stephen Stills、Graham Nash和Neil Young组成。他们以华丽的多声部和声和深刻的社会歌词闻名，是60年代末至70年代最具影响力的乐队之���。
items.artistIntroEn: Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young is a legendary American folk-rock supergroup composed of David Crosby, Stephen Stills, Graham Nash, and Neil Young. Renowned for their lush harmonies and socially conscious lyrics, they were one of the most influential bands of the late 1960s and 1970s.

items.name: Crash! Boom! Bang!
items.descriptionZh: 《Crash! Boom! Bang!》是瑞典流行摇滚组合Roxette于1994年发行的第五张录音室专辑。风格延续了乐队标志性的旋律流行摇滚，融合了强力流行乐和成人当代元素，歌词多围绕爱情与心碎。专辑制作华丽，充满90年代典型的合成器与吉他交织声场。
items.descriptionEn: "Crash! Boom! Bang!" is Roxette's fifth studio album, released in 1994. It continues their signature melodic pop-rock sound, blending power pop and adult contemporary elements, with lyrics centered on love and heartbreak. The production is lavish, featuring 90s-typical synths and layered guitars.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Marie Fredriksson曾因过度疲劳而短暂失声，制作人不得不将部分录音推迟。专辑名源自一首未收录的Demo，成员认为这三个词完美概括了专辑中情感的爆发与脆弱。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead singer Marie Fredriksson temporarily lost her voice due to exhaustion, forcing the producer to delay some sessions. The album title came from an unreleased demo; the band felt the three words perfectly captured the album's emotional explosions and fragility.
items.artistIntroZh: Roxette是瑞典国宝级流行摇滚二人组，由Per Gessle和Marie Fredriksson于1986年成立。他们凭借《The Look》《Listen to Your Heart》等金曲在全球卖出超过8000万张唱片，是90年代最成功的欧洲流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Roxette is a Swedish pop-rock duo formed in 1986 by Per Gessle and Marie Fredriksson. With global hits like "The Look" and "Listen to Your Heart," they sold over 80 million records worldwide, becoming one of the most successful European pop acts of the 1990s.

items.name: 99 Luftballons
items.descriptionZh: 《99 Luftballons》是德国新浪潮乐队Nena于1984年发行的首张国际专辑，包含德语原版及英语版《99 Red Balloons》。风格为流行摇滚与新浪潮结合，旋律抓耳，节奏明快。歌词通过99个气球引发的虚构军事冲突，表达反战主题。
items.descriptionEn: "99 Luftballons" is Nena's first international album, released in 1984, featuring the original German version and the English "99 Red Balloons." It blends pop-rock with new wave, with catchy melodies and upbeat rhythms. The lyrics use a fictional military conflict triggered by 99 balloons to convey an anti-war message.
items.storiesZh: 歌曲灵感来自乐队成员在柏林演唱会现场看到气球升空，进而想象气球被雷达误认为导弹的荒诞情景。英语版歌词由一位美国翻译重新创作，保留了反战内核但调整了细节。专辑在德国录制时，乐队曾因预算紧张不得不使用临时搭建的录音室。
items.storiesEn: The song was inspired by band members watching balloons rise at a Berlin concert, imagining them being mistaken for missiles by radar. The English lyrics were rewritten by an American translator, retaining the anti-war core but adjusting details. The album was recorded in Germany on a tight budget, using a makeshift studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑的同名歌曲成为冷战时期最具代表性的反战流行歌曲之一，推动了德语歌曲在国际市场的突破。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track became one of the most iconic anti-war pop songs of the Cold War era, helping German-language songs break into international markets.
items.artistIntroZh: Nena是德国新浪潮乐队，1982年成立于柏林，主唱为Gabriele 'Nena' Kerner。乐队以同名主唱命名，凭借《99 Luftballons》一炮而红，成为80年代德国最具国际知名度的乐队之一，后于1987年解散。
items.artistIntroEn: Nena is a German new wave band formed in Berlin in 1982, fronted by Gabriele 'Nena' Kerner. Named after the lead singer, they shot to fame with "99 Luftballons," becoming one of the most internationally recognized German bands of the 1980s before disbanding in 1987.

items.name: Sin After Sin
items.descriptionZh: 《Sin After Sin》是英国重金属乐队Judas Priest于1977年发行的第三张录音室专辑，由著名制作人Roger Glover（Deep Purple贝斯手）操刀。风格是典型的重金属，融合了双吉他 riff、高速鼓点和Rob Halford的高亢嗓音，是乐队从早期硬摇滚向纯正重金属转型的关键作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Sin After Sin" is Judas Priest's third studio album, released in 1977, produced by Roger Glover (Deep Purple bassist). It features classic heavy metal with twin-guitar riffs, fast drumming, and Rob Halford's soaring vocals, marking the band's transition from hard rock to pure heavy metal.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Roger Glover曾要求乐队在录音前进行大量排练，这让他们感到不习惯但最终受益匪浅。专辑中翻唱了Joan Baez的《Diamonds & Rust》，Halford的演��被原唱盛赞。录音期间，乐队因预算有限，不得不在地下室录音室工作，鼓手甚至用纸板箱临时隔音。
items.storiesEn: Producer Roger Glover insisted on extensive rehearsals before recording, which felt unusual for the band but ultimately benefited them. Their cover of Joan Baez's "Diamonds & Rust" earned praise from the original artist. On a tight budget, the band recorded in a basement studio, with the drummer using cardboard boxes for makeshift soundproofing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了Judas Priest在重金属史上的地位，影响了后来无数激流金属和速度金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Judas Priest's place in heavy metal history, influencing countless thrash and speed metal bands that followed.
items.artistIntroZh: Judas Priest是英国重金属先驱，1969年成立于伯明翰。乐队以皮革与铆钉的舞台形象、双吉他攻击和Rob Halford的尖叫式唱腔闻名，被誉为“重金属之神”。他们的音乐对重金属风格的定型与推广起到了决定性作用。
items.artistIntroEn: Judas Priest is a pioneering British heavy metal band formed in Birmingham in 1969. Known for their leather-and-studs image, twin-guitar attack, and Rob Halford's piercing vocals, they are often called the "Gods of Heavy Metal." Their music was instrumental in defining and popularizing the heavy metal genre.

items.name: Nashville Skyline
items.descriptionZh: 《Nashville Skyline》是鲍勃·迪伦1969年发行的乡村风格转型专辑，一改以往的民谣摇滚与尖锐歌词，旋律柔和温暖，嗓音也出奇地清亮甜美。专辑充满乡村音乐的质朴与宁静，展现了迪伦在经历了摩托车事故后对生活态度的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Nashville Skyline is Bob Dylan's 1969 country-style transformation album, abandoning his earlier folk-rock and sharp lyrics for a warm, gentle sound and surprisingly clear, sweet vocals. The album exudes the simplicity and tranquility of country music, reflecting Dylan's changed outlook on life after his motorcycle accident.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常轻松愉快，迪伦甚至与强尼·卡什进行了著名的二重唱《Girl from the North Country》。卡什当时已是乡村音乐巨星，两人在纳什维尔的录音室里即兴合作，气氛融洽。迪伦还特意戒烟戒酒，让自己的嗓音变得更为柔和。
items.storiesEn: The recording sessions were remarkably relaxed and joyful, featuring a famous duet with Johnny Cash on 'Girl from the North Country.' Cash, already a country music giant, joined Dylan spontaneously in a Nashville studio, creating a warm atmosphere. Dylan even quit smoking and drinking to soften his voice.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是摇滚歌手成功跨界乡村音乐的标志性作品，打破了两种流派的壁垒，推动了乡村摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a landmark crossover from rock to country music, breaking down genre barriers and advancing the development of country rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·迪伦（Bob Dylan），美国创作歌手、诗人，诺贝尔文学奖得主。他的音乐深刻影响了20世纪流行文化，以民谣和摇滚为载体，歌词充满社会批判与诗意。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer-songwriter, poet, and Nobel laureate in Literature. His music profoundly shaped 20th-century pop culture, using folk and rock as vehicles for socially critical and poetic lyrics.

items.name: One Night in Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《One Night in Japan》是迈克尔·杰克逊2009年计划中的伦敦演唱会预热专辑，但在他突然去世后，这张专辑成为未竟的遗作。风格融合流行、R&B与舞曲，保留了杰克逊标志性的节奏与声线，充满舞台能量。
items.descriptionEn: One Night in Japan is a planned prelude album for Michael Jackson's 2009 London concerts, but became an unfinished posthumous work after his sudden death. The style blends pop, R&B, and dance music, retaining Jackson's signature rhythm and vocal energy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是为杰克逊的“This Is It”巡演预热，他计划在日本录制部分曲目。然而，2009年6月25日他因药物中毒去世，专辑项目戛然而止。后续发行的歌曲《This Is It》正是来自这些未完成的录音。
items.storiesEn: Originally intended as a teaser for Jackson's 'This Is It' tour, the album was to be partially recorded in Japan. However, on June 25, 2009, he died of drug intoxication, abruptly halting the project. The subsequent single 'This Is It' was drawn from these unfinished recordings.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管未能正式完成，这张专辑的素材成为杰克逊遗作的重要组成部分，引发全球歌迷对流行音乐之王最后的致敬。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although never completed, the album's material became a crucial part of Jackson's posthumous legacy, sparking a global tribute to the King of Pop.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson），美国歌手、舞者、流行音乐之王。他以其独特的嗓音、太空步和《Thriller��等经典作品，成为20世纪最具影响力的流行偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson, American singer, dancer, and the King of Pop, is one of the most influential pop icons of the 20th century, known for his unique voice, moonwalk, and classics like 'Thriller.'

items.name: Songs for Drella
items.descriptionZh: 《Songs for Drella》是卢·里德与约翰·凯尔1990年合作的概念专辑，为纪念他们已故的导师、波普艺术大师安迪·沃霍尔而作。风格以简约的钢琴、中提琴和低吟为主，充满叙事性和哀思，是二人自“地下丝绒”解散后罕见的重聚。
items.descriptionEn: Songs for Drella is a 1990 concept album by Lou Reed and John Cale, a tribute to their late mentor, pop art icon Andy Warhol. The style is minimalist, featuring piano, viola, and whispered vocals, rich in narrative and mourning, marking their rare reunion since the Velvet Underground disbanded.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“Drella”是沃霍尔的昵称，结合了“Dracula”（吸血鬼）和“Cinderella”（灰姑娘）。里德和凯尔在沃霍尔去世后决定合作，以音乐讲述他的生平。录音过程中两人曾因艺术方向争执，但最终达成和解，完成了这部深情之作。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Drella' is Warhol's nickname, a blend of 'Dracula' and 'Cinderella.' After Warhol's death, Reed and Cale decided to collaborate, telling his life story through music. They clashed over artistic direction during recording but eventually reconciled to complete this heartfelt work.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为对安迪·沃霍尔最真诚的音乐致敬，也是地下丝绒成员重聚的唯一正式录音室作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as the most sincere musical tribute to Andy Warhol and the only official studio reunion of Velvet Underground members.
items.artistIntroZh: 卢·里德（Lou Reed），美国摇滚歌手、吉他手，地下丝绒乐队核心成员。他以粗粝的嗓音和写实的歌词著称，深刻影响了另类摇滚与朋克音乐的发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Lou Reed, American rock singer and guitarist, was the core member of the Velvet Underground. Known for his gritty voice and realistic lyrics, he profoundly influenced alternative rock and punk music.

items.name: Seventh Son of a Seventh Son
items.descriptionZh: 《Seventh Son of a Seventh Son》是铁娘子乐队1988年发行的第七张录音室专辑，也是他们首张概念专辑。风格延续了乐队的重金属传统，融合前卫元素和复杂的叙事结构，围绕预言、轮回与善恶斗争展开，旋律宏大且充满戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: Seventh Son of a Seventh Son is Iron Maiden's seventh studio album (1988) and their first concept album. It continues the band's heavy metal tradition while incorporating progressive elements and complex storytelling, centered on prophecy, reincarnation, and the battle between good and evil, with grand, dramatic melodies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感来源于英国民间传说中关于第七个儿子的第七个儿子拥有预言能力的说法。录制期间，主唱布鲁斯·迪金森坚持使用更多合成器来营造氛围，而吉他手们则希望保持吉他主导。最终双方妥协，创造了乐队最具实验性的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by the British folk belief that the seventh son of a seventh son possesses prophetic powers. During recording, vocalist Bruce Dickinson pushed for more synthesizers to create atmosphere, while guitarists wanted to keep guitar dominance. They compromised, creating one of the band's most experimental works.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是重金属概念专辑的典范，影响了后来许多前卫金属乐队，被认为是铁娘子最具艺术野心的作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a benchmark for heavy metal concept albums, influencing many later progressive metal bands and considered Iron Maiden's most artistically ambitious work.
items.artistIntroZh: 铁娘子（Iron Maiden），英国重金属乐队，1975年成立。以其标志性的吉祥物“埃迪”、双吉他旋律和史诗般的歌曲结构闻名，是“英国重金属新浪潮”的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a British heavy metal band formed in 1975, known for their mascot 'Eddie,' twin-guitar harmonies, and epic song structures. They are a leading band of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal.

items.name: The Capitol Albums Vol. 2
items.descriptionZh: 《The Capitol Albums Vol. 2》是披头士2006年发行的合辑，收录了乐队在美国Capitol唱片公司发行的专辑版本，包括《Meet the Beatles!》等。这些版本与美国原版在曲目排序、混音和封面设计上有所不同，展现了披头士在美国市场的独特呈现。
items.descriptionEn: The Capitol Albums Vol. 2 is a 2006 compilation by the Beatles, collecting the American versions of their albums released by Capitol Records, including 'Meet the Beatles!' These versions differ from the UK originals in track sequencing, mixing, and cover art, showcasing the Beatles' unique presentation in the American market.
items.storiesZh: 这套合辑的诞生源于歌迷对披头士美国版专辑的怀旧需求。20世纪60年代，Capitol唱片公司常常擅自修改披头士的专辑曲目，将单曲加入其中。制作人乔治·马丁曾对此不满，但2006年这些版本终于得到官方认可，并采用原始模拟母带重新制作。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was born from fan nostalgia for the Beatles' American album versions. In the 1960s, Capitol Records often altered the Beatles' track listings, inserting singles. Producer George Martin disapproved, but in 2006 these versions were officially recognized and remastered from original analog tapes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张合辑揭示了披头士音乐在美国传播的特殊历史，反映了唱片公司对艺术作品的商业干预。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation reveals the unique history of the Beatles' music dissemination in America, reflecting commercial intervention in artistic works by record labels.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles），英国摇滚乐队，1960年成立于利物浦。由约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔组成，是史上最畅销的乐队，深刻改变了流行音乐的面貌。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles, an English rock band formed in Liverpool in 1960, consisted of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. They are the best-selling band in history, profoundly transforming the landscape of popular music.

items.name: Wasting Light
items.descriptionZh: 《Wasting Light》是Foo Fighters的第七张录音室专辑，以粗粝、直接的硬摇滚风格回归车库摇滚根源。专辑全程在乐队主唱Dave Grohl的车库中录制，采用模拟磁带设备，音色充满原始能量与爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: Wasting Light is the seventh studio album by Foo Fighters, returning to raw, direct hard rock with a garage rock ethos. Recorded entirely in frontman Dave Grohl's garage using analog tape, the sound is brimming with primal energy and explosive power.
items.storiesZh: 为了捕捉真实的声音，Dave Grohl坚持在自家车库用老式模拟磁带机录制，邻居甚至投诉噪音。制作人Butch Vig带来了经典grunge制作经验，吉他手Pat Smear回归乐队。专辑名源自乐队成员对时间被浪费的感慨。
items.storiesEn: To capture an authentic sound, Dave Grohl insisted on recording in his garage with vintage analog tape machines, drawing noise complaints from neighbors. Producer Butch Vig brought classic grunge production experience, and guitarist Pat Smear rejoined the band. The title reflects the band's lament over wasted time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑荣获2012年格���美最佳摇滚专辑奖，并被视为Foo Fighters职业生涯的巅峰之作，重新定义了现代摇滚的硬朗标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the Grammy Award for Best Rock Album in 2012 and is considered the pinnacle of Foo Fighters' career, redefining the hard-edged standards of modern rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Foo Fighters是一支美国摇滚乐队，由前Nirvana鼓手Dave Grohl于1994年创立。他们以激昂的现场表演和旋律性强的硬摇滚著称，成为全球最畅销的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Foo Fighters are an American rock band founded in 1994 by former Nirvana drummer Dave Grohl. Known for their electrifying live shows and melodic hard rock, they have become one of the best-selling rock bands worldwide.

items.name: Music & Me
items.descriptionZh: 《Music & Me》是Michael Jackson的第三张个人录音室专辑，风格以流行和灵魂乐为主，融合了轻柔的民谣和舞曲元素。专辑整体氛围温馨，展现了少年Jackson在Motown体系下的成长轨迹。
items.descriptionEn: Music & Me is Michael Jackson's third solo studio album, primarily pop and soul, blending gentle ballads with dance elements. The overall atmosphere is warm, showcasing Jackson's growth under the Motown system as a teenager.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时Michael年仅14岁，正处于变声期，制作人特意挑选了适合他当时嗓音的曲目。主打歌《Music and Me》是一首关于音乐陪伴的温馨作品，但专辑商业反响平平，未产生大热单曲。
items.storiesEn: Michael was only 14 during recording, going through puberty, so producers specially selected songs suitable for his changing voice. The title track 'Music and Me' is a warm ode to musical companionship, but the album had modest commercial success without major hits.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson是美国歌手、舞者及流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他5岁出道，在Jackson 5中成名，后以《Thriller》等专辑打破种族和音乐界限，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and pop culture icon known as the 'King of Pop.' He debuted at age 5 with the Jackson 5 and later broke racial and musical barriers with albums like Thriller, leaving a lasting legacy.

items.name: Aladdin Sane
items.descriptionZh: 《Aladdin Sane》是David Bowie的第六张录音室专辑，风格融合了华丽摇滚、爵士和前卫音乐。专辑以Bowie标志性的戏剧化嗓音和充满实验性的编曲著称，封面上的闪电妆成为流行文化经典符号。
items.descriptionEn: Aladdin Sane is David Bowie's sixth studio album, blending glam rock, jazz, and avant-garde music. Known for Bowie's theatrical vocals and experimental arrangements, the lightning bolt makeup on the cover became an iconic pop culture symbol.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1972-1973年Bowie的Ziggy Stardust巡演期间，大部分歌曲在巡演路上创作。Bowie深受美国文化冲击，专辑名取自“A Lad Insane”的双关语。钢琴手Mike Garson的自由爵士独奏为专辑增添了疯狂色彩。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during Bowie's Ziggy Stardust tour in 1972-1973, with most songs written on the road. Bowie was deeply influenced by American culture, and the title is a pun on 'A Lad Insane.' Pianist Mike Garson's free jazz solos added a manic edge.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑被视为华丽摇滚的里程碑之一，其封面艺术和音乐实验性影响了无数后来的艺术家，巩固了Bowie作为文化变革者的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a milestone of glam rock; its cover art and musical experimentation influenced countless later artists, cementing Bowie's status as a cultural transformer.
items.artistIntroZh: David Bowie是英国摇滚音乐家、演员和文化��像，以不断重塑音乐风格和视觉形象闻名。从Ziggy Stardust到柏林三部曲，他始终走在时代前沿，影响跨越音乐、时尚和艺术。
items.artistIntroEn: David Bowie was a British rock musician, actor, and cultural icon known for constantly reinventing his musical style and visual persona. From Ziggy Stardust to the Berlin Trilogy, he remained ahead of his time, influencing music, fashion, and art.

items.name: 39/Smooth
items.descriptionZh: 《39/Smooth》是Green Day的首张录音室专辑，风格以朋克摇滚和流行朋克为主，旋律简单直接，充满青少年叛逆和青春活力。专辑时长仅30分钟，体现了早期加州朋克的粗糙与真诚。
items.descriptionEn: 39/Smooth is Green Day's debut studio album, primarily punk rock and pop punk, with simple, direct melodies full of teenage rebellion and youthful energy. At just 30 minutes, it captures the raw sincerity of early California punk.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由乐队自筹资金录制，最初在独立厂牌Lookout! Records发行，仅制作了3000份黑胶拷贝。主唱Billie Joe Armstrong当时年仅17岁，歌词多写自校园生活。专辑名中的“39”代表乐队第一张作品，“Smooth”是对音乐流畅性的自嘲。
items.storiesEn: The album was self-funded and initially released on independent label Lookout! Records, with only 3,000 vinyl copies pressed. Frontman Billie Joe Armstrong was just 17, with lyrics drawn from school life. The '39' denotes the band's first release, while 'Smooth' is a self-deprecating nod to musical flow.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是90年代美国朋克复兴的重要起点，为Green Day后来打入主流奠定了坚实基础，影响了整整一代朋克乐手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a crucial starting point for the 1990s American punk revival, laying the groundwork for Green Day's mainstream breakthrough and influencing an entire generation of punk musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Green Day是美国朋克摇滚乐队，1987年由Billie Joe Armstrong和Mike Dirnt创立。他们以旋律化的朋克风格和反叛精神闻名，1994年的《Dookie》使其成为全球现象级乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Green Day is an American punk rock band formed in 1987 by Billie Joe Armstrong and Mike Dirnt. Known for melodic punk and rebellious spirit, their 1994 album Dookie made them a global phenomenon.

items.name: Sucking in the Seventies
items.descriptionZh: 《Sucking in the Seventies》是The Rolling Stones的一张合辑，收录了乐队在1970年代未发行或罕见的录音室作品。风格涵盖硬摇滚、布鲁斯和放克，展现了乐队在黄金十年的多元探索。
items.descriptionEn: Sucking in the Seventies is a compilation album by The Rolling Stones, featuring unreleased or rare studio recordings from the 1970s. The style spans hard rock, blues, and funk, showcasing the band's diverse explorations during their golden decade.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队与前任经纪人Allen Klein法律纠纷期间的产物，Klein未经乐队许可发行了这些早期素材。滚石成员对此极为不满，Mick Jagger曾公开批评这张合辑“粗制滥造”。专辑封面由著名艺术家Andy Warhol设计，但乐队未参与选曲。
items.storiesEn: The album was released during the band's legal dispute with former manager Allen Klein, who issued these early recordings without the band's permission. The Stones were highly displeased; Mick Jagger publicly criticized it as 'shoddy.' The cover was designed by Andy Warhol, but the band had no input on track selection.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管是一张未经授权的合辑，但它记录了滚石乐队1970年代最具实验性的过渡期，为乐迷提供了罕见的史料。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although an unauthorized compilation, it documents the Rolling Stones' most experimental transitional period in the 1970s, offering rare historical material for fans.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones是英国摇滚乐队，成立于1962年，被誉为“世界上最伟大的摇滚乐队”。以布鲁斯根基和叛逆形象著称，他们定义了硬摇滚和现场演出的标准，至今活跃。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are an English rock band formed in 1962, often called 'the greatest rock 'n' roll band in the world.' Known for their blues roots and rebellious image, they defined hard rock and live performance standards, remaining active to this day.

items.name: Let's Dance
items.descriptionZh: 《Let's Dance》是David Bowie在1983年发行的专辑，融合了舞曲、摇滚和放克元素，呈现出一种明亮、流畅且极具感染力的流行风格。这张专辑标志着Bowie从实验艺术摇滚转向更为主流和商业化的声音，其标志性的节奏和Bowie独特的嗓音使其成为80年代舞池的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Let's Dance is a 1983 album by David Bowie, blending dance, rock, and funk into a bright, smooth, and infectious pop sound. It marks Bowie's shift from experimental art rock to a more mainstream and commercial direction, with its iconic grooves and Bowie's distinctive vocals making it a classic of the 80s dance floor.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦和纽约，由“ Chic”乐队的Nile Rodgers担任制作人。Rodgers曾回忆，Bowie在录音室中非常开放，允许他自由发挥吉他部分。专辑同名主打歌《Let's Dance》的灵感来自Bowie在酒吧听到的节奏，而MV中红鞋舞者的形象也成为流行文化符号。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in London and New York, the album was produced by Nile Rodgers of Chic. Rodgers recalled Bowie being very open in the studio, allowing him to freely contribute guitar parts. The title track 'Let's Dance' was inspired by a rhythm Bowie heard in a bar, and the image of the red-shoe dancer in its music video became a pop culture icon.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Bowie商业上最成功的作品之一，全球销量超过1000万张，成功将Bowie带入主流流行巨星行列，并影响了80年代流行舞曲的制作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is one of Bowie's most commercially successful, selling over 10 million copies worldwide, propelling him into mainstream pop superstardom and influencing the production direction of 80s dance-pop.
items.artistIntroZh: David Bowie（1947-2016）是英国摇滚音乐家、演员和文化偶像。他以不断创新的音乐风格、戏剧化的舞台形象和性别模糊的造型著称，代表作包括《Space Oddity》《Heroes》等，被誉为“摇滚变色龙”。
items.artistIntroEn: David Bowie (1947-2016) was a British rock musician, actor, and cultural icon. Known for his constantly innovating musical styles, theatrical stage personas, and androgynous looks, with classics like 'Space Oddity' and 'Heroes', he is hailed as the 'chameleon of rock'.

items.name: Iron Maiden
items.descriptionZh: 《Iron Maiden》是英国重金属乐队Iron Maiden的同名首张专辑，于1980年发行。风格是典型的NWOBHM（不列颠重金属新浪潮），以快速的双���他、狂暴的鼓点和主唱Paul Di'Anno的粗粝嗓音为核心，充满了原始的能量和侵略性。
items.descriptionEn: Iron Maiden is the self-titled debut album by the British heavy metal band Iron Maiden, released in 1980. It epitomizes the NWOBHM (New Wave of British Heavy Metal) sound, characterized by fast dual guitars, pounding drums, and the raw, aggressive vocals of Paul Di'Anno, brimming with primal energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制成本极低，仅花费了约2万英镑。乐队在录音室中几乎是一气呵成，保留了现场演出的粗粝感。专辑封面由Derek Riggs创作，首次引入了乐队标志性的吉祥物“Eddie”，其形象源自乐队早期演出时使用的纸浆面具。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded on a very low budget of about £20,000. The band recorded almost live in the studio, preserving a raw, concert-like feel. The cover art by Derek Riggs introduced the band's iconic mascot 'Eddie', whose image originated from a papier-mâché mask used in early gigs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为NWOBHM运动的奠基之作之一，为整个80年代重金属音乐的发展铺平了道路，并确立了Iron Maiden作为重金属传奇的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a foundational work of the NWOBHM movement, paving the way for heavy metal's development throughout the 1980s and establishing Iron Maiden as heavy metal legends.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden成立于1975年，是英国最具影响力的重金属乐队之一。他们以复杂的编曲、史诗般的歌词和现场表演中的巨大怪物Eddie闻名，专辑全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden, formed in 1975, are one of the most influential heavy metal bands from the UK. Known for their complex compositions, epic lyrics, and the giant monster Eddie at live shows, they have sold over 100 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Aftermath
items.descriptionZh: 《Aftermath》是滚石乐队在1966年发行的专辑，也是他们第一张全原创歌曲的专辑。风格上，它融合了布鲁斯摇滚、民谣和迷幻元素，展现了乐队从早期翻唱向成熟创作的转变。歌词大胆，涉及性、毒品和社会批判，充满反叛精神。
items.descriptionEn: Aftermath is a 1966 album by The Rolling Stones, their first consisting entirely of original songs. Stylistically, it blends blues rock, folk, and psychedelic elements, showcasing the band's transition from early covers to mature songwriting. The lyrics are bold, touching on sex, drugs, and social critique, brimming with rebellious spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主要在美国洛杉矶的RCA录音室录制，制作人Andrew Loog Oldham鼓励Mick Jagger和Keith Richards创作更多原创歌曲。录制过程中，Brian Jones尝试了多种异域乐器，如西塔琴和马林巴琴，为专辑增添了独特的音色。
items.storiesEn: Primarily recorded at RCA Studios in Los Angeles, producer Andrew Loog Oldham pushed Mick Jagger and Keith Richards to write more original material. During recording, Brian Jones experimented with various exotic instruments like the sitar and marimba, adding unique textures to the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Aftermath》是滚石乐队艺术成熟的标志，其全原创歌曲模式影响了后世众多乐队，被认为是摇滚史上最重要的早期专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Aftermath marks The Rolling Stones' artistic maturity; its all-original song format influenced countless later bands and is considered one of the most important early albums in rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队成立于1962年，是英国传奇摇滚乐队。以Mick Jagger和Keith Richards为核心，他们以硬朗的布鲁斯摇滚、叛逆的形象和持久的生命力著称，被誉为“世界上最伟大的摇滚乐队”。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in 1962, are a legendary English rock band. Centered on Mick Jagger and Keith Richards, they are known for their hard-driving blues rock, rebellious image, and enduring career, often called 'the greatest rock and roll band in the world'.

items.name: Ultra
items.descriptionZh: 《Ultra》是Depeche Mode在1997年发行的专辑，风格转向更为阴暗、内省的另类摇滚和电子摇滚。在经历了前成员离队和主唱Dave Gahan的毒品危机后，专辑充满了忧郁、反思和重生的氛围，旋律压抑却富有张力。
items.descriptionEn: Ultra is a 1997 album by Depeche Mode, shifting towards a darker, more introspective alternative rock and electronic rock sound. Following a band member's departure and frontman Dave Gahan's drug crisis, the album is filled with melancholy, reflection, and a sense of rebirth, with brooding yet tense melodies.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程极为艰难，因为主唱Dave Gahan刚刚从海洛因成瘾中康复，几乎在死亡边缘徘徊。乐队在伦敦东区的一个简陋录音室工作，制作人Tim Simenon帮助乐队重构了声音。专辑中的《It's No Good》灵感来自Gahan在康复中心写的日记。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was extremely difficult, as frontman Dave Gahan was recovering from heroin addiction, having nearly died. The band worked in a modest studio in East London, with producer Tim Simenon helping to reshape their sound. The track 'It's No Good' was inspired by journal entries Gahan wrote in rehab.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode成立于1980年，是英国最具影响力的电子摇滚乐队之一。他们以合成器驱动的黑暗旋律和深情歌词著称，在全球售出超过1亿张唱片，代表作包括《Personal Jesus》《Enjoy the Silence》。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode, formed in 1980, are one of the most influential electronic rock bands from the UK. Known for their synthesizer-driven dark melodies and emotional lyrics, they have sold over 100 million records worldwide, with classics like 'Personal Jesus' and 'Enjoy the Silence'.

items.name: The Rolling Stones
items.descriptionZh: 《The Rolling Stones》是滚石乐队1964年发行的同名首张专辑，以纯正的芝加哥布鲁斯和节奏布鲁斯为核心。风格原始、粗粝，充满了Chuck Berry和Muddy Waters的影响，展现了乐队早期作为布鲁斯翻唱乐队的扎实功底。
items.descriptionEn: The Rolling Stones is the 1964 self-titled debut album by the band, rooted in authentic Chicago blues and R&B. Its sound is raw and gritty, heavily influenced by Chuck Berry and Muddy Waters, showcasing the band's early prowess as a blues cover band.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在英国仅用五天就录制完成，大部分歌曲都是一次性现场录制。制作人Eric Easton和Andrew Loog Oldham故意保留了录音中的瑕疵，以营造一种“地下俱乐部”的临场感。专辑封面由摄影师Nicholas Wright拍摄，乐队成员穿着统一的条纹衬衫。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just five days in the UK, with most songs cut live in one take. Producers Eric Easton and Andrew Loog Oldham deliberately kept imperfections to create a 'underground club' atmosphere. The cover photo by Nicholas Wright shows the band in matching striped shirts.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为滚石乐队的首张专辑，它奠定了乐队基于布鲁斯的硬朗风格，与披头士的流行风格形成鲜明对比，开启了英伦入侵中更“坏”的一面。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the Rolling Stones' debut, it established their hard, blues-based sound in stark contrast to The Beatles' pop style, launching the 'bad boy' side of the British Invasion.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队成立于1962年，是英国传奇摇滚乐队。以Mick Jagger和Keith Richards为核心，他们以硬朗的布鲁斯摇滚、叛逆的形象和持久的生命力著称，被誉为“世界上最伟���的摇滚乐队”。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in 1962, are a legendary English rock band. Centered on Mick Jagger and Keith Richards, they are known for their hard-driving blues rock, rebellious image, and enduring career, often called 'the greatest rock and roll band in the world'.

items.name: The Good Son
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《The Good Son》是Nick Cave与Bad Seeds在1990年发行的第九张录音室专辑，风格从之前的后朋克阴暗转向更内省的民谣与抒情摇滚。核心特色在于钢琴主导的旋律、诗意的歌词，以及Cave深情而克制的演唱，展现了他在个人创伤后的情感重生。
items.descriptionEn: "The Good Son" is the ninth studio album by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, released in 1990. Its style shifts from previous post-punk gloom to more introspective folk and抒情 rock, featuring piano-driven melodies, poetic lyrics, and Cave's deeply emotional yet restrained vocals, reflecting his emotional rebirth after personal trauma.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感源于Nick Cave在巴西圣保罗的一段自我放逐时光。他因前女友Anita Lane分手而陷入抑郁，却在巴西的炎热与孤独中找到了创作出口。录制在巴西和伦敦进行，Cave曾表示专辑中的钢琴音色是他特意要求模仿教堂圣歌的效果，以传达一种赎罪与希望的感觉。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Nick Cave's self-imposed exile in São Paulo, Brazil, after a painful breakup with his ex-girlfriend Anita Lane. In the heat and solitude, he found a creative outlet. Recorded in Brazil and London, Cave specifically asked for the piano sound to mimic church hymns, conveying a sense of atonement and hope.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Nick Cave职业生涯的转折点，标志着他从黑暗哥特风格向更成熟、内省的创作阶段过渡，对90年代另类民谣摇滚产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a turning point in Nick Cave's career, marking his transition from dark gothic style to a more mature, introspective phase, deeply influencing 1990s alternative folk rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave是澳大利亚歌手、词曲作家、作家和演员，生于1957年。他以独特的低沉嗓音、诗意的黑暗歌词和戏剧化的舞台表现闻名。Bad Seeds是他自1983年起组建的乐队，成员多变，共同塑造了后朋克、哥特摇滚和另类民谣的经典声音。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave is an Australian singer, songwriter, author, and actor, born in 1957. He is known for his distinctive deep voice, poetic dark lyrics, and dramatic stage presence. The Bad Seeds, formed in 1983, is his ever-evolving band that together shaped classic post-punk, gothic rock, and alternative folk sounds.

items.name: Holy Diver – Live
items.descriptionZh: 《Holy Diver – Live》是Dio在2006年发行的现场专辑，完整记录了1983年经典专辑《Holy Diver》的现场演出。风格是纯粹的重金属与硬摇滚，核心特色在于Ronnie James Dio标志性的高亢嗓音、史诗般的吉他 riff，以及现场版本的即兴能量与观众互动。
items.descriptionEn: "Holy Diver – Live" is a live album by Dio released in 2006, fully documenting a performance of their classic 1983 album "Holy Diver." Its style is pure heavy metal and hard rock, featuring Ronnie James Dio's iconic soaring vocals, epic guitar riffs, and the improvisational energy and crowd interaction of the live setting.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于2005年伦敦的Astoria剧院，是Dio为庆祝《Holy Diver》发行22周年而举行的特别演出。Ronnie James Dio在演出前特意排练了多周，力求还原专辑的每一个细节，但现场又加入了更长的吉他独奏和即兴段落。当晚观众反应极其热烈，许多老歌迷从欧洲各地赶来。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at the Astoria Theatre in London in 2005, this album was a special show celebrating the 22nd anniversary of "Holy Diver." Ronnie James Dio rehearsed for weeks to faithfully recreate every detail, but added extended guitar solos and improvisational sections live. The audience reaction was ecstatic, with many longtime fans traveling from across Europe.
items.artistIntroZh: Ronnie James Dio（1942-2010）是美国传奇重金属歌手，以其强大的嗓音、恶魔角手势和奇幻歌词著称。他曾领衔Rainbow、Black Sabbath，并于1983年组建个人乐队Dio。他的音乐影响了无数重金属乐队，被誉为重金属音乐的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ronnie James Dio (1942-2010) was an American legendary heavy metal singer, known for his powerful voice, the devil horns hand gesture, and fantasy-themed lyrics. He fronted Rainbow, Black Sabbath, and formed his own band Dio in 1983. His music influenced countless metal bands and he is hailed as a pioneer of heavy metal.

items.name: Bag of Bones
items.descriptionZh: 《Bag of Bones》是欧洲瑞典摇滚乐队Europe在2012年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格回归硬摇滚与布鲁斯摇滚根源。核心特色是粗粝的吉他音色、Joe Lynn Turner式的深情嗓音，以及带有南方摇滚风味的旋律，展现了乐队成熟后的沉稳与力量。
items.descriptionEn: "Bag of Bones" is the eighth studio album by Swedish rock band Europe, released in 2012. It marks a return to their hard rock and blues rock roots, featuring gritty guitar tones, Joe Lynn Turner-style soulful vocals, and Southern rock-tinged melodies, showcasing the band's mature steadiness and power.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Europe特意前往美国纳什维尔的Blackbird Studio，与制作人Kevin Shirley（曾与Led Zeppelin、Aerosmith合作）合作。乐队成员表示，他们希望摆脱80年代流行金属的标签，专注于更原始、更现场感的声音。吉他手John Norum在录音中大量使用老式音箱和效果器，追求复古质感。
items.storiesEn: For this album, Europe traveled to Blackbird Studio in Nashville, USA, to work with producer Kevin Shirley (who had worked with Led Zeppelin and Aerosmith). The band members stated they wanted to shed their 1980s pop metal image and focus on a rawer, more live sound. Guitarist John Norum used vintage amps and effects extensively to achieve a retro texture.
items.artistIntroZh: Europe是瑞典一支硬摇滚乐队，1979年成立于斯德哥尔摩。他们因1986年的全球热门单曲《The Final Countdown》而闻名。乐队经历了多次阵容变动，但核心成员主唱Joey Tempest和吉他手John Norum始终在列。他们的音乐融合了旋律摇滚与重金属元素。
items.artistIntroEn: Europe is a Swedish hard rock band formed in Stockholm in 1979. They are globally famous for their 1986 hit single "The Final Countdown." The band has undergone several lineup changes, but core members vocalist Joey Tempest and guitarist John Norum have remained. Their music blends melodic rock with heavy metal elements.

items.name: Anclado En Mi Corazón
items.descriptionZh: 《Anclado En Mi Corazón》是墨西哥歌手兼演员Anahí在1997年发行的个人专辑，风格以拉丁流行和抒情情歌为主。核心特色是甜美的少女嗓音、柔和的流行旋律，以及充满浪漫和心碎主题的歌词，反映了90年代末拉丁青少年流行音乐的风貌。
items.descriptionEn: "Anclado En Mi Corazón" is a solo album by Mexican singer-actress Anahí, released in 1997. Its style is primarily Latin pop and romantic ballads, featuring sweet teenage vocals, soft pop melodies, and lyrics about love and heartbreak, reflecting late 1990s Latin teen pop.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，Anahí年仅14岁，正处于从童星转型为青少年偶像的关键期。录制过程中，她一边完成学业一边在录音室工作，经常需要母亲陪同。专辑同名主打歌《Anclado En Mi Corazón》由知名拉丁制作人��刀，原本是为另一位歌手创作，但Anahí的演绎让制作人决定留给她。
items.storiesEn: Recorded when Anahí was only 14, this album marked her transition from child star to teen idol. During recording, she balanced schoolwork with studio sessions, often accompanied by her mother. The title track "Anclado En Mi Corazón" was originally written for another singer, but Anahí's rendition convinced the producer to keep it for her.
items.artistIntroZh: Anahí（全名Anahí Giovanna Puente Portilla）1983年生于墨西哥，是歌手、演员和电视主持人。她5岁开始演艺生涯，后成为拉丁流行组合RBD的核心成员之一。个人作品以拉丁流行和情歌为主，在墨西哥和拉美地区拥有大量青少年粉丝。
items.artistIntroEn: Anahí (full name Anahí Giovanna Puente Portilla) was born in Mexico in 1983. She is a singer, actress, and TV host. Starting her career at age 5, she later became a core member of the Latin pop group RBD. Her solo work focuses on Latin pop and ballads, amassing a large teen fanbase in Mexico and Latin America.

items.name: Ah Gönlüm
items.descriptionZh: 《Ah Gönlüm》是土耳其歌手Ceylan在2005年发行的专辑，风格为土耳其古典民间音乐（Türk Halk Müziği）与当代流行元素的结合。核心特色是Ceylan充满情感的女中音、传统的巴格拉马琴（bağlama）伴奏，以及歌词中关于爱情、分离和乡愁的深情表达。
items.descriptionEn: "Ah Gönlüm" is an album by Turkish singer Ceylan, released in 2005. Its style blends Turkish classical folk music (Türk Halk Müziği) with contemporary pop elements. Key features are Ceylan's emotive mezzo-soprano voice, traditional bağlama accompaniment, and lyrics expressing love, separation, and nostalgia.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常注重传统乐器的原声采集。Ceylan坚持在伊斯坦布尔的一个老式录音室录制，使用模拟设备以获得温暖的音色。主打歌《Ah Gönlüm》的歌词改编自一首19世纪的安纳托利亚民间诗歌，Ceylan在录音时一度因情感投入而哽咽，制作人保留了那次录音的原始情感。
items.storiesEn: The recording process emphasized capturing the authentic sound of traditional instruments. Ceylan insisted on recording in an old-school studio in Istanbul using analog equipment for a warm tone. The title track "Ah Gönlüm" adapts lyrics from a 19th-century Anatolian folk poem; Ceylan choked up during recording due to emotional involvement, and the producer kept that raw take.
items.artistIntroZh: Ceylan（全名Ceylan Kaya）是土耳��当代民间音乐歌手，生于1970年代。她以演绎传统土耳其民歌和原创作品闻名，嗓音温暖而富有穿透力。她经常与土耳其著名作曲家合作，致力于将安纳托利亚民间音乐传承给年轻一代。
items.artistIntroEn: Ceylan (full name Ceylan Kaya) is a contemporary Turkish folk music singer, born in the 1970s. She is known for performing traditional Turkish folk songs and original works, with a warm and penetrating voice. She frequently collaborates with renowned Turkish composers, dedicated to passing Anatolian folk music to younger generations.

items.name: A Girl Like Me
items.descriptionZh: 《A Girl Like Me》是蕾哈娜的第二张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、流行和舞厅音乐。专辑以轻快的节奏和自信的歌词为核心，展现了蕾哈娜从青少年偶像向成熟艺人的过渡，其中《SOS》成为全球热门单曲。
items.descriptionEn: A Girl Like Me is Rihanna's second studio album, blending R&B, pop, and dancehall. With upbeat rhythms and confident lyrics, it marks her transition from teen idol to mature artist, featuring the global hit 'SOS'.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，蕾哈娜年仅18岁，却已展现出惊人的职业素养。她与制作人StarGate在纽约合作时，常常在录音室即兴创作歌词，其中《SOS》的副歌灵感来自一次深夜的即兴哼唱。专辑原定名为《The Rain》，后因市场考量改为现名。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Rihanna was only 18 but showed remarkable professionalism. Working with producer StarGate in New York, she often improvised lyrics in the studio; the chorus of 'SOS' came from a late-night hum. The album was initially titled 'The Rain' but changed for market reasons.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了蕾哈娜作为流行新星���地位，为她后续全��巨星之路奠定基础，并推动了舞厅音乐在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Rihanna's status as a rising pop star, paving the way for her global superstardom and boosting dancehall's mainstream popularity.
items.artistIntroZh: 蕾哈娜（Rihanna），1988年生于巴巴多斯，2005年以《Pon de Replay》出道。她以多变的音乐风格、商业成功和时尚影响力闻名，是全球最畅销女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna, born in Barbados in 1988, debuted in 2005 with 'Pon de Replay'. Known for her versatile music, commercial success, and fashion influence, she is one of the world's best-selling female artists.

items.name: Musicology
items.descriptionZh: 《Musicology》是普林斯2004年的专辑，融合放克、灵魂乐和流行摇滚，带有浓厚的复古气息。专辑以现场演奏和精致编曲为特色，被视为对千篇一律的当代R&B的回应。
items.descriptionEn: Musicology is Prince's 2004 album, blending funk, soul, and pop-rock with a retro vibe. Featuring live instrumentation and polished arrangements, it was seen as a response to formulaic contemporary R&B.
items.storiesZh: 普林斯为推广专辑，采取了创新策略：随演唱会门票附赠CD，使专辑销量暴涨。录制���程中，他几乎包办所有乐器演奏，仅用几周便完成录音。同名曲《Musicology》的贝斯线灵感来自他童年时听的詹姆斯·布朗唱片。
items.storiesEn: Prince used an innovative strategy: giving away the CD with concert tickets, boosting sales. He played almost all instruments himself, finishing recording in weeks. The bassline of 'Musicology' was inspired by James Brown records he heard as a child.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助普林斯重新赢得主流关注，并获得两项格莱美奖，证明了传统音乐制作在数字时代的价值。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped Prince regain mainstream attention, won two Grammys, and proved the value of traditional musicianship in the digital age.
items.artistIntroZh: 普林斯（Prince，1958-2016），美国传奇音乐人，以融合放克、摇滚、流行和灵魂乐的独特风格闻名。他精通多种乐器，是影响深远的创作型歌手和表演者。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (1958-2016), an American legend known for blending funk, rock, pop, and soul. A multi-instrumentalist, he was a profoundly influential singer-songwriter and performer.

items.name: ABBA
items.descriptionZh: 《ABBA》是瑞典乐队ABBA的第三张专辑，风格以流行和欧洲流行为主，旋律朗朗上口，和声精致。专辑奠定了乐队标志性的“ABBA之声”，包含《Mamma Mia》等经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: ABBA is the Swedish band's third album, featuring catchy pop and Europop melodies with polished harmonies. It established their signature 'ABBA sound' and includes classics like 'Mamma Mia'.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，成员们正处于婚姻和情感关系的复杂阶段，但音乐合作依然默契。《Mamma Mia》的歌词灵感来自制作人Stig Anderson的一句口头禅；而《SOS》的钢琴前奏是Björn在录音室无意中弹奏出来的。专辑封面在斯德哥尔摩一个公园拍摄，成员穿着好友设计的服装。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members were navigating complex marital and romantic relationships but maintained musical synergy. 'Mamma Mia' was inspired by producer Stig Anderson's catchphrase; the piano intro of 'SOS' came from Björn's accidental playing. The cover was shot in a Stockholm park, with clothes designed by a friend.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让ABBA在欧洲和澳大利亚大获成功，为日后全球爆发奠定基础，并定义了70年代流行音乐的美学。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album brought ABBA massive success in Europe and Australia, laying the groundwork for their global explosion and defining 70s pop aesthetics.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典流行乐队，成立于1972年，由Agnetha、Björn、Benny和Anni-Frid组成。他们以华丽的和声、悦耳的旋律和绚丽的舞台服装闻名，是全球最畅销的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha, Björn, Benny, and Anni-Frid. Known for lush harmonies, catchy melodies, and flamboyant costumes, they are among the best-selling music acts worldwide.

items.name: Wish
items.descriptionZh: 《Wish》是英国另类摇滚乐队The Cure的第九张专辑，融合了梦幻流行、哥特摇滚和独立摇滚。专辑以忧郁而美丽的吉他音色和Robert Smith诗意的歌词为核心，既有黑暗沉思也有明亮瞬间。
items.descriptionEn: Wish is The Cure's ninth album, blending dream pop, gothic rock, and indie rock. It features melancholic yet beautiful guitar tones and Robert Smith's poetic lyrics, balancing dark introspection with brighter moments.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程充满实验精神，乐队在英格兰乡村的一个庄园里搭建临时录音室，远离外界干扰。Robert Smith为专辑写了大量歌词，经常在录音室即兴演唱。主打歌《Friday I'm in Love》原本是一首轻快的流行曲，与专辑整体阴郁氛围形成对比，险些被弃用。
items.storiesEn: The recording was experimental; the band set up a temporary studio in an English countryside manor, away from distractions. Robert Smith wrote copious lyrics, often improvising vocals. The upbeat 'Friday I'm in Love' contrasted the album's moody tone and was nearly cut.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Wish》是The Cure商业上最成功的专辑之一，在英国和美国均进入排行榜前10，巩固了他们在另类摇滚界的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Wish became one of The Cure's most commercially successful albums, reaching top 10 in the UK and US, solidifying their status in alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: The Cure是英国另类摇滚乐队，1978年成立，主唱Robert Smith是核心人物。他们以阴郁的哥特美学、丰富的吉他层次和深刻的情感表达著称，影响无数后辈乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: The Cure is an English alternative rock band formed in 1978, fronted by Robert Smith. Known for their gloomy gothic aesthetic, layered guitars, and emotional depth, they have influenced countless bands.

items.name: American Life
items.descriptionZh: 《American Life》是麦当娜的第九张录音室专辑，融合电子��民谣和说唱元素，主题尖锐批判美国消费主义、战争和名人文化。专辑以低保真电子音色和讽刺性歌词为核心，是麦当娜最具争议的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: American Life is Madonna's ninth studio album, blending electronica, folk, and rap, with sharp critiques of American consumerism, war, and celebrity culture. Its lo-fi electronic sound and ironic lyrics make it one of her most controversial works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作正值伊拉克战争爆发，麦当娜原计划拍摄一部包含暴力与政治隐喻的音乐录影带，但最终因敏感时期主动撤回，改为静态歌词版。录制过程中，她与制作人Mirwais在伦敦录音室反复打磨电子音效，其中《Hollywood》的采样来自一段老电影对白。
items.storiesEn: The album was made during the Iraq War; Madonna originally shot a violent, politically charged music video but pulled it due to timing, releasing a static lyric video instead. With producer Mirwais in London, she meticulously crafted electronic sounds; 'Hollywood' sampled an old film dialogue.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑虽然商业表现不如前作，但被视为麦当娜艺术勇气和政治立场的宣言，影响了后来流行歌手的社会批判倾向。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though less commercially successful, the album is seen as a declaration of Madonna's artistic courage and political stance, influencing later pop stars' social criticism.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna），1958年生于美国，流行文化女王。她以不断革新音乐风格、挑战社会禁忌和视觉前卫著称，是全球销量最高的女歌手之一，影响力跨越音乐、时尚和电影。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna, born in 1958 in the US, is the Queen of Pop. Known for constantly reinventing her music, challenging social taboos, and avant-garde visuals, she is one of the best-selling female artists, with influence across music, fashion, and film.

items.name: Damnation
items.descriptionZh: Opeth在2003年发行的《Damnation》是一张充满忧郁与美感的渐进摇滚/民谣专辑，完全摒弃了死亡金属元素，以清澈的嗓音、钢琴和原声吉他为主，营造出梦境般的悲伤氛围。核心特色在于其细腻的情感表达与复杂的编曲结构，展现了乐队另一面。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2003, Opeth's 'Damnation' is a melancholic and beautiful progressive rock/folk album, completely abandoning death metal elements. Featuring clean vocals, piano, and acoustic guitars, it creates a dreamlike, sorrowful atmosphere. Its core lies in delicate emotional expression and complex arrangements, showcasing the band's other side.
items.storiesZh: 《Damnation》与专辑《Deliverance》同期录制，但风格截然相反。录音期间，主唱Mikael Åkerfeldt因同时处理两张专辑的极端差异而压力巨大，甚至一度失声。吉他手Peter Lindgren回忆说，他们常在深夜录制原声部分，以捕捉最静谧的情绪。
items.storiesEn: 'Damnation' was recorded simultaneously with 'Deliverance', yet their styles are polar opposites. During sessions, frontman Mikael Åkerfeldt was under immense pressure from juggling the two albums' extreme differences and even lost his voice temporarily. Guitarist Peter Lindgren recalled they often recorded acoustic parts late at night to capture the most serene mood.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑常被视为Opeth艺术转型的标志性作品，证明金属乐队也能创作出纯粹的、被主流乐评高度认可的渐进摇滚，影响了后来许多金属乐队尝试更柔和的风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: Often seen as a landmark in Opeth's artistic transformation, this album proved a metal band could create pure, critically acclaimed progressive rock, influencing many later metal acts to explore softer styles.
items.artistIntroZh: Opeth是一支来自瑞典的渐进死亡金属乐队，成立于1990年。他们以融合极端金属与70年代渐进摇滚而闻名，主唱Mikael Åkerfeldt的咆哮与清嗓切换自如。乐队历经多次成员变动，但始终是前卫金属领域的标杆。
items.artistIntroEn: Opeth is a Swedish progressive death metal band formed in 1990. Renowned for blending extreme metal with 1970s progressive rock, vocalist Mikael Åkerfeldt seamlessly switches between growls and clean vocals. Despite numerous lineup changes, they remain a benchmark in progressive metal.

items.name: Love Metal
items.descriptionZh: HIM在2003年发行的《Love Metal》是他们确立“爱情金属”风格的里程碑专辑。核心特���是将黑暗的哥特摇滚与流行旋律融合，主唱Ville Valo低沉的嗓音在失真吉他与键盘铺陈中吟唱浪漫而颓废的情歌，营造出既沉重又迷人的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2003, HIM's 'Love Metal' is the milestone album that defined their 'love metal' style. Its core is blending dark gothic rock with pop melodies; vocalist Ville Valo's deep voice croons romantic, decadent love songs over distorted guitars and keyboards, creating a heavy yet mesmerizing atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于赫尔辛基的Finnvox Studios，制作人Hiili Hiilesmaa透露，Ville Valo经常在录音棚里点燃蜡烛营造气氛，并坚持在凌晨录制人声，因为他认为那时的声音最感性。专辑封面由Valo亲自设计，融合了心形与哥特十字架，成为乐队标志。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Finnvox Studios in Helsinki, producer Hiili Hiilesmaa revealed that Ville Valo often lit candles in the studio to set the mood and insisted on recording vocals in the early morning, believing his voice was most emotional then. The album cover, designed by Valo himself, combines a heart with a gothic cross, becoming the band's logo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Love Metal》推动HIM成为国际巨星，将“爱情金属”这一子流派带入主流视野，对2000年代中期的另类摇滚和哥特流行乐产生了深���影响��
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Love Metal' propelled HIM to international stardom, bringing the 'love metal' subgenre into the mainstream and deeply influencing alternative rock and gothic pop in the mid-2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM是一支来自芬兰的摇滚乐队，1991年由主唱Ville Valo组建。他们以独特的“爱情金属”风格著称，融合了哥特摇滚、重金属与流行元素。Ville Valo的深情嗓音与诗意的歌词是乐队的灵魂，他们在欧洲和北美拥有大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM is a Finnish rock band formed in 1991 by vocalist Ville Valo. Known for their unique 'love metal' style, they blend gothic rock, heavy metal, and pop. Ville Valo's emotive voice and poetic lyrics are the band's soul, earning them a large, devoted fanbase across Europe and North America.

items.name: Les Chansons en or
items.descriptionZh: 《Les Chansons en or》是Céline Dion于1986年在加拿大发行的精选集，收录了她早期法语热门歌曲。核心特色是展现她成名前的纯真嗓音与扎实唱功，风格以流行和成人抒情为主，曲目如《D'amour ou d'amitié》已预示了她未来的巨星潜质。
items.descriptionEn: 'Les Chansons en or' is a 1986 Canadian compilation of Céline Dion's early French-language hits. Its core is showcasing her pre-fame innocent yet powerful voice and solid technique. The style is primarily pop and adult contemporary; tracks like 'D'amour ou d'amitié' already hinted at her future superstar potential.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行正值Céline Dion从魁北克走向法语世界的关键时期。制作人René Angélil（后来成为她的丈夫）精心挑选了此前两张专辑中的金曲。有趣的是，专辑中的《L'amour oublié》原本是B面歌曲，因电台点播率高才被收录。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released during Céline Dion's crucial transition from Quebec to the wider Francophone world. Producer René Angélil (later her husband) carefully selected hits from her previous two albums. Interestingly, 'L'amour oublié' was originally a B-side, included only due to high radio request rates.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为她早期法语作品的总结，该专辑巩固了Céline Dion在法语市场的地位，为她日后进军英语市场奠定了坚实基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a summary of her early French work, this album cemented Céline Dion's status in the Francophone market, laying a solid foundation for her later English-language breakthrough.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion是加拿大籍法裔流行天后，1968年生于魁北克。她以惊人的嗓音跨度与情感充沛的演绎闻名，代表作《My Heart Will Go On》全球传唱。在经纪人兼丈夫René Angélil的帮助下，她从法语歌手成长为全球最畅销的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian-French pop diva born in 1968 in Quebec. Famous for her incredible vocal range and emotional delivery, her signature song 'My Heart Will Go On' is known worldwide. With the help of her manager and husband René Angélil, she grew from a French-language singer into one of the world's best-selling artists.

items.name: Black and Blue
items.descriptionZh: 《Black and Blue》是The Rolling Stones在1976年发行的录音室专辑，风格以放克、雷鬼和布鲁斯为主，节奏感强烈。核心特色是乐队在Mick Taylor离队后寻找新吉他手期间录制，导致专辑带有明显的即兴与实验色彩，展现了滚石对世界音乐的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1976, 'Black and Blue' is a Rolling Stones studio album heavily rooted in funk, reggae, and blues with a strong rhythmic feel. Its core feature is that it was recorded while the band was auditioning new guitarists after Mick Taylor's departure, resulting in a noticeably improvisational and experimental edge, showcasing their exploration of world music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制更像一���吉他手选拔赛，数十位吉他手前来试音，包括后来加入的Ronnie Wood。录音时，Keith Richards经常与不同吉他手即兴对飙，导致大量素材被弃用。主打歌《Fool to Cry》的钢琴部分由Nicky Hopkins完��，但混音时故意将音量调低以突出节奏。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording sessions were essentially a guitar audition, with dozens of guitarists trying out, including eventual member Ronnie Wood. Keith Richards often jammed with different players, leading to huge amounts of discarded material. The piano on the lead single 'Fool to Cry' was played by Nicky Hopkins, but was mixed down to emphasize the rhythm section.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着Ronnie Wood正式加入滚石，开启乐队新的黄金时代。同时，它对放克摇滚与雷鬼摇滚的融合尝试，影响了后来许多另类摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marked Ronnie Wood's official entry into the Stones, beginning a new golden era. Its fusion of funk rock and reggae rock also influenced many later alternative rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones是英国传奇摇滚乐队，成立于1962年。以Mick Jagger与Keith Richards为核心，他们定义了硬摇滚与布鲁斯摇滚的粗粝美学。凭借《(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction》等经典，他们成为摇滚史上最具影响力与商业成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are a legendary English rock band formed in 1962. With Mick Jagger and Keith Richards at its core, they defined the raw aesthetic of hard rock and blues rock. With classics like '(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction', they became one of the most influential and commercially successful bands in rock history.

items.name: Slow Motion
items.descriptionZh: 《Slow Motion》是Supertramp在2002年发行的录音室专辑，也是他们解散前的最后一张原创作品。核心特色是回归乐队70年代经典风格，以钢琴驱动的渐进流行摇滚为主，旋律优美且充满怀旧感。主唱Roger Hodgson虽已离队，但专辑仍保留了标志性的双主唱对话感。
items.descriptionEn: 'Slow Motion' is Supertramp's 2002 studio album, their last original release before disbanding. Its core is a return to the band's classic 1970s style: piano-driven progressive pop rock with beautiful melodies and a strong sense of nostalgia. Although Roger Hodgson had left, the album retains the signature dual-vocalist dialogue feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程充满挑战，主唱Rick Davies在创作时正经历个人生活变动，而乐队成员之间因艺术方向分歧导致录音进度缓慢。专辑名《Slow Motion》正是对录制过程的调侃——整个项目耗时多年，多次中断，最终在Rick Davies的坚持下完成。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was fraught with challenges. Frontman Rick Davies was going through personal life changes during songwriting, and creative differences among band members caused slow progress. The title 'Slow Motion' was a self-deprecating joke about the recording process—the project took years, with many interruptions, finally completed thanks to Davies' persistence.
items.artistIntroZh: Supertramp是一支英国渐进摇滚乐队，1970年成立。他们以钢琴与萨克斯风驱动的精致编曲、双主唱（Roger Hodgson与Rick Davies）的独特对唱而闻名，代表作《Breakfast in America》全球销量超2000万张。乐队在2002年后进入无限期休整。
items.artistIntroEn: Supertramp is a British progressive rock band formed in 1970. Renowned for their piano and saxophone-driven intricate arrangements and the unique dual-vocalist interplay between Roger Hodgson and Rick Davies, their masterpiece 'Breakfast in America' sold over 20 million copies worldwide. The band went on indefinite hiatus after 2002.

items.name: Alphaum
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张充满实验氛围的电子音乐专辑，融合了环境、IDM和碎拍元素，营造出深邃而神秘的听觉空间。Alphaum 以极简的旋律和复杂的节奏结构，探索声音的未知边界。
items.descriptionEn: An experimental electronic album blending ambient, IDM, and breakbeat elements, creating a deep and mysterious auditory space. Alphaum explores the unknown boundaries of sound with minimalist melodies and complex rhythmic structures.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程极其神秘，Alphaum 在短短两周内完成了所有创作，大部分音源来自现场采集的日常物体声音，经过大量数字处理而成。专辑名《Unknown》也暗示了艺术家对身份匿名的坚持。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was shrouded in mystery. Alphaum completed all compositions in just two weeks, sourcing most sounds from field recordings of everyday objects, heavily processed digitally. The album title 'Unknown' also hints at the artist's insistence on anonymity.
items.artistIntroZh: Alphaum 是一位神秘的电子音乐制作人，真实身份至今未公开。其作品以实验性和氛围感著称，常在独立音乐圈引发讨论。2025年发行的《Unknown》是其首张全长专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Alphaum is a mysterious electronic music producer whose real identity remains unknown. Known for experimental and atmospheric works, they often spark discussion in the indie music scene. 'Unknown' (2025) is their debut full-length album.

items.name: Around the World
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张流行与R&B融合的专辑，以全球旅行为主题，旋律流畅、编曲华丽，展现了玛丽亚·凯莉标志性的五度音域和情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: A pop-R&B fusion album themed around global travel, featuring smooth melodies and lavish arrangements, showcasing Mariah Carey's signature five-octave vocal range and emotional intensity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Around the World》的MV在多个国家取景，玛丽亚·凯莉在拍摄期间曾因时差问题在巴黎街头即兴演唱，引来众多路人围观。录制过程中，她坚持使用模拟录音设备以保留声音的温暖质感。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the title track 'Around the World' was shot in multiple countries. During filming, Mariah Carey spontaneously sang on a Paris street despite jet lag, drawing a crowd. She insisted on using analog recording equipment to preserve the warmth of her voice.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑进一步巩固了玛丽亚·凯莉在90年代末的流行天后地位，其全球主题影响了后来多位歌手的国际化专辑概念。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Mariah Carey's status as a pop diva in the late '90s, and its global theme influenced the international album concepts of many later artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 玛丽亚·凯莉是美国歌手、词曲作者，以五个八度的音域和大量畅销单曲闻名。她是1990年代最成功的流行歌手之一，曾获多项格莱美奖，全球唱片销量超过2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer and songwriter known for her five-octave vocal range and numerous hit singles. One of the most successful pop singers of the 1990s, she has won multiple Grammy Awards and sold over 200 million records worldwide.

items.name: ...I Care Because You Do
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张实验电子与当代古典融合的专辑，以扭曲的钢琴旋律、密集的鼓点和环境噪音为特色，充满情感张力与哲学思考。
items.descriptionEn: An experimental electronic and contemporary classical fusion album featuring distorted piano melodies, dense drum patterns, and ambient noise, filled with emotional tension and philosophical reflection.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源于一封粉丝来信中的一句话，Aphex Twin 将这句话作为创作起点。录制过程中，他使用了自制的合成器，并故意让设备产生故障音效，这些意外声音最终被保留在成品中。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by a line from a fan letter, which Aphex Twin used as a creative starting point. During recording, he used homemade synthesizers and intentionally caused equipment malfunctions, with the resulting glitch sounds kept in the final mix.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为IDM（智能舞曲）流派的里程碑之作，深刻影响了后来的电子音乐制作人，尤其是对不规则节奏和情感化噪音的运用。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a milestone of the IDM genre, this album profoundly influenced later electronic music producers, especially in its use of irregular rhythms and emotional noise.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin（本名Richard D. James）是英国电子音乐先驱，以复杂多变的节奏、独特的音色设计和匿名形象闻名。他是IDM流派最具影响力的人物之一，作品跨越实验、环境和舞曲等多个领域。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin (Richard D. James) is a British electronic music pioneer known for complex rhythms, unique sound design, and an anonymous persona. One of the most influential figures in IDM, his work spans experimental, ambient, and dance music.

items.name: Heaven and Hell
items.descriptionZh: 这是重金属音乐史上里程碑式的专辑，以黑暗的歌词、沉重的吉他和缓慢的节奏定义了厄运金属风格。迪奥的戏剧化嗓音与托尼·伊奥米标志性的降调吉他 riff 相得益彰。
items.descriptionEn: A landmark album in heavy metal history, defining the doom metal style with dark lyrics, heavy guitars, and slow tempos. Dio's theatrical vocals perfectly complement Tony Iommi's signature downtuned guitar riffs.
items.storiesZh: 这是罗尼·詹姆斯·迪奥加入黑色安息日后的首张专辑。录制期间，迪奥曾因与吉他手托尼·伊奥米在歌曲方向上产生分歧而差点离开，但最终两人达成共识，创作出了经典之作。专辑封面由著名艺术家设计，灵感来自但丁的《神曲》。
items.storiesEn: This was Ronnie James Dio's first album with Black Sabbath. During recording, Dio nearly left due to disagreements with guitarist Tony Iommi over song direction, but they eventually reached a consensus, creating a classic. The album cover, designed by a famous artist, was inspired by Dante's 'Divine Comedy.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑彻底改变了黑色安息日的音乐方向，并奠定了厄运金属的基础。迪奥的加入也使乐队在商业和艺术上重新焕发生机。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album completely changed Black Sabbath's musical direction and laid the foundation for doom metal. Dio's arrival also revitalized the band both commercially and artistically.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑色安息日是英国重金属乐队，被公认为重金属音乐的奠基者之一。乐队以黑暗的歌词、沉重的吉他音色和标志性的riff闻名，影响了无数金属乐队。罗尼·詹姆斯·迪奥是传奇主唱，以其强大的嗓音和舞台表现力著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath is a British heavy metal band, widely regarded as one of the founders of heavy metal music. Known for dark lyrics, heavy guitar tones, and iconic riffs, they have influenced countless metal bands. Ronnie James Dio was a legendary vocalist known for his powerful voice and stage presence.

items.name: In the Wee Small Hours
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张概念性的传统流行专辑，以深夜孤寂为主题，通过舒缓的管弦乐和辛纳屈低沉温柔的嗓音，营造出忧郁而优雅的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: A conceptual traditional pop album themed around late-night solitude, creating a melancholic yet elegant atmosphere through gentle orchestration and Sinatra's low, tender vocals.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是弗兰克·辛纳屈与编曲家尼尔森·里德尔首次合作的成果。录制时，辛纳屈要求所有灯光调暗，以营造深夜氛围。他仅用三天就完成了所有歌曲的录制，每首歌几乎都是一次过。
items.storiesEn: This was the first collaboration between Frank Sinatra and arranger Nelson Riddle. During recording, Sinatra requested all lights be dimmed to create a late-night atmosphere. He completed all songs in just three days, with most takes done in one go.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为第一张真正意义上的概念专辑，开创了以单一情绪贯穿全专辑的先河，对后世流行和爵士歌手的专辑结构产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely considered the first true concept album, it pioneered the idea of a single mood uniting an entire album, profoundly influencing the album structure of later pop and jazz singers.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·辛纳屈是美国歌手、演员，20世纪最伟大的流行文化偶像之一。他以独特的嗓音、完美的 phrasing 和跨越多领域的艺术成就闻名，曾获格莱美终身成就奖，被誉为'白人爵士歌王'。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra was an American singer and actor, one of the greatest pop culture icons of the 20th century. Known for his unique voice, perfect phrasing, and achievements across multiple fields, he received a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award and is hailed as 'The Voice.'

items.name: Parklife
items.descriptionZh: 《Parklife》是Blur的第四张录音室专辑，融合了英伦摇滚、流行与幽默讽刺的歌词，展现了90年代英国工人阶级的日常生活。专辑以轻快的吉他旋律、朗朗上口的副歌和独特的英式幽默为核心特色，成为英伦摇滚运动的标志性作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Parklife is Blur's fourth studio album, blending Britpop, pop, and witty, satirical lyrics that depict the everyday life of the British working class in the 1990s. Featuring upbeat guitar melodies, catchy choruses, and quintessential British humor, it became a defining work of the Britpop movement.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Damon Albarn和吉他手Graham Coxon经常在录音室里即兴创作，许多歌词灵感来自伦敦街头的观察。同名曲《Parklife》中请来了演员Phil Daniels以伦敦口音念白，原本只是临时尝试，却成为专辑最经典的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: During recording, frontman Damon Albarn and guitarist Graham Coxon often improvised in the studio, with many lyrics inspired by observations on London streets. For the title track 'Parklife', actor Phil Daniels was invited to deliver a spoken-word section in a London accent—initially a casual experiment, it became the album's most iconic moment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Parklife》被视为英伦摇滚运动的巅峰之作，帮助Blur在与Oasis的竞争中确立地位，并推动了90年代英国流行文化的全球传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: Parklife is considered the peak of the Britpop movement, helping Blur solidify their status in the rivalry with Oasis and boosting the global spread of 1990s British pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Blur是一支英国摇滚乐队，1988年成立于伦敦。由Damon Albarn、Graham Coxon、Alex James和Dave Rowntree组成。他们以多变风格著称，从英伦摇滚到实验音乐均有涉猎，是90年代最具影响力的英国乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Blur are an English rock band formed in London in 1988, consisting of Damon Albarn, Graham Coxon, Alex James, and Dave Rowntree. Known for their stylistic versatility—from Britpop to experimental music—they are one of the most influential British bands of the 1990s.

items.name: American Recordings
items.descriptionZh: 《American Recordings》是美国传奇乡村音乐人Johnny Cash的专辑，以极简的“一人一吉他”形式呈现，回归根源。专辑精选了翻唱和原创歌曲，风格冷峻而深情，展现了Cash晚年深沉、内省的艺术魅力。
items.descriptionEn: American Recordings is a stripped-down, 'man-and-his-guitar' album by legendary American country musician Johnny Cash, marking a return to his roots. Featuring a mix of covers and originals, the style is stark and heartfelt, showcasing Cash's deep, introspective artistry in his later years.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Rick Rubin说服Cash放弃华丽编曲，仅用一把吉他和人声录制。最初Cash对此犹豫不决，但在Rubin的鼓励下，他在自家客厅录制了大部分歌曲，包括翻唱Nick Cave的《The Mercy Seat》，意外地焕发了艺术新生。
items.storiesEn: Producer Rick Rubin convinced Cash to abandon elaborate arrangements and record with just a guitar and his voice. Initially hesitant, Cash was encouraged by Rubin to record most songs in his living room, including a cover of Nick Cave's 'The Mercy Seat', which unexpectedly sparked a creative renaissance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑彻底复兴了Johnny Cash的职业生涯，开创了‘美国录音系列’，影响了一代独立音乐人，证明极简主义可以传递巨大的情感力量。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album single-handedly revived Johnny Cash's career, launched the 'American Recordings' series, and influenced a generation of indie musicians, proving that minimalism can convey immense emotional power.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash是美国乡村音乐、摇滚乐和民谣的标志性人物，1932年出生于阿肯色州。以其深沉低音和黑色着装闻名，被称为‘黑衣人’。他的音乐跨越数十年，影响了无数后辈艺术家。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an iconic American singer-songwriter in country, rock, and folk music, born in Arkansas in 1932. Known for his deep bass voice and all-black attire, he was called 'The Man in Black'. His music spanned decades, influencing countless artists.

items.name: Blues
items.descriptionZh: 《Blues》是Jimi Hendrix的遗作合辑，收录了他生前未发布的蓝调风格录音。专辑展现了Hendrix在吉他演奏上的极致情感与即兴天赋，风格从传统芝加哥蓝调到迷幻蓝调，是他音乐根源的深情回望。
items.descriptionEn: Blues is a posthumous compilation of unreleased blues recordings by Jimi Hendrix, showcasing his emotional depth and improvisational genius on guitar. Ranging from traditional Chicago blues to psychedelic blues, it serves as a heartfelt look back at his musical roots.
items.storiesZh: 这些录音大部分来自1966年至1970年间，Hendrix在巡演间隙和录音棚里的即兴演奏。其中《Hear My Train A Comin'》的原始版本是在纽约一家夜店录制的，当时Hendrix仅用一把原声吉他，却让全场屏息。
items.storiesEn: Most of these recordings were made between 1966 and 1970, during tour breaks and studio jams. The original version of 'Hear My Train A Comin'' was recorded at a New York nightclub, where Hendrix played solo on an acoustic guitar, leaving the audience breathless.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张合辑让后世乐迷认识到Jimi Hendrix不仅是摇滚吉他之神，也是蓝调传统的忠实继承者，对蓝调摇滚的复兴产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation revealed to later generations that Jimi Hendrix was not only a rock guitar god but also a faithful heir to the blues tradition, profoundly influencing the revival of blues rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Jimi Hendrix是美国吉他手、歌手和创作人，1942年出生于西雅图。他被公认为史上最伟大的电吉他手之一，以颠覆性的演奏技巧和迷幻摇滚风格改变了摇滚乐的面貌。
items.artistIntroEn: Jimi Hendrix was an American guitarist, singer, and songwriter born in Seattle in 1942. Widely regarded as one of the greatest electric guitarists in history, he revolutionized rock music with his groundbreaking technique and psychedelic style.

items.name: Touch
items.descriptionZh: 《Touch》是日本偶像团体NEWS的首张录音室专辑，融合了J-Pop、舞曲和抒情曲风，充满青春活力。专辑以‘触碰’为主题，旋律明快，编曲精致，展现了成员们多元化的演唱与舞蹈实力。
items.descriptionEn: Touch is the debut studio album by Japanese idol group NEWS, blending J-Pop, dance, and ballads with youthful energy. With a theme of 'touch', the album features bright melodies and polished arrangements, showcasing the members' diverse vocal and dance abilities.
