items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Touch》源自成员们希望用音乐‘触碰’听众心灵。录制时，成员山下智久和锦户亮经常在休息时间即兴合唱，其中一首未收录的即兴曲后来被粉丝称为‘传说中的歌曲’。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Touch' came from the members' desire to 'touch' listeners' hearts with music. During recording, members Tomohisa Yamashita and Ryo Nishida often sang impromptu harmonies during breaks; one unreleased jam later became known among fans as 'the legendary song'.
items.artistIntroZh: NEWS是日本杰尼斯事务所旗下的男子偶像团体，2003年成立。以团队合作和多样化表演著称，成员们活跃于音乐、影视和综艺领域，是日本最具人气的偶像团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: NEWS is a Japanese boy band under Johnny & Associates, formed in 2003. Known for their teamwork and versatile performances, members are active in music, film, and variety shows, making them one of Japan's most popular idol groups.

items.name: Mundial
items.descriptionZh: 《Mundial》是波多黎各雷鬼动巨星Daddy Yankee的专辑，以雷鬼动、拉丁流行和嘻哈为核心，节奏强劲，充满派对氛围。专辑名称意为‘世界级’，旨在展现拉丁音乐在全球的统治力。
items.descriptionEn: Mundial is an album by Puerto Rican reggaeton superstar Daddy Yankee, centered on reggaeton, Latin pop, and hip-hop. With powerful beats and a party atmosphere, the title means 'world-class', aiming to showcase Latin music's global dominance.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Daddy Yankee邀请了多位拉丁音乐人合作，包括Wisin & Yandel。其中主打歌《Descontrol》的MV在波多黎各街头拍摄，动用了数百名临时演员，现场气氛如同真正的街头派对。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Daddy Yankee collaborated with several Latin artists, including Wisin & Yandel. The music video for the lead single 'Descontrol' was shot on the streets of Puerto Rico with hundreds of extras, creating a real street-party atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Daddy Yankee，本名Ramón Luis Ayala Rodríguez，1977年出生于波多黎各。他是雷鬼动音乐的先驱和全球推广者，被誉为‘雷鬼动之王’，代表作《Gasolina》和《Despacito》享誉世界。
items.artistIntroEn: Daddy Yankee, born Ramón Luis Ayala Rodríguez in 1977 in Puerto Rico, is a pioneer and global ambassador of reggaeton, known as the 'King of Reggaeton'. His hits 'Gasolina' and 'Despacito' have achieved worldwide fame.

items.name: Discouraged Ones
items.descriptionZh: 《Discouraged Ones》是瑞典乐队Katatonia转型期的代表作，从早期的死亡厄运金属转向更忧郁的另类摇滚/厄运金属。专辑以阴暗的旋律、失真的吉他音墙和Jonas Renkse标志性的清嗓演唱为核心，营造出一种压抑而唯美的氛围，歌词探讨绝望、孤独与心理挣扎。
items.descriptionEn: Discouraged Ones marks Katatonia's shift from death-doom metal to a more melancholic alternative/doom sound. Defined by dark melodies, distorted guitar walls, and Jonas Renkse's clean vocals, the album creates a depressive yet beautiful atmosphere, exploring themes of despair, solitude, and mental struggle.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队首次完全使用清嗓演唱，主唱Jonas Renkse为此付出了巨大努力，甚至一度因声带问题而焦虑。录制过程中，乐队在瑞典的Sunlight Studio与工程师合作，但条件简陋，他们不得不自己动手改造设备。专辑封面由Travis Smith设计，其阴郁的视觉风格与音乐完美契合。
items.storiesEn: This album marked the band's first full use of clean vocals; vocalist Jonas Renkse struggled with vocal cord issues and anxiety during recording. The band worked at Sunlight Studio in Sweden under basic conditions, often modifying equipment themselves. The album cover, designed by Travis Smith, perfectly matches the music's gloomy aesthetic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是厄运金属向更情感化、旋律化方向发展的关键转折点，影响了后来的后金属和氛围厄运金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a key turning point for doom metal toward a more emotional, melodic direction, influencing later post-metal and atmospheric doom bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Katatonia成立于1991年，是瑞典最具影响力的厄运金属/另类摇滚乐队之一。他们以阴暗的旋律和深刻的歌词著称，从早期的死亡厄运金属逐渐演变为更实验性的风格，至今仍是金属乐坛的标杆。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1991, Katatonia is one of Sweden's most influential doom metal/alternative rock bands. Known for dark melodies and profound lyrics, they evolved from death-doom to a more experimental style, remaining a benchmark in the metal scene.

items.name: 10,000 Days
items.descriptionZh: 《10,000 Days》是美国前卫金属乐队Tool的第四张录音室专辑，延续了其复杂的节奏结构、哲学性歌词和多层次编曲。专辑融合了硬摇滚、氛围音乐和太空摇滚元素，主题涉及灵性、生死轮回和个人成长，时长近80分钟，堪称概念性巨作。
items.descriptionEn: 10,000 Days is Tool's fourth studio album, continuing their trademark complex rhythms, philosophical lyrics, and layered arrangements. Blending hard rock, ambient, and space rock, the album explores spirituality, reincarnation, and personal growth, spanning nearly 80 minutes as a conceptual masterpiece.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源自佛教中‘中阴身’（bardo）的49天（约10000分钟）概念。录制过程中，鼓手Danny Carey因膝盖手术而延迟，吉他手Adam Jones则花费数月手工制作专辑的3D立体封面。主唱Maynard James Keenan的母亲在专辑发行前去世，歌曲《Wings for Marie》就是为她而作。
items.storiesEn: The title references the Buddhist concept of 'bardo' (49 days, ~10,000 minutes). Drummer Danny Carey's knee surgery delayed recording; guitarist Adam Jones spent months creating the album's 3D stereoscopic cover. Vocalist Maynard James Keenan's mother died before release; 'Wings for Marie' was written for her.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑发行首周即登顶Billboard 200，并获得格莱美最佳金属表演奖（《Vicarious》），巩固了Tool作为前卫金属领袖的地位，影响了无数前卫和另类金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Debuted at No.1 on Billboard 200 and won a Grammy for Best Metal Performance ('Vicarious'), cementing Tool's status as progressive metal leaders and influencing countless prog and alt-metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Tool成立于1990年，是美国最著名的前卫金属乐队之一。以复杂的编曲、深刻的哲学主题和极具视觉冲击力的现场表演闻名，他们拥有大量狂热粉丝，每一张专辑都成为音乐界的事件。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1990, Tool is one of the most famous progressive metal bands in the US. Known for complex arrangements, deep philosophical themes, and visually stunning live shows, they have a massive cult following, with each album becoming a musical event.

items.name: Hard Candy
items.descriptionZh: 《Hard Candy》是麦当娜的第11张录音室专辑，主打流行舞曲和R&B风格，融合了电子、嘻哈和放克元素。专辑由Timbaland、Pharrell Williams等制作人操刀，节奏强劲、制作精良，歌词探讨权力、性别和享乐主义，展现了麦当娜对商业流行乐的精准掌控。
items.descriptionEn: Hard Candy is Madonna's 11th studio album, blending pop dance and R&B with electronic, hip-hop, and funk elements. Produced by Timbaland and Pharrell Williams, it features strong beats and polished production, with lyrics exploring power, gender, and hedonism, showcasing Madonna's mastery of commercial pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，麦当娜与制作人Timbaland和Pharrell产生了有趣的化学反应。Pharrell曾回忆说，麦当娜在录音室里非常直接，甚至要求他‘更疯狂一点’。专辑名称‘Hard Candy’原本是Pharrell提出的一个玩笑，但麦当娜喜欢这个比喻——外表坚硬，内里甜美。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna had a dynamic chemistry with producers Timbaland and Pharrell. Pharrell recalled Madonna being very direct, even demanding he 'get crazier.' The title 'Hard Candy' was originally a joke by Pharrell, but Madonna liked the metaphor—hard on the outside, sweet inside.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna）是流行音乐史上最具影响力的女歌手之一，被誉为‘流行女王’。自1980年代出道以来，她不断革新音乐风格和视觉形象，挑战社会禁忌，全球专辑销量超过3亿张，是文化偶像和女性赋权的象征。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is one of the most influential female artists in pop history, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Since the 1980s, she has constantly reinvented her music and image, challenging social taboos, with over 300 million albums sold worldwide, becoming a cultural icon and symbol of female empowerment.

items.name: Third
items.descriptionZh: 《Third》是英国电子乐队Portishead时隔11年的回归专辑，彻底颠覆了其标志性的Trip-hop风格。专辑以实验性、不和谐的音色和扭曲的电子氛围为核心，融合了爵士、摇滚和工业音乐元素，Beth Gibbons的嗓音在破碎的编曲中显得格外脆弱而有力，整体氛围阴暗而充满张力。
items.descriptionEn: Third is Portishead's return after 11 years, completely subverting their signature trip-hop sound. Centered on experimental, dissonant textures and distorted electronic atmospheres, it blends jazz, rock, and industrial elements. Beth Gibbons' voice sounds fragile yet powerful amid fractured arrangements, creating a dark, tense atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程极其艰难，乐队经历了严重的创作瓶颈。吉他手Adrian Utley和键盘手Geoff Barrow几乎拆解了所有传统乐器，用自制设备和老旧合成器制造出刺耳、机械的声音。Beth Gibbons曾因压力过大而多次崩溃，但最终这些挣扎成就了专辑独特的粗粝质感。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was extremely difficult, with the band facing severe creative block. Guitarist Adrian Utley and keyboardist Geoff Barrow deconstructed traditional instruments, using homemade gear and vintage synthesizers to create harsh, mechanical sounds. Beth Gibbons broke down multiple times from pressure, but these struggles gave the album its unique raw texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Third》被广泛认为是21世纪最具实验精神的专辑之一，打破了Trip-hop的刻板印象，影响了后来的实验电子和独立摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most experimental albums of the 21st century, it shattered trip-hop stereotypes and influenced later experimental electronic and indie rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Portishead成立于1991年，是英国布里斯托尔Trip-hop运动的三大先驱之一。以电影化的阴暗氛围、采样技术和Beth Gibbons独特的嗓音著称，他们只发行了三张录音室专辑，但每张都是经典，对电子音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1991, Portishead is one of the three pioneers of the Bristol trip-hop movement. Known for cinematic dark atmospheres, sampling techniques, and Beth Gibbons' unique voice, they have released only three studio albums, each a classic, profoundly influencing electronic music.

items.name: Mudcrutch
items.descriptionZh: 《Mudcrutch》是美国摇滚乐队Mudcrutch的同名首张专辑，也是Tom Petty在成名前组建的乐队的唯一录音室作品。风格以乡村摇滚、民谣和经典摇滚为主，融合了轻松惬意的南加州之声，吉他、键盘和和��交织，充满了怀旧而真诚的复古气息。
items.descriptionEn: Mudcrutch is the self-titled debut album by the American rock band Mudcrutch, Tom Petty's pre-fame project. Rooted in country rock, folk, and classic rock, it blends a laid-back SoCal sound with interwoven guitars, keyboards, and harmonies, exuding nostalgic and sincere retro vibes.
items.storiesZh: Mudcrutch成立于1970年，但直到2007年才重组录制这张专辑。Tom Petty原本只想和旧友玩一玩，结果灵感迸发，在自家录音棚里迅速完成了录制。有趣的是，鼓手Mike Campbell和键盘手Benmont Tench都是后来Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers的核心成员，这张专辑像是他们的‘时光胶囊’。
items.storiesEn: Mudcrutch formed in 1970 but didn't reunite to record this album until 2007. Tom Petty initially planned a casual jam session with old friends, but inspiration struck, and they quickly recorded it at his home studio. Interestingly, drummer Mike Campbell and keyboardist Benmont Tench later became core members of Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers, making this album a 'time capsule.'
items.artistIntroZh: Mudcrutch是Tom Petty在1970年于佛罗里达州成立的乐队，是他音乐生涯的起点。虽然乐队在1970年代中期解散，但成员后来重组了Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers。2007年，他们短暂重聚并发行了这张同名专辑，完成了未竟的音乐梦想。
items.artistIntroEn: Mudcrutch was a band formed by Tom Petty in Florida in 1970, marking the start of his music career. Though they disbanded in the mid-1970s, members later formed Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers. In 2007, they briefly reunited to release this self-titled album, fulfilling unfinished musical dreams.

items.name: Digital Versatile Doom
items.descriptionZh: 《Digital Versatile Doom》是芬兰乐队HIM的精选集，融合了爱情金属与哥特摇滚的浪漫与阴暗。专辑以深情的旋律、沉重的吉他和主唱Ville Valo标志性的低沉嗓音为特色，营造出一种忧郁而迷人的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Digital Versatile Doom is a compilation album by Finnish band HIM, blending love metal with gothic rock's romance and darkness. It features heartfelt melodies, heavy guitars, and Ville Valo's signature deep vocals, creating a melancholic yet captivating atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满创意碰撞。乐队在芬兰的录音室中反复打磨精选曲目，其中翻唱歌曲《Wicked Game》的录制尤为特别，Ville Valo在录音时即兴加入了一段低语，成为经典版本。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was full of creative collisions. The band meticulously refined the selected tracks in a Finnish studio. The cover of 'Wicked Game' was especially notable; Ville Valo improvised a whispered part during recording, which became a classic version.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为HIM的精选集，它巩固了乐队在爱情金属流派中的地位，影响了后来众多哥特摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a HIM compilation, it solidified the band's status in the love metal genre, influencing many later gothic rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM是1991年成立于芬兰赫尔辛基的摇滚乐队，以爱情金属风格闻名。主唱Ville Valo的独特嗓音和乐队融合了哥特、重金属与流行旋律的风格，使他们成为国际乐坛的亮点。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM is a rock band formed in Helsinki, Finland in 1991, known for their love metal style. With Ville Valo's unique vocals and a blend of gothic, heavy metal, and pop melodies, they became a highlight on the international music scene.

items.name: Louder Than Hell
items.descriptionZh: 《Louder Than Hell》是美国重金属乐队Manowar的第八张录音室专辑，以史诗般的力量金属风格著称。专辑充满雷鸣般的鼓点、激昂的吉他独奏和歌颂战斗与荣耀的歌词，展现了乐队对重金属纯粹力量的极致追求。
items.descriptionEn: Louder Than Hell is the eighth studio album by American heavy metal band Manowar, known for its epic power metal style. It features thunderous drums, soaring guitar solos, and lyrics celebrating battle and glory, showcasing the band's ultimate pursuit of pure heavy metal power.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，乐队为了追求最震撼的吉他音色，使用了特制的扩音设备，甚至让录音室墙壁产生共振。贝斯手Joey DeMaio在录制《King of Kings》时，因过度用力拨弦导致琴弦断裂，这段录音被保留下来。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band used custom amplification equipment to achieve the most crushing guitar tone, even causing the studio walls to resonate. Bassist Joey DeMaio broke a string from excessive force while recording 'King of Kings', and the take was kept.
items.artistIntroZh: Manowar是1980年成立于美国纽约的力量金属乐队，以宣扬重金属精神和维京主题闻名。他们以震耳欲聋的现场演出和“为金属而生”的座右铭著称，是重金属文化的重要象征之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Manowar is a power metal band formed in New York, USA in 1980, famous for promoting the spirit of heavy metal and Viking themes. Known for deafening live shows and the motto 'Born for Metal', they are a key symbol of heavy metal culture.

items.name: High Voltage
items.descriptionZh: 《High Voltage》是澳大利亚硬摇滚乐队AC/DC的首张国际版专辑，融合了布鲁斯摇滚与硬摇滚的粗粝能量。吉他手Angus Young的狂野演奏和主唱Bon Scott的嘶吼嗓音，奠定了乐队标志性的简约而有力的风格。
items.descriptionEn: High Voltage is the first international album by Australian hard rock band AC/DC, blending blues rock with raw hard rock energy. Guitarist Angus Young's wild playing and vocalist Bon Scott's raspy voice established the band's signature simple yet powerful style.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，乐队为了捕捉最原始的现场感，经常在录音室里即兴演奏。歌曲《T.N.T.》的灵感来自一次排练时Bon Scott随手写下的歌词，Angus Young则用一把破旧的吉他弹出了标志性的 riff。
items.storiesEn: To capture a raw live feel, the band often jammed spontaneously in the studio. The song 'T.N.T.' was inspired by lyrics Bon Scott jotted down during a rehearsal, and Angus Young played its iconic riff on a battered guitar.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑让AC/DC在国际上崭露头角，为后来的硬摇滚和重金属音乐树立了粗粝、直接的标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album brought AC/DC international recognition, setting a raw, direct benchmark for later hard rock and heavy metal music.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是1973年成立于澳大利亚悉尼的硬摇滚乐队，由Malcolm和Angus Young兄弟创立。他们以电力十足的现场演出和���叛的摇滚精神闻名，是史上最畅销的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is a hard rock band formed in Sydney, Australia in 1973 by brothers Malcolm and Angus Young. Famous for electrifying live performances and rebellious rock spirit, they are one of the best-selling rock bands in history.

items.name: After School Session
items.descriptionZh: 《After School Session》是摇滚先驱Chuck Berry的首张录音室专辑，定义了早期摇滚乐的雏形。专辑以节奏布鲁斯为基础，融合了乡村音乐元素，充满活力的吉他 riff 和Berry诙谐的叙事歌词，展现了青少年生活的欢乐与叛逆。
items.descriptionEn: After School Session is the debut studio album by rock pioneer Chuck Berry, defining the early form of rock and roll. Based on rhythm and blues with country elements, it features lively guitar riffs and Berry's witty narrative lyrics, capturing the joy and rebellion of teenage life.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Chuck Berry坚持使用自己独特的即兴演奏方式，常常在录音室里一边弹唱一边修改歌词。专辑中的《School Day》灵感来自他观察学生们放学后的情景，Berry仅用半小时就完成了创作。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Chuck Berry insisted on his unique improvisational style, often modifying lyrics while singing and playing in the studio. 'School Day' was inspired by watching students after school; Berry wrote it in just half an hour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了Chuck Berry作为摇滚乐奠基人的地位，其吉他技巧和叙事风格深刻影响了后来的披头士、滚石等无数乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Chuck Berry as a founding father of rock and roll, with his guitar techniques and narrative style deeply influencing later bands like The Beatles and The Rolling Stones.
items.artistIntroZh: Chuck Berry（1926-2017）是美国歌手、词曲作者和吉他手，被誉为“摇滚乐之父”。他以标志性的“鸭子步”和如《Johnny B. Goode》等经典作品，定义了摇滚乐的声音和态度。
items.artistIntroEn: Chuck Berry (1926-2017) was an American singer, songwriter, and guitarist, known as the 'Father of Rock and Roll'. With his iconic duck walk and classics like 'Johnny B. Goode', he defined the sound and attitude of rock music.

items.name: The Royal Scam
items.descriptionZh: 《The Royal Scam》是美国摇滚乐队Steely Dan的第五张录音室专辑，融合了爵士摇滚、放克和流行元素。专辑以精湛的编曲、复杂的和声和讽刺性的歌词著称，描绘了美国都市生活中的浮华与阴暗。
items.descriptionEn: The Royal Scam is the fifth studio album by American rock band Steely Dan, blending jazz rock, funk, and pop. Known for its meticulous arrangements, complex harmonies, and cynical lyrics, it depicts the glamour and darkness of urban American life.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程以追求完美闻名，���他手Larry Carlton为歌曲《Kid Charlemagne》录制了数十次 solo，最终版本被公认为史上最佳吉他 solo 之一。键盘手也因反复调整音色而几乎更换了所有设备。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was notorious for perfectionism. Guitarist Larry Carlton recorded dozens of takes for the solo on 'Kid Charlemagne', and the final version is considered one of the greatest guitar solos ever. The keyboardist also replaced nearly all equipment to fine-tune the sound.
items.artistIntroZh: Steely Dan是1972年成立于美国纽约的摇滚乐队，由核心成员Donald Fagen和Walter Becker主导。他们以精密的录音室制作、爵士化的和声和文学性的歌词著称，是70年代最具艺术性的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Steely Dan is a rock band formed in New York in 1972, led by core members Donald Fagen and Walter Becker. Known for meticulous studio production, jazz-influenced harmonies, and literary lyrics, they are one of the most artistic rock bands of the 1970s.

items.name: Live in NYC 12/31/92
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑记录了珍珠酱乐队1992年12月31日在纽约的跨年现场演出，充满原始而爆发的能量。乐队正处于巅峰期，演奏风格狂野不羁，主唱艾迪·维德的即兴呐喊与观众狂热互动融为一体，体现了90年代垃圾摇滚的现场魅力。
items.descriptionEn: This album captures Pearl Jam's raw and explosive New Year's Eve live performance in NYC on December 31, 1992. At their peak, the band delivered wild, unhinged energy, with Eddie Vedder's improvised shouts merging with the crowd's frenzy, embodying the live allure of '90s grunge.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出是珍珠酱乐队1992年巡演的压轴场，门票一抢而空。现场气氛极其热烈，主唱艾迪·维德多次跳入观众席，甚至从舞台高处跃下。录音时因观众噪音过大，后期混音师不得不将人声和乐器重新平衡，才得以发行。
items.storiesEn: This show was the finale of Pearl Jam's 1992 tour, with tickets sold out instantly. The atmosphere was electric; Eddie Vedder crowd-surfed multiple times and even jumped from the stage height. The audience noise was so loud that the mixing engineer had to rebalance vocals and instruments for release.
items.artistIntroZh: 珍珠酱乐队是美国西雅图传奇垃圾摇滚乐队，成立于1990年。他们以直击社会议题的歌词和充满激情的现场闻名，与涅槃、爱丽丝囚徒等共同定义了90年代另类摇滚。
items.artistIntroEn: Pearl Jam is a legendary grunge band from Seattle, formed in 1990. Known for politically charged lyrics and passionate live shows, they helped define '90s alternative rock alongside Nirvana and Alice in Chains.

items.name: Operation: Mindcrime
items.descriptionZh: 《Operation: Mindcrime》是皇后里克乐队的概念金属巨作，讲述一个政治阴谋与个人堕落的故事。专辑融合前卫金属与硬摇滚，歌词黑暗复杂，戏剧性叙事贯穿始终，被誉为摇滚歌剧的经典。
items.descriptionEn: Operation: Mindcrime is Queensrÿche's concept metal masterpiece, telling a story of political conspiracy and personal downfall. Blending progressive metal with hard rock, its dark, complex lyrics and dramatic narrative make it a classic rock opera.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员几乎住在录音室里，每天工作16小时。主唱杰夫·泰特为了进入角色，曾独自在黑暗的房间里冥想数小时。制作人彼得·柯林斯还邀请了一位真正的歌剧演员来演唱女高音部分，增加了戏剧张力���
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members practically lived in the studio, working 16-hour days. Lead singer Geoff Tate meditated alone in dark rooms for hours to get into character. Producer Peter Collins also hired a real opera singer for the soprano parts, adding dramatic tension.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为前卫金属史上最重要的概念专辑之一，影响了后来无数金属乐队创作长篇叙事作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most important concept albums in progressive metal history, influencing countless metal bands to create long-form narrative works.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后里克乐队是美国前卫金属先驱，成立于1981年。他们以复杂的编曲和深刻的主题著称，在80年代金属浪潮中独树一帜，是少数兼具技术性与商业成功的乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Queensrÿche is an American progressive metal pioneer, formed in 1981. Known for complex arrangements and deep themes, they stood out in the '80s metal wave as a rare blend of technicality and commercial success.

items.name: Orchestral Favorites
items.descriptionZh: 《Orchestral Favorites》是弗兰克·扎帕1975年洛杉矶管弦乐演出的现场录音，展现了他将摇滚、爵士与古典音乐融合的实验精神。专辑包含复杂的器乐段落和即兴演奏，是扎帕对管弦乐编排的独特探索。
items.descriptionEn: Orchestral Favorites is a live recording of Frank Zappa's 1975 orchestral performance in Los Angeles, showcasing his experimental fusion of rock, jazz, and classical music. Featuring complex instrumental passages and improvisation, it's a unique exploration of orchestral arrangement.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的母带曾因火灾险些被毁，直到1979年才得以修复发行。演出当晚，扎帕对管弦乐手们提出了极其苛刻的音准要求，导致部分乐手当场罢工。扎帕后来在采访中笑称这是“音乐家与作曲家的战争”。
items.storiesEn: The master tapes were nearly destroyed in a fire and were not restored and released until 1979. During the performance, Zappa demanded extremely strict intonation from the orchestra, causing some musicians to walk out. He later joked it was 'a war between musicians and the composer.'
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕是美国音乐全才，作曲家、吉他手、讽刺作家。他以颠覆性的音乐实验、尖锐的社会评论和庞大的作品量闻名，一生发行超过60张专辑，跨越摇滚、爵士、古典等多种风格。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American musical polymath—composer, guitarist, satirist. Known for subversive musical experiments, sharp social commentary, and a vast catalog of over 60 albums spanning rock, jazz, and classical.

items.name: On and On
items.descriptionZh: 《On and On》是杰克·约翰逊的第三张录音室专辑，延续了他标志性的舒缓冲浪民谣风格。温暖的木吉他、慵懒的嗓音和轻松节奏营造出夏日的悠闲氛围，歌词关于生活、爱与自然，简单而动人。
items.descriptionEn: On and On is Jack Johnson's third studio album, continuing his signature laid-back surf folk style. Warm acoustic guitars, mellow vocals, and easygoing rhythms create a summer vibe, with lyrics about life, love, and nature—simple yet touching.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在夏威夷欧胡岛的一个由车库改造的录音室里录制，约翰逊与好友们一边冲浪一边创作。录音设备十分简陋，甚至用泡沫塑料做隔音。专辑封面是约翰逊自己画的涂鸦，他说这样更“随意”。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a garage-turned-studio on Oahu, Hawaii, Johnson wrote songs while surfing with friends. The equipment was basic, with foam used for soundproofing. The album cover is Johnson's own doodle, which he said felt more 'casual.'
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克·约翰逊是美国歌手、冲浪手，出生于夏威夷。他以轻松温暖的民谣摇滚风格著称，歌词充满生活哲学。同时他也是环保活动家，创立了Kokua Hawaii Foundation。
items.artistIntroEn: Jack Johnson is an American singer-songwriter and surfer from Hawaii. Known for his warm, laid-back folk-rock style and life-affirming lyrics, he is also an environmental activist who founded the Kokua Hawaii Foundation.

items.name: Cómplices
items.descriptionZh: 《Cómplices》是西班牙歌手路易斯·米格尔的拉丁流行专辑，以浪漫情歌为主题。专辑融合了波莱罗、流行和轻柔摇滚，旋律优美深情，路易斯·米格尔的嗓音充满磁性，展现了他作为拉丁情歌王子的魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Cómplices is Luis Miguel's Latin pop album centered on romantic ballads. Blending bolero, pop, and soft rock, the melodies are beautiful and heartfelt, with Luis Miguel's magnetic vocals showcasing his reign as the 'Prince of Latin Pop.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑的制作邀请了多位知名词曲作者，��括曼努埃尔·亚历杭德罗。路易斯·米格尔对录音要求极高，曾为了一句歌词的发音反复录制数十遍。专辑发行后，他在墨西哥城的发布会上吸引了超过5万名粉丝到场。
items.storiesEn: The album featured renowned songwriters including Manuel Alejandro. Luis Miguel was extremely demanding in the studio, re-recording a single line dozens of times for perfect pronunciation. Upon release, his Mexico City launch event drew over 50,000 fans.
items.artistIntroZh: 路易斯·米格尔是墨西哥国宝级歌手，被誉为“拉丁流行之王”。他11岁出道，凭借醇厚的嗓音和浪漫风格征服全球，获得多项格莱美奖，是拉丁音乐史上最畅销的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Luis Miguel is a Mexican national treasure, known as the 'King of Latin Pop.' Debuting at age 11, he conquered the world with his rich voice and romantic style, winning multiple Grammys and becoming one of the best-selling Latin artists.

items.name: The Good, the Bad & the Live
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Metallica在1990年发行的现场录音精选，收录了乐队早期经典曲目的现场演绎。风格上展现了激流金属的狂野与精准，核心特色在于其原始、未经修饰的现场能量，以及乐队与观众之间爆发的化学反应，是体验Metallica现场魅力的绝佳记录。
items.descriptionEn: This is a live compilation album released by Metallica in 1990, featuring live renditions of the band's early classics. Stylistically, it showcases the raw energy and precision of thrash metal, with the core feature being its unpolished, visceral live power and the explosive chemistry between the band and the audience, making it an excellent record of Metallica's live charisma.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制素材来源于1989年至1990年间的多场巡演。有趣的是，Metallica当时正处于从激流金属向更主流风格过渡的时期，而这场现场录音恰好捕捉了他们旧作中最火爆的瞬间。专辑中的曲目编排紧凑，据说乐队成员在后台常因即兴发挥而碰撞出意想不到的火花。
items.storiesEn: The material for this album was recorded during multiple tours between 1989 and 1990. Interestingly, Metallica was in a transitional period from thrash metal towards a more mainstream sound, and this live recording perfectly captured the most explosive moments of their older material. The tracklist is tightly arranged, and it's said that band members often sparked unexpected creative collisions through improvisation backstage.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica于1981年在美国洛杉矶成立，是激流金属四巨头之一，以快速、侵略性的吉他riff和复杂的编曲闻名。他们在80年代奠定了金属乐的新标准，随后不断探索商业与艺术平衡，成为全球最具影响力的重金属乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica was formed in Los Angeles, USA in 1981, and is one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal, known for fast, aggressive guitar riffs and complex arrangements. They set new standards for metal in the 1980s and have since continuously explored the balance between commercial success and artistic integrity, becoming one of the most influential heavy metal bands globally.

items.name: Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers
items.descriptionZh: 这张精选集于1984年发行，是Bob Marley去世后推出的最畅销专辑，浓缩了他与The Wailers最经典的雷鬼乐作品。风格融合了牙买加节奏、灵魂乐与抗议精神，核心特色在于其传递的爱、和平与反抗压迫的普世信息，是雷鬼���入门与收藏的终极之选。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1984, this compilation is the best-selling album after Bob Marley's death, distilling the most classic reggae works of him and The Wailers. The style blends Jamaican rhythms, soul music, and protest spirit, with its core feature being the universal message of love, peace, and resistance against oppression. It is the ultimate choice for reggae newcomers and collectors alike.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于Island Records在Marley去世后希望整理其遗产。有趣的是，曲目选择并非完全基于商业考量，而是试图呈现Marley精神的全貌。录制素材来自不同时期，制作人精心混音，使得歌曲之间的过渡异常流畅，仿佛一张完整的专辑而非拼凑品。
items.storiesEn: This album was born from Island Records' desire to organize Marley's legacy after his death. Interestingly, the track selection was not purely commercial but aimed to present a complete picture of Marley's spirit. The material came from different periods, and the producers carefully mixed the tracks to ensure seamless transitions, making it feel like a cohesive album rather than a compilation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑将雷鬼乐推向全球主流，成为史上最畅销的雷鬼专辑之一。它巩固了Bob Marley作为文化偶像的地位，其和平与抗争的主题影响了无数后辈音乐人和社会运动。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album propelled reggae into the global mainstream, becoming one of the best-selling reggae albums of all time. It cemented Bob Marley's status as a cultural icon, and its themes of peace and resistance have influenced countless later musicians and social movements.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Marley（1945-1981）是牙买加雷鬼乐传奇，The Wailers的核心人物。他将牙买加民族音乐与全球流行文化结合，用歌声传递反抗与爱的信息。他是第三世界最知名的音乐符号之一，至今仍被尊为雷鬼乐之父。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley (1945-1981) was a Jamaican reggae legend and the core figure of The Wailers. He fused Jamaican folk music with global pop culture, delivering messages of resistance and love through his songs. He remains one of the most recognizable musical icons from the Third World and is revered as the father of reggae.

items.name: Let It Be
items.descriptionZh: 《Let It Be》是The Beatles于1970年发行的最后一张录音室专辑（实际录制早于《Abbey Road》）。风格回归早期摇滚与福音根源，核心特色在于其质朴、未加过多修饰的制作，以及成员间即将解散前的复杂情感投射。同名主打歌与《Across the Universe》等作品成为不朽经典。
items.descriptionEn: 'Let It Be' is The Beatles' final studio album, released in 1970 (though recorded before 'Abbey Road'). The style marks a return to early rock and gospel roots, with its core feature being the raw, minimally polished production and the complex emotional projection of the band on the verge of breakup. The title track and 'Across the Universe' have become timeless classics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满紧张气氛，成员间矛盾激化。有趣的是，录制时他们邀请了键盘手Billy Preston加入，他的演奏缓和了部分冲突。最初由Phil Spector混音，他添加的管弦乐引发争议，后来Paul McCartney发行了无管弦乐版《Let It Be... Naked》以还原初衷。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was fraught with tension, as conflicts among the members escalated. Interestingly, they invited keyboardist Billy Preston to join the sessions, and his playing helped ease some tensions. The initial mix by Phil Spector, with his added orchestration, sparked controversy, leading Paul McCartney to later release 'Let It Be... Naked' to restore the original vision.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为The Beatles的绝唱，这张专辑标志着一个时代的结束。它影响了后来无数乐队如何面对解散与告别。同名电影与歌曲成为流行文化中关于‘放手’的永恒隐喻。
items.historicalImpactEn: As The Beatles' swan song, this album marked the end of an era. It influenced countless later bands on how to face breakups and farewells. The eponymous film and song have become enduring metaphors for 'letting go' in popular culture.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beatles于1960年在英国利物浦成立，是史上最伟大、最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。成员包括John Lennon、Paul McCartney、George Harrison和Ringo Starr。他们在60年代引领了音乐与文化革命，其创新性至今影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were formed in Liverpool, England in 1960, and are one of the greatest and most influential rock bands in history. Members included John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. They led a musical and cultural revolution in the 1960s, and their innovations remain profoundly influential.

items.name: Stadium Arcadium
items.descriptionZh: 《Stadium Arcadium》是Red Hot Chili Peppers于2006年发行的双碟专辑，���格融合了另类摇滚、放克与迷幻元素。核心特色在于其宏大的篇幅与丰富的编曲，从硬朗的放克摇滚到柔美的抒情曲，展现了乐队极高的创作成熟度。单曲《Dani California》成为全球热门。
items.descriptionEn: 'Stadium Arcadium' is a double album released by Red Hot Chili Peppers in 2006, blending alternative rock, funk, and psychedelic elements. Its core feature lies in its grand scale and rich arrangements, ranging from hard-hitting funk rock to tender ballads, showcasing the band's high level of creative maturity. The single 'Dani California' became a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于乐队主唱Anthony Kiedis康复期间，他在戒毒后状态极佳。有趣的是，最初他们计划发行三张碟，但最终压缩为双碟。制作人Rick Rubin鼓励他们尝试更多样化的编曲，导致录音长达数月。吉他手John Frusciante贡献了大量迷幻风格的即兴段落。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during lead singer Anthony Kiedis's recovery period; he was in great shape after overcoming addiction. Interestingly, they initially planned a three-disc set but eventually compressed it to two. Producer Rick Rubin encouraged them to experiment with more diverse arrangements, leading to months of recording. Guitarist John Frusciante contributed a wealth of psychedelic-style improvisations.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Red Hot Chili Peppers商业与艺术巅峰的象征，获得多项格莱美奖。它证明了双碟专辑在数字时代仍能取得巨大成功，并巩固了乐队作为21世纪初另类摇滚领袖的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album represents the commercial and artistic peak of Red Hot Chili Peppers, winning multiple Grammy Awards. It proved that double albums could still achieve massive success in the digital age and cemented the band's status as leaders of alternative rock in the early 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers于1983年在美国洛杉矶成立，以融合放克、朋克和另类摇滚的独特风格著称。主唱Anthony Kiedis与贝斯手Flea是核心成员，他们的现场表演充满爆炸性能量。乐队在全球售出超过一亿张唱片，是90年代以来最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Red Hot Chili Peppers were formed in Los Angeles, USA in 1983, known for their unique fusion of funk, punk, and alternative rock. Lead singer Anthony Kiedis and bassist Flea are core members, and their live performances are explosive. The band has sold over 100 million records worldwide, making them one of the most successful rock bands since the 1990s.

items.descriptionZh: 《9》是Public Image Ltd.于1989年发行的专辑，风格从早期的后朋克转向更商业化的另类摇滚与流行元素。核心特色在于主唱John Lydon极具辨识度的嗓音与乐队紧凑的吉他旋律，专辑氛围阴暗而富有张力，歌词充满社会批判与个人反思。
items.descriptionEn: '9' is an album released by Public Image Ltd. in 1989, marking a shift from their early post-punk sound towards a more commercial alternative rock and pop style. Its core features are frontman John Lydon's highly distinctive voice and the band's tight guitar melodies. The album's atmosphere is dark and tense, with lyrics filled with social critique and personal reflection.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是John Lydon在经历性手枪时期后的又一次自我重塑。有趣的是，录制过程中乐队成员之间依然存在紧张关系，但Lydon坚持将个人经历融入创作。专辑中的歌曲《Disappointed》成为他们在英国的热门单曲，而《Warrior》则展现了更为内省的一面。
items.storiesEn: This album was another self-reinvention for John Lydon after his Sex Pistols days. Interestingly, tensions among band members persisted during recording, but Lydon insisted on weaving his personal experiences into the songwriting. The song 'Disappointed' became a hit single for them in the UK, while 'Warrior' showcased a more introspective side.
items.artistIntroZh: Public Image Ltd.（PiL）于1978年在英国伦敦成立，由前Sex Pistols主唱John Lydon创立。他们是后朋克运动的先驱，以实验性、政治化和反商业的音乐态度著称。乐队历经多次成员更迭，但Lydon始终是核心，其音乐影响了许多另类摇滚与工业乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Public Image Ltd. (PiL) was formed in London, UK in 1978 by former Sex Pistols frontman John Lydon. They are pioneers of the post-punk movement, known for their experimental, political, and anti-commercial musical attitude. The band has undergone numerous lineup changes, but Lydon has always remained the core, and their music has influenced many alternative rock and industrial bands.

items.name: Zaz
items.descriptionZh: 《Zaz》是法国歌手Zaz的首张录音室专辑，融合了法国香颂、爵士和民谣风格，以她沙哑而充满活力的嗓音著称。核心特色在于将传统巴黎街头音乐与现代流行元素结合，歌曲如《Je veux》传递自由与快乐，整体氛围温暖而富有感染力。
items.descriptionEn: "Zaz" is the debut studio album by French singer Zaz, blending French chanson, jazz, and folk styles, known for her raspy and energetic vocals. Its core feature lies in combining traditional Parisian street music with modern pop elements; songs like "Je veux" convey freedom and joy, creating a warm and infectious atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴黎的录音室，Zaz曾在街头表演多年，这张专辑的灵感直接来源于她的街头经历。制作人Kerredine Soltani鼓励她即兴演唱，许多歌曲的第一版录音被直接采用，以保留现场的真实感。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a Paris studio; Zaz had performed on the streets for years, and the album's inspiration came directly from her street experiences. Producer Kerredine Soltani encouraged her to improvise, and many first-take recordings were used directly to preserve the live authenticity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在全球售出超过300万张，使Zaz成为法国音乐出口的标志性人物，并推动了法语香颂在国际上的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 3 million copies worldwide, making Zaz an iconic figure in French music exports and reviving international interest in French chanson.
items.artistIntroZh: Zaz（本名伊莎贝尔·若弗鲁瓦）是法国创作歌手，出生于1980年。她以街头艺人起家，2010年凭借首张专辑一炮而红，嗓音独特，融合爵士与民谣元素，被誉为法国当代香颂的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Zaz (born Isabelle Geoffroy) is a French singer-songwriter, born in 1980. She started as a street performer and rose to fame with her debut album in 2010. Known for her unique voice blending jazz and folk, she is hailed as a representative of contemporary French chanson.

items.name: Acoustic Live
items.descriptionZh: 《Acoustic Live》是英国合成器流行二人组Erasure在2006年发行的现场专辑，以不插电形式重新演绎他们的经典歌曲。核心特色在于用原声吉他、钢琴和和声取代电子合成器，展现歌曲旋律与情感的本质，氛围亲密而温暖。
items.descriptionEn: "Acoustic Live" is a live album by British synth-pop duo Erasure, released in 2006, featuring unplugged reinterpretations of their classic songs. Its core feature lies in replacing synthesizers with acoustic guitars, piano, and harmonies, revealing the essence of melody and emotion, creating an intimate and warm atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于2005年的一次小型巡演，地点多为欧洲的剧院。主唱Andy Bell和键盘手Vince Clarke在演出中完全依赖原声乐器，甚至临时调整了多首歌曲的编曲，以应对不同场地的声学特性。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during a small tour in 2005, mostly in European theaters. Lead singer Andy Bell and keyboardist Vince Clarke relied entirely on acoustic instruments, even adjusting arrangements on the fly to suit the acoustics of different venues.
items.artistIntroZh: Erasure是英国合成器流行二人组，成立于1985年，由主唱Andy Bell和键盘手Vince Clarke组成。他们以动听的旋律和电子节拍著称，是80年代和90年代最成功的双人组合之一，全球销量超过2500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Erasure is a British synth-pop duo formed in 1985, consisting of lead singer Andy Bell and keyboardist Vince Clarke. Known for catchy melodies and electronic beats, they are one of the most successful duos of the 1980s and 1990s, with over 25 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix
items.descriptionZh: 《Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix》是Michael Jackson的混音专辑，于1997年发行，包含五首新歌和八首《HIStory》专辑歌曲的混音版本。核心特色在于将流行、摇滚与放克元素融入舞曲节拍，节奏强劲，充满戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: "Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix" is a remix album by Michael Jackson, released in 1997, containing five new songs and eight remixes of tracks from the "HIStory" album. Its core feature lies in blending pop, rock, and funk elements into dance beats, with strong rhythms and dramatic flair.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的同名主打歌《Blood on the Dance Floor》灵感来源于Jackson对好莱坞夜店文化的观察，歌词讲述了一段危险关系。录制时，他坚持使用现场乐手而非采样，以增强真实感。混音部分由多位知名制作人参与，包括Frankie Knuckles。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Blood on the Dance Floor" was inspired by Jackson's observations of Hollywood nightclub culture, telling a story of a dangerous relationship. During recording, he insisted on using live musicians rather than samples to enhance authenticity. The remixes involved several renowned producers, including Frankie Knuckles.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是全球最畅销的混音专辑之一，销量超过600万张，巩固了Michael Jackson作为流行天王的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the best-selling remix albums globally, with over 6 million copies sold, cementing Michael Jackson's status as the King of Pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者及流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步和突破性的音乐视频闻名，专辑《Thriller》至今仍是全球最畅销专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and pop culture icon, known as the King of Pop. Renowned for his unique voice, signature dance moves, and groundbreaking music videos, his album "Thriller" remains the best-selling album of all time.

items.name: Fear of the Dark
items.descriptionZh: 《Fear of the Dark》是英国重金属乐队Iron Maiden的第九张录音室专辑，于1992年发行。核心特色在于融合了前卫金属与硬摇滚元素，旋律性强，吉他独奏复杂，歌词探讨恐惧、死亡与超自然主题，氛围阴暗而史诗。
items.descriptionEn: "Fear of the Dark" is the ninth studio album by British heavy metal band Iron Maiden, released in 1992. Its core feature lies in blending progressive metal with hard rock elements, featuring strong melodies, complex guitar solos, and lyrics exploring fear, death, and the supernatural, creating a dark and epic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队经历了阵容变动——吉他手Janick Gers取代了Adrian Smith。主唱Bruce Dickinson曾抱怨制作过程仓促，但专辑同名曲《Fear of the Dark》的现场版本后来成为乐队最受欢迎的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band underwent a lineup change—guitarist Janick Gers replaced Adrian Smith. Lead singer Bruce Dickinson complained about the rushed production, but the live version of the title track "Fear of the Dark" later became one of the band's most beloved songs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑获得了商业成功，在英国专辑榜排名第一，并帮助Iron Maiden在90年代初期保持了重金属的领军地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved commercial success, reaching No. 1 on the UK Albums Chart, and helped Iron Maiden maintain their leading position in heavy metal during the early 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是英国重金属乐队，成立于1975年，是英式重金属新浪潮的代表乐队之一。他们以复杂的吉他编曲、史诗般的歌词和标志性的吉祥物Eddie闻名，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a British heavy metal band formed in 1975, one of the leading bands of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal. Known for complex guitar arrangements, epic lyrics, and their mascot Eddie, they have sold over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: Exile on Main St.
items.descriptionZh: 《Exile on Main St.》是The Rolling Stones的第十张录音室专辑，于1972年发行。核心特色在于将摇滚、布鲁斯、乡村和灵魂乐融合，声音粗粝而原始，歌词描绘堕落与救赎，氛围颓废而真实，被誉为摇滚史上的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Exile on Main St." is the tenth studio album by The Rolling Stones, released in 1972. Its core feature lies in blending rock, blues, country, and soul music, with a raw and gritty sound; lyrics depict decadence and redemption, creating a decadent yet authentic atmosphere, hailed as a milestone in rock history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分录制于法国南部的一个别墅地下室，乐队成员当时因税务问题流亡海外。录音环境潮湿简陋，设备经常故障，但反而催生了松散而富有生命力的声音。Mick Jagger的许多 vocals 是在别墅的走廊里录制的。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded in a villa basement in the south of France, as the band members were in tax exile overseas. The damp, makeshift recording environment with frequent equipment failures inadvertently produced a loose, vibrant sound. Many of Mick Jagger's vocals were recorded in the villa's hallway.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Exile on Main St.》被广泛认为是The Rolling Stones最伟大的专辑之一，也是摇滚乐史上最具影响力的双专辑，影响了无数后来的乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Exile on Main St." is widely regarded as one of The Rolling Stones' greatest albums and one of the most influential double albums in rock history, inspiring countless later bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones是英国摇滚乐队，成立于1962年，是摇滚史上最长寿和最成功的乐队之一。由Mick Jagger和Keith Richards领衔，他们以布鲁斯为基础的摇滚风格和叛逆形象定义了摇滚乐的精神。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are a British rock band formed in 1962, one of the longest-lasting and most successful bands in rock history. Led by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards, they defined the spirit of rock with their blues-based style and rebellious image.

items.name: Dancing Diva
items.descriptionZh: 《Dancing Diva》是蔡依林2006年发行的专辑，以强烈的舞曲风格和电子元素为核心，融合了流行、R&B和拉丁节奏。专辑展现了蔡依林从少女偶像向全能舞曲天后的转型，主打歌《舞娘》以华丽的编曲和异域风情成为华语乐坛标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Dancing Diva" is Jolin Tsai's 2006 album, defined by high-energy dance music and electronic elements, blending pop, R&B, and Latin rhythms. It marks her transformation from teen idol to all-around dance diva, with the title track "Dancing Diva" becoming a landmark in Mandopop for its lavish arrangement and exotic flair.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Dancing Diva》时，蔡依林为了呈现完美的舞蹈效果，每天练习超过10小时，甚至因高强度训练导致脚踝受伤。专辑同名主打歌的MV远赴布拉格取景，耗资近千万新台币，成为当时华语乐坛制作成本最高的MV之一。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Dancing Diva", Jolin Tsai practiced over 10 hours daily to perfect her dance moves, even injuring her ankle due to intense training. The music video for the title track was shot in Prague at a cost of nearly NT$10 million, making it one of the most expensive Mandopop MVs at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助蔡依林获得第18届金曲奖最佳国语女歌手奖，奠定了她在华语乐坛的天后地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won Jolin Tsai the Golden Melody Award for Best Female Mandarin Singer, solidifying her status as a diva in Mandopop.
items.artistIntroZh: 蔡依林（Jolin Tsai），1980年出生于台湾，华语流行天后。自1999年出道以来，她以不断进化的音乐风格和精湛的舞蹈实力著称，从少女偶像转型为全能艺人，多次获得金曲奖，被誉为“亚洲舞娘”。
items.artistIntroEn: Jolin Tsai (born 1980 in Taiwan) is a Mandopop diva. Since her debut in 1999, she has been known for her evolving musical style and exceptional dance skills, transitioning from teen idol to all-around entertainer, winning multiple Golden Melody Awards and earning the title "Asia's Dancing Diva".

items.name: Low-Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Low-Life》是New Order 1985年发行的专辑，融合了后朋克的冷峻与合成器流行、舞曲节拍。专辑以忧郁的歌词和明亮的电子音色形成对比，奠定了New Order在独立舞曲领域的开创性地位，被视为80年代��类摇滚的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Low-Life" is New Order's 1985 album, blending post-punk's austerity with synth-pop and dance beats. Its melancholic lyrics contrast with bright electronic textures, cementing the band's pioneering role in indie dance music and marking a milestone in 1980s alternative rock.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Low-Life》时，乐队在录音室尝试了当时最先进的采样器Fairlight CMI，但主唱Bernard Sumner一度因设备复杂而沮丧。专辑封面由设计师Peter Saville设计，灵感来自工厂工人的生活，但乐队成员曾开玩笑说封面上的陌生人让他们后悔没亲自出镜。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Low-Life", the band experimented with the cutting-edge Fairlight CMI sampler, but vocalist Bernard Sumner was initially frustrated by its complexity. The cover art by Peter Saville was inspired by factory workers' lives, though band members later joked they regretted not appearing themselves, leaving the stranger on the cover.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Low-Life》影响了后来的独立舞曲和电子摇滚乐队，如The Killers和LCD Soundsystem，并巩固了New Order作为后朋克与舞曲融合先驱的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Low-Life" influenced later indie-dance and electronic rock bands like The Killers and LCD Soundsystem, solidifying New Order's legacy as pioneers fusing post-punk with dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: New Order是英国摇滚乐队，1980年由Joy Division剩余成员组建。他们将后朋克的阴暗与合成器流行、舞曲结合，开创了独立舞曲风格。经典作品包括《Blue Monday》和《Bizarre Love Triangle》，对电子摇滚和另类音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: New Order is a British rock band formed in 1980 by surviving members of Joy Division. They fused post-punk's darkness with synth-pop and dance music, pioneering indie-dance. Classics include "Blue Monday" and "Bizarre Love Triangle", profoundly influencing electronic rock and alternative music.

items.name: Relics
items.descriptionZh: 《Relics》是Pink Floyd 1971年发行的精选集，收录了他们早期迷幻摇滚和实验作品，包括《Arnold Layne》和《See Emily Play》。专辑展现了乐队在Syd Barrett时期的迷幻色彩与后Barrett时代的前卫转向，是了解Pink Floyd早期音乐的重要入门。
items.descriptionEn: "Relics" is Pink Floyd's 1971 compilation, featuring early psychedelic and experimental works including "Arnold Layne" and "See Emily Play." It captures the band's psychedelic era under Syd Barrett and their transition toward progressive rock, serving as a key introduction to their early music.
items.storiesZh: 《Relics》的封面设计来自乐队鼓手Nick Mason的创意——一个布满灰尘的旧机械模型，象征着“遗物”主题。专辑原本是唱片公司为了填补合约空缺而发行，但乐队成员亲自参与了曲目选择，使其成为最受粉丝喜爱的精选集之一。
items.storiesEn: The cover art for "Relics" was inspired by drummer Nick Mason's idea of a dusty old mechanical model, symbolizing the "relics" theme. Originally released to fulfill a contract obligation, the band members personally selected the tracks, making it one of the most beloved compilations among fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd是英国前卫摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦。以哲学性歌词、概念专辑和恢弘的现场演出闻名，代表作《The Dark Side of the Moon》和《The Wall》成为摇滚史上不朽经典。早期主唱Syd Barrett的迷幻风格奠定了乐队的实验根基。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1965. Known for philosophical lyrics, concept albums, and grand live shows, their masterpieces "The Dark Side of the Moon" and "The Wall" are rock classics. Early frontman Syd Barrett's psychedelic style laid their experimental foundation.

items.name: Lateralus
items.descriptionZh: 《Lateralus》是Tool 2001年发行的专辑，融合了前卫金属、另类金属和艺术摇滚，以复杂的节奏结构、哲学歌词和灵性主题著称。专辑大量使用奇数拍和动态变化，被乐迷视为前卫金属的巅峰之作，展现了乐队在音乐深度和情感表达上的极致追求。
items.descriptionEn: "Lateralus" is Tool's 2001 album, blending progressive metal, alternative metal, and art rock, known for complex time signatures, philosophical lyrics, and spiritual themes. Its extensive use of odd meters and dynamic shifts is regarded by fans as a peak of progressive metal, showcasing the band's ultimate pursuit of musical depth and emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Lateralus》时，乐队采用了罕见的斐波那契数列结构来编排歌曲《Lateralus》的节奏和歌词音节。主唱Maynard James Keenan曾透露，乐队在录音室中花费大量时间冥想和即兴创作，以确保音乐的能量与灵性契合。专辑封面由艺术家Alex Grey创作，描绘了人体能量场与宇宙意识的结合。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Lateralus", the band used the Fibonacci sequence to structure the rhythm and syllable count of the title track. Vocalist Maynard James Keenan revealed they spent extensive time meditating and improvising in the studio to align the music's energy with spirituality. The cover art by Alex Grey depicts the human energy field merging with cosmic consciousness.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Lateralus》被广泛认为是前卫金属的里程碑，影响了无数后续乐队，如Mastodon和Deftones，并巩固了Tool作为当代艺术摇滚先锋的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Lateralus" is widely considered a milestone in progressive metal, influencing countless bands like Mastodon and Deftones, and cementing Tool's status as pioneers of contemporary art rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Tool是美国摇滚乐队，1990年成立于洛杉矶。以黑暗、复杂的音乐和哲学主题著称，融合前卫金属、另类金属和艺术摇滚。乐队成员包括主唱Maynard James Keenan和吉他手Adam Jones，他们的现场演出以多媒体视觉艺术闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Tool is an American rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1990. Known for dark, complex music and philosophical themes, they blend progressive metal, alternative metal, and art rock. Members include vocalist Maynard James Keenan and guitarist Adam Jones, renowned for multimedia visual art in live shows.

items.name: Lock Up the Wolves
items.descriptionZh: 《Lock Up the Wolves》是Dio 1990年发行的专辑，延续了主唱Ronnie James Dio标志性的力量金属风格，融合了史诗般的吉他独奏和奇幻歌词。专辑比前作更偏向传统重金属，展现了Dio在80年代末90年代初重金属转型期的坚持与创新。
items.descriptionEn: "Lock Up the Wolves" is Dio's 1990 album, continuing Ronnie James Dio's signature power metal style with epic guitar solos and fantasy lyrics. The album leans more toward traditional heavy metal than its predecessors, showcasing Dio's persistence and innovation during the heavy metal transition of the late '80s and early '90s.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Lock Up the Wolves》时，Dio招募了年仅16岁的吉他手Rowan Robertson，成为重金属史上最年轻的正式吉他手之一。Ronnie James Dio曾回忆说，Robertson的演奏技巧和成熟度让他震惊，专辑的吉他音色也因此更加犀利。此外，专辑的录制过程因乐队成员更替而几度中断。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Lock Up the Wolves", Dio recruited 16-year-old guitarist Rowan Robertson, making him one of the youngest official guitarists in heavy metal history. Ronnie James Dio recalled being stunned by Robertson's skill and maturity, resulting in sharper guitar tones. The recording process was also interrupted several times due to lineup changes.
items.artistIntroZh: Dio是美国重金属乐队，由传奇主唱Ronnie James Dio于1982年创立。他是重金属史上最具影响力的歌手之一，以强大的嗓音、恶魔角手势和奇幻歌词著称。乐队代表作包括《Holy Diver》和《Rainbow in the Dark》，对力量金属和传统重金属发展贡献巨大。
items.artistIntroEn: Dio is an American heavy metal band founded in 1982 by legendary vocalist Ronnie James Dio. One of the most influential singers in heavy metal history, he is known for his powerful voice, the devil horns gesture, and fantasy lyrics. Classics include "Holy Diver" and "Rainbow in the Dark", profoundly influencing power metal and traditional heavy metal.

items.name: 21st Century Breakdown
items.descriptionZh: 《21st Century Breakdown》是Green Day在2009年推出的摇滚歌剧式专辑，延续了前作《American Idiot》的政治批判风格，融合了朋克、流行与硬摇滚元素。专辑以一对情侣的视角展开，探讨战争、宗教、媒体操控等社会议题，旋律激昂且富有叙事性，展现了乐队成熟的创作野心。
items.descriptionEn: 21st Century Breakdown is a rock opera album by Green Day released in 2009, continuing the political critique of its predecessor American Idiot. Blending punk, pop, and hard rock, it follows a couple's perspective to explore war, religion, and media manipulation, with passionate melodies and narrative ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制历时三年，主唱Billie Joe Armstrong坦言创作过程压力巨大，甚至一度怀疑自己能否再写出好歌。制作人Butch Vig（曾制作Nirvana的《Nevermind》）加入后，乐队在好莱坞的录音室里尝试了更复杂的编曲，比如用钢琴和管弦乐增强戏剧性。有趣的是，专辑同名曲的demo最初被乐队成员嫌弃“太像音乐剧”。
items.storiesEn: The album took three years to record, with Billie Joe Armstrong admitting immense pressure and self-doubt about writing again. Producer Butch Vig (known for Nirvana's Nevermind) helped the band experiment with complex arrangements, including piano and orchestral elements. Interestingly, the title track's demo was initially dismissed by band members as 'too musical-like.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在全球售出超过400万张，并获得格莱美最佳摇滚专辑奖，巩固了Green Day作为21世纪朋克摇滚旗手的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 4 million copies worldwide and won a Grammy for Best Rock Album, cementing Green Day's status as punk rock icons of the 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: Green Day是美国朋克摇滚乐队，1987年成立于加州伯克利。由Billie Joe Armstrong（主唱/吉他）、Mike Dirnt（贝斯）和Tré Cool（鼓）组成。他们以旋律化的朋克风格和尖锐的社会评论闻名，代表作包括《Dookie》《American Idiot》等，全球销量超过7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Green Day is an American punk rock band formed in Berkeley, California in 1987, consisting of Billie Joe Armstrong, Mike Dirnt, and Tré Cool. Known for melodic punk and sharp social commentary, their hits include Dookie and American Idiot, with over 75 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Piece of Mind
items.descriptionZh: 《Piece of Mind》是Iron Maiden在1983年发行的第四张录音室专辑，标���着乐队经典阵容的成型。风格上，它融合了速度金属、前卫元素与史诗叙事，以双吉他旋律和Bruce Dickinson的高亢嗓音为特色。歌词涉及神话、文学和哲学，如反战主题的《The Trooper》。
items.descriptionEn: Piece of Mind is Iron Maiden's fourth studio album, released in 1983, cementing their classic lineup. It blends speed metal, progressive elements, and epic storytelling, featuring twin-guitar harmonies and Bruce Dickinson's soaring vocals. Lyrics draw from mythology, literature, and philosophy, as in the anti-war anthem The Trooper.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，鼓手Nicko McBrain在加入乐队仅两周后就参与了录制，他的鼓点即兴创作了《Where Eagles Dare》的经典前奏。主唱Bruce Dickinson在录音时突发奇想，在《Still Life》的结尾加入了一段诡异的笑声，后来被证实是他在录音室里用反向磁带效果搞的恶作剧。
items.storiesEn: During recording, drummer Nicko McBrain joined just two weeks prior and improvised the iconic intro to Where Eagles Dare. For Still Life, Bruce Dickinson added eerie laughter at the end as a prank using reverse tape effects, which became a permanent part of the track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国排行榜上位列第3，全球销量超过200万张，奠定了Iron Maiden在重金属历史上的不朽地位，尤其是《The Trooper》成为乐队现场必演曲目。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album reached No. 3 on the UK charts and sold over 2 million copies worldwide, solidifying Iron Maiden's legacy in heavy metal history, with The Trooper becoming a live staple.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是英国重金属乐队，1975年成立于伦敦。由贝斯手Steve Harris领衔，以复杂的编曲、吉祥物Eddie和Bruce Dickinson的戏剧性表演著称。他们是新浪潮英国重金属运动的代表，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a British heavy metal band formed in London in 1975, led by bassist Steve Harris. Known for complex compositions, mascot Eddie, and Bruce Dickinson's theatrical performances, they are pioneers of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal, with over 100 million records sold.

items.name: Pet Sounds
items.descriptionZh: 《Pet Sounds》是The Beach Boys在1966年发行的里程碑式专辑，以精密的和声编排、丰富的器乐层次和忧郁的歌词著称。它融合了流行、摇滚、古典和实验音效，被誉为“概念专辑”的先驱之一。Brian Wilson的创作将冲浪音乐转向了内心情感的深度探索。
items.descriptionEn: Pet Sounds is a landmark 1966 album by The Beach Boys, renowned for its intricate vocal harmonies, lush instrumentation, and melancholic lyrics. Blending pop, rock, classical, and experimental sounds, it is considered a precursor to the concept album, as Brian Wilson shifted the band from surf music to deep emotional introspection.
items.storiesZh: Brian Wilson为了这张专辑几乎独揽创作和制作，甚至聘请了顶级录音室乐手“The Wrecking Crew”。录制《God Only Knows》时，Capitol唱片公司担心歌名提到“God”会引发争议，但Wilson坚持保留。专辑中著名的狗哨声出现在《Pet Sounds》器乐版中，是Wilson突发奇想加入的。
items.storiesEn: Brian Wilson took near-total control of writing and production, hiring top session musicians 'The Wrecking Crew.' For God Only Knows, Capitol Records worried the title's mention of 'God' would cause controversy, but Wilson insisted. The famous dog whistle sound in the instrumental Pet Sounds was a spontaneous addition by Wilson.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Pet Sounds》被公认为流行音乐史上最伟大的专辑之一，深刻影响了The Beatles的《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》以及后世无数音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Pet Sounds is widely regarded as one of the greatest albums in pop music history, profoundly influencing The Beatles' Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band and countless subsequent artists.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beach Boys是美国摇滚乐队，1961年成立于加州霍桑。核心成员包括Brian Wilson、Mike Love等，以多声部和声和冲浪摇滚闻名。Brian Wilson的创作才华使乐队成为60年代流行音乐的重要力量，代表作有《Good Vibrations》等。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys are an American rock band formed in Hawthorne, California in 1961, with core members including Brian Wilson and Mike Love. Famous for multi-part harmonies and surf rock, Brian Wilson's genius made them a pivotal force in 1960s pop music, with hits like Good Vibrations.

items.name: Live at Leeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Live at Leeds》是The Who在1970年发行的现场专辑，收录了他们在利兹大学的震撼演出。风格上，它以纯粹的硬摇滚能量著称，融合了蓝调、迷幻和即兴演奏。专辑展现了乐队无与伦比的舞台爆发力，尤其是鼓手Keith Moon的狂野打击乐和吉他手Pete Townshend的风车式扫弦。
items.descriptionEn: Live at Leeds is a 1970 live album by The Who, capturing their explosive performance at Leeds University. Known for pure hard rock energy, it blends blues, psychedelia, and improvisation, showcasing the band's unmatched stage power, especially drummer Keith Moon's wild percussion and Pete Townshend's windmill strumming.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本计划收录更多曲目，但最终只保留了六首，以呈现最紧凑的体验。演出当晚，Keith Moon的鼓组多次移位，他不得不一边打鼓一边用手扶稳。Pete Townshend在《My Generation》中故意将吉他砸向音箱，制造了刺耳的反馈声，这个意外被保留在最终版本中。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally planned with more tracks but was trimmed to six for a tighter experience. During the show, Keith Moon's drum kit kept shifting, forcing him to play while stabilizing it. During My Generation, Pete Townshend deliberately smashed his guitar into the amp, creating a piercing feedback that was kept on the final release.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Live at Leeds》被许多评论家誉为史上最伟大的现场摇滚专辑之一，确立了现场录音的标杆，影响了后来的朋克和硬摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Live at Leeds is often hailed as one of the greatest live rock albums ever, setting a benchmark for live recordings and influencing later punk and hard rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who是英国摇滚乐队，1964年成立于伦敦。成员包括Roger Daltrey（主唱）、Pete Townshend（吉他）、John Entwistle（贝斯）和Keith Moon（鼓）。他们以破坏乐器的舞台行为、摇滚歌剧《Tommy》和经典歌曲《Baba O'Riley》闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who are a British rock band formed in London in 1964, consisting of Roger Daltrey, Pete Townshend, John Entwistle, and Keith Moon. Known for instrument-smashing stage antics, the rock opera Tommy, and classics like Baba O'Riley.

items.name: Mezmerize
items.descriptionZh: 《Mezmerize》是System of a Down在2005年发行的第四张录音室专辑，与其姊妹专辑《Hypnotize》同年推出。风格上，它融合了另类金属、民谣、歌剧和实验元素，以极端的动态变化、政治讽刺和古怪的节奏著称。歌词尖锐批判战争、消费主义和政府腐败。
items.descriptionEn: Mezmerize is System of a Down's fourth studio album, released in 2005 alongside its sister album Hypnotize. Blending alternative metal, folk, opera, and experimental elements, it features extreme dynamics, political satire, and eccentric rhythms. Lyrics sharply critique war, consumerism, and government corruption.
items.storiesZh: 乐队在录制前已经积累了大量的素材，最终决定分两张专辑发行。主唱Serj Tankian和吉他手Daron Malakian在创作中经常激烈争论，比如《BYOB》的副歌部分��两人对旋律走向意见不合，最后通过混合两种版本达成妥协。专辑封面由Daron的父亲绘制，灵感来自超现实主义绘画。
items.storiesEn: The band had amassed so much material that they decided to split it into two albums. Serj Tankian and Daron Malakian often clashed during writing; for BYOB's chorus, they disagreed on the melody until blending both versions. The album cover, painted by Daron's father, was inspired by surrealist art.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周在美国售出超过45万张，空降Billboard 200冠军，成为乐队商业上最成功的作品之一，并巩固了他们作为政治金属先锋的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, selling over 450,000 copies in its first week in the US, becoming one of the band's most commercially successful works and cementing their role as political metal pioneers.
items.artistIntroZh: System of a Down是美国另类金属乐队，1994年成立于加州洛杉矶。成员包括Serj Tankian（主唱/键盘）、Daron Malakian（吉他/主唱）、Shavo Odadjian（贝斯）和John Dolmayan（鼓）。他们以亚美尼亚裔背景和激进的政治立场闻名，代表作有《Toxicity》。
items.artistIntroEn: System of a Down is an American alternative metal band formed in Los Angeles in 1994, consisting of Serj Tankian, Daron Malakian, Shavo Odadjian, and John Dolmayan. Known for their Armenian heritage and radical political stance, their hits include Toxicity.

items.name: Yessongs
items.descriptionZh: 《Yessongs》是前卫摇滚乐队Yes于1973年发行的现场专辑，记录了他们在巅峰时期的震撼演出。专辑融合了复杂的器乐编排、悠长的史诗级曲目和成员高超的演奏技巧，展现了70年代前卫摇滚的极致魅力。其标志性的奇幻封面艺术与音乐中的科幻与哲学主题相得益彰，是Yes迷不可错过的经典。
items.descriptionEn: Yessongs is a live album by the progressive rock band Yes, released in 1973, capturing their peak-era performances. It features complex instrumental arrangements, epic-length compositions, and virtuosic musicianship, epitomizing the grandeur of 1970s prog rock. The iconic fantasy artwork complements the music's sci-fi and philosophical themes, making it an essential listen for Yes fans.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1972年底至1973年初的北美和欧洲巡演，乐队使用了当时最先进的36轨录音设备。由于现场演出时长常超过三个小时，最终专辑不得不压缩为三张黑胶唱片。有趣的是，键盘手Rick Wakeman在演出中经常穿着闪亮的斗篷，而鼓手Bill Bruford在录制《Roundabout》时即兴加入了标志性的鼓点，成为乐队最��名的片段之一。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during the 1972-1973 North American and European tours, the album utilized state-of-the-art 36-track recording equipment. Since live shows often exceeded three hours, the final release was compressed into a triple vinyl LP. Keyboardist Rick Wakeman often performed in a glittering cape, while drummer Bill Bruford improvised the iconic drum fill on 'Roundabout,' which became one of the band's most famous moments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Yessongs》被广泛认为是前卫摇滚最伟大的现场专辑之一，为后续现场专辑的制作树立了标杆，并巩固了Yes作为70年代最具创新性乐队的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Yessongs is widely regarded as one of the greatest live progressive rock albums ever, setting a benchmark for live album production and cementing Yes's status as one of the most innovative bands of the 1970s.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes于1968年在伦敦成立，是前卫摇滚的先驱之一。乐队以其复杂的音乐结构、古典音乐融合和科幻主题著称，成员包括Jon Anderson、Chris Squire、Steve Howe、Rick Wakeman和Alan White等传奇乐手。他们的作品如《Close to the Edge》和《Fragile》定义了前卫摇滚的黄金时代。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in London in 1968, Yes is a pioneering progressive rock band known for complex compositions, classical fusion, and sci-fi themes. Legendary members include Jon Anderson, Chris Squire, Steve Howe, Rick Wakeman, and Alan White. Albums like Close to the Edge and Fragile defined the golden age of prog rock.

items.descriptionZh: 《1930》是日本噪音音乐先锋Merzbow于1998年发行的专辑，以其极端刺耳、密集的电子噪音墙著称。专辑融合了失真、反馈、循环和大量电子效果，创造出令人窒息的听觉体验。标题“1930”暗示了经济大萧条时代的绝望感，音乐本身则是对传统听觉美学的彻底颠覆与挑战。
items.descriptionEn: 1930 is a 1998 album by Japanese noise pioneer Merzbow, known for its extreme, dense walls of electronic noise. It incorporates distortion, feedback, loops, and heavy electronic effects to create a suffocating auditory experience. The title '1930' evokes the despair of the Great Depression era, and the music itself is a radical challenge to conventional auditory aesthetics.
items.storiesZh: Merzbow（本名秋田昌美）在录制《1930》时，大量使用了自制的噪音电路和改装设备。专辑的灵感来源于他对20世纪30年代经济危机和社会动荡的反思。秋田曾表示，他希望用噪音模拟那个时代的“精神崩溃”。录制过程中，他经常连续工作十几个小时，通过不断叠加音层来构建极端的声场。
items.storiesEn: Merzbow (real name Masami Akita) relied heavily on homemade noise circuits and modified equipment while recording 1930. The album was inspired by his reflections on the economic crisis and social turmoil of the 1930s. Akita stated he wanted to simulate the 'mental breakdown' of that era through noise. During recording, he often worked for over ten hours straight, layering sounds to build extreme sonic textures.
items.historicalImpactZh: Merzbow的《1930》是噪音音乐领域的重要作品，进一步确立了日本噪音在国际实验音乐界的地位，影响了无数工业、电子和实验音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Merzbow's 1930 is a landmark work in noise music, solidifying Japanese noise's international status and influencing countless industrial, electronic, and experimental artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Merzbow（秋田昌美）是日本噪音音乐的代表人物，自1979年开始活跃。他以其极端、高音量、无调性的电子噪音作品闻名，使用大量自制设备和反馈回路。秋田也是一位动物权利活动家和作家，其作品常涉及反人类中心主义和社会批判主题。
items.artistIntroEn: Merzbow (Masami Akita) is the leading figure of Japanese noise music, active since 1979. He is famous for extreme, high-volume, atonal electronic noise using homemade devices and feedback loops. Akita is also an animal rights activist and writer, often incorporating anti-anthropocentrism and social critique into his work.

items.name: Back on My B.S.
items.descriptionZh: 《Back on My B.S.》是美国说唱歌手Busta Rhymes于2009年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格以硬核东海岸说唱为主，融合了雷鬼、放克和电子元素。专辑节奏强劲，Busta以其标志性的机关枪式快速说唱和戏剧化的嗓音贯穿始终，展现了他在嘻哈界不可替代的爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: Back on My B.S. is the eighth studio album by American rapper Busta Rhymes, released in 2009. It features hardcore East Coast hip-hop fused with reggae, funk, and electronic elements. With powerful beats and Busta's signature rapid-fire, machine-gun delivery and dramatic vocals, the album showcases his unmatched explosive energy in hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原定名为《Before Hell》，后因厂牌变动而改为《Back on My B.S.》。录制期间，Busta邀请了众多大牌合作，包括Lil Wayne、T.I.和Kanye West。有趣的是，与Kanye合作的《Arab Money》因其中一句歌词涉及文化争议，Busta不得不重新录制部分段落。此外��专辑中的《We Made It》原本是为已故歌手Michael Jackson创作的致敬曲。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled Before Hell, the album was renamed Back on My B.S. after label changes. During recording, Busta enlisted big-name collaborators including Lil Wayne, T.I., and Kanye West. Interestingly, the track 'Arab Money' with Kanye faced cultural controversy over a lyric, forcing Busta to re-record parts. Additionally, 'We Made It' was originally conceived as a tribute to the late Michael Jackson.
items.artistIntroZh: Busta Rhymes（原名Trevor Smith Jr.）生于1972年，是90年代崛起的美籍牙买加裔说唱歌手、演员。他以独特的快嘴说唱风格、夸张的舞台表现和标志性的非洲发型闻名。曾获格莱美提名，经典作品包括《Woo Hah!! Got You All in Check》和《Put Your Hands Where My Eyes Could See》。
items.artistIntroEn: Busta Rhymes (born Trevor Smith Jr., 1972) is a Jamaican-American rapper and actor who rose to prominence in the 1990s. He is known for his rapid-fire vocal style, flamboyant stage presence, and iconic African hairstyles. A Grammy nominee, his classic hits include 'Woo Hah!! Got You All in Check' and 'Put Your Hands Where My Eyes Could See.'

items.name: Natural Force
items.descriptionZh: 《Natural Force》是威尔士歌手Bonnie Tyler于1978年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚和力量民谣为主。专辑展现了Tyler标志性的沙哑、充满力量的嗓音，歌曲旋律动人，编曲华丽，融合了软摇滚和成人抒情元素。标题曲《Natural Force》以及《It's a Heartache》等歌曲奠定了她国际巨星的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Natural Force is the second studio album by Welsh singer Bonnie Tyler, released in 1978. It features pop rock and power ballads, showcasing Tyler's signature husky, powerful voice. The melodies are captivating, with lush arrangements blending soft rock and adult contemporary elements. Tracks like the title song and 'It's a Heartache' cemented her international stardom.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的《It's a Heartache》最初由Ronnie Scott和Steve Wolfe创作，但Tyler一开始并不太喜欢这首歌，认为它太简单。然而在制作人坚持下，她录制了这首歌，结果成为全球热门单曲，在多国排行榜夺冠。有趣的是，Tyler在录制《Natural Force》时因声带结节手术刚恢复，嗓音反而变得更加沙哑独特，这意外成为她最大的标志。
items.storiesEn: The album's hit 'It's a Heartache' was written by Ronnie Scott and Steve Wolfe. Tyler initially disliked the song, finding it too simple, but her producer insisted. She recorded it, and it became a global smash, topping charts in multiple countries. Interestingly, Tyler had recently undergone vocal cord surgery before recording Natural Force, which ironically made her voice even raspier and more distinctive—a signature that defined her career.
items.artistIntroZh: Bonnie Tyler（本名Gaynor Hopkins）生于1951年，威尔士歌手，以沙哑有力的嗓音著称。1977年凭借《Lost in France》出道，1978年《It's a Heartache》使其成为国际巨星。80年代她与Jim Steinman合作，推出了《Total Eclipse of the Heart》等经典之作，全球唱片销量超过一亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Bonnie Tyler (born Gaynor Hopkins, 1951) is a Welsh singer known for her distinctive husky voice. She debuted in 1977 with 'Lost in France' and became an international star in 1978 with 'It's a Heartache.' In the 1980s, she collaborated with Jim Steinman on classics like 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' selling over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: Poodle Hat
items.descriptionZh: 《Poodle Hat》是美国恶搞音乐人“怪人奥尔” Yankovic于2003年发行的第11张录音室专辑，延续了他一贯的滑稽模仿风格。专辑中既有对流行歌曲的恶搞改编（如将Eminem的《Lose Yourself》改为《Couch Potato》），也有原创喜剧歌曲。讽刺、机智和音乐多样性贯穿始终，展现了奥尔对流行文化的敏锐洞察。
items.descriptionEn: Poodle Hat is the 11th studio album by 'Weird Al' Yankovic, released in 2003, continuing his signature parody style. It features spoofs of popular songs (like turning Eminem's 'Lose Yourself' into 'Couch Potato') as well as original comedy songs. The album is filled with satire, wit, and musical diversity, showcasing Al's keen observations of pop culture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中最具争议的歌曲是《Couch Potato》，它对Eminem的《Lose Yourself》进行了恶搞。Eminem最初同意授权，但在专辑发行前反悔，迫使奥尔紧急重新录制歌词和音乐。有趣的是，奥尔后来在采访中表示，Eminem其实私下很喜欢这首歌，只是出于商业考虑才撤回授权。此外，专辑封面上的“贵宾犬帽子”是奥尔亲自设计的，灵感来自他在跳蚤市场看到的一顶奇怪帽子。
items.storiesEn: The most controversial track on the album was 'Couch Potato,' a parody of Eminem's 'Lose Yourself.' Eminem initially granted permission but withdrew it before release, forcing Al to hastily re-record new lyrics and music. Interestingly, Al later revealed Eminem privately liked the song but pulled the license for business reasons. The album's cover featuring a 'poodle hat' was designed by Al himself, inspired by a bizarre hat he found at a flea market.
items.artistIntroZh: “怪人奥尔” Yankovic（生于1959年）是美国音乐人、喜剧演员，以恶搞流行歌曲闻名。自1979年出道以来，他发行了超过12张录音室专辑，经典作品包括《Eat It》（恶搞Michael Jackson）和《White & Nerdy》（恶搞Chamillionaire）。他以其手风琴演奏、夸张的造型和幽默的歌词深受全球乐迷喜爱。
items.artistIntroEn: 'Weird Al' Yankovic (born 1959) is an American musician and comedian famous for parodying popular songs. Since his debut in 1979, he has released over 12 studio albums, with classics like 'Eat It' (parodying Michael Jackson) and 'White & Nerdy' (parodying Chamillionaire). Known for his accordion playing, flamboyant costumes, and witty lyrics, he is beloved by fans worldwide.

items.name: Fire
items.descriptionZh: 《Fire》是Electric Six在2003年发行的首张专辑，融合了迪斯科、摇滚和放克元素，风格夸张幽默。核心特色是其标志性的单曲《Danger! High Voltage》，以戏谑的歌词和复古的合成器音色，营造出一种狂欢派对般的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Fire is the debut album by Electric Six, released in 2003, blending disco, rock, and funk with an exaggerated, humorous style. Its core feature is the iconic single 'Danger! High Voltage,' with playful lyrics and retro synth sounds creating a party-like atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Fire》时，乐队主唱Dick Valentine曾因预算有限，在自家地下室录制了部分人声。单曲《Danger! High Voltage》的副歌部分邀请了Jack White客串和声，但White要求匿名，因此最初只标注为“The White”。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Fire, lead singer Dick Valentine recorded some vocals in his basement due to budget constraints. Jack White was invited to provide backing vocals on 'Danger! High Voltage' but requested anonymity, so he was initially credited only as 'The White.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑单曲《Danger! High Voltage》成为2000年代初期另类舞曲的经典，推动了迪斯科摇滚的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The single 'Danger! High Voltage' became a classic of early 2000s alternative dance music, fueling a disco-rock revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Electric Six是一支来自美国底特律的摇滚乐队，成立于1996年。以夸张的舞台表演和融合放克、迪斯科的摇滚风格著称，主唱Dick Valentine的戏谑歌词是其标志。
items.artistIntroEn: Electric Six is a rock band from Detroit, USA, formed in 1996. Known for theatrical performances and a fusion of funk, disco, and rock, with lead singer Dick Valentine's sardonic lyrics as a hallmark.

items.name: 3 Doors Down
items.descriptionZh: 《3 Doors Down》是同名乐队2008年发行的第四张录音室专辑，延续了其标志性的后垃圾摇滚风格，旋律流畅且充满情感。核心特色是硬朗的吉他 riff 与主唱Brad Arnold富有穿透力的嗓音，主题多围绕个人挣扎与希望。
items.descriptionEn: 3 Doors Down is the fourth studio album by the band of the same name, released in 2008. It continues their signature post-grunge style with smooth melodies and emotional depth, featuring hard-edged guitar riffs and lead singer Brad Arnold's piercing vocals, with themes of personal struggle and hope.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，吉他手Matt Roberts因健康问题缺席了部分���音，由其他成员临时顶替。主打歌《It's Not My Time》的歌词灵感来源于主唱Brad Arnold在一次车祸后的反思。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, guitarist Matt Roberts was absent for some sessions due to health issues, with other members filling in. The lead single 'It's Not My Time' was inspired by lead singer Brad Arnold's reflections after a car accident.
items.artistIntroZh: 3 Doors Down是一支美国摇滚乐队，1996年成立于密西西比州。以2000年的单曲《Kryptonite》一举成名，风格为后垃圾摇滚，歌词常探讨个人情感与社会问题。
items.artistIntroEn: 3 Doors Down is an American rock band formed in Mississippi in 1996. They rose to fame with the 2000 single 'Kryptonite,' playing post-grunge with lyrics often exploring personal emotions and social issues.

items.name: OK Computer
items.descriptionZh: 《OK Computer》是Radiohead于1997年发行的第三张专辑，彻底改变了另类摇滚的面貌。风格融合了艺术摇滚、电子实验和忧郁的旋律，核心特色是主唱Thom Yorke的假声与对现代异化、科技焦虑的深刻歌词。
items.descriptionEn: OK Computer is Radiohead's third album, released in 1997, which radically transformed alternative rock. It blends art rock, electronic experimentation, and melancholic melodies, with Thom Yorke's falsetto and lyrics about modern alienation and technological anxiety as its core.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分在英格兰巴斯附近的废弃豪宅中录制，乐队刻意营造与世隔绝的氛围。录制过程中，吉他手Jonny Greenwood常使用自制效果器，创造出独特的噪音音墙。歌曲《Paranoid Android》的复杂结构源于一次即兴 jam。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded in a dilapidated mansion near Bath, England, where the band sought isolation. Guitarist Jonny Greenwood often used homemade effects pedals to create unique noise walls. The complex structure of 'Paranoid Android' originated from a jam session.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《OK Computer》被誉为1990年代最伟大的专辑之一，深刻影响了后来的独立摇滚和电子乐发展，定义了“焦虑的千禧年”音乐美学。
items.historicalImpactEn: OK Computer is hailed as one of the greatest albums of the 1990s, profoundly influencing indie rock and electronic music, defining the 'anxious millennium' musical aesthetic.
items.artistIntroZh: Radiohead是一支英国摇滚乐队，1985年成立于牛津郡。以实验精神和不断突破的音乐边界著称，从另类摇滚起步，后融入电子、古典等元素，是当代最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Radiohead is an English rock band formed in Oxfordshire in 1985. Known for their experimental spirit and constant musical evolution, they started with alternative rock and later incorporated electronic and classical elements, becoming one of the most influential bands of the era.

items.name: Down on the Upside
items.descriptionZh: 《Down on the Upside》是Soundgarden于1996年发行的第五张录音室专辑，也是他们解散前的最后一张作品。风格延续了垃圾摇滚的厚重感，但加入了更多迷幻和实验元素，核心特色是复杂的吉他编曲和Chris Cornell极具爆发力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: Down on the Upside is Soundgarden's fifth studio album, released in 1996, and their last before disbanding. It continues the heaviness of grunge but adds more psychedelic and experimental elements, with complex guitar arrangements and Chris Cornell's explosive vocals as its core.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队内部矛盾加剧，吉他手Kim Thayil和主唱Chris Cornell在音乐方向上产生分歧。专辑名《Down on the Upside》反映了这种混乱状态——当一切看似好转时，实则在下滑。歌曲《Blow Up the Outside World》的歌词灵感来源于Cornell对媒体过度关注的厌倦。
items.storiesEn: During recording, internal tensions grew, with guitarist Kim Thayil and vocalist Chris Cornell clashing over musical direction. The album title Down on the Upside reflects this turmoil—things seem to improve but are actually declining. 'Blow Up the Outside World' was inspired by Cornell's weariness of media scrutiny.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为垃圾摇滚时代的收官之作之一，该专辑展示了该流派向更复杂音乐方向的演变，对后垃圾摇滚乐队有重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the final statements of the grunge era, this album shows the genre's evolution toward greater complexity, influencing later post-grunge bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Soundgarden是一支美国摇滚乐队，1984年成立于西雅图，是垃圾摇滚运动的先驱之一。以重型吉他 riff 和Chris Cornell的高亢嗓音闻名，1997年解散后于2010年重组。
items.artistIntroEn: Soundgarden is an American rock band formed in Seattle in 1984, a pioneer of the grunge movement. Known for heavy guitar riffs and Chris Cornell's soaring vocals, they disbanded in 1997 and reunited in 2010.

items.name: Keystudio
items.descriptionZh: 《Keystudio》是Yes于2001年发行的精选集，收录了1970年代经典阵容时期未收录于原版专辑的录音室作��。风格为前卫摇滚，核心特色是长达数分钟的精巧器乐段落、复杂的和声与Jon Anderson空灵的高音。
items.descriptionEn: Keystudio is a compilation album by Yes, released in 2001, featuring studio recordings from their classic 1970s lineup that were not included on original albums. It is progressive rock at its core, with intricate instrumental passages, complex harmonies, and Jon Anderson's ethereal high vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的素材主要来自《Tales from Topographic Oceans》和《Relayer》时期的录制 session，许多曲目因时长过长或风格过于实验被原专辑舍弃。2001年，乐队成员重新混音并拼接这些片段，形成了这张“新”专辑。
items.storiesEn: The material mainly comes from recording sessions during the Tales from Topographic Oceans and Relayer eras; many tracks were omitted from original albums due to excessive length or experimental nature. In 2001, band members remixed and assembled these fragments to create this 'new' album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让新一代听众得以一窥Yes黄金时期最具实验性的创作，巩固了其前卫摇滚先驱的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album allowed a new generation of listeners to glimpse Yes's most experimental work from their golden era, solidifying their status as progressive rock pioneers.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是一支英国前卫摇滚乐队，1968年成立于伦敦。以复杂的编曲、长篇曲目和奇幻主题著称，是前卫摇滚运动的标志性乐队之一，历经多次成员变动仍持续创作。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes is an English progressive rock band formed in London in 1968. Known for complex arrangements, long-form compositions, and fantastical themes, they are iconic in the progressive rock movement, continuing to create through numerous lineup changes.

items.name: The Miracle
items.descriptionZh: 《The Miracle》是皇后乐队在1989年发行的第13张录音室专辑，风格融合了硬摇滚、流行摇滚和前卫摇滚。核心特色在于乐队成员共同创作所有歌曲，展现了前所未有的集体协作精神，旋律华丽且充满乐观主义，尽管主唱弗雷迪·默丘里当时已身患重病。
items.descriptionEn: The Miracle is Queen's 13th studio album released in 1989, blending hard rock, pop rock, and progressive rock. Its core feature is that all songs were co-credited to the entire band, showcasing unprecedented collective collaboration, with grandiose melodies and optimism despite Freddie Mercury's serious illness.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，弗雷迪·默丘里坚持将专辑命名为《The Miracle》，因为他认为乐队能继续创作音乐本身就是奇迹。专辑中的《I Want It All》原本由吉他手布莱恩·梅创作，但最终以Queen名义发行。由于默丘里的健康恶化，乐队减少了巡演，把更多精力放在录音室制作上。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Freddie Mercury insisted on naming the album The Miracle, believing it was a miracle that the band could still create music. The track 'I Want It All' was originally written by guitarist Brian May but was credited to Queen. Due to Mercury's declining health, the band reduced touring and focused more on studio production.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是弗雷迪·默丘里去世前最后几张完整专辑之一，标志着皇后乐队从80年代风格回归到早期集体创作模式，对90年代英伦摇滚的集体主义精神有间接影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This is one of the last complete albums before Freddie Mercury's death, marking Queen's return to early collective songwriting and indirectly influencing the collectivist spirit of 90s Britpop.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队是1970年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由主唱弗雷迪·默丘里、吉他手布莱恩·梅、鼓手罗杰·泰勒和贝斯手约翰·迪肯组成。他们以华丽舞台表演、复杂和声与融合多种摇滚风格而闻名，代表作包括《Bohemian Rhapsody》和《We Will Rock You》。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), Roger Taylor (drums), and John Deacon (bass). Known for their flamboyant stage performances, complex harmonies, and genre-blending rock, their hits include 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'We Will Rock You'.

items.name: The Marshall Mathers LP
items.descriptionZh: 《The Marshall Mathers LP》是埃米纳姆于2000年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以硬核嘻哈为主，融合了恐怖核和心理叙事。核心特色在于其极端的歌词内容，充满了暴力、讽刺和自我反省，同时展现了埃米纳姆高超的押韵技巧和叙事能力，成为商业与评论双赢的杰作。
items.descriptionEn: The Marshall Mathers LP is Eminem's third studio album released in 2000, primarily hardcore hip-hop with horrorcore and psychological narrative elements. Its core feature is the extreme lyrical content filled with violence, satire, and self-reflection, showcasing Eminem's masterful rhyming and storytelling, achieving both commercial and critical success.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，埃米纳姆因母亲和妻子的法律纠纷而情绪波动，许多歌曲如《The Real Slim Shady》和《Stan》都是在愤怒和焦虑中写就。制作人Dr. Dre回忆说，埃米纳姆经常在录音室里一口气录完整首歌，几乎不需要后期修正。专辑原定名《Amityville》，后改为现名。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Eminem was emotionally volatile due to legal disputes with his mother and wife; many songs like 'The Real Slim Shady' and 'Stan' were written in anger and anxiety. Producer Dr. Dre recalled that Eminem often recorded entire songs in one take with little need for correction. The album was originally titled 'Amityville' before being changed.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是21世纪初最具影响力的嘻哈专辑之一，将说唱音乐推向主流巅峰，并引发了关于言论自由和暴力歌词的广泛社会讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered one of the most influential hip-hop albums of the early 2000s, pushing rap music to mainstream peak and sparking widespread societal debate on free speech and violent lyrics.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃米纳姆（Eminem），本名马歇尔·马瑟斯，1972年出生于美国密苏里州，是历史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一。他以快节奏、复杂的歌词和充满争议的主题著称，代表作包括《Lose Yourself》和《Love the Way You Lie》，曾获15项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem, born Marshall Mathers in 1972 in Missouri, USA, is one of the best-selling rappers in history. Known for his fast-paced, complex lyrics and controversial themes, his hits include 'Lose Yourself' and 'Love the Way You Lie', winning 15 Grammy Awards.

items.name: Tommy
items.descriptionZh: 《Tommy》是The Who于1969年发行的双概念专辑，风格融合了摇滚、迷幻和古典元素。核心特色在于它是一部完整的摇滚歌剧，讲述了一个聋哑盲男孩汤姆·沃克通过弹珠台成为精神领袖的故事，音乐编排宏大，叙事性强，开创了概念专辑的先河。
items.descriptionEn: Tommy is The Who's 1969 double concept album, blending rock, psychedelia, and classical elements. Its core feature is that it is a complete rock opera telling the story of a deaf, dumb, and blind boy Tommy Walker who becomes a spiritual leader through pinball, with grand musical arrangements and strong narrative, pioneering the concept album format.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的创作灵感来自乐队吉他手皮特·汤森德的印度精神导师梅赫·巴巴。录制过程中，乐队使用了当时创新的合成器技术和多轨录音，尤其是《Pinball Wizard》一曲成为经典。专辑发行后，乐队在1969年伍德斯托克音乐节上表演了《Tommy》全本，获得巨大反响。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by guitarist Pete Townshend's Indian spiritual teacher Meher Baba. During recording, the band used innovative synthesizer technology and multi-track recording; 'Pinball Wizard' became a classic. After release, The Who performed the full Tommy at the 1969 Woodstock festival to huge acclaim.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tommy》被公认为第一张成功的摇滚歌剧专辑，彻底改变了流行音乐叙事方式，影响了后来的《Jesus Christ Superstar》和《The Wall》等作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: Tommy is widely recognized as the first successful rock opera album, fundamentally changing narrative in popular music and influencing later works like 'Jesus Christ Superstar' and 'The Wall'.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who是1964年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由主唱罗杰·达特里、吉他手皮特·汤森德、贝斯手约翰·恩特维斯托和鼓手基思·穆恩组成。他们以狂暴的现场表演、破坏乐器的传统和硬朗的摇滚风格著称，代表作包括《My Generation》和《Baba O'Riley》。
