items.artistIntroEn: The Who is an English rock band formed in London in 1964, comprising Roger Daltrey (vocals), Pete Townshend (guitar), John Entwistle (bass), and Keith Moon (drums). Known for their explosive live performances, instrument-smashing tradition, and hard-driving rock, their hits include 'My Generation' and 'Baba O'Riley'.

items.name: the construKction of light
items.descriptionZh: 《the construKction of light》是King Crimson于2000年发行的第11张录音室专辑，风格以前卫摇滚和实验摇滚为主，融合了金属、自由爵士和���子元素。核心特色在于其复杂的复合节奏、密集的吉他音墙和哲学性的歌词，展现了乐队在世纪之交对音乐结构的激进探索。
items.descriptionEn: The construKction of light is King Crimson's 11th studio album released in 2000, primarily progressive and experimental rock, blending metal, free jazz, and electronic elements. Its core feature is complex polyrhythms, dense guitar walls, and philosophical lyrics, showcasing the band's radical exploration of musical structure at the turn of the century.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是King Crimson在90年代末重组后的第二张作品，录制时采用了双鼓手配置（帕特·马斯特洛托和加文·哈里森），创造了极具冲击力的节奏层。吉他手罗伯特·弗里普使用了大量数字效果器，试图模拟“建筑般的”声音结构。专辑标题源自弗里普对现代社会中“解构”与“重构”的思考。
items.storiesEn: This album is King Crimson's second release after their late-90s reformation, featuring a dual-drummer lineup (Pat Mastelotto and Gavin Harrison) creating powerful rhythmic layers. Guitarist Robert Fripp used extensive digital effects to simulate 'architectural' sound structures. The title stems from Fripp's reflections on 'deconstruction' and 'reconstruction' in modern society.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为前卫摇滚在21世纪初的重要复兴之作，影响了后来Djent和数学摇滚等子流派的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a significant revival of progressive rock in the early 21st century, influencing later subgenres like djent and math rock.
items.artistIntroZh: King Crimson是1968年成立于伦敦的英国前卫摇滚乐队，由吉他手罗伯特·弗里普创立并长期领导。他们是前卫摇滚的先驱之一，以复杂的编曲、即兴演奏和多变的阵容著称，代表作包括《21st Century Schizoid Man》和《In the Court of the Crimson King》。
items.artistIntroEn: King Crimson is an English progressive rock band formed in London in 1968, founded and long led by guitarist Robert Fripp. They are pioneers of progressive rock, known for complex arrangements, improvisation, and ever-changing lineups; their landmark works include '21st Century Schizoid Man' and 'In the Court of the Crimson King'.

items.descriptionZh: 《11:11》是玛丽亚·泰勒于2005年发行的第二张个人专辑，风格以独立民谣和梦幻流行为主，融合了轻柔的电子节拍和原声吉他。核心特色在于其温暖而略带忧郁的嗓音，歌词充满诗意，探讨时间、记忆与情感，营造出宁静而内省的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: 11:11 is Maria Taylor's second solo album released in 2005, primarily indie folk and dream pop, blending gentle electronic beats with acoustic guitar. Its core feature is her warm, slightly melancholic vocals and poetic lyrics exploring time, memory, and emotion, creating a serene and introspective atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于泰勒在阿拉巴马州伯明翰的家中，大部分乐器由她亲自演奏，包括吉他、钢琴和鼓。专辑名《11:11》源于泰勒对数字11的迷恋，她常看到时钟显示11:11，认为这是一个许愿或自我反省的时刻。主打歌《Song Beneath the Song》是在一次失眠后写成的。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in Taylor's home in Birmingham, Alabama, with her playing most instruments including guitar, piano, and drums. The title 11:11 stems from her fascination with the number 11; she often saw clocks showing 11:11 and saw it as a moment for wishing or self-reflection. The lead track 'Song Beneath the Song' was written after a sleepless night.
items.artistIntroZh: 玛丽亚·泰勒（Maria Taylor）1980年出生于美国阿拉巴马州，是独立摇滚乐队Azure Ray的成员之一。她以��人身份发行了多张专辑，风格融合了民谣、电子和流行，代表作包括《11:11》和《Lynn Teeter Flower》。她的音乐以细腻的情感和简约的编曲著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Maria Taylor, born in 1980 in Alabama, USA, is a member of the indie rock duo Azure Ray. She has released several solo albums blending folk, electronic, and pop, including '11:11' and 'Lynn Teeter Flower'. Her music is known for delicate emotion and minimalist arrangements.

items.name: Material defectuoso
items.descriptionZh: 《Material defectuoso》是西班牙硬摇滚乐队Extremoduro的第九张录音室专辑，风格融合了硬摇滚、前卫摇滚和西班牙本土摇滚元素。这张专辑以复杂的编曲、诗意的歌词和强烈的情感表达为核心特色，展现了乐队在音乐上的成熟与突破。
items.descriptionEn: "Material defectuoso" is the ninth studio album by Spanish hard rock band Extremoduro, blending hard rock, progressive rock, and Spanish rock elements. It features intricate arrangements, poetic lyrics, and intense emotional expression, showcasing the band's maturity and breakthrough.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，主唱Robe Iniesta曾因健康问题一度中断工作，但最终克服困难完成创作。部分歌曲的灵感来自他个人生活中的挫折与反思，使得整张专辑更具自传色彩。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead singer Robe Iniesta paused work due to health issues but eventually overcame them to complete the album. Some songs were inspired by his personal setbacks and reflections, giving the album an autobiographical touch.
items.artistIntroZh: Extremoduro成立于1987年，是西班牙最具影响力的硬摇滚乐队之一。以其独特的音乐风格和富有诗意的歌词著称，主唱Robe Iniesta是乐队的灵魂人物，作品常探讨社会与个人主题。
items.artistIntroEn: Extremoduro, formed in 1987, is one of Spain's most influential hard rock bands. Known for their unique style and poetic lyrics, lead singer Robe Iniesta is the band's core, often exploring social and personal themes.

items.name: Klassiska mästerverk
items.descriptionZh: 《Klassiska mästerverk》是瑞典摇滚歌手Magnus Uggla的精选集，收录了他1970年代末至2000年代初的经典作品。风格以流行摇滚和华丽摇滚为主，歌词幽默讽刺，旋律朗朗上口，充满瑞典特色。
items.descriptionEn: "Klassiska mästerverk" is a compilation by Swedish rock singer Magnus Uggla, featuring his classics from the late 1970s to early 2000s. The style is pop rock and glam rock, with humorous and satirical lyrics and catchy melodies, full of Swedish character.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集原本是为纪念Uggla出道25周年而策划，但他在选曲过程中坚持加入一些冷门歌曲，以展示自己音乐生涯的多样性。录制时还重新编排了部分老歌，赋予它们新的生命力。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned to celebrate Uggla's 25th anniversary in music, he insisted on including some lesser-known songs to showcase his career diversity. Some old tracks were rearranged during recording, giving them new life.
items.artistIntroZh: Magnus Uggla生于1954年，是瑞典著名的摇滚歌手和词曲作者。自1970年代出道以来，他以夸张的舞台风格和尖锐的社会讽刺歌词闻名，被誉为瑞典流行摇滚的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Magnus Uggla, born in 1954, is a famous Swedish rock singer and songwriter. Since his debut in the 1970s, he is known for his flamboyant stage style and sharp social satire, hailed as an iconic figure in Swedish pop rock.

items.descriptionZh: 《13》是德国朋克摇滚乐队Die Ärzte的第六张录音室专辑，风格以朋克摇滚为主，融合了流行朋克和另类摇滚元素。专辑以直白的歌词、快速的节奏和幽默的反叛精神著称，是乐队商业上最成功的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: "13" is the sixth studio album by German punk rock band Die Ärzte, primarily punk rock with elements of pop punk and alternative rock. Known for its straightforward lyrics, fast tempo, and humorous rebellious spirit, it's one of the band's most commercially successful works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《13》源自录制过程中乐队遇到的13个技术故障，成员���认为这既是诅咒也是幸运。录制期间，鼓手Bela B曾因即兴演奏一段节奏而被收录进最终版本，成为专辑的隐藏彩蛋。
items.storiesEn: The album title "13" comes from 13 technical glitches during recording, which the band saw as both a curse and a blessing. Drummer Bela B's impromptu drum groove was included in the final version as a hidden Easter egg.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《13》在德国专辑榜上取得冠军，巩固了Die Ärzte作为德国朋克摇滚领军人物的地位，影响了后续德国朋克乐队的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "13" topped the German album charts, solidifying Die Ärzte's status as pioneers of German punk rock and influencing later German punk bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Die Ärzte成立于1982年，是德国最成功的朋克摇滚乐队之一。以幽默、讽刺的歌词和充满活力的现场表演著称，成员包括主唱兼吉他手Farin Urlaub、贝斯手Rodrigo González和鼓手Bela B。
items.artistIntroEn: Die Ärzte, formed in 1982, is one of Germany's most successful punk rock bands. Known for humorous, satirical lyrics and energetic live shows, members include singer/guitarist Farin Urlaub, bassist Rodrigo González, and drummer Bela B.

items.name: A New Kind of Army
items.descriptionZh: 《A New Kind of Army》是美国朋克乐队Anti-Flag的第二张录音室专辑，风格以硬核朋克和政治朋克为主。专辑以激进的吉他、愤怒的呐喊和鲜明的反战、反种族主义主题为核心特色，充满街头抗议精神。
items.descriptionEn: "A New Kind of Army" is the second studio album by American punk band Anti-Flag, featuring hardcore punk and political punk. It's characterized by aggressive guitars, furious vocals, and clear anti-war, anti-racism themes, full of street protest spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队因预算有限，在朋友的地下室完成了大部分录音。主唱Justin Sane曾回忆，录制期间他们经常被邻居投诉噪音，但这也让专辑保留了原始的粗糙感和真实感。
items.storiesEn: Due to a limited budget, the band recorded most of the album in a friend's basement. Lead singer Justin Sane recalled frequent noise complaints from neighbors, which helped preserve the album's raw and authentic feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为21世纪初美国政治朋克复兴的重要作品，激励了许多年轻听众参与社会运动，并影响了后来的政治朋克乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key work in the early 2000s American political punk revival, inspiring many young listeners to engage in social movements and influencing later political punk bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Anti-Flag成立于1988年，是美国著名的政治朋克乐队。以激进的政治立场和反战主题闻名，成员包括主唱Justin Sane、吉他手Chris Head等，他们的音乐始终关注社会正义。
items.artistIntroEn: Anti-Flag, formed in 1988, is a renowned American political punk band. Known for radical political stances and anti-war themes, members include lead singer Justin Sane and guitarist Chris Head, with music always focused on social justice.

items.name: Brilliant
items.descriptionZh: 《Brilliant》是英国合成器流行乐队Ultravox的第十一张录音室专辑，也是他们2010年重组后的首张作品。风格延续了乐队标志性的合成器流行和新浪潮，融合了电子摇滚元素，旋律优美且充满未来感。
items.descriptionEn: "Brilliant" is the eleventh studio album by British synth-pop band Ultravox, their first after reuniting in 2010. It continues the band's signature synth-pop and new wave style, blending electronic rock elements with beautiful melodies and a futuristic feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，乐队成员时隔多年重新在录音室合作，起初气氛有些生疏。但很快他们找回了默契，主唱Midge Ure透露，许多歌曲的灵感来自他们对现代科技社会的观察与反思。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members reunited in the studio after many years, initially feeling a bit awkward. But they quickly regained their chemistry; lead singer Midge Ure revealed that many songs were inspired by their observations and reflections on modern technological society.
items.artistIntroZh: Ultravox成立于1974年，是英国新浪潮和合成器流行运动的先驱乐队。以主唱Midge Ure和键盘手Billy Currie为核心，他们的音乐影响了众多电子流行乐队，代表作包括《Vienna》等经典歌曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Ultravox, formed in 1974, is a pioneering band in the British new wave and synth-pop movement. Centered around lead singer Midge Ure and keyboardist Billy Currie, their music has influenced many electronic pop bands, with classics like "Vienna."

items.name: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band
items.descriptionZh: 《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》是披头士在1967年推出的概念专辑，融合了迷幻摇滚、巴洛克流行和前卫音乐元素。专辑以虚构乐队表演为框架，通过华丽的编曲、实验性的录音技术和天马行空的歌词，打破了流行音乐的边界。其标志性的封面设计和主题连贯性，使整张专辑如同一场充满想象力的嘉年华。
items.descriptionEn: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band is a 1967 concept album by The Beatles, blending psychedelic rock, baroque pop, and avant-garde music. Framed as a performance by a fictional band, it breaks pop boundaries with lavish arrangements, experimental recording techniques, and whimsical lyrics. Its iconic cover art and thematic cohesion make the album a carnival of imagination.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，披头士成员和制作人乔治·马丁在艾比路录音室进行了大量创新尝试。例如，为了制造特殊音效，他们让管弦乐队穿着正式礼服却戴着滑稽的假鼻子演奏；保罗·麦卡特尼还坚持在《A Day in the Life》中加入一段只有狗能听到的高频音，最终因技术限制未能完全实现。专辑封面��蒙太奇照片由彼得·布莱克设计，花费了数周时间才完成。
items.storiesEn: During recording, The Beatles and producer George Martin made many innovative attempts at Abbey Road Studios. For example, they had an orchestra play in formal wear but with silly fake noses for a unique sound effect; Paul McCartney insisted on adding a high-frequency tone only dogs could hear in 'A Day in the Life,' but it was never fully realized due to technical limits. The album's photomontage cover by Peter Blake took weeks to complete.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是流行音乐史上最具影响力的作品之一，开创了概念专辑和录音室作为乐器的先河，并直接推动了迷幻摇滚和艺术摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most influential albums in pop music history, it pioneered the concept album and the use of the studio as an instrument, directly advancing psychedelic rock and art rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年成立于英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，由约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔组成。他们以创新的音乐风格、文化影响力和广泛的商业成功，成为史上最畅销和最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles, formed in Liverpool in 1960, consist of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Known for their innovative music, cultural impact, and massive commercial success, they are one of the best-selling and most influential bands in history.

items.name: The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: 《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》是鲍勃·迪伦1963年的第二张专辑，以原声民谣为基础，融合了抗议民谣、情歌和超现实主义叙事。迪伦用沙哑的嗓音和诗意的歌词，探讨了社会正义、核威胁和个人情感，展现了从传统民谣向个人化创作转型的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan is Bob Dylan's second album from 1963, rooted in acoustic folk and blending protest songs, love ballads, and surrealist narratives. With his raspy voice and poetic lyrics, Dylan tackles social justice, nuclear threats, and personal emotions, marking a milestone in his shift from traditional folk to personal songwriting.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，迪伦曾因不满意早期版本而重录了多首歌曲。最著名的故事是，他在录制《Blowin' in the Wind》时仅用了十分钟就写完了歌词，这首歌后来成为反战运动的圣歌。此外，专辑封面拍摄于格林威治村的一条雪街上，迪伦搂着当时的女友苏西·罗托洛，这张照片后来成为民谣时代的经典影像。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dylan re-recorded several songs because he was dissatisfied with early takes. The most famous story is that he wrote the lyrics to 'Blowin' in the Wind' in just ten minutes; it later became an anthem for the anti-war movement. The cover photo, taken on a snowy street in Greenwich Village, shows Dylan arm-in-arm with his then-girlfriend Suze Rotolo, and it became an iconic image of the folk era.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑确立了迪伦作为时代代言人的地位，其抗议歌曲如《Blowin' in the Wind》和《A Hard Rain's a-Gonna Fall》极大地影响了60年代的社会运动，并重新定义了民谣音乐的政治潜力。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Dylan as a voice of his generation, with protest songs like 'Blowin' in the Wind' and 'A Hard Rain's a-Gonna Fall' profoundly influencing 1960s social movements and redefining folk music's political potential.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·迪伦（Bob Dylan）是美国创作歌手、作家和艺术家，1941年生于明尼苏达州。自1960年代出道以来，他以深刻的歌词、独特的嗓音和不断创新的风格，成为民谣和摇滚史上最重要的人物之一，并于2016年获得诺贝尔文学奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer-songwriter, writer, and artist, born in Minnesota in 1941. Since his debut in the 1960s, he has become one of the most important figures in folk and rock history for his profound lyrics, distinctive voice, and constant innovation, winning the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016.

items.name: How the West Was Won
items.descriptionZh: 《How the West Was Won》是齐柏林飞艇2003年发行的现场专辑，收录了1972年洛杉矶和长滩两场演出的精选曲目。专辑展现了乐队巅峰时期的硬摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚风格，以长达20分钟的即兴演奏和震撼的舞台能量著称，是对他们现场统治力的终极记录。
items.descriptionEn: How the West Was Won is a 2003 live album by Led Zeppelin, featuring highlights from two 1972 shows in Los Angeles and Long Beach. It captures the band's peak hard rock and blues-rock style, known for 20-minute improvisations and electrifying stage energy, serving as the ultimate document of their live dominance.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的母带在录制后沉睡了三十多年，直到2000年代初才被重新发现。吉他手吉米·佩奇亲自监督了混音工作，他特别指出，1972年正是乐队现场最狂野的时期——在长滩的演出中，鼓手约翰·博纳姆的鼓槌甚至飞到了观众席，而佩奇用一把双头吉他演奏了《Stairway to Heaven》的经典独奏。
items.storiesEn: The master tapes lay dormant for over 30 years after recording, only rediscovered in the early 2000s. Guitarist Jimmy Page personally oversaw the mixing, noting that 1972 was the band's wildest live period—during the Long Beach show, drummer John Bonham's drumstick flew into the audience, and Page played the iconic 'Stairway to Heaven' solo on a double-neck guitar.
items.artistIntroZh: 齐柏林飞艇（Led Zeppelin）是1968年在英国伦敦成立的硬摇滚乐队，由吉米·佩奇、罗伯特·普兰特、约翰·保罗·琼斯和约翰·博纳姆组成。他们以强大的即兴演奏、布鲁斯根基和舞台表现力闻名，是史上最畅销的乐队之一，深刻影响了重金属和摇滚乐的发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin, formed in London in 1968, consists of Jimmy Page, Robert Plant, John Paul Jones, and John Bonham. Renowned for their powerful improvisation, blues roots, and stage presence, they are one of the best-selling bands in history, deeply influencing heavy metal and rock music.

items.name: The Eminem Show
items.descriptionZh: ���The Eminem Show》是埃米纳姆2002年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、流行和摇滚元素。专辑以激烈的个人叙事和社会评论为核心，探讨了成名、家庭矛盾、政治不满和种族问题。埃米纳姆的流畅说唱、尖锐的歌词和戏剧化的制作，使其成为千禧年初最具代表性的嘻哈专辑之一。
items.descriptionEn: The Eminem Show is Eminem's fourth studio album from 2002, blending hip-hop, pop, and rock. Centered on intense personal narrative and social commentary, it tackles fame, family conflicts, political discontent, and racial issues. Eminem's fluid rap, sharp lyrics, and dramatic production make it one of the most iconic hip-hop albums of the early 2000s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原定名为《The Marshall Mathers LP 2》，但埃米纳姆在最后时刻决定改为《The Eminem Show》，因为他觉得这个名字更能反映专辑的表演性。录制期间，他与制作人Dr. Dre发生了激烈争论，因为埃米纳姆坚持要加入更多个人化的内容，而非商业化的流行曲目。专辑中的《White America》因直接批评美国政府而引发争议，但埃米纳姆拒绝修改歌词。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally titled 'The Marshall Mathers LP 2,' but Eminem changed it to 'The Eminem Show' at the last minute, feeling the new name better reflected its performative nature. During recording, he had heated arguments with producer Dr. Dre, insisting on more personal content over commercial pop tracks. The song 'White America' sparked controversy for its direct criticism of the U.S. government, but Eminem refused to alter the lyrics.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了埃米纳姆作为白人嘻哈巨星的地位，同时因其对政治和家庭议题的直白讨论，推动了嘻哈音乐向更严肃的社会观察方向发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Eminem's status as a white hip-hop superstar, and its frank discussion of political and family issues pushed hip-hop toward more serious social observation.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃米纳姆（Eminem），本名马歇尔·马瑟斯，1972年生于美国密苏里州圣约瑟夫。他是史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一，以技术精湛的说唱、充满争议的歌词和戏剧化的表演风格闻名，曾获多项格莱美奖，并被视为改变了嘻哈文化的种族和地域壁垒。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem, born Marshall Mathers in St. Joseph, Missouri in 1972, is one of the best-selling rappers in history. Known for his technical rapping, controversial lyrics, and dramatic performance style, he has won multiple Grammy Awards and is credited with breaking racial and regional barriers in hip-hop culture.

items.name: Fevers and Mirrors
items.descriptionZh: 《Fevers and Mirrors》是Bright Eyes在2000年发行的第三张录音室专辑，以独立民谣和低保真摇滚为基底，充满了情绪化的脆弱感和戏剧性的编排。主唱康纳·奥伯斯特用颤抖的嗓音和自省的诗句，探讨了抑郁、自我厌恶和存在主义焦虑，专辑中穿插的旁白和实验音效增添了荒诞与不安的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Fevers and Mirrors is Bright Eyes' third studio album from 2000, rooted in indie folk and lo-fi rock, brimming with emotional vulnerability and dramatic arrangements. Frontman Conor Oberst delivers trembling vocals and introspective lyrics exploring depression, self-loathing, and existential angst, while interludes of spoken word and experimental sound effects add a surreal, uneasy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，康纳·奥伯斯特正处于严重的心理低谷期，他曾在录音室里崩溃大哭，但坚持不剪掉这些片段，最终将它们保留在成品中。专辑中有一首长达11分钟的实验性曲目《Arienette》，包含了打字机声、电话铃声和模糊的对话，据说是奥伯斯特在深夜独自一人时即兴录制的。封面上的男孩是奥伯���特的童年照片，他后来表示这张照片让他感到“不安和疏离”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Conor Oberst was in a deep psychological slump; he once broke down crying in the studio but insisted on keeping those moments in the final cut. The experimental 11-minute track 'Arienette' includes typewriter sounds, phone rings, and muffled conversations, reportedly improvised by Oberst alone late at night. The cover photo is Oberst as a child, which he later said made him feel 'uneasy and alienated.'
items.artistIntroZh: Bright Eyes是美国独立民谣乐队，1995年由康纳·奥伯斯特在奥马哈创立。乐队以奥伯斯特为核心，以其情感直白、歌词诗意的风格成为2000年代独立音乐界的重要代表，影响了后来的情绪民谣和独立摇滚场景。
items.artistIntroEn: Bright Eyes is an American indie folk band founded in Omaha in 1995 by Conor Oberst. Centered on Oberst's emotionally raw and poetic songwriting, the band became a key figure in the 2000s indie music scene, influencing later emo-folk and indie rock.

items.name: Brave New World
items.descriptionZh: 《Brave New World》是Iron Maiden在2000年发行的经典专辑，标志着主唱Bruce Dickinson和吉他手Adrian Smith回归后的首张作品。风格延续了乐队标志性的重金属与史诗叙事，融合复杂的吉他编曲、高亢的 vocals 和深邃的歌词主题，探讨反乌托邦、战争与人性。专辑音色更加现代化，同时保留了传统重金属的磅礴气势。
items.descriptionEn: Brave New World is a classic 2000 album by Iron Maiden, marking the return of vocalist Bruce Dickinson and guitarist Adrian Smith. It features the band's signature heavy metal and epic storytelling, blending intricate guitar work, soaring vocals, and deep lyrical themes of dystopia, war, and humanity. The sound is more modern while retaining traditional heavy metal grandeur.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队在法国南部的Studio Guillaume Tell进行，氛围极为融洽。Bruce Dickinson回归后，与团队重新磨合，创作过程充满激情。有趣的是，专辑同名曲《Brave New World》的灵感来自赫胥黎的小说，但歌词也融入了乐队对音乐产业变迁的反思。吉他手Janick Gers曾开玩笑说，录音时大家像“一群兴奋的孩子”。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Studio Guillaume Tell in southern France, with a very harmonious atmosphere. After Bruce Dickinson's return, the band re-synced creatively with great passion. Interestingly, the title track 'Brave New World' was inspired by Huxley's novel but also reflected the band's thoughts on music industry changes. Guitarist Janick Gers joked that recording felt like 'a bunch of excited kids.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Iron Maiden复兴的里程碑，证明了经典阵容的回归能带来商业与艺术的双重成功，影响了后续重金属乐队的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in Iron Maiden's revival, proving that the classic lineup could achieve both commercial and artistic success, influencing the direction of subsequent heavy metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是英国重金属传奇乐队，成立于1975年。以其标志性的吉祥物Eddie、复杂的吉他旋律和史诗般的歌词闻名，是全球最具影响力的金属乐队之一，销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a legendary British heavy metal band formed in 1975. Known for their mascot Eddie, intricate guitar melodies, and epic lyrics, they are one of the most influential metal bands globally, with over 100 million records sold.

items.name: Vinland Saga
items.descriptionZh: 《Vinland Saga》是德国交响金属乐队Leaves' Eyes在2005年发行的专辑，以北欧维京传说和探险为主题。风格融合了哥特金属、交响金属和民谣元素，女主唱Liv Kristine的清澈嗓音与重型吉他形成鲜明对比，营造出史诗般的海洋与战争氛围。专辑充满旋律性，极具画面感。
items.descriptionEn: Vinland Saga is a 2005 album by German symphonic metal band Leaves' Eyes, themed around Norse Viking legends and exploration. It blends gothic metal, symphonic metal, and folk elements, with Liv Kristine's clear vocals contrasting heavy guitars, creating an epic atmosphere of the sea and war. The album is melodic and highly visual.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感来源于北欧萨迦和莱夫·埃里克松发现文兰（北美）的故事。录制时，乐队在挪威的录音室中使用了大量传统乐器，如风笛和竖琴，以增强历史真实感。主唱Liv Kristine曾透露，她为了唱好古诺尔斯语歌词，特意学习了基础发音，甚至请来语言学家指导。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Norse sagas and Leif Erikson's discovery of Vinland (North America). During recording, the band used many traditional instruments like bagpipes and harps at a Norwegian studio to enhance historical authenticity. Vocalist Liv Kristine revealed she learned basic Old Norse pronunciation with a linguist's help to sing the lyrics.
items.artistIntroZh: Leaves' Eyes是一支德国/挪威交响金属乐队，成立于2003年，由主唱Liv Kristine（前Theatre of Tragedy成员）和Alexander Krull领衔。他们的音乐以维京和神话主题著称，风格大气而富有戏剧性。
items.artistIntroEn: Leaves' Eyes is a German/Norwegian symphonic metal band formed in 2003, led by vocalist Liv Kristine (ex-Theatre of Tragedy) and Alexander Krull. Their music is known for Viking and mythological themes, with a grand and dramatic style.

items.name: Speaking in Tongues
items.descriptionZh: 《Speaking in Tongues》是美国新浪潮乐队Talking Heads于1983年发行的第五张录音室专辑。风格融合了艺术摇滚、放克和世界音乐，节奏感强烈，旋律古怪而富有感染力。专辑中的合成器和打击乐层次丰富，歌词充满超现实主义色彩，展现了乐队对流行音乐的另类解构。
items.descriptionEn: Speaking in Tongues is the fifth studio album by American new wave band Talking Heads, released in 1983. It blends art rock, funk, and world music with strong rhythms and quirky, infectious melodies. The album features rich synthesizer and percussion layers, with surreal lyrics showcasing the band's alternative deconstruction of pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约的Blank Tape Studios，制作人由乐队长期合作者Brian Eno转为乐队自身，这给了他们更大的实验空间。有趣的是，主打歌《Burning Down the House》的灵感源自Parliament-Funkadelic的现场演出，主唱David Byrne在观看时即兴喊出了一句歌词。专辑封面由著名艺术家Robert Rauschenberg设计，采用透明拼贴画。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Blank Tape Studios in New York, with production shifting from long-time collaborator Brian Eno to the band themselves, giving them more experimental freedom. Interestingly, the hit 'Burning Down the House' was inspired by a Parliament-Funkadelic concert, where David Byrne improvised a lyric. The cover was designed by artist Robert Rauschenberg using transparent collage.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的《Burning Down the House》成为Talking Heads最畅销单曲之一，推动了新浪潮音乐进入主流视野，并影响了后来的另类摇滚和舞曲摇滚。
items.historicalImpactEn: The single 'Burning Down the House' became one of Talking Heads' biggest hits, pushing new wave into the mainstream and influencing later alternative rock and dance-rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Talking Heads是美国新浪潮乐队，1977年成立于纽约，核心成员包括David Byrne、Tina Weymouth等。他们以艺术摇滚、放克和世界音乐的融合著称，现场演出极具视觉冲击力，是80年代最具创新性的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Talking Heads is an American new wave band formed in New York in 1977, with core members including David Byrne and Tina Weymouth. Known for blending art rock, funk, and world music, their visually striking live performances made them one of the most innovative bands of the 1980s.

items.name: Historic Dead
items.descriptionZh: 《Historic Dead》是美国迷幻摇滚乐队Grateful Dead于1971年发行的现场专辑，收录了他们在1966年至1967年间的早期演出录音。风格以迷幻摇滚、蓝草和民谣融合为主，即兴演奏占据核心地位，展现了乐队早期在旧金山迷幻场景中的原始能量和实验精神。
items.descriptionEn: Historic Dead is a 1971 live album by American psychedelic rock band Grateful Dead, featuring recordings from 1966-1967. It blends psychedelic rock, bluegrass, and folk, with improvisation at its core, showcasing the band's raw energy and experimental spirit in the early San Francisco psychedelic scene.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音来源颇为曲折，大部分素材来自1966年旧金山“Acid Tests”和“The Human Be-In”等历史性活动的现场录音，由粉丝和业余录音师用简陋设备录制。乐队当时并未计划发行，直到1971年才将这些珍贵的历史音轨整理发布。录音质量虽粗糙，却真实捕捉了那个时代的氛围。
items.storiesEn: The album's recordings came from various sources, mostly from the 1966 'Acid Tests' and 'The Human Be-In' events in San Francisco, recorded by fans and amateur engineers with basic equipment. The band had no initial plan to release them, but compiled and released these historic tracks in 1971. Despite rough sound quality, it authentically captures the era's vibe.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Grateful Dead早期现场的珍贵记录，这张专辑对迷幻摇滚和即兴音乐文化的研究具有历史文献价值。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a precious document of Grateful Dead's early live performances, this album holds historical documentary value for the study of psychedelic rock and improvisational music culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Grateful Dead是美国传奇迷幻摇滚乐队，1965年成立于旧金山。他们以漫长的即兴演奏、多元的音乐风格和忠实的粉丝群体“Deadheads”闻名，是嬉皮士文化的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Grateful Dead is a legendary American psychedelic rock band formed in San Francisco in 1965. Known for extended improvisations, diverse musical styles, and their devoted fan base 'Deadheads,' they are icons of hippie culture.

items.name: 2nd Skin
items.descriptionZh: 《2nd Skin》是德国朋克摇滚乐队The Bates于2000年发行的专辑。风格融合了旋律朋克、流行朋克和另类摇滚，吉他 riff 简洁有力，节奏明快，歌词多关注青春、反叛和日常挣扎。专辑整体充满能量，同时带有一定的流行敏感度，易于入耳。
items.descriptionEn: 2nd Skin is a 2000 album by German punk rock band The Bates. It blends melodic punk, pop punk, and alternative rock, with punchy guitar riffs, fast tempos, and lyrics about youth, rebellion, and everyday struggles. The album is energetic yet has a pop sensibility, making it accessible.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队在德国汉堡的录音室中尝试了更精细的制作方式，与制作人合作打磨音色。有趣的是，专辑中的一首歌《It's Getting Dark》原本是主唱在巡演大巴上即兴哼唱的旋律，后来成为乐迷最爱。录音期间，乐队成员还因为对某个贝斯段落争执不下，最后通过猜拳决定。
items.storiesEn: During recording at a Hamburg studio, the band experimented with more refined production, collaborating with a producer to polish the sound. Interestingly, the song 'It's Getting Dark' started as a melody the vocalist hummed on the tour bus, later becoming a fan favorite. During sessions, band members argued over a bass part and finally decided it by rock-paper-scissors.
items.artistIntroZh: The Bates是一支德国朋克摇滚乐队，成立于1988年。他们以旋律化的朋克风格和现场活力著称，在德国及欧洲朋克圈拥有一定影响力，曾多次登上大型音乐节舞台。
items.artistIntroEn: The Bates is a German punk rock band formed in 1988. Known for their melodic punk style and energetic live shows, they have a notable presence in the German and European punk scene, having performed at major festivals.

items.descriptionZh: 《3》是Soulfly的第三张录音室专辑，融合了重金属、新金属与巴西部落元素。马克斯·卡瓦莱拉以狂暴的吉他Riff和嘶吼，搭配打击乐与民族旋律，营造出原始而侵略性的听觉体验。专辑主题围绕战争、精神与重生，展现了乐队在极端金属领域的独特地位。
items.descriptionEn: "3" is Soulfly's third studio album, blending heavy metal, nu-metal, and Brazilian tribal elements. Max Cavalera delivers狂暴 guitar riffs and growls, paired with percussion and ethnic melodies, creating a primal and aggressive sonic experience. Themes of war, spirituality, and rebirth define the album, showcasing the band's unique place in extreme metal.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于亚利桑那州，马克斯·卡瓦莱拉在创作中深受巴西雨林和部落仪式影响，甚至邀请当地土著音乐人参与打击乐部分。录音期间，乐队经历了成员更替，但马克斯坚持用更原始的录音方式，在棚内搭建临时篝火场景以捕捉真实氛围。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Arizona, Max Cavalera drew heavy inspiration from the Brazilian rainforest and tribal rituals, even inviting indigenous musicians for percussion. During recording, the band faced lineup changes, but Max insisted on a raw approach, building a makeshift campfire setup in the studio to capture an authentic atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Soulfly由前Sepultura主唱马克斯·卡瓦莱拉于1997年创立，以融合重金属、巴西音乐与硬核朋克著称。乐队作品充满政治与精神主题，现场演出极具爆发力。
items.artistIntroEn: Soulfly was founded in 1997 by former Sepultura frontman Max Cavalera, known for blending heavy metal, Brazilian music, and hardcore punk. Their work is politically and spiritually charged, with explosive live performances.

items.name: A Kind of Magic
items.descriptionZh: 《A Kind of Magic》是Queen的第十二张录音室专辑，风格偏向流行摇滚与合成器摇滚。受电影《高地人》启发，专辑充满戏剧化的旋律与华丽的和声，弗雷迪·默丘里的嗓音在强劲节奏中游刃有余，展现了乐队在80年代对商业与艺术平衡的探索。
items.descriptionEn: "A Kind of Magic" is Queen's twelfth studio album, leaning towards pop rock and synth-rock. Inspired by the film "Highlander," it features dramatic melodies and lush harmonies, with Freddie Mercury's vocals soaring over driving rhythms, showcasing the band's 80s balance of commerce and art.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲最初是为电影《高地人》创作的配乐，弗雷迪·默丘里在看完粗剪后，仅用一晚就写出了主旋律。录制时，鼓手罗杰·泰勒因与制作人意见不合，一度摔鼓棒离场，但第二天又带着新灵感回来，最终成就了专辑中多首经典。
items.storiesEn: The title track was originally written for the film "Highlander." After seeing a rough cut, Freddie Mercury wrote the main melody in one night. During recording, drummer Roger Taylor once stormed out after clashing with the producer, but returned the next day with new ideas, contributing to several classics on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国专辑榜夺冠，全球销量超600万张，巩固了Queen在80年代的主流地位。同名曲成为乐队演唱会保留曲目。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album topped the UK Albums Chart and sold over 6 million copies worldwide, solidifying Queen's mainstream status in the 80s. The title track became a concert staple.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是1970年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，以华丽摇滚、歌剧式编曲和弗��迪·默丘里的舞台魅力闻名。代表作包括《Bohemian Rhapsody》和《We Will Rock You》，是全球最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, known for glam rock, operatic arrangements, and Freddie Mercury's stage presence. Hits include "Bohemian Rhapsody" and "We Will Rock You," making them one of the best-selling bands worldwide.

items.name: Obscured by Clouds
items.descriptionZh: 《Obscured by Clouds》是Pink Floyd为电影《La Vallée》创作的原声专辑，风格介于早期迷幻摇滚与中期前卫摇滚之间。音乐以器乐为主，融合环境音效、柔和的吉他和键盘，氛围宁静而略带忧郁，是乐队过渡时期的重要作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Obscured by Clouds" is Pink Floyd's soundtrack for the film "La Vallée," bridging their early psychedelic rock and mid-era progressive rock. Mostly instrumental, it blends ambient soundscapes, gentle guitars, and keyboards, creating a serene yet melancholic mood—a key transitional work.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在法国录制，仅用两周时间完成，是乐队创作速度最快的作品之一。录制期间，乐队成员对电影剧情兴趣不大，更多是即兴发挥。吉他手大卫·吉尔摩回忆，他们甚至在录音棚里用乒乓球比赛来激发节奏灵感。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in France in just two weeks, it's one of the band's fastest works. Members showed little interest in the film's plot, relying heavily on improvisation. Guitarist David Gilmour recalled even playing table tennis in the studio to inspire rhythmic ideas.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd是1965年成立于伦敦的英国前卫摇滚乐队，以概念专辑、哲学歌词和宏大现场演出闻名。代表作《The Dark Side of the Moon》是史上最畅销专辑之一，深刻影响了摇滚乐发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1965, known for concept albums, philosophical lyrics, and grand live shows. Their masterpiece "The Dark Side of the Moon" is one of the best-selling albums ever, profoundly influencing rock music.

items.name: The Firstborn Is Dead
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《The Firstborn Is Dead》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds的第二张专辑，延续了前作的哥特蓝调与后朋克风格。尼克·凯夫以低沉念白式的嗓音，讲述关于死亡、宗教与南方哥特式的黑暗故事，音乐充满荒凉的电吉他、钢琴与打击乐，营造出压抑而诗意的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "The Firstborn Is Dead" is Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds' second album, continuing their gothic blues and post-punk style. Nick Cave's低沉 spoken-word vocals narrate dark tales of death, religion, and Southern Gothic, with sparse electric guitars, piano, and percussion creating a压抑 yet poetic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于柏林，灵感来自美国南方哥特文学和圣经故事。尼克·凯夫在录音时坚持使用老式麦克风，以捕捉低保真质感。贝斯手巴里·亚当森回忆，某次录制时一只蝙蝠飞进棚内，凯夫即兴将其写入歌词，成为专辑中的神秘隐喻。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Berlin, the album drew inspiration from Southern Gothic literature and biblical tales. Nick Cave insisted on vintage microphones for a lo-fi texture. Bassist Barry Adamson recalled a bat flying into the studio during a session; Cave improvised it into the lyrics, adding a cryptic metaphor.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Nick Cave在哥特摇滚界的地位，其黑暗美学影响了后续众多另类摇滚与暗潮乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Nick Cave's status in gothic rock, with its dark aesthetic influencing many subsequent alternative rock and darkwave bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds成立于1983年，由澳大利亚音乐人尼克·凯夫领衔。乐队以哥特摇滚、蓝调和前卫诗歌著称，歌词充满宗教与暴力意象，现场演出极具戏剧张力。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds formed in 1983, led by Australian musician Nick Cave. Known for gothic rock, blues, and poetic lyrics filled with religious and violent imagery, their live performances are intensely theatrical.

items.name: Born in the U.S.A.
items.descriptionZh: 《Born in the U.S.A.》是布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀的第七张录音室专辑，风格为心脏地带摇滚与流行摇滚。专辑以合成器、强劲鼓点和斯普林斯汀沙哑嗓音为标志，旋律朗朗上口，歌词却深刻反映美国工人阶级的困境与越战创伤，是商业与批判性并重的经典。
items.descriptionEn: "Born in the U.S.A." is Bruce Springsteen's seventh studio album, a heartland rock and pop-rock masterpiece. Defined by synths, pounding drums, and Springsteen's gravelly vocals, its catchy melodies contrast with lyrics about working-class struggles and Vietnam War trauma—a classic balancing commerce and critique.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲最初以原声吉他写成，后由制作人建议加入合成器，变成更具冲击力的摇滚版本。录制时，斯普林斯汀对混音极为苛刻，曾要求工程师反复调整鼓声，直到听起来像“一辆卡车撞进车库”。专辑封面著名的“屁股照”是在一次街头拍摄中意外抓拍的。
items.storiesEn: The title track was initially written on acoustic guitar, but the producer suggested adding synths, transforming it into a more explosive rock version. Springsteen was famously demanding during mixing, asking engineers to tweak the drums until they sounded like "a truck crashing into a garage." The iconic album cover was an unposed street shot.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超3000万张，诞生七首Top 10单曲，是斯普林斯汀商业巅峰之作。同名曲被广泛误解为爱国歌曲，实际是对美国梦的批判，引发社会讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 30 million copies worldwide and spawned seven Top 10 singles, marking Springsteen's commercial peak. The title track was widely misread as patriotic but is actually a critique of the American Dream, sparking social debate.
items.artistIntroZh: 布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀是美国摇滚歌手、词曲作者，生于1949年，以“老板”绰号闻名。他的音乐扎根于新泽西蓝领生活，融合民谣、摇滚与布鲁斯，歌词充满叙事性与社会关怀，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Bruce Springsteen is an American rock singer-songwriter born in 1949, known as "The Boss." His music is rooted in New Jersey working-class life, blending folk, rock, and blues with narrative lyrics and social conscience, making him one of the most influential artists of the 20th century.

items.name: Load
items.descriptionZh: 《Load》是Metallica在1996年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格上大幅偏离了乐队早期的激流金属，转向了更具另类摇滚、布鲁斯和南方摇滚色彩的硬摇滚。制作精良，旋律感增强，展现了乐队在创作上的转型与实验性。
items.descriptionEn: Load is Metallica's sixth studio album, released in 1996. It marked a significant departure from the band's thrash metal roots, embracing a hard rock sound infused with alternative rock, blues, and Southern rock influences, showcasing their creative evolution.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队成员经历了严重的创作分歧。主唱James Hetfield与鼓手Lars Ulrich曾因歌曲方向激烈争吵，甚至一度中断录制。专辑封面由艺术家Andres Serrano创作，是一幅牛血与尿液混合物的抽象摄影，引发了不少争议。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band faced creative tensions. James Hetfield and Lars Ulrich had heated arguments over song directions, leading to a temporary halt. The controversial cover art, by Andres Serrano, was an abstract photograph of cow blood and urine, sparking debate.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Load》标志着Metallica从激流金属向更主流摇滚的转型，虽然引发老歌迷争议，但商业上大获成功，全球销量超千万张，影响了90年代中期重金属的多元化发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Load signified Metallica's shift from thrash to mainstream rock, dividing fans but achieving massive commercial success with over 10 million copies sold worldwide, influencing heavy metal's diversification in the mid-90s.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica成立于1981年，是美国最著名的重金属乐队之一，以快速、激进的激流金属风格闻名。乐队核心成员包括James Hetfield和Lars Ulrich，他们不断突破音乐边界，成为全球金属乐的标杆。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1981, Metallica is one of the most iconic heavy metal bands, known for fast, aggressive thrash metal. Led by James Hetfield and Lars Ulrich, they constantly push musical boundaries, becoming global metal icons.

items.name: Good Girl Gone Bad
items.descriptionZh: 《Good Girl Gone Bad》是Rihanna在2007年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格从早期的舞厅雷鬼转向了更主流的流行、R&B和电子舞曲。专辑充满自信、性感与叛逆气息，标志着她从邻家女孩向全球流行天后的蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: Good Girl Gone Bad is Rihanna's third studio album, released in 2007. It marked a shift from her earlier dancehall-reggae sound to mainstream pop, R&B, and electronic dance music, exuding confidence, sexiness, and rebellion as she transformed into a global pop icon.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Umbrella》原本是为Britney Spears和Mary J. Blige准备的，但都被拒绝。Rihanna起初也不喜欢，但在制作人劝说下录制，结果成为她职业生涯的突破性金曲。拍摄专辑封面时，她佩戴的黑色假发和皮衣造型成为标志性形象。
items.storiesEn: The lead single 'Umbrella' was originally offered to Britney Spears and Mary J. Blige, both of whom passed. Rihanna initially disliked it but recorded it on her producer's insistence, making it a career-defining hit. The black wig and leather outfit on the cover became iconic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Rihanna的全球巨星地位，《Umbrella》成为21世纪最畅销单曲之一，并带动了流行乐坛对电子舞曲元素的广泛采纳。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Rihanna's global superstardom. 'Umbrella' became one of the best-selling singles of the 21st century, influencing pop music's embrace of electronic dance elements.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna出生于巴巴多斯，2005年以《Pon de Replay》出道，迅速成为国际流行天后。她以多变的音乐风格、大胆的时尚和商业头脑闻名，同时涉足美妆和时尚产业，是全球最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Born in Barbados, Rihanna debuted in 2005 with 'Pon de Replay' and quickly became a global pop icon. Known for her versatile music, bold fashion, and business acumen in beauty and fashion, she is one of the world's most influential artists.

items.name: St. Anger
items.descriptionZh: 《St. Anger》是Metallica在2003年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格极端粗糙、原始，充满了愤怒和实验性。乐队刻意摒弃了吉他独奏，采用刺耳的鼓声和粗粝的混音，反映乐队当时的内部动荡与主唱James Hetfield的康复历程。
items.descriptionEn: St. Anger is Metallica's eighth studio album, released in 2003. It features an extremely raw, angry, and experimental sound, deliberately omitting guitar solos and using harsh drum sounds and gritty production, reflecting the band's internal turmoil and James Hetfield's rehab journey.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程充满戏剧性：James Hetfield因酗酒问题进入康复中心，乐队一度面临解散。鼓手Lars Ulrich的军鼓声因像敲垃圾桶而饱受争议，但乐队坚持这种“不完美”的声音。纪录片《Some Kind of Monster》全程记录了这段混乱时期。
items.storiesEn: The recording was dramatic: James Hetfield entered rehab for alcoholism, nearly breaking up the band. Lars Ulrich's snare drum sound, likened to a trash can, was highly controversial, but the band defended its 'imperfect' rawness. The documentary 'Some Kind of Monster' captured this chaotic period.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica是1981年成立于洛杉矶的美国重金属乐队，以激流金属奠基者的身份闻名。尽管经历人员变动和风格转型，他们始终是销量最高、最具影响力的金属乐队之一，全球唱片销量超过1.25亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica is an American heavy metal band formed in Los Angeles in 1981, known as pioneers of thrash metal. Despite lineup changes and stylistic shifts, they remain one of the best-selling and most influential metal bands, with over 125 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Deep Purple In Rock
items.descriptionZh: 《Deep Purple In Rock》是Deep Purple在1970年发行的第四张录音室专辑，也是乐队经典Mark II阵容的首张作品。风格以硬摇滚和重金属为基础，充满强劲的吉他 riff、激昂的键盘和怒吼式 vocals，被誉为硬摇滚和重金属的里程碑之作。
items.descriptionEn: Deep Purple In Rock, released in 1970, is the band's fourth studio album and the first with the classic Mark II lineup. It is a hard rock and heavy metal masterpiece, featuring powerful guitar riffs, fiery organ work, and aggressive vocals, considered a landmark in the genre.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队刚刚经历了阵容重组，新主唱Ian Gillan和贝斯手Roger Glover的加入带来了全新活力。专辑中最著名的歌曲《Child in Time》灵感来自越战，其长达10分钟的编曲和尖叫式演唱成为经典。乐队在录音室中经常即兴创作，许多歌曲都是一次成型。
items.storiesEn: The album followed a lineup change, with new vocalist Ian Gillan and bassist Roger Glover injecting fresh energy. The epic 'Child in Time' was inspired by the Vietnam War, featuring a 10-minute arrangement and iconic screams. Many songs were improvised and recorded in single takes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Deep Purple In Rock》与Black Sabbath和Led Zeppelin的作品一起，被公认为重金属音乐的奠基之作，直接影响了后来的无数硬摇滚和金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Alongside works by Black Sabbath and Led Zeppelin, Deep Purple In Rock is recognized as a foundational heavy metal album, directly influencing countless hard rock and metal bands that followed.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是1968年在英国成立的摇滚乐队，与Led Zeppelin和Black Sabbath并称为“重金属三大元老”。他们以精湛的乐器演奏、古典与摇滚的融合著称，经典阵容Mark II（Gillan、Blackmore、Lord、Paice、Glover）定义了硬摇滚黄金时代。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1968 in England, Deep Purple is one of the 'Big Three' pioneers of heavy metal alongside Led Zeppelin and Black Sabbath. Known for virtuosic musicianship and blending classical with rock, their classic Mark II lineup defined the golden age of hard rock.

items.name: Metamorphosis
items.descriptionZh: 《Metamorphosis》是The Rolling Stones在1975年发行的一张精选合辑，收录了1964年至1971年间未曾在专辑中发表过的录音室作品、B面曲和早期demo。风格横跨蓝调摇滚、乡村和迷幻，展现了乐队在黄金十年的实验与多样性。
items.descriptionEn: Metamorphosis is a 1975 compilation album by The Rolling Stones, featuring unreleased studio tracks, B-sides, and early demos from 1964 to 1971. Spanning blues rock, country, and psychedelia, it showcases the band's experimentation and diversity during their golden decade.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑的诞生颇具争议：它是在乐队与前任经理Allen Klein的法律纠纷后，由Klein控制的ABKCO公司发行的，乐队并未参与曲目选择。许多歌曲是早期未完成的demo，包括一首Mick Jagger与Jimmy Page合作的《Scarlet》的早期版本。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was controversial: released by ABKCO Records after legal disputes with former manager Allen Klein, the band had no input on the tracklist. Many songs were unfinished demos, including an early version of 'Scarlet', a collaboration between Mick Jagger and Jimmy Page.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管并非乐队官方作品，但《Metamorphosis》提供了研究滚石乐队创作过程的珍贵档案，揭示了他们许多经典歌曲的原始面貌，对理解60年代摇滚乐的制作流程有重要意义。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though not an official band release, Metamorphosis provides valuable archival insight into the Rolling Stones' creative process, revealing the raw origins of many classics and offering a window into 1960s rock production.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones成立于1962年，是英国最伟大的摇滚乐队之一，以蓝调根基、叛逆形象和Mick Jagger与Keith Richards的创作组合闻名。他们拥有超过50年的音乐生涯，是全球巡回票房最高的乐队之一，被誉为“世界上最伟大的摇滚乐队”。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1962, The Rolling Stones are one of the greatest rock bands, known for their blues roots, rebellious image, and the songwriting duo of Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. With a career spanning over 50 years, they are one of the highest-grossing touring acts, often called 'The Greatest Rock and Roll Band in the World'.

items.name: X&Y
items.descriptionZh: 《X&Y》是酷玩乐队的第三张录音室专辑，延续了前作《A Rush of Blood to the Head》的宏大抒情风格，同时融入了更多电子与合成器元素。专辑以宇宙、爱与存在主义为核心主题，旋律流畅而富有感染力，展现了乐队在流行与独立摇滚之间的精准平衡。
items.descriptionEn: X&Y is Coldplay's third studio album, continuing the grand lyrical style of its predecessor while incorporating more electronic and synthesizer elements. Centered on themes of cosmos, love, and existentialism, the album features smooth, infectious melodies, showcasing the band's precise balance between pop and indie rock.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，主唱克里斯·马丁因对专辑方向感到焦虑，曾一度推翻大量已录制的素材。专辑名《X&Y》源于数学中的未知数，象征人生中的不确定性与选择。制作人肯·尼尔森在伦敦的录音室中使用了大量复古合成器，以营造出独特的太空感音效。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead singer Chris Martin, anxious about the album's direction, scrapped a large amount of recorded material. The title X&Y, derived from mathematical unknowns, symbolizes uncertainty and choices in life. Producer Ken Nelson used numerous vintage synthesizers in a London studio to create a distinctive space-like sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1300万张，帮助酷玩乐队确立了21世纪初英伦摇滚全球领军人物的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: With over 13 million copies sold worldwide, the album cemented Coldplay's status as global leaders of British rock in the early 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: 酷玩乐队（Coldplay）成立于1996年，由主唱克里斯·马丁、吉他手强尼·巴克兰、贝斯手盖·贝里曼和鼓手威尔·查平组成。他们以情感充沛的旋律和诗意的歌词闻名，是当代最成功的英伦摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Coldplay, formed in 1996, consists of Chris Martin (vocals), Jonny Buckland (guitar), Guy Berryman (bass), and Will Champion (drums). Known for emotionally charged melodies and poetic lyrics, they are one of the most successful British rock bands of the modern era.

items.name: Deep Cuts, Volume 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Deep Cuts, Volume 2》是皇后乐队的一张精选集，专注于收录乐队1970至1980年代被主流忽视的深度曲目。风格横跨硬摇滚、华丽摇滚与实验性前卫摇滚，展现了乐��在热门单曲之外更为复杂、多元的音乐探索。
items.descriptionEn: Deep Cuts, Volume 2 is a Queen compilation focusing on lesser-known tracks from the 1970s and 1980s. Spanning hard rock, glam rock, and experimental progressive rock, it reveals the band's more complex and diverse musical explorations beyond their hit singles.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的曲目由皇后乐队吉他手布莱恩·梅与鼓手罗杰·泰勒亲自挑选，旨在纠正主流听众对乐队“只有金曲”的刻板印象。许多歌曲首次以数字形式发行，包括罕见的B面曲和现场录音。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist was personally selected by guitarist Brian May and drummer Roger Taylor to challenge the mainstream perception that Queen was 'only a singles band.' Many songs were released digitally for the first time, including rare B-sides and live recordings.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队（Queen）成立于1970年，成员包括弗雷迪·默丘里（主唱）、布莱恩·梅（吉他）、约翰·迪肯（贝斯）和罗杰·泰勒（鼓）。他们以华丽的舞台表演、复杂的和声以及融合多种摇滚风格的创新精神而成为传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen, formed in 1970, comprised Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), John Deacon (bass), and Roger Taylor (drums). Renowned for flamboyant stage shows, complex harmonies, and genre-blending innovation, they became rock legends.

items.name: Californication
items.descriptionZh: 《Californication》是红辣椒乐队的第七张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从朋克放克向更旋律化、内省风格的转型。专辑以加州阳光下的阴暗面为主题，融合了放克节奏、另类摇滚吉他以及主唱凯迪斯的标志性低吟，充满忧郁与希望交织的张力。
items.descriptionEn: Californication is the Red Hot Chili Peppers' seventh studio album, marking a shift from punk-funk to a more melodic, introspective style. Exploring the dark side of California sunshine, it blends funk rhythms, alternative rock guitar, and lead singer Anthony Kiedis's signature croon, creating a tension between melancholy and hope.
items.storiesZh: 吉他手约翰·弗鲁西安特在戒毒成功后重新归队，为专辑带来了全新的创作活力。录制在洛杉矶的一处私人别墅中进行，乐队经常在泳池边即兴创作。专辑同名曲《Californication》的歌词灵感源于凯迪斯对好莱坞文化异化的观察。
items.storiesEn: Guitarist John Frusciante rejoined the band after successfully overcoming addiction, bringing renewed creative energy. Recorded in a private villa in Los Angeles, the band often improvised by the pool. The title track's lyrics were inspired by Kiedis's observations of Hollywood's cultural alienation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1500万张，被公认为另类摇滚在1990年代末的代表作，并帮助乐队从低谷重返巅峰。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling over 15 million copies worldwide, it is widely regarded as a landmark alternative rock album of the late 1990s and restored the band to mainstream prominence after a slump.
items.artistIntroZh: 红辣椒乐队（Red Hot Chili Peppers）1983年成立于洛杉矶，核心成员包括安东尼·凯迪斯（主唱）、约翰·弗鲁西安特（吉他）、跳蚤（贝斯）与查德·史密斯（鼓）。他们以放克、朋克与摇滚的融合以及充满活力的现场表演著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in Los Angeles in 1983, the Red Hot Chili Peppers' core members include Anthony Kiedis (vocals), John Frusciante (guitar), Flea (bass), and Chad Smith (drums). They are known for blending funk, punk, and rock, and for their high-energy live shows.

items.name: The Art of Live
items.descriptionZh: 《The Art of Live》是前卫金属乐队Queensrÿche的现场专辑，收录了2003年巡演的精湛演出。风格以复杂编曲、高亢的嗓音和概念性叙事为核心，展现了乐队在舞台上的技术实力与戏剧感染力，尤其突出了吉他手迈克尔·威尔顿的独奏魅力。
items.descriptionEn: The Art of Live is a live album by progressive metal band Queensrÿche, capturing performances from their 2003 tour. Featuring complex arrangements, soaring vocals, and conceptual storytelling, it showcases the band's technical prowess and theatrical intensity on stage, particularly highlighting guitarist Michael Wilton's solos.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于美国多个城市的连续演出，乐队特意选择了较小的场馆以营造更亲密的现场氛围。主唱杰夫·泰特在演唱经典曲目《Eyes of a Stranger》时即兴改变了尾奏的旋律，这一版本被保留并成为粉丝最爱。
items.storiesEn: Recorded across multiple U.S. cities during a continuous tour, the band deliberately chose smaller venues to create a more intimate atmosphere. Lead singer Geoff Tate improvised a new ending melody for the classic track 'Eyes of a Stranger,' and this version was retained, becoming a fan favorite.
items.artistIntroZh: Queensrÿche于1982年在美国华盛顿州创��，以杰夫·泰特（主唱）、迈克尔·威尔顿（吉他）为核心。他们是前卫金属流派的开创者之一，以概念专辑《Operation: Mindcrime》和歌剧式的演唱风格享誉乐坛。
items.artistIntroEn: Queensrÿche was formed in Washington State in 1982, with Geoff Tate (vocals) and Michael Wilton (guitar) as core members. Pioneers of progressive metal, they are renowned for the concept album Operation: Mindcrime and their operatic vocal style.

items.name: Hail to the Thief
items.descriptionZh: 《Hail to the Thief》是电台司令的第六张录音室专辑，融合了电子实验、吉他噪音与政治隐喻。风格上它既保留了《Kid A》时期的电子化倾向，又回归了部分吉他驱动的摇滚元素，歌词充满对战争、媒体操控与后现代社会的尖锐批判。
items.descriptionEn: Hail to the Thief is Radiohead's sixth studio album, blending electronic experimentation, guitar noise, and political metaphor. It retains the electronic leanings of the Kid A era while reintroducing guitar-driven rock, with lyrics sharply critiquing war, media manipulation, and postmodern society.
items.storiesZh: 专辑仅用两周时间在洛杉矶录制完成，制作人奈杰尔·戈德里奇鼓励乐队采用更即兴的创作方式。专辑名源自美国2000年总统大选争议期间的一句抗议标语，主唱汤姆·约克表示这反映了“窃取权力”的普遍现象。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two weeks in Los Angeles, with producer Nigel Godrich encouraging a more improvisational approach. The title originated from a protest slogan during the controversial 2000 U.S. presidential election, with lead singer Thom Yorke describing it as reflecting the universal phenomenon of 'stolen power.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周登顶英国专辑榜，被乐评视为电台司令对21世纪初政治焦虑的即时回应，也是他们电子摇滚融合时期的收官之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Debuting at No. 1 on the UK Albums Chart, it was hailed by critics as Radiohead's immediate response to early-2000s political anxiety and marked the culmination of their electronic-rock fusion period.
items.artistIntroZh: 电台司令（Radiohead）1985年成立于英国牛津郡，成员包括汤姆·约克（主唱）、强尼·格林伍德（吉他）、艾德·欧布莱恩（吉他）、科林·格林伍德（贝斯）与菲尔·塞尔维（鼓）。他们以不断颠覆自我、融合另类摇滚与电子音乐的前卫精神而闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Radiohead, formed in Oxfordshire, UK in 1985, consists of Thom Yorke (vocals), Jonny Greenwood (guitar), Ed O'Brien (guitar), Colin Greenwood (bass), and Philip Selway (drums). They are famed for their avant-garde spirit, constantly reinventing their sound by blending alternative rock with electronic music.

items.name: A Little Deeper
items.descriptionZh: 《A Little Deeper》是英国歌手Ms. Dynamite的首张专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐、嘻哈和雷鬼元素。专辑以温暖而富有社会意识的歌词为核心，探讨种族、性别和阶级议题，同时展现了她在旋律与节奏上的细腻掌控。制作上采用大量原声乐器与电子节拍交织，营造出既亲密又充满力量的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: A Little Deeper is the debut album by British singer Ms. Dynamite, blending R&B, soul, hip-hop, and reggae. The album is centered on warm, socially conscious lyrics addressing race, gender, and class, while showcasing her delicate control over melody and rhythm. Production weaves acoustic instruments with electronic beats, creating an intimate yet powerful atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Ms. Dynamite坚持在家中地下室搭建临时录音室，以便照顾年幼的儿子。她曾回忆说，许多深夜的灵感都来自哄孩子入睡后的安静时光。制作人Piano和Mister Dan为了捕捉她即兴演唱的魔力，常常不设固定流程，任由她在麦克风前自由发挥，最终促成了一些专辑中最动人的段落。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Ms. Dynamite insisted on setting up a makeshift studio in her basement to care for her young son. She recalled that many late-night inspirations came after putting her child to sleep. Producers Piano and Mister Dan often avoided fixed routines to capture her improvised vocal magic, letting her freestyle at the mic, which led to some of the album's most moving passages.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为Ms. Dynamite赢得2003年水星奖，并被视为21世纪初英国女性艺术家融合社会评论与主流音乐的里程碑之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the 2003 Mercury Prize and is regarded as a milestone for British female artists blending social commentary with mainstream music in the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Ms. Dynamite（本名Niomi McLean-Daley）是英国歌手、说唱歌手和社会活动家。她以融合R&B、嘻哈与雷鬼的独特风格闻名，歌词常聚焦种族平等与女性赋权。2002年凭首张专辑一举夺得水星奖，成为当时最年轻的获奖者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ms. Dynamite (born Niomi McLean-Daley) is a British singer, rapper, and social activist. Known for blending R&B, hip-hop, and reggae, her lyrics often focus on racial equality and female empowerment. She won the Mercury Prize in 2002 with her debut album, becoming one of the youngest winners at the time.

items.name: State of Confusion
items.descriptionZh: 《State of Confusion》是英国摇滚乐队The Kinks的第十八张录音室专辑，延续了他们在80年代初期的流行摇滚风格，同时融入了更多合成器和流行元素。专辑主题围绕社会混乱、个人迷茫与政治讽刺，旋律朗朗上口，吉他riff依然锋利，展现了乐队在商业与艺术之间的平衡。
items.descriptionEn: State of Confusion is the 18th studio album by British rock band The Kinks, continuing their early 80s pop-rock style while incorporating more synthesizers and pop elements. The album's themes revolve around social chaos, personal confusion, and political satire, with catchy melodies and sharp guitar riffs, showcasing the band's balance between commerce and art.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《State of Confusion》的灵感来自主唱Ray Davies在纽约街头目睹的流浪汉与城市混乱景象。录制时，乐队成员曾因合成器使用比例产生争执，但最终Ray坚持加入电子音色以反映80年代的焦虑感。鼓手Mick Avory在录制《Don't Forget to Dance》时即兴加入了一段非洲节奏，意外成为专辑亮点。
items.storiesEn: The title track State of Confusion was inspired by lead singer Ray Davies witnessing homeless people and urban chaos on the streets of New York. During recording, band members argued over the proportion of synthesizers, but Ray insisted on adding electronic textures to reflect 80s anxiety. Drummer Mick Avory spontaneously added an African rhythm to Don't Forget to Dance, which unexpectedly became a highlight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国表现稳健，但未在美国取得突破，被视为The Kinks在商业转型期的一张被低估的作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album performed steadily in the UK but failed to break through in the US, and is often considered an underrated work during The Kinks' commercial transition.
items.artistIntroZh: The Kinks是英国摇滚乐队，1964年凭借《You Really Got Me》一举成名，是英国入侵浪潮的核心力量之一。乐队以主唱Ray Davies犀利的歌词和旋律天赋著称，风格从硬摇滚到音乐厅流行剧多变，对后世朋克、英伦摇滚影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: The Kinks are a British rock band that rose to fame in 1964 with You Really Got Me, becoming a core force of the British Invasion. Known for lead singer Ray Davies' sharp lyrics and melodic talent, their style ranges from hard rock to music hall pop, profoundly influencing later punk and Britpop.

items.name: ...And the Circus Leaves Town
items.descriptionZh: 《...And the Circus Leaves Town》是美国摇滚乐队Kyuss的第四张也是最后一张录音室专辑。这张专辑延续了乐队标志性的沙漠摇滚风格——厚重的失真吉他、迷幻的即兴段落和沉重的低音，同时加入了更多实验性的结构变化和氛围段落。它是Stoner Rock流派的重要代表作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: ...And the Circus Leaves Town is the fourth and final studio album by American rock band Kyuss. It continues the band's signature desert rock style—heavy distorted guitars, psychedelic jams, and thick bass—while adding more experimental structural shifts and atmospheric passages. It is a key representative work of the stoner rock genre.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队内部已出现严重分歧，吉他手Josh Homme和主唱John Garcia在音乐方向上矛盾激化。专辑标题暗示了乐队即将解散的宿命。录音时，他们刻意将音箱埋入沙漠沙丘中，以获取独特的混响效果。专辑完成后不久，Kyuss即宣告解散，成员各自发展。
items.storiesEn: During recording, internal tensions were high, with guitarist Josh Homme and vocalist John Garcia clashing over musical direction. The album title hints at the band's impending breakup. To achieve a unique reverb, they deliberately buried amplifiers in desert sand dunes. Shortly after the album's completion, Kyuss disbanded, with members going their separate ways.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Stoner Rock流派的重要文献，对后世乐队如Queens of the Stone Age产生直接影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a crucial document of the stoner rock genre, directly influencing later bands like Queens of the Stone Age.
items.artistIntroZh: Kyuss是美国沙漠摇滚/Stoner Rock乐队，1987年成立于加州棕榈沙漠。乐队以沉重、迷幻且充满沙漠气息的吉他音色著称，是90年代地下摇滚的重要力量。尽管仅发行四张专辑，他们深刻影响了后续的金属和摇滚音乐场景。
items.artistIntroEn: Kyuss is an American desert rock/stoner rock band formed in Palm Desert, California in 1987. Known for their heavy, psychedelic guitar sound evoking desert landscapes, they were a major force in 90s underground rock. Despite releasing only four albums, they profoundly influenced subsequent metal and rock scenes.

items.name: Take Off Your Pants and Jacket
items.descriptionZh: 《Take Off Your Pants and Jacket》是美国流行朋克乐队Blink-182的第四张录音室专辑，延续了他们标志性的快节奏朋克旋律与青春期幽默歌词。专辑在流行朋克框架下加入更精致的和声与制作，主题涵盖恋爱、叛逆、成长焦虑与粗俗笑话，是21世纪初流行朋克黄金时代的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Take Off Your Pants and Jacket is the fourth studio album by American pop-punk band Blink-182, continuing their signature fast-paced punk melodies and adolescent humor. The album adds more refined harmonies and production within the pop-punk framework, covering themes of love, rebellion, growing pains, and crude jokes. It is a defining work of the early 2000s pop-punk golden era.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队三人曾因歌词尺度产生激烈争吵——贝斯手Mark Hoppus希望更成熟，而吉他手Tom DeLonge坚持保留低俗笑话。最终他们决定将两种风格混合，例如《The Rock Show》的浪漫与《Happy Holidays, You Bastard》的恶搞并存。专辑名原本是Tom随口说的玩笑，却被大家一致通过。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the three band members argued fiercely over lyrical content—bassist Mark Hoppus wanted more maturity, while guitarist Tom DeLonge insisted on keeping crude jokes. They eventually blended both styles, as seen in the romantic The Rock Show alongside the irreverent Happy Holidays, You Bastard. The album title was originally a joke by Tom, but everyone agreed to keep it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑首周空降Billboard 200冠军��成为流行朋克商业巅峰的标志之一，影响了后续无数流行朋克乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, marking a commercial peak for pop-punk and influencing countless subsequent pop-punk bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Blink-182是美国流行朋克乐队，1992年成立于加州。乐队以极快的三和弦、青春期幽默和直白的歌词风靡全球，是90年代末至2000年代初流行朋克运动的领军者。代表作包括《All the Small Things》《What's My Age Again?》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Blink-182 is an American pop-punk band formed in California in 1992. Known for lightning-fast power chords, adolescent humor, and direct lyrics, they became global icons and leaders of the late 90s/early 2000s pop-punk movement. Hits include All the Small Things and What's My Age Again?.

items.name: My Name
items.descriptionZh: 《My Name》是韩国歌手BoA的第四张韩语录音室专辑，也是她巩固亚洲天后地位的关键作品。专辑以流行舞曲和R&B为基底，融合了电子、嘻哈和抒情元素。BoA展现了更成熟的演唱技巧和多元曲风掌控力，歌词涉及自我认同、爱情与成长，制作精良且充满国际视野。
items.descriptionEn: My Name is the fourth Korean studio album by South Korean singer BoA, a key work solidifying her status as Asia's pop queen. The album is rooted in dance-pop and R&B, incorporating electronic, hip-hop, and ballad elements. BoA showcases more mature vocal techniques and genre versatility, with lyrics exploring self-identity, love, and growth, backed by polished, internationally-minded production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《My Name》的编舞由美国著名编舞家创作，BoA为了完美呈现，每天练习超过12小时，导致膝盖受伤。录制中文版时，她特意请来中文老师逐字纠正发音，力求在亚洲市场达到最高标准。专辑封面拍摄时，她坚持不用替身完成高难度悬挂动作，展现出极强的敬业精神。
items.storiesEn: The choreography for the title track My Name was created by a renowned American choreographer. BoA practiced over 12 hours daily, injuring her knee in the process. For the Chinese version, she hired a Mandarin teacher to correct her pronunciation word by word, aiming for the highest standard in the Asian market. During the album cover shoot, she insisted on performing difficult suspension stunts without a stunt double, demonstrating her strong professionalism.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在韩国销量突破50万张，并成功打入日本和中国市场，进一步确立了BoA作为韩流全球化先锋的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 500,000 copies in South Korea and successfully entered the Japanese and Chinese markets, further establishing BoA as a pioneer of K-pop globalization.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿）是韩国歌手、演员，被誉为‘亚洲之星’。她13岁出道，凭借出色的唱跳实力迅速走红，是首位在日本Oricon公信榜获得冠军的韩国歌手。她推动了K-pop在亚洲乃至全球的传播，是韩流文化的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean singer and actress, often called the 'Queen of Asian Pop.' Debuting at age 13, she rose to fame with outstanding singing and dancing skills, becoming the first Korean artist to top Japan's Oricon chart. She has been instrumental in spreading K-pop across Asia and globally, a true icon of Hallyu.

items.name: Viva la Vida or Death and All His Friends
items.descriptionZh: 《Viva la Vida or Death and All His Friends》是Coldplay在2008年发行的第四张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从英伦摇滚向更宏大、艺术化的流行摇滚转型。专辑以巴洛克流行、管弦乐和教堂钟声般的音效为特色，充满史诗感和宗教隐喻，歌词探讨生死、革命与权力。
items.descriptionEn: Viva la Vida or Death and All His Friends is Coldplay's fourth studio album (2008), marking a shift from Britpop to grand, artful pop rock. Featuring baroque pop, orchestral sounds, and church-like bells, it exudes epic grandeur and religious metaphors, exploring life, death, revolution, and power.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由Brian Eno制作，录制过程中乐队尝试了非常规方法，比如在废弃的教堂和旧谷仓里录音。主唱Chris Martin曾表示，专辑标题灵感来自他母亲的一句话，而同名曲《Viva la Vida》的旋律来自他梦中听到的一段吉他循环。
items.storiesEn: Produced by Brian Eno, the band experimented with unconventional recording methods, using an abandoned church and an old barn. Chris Martin said the album title was inspired by a phrase his mother used, and the melody for 'Viva la Vida' came from a guitar loop he heard in a dream.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1000万张，同名曲《Viva la Vida》成为Coldplay首支美国公告牌冠军单曲，并获格莱美年度歌曲奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 10 million copies worldwide; the title track became Coldplay's first US Billboard Hot 100 number-one single and won a Grammy for Song of the Year.
items.artistIntroZh: Coldplay成立于1996年，主唱Chris Martin、吉他手Jonny Buckland、贝斯手Guy Berryman和鼓手Will Champion。他们以情感充沛的英伦摇滚和流行旋律闻名，是全球最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Coldplay formed in 1996, consisting of Chris Martin (vocals), Jonny Buckland (guitar), Guy Berryman (bass), and Will Champion (drums). Known for emotive Britpop and pop melodies, they are one of the world's best-selling bands.

items.name: Mingus
items.descriptionZh: 《Mingus》是Joni Mitchell向爵士大师Charles Mingus致敬的专辑，融合了爵士、民谣和实验元素。Mitchell用诗意的歌词和独特的吉他调弦，将Mingus未完成的曲目转化为声乐作品，风格忧郁而充满智性。
items.descriptionEn: Mingus is Joni Mitchell's tribute to jazz legend Charles Mingus, blending jazz, folk, and experimental elements. With poetic lyrics and unique guitar tunings, she transforms Mingus's unfinished compositions into vocal works, creating a melancholic and intellectual style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑源于Mitchell与Charles Mingus的合作计划，但Mingus在录制前因渐冻症去世。Mitchell使用了他留下的音乐草稿，并邀请Mingus的长期合作伙伴如Herbie Hancock参与录制，整个过程充满情感挑战。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from a planned collaboration with Charles Mingus, but he died of ALS before recording. Mitchell used his musical sketches, enlisted Mingus's longtime collaborators like Herbie Hancock, and found the process emotionally challenging.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑被视为Joni Mitchell艺术生涯的转折点，展现了她从民谣向爵士的深度转型，并影响了后来的女性爵士歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is seen as a turning point in Joni Mitchell's career, showcasing her deep shift from folk to jazz, and influenced later female jazz vocalists.
items.artistIntroZh: Joni Mitchell（1943年生）是加拿大歌手、词曲作家和画家，以复杂的和声、诗意的歌词和吉他调弦闻名。她跨越民谣、爵士和流行，是20世纪最具影响力的创作女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Joni Mitchell (b. 1943) is a Canadian singer, songwriter, and painter known for complex harmonies, poetic lyrics, and guitar tunings. Spanning folk, jazz, and pop, she is one of the most influential singer-songwriters of the 20th century.

items.name: Gold
items.descriptionZh: 《Gold》是The Velvet Underground在2005年发行的精选集，涵盖乐队1966-1973年的经典作品，包括地下丝绒的早期实验摇滚、Lou Reed的叙事诗和Nico的冷艳歌声。专辑如其名，是乐队的黄金时代浓缩。
items.descriptionEn: Gold is a 2005 compilation by The Velvet Underground, covering their classic work from 1966-1973, including early experimental rock, Lou Reed's narrative poetry, and Nico's cool vocals. As the title suggests, it's a distillation of the band's golden era.
items.storiesZh: 这张双CD精选集由乐队成员参与策划，收录了罕见录音和现场版本。曲目编排按时间顺序，展示了乐队从Andy Warhol工厂时期的先锋噪音到更旋律化转型的完整轨迹。
items.storiesEn: This double-CD compilation was curated with band members' input, including rare recordings and live versions. The tracklist is chronological, showing the band's full evolution from Andy Warhol Factory-era avant-garde noise to more melodic work.
items.artistIntroZh: The Velvet Underground成立于1964年纽约，核心成员Lou Reed、John Cale、Sterling Morrison和Mo Tucker。他们以实验噪音、禁忌主题和艺术摇滚影响深远，虽商业上初期失败，但被视为另类摇滚的鼻祖。
items.artistIntroEn: The Velvet Underground formed in 1964 in New York, with core members Lou Reed, John Cale, Sterling Morrison, and Mo Tucker. Known for experimental noise, taboo subjects, and art rock, they were initially commercially unsuccessful but are considered godfathers of alternative rock.

items.name: You Can't Do That on Stage Anymore, Vol. 4
items.descriptionZh: 《You Can't Do That on Stage Anymore, Vol. 4》是Frank Zappa的现场系列专辑第四卷，聚焦1970年代末至1980年代初的演出。专辑以复杂的爵士摇滚、即兴演奏和Zappa标志性的讽刺幽默为特色，展现了他对音乐结构的极致掌控。
items.descriptionEn: You Can't Do That on Stage Anymore, Vol. 4 is the fourth volume of Frank Zappa's live series, focusing on performances from the late 1970s to early 1980s. Featuring complex jazz-rock, improvisation, and Zappa's trademark satirical humor, it showcases his masterful control of musical structure.
items.storiesZh: Zappa从大量现场录音中精选曲目，每首都有详细标注录制时间和地点。专辑标题暗示这些现场表演因乐队解散或政策变化无法重现，其中包含许多即兴段落和观众互动，是Zappa舞台魅力的直接记录。
items.storiesEn: Zappa selected tracks from vast live recordings, each annotated with date and venue. The title implies these performances can't be replicated due to band disbandment or policy changes. It includes many improvisations and audience interactions, directly capturing Zappa's stage charisma.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa（1940-1993）是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，以多产和跨流派创作闻名。他的作品涵盖摇滚、爵士、古典和实验音乐，歌词充满社会批判，是20世纪最独特的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist known for his prolific, cross-genre output. His work spans rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music, with lyrics full of social critique, making him one of the 20th century's most unique musicians.

items.name: Time Flies... 1994–2009
items.descriptionZh: 《Time Flies... 1994–2009》是Oasis的精选集，收录了乐队从首张专辑《Definitely Maybe》到解散前的所有重要单曲和B面曲。专辑以英伦摇滚的吉他轰鸣和Liam Gallagher的招牌嗓音为核心，记录了Britpop时代的辉煌。
items.descriptionEn: Time Flies... 1994–2009 is an Oasis compilation featuring all major singles and B-sides from their debut Definitely Maybe to their breakup. Centered on Britpop's guitar roar and Liam Gallagher's signature voice, it chronicles the glory of the Britpop era.
items.storiesZh: 这张双CD精选集由Noel Gallagher亲自选曲，他特意加入了多首B面曲，认为它们不输于正式单曲。专辑封面采用了乐队不同时期的照片拼贴，象征时间流逝。发行时正值Oasis解散后不久，引发歌迷怀旧热潮。
items.storiesEn: This double-CD compilation was personally curated by Noel Gallagher, who deliberately included many B-sides, believing they were as good as singles. The cover features a collage of band photos from different eras, symbolizing time passing. Released shortly after Oasis's breakup, it sparked fan nostalgia.
items.historicalImpactZh: Oasis是Britpop运动的标志性乐队，这张精选集总结了他们15年的职业生涯，巩固了其在英国摇滚史上的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Oasis was the iconic band of the Britpop movement; this compilation summarizes their 15-year career, cementing their status in British rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: Oasis成立于1991年曼彻斯特，核心为Noel和Liam Gallagher兄弟。他们以直白的吉他摇滚、工人阶级态度和兄弟内斗闻名，是1990年代英国最成功的乐队之一，全球销量超过7000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Oasis formed in 1991 in Manchester, centered on brothers Noel and Liam Gallagher. Known for straightforward guitar rock, working-class attitude, and sibling rivalry, they were one of the most successful UK bands of the 1990s, selling over 70 million records worldwide.

items.name: Bleach
items.descriptionZh: 《Bleach》是Nirvana的首张专辑，风格以粗粝的垃圾摇滚和朋克为主，核心特色是原始、未经修饰的吉他音色和Kurt Cobain充满愤怒与绝望的嘶吼。这张专辑奠定了西雅图之声的基础，展现了乐队在商业成功前的纯粹地下气质。
items.descriptionEn: Bleach is Nirvana's debut album, characterized by raw grunge and punk, with unpolished guitar tones and Kurt Cobain's anguished screams. It laid the foundation for the Seattle sound, capturing the band's pure underground essence before commercial success.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制仅花费了606美元，由Sub Pop厂牌出资。乐队当时经济拮据，Kurt Cobain甚至不得不借来一把吉他完成录制。鼓手Chad Channing因不满专辑制作粗糙而离开，后来Dave Grohl接替了他的位置。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded for just $606, funded by Sub Pop. The band was broke, and Kurt Cobain had to borrow a guitar for the sessions. Drummer Chad Channing left due to dissatisfaction with the raw production, later replaced by Dave Grohl.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为垃圾摇滚运动的早期里程碑，它影响了90年代另类摇滚的爆发，并展示了Nirvana从地下走向主流的过渡。
items.historicalImpactEn: As an early milestone of the grunge movement, it influenced the explosion of 90s alternative rock and showcased Nirvana's transition from underground to mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Nirvana是一支美国摇滚乐队，1987年成立于华盛顿州阿伯丁。由主唱兼吉他手Kurt Cobain和贝斯手Krist Novoselic创立，他们以垃圾摇滚风格成为90年代文化现象，彻底改变了主流音乐格局。
items.artistIntroEn: Nirvana was an American rock band formed in Aberdeen, Washington in 1987 by Kurt Cobain and Krist Novoselic. Their grunge style became a 90s cultural phenomenon, transforming the mainstream music landscape.

items.name: HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I
items.descriptionZh: 《HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I》是Michael Jackson的双碟专辑，融合流行、R&B、新杰克摇摆和硬摇滚。核心特色是宏大的制作、社会批判主题（如种族歧视、战争）以及标志性的MV叙事，展现了Jackson的艺术野心。
items.descriptionEn: HIStory is a double album by Michael Jackson blending pop, R&B, new jack swing, and hard rock. Its core features are grand production, social critique (racism, war), and iconic music video storytelling, showcasing Jackson's artistic ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制耗时两年，Jackson在录音室中极度完美主义，曾要求重录同一段旋律上百次。主打歌《Scream》的MV成本高达700万美元，创下当时纪录；Jackson还因专辑中的反战歌词与唱片公司发生争执。
items.storiesEn: The album took two years to record; Jackson's perfectionism led to hundreds of retakes of the same melody. The 'Scream' music video cost $7 million, a record at the time. Jackson also clashed with the label over anti-war lyrics.
items.historicalImpactZh: 成为1995年全球最畅销专辑之一，巩固了Jackson作为流行之王的地位，其社会批判主题影响了后续流行艺人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: It became one of the best-selling albums globally in 1995, cementing Jackson's status as the King of Pop, and its social critique influenced subsequent pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson是美国歌手、舞者及慈善家，被誉为‘流行音乐之王’。他5岁出道，以《Thriller》等专辑革新了音乐产业，并在全球推动人道主义事业，是20世纪最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the 'King of Pop'. Debuting at age 5, he revolutionized the music industry with albums like Thriller and promoted humanitarian causes globally, becoming one of the most influential artists of the 20th century.

items.name: Not That Kind
items.descriptionZh: 《Not That Kind》是Anastacia的首张专辑，风格以流行摇滚、灵魂和R&B为主，核心特色是她极具爆发力的嗓音和积极向上的歌词。专辑融合了舞曲节奏与抒情段落，展现了她在流行和成人当代领域的跨界能力。
items.descriptionEn: Not That Kind is Anastacia's debut album, blending pop rock, soul, and R&B. Its core features are her explosive vocal power and uplifting lyrics, combining dance rhythms with ballads, showcasing her crossover appeal in pop and adult contemporary.
items.storiesZh: Anastacia最初因健康问题（克罗恩病）险些放弃音乐，但康复后她凭借Demo赢得唱片合约。专辑同名主打歌灵感来自她拒绝被他人定义的真实经历，录制时她坚持一次完成人声以保留情感冲击力。
items.storiesEn: Anastacia almost quit music due to Crohn's disease, but after recovery, her demo won a record deal. The title track was inspired by her refusal to be defined by others; she insisted on recording vocals in one take to preserve emotional impact.
items.artistIntroZh: Anastacia是美国歌手兼词曲作者，以浑厚有力的嗓音著称。她在2000年代初期凭借多张白金专辑成为国际巨星，同时是克罗恩病研究的积极倡导者，展现了音乐之外的坚韧品格。
items.artistIntroEn: Anastacia is an American singer-songwriter known for her powerful, husky voice. She became an international star in the early 2000s with multi-platinum albums and is an active advocate for Crohn's disease research, demonstrating resilience beyond music.

items.name: Feelings
items.descriptionZh: 《Feelings》是David Byrne的第三张个人专辑，风格融合世界音乐、实验摇滚和电子元素，核心特色是奇异的节奏结构、非传统歌词以及对人类情感的抽象探索。专辑充满了Byrne标志性的智性幽默和艺术野心。
items.descriptionEn: Feelings is David Byrne's third solo album, blending world music, experimental rock, and electronic elements. Its core features are quirky rhythmic structures, unconventional lyrics, and an abstract exploration of human emotions, filled with Byrne's intellectual humor and artistic ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约和洛杉矶，Byrne邀请了多位实验音乐人合作，包括Brian Eno的旧友。他曾在采访中透露，专辑标题《Feelings》是对流行音乐中情感表达套路的反讽，录制时他刻意使用不和谐音来制造‘不舒服’的聆听体验。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in New York and Los Angeles, Byrne collaborated with experimental musicians, including old friends of Brian Eno. He revealed the title Feelings was an ironic take on pop music's emotional clichés, deliberately using dissonance to create an 'uncomfortable' listening experience.
items.artistIntroZh: David Byrne是苏格兰裔美国音乐家、艺术家，Talking Heads乐队主唱兼吉他手。他以先锋音乐、跨媒体艺术和电影配乐闻名，作品常探讨城市生活与人类行为，是后朋克和艺术摇滚的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: David Byrne is a Scottish-American musician and artist, lead singer and guitarist of Talking Heads. Known for avant-garde music, multimedia art, and film scores, his work often explores urban life and human behavior, making him a key figure in post-punk and art rock.

items.name: Rise and Fall, Rage and Grace
items.descriptionZh: 《Rise and Fall, Rage and Grace》是The Offspring的第七张专辑，风格以流行朋克和另类摇滚为主，核心特色是旋律化的副歌、社会讽刺歌词以及更成熟的制���。专辑在保持朋克能量的同时，融入了更多流行元素和情感深度。
items.descriptionEn: Rise and Fall, Rage and Grace is The Offspring's seventh album, blending pop punk and alternative rock. Its core features are melodic choruses, socially satirical lyrics, and more polished production, maintaining punk energy while adding pop elements and emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制耗时三年，主唱Dexter Holland在创作期间攻读生物学博士学位，经常在实验室和录音室之间奔波。歌曲《You're Gonna Go Far, Kid》的歌词灵感来自他观察到的娱乐圈虚伪现象，录制时乐队因节奏分歧多次推翻重录。
items.storiesEn: The album took three years to record; frontman Dexter Holland was pursuing a PhD in biology, juggling between lab and studio. 'You're Gonna Go Far, Kid' was inspired by his observations of hypocrisy in the entertainment industry; the band re-recorded it multiple times due to rhythmic disagreements.
items.artistIntroZh: The Offspring是一支美国朋克摇滚乐队，1987年成立于加利福尼亚州。他们以朗朗上口的旋律和讽刺歌词著称，在90年代朋克复兴浪潮中脱颖而出，全球销量超过4000万张，是流行朋克流派的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Offspring is an American punk rock band formed in California in 1987. Known for catchy melodies and satirical lyrics, they rose to prominence during the 90s punk revival, selling over 40 million albums worldwide, and are a representative of the pop punk genre.

items.name: Cryptic Writings
items.descriptionZh: 《Cryptic Writings》是美国重金属乐队Megadeth的第八张录音室专辑，风格上延续了前作《Youthanasia》的旋律化倾向，同时保留了鞭挞金属的锋利感。核心特色在于吉他Riff更加简洁直接，主唱Dave Mustaine的嗓音更具叙事性，整体氛围冷峻而富有层次，被视为乐队商业化转型的成熟之作。
items.descriptionEn: Cryptic Writings is the eighth studio album by American heavy metal band Megadeth. It continues the melodic direction of its predecessor Youthanasia while retaining thrash metal's edge. The core features are simpler, more direct guitar riffs and Dave Mustaine's more narrative vocal delivery, creating a cold yet layered atmosphere, often seen as a mature commercial shift.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，吉他手Marty Friedman贡献了大量富有异域风情的旋律，尤其是《She-Wolf》中的中东风格独奏。Dave Mustaine曾透露，专辑名《Cryptic Writings》源于他在排练时随手写下的潦草歌词，队友们戏称其为“神秘字迹”。制作人Dann Huff为了追求更清晰的音色，要求乐队多次重录节奏吉他部分，导致预算超支。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist Marty Friedman contributed many exotic melodies, notably the Middle Eastern-style solo in 'She-Wolf.' Dave Mustaine revealed the album title came from his scribbled lyrics during rehearsals, which bandmates jokingly called 'cryptic writings.' Producer Dann Huff demanded multiple re-recordings of rhythm guitar parts for a cleaner sound, causing budget overruns.
items.artistIntroZh: Megadeth由Dave Mustaine于1983年创立，是与Metallica、Slayer、Anthrax并称的“鞭挞金属四巨头”之一。乐队以复杂的吉他编曲、政治讽刺歌词和Mustaine独特的尖锐嗓音著称，全球销量超过3800万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Megadeth was founded by Dave Mustaine in 1983, one of the 'Big Four' thrash metal bands alongside Metallica, Slayer, and Anthrax. Known for complex guitar arrangements, politically charged lyrics, and Mustaine's distinctive snarl, they have sold over 38 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Mirage
items.descriptionZh: 《Mirage》是Fleetwood Mac的第13张录音室专辑，风格回归乐队70年代中期的软摇滚与流行摇滚路线，减少了实验性元素。核心特色是Lindsey Buckingham精湛的吉他编曲与Christine McVie、Stevie Nicks交织的动人和声，整体听感温暖流畅，充满加州阳光般的惬意氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Mirage is Fleetwood Mac's 13th studio album, returning to the soft rock and pop rock sound of their mid-70s heyday with fewer experimental elements. Its core features Lindsey Buckingham's masterful guitar work and the intertwining harmonies of Christine McVie and Stevie Nicks, creating a warm, flowing, California-sunshine vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员间的紧张关系因药物滥用和情感纠葛而加剧。Stevie Nicks和Lindsey Buckingham在录音室爆发激烈争吵，但两人后来承认这种冲突反而催生了《Gypsy》等歌曲的深情演绎。制作人Richard Dashut回忆，为了捕捉完美的鼓声，Mick Fleetwood在录音棚里连续敲了12个小时，直到鼓皮破裂。
items.storiesEn: During recording, tensions among band members escalated due to substance abuse and romantic entanglements. Stevie Nicks and Lindsey Buckingham had a fierce argument in the studio, but later admitted the conflict fueled the emotional depth of songs like 'Gypsy.' Producer Richard Dashut recalled Mick Fleetwood drumming for 12 hours straight to get the perfect take, until his drumhead broke.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Mirage》虽然未达到《Rumours》的商业高度，但巩固了Fleetwood Mac在80年代初的巨星地位，其主打歌《Hold Me》成为电台热门，影响了后来一批软摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although not reaching the commercial heights of Rumours, Mirage cemented Fleetwood Mac's superstar status in the early '80s. The lead single 'Hold Me' became a radio staple, influencing a generation of soft rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Fleetwood Mac成立于1967年，是英国裔美国摇滚乐队，以不断变化的阵容和融合民谣、布鲁斯、流行摇滚的多元风格闻名。核心成员包括Stevie Nicks、Lindsey Buckingham、Christine McVie和Mick Fleetwood，全球专辑销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Fleetwood Mac, formed in 1967, is a British-American rock band known for its ever-changing lineup and fusion of folk, blues, and pop rock. Core members include Stevie Nicks, Lindsey Buckingham, Christine McVie, and Mick Fleetwood. They have sold over 100 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Recovery
items.descriptionZh: 《Recovery》是美国说唱歌手Eminem的第七张录音室专辑，风格从之前的夸张恐怖转向内省与自我救赎。核心特色是大量采用流行、摇滚和R&B采样（如Rihanna、P!nk），歌词聚焦于戒毒、离婚、母亲关系等私人议题，节奏紧凑有力，展现了Eminem在技术层面的巅峰状态。
items.descriptionEn: Recovery is Eminem's seventh studio album, shifting from his previous horrorcore style toward introspection and redemption. Its core feature is heavy use of pop, rock, and R&B samples (e.g., Rihanna, P!nk), with lyrics focusing on addiction recovery, divorce, and his mother. The tight, forceful beats showcase Eminem at his technical peak.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Love the Way You Lie》最初由Skylar Grey创作，Eminem听到demo后立刻被吸引，并邀请Rihanna合作。录制时，Eminem要求Rihanna反复演唱副歌以捕捉最真实的情感，Rihanna后来笑称“他比我更在意我的声音”。制作人Alex da Kid透露，Eminem曾一天内写下超过20段不同版本的歌词，最终选用了最私人化的一版。
items.storiesEn: The lead single 'Love the Way You Lie' was originally written by Skylar Grey. Eminem was instantly drawn to the demo and invited Rihanna to collaborate. During recording, he made Rihanna re-sing the chorus multiple times to capture raw emotion; she later joked, 'He cared more about my voice than I did.' Producer Alex da Kid revealed Eminem wrote over 20 different lyric versions in one day, ultimately choosing the most personal one.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Recovery》成为2010年全球最畅销专辑之一，获得格莱美最佳说唱专辑奖。它标志着Eminem从药物成瘾中彻底康复的宣言，激励了无数听众面对自身困境，同时巩固了他作为当代说唱标杆的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Recovery became one of the best-selling albums of 2010 and won the Grammy for Best Rap Album. It marked Eminem's definitive recovery from addiction, inspiring countless listeners to confront their own struggles, while solidifying his status as a contemporary rap benchmark.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）出生于1972年，是史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一，全球销量超过2.2亿张。他以复杂的押韵、愤怒的情感表达和自传式歌词著称，曾获15项格莱美奖，被《滚石》评为“嘻哈之王”。
