items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers, 1972) is one of the best-selling rappers of all time, with over 220 million albums sold worldwide. Known for complex rhymes, raw emotional expression, and autobiographical lyrics, he has won 15 Grammy Awards and was named 'King of Hip-Hop' by Rolling Stone.

items.name: Taking Over
items.descriptionZh: 《Taking Over》是牙买加雷鬼艺术家Sizzla的第十张录音室专辑，风格根植于正统的根源雷鬼，融合了舞厅节奏与Rastafari信仰的灵性表达。核心特色是Sizzla充满力量的嗓音与政治意识强烈的歌词，批判社会不公、倡导非洲中心主义，同时保持了雷鬼音乐标志性的舒缓律动。
items.descriptionEn: Taking Over is the tenth studio album by Jamaican reggae artist Sizzla. Rooted in traditional roots reggae, it blends dancehall rhythms with Rastafari spiritual expression. Its core features Sizzla's powerful vocals and politically charged lyrics criticizing social injustice and promoting Afrocentrism, while maintaining reggae's signature laid-back groove.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于Kingston的著名录音室Tuff Gong，由资深制作人Bobby 'Digital' Dixon操刀。Sizzla在录制期间坚持每天清晨进行冥想和祈祷，以确保歌词的灵性纯度。有一次，录音室停电，Sizzla索性带着乐队到街上即兴表演，吸引了数十名路人围观，这段经历后来被融入专辑的即兴段落中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at the legendary Tuff Gong studio in Kingston, produced by veteran Bobby 'Digital' Dixon. Sizzla insisted on daily morning meditation and prayer during recording to ensure spiritual purity in his lyrics. Once, a power outage forced the band to perform impromptu on the street, drawing dozens of onlookers—an experience later woven into the album's improvisational sections.
items.artistIntroZh: Sizzla（本名Miguel Collins）出生于1976年，是当代雷鬼音乐最具影响力的声音之一，以坚定的Rastafari信仰和激进的社会评论著称。他发行了���过70张专辑，是牙买加音乐界最高产的艺术家之一，全球粉丝遍布非洲、欧洲和美洲。
items.artistIntroEn: Sizzla (born Miguel Collins, 1976) is one of the most influential voices in contemporary reggae, known for his steadfast Rastafari faith and radical social commentary. With over 70 albums released, he is among Jamaica's most prolific artists, with a global fanbase spanning Africa, Europe, and the Americas.

items.name: These Days
items.descriptionZh: 《These Days》是美国摇滚乐队Bon Jovi的第六张录音室专辑，风格转向更成熟的布鲁斯摇滚和民谣摇滚，减少了华丽金属的痕迹。核心特色是Jon Bon Jovi深情而沙哑的嗓音与Richie Sambora精湛的滑棒吉他，歌词探讨爱情、失落与中年危机，整体氛围忧郁而富有诗意。
items.descriptionEn: These Days is Bon Jovi's sixth studio album, shifting toward a more mature blues-rock and folk-rock sound, shedding much of their glam metal past. Its core features Jon Bon Jovi's heartfelt, gravelly vocals and Richie Sambora's masterful slide guitar, with lyrics exploring love, loss, and midlife crisis, creating a melancholic, poetic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Jon Bon Jovi与长期合作制作人Bob Rock因音乐方向产生激烈分歧。Jon希望更真实地反映个人生活，而Bob���向于商业化的流行摇滚。最终Jon坚持己见，甚至一度将自己锁在录音室独自完成《Hey God》的录制。Richie Sambora则为了专辑中复杂的吉他独奏，每天练习6小时，导致手指起泡。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jon Bon Jovi clashed with longtime producer Bob Rock over musical direction. Jon wanted a more authentic reflection of his personal life, while Bob favored commercial pop-rock. Jon ultimately prevailed, even locking himself in the studio to record 'Hey God' alone. Richie Sambora practiced six hours daily for the album's complex guitar solos, developing blisters on his fingers.
items.artistIntroZh: Bon Jovi成立于1983年，是美国最成功的摇滚乐队之一，全球专辑销量超过1.3亿张。主唱Jon Bon Jovi以极具感染力的舞台表现和情歌创作闻名，吉他手Richie Sambora的布鲁斯摇滚风格为乐队注入灵魂。他们曾入选摇滚名人堂，代表作《Livin' on a Prayer》成为文化符号。
items.artistIntroEn: Bon Jovi, formed in 1983, is one of America's most successful rock bands, with over 130 million albums sold worldwide. Frontman Jon Bon Jovi is known for his charismatic stage presence and love-song writing, while guitarist Richie Sambora's blues-rock style adds soul. They were inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame, and 'Livin' on a Prayer' remains a cultural anthem.

items.name: Oh, Inverted World
items.descriptionZh: 《Oh, Inverted World》是The Shins的首张专辑，融合了独立摇滚、梦幻流行和民谣元素，以清新悦耳的旋律、细腻的吉他编曲和主唱James Mercer富有诗意的歌词著称。专辑整体氛围温暖而略带忧郁，如同一场关于青春与感伤的听觉之旅。
items.descriptionEn: Oh, Inverted World is The Shins' debut album, blending indie rock, dream pop, and folk with bright melodies, delicate guitar work, and James Mercer's poetic lyrics. The album exudes a warm yet melancholic atmosphere, evoking a journey through youth and nostalgia.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于新墨西哥州阿尔伯克基的一个简陋地下室，制作人Phil Ek曾笑称环境简陋到只能靠蜡烛照明。主唱Mercer在录制期间因经济压力兼职送披萨，专辑发行后却被迅速炒热，尤其因电影《花园之州》的引用而广为人知。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a dimly lit basement in Albuquerque, New Mexico, with producer Phil Ek joking that they relied on candlelight. Mercer worked as a pizza delivery driver during recording due to financial strain. The album gained massive exposure after being featured in the film Garden State.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为2000年代独立摇滚复兴的标志性作品之一，影响了后来的独立乐队如Vampire Weekend和Fleet Foxes。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a landmark of 2000s indie rock revival, influencing later bands like Vampire Weekend and Fleet Foxes.
items.artistIntroZh: The Shins是一支来自美国新墨西哥州的独立摇滚乐队，成立于1996年，由主唱兼吉他手James Mercer领衔。他们以旋律优美、情感细腻的独立音乐闻名，是21世纪初独立音乐浪潮的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Shins are an American indie rock band formed in 1996 in Albuquerque, New Mexico, led by singer-songwriter James Mercer. Known for their melodic, emotionally nuanced music, they became iconic figures in the early 2000s indie scene.

items.name: Blonde on Blonde
items.descriptionZh: 《Blonde on Blonde》是Bob Dylan的第七张录音室专辑，融合了民谣摇滚、布鲁斯和乡村音乐，以其超现实的歌词、复杂的叙事和独特的“纳什维尔之声”著称。这张双专辑被认为是Dylan艺术巅峰的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Blonde on Blonde is Bob Dylan's seventh studio album, blending folk rock, blues, and country music. Known for its surreal lyrics, complex narratives, and distinctive 'Nashville sound,' this double album is widely regarded as one of Dylan's artistic peaks.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程充满传奇色彩：Dylan在纳什维尔与一批顶级录音室乐手合作，经常在深夜创作歌词并即兴录制。名曲《Sad Eyed Lady of the Lowlands》长达11分钟，据传是Dylan为妻子Sara所作，录制时乐手们连续演奏数小时未停歇。
items.storiesEn: The recording sessions were legendary: Dylan worked with top Nashville session musicians, often writing lyrics late at night and recording spontaneously. The 11-minute epic 'Sad Eyed Lady of the Lowlands' was reportedly written for his wife Sara; the band played continuously for hours without a break.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被誉为史上最伟大的摇滚专辑之一，深刻影响了后来的创作歌手和摇滚音乐发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is often hailed as one of the greatest rock albums of all time, profoundly influencing singer-songwriters and the evolution of rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Dylan（鲍勃·迪伦）是美国传奇歌手、词曲作家，2016年诺贝尔文学奖得主。自1960年代起，他以深刻的歌词、独特的嗓音和���谣摇滚风格改变了流行音乐的面貌，被誉为“时代之声”。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American legendary singer-songwriter and Nobel Prize in Literature laureate (2016). Since the 1960s, his profound lyrics, distinctive voice, and folk-rock style transformed popular music, earning him the title 'Voice of a Generation.'

items.name: Deep Purple
items.descriptionZh: 《Deep Purple》是Deep Purple的同名专辑，也是乐队早期硬摇滚风格的奠基之作。专辑融合了布鲁斯摇滚、迷幻摇滚和古典音乐元素，以强劲的吉他riff和即兴演奏为特色，展现了乐队成员精湛的器乐技巧。
items.descriptionEn: Deep Purple is the band's eponymous album and a cornerstone of their early hard rock sound. Blending blues rock, psychedelic rock, and classical music, it features powerful guitar riffs and improvisational jams, showcasing the musicians' virtuosity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队在经历首张专辑后风格转型的关键作品。录制时，吉他手Ritchie Blackmore和键盘手Jon Lord经常在录音棚内进行即兴对决，鼓手Ian Paice的鼓点也被认为极具爆发力。专辑封面由著名设计师Hipgnosis设计。
items.storiesEn: This album marked a key shift after the band's debut. During recording, guitarist Ritchie Blackmore and keyboardist Jon Lord frequently engaged in improvisational duels, while drummer Ian Paice's powerful beats stood out. The iconic cover was designed by the famous studio Hipgnosis.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助定义了硬摇滚和重金属的早期声音，为Deep Purple后来的辉煌奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped define the early sound of hard rock and heavy metal, laying the foundation for Deep Purple's later success.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是英国传奇硬摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，与Led Zeppelin、Black Sabbath并称为“硬摇滚三巨头”。他们以精湛的乐器演奏、古典与摇滚的融合而闻名，代表作包括《Smoke on the Water》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple are a legendary English hard rock band formed in 1968, considered one of the 'Big Three of hard rock' alongside Led Zeppelin and Black Sabbath. Known for their instrumental prowess and fusion of classical and rock, their hits include 'Smoke on the Water.'

items.name: Fly from Here
items.descriptionZh: 《Fly from Here》是Yes在2011年发行的第20张录音室专辑，也是主唱Benoît David和键盘手Oliver Wakeman（Rick Wakeman之子）参与的唯一一张专辑。风格延续了Yes经典的渐进式摇滚，融合复杂编曲、多段落结构和科幻主题。
items.descriptionEn: Fly from Here is Yes's 20th studio album (2011), the only one featuring vocalist Benoît David and keyboardist Oliver Wakeman (son of Rick Wakeman). It continues Yes's classic progressive rock style with complex arrangements, multi-sectional structures, and sci-fi themes.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队经历了人员变动：原主唱Jon Anderson因健康问题无法参与，由加拿大歌手Benoît David接替。制作人Trevor Horn（曾为Yes早期成员）回归操刀，专辑同名曲《Fly from Here》长达23分钟，是乐队史上最长曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band faced lineup changes: original vocalist Jon Anderson couldn't participate due to health issues, replaced by Canadian singer Benoît David. Producer Trevor Horn, a former Yes member, returned. The title track 'Fly from Here' runs 23 minutes, one of the band's longest songs.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是英国传奇渐进式摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，以复杂的音乐结构、古典乐融合和科幻主题著称。他们是渐进摇滚运动的代表，专辑《Fragile》和《Close to the Edge》被视为经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes are a legendary English progressive rock band formed in 1968, known for complex musical structures, classical fusion, and sci-fi themes. They are icons of the prog rock movement, with albums like Fragile and Close to the Edge considered classics.

items.name: Live Killers
items.descriptionZh: 《Live Killers》是Queen的首张现场专辑，收录了1979年欧洲巡演的多场演出。专辑展现了Queen作为顶级摇滚乐队的舞台魅力，融合硬摇滚、华丽摇滚和歌剧元素，Freddie Mercury的歌声与Brian May的吉他交相辉映。
items.descriptionEn: Live Killers is Queen's first live album, compiled from multiple shows during their 1979 European tour. It captures the band's spectacular stage presence, blending hard rock, glam rock, and operatic elements, with Freddie Mercury's vocals and Brian May's guitar shining.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于Queen的“Jazz”巡演期间，乐队从多场演出中精选最佳版本。Freddie Mercury在台上经常即兴发挥，包括与观众互动和延长歌曲段落。专辑封面由著名摄影师拍摄，但乐队后来对混音效果并不完全满意。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during Queen's 'Jazz' tour, with the band selecting the best performances from multiple shows. Freddie Mercury often improvised on stage, interacting with the audience and extending song sections. The cover was shot by a famous photographer, though the band later expressed some dissatisfaction with the mix.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Queen现场能量的重要记录，为后来众多摇滚乐队的现场专辑树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a vital document of Queen's live energy, setting a benchmark for future rock live albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是英国传奇摇滚乐队，成立于1970年，由主唱Freddie Mercury、吉他手Brian May、鼓手Roger Taylor和贝斯手John Deacon组成。他们以华丽舞台、多风格融合和无数经典金曲闻名，是全球最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen are a legendary English rock band formed in 1970, comprising Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), Roger Taylor (drums), and John Deacon (bass). Known for their flamboyant performances, genre-blending music, and countless hits, they are one of the best-selling bands worldwide.

items.name: To Love
items.descriptionZh: 《To Love》是西野加奈2010年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合J-Pop与R&B风格，以轻快旋律和细腻歌词描绘恋爱中的甜蜜与苦涩。核心特色在于她清澈的嗓音与情感饱满的叙事，收录了《If》、《会いたくて 会いたくて》等热门单曲，展现了都市女性的爱情观。
items.descriptionEn: "To Love" is Kana Nishino's second studio album released in 2010, blending J-Pop and R&B with upbeat melodies and heartfelt lyrics about love's joys and pains. Its core features her clear vocals and emotionally rich storytelling, including hits like "If" and "I Miss You."
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，西野加奈为了捕捉真实的恋爱情绪，经常在录音前与制作人讨论自己的亲身经历。专辑同名曲《To Love》的歌词修改了多次，直到她在一次深夜灵感迸发时写下最终版本。此外，她曾透露《If》的副歌部分是在淋浴时哼唱出来的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kana Nishino often discussed her personal experiences with producers to capture authentic romantic emotions. The title track "To Love" underwent multiple lyric revisions until a late-night burst of inspiration led to the final version. She also revealed that the chorus of "If" was hummed in the shower.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑使西野加奈在日本乐坛确立了“恋爱教主”地位，连续两周登顶Oricon公信榜，成为2010年代女性歌手代表作之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Kana Nishino's status as the "Love Queen" in Japanese music, topping the Oricon chart for two weeks and becoming a defining work for female artists in the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈（Kana Nishino）是日本流行女歌手，1989年出生于三重县。2008年出道后以贴近年轻人恋爱心事的歌词和甜美嗓音迅速走红，代表作有《Best Friend》、《トリセツ》等，被称为平成歌姬之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese pop singer born in Mie Prefecture in 1989. Debuting in 2008, she gained fame for lyrics about young love and her sweet voice, with hits like "Best Friend" and "Torisetsu," earning her the title of one of Heisei era's divas.

items.name: Black Clouds & Silver Linings
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Clouds & Silver Linings》是美国前卫金属乐队梦剧院2009年的第十张录音室专辑，风格融合前卫金属、交响摇滚与复杂编曲。核���特色在于长达19分钟的史诗级曲目《The Count of Tuscany》以及乐队标志性的技术性演奏，情感上探讨黑暗与希望并存的主题。
items.descriptionEn: "Black Clouds & Silver Linings" is Dream Theater's tenth studio album from 2009, blending progressive metal, symphonic rock, and intricate arrangements. Its core features include the 19-minute epic "The Count of Tuscany" and the band's signature technical musicianship, exploring themes of darkness and hope.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，鼓手Mike Portnoy因父亲去世而情绪低落，将悲痛融入《The Best of Times》的创作中，该曲献给其父。吉他手John Petrucci在录制《A Nightmare to Remember》时使用了罕见的7弦吉他，并邀请儿子客串背景人声。此外，专辑封面由Hugh Syme设计，灵感来自乐队在纽约的排练室。
items.storiesEn: During recording, drummer Mike Portnoy channeled grief from his father's passing into "The Best of Times," a tribute to his dad. Guitarist John Petrucci used a rare 7-string guitar for "A Nightmare to Remember" and had his son provide background vocals. The cover art by Hugh Syme was inspired by the band's New York rehearsal space.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是梦剧院2000年代后期的巅峰之作，巩固了他们在前卫金属界的地位，并影响了后续一批技术性金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as Dream Theater's late-2000s peak, the album solidified their status in progressive metal and influenced a wave of technical metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: 梦剧院（Dream Theater）是美国前卫金属乐队，1985年成立于纽约，以复杂编曲、高超器乐技巧和概念专辑著称。成员包括John Petrucci、Mike Portnoy等，代表作有《Images and Words》、《Metropolis Pt. 2》等，是全球前卫金属的标杆。
items.artistIntroEn: Dream Theater is an American progressive metal band formed in New York in 1985, known for complex arrangements, instrumental virtuosity, and concept albums. Featuring members like John Petrucci and Mike Portnoy, their iconic works include "Images and Words" and "Metropolis Pt. 2," setting the standard for progressive metal worldwide.

items.name: LaFee
items.descriptionZh: 《LaFee》是德国摇滚女歌手LaFee 2006年发行的同名首张专辑，风格融合另类摇滚、流行金属与暗黑元素。核心特色在于她当时年仅15岁的稚嫩嗓音与歌词中尖锐的社会批判形成反差，收录了《Virus》、《Prinzesschen》等充满叛逆精神的单曲。
items.descriptionEn: "LaFee" is the self-titled debut album by German rock singer LaFee, released in 2006, blending alternative rock, pop metal, and dark elements. Its core feature is the contrast between her youthful voice (age 15) and sharp social criticism in lyrics, with rebellious singles like "Virus" and "Prinzesschen."
items.storiesZh: LaFee在录制时年仅14-15岁，制作人Bob Arnz最初对她的成熟歌词感到惊讶。专辑中《Prinzesschen》讲述了一个被宠坏的女孩的故事，灵感来自LaFee在学校观察到的现象。由于她当时还在上学，录音常安排在放学后进行，有时甚至需要调整课程表。
items.storiesEn: LaFee was only 14-15 during recording, and producer Bob Arnz was initially shocked by her mature lyrics. "Prinzesschen" was inspired by spoiled girls she observed at school. Since she was still a student, recording sessions often happened after school, sometimes requiring schedule adjustments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在德国、奥地利和瑞士大获成功，使LaFee成为德语区最年轻的摇滚明星之一，推动了青少年摇滚的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was a massive success in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland, making LaFee one of the youngest rock stars in German-speaking regions and boosting teen rock popularity.
items.artistIntroZh: LaFee（本名Christina Klein）是德国摇滚女歌手，1990年出生于德国施托尔贝格。12岁参加歌唱比赛出道，以暗黑摇滚风格和批判社会议题的歌词闻名，代表作有《Virus》、《Heul doch》等，是德语乐坛的另类偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: LaFee (born Christina Klein) is a German rock singer born in Stolberg in 1990. She debuted after winning a singing contest at age 12, known for dark rock style and socially critical lyrics, with hits like "Virus" and "Heul doch," becoming an alternative icon in German music.

items.name: Friends
items.descriptionZh: 《Friends》是美国摇滚乐队海滩男孩1968年的第14张录音室专辑，风格以阳光流行、迷幻摇滚和巴洛克流行为主。核心特色在于其轻松愉快的氛围和和声编排，专辑概念围绕友谊与夏日时光，是乐队从早期冲浪摇滚向更复杂音乐实验过渡的作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Friends" is The Beach Boys' 14th studio album from 1968, blending sunshine pop, psychedelic rock, and baroque pop. Its core features are its breezy, joyful atmosphere and intricate harmonies, centered on friendship and summer themes, marking the band's transition from surf rock to more experimental sounds.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队成员Brian Wilson正处于精神健康低谷，但专辑的轻松风格部分源于他尝试通过音乐自我疗愈。专辑同名曲《Friends》的录制非常随性，Brian在录音室即兴弹奏钢琴，其他成员加入和声。此外，专辑封面在夏威夷拍摄，成员们穿着休闲装，展现自然友情。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Brian Wilson was struggling with mental health, but the album's lighthearted style partly stemmed from his attempt at self-healing through music. The title track "Friends" was recorded spontaneously—Brian improvised on piano while others joined in harmonies. The cover was shot in Hawaii, with members in casual wear, showcasing natural camaraderie.
items.artistIntroZh: 海滩男孩（The Beach Boys）是美国传奇摇滚乐队，1961年成立于加利福尼亚州，以多声部和声和冲浪摇滚闻名。核心成员包括Brian Wilson、Mike Love等，代表作有《Good Vibrations》、《Surfin' USA》等，被誉为美国最伟大的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys are an iconic American rock band formed in California in 1961, famous for their vocal harmonies and surf rock. Key members include Brian Wilson and Mike Love, with classics like "Good Vibrations" and "Surfin' USA," hailed as one of America's greatest bands.

items.name: The Soft Parade
items.descriptionZh: 《The Soft Parade》是美国摇滚乐队大门乐队1969年的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合迷幻摇滚、布鲁斯摇滚与管弦乐元素。核心特色在于其华丽的编曲，大量使用铜管和弦乐，与Jim Morrison的诗意歌词形成独特对比，收录了《Touch Me》、《Wild Child》等经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: "The Soft Parade" is The Doors' fourth studio album from 1969, blending psychedelic rock, blues rock, and orchestral elements. Its core feature is the lavish arrangements with brass and strings, contrasting with Jim Morrison's poetic lyrics, featuring classics like "Touch Me" and "Wild Child."
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制中，吉他手Robby Krieger与制作人Paul Rothchild因编曲方向产生激烈争执，Rothchild坚持加入管弦乐，而Krieger希望保持吉他主导。《Touch Me》最初名为《Hit Me》，但为避嫌改名为《Touch Me》。Jim Morrison在录制时经常酗酒，导致部分录音需要多次重来。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist Robby Krieger clashed with producer Paul Rothchild over arrangements—Rothchild insisted on orchestral elements while Krieger wanted guitar dominance. "Touch Me" was originally titled "Hit Me" but was changed to avoid controversy. Jim Morrison often drank heavily during sessions, causing multiple retakes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在大门乐队商业上取得成功，但因其流行化管弦乐风格被一些乐迷视为争议之作，反映了60年代末摇滚乐的艺术分化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was commercially successful for The Doors but viewed as controversial by some fans due to its pop-oriented orchestral style, reflecting the artistic divergence of late-1960s rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 大门乐队（The Doors）是美国传奇摇滚乐队，1965年成立于洛杉矶，以Jim Morrison的迷幻歌词和Ray Manzarek的键盘音色著称。代表作有《Light My Fire》、《Riders on the Storm》等，是反文化运动的标志性团体。
items.artistIntroEn: The Doors are a legendary American rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1965, known for Jim Morrison's psychedelic lyrics and Ray Manzarek's keyboard sound. Their hits include "Light My Fire" and "Riders on the Storm," becoming icons of the counterculture movement.

items.name: Purple Rain
items.descriptionZh: 《Purple Rain》是Prince与The Revolution的巅峰之作，融合了放克、摇滚、流行和新浪潮元素。专辑以华丽的编曲、深情的歌词和标志性的吉他独奏为核心，展现了Prince无与伦比的音乐才华和舞台魅力。同名电影原声带使其成为1980年代最具代表性的文化符号之一。
items.descriptionEn: Purple Rain is Prince and the Revolution's magnum opus, blending funk, rock, pop, and new wave. The album features lavish arrangements, heartfelt lyrics, and iconic guitar solos, showcasing Prince's unparalleled musical genius and stage charisma. As the soundtrack to the同名 film, it became one of the most iconic cultural symbols of the 1980s.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Purple Rain》时，Prince常常在录音室通宵工作，甚至连续几天不睡觉。他坚持让乐队成员在一天内学会并录制完成同名曲，最终在凌晨四点完成，所有人都精疲力竭。专辑中许多乐器都由Prince亲自演奏，包括吉他、键盘和贝斯。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Purple Rain, Prince often worked overnight in the studio, sometimes going days without sleep. He insisted that the band learn and record the title track in a single day, finishing at 4 a.m. with everyone exhausted. Prince played many instruments himself, including guitar, keyboards, and bass.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑荣获格莱美奖，全球销量超2500万张，被《滚石》杂志列为史上最伟大专辑之一，深刻影响了流行音乐和黑人文化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won a Grammy, sold over 25 million copies worldwide, and is listed by Rolling Stone as one of the greatest albums of all time, profoundly influencing pop music and Black culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince（1958-2016）是美国传奇音乐人，以融合放克、摇滚、R&B和流行著称。他是一位多乐器演奏家、歌手和词曲作者，以其华丽风格、假声唱法和革命性音乐影响力闻名，被视为20世纪最具创造力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (1958-2016) was an American legendary musician known for blending funk, rock, R&B, and pop. A multi-instrumentalist, singer, and songwriter, he was famed for his flamboyant style, falsetto vocals, and revolutionary musical influence, regarded as one of the most creative artists of the 20th century.

items.name: Flowers
items.descriptionZh: 《Flowers》是The Rolling Stones于1967年发行的美国精选集，收录了1965-1967年间多首单曲和专辑遗珠。风格涵盖节奏蓝调、迷幻摇滚和流行，展现了乐队从早期布鲁斯摇滚向迷幻实验过渡的多元面貌，其中包含经典曲目《Ruby Tuesday》和《Let's Spend the Night Together》。
items.descriptionEn: Flowers is a 1967 US compilation by The Rolling Stones, featuring singles and album outtakes from 1965-1967. The style spans rhythm and blues, psychedelic rock, and pop, showcasing the band's transition from early blues rock to psychedelic experimentation, including classics like Ruby Tuesday and Let's Spend the Night Together.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由艺术家Guy Webster拍摄，原本计划在花丛中拍摄，但拍摄当天花店送错了花，导致临时改用野花和雏菊。此外，专辑中《My Girl》的录制因Mick Jagger感冒嗓音沙哑而意外呈现出更粗犷的效果，成为乐迷津津乐道的细节。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was shot by artist Guy Webster, originally planned among flower beds, but the florist delivered the wrong flowers, forcing a last-minute switch to wildflowers and daisies. Also, the recording of My Girl featured a raspier vocal due to Mick Jagger's cold, creating a rougher sound that fans still talk about.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones成立于1962年，是英国最著名的摇滚乐队之一，以布鲁斯摇滚和硬摇滚风格闻名。主唱Mick Jagger和吉他手Keith Richards是核心创作组合，乐队以叛逆形象、现场能量和经典曲目如《(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction》影响全球数代乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in 1962, are one of Britain's most famous rock bands, known for blues rock and hard rock. Vocalist Mick Jagger and guitarist Keith Richards are the core songwriting duo, with a rebellious image, live energy, and classics like (I Can't Get No) Satisfaction influencing generations worldwide.

items.name: Foo Fighters
items.descriptionZh: 《Foo Fighters》是Foo Fighters的首张同名专辑，1995年发行，风格以另类摇滚、后垃圾摇滚为主。Dave Grohl几乎独自完成了所有乐器演奏和演唱，专辑充满原始的能量、朗朗上口的旋律和有力的吉他失真，被视为1990年代另类摇滚的重要作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Foo Fighters is the debut self-titled album by Foo Fighters, released in 1995, featuring alternative rock and post-grunge. Dave Grohl played nearly all instruments and vocals, delivering raw energy, catchy melodies, and powerful guitar distortion, regarded as a key alternative rock work of the 1990s.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Dave Grohl在Nirvana主唱Kurt Cobain去世后，为了走出悲伤而秘密录制的。他在加州一家录音室里独自录制了所有曲目，仅用了五天时间。最初他只打算发行一个私人项目，但朋友鼓励下最终以Foo Fighters名义发布，意外开启新篇章。
items.storiesEn: This album was secretly recorded by Dave Grohl after Nirvana frontman Kurt Cobain's death, as a way to cope with grief. He recorded all tracks alone in a California studio in just five days. Initially intended as a private project, friends encouraged him to release it under the name Foo Fighters, unexpectedly starting a new chapter.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑推动了后垃圾摇滚和另类摇滚在1990年代中期的复兴，并奠定了Foo Fighters作为全球最成功摇滚乐队之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped revive post-grunge and alternative rock in the mid-1990s, establishing Foo Fighters as one of the world's most successful rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Foo Fighters是美国摇滚乐队，1994年由前Nirvana鼓手Dave Grohl创立。乐队以激昂的吉他、有力的鼓点和旋律性歌词著称，代表作包括《Everlong》《My Hero》等。Grohl的多乐器才华和乐队稳定的阵容使其成为21世纪最受欢迎的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Foo Fighters is an American rock band founded in 1994 by former Nirvana drummer Dave Grohl. Known for激昂 guitar, powerful drums, and melodic lyrics, with hits like Everlong and My Hero. Grohl's multi-instrumental talent and stable lineup have made them one of the most popular rock bands of the 21st century.

items.name: We Are the Night
items.descriptionZh: 《We Are the Night》是The Chemical Brothers的第六张录音室专辑，2007年发行，延续了他们标志性的电子摇滚和Big Beat风格。专辑融合了迷幻合成器、重拍节奏和客座歌手（如Klaxons、Fatlip），营造出迷幻而充满能量的舞池氛围，展现了乐队在电子音乐领域的持续创新。
items.descriptionEn: We Are the Night is The Chemical Brothers' sixth studio album, released in 2007, continuing their signature electronic rock and big beat style. The album blends psychedelic synths, heavy beats, and guest vocalists (e.g., Klaxons, Fatlip), creating a trippy yet energetic dancefloor atmosphere, showcasing the duo's ongoing innovation in electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Tom Rowlands和Ed Simons在工作室里反复试验老式模拟合成器，甚至从eBay上淘来一台损坏的EMS VCS3��修好后成为专辑声音的重要来源。此外，与Klaxons合作的《All Rights Reversed》原本是即兴jam，后来被完整保留。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Tom Rowlands and Ed Simons experimented extensively with vintage analog synthesizers, even buying a broken EMS VCS3 on eBay, which they repaired and used as a key sound source. The track All Rights Reversed with Klaxons started as an improvisational jam and was kept intact.
items.artistIntroZh: The Chemical Brothers是英国电子音乐二人组，由Tom Rowlands和Ed Simons组成，成立于1991年。他们是Big Beat流派的先驱，以融合摇滚、舞曲和迷幻元素的现场表演闻名，代表作包括《Hey Boy Hey Girl》《Galvanize》等，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: The Chemical Brothers are a British electronic duo formed in 1991, consisting of Tom Rowlands and Ed Simons. Pioneers of the big beat genre, they are known for blending rock, dance, and psychedelic elements in live shows, with hits like Hey Boy Hey Girl and Galvanize, winning multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Tonight and the Rest of My Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Tonight and the Rest of My Life》是Nina Gordon的首张个人专辑，2000年发行，风格以流行摇滚、另类乡村和民谣为主。专辑以细腻的吉他编曲、温暖的嗓音和坦诚的歌词为特色，探讨爱情、孤独与自我发现，展现了从乐队主唱转型为独立唱作人的柔美一面。
items.descriptionEn: Tonight and the Rest of My Life is Nina Gordon's debut solo album, released in 2000, featuring pop rock, alternative country, and folk. The album is characterized by delicate guitar arrangements, warm vocals, and honest lyrics exploring love, loneliness, and self-discovery, showcasing her softer side as a solo singer-songwriter after leaving her band.
items.storiesZh: Nina Gordon在录制这张专辑时，刚刚离开她担任主唱的乐队Veruca Salt，正处于事业转型期。她与制作人Bob Rock合作，在洛杉矶录音室中尝试了许多即兴创作。专辑同名曲《Tonight and the Rest of My Life》最初只是她在家中用一把原声吉他写的简单demo，后来成为专辑主打。
items.storiesEn: Nina Gordon had just left her band Veruca Salt while recording this album, in a career transition. Working with producer Bob Rock, she experimented with improvisation in a Los Angeles studio. The title track Tonight and the Rest of My Life started as a simple acoustic guitar demo at home, later becoming the album's lead single.
items.artistIntroZh: Nina Gordon是美国歌手、词曲作者，出生于1967年，曾是另类摇滚乐队Veruca Salt的主唱和吉他手。她的个人作品以情感细腻的歌词和清新的旋律著称，融合了流行、民谣和摇滚元素。除了音乐事业，她还涉足影视配乐和写作。
items.artistIntroEn: Nina Gordon is an American singer-songwriter born in 1967, formerly the lead vocalist and guitarist of alternative rock band Veruca Salt. Her solo work is known for emotionally nuanced lyrics and清新 melodies, blending pop, folk, and rock. She has also ventured into film scoring and writing.

items.name: Kinder des Himmels
items.descriptionZh: 《Kinder des Himmels》（天堂的孩子）是德国乐队Q369058于2008年发行的实验电子专辑。作品融合了氛围音乐、极简主义电子和世界音乐元素，以空灵的合成器音色和细腻的节奏层次构建出如同悬浮于天际的听觉空间。专辑整体呈现出一种超脱尘世的宁静与深邃。
items.descriptionEn: "Kinder des Himmels" (Children of Heaven) is a 2008 experimental electronic album by German band Q369058. It blends ambient, minimalist electronics, and world music, using ethereal synthesizers and delicate rhythmic layers to create a floating, celestial soundscape. The album exudes a sense of transcendent serenity and depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制灵感源于乐队成员在阿尔卑斯山的一次徒步旅行。他们在海拔3000米处录制了风声、冰川融水声，并将这些自然采样融入电子音轨中。由于设备在低温下频繁失灵，团队不得不用暖宝宝包裹器材，反而意外获得了带有细微失真感的独特音色。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by a hiking trip in the Alps. The band recorded wind and glacial meltwater sounds at 3,000 meters, integrating them into electronic tracks. Equipment frequently malfunctioned in the cold, forcing them to wrap gear in hand warmers, which accidentally created unique, subtly distorted textures.
items.artistIntroZh: Q369058是一支来自德国柏林的独立电子乐队，成立于2005年。他们以融合自然采样与电子节拍的实验风格著称，作品常探讨人类与自然的关系。乐队成员始终保持匿名，专注于声音艺术本身。
items.artistIntroEn: Q369058 is an independent electronic band from Berlin, Germany, formed in 2005. Known for blending natural field recordings with electronic beats, their work often explores humanity's relationship with nature. Members remain anonymous, focusing purely on sonic art.

items.name: A Saucerful of Secrets
items.descriptionZh: 《A Saucerful of Secrets》是平克·弗洛伊德的第二张录音室专辑，1968年发行。风格上延续了前作的迷幻摇滚基调，但开始向更具实验性的太空摇滚和自由爵士领域探索。专辑以同名长篇组曲为核心，充满混沌的噪音段落、管风琴嗡鸣和诡异的音效拼贴，展现了乐队在失去主创西德·巴雷特后的转型尝试。
items.descriptionEn: "A Saucerful of Secrets" is Pink Floyd's second studio album, released in 1968. It continues their psychedelic rock roots while venturing into experimental space rock and free jazz. The centerpiece is the title suite, featuring chaotic noise passages, organ drones, and eerie sound collages, marking the band's transition after losing Syd Barrett.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，创始人西德·巴雷特的精神状态已极度不稳定，仅参与了一首歌的创作。乐队其他成员——尤其是罗杰·沃特斯和大卫·吉尔摩——不得不临时接管创作。吉尔摩甚至边学弹吉他边录制，专辑中部分吉他声部是他首次录制的成品。鼓手尼克·梅森回忆，巴雷特有时会突然在录音室弹奏完全无关的旋律，大家只能无奈地将其剪掉。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Syd Barrett's mental state was extremely unstable; he contributed to only one song. Other members, especially Roger Waters and David Gilmour, had to take over. Gilmour was still learning guitar while recording; some parts were his first completed takes. Drummer Nick Mason recalled Barrett suddenly playing unrelated melodies, which they had to cut out.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着平克·弗洛伊德从巴雷特时代向沃特斯/吉尔摩时代��过渡，确立了乐队未来十年的实验方向。同名曲的现场演绎成为早期迷幻演出中的标志性环节。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marks Pink Floyd's transition from the Barrett era to the Waters/Gilmour era, establishing their experimental direction for the next decade. The title track's live performances became iconic in early psychedelic shows.
items.artistIntroZh: 平克·弗洛伊德（Pink Floyd）是1965年在伦敦成立的英国摇滚乐队，以概念专辑、哲学性歌词和先锋的视听演出闻名。成员包括罗杰·沃特斯、大卫·吉尔摩、尼克·梅森和理查德·赖特。他们是史上最具商业成功和艺术影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British rock band formed in London in 1965, known for concept albums, philosophical lyrics, and pioneering audiovisual shows. Members include Roger Waters, David Gilmour, Nick Mason, and Richard Wright. They are one of the most commercially successful and artistically influential rock bands in history.

items.name: Random Thoughts
items.descriptionZh: 《浮躁》是王菲1994年发行的国语专辑，也是她艺术探索期的代表作。风格以英伦摇滚、梦幻流行和另类摇滚为主，融合了主唱标志性的空灵唱腔与实验性的编曲。专辑中大量使用模糊吉他音墙、非线性旋律结构和非主流的和弦进行，营造出一种疏离而自省的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Random Thoughts" (Fú Zào) is Faye Wong's 1994 Mandarin album, a hallmark of her artistic exploration. It blends Britpop, dream pop, and alternative rock, featuring her ethereal vocals and experimental arrangements. The album employs fuzzy guitar walls, nonlinear melodies, and unconventional chord progressions, creating an alienated, introspective mood.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是王菲与制作人张亚东首次深度合作，两人在录音室经常推翻原有编曲即兴重录。张亚东回忆，王菲对歌词极其挑剔，曾因为觉得一句词“太像流行情歌”而要求词人林夕重写七版。专辑主打歌《浮躁》的灵感来自王菲在北京胡同里听到的街头艺人演奏。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Faye Wong's first deep collaboration with producer Zhang Yadong. They often discarded arrangements and improvised in the studio. Zhang recalled Wong being extremely picky about lyrics, once asking lyricist Lin Xi to rewrite a line seven times because it felt "too pop." The title track was inspired by street musicians she heard in a Beijing hutong.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《浮躁》被视为王菲从商业流行向独立艺术转型的关键作品，深刻影响了90年代中后期的华语另类摇滚和独立音乐场景。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Random Thoughts" is considered a key turning point in Faye Wong's shift from commercial pop to independent art, profoundly influencing the Mandarin alternative rock and indie scene in the mid-to-late 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲（Faye Wong），1969年生于北京，华语乐坛天后级歌手与演员。以多变的唱腔、前卫的音乐风格和特立独行的公众形象著称。她在90年代至2000年代推出多张具有开创性的专辑，是首位在《时代》周刊封面上出现的华人女歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong (born 1969 in Beijing) is a Mandarin pop diva and actress, known for her versatile vocals, avant-garde musical style, and independent public image. She released groundbreaking albums from the 1990s to 2000s and became the first Chinese female singer on the cover of Time magazine.

items.name: True Blue
items.descriptionZh: 《True Blue》是麦当娜1986年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合了放克、新浪潮和拉丁音乐元素。专辑主题围绕爱情、婚姻和女性独立展开，制作精良且旋律朗朗上口。封面上的露肩蓝裙造型成为80年代标志性时尚符号。
items.descriptionEn: "True Blue" is Madonna's third studio album, released in 1986. It features pop dance music with funk, new wave, and Latin influences. Themes center on love, marriage, and female independence. The cover image of Madonna in a blue off-shoulder dress became an iconic 80s fashion symbol.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《True Blue》是麦当娜为当时的丈夫肖恩·潘创作的，歌词灵感来自他送给她的一封情书中的短语。录制《Papa Don't Preach》时，麦当娜与制作人因编曲方向激烈争吵，最后她坚持加入一段类似歌剧的和声，成为歌曲最出彩的部分。专辑封面拍摄仅用了一小时，麦当娜在镜头前即兴摆出各种姿势。
items.storiesEn: The title track "True Blue" was written for then-husband Sean Penn, inspired by a phrase from a love letter he gave her. During "Papa Don't Preach," Madonna fiercely argued with the producer over arrangement, insisting on adding an opera-like harmony that became the song's highlight. The cover shoot took only one hour, with Madonna improvising poses.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《True Blue》是麦当娜确立流行天后地位的关键专辑，全球销量超过2500万张。它推动了80年代流行舞曲的拉丁化潮流，并强化了麦当娜作为女性自主权象征的文化形象。
items.historicalImpactEn: "True Blue" cemented Madonna's status as a pop superstar, selling over 25 million copies worldwide. It propelled the Latin-tinged pop dance trend of the 80s and reinforced Madonna's cultural image as a symbol of female empowerment.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当��（Madonna），1958年生于美国密歇根州，流行音乐史上最具影响力的女艺人之一。她以不断革新音乐风格、挑战社会禁忌和惊人的舞台表现力著称，被誉为“流行女王”。职业生涯跨越40余年，全球唱片销量超过3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (born 1958 in Michigan, USA) is one of the most influential female artists in pop music history. Known for constantly reinventing her musical style, challenging social taboos, and electrifying stage presence, she is called the "Queen of Pop." Her career spans over 40 years with global record sales exceeding 300 million.

items.name: The Game
items.descriptionZh: 《The Game》是皇后乐队1980年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格从之前的硬摇滚和华丽摇滚转向更商业化的流行摇滚和放克。专辑大量使用合成器，旋律简洁明快，节奏强劲。其中包含两首经典单曲《Another One Bites the Dust》和《Crazy Little Thing Called Love》，展现了乐队在新时代的适应力。
items.descriptionEn: "The Game" is Queen's eighth studio album, released in 1980. It marks a shift from hard rock and glam rock toward more commercial pop rock and funk, featuring heavy use of synthesizers, streamlined melodies, and punchy rhythms. It includes two classic singles: "Another One Bites the Dust" and "Crazy Little Thing Called Love," showcasing the band's adaptability.
items.storiesZh: 《Another One Bites the Dust》的贝斯线灵感来自贝斯手约翰·迪肯对迈克尔·杰克逊的《Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough》的欣赏。弗雷迪·默丘里最初并不喜欢这首歌，认为它太“迪斯科”，但后来在录音室听到混音后改变了主意。专辑录制时乐队首次使用鼓机，鼓手罗杰·泰勒一度担心自己会被机器取代。
items.storiesEn: The bassline of "Another One Bites the Dust" was inspired by John Deacon's admiration for Michael Jackson's "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough." Freddie Mercury initially disliked the song, calling it "too disco," but changed his mind after hearing the mix. The album was Queen's first to use a drum machine, causing drummer Roger Taylor to worry about being replaced by machines.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Game》是皇后乐队首张在美国登上公��牌专辑榜冠军的作品，也是他们商业上最成功的专辑之一。它成功将乐队带入80年代的新流行浪潮，证明了摇滚乐队也能驾驭放克和迪斯科元素。
items.historicalImpactEn: "The Game" became Queen's first album to top the Billboard 200 in the US and one of their most commercially successful. It successfully transitioned the band into the 80s new pop wave, proving rock bands could master funk and disco elements.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队（Queen）是1970年在伦敦成立的英国摇滚乐队，由弗雷迪·默丘里（主唱）、布莱恩·梅（吉他）、约翰·迪肯（贝斯）和罗杰·泰勒（鼓手）组成。他们以华丽的舞台表演、多元的音乐风格和传世金曲著称，是全球最畅销的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), John Deacon (bass), and Roger Taylor (drums). Known for flamboyant stage shows, diverse music styles, and timeless hits, they are one of the world's best-selling music groups.

items.name: System of a Down
items.descriptionZh: 这张同名首专融合了另类金属、硬核朋克和亚美尼亚传统音乐，以狂野的节奏、扭曲的吉他和主唱Serj Tankian戏剧性的嘶吼为特色。歌词充满政治讽刺和超现实主义意象，奠定了乐队独特而暴烈的风格。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled debut blends alternative metal, hardcore punk, and Armenian folk music, featuring wild rhythms, distorted guitars, and Serj Tankian's dramatic screams. Lyrically, it's packed with political satire and surreal imagery, establishing the band's uniquely explosive style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于加州，当时乐队仅成立四年。主唱Serj和吉他手Daron在录音室常因编曲方向激烈争吵，但正是这种冲突催生了专辑中扭曲的吉他Riff和非常规的节拍。鼓手John Dolmayan曾回忆，他们在一天内就完成了《Sugar》的录音，因为那股愤怒和能量一次成型。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in California just four years after the band formed, singer Serj and guitarist Daron often clashed over arrangements in the studio, but that friction created the album's twisted riffs and off-kilter rhythms. Drummer John Dolmayan recalled that 'Sugar' was recorded in a single day because the anger and energy were captured instantly.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为新金属运动的里程碑之一，为System of a Down后续成为21世纪初最具政治影响力的摇滚乐队奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a milestone of the nu-metal movement, laying the groundwork for System of a Down to become one of the most politically influential rock bands of the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: System of a Down是一支美国亚美尼亚裔摇滚乐队，成立于1994年。成员包括Serj Tankian（主唱）、Daron Malakian（吉他手）、Shavo Odadjian（贝斯手）和John Dolmayan（鼓手）。他们以激进的政治立场和融合多种音乐元素的风格闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: System of a Down is an American-Armenian rock band formed in 1994, consisting of Serj Tankian, Daron Malakian, Shavo Odadjian, and John Dolmayan. They are known for their aggressive political stance and eclectic musical fusion.

items.name: Sinatra Sings… of Love and Things
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Frank Sinatra在1962年发行的情歌合集，以舒缓的管弦乐编曲和Sinatra标志性的磁性嗓音为核心。风格偏向传统流行和爵士标准曲，充满浪漫与怀旧气息，适合深夜聆听。
items.descriptionEn: This 1962 collection of love songs features lush orchestral arrangements and Sinatra's iconic velvety voice. Stylistically leaning toward traditional pop and jazz standards, it exudes romance and nostalgia, perfect for late-night listening.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Sinatra与制作人Nelson Riddle的黄金合作期。有趣的是，Sinatra在录音时经常即兴改变歌词或节奏，迫使乐手们必须高度集中。据说有一次他因为录音棚的灯光太刺眼而要求重装整个照明系统，只为营造更“亲密”的演唱氛围。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during Sinatra's golden partnership with producer Nelson Riddle, Sinatra often improvised lyrics and tempo changes on the spot, keeping the band on edge. Legend has it he once demanded the entire lighting system be replaced because it was too harsh, insisting on a more 'intimate' vocal atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Sinatra（1915-1998）是美国传奇歌手和演员，被誉为20世纪最伟大的流行歌手之一。他以其完美的 phrasing、情感深度和跨界魅力定义了摇摆乐与流行标准曲的时代。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra (1915-1998) was an American legendary singer and actor, hailed as one of the greatest pop vocalists of the 20th century. His impeccable phrasing, emotional depth, and crossover appeal defined the era of swing and standards.

items.name: Countdown to Ecstasy
items.descriptionZh: 这是Steely Dan的第三张录音室专辑，融合了爵士摇滚、放克和迷幻流行，以复杂的和弦进行、讽刺的歌词和精密的录音制作著称。专辑氛围阴郁而精致，展现了乐队向更成熟爵士风格过渡的野心。
items.descriptionEn: Steely Dan's third studio album blends jazz-rock, funk, and psychedelic pop, known for its complex chord progressions, cynical lyrics, and meticulous production. The mood is dark yet polished, showcasing the band's ambitious shift toward a more sophisticated jazz sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，核心成员Donald Fagen和Walter Becker对录音质量极度苛求，曾因一个吉他音色不满意而让录音师更换了五种不同的音箱。贝斯手在录制《My Old School》时，因反复演奏同一段贝斯线超过50次而几乎崩溃，但最终呈现的律动被公认为经典。
items.storiesEn: During recording, core members Donald Fagen and Walter Becker were notoriously perfectionist. They once made the engineer swap five different guitar amps for a single tone. The bassist nearly broke down after playing the same bass line over 50 times for 'My Old School,' but the resulting groove became legendary.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Steely Dan作为录音室精品的声誉，影响了后来无数爵士摇滚和艺术流行乐队，如Radiohead和Tame Impala。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Steely Dan's reputation as studio perfectionists, influencing countless later jazz-rock and art-pop acts like Radiohead and Tame Impala.
items.artistIntroZh: Steely Dan是一支美国摇滚乐队，由Donald Fagen（主唱、键盘）和Walter Becker（吉他、贝斯）于1972年创立。他们以复杂的和声、讽刺的歌词和完美的录音制作闻名，是70年代最具智识性的流行音乐组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Steely Dan is an American rock band founded in 1972 by Donald Fagen and Walter Becker. Renowned for their complex harmonies, cynical lyrics, and flawless studio production, they are one of the most intellectually sophisticated pop acts of the 1970s.

items.name: Crescent
items.descriptionZh: 这是John Coltrane四重奏在1964年发行的专辑，以深沉、灵性且内省的现代爵士乐为核心。Coltrane的萨克斯演奏充满情感张力，节奏组配合默契，营造出一种冥想般的氛围，标志着他向自由爵士和精神性音乐的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1964 by the John Coltrane Quartet, this album centers on deep, spiritual, and introspective modern jazz. Coltrane's saxophone playing is emotionally charged, with a tightly cohesive rhythm section creating a meditative atmosphere, marking his shift toward free jazz and spiritual music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制非常迅速，仅用了一天时间。Coltrane当时深受东方哲学和宗教影响，在录音前会带领乐队进行冥想。钢琴手McCoy Tyner曾回忆，Coltrane在录制《Lonnie's Lament》时要求所有人“想象一片无尽的沙漠”，以此捕捉那种孤寂与辽阔并存的声音。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a single day. Deeply influenced by Eastern philosophy and religion, Coltrane would lead the band in meditation before recording. Pianist McCoy Tyner recalled that during 'Lonnie's Lament,' Coltrane asked everyone to 'imagine an endless desert' to capture the sound of solitude and vastness.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Coltrane精神爵士时期的代表作之一，对后世爵士乐手如Pharoah Sanders和Kamasi Washington产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a landmark of Coltrane's spiritual jazz period, profoundly influencing later jazz musicians such as Pharoah Sanders and Kamasi Washington.
items.artistIntroZh: John Coltrane（1926-1967）是美国爵士萨克斯演奏家和作曲家，被誉为爵士乐史上最具创新精神的音乐家之一。他不断突破和声与即兴的边界，从硬波普到自由爵士，留下了无数经典作品。
items.artistIntroEn: John Coltrane (1926-1967) was an American jazz saxophonist and composer, hailed as one of the most innovative musicians in jazz history. He constantly pushed the boundaries of harmony and improvisation, leaving behind a legacy from hard bop to free jazz.

items.name: It Was Written
items.descriptionZh: Nas的第二张专辑延续了首张经典的街头叙事风格，但制作更为精致，融合了东海岸嘻哈、灵魂乐采样和戏剧化的弦乐编排。歌词深入描绘了纽约皇后区的街头生活、野心与挣扎，展现了更成熟的叙事技巧。
items.descriptionEn: Nas's second album continues his classic street narrative style but with more polished production, blending East Coast hip-hop, soul samples, and dramatic string arrangements. Lyrically, it delves into the street life, ambition, and struggles of Queensbridge, showcasing a more mature storytelling prowess.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Nas与制作人Trackmasters发生了激烈争执。Trackmasters希望加入更多商业化的流行元素，而Nas坚持保留硬核街头风格。最终他们达成妥协，加入了《If I Ruled the World》这样的大热单曲。有趣的是，这首歌的副歌采样了女歌手Lauryn Hill的声音，但当时她并未署名，后来才被追认。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Nas clashed with producers Trackmasters, who wanted more commercial pop elements, while Nas insisted on keeping it hardcore street. They compromised, resulting in hits like 'If I Ruled the World.' Interestingly, Lauryn Hill's vocals on the hook were uncredited at first, only later acknowledged.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Nas在东海岸嘻哈界的地位，被视为90年代中后期匪帮说唱与意识说唱融合的典范之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Nas's status in East Coast hip-hop and is regarded as a classic fusion of gangsta rap and conscious rap from the mid-to-late 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Nas（生于1973年）是美国说唱歌手和词曲作者，出生于纽约皇后区。1994年以首张专辑《Illmatic》一举成名，被公认为史上最伟大的MC之一，以其复杂的押韵和深刻的街头叙事闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas (born 1973) is an American rapper and songwriter from Queensbridge, New York. He rose to fame with his 1994 debut 'Illmatic' and is widely regarded as one of the greatest MCs of all time, known for his complex rhymes and vivid street narratives.

items.name: People Are People
items.descriptionZh: 《People Are People》是Depeche Mode在1984年发行的精选专辑，融合了合成器流行、工业电子和暗潮风格。核心特色在于冷酷机械的节拍与主唱Dave Gahan忧郁深沉的嗓音形成强烈对比，歌词探讨人性、战争与社会压迫，奠定了乐队在电子摇滚领域的先锋地位。
items.descriptionEn: People Are People is a 1984 compilation album by Depeche Mode, blending synth-pop, industrial electronic, and dark wave. Its core feature lies in the contrast between cold mechanical beats and Dave Gahan's melancholic vocals, with lyrics exploring humanity, war, and social oppression, cementing the band's pioneering role in electronic rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《People Are People》原本是乐队为1984年专辑《Some Great Reward》录制的一首单曲，但意外成为他们在美国的首支热门单曲。录制时，乐队成员曾因合成器音色争论不休，最终Martin Gore用一台破旧的Roland JX-3P创造出标志性的尖锐前奏。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'People Are People' was originally a single for the 1984 album Some Great Reward, but unexpectedly became their first US hit. During recording, band members argued over synth sounds until Martin Gore created the iconic sharp intro using a battered Roland JX-3P.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助Depeche Mode打开了美国市场，并推动了合成器流行乐在主流文化中的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Depeche Mode break into the US market and propelled synth-pop into mainstream culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode成立于1980年英国巴斯，是电子摇滚的先驱。成员包括Dave Gahan（主唱）、Martin Gore（吉他/键盘）等。他们以黑暗的歌词和创新的电子音效闻名，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode formed in Basildon, England in 1980, pioneers of electronic rock. Members include Dave Gahan (vocals) and Martin Gore (guitar/keyboards). Known for dark lyrics and innovative electronic sounds, they have sold over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: Decadent Sounds of Faye
items.descriptionZh: 《Decadent Sounds of Faye》是王菲1995年发行的翻唱专辑，风格融合了Trip-hop、迷幻摇滚和另类流行。核心特色在于王菲空灵缥缈的嗓音与实验性编曲的结合，将邓丽君的经典歌曲解构为颓废而梦幻的听觉体验，展现了东方神韵与西方前卫音乐的碰撞。
items.descriptionEn: Decadent Sounds of Faye is a 1995 cover album by Faye Wong, blending trip-hop, psychedelic rock, and alternative pop. Its core feature is the fusion of Faye's ethereal vocals with experimental arrangements, deconstructing Teresa Teng's classics into a decadent, dreamy auditory experience, showcasing the collision of Eastern charm and Western avant-garde music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，王菲正经历与窦唯的热恋，录音室常弥漫着香烟和香水混合的暧昧气息。制作人张亚东为《诱惑我》加入长达两分钟的噪音墙，王菲即兴哼唱的呓语被保留为最终版本。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Faye Wong was in a passionate relationship with Dou Wei, and the studio often smelled of cigarettes and perfume. Producer Zhang Yadong added a two-minute noise wall to 'Tempt Me,' and Faye's impromptu murmurs were kept in the final cut.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为华语乐坛翻唱专辑的里程碑，启发了后来许多歌手对经典歌曲的实验性改编。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in Chinese-language cover albums, inspiring many later artists to experimentally reinterpret classics.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲，1969年生于北京，华语乐坛天后。以空灵嗓音和特立独行的风格著称，横跨流行、摇滚、电子等多种曲风。代表作《红豆》《传奇》等，曾获金曲奖最佳女歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong, born in Beijing in 1969, is a Chinese pop diva. Known for her ethereal voice and unconventional style, she spans pop, rock, and electronic music. Hits include 'Red Beans' and 'Legend,' and she has won Golden Melody Awards for Best Female Singer.

items.name: American V: A Hundred Highways
items.descriptionZh: 《American V: A Hundred Highways》是Johnny Cash在2006年去世后发行的遗作专辑，风格为乡村、民谣和福音。核心特色在于Cash垂暮之年沙哑而充满沧桑感的嗓音，搭配极简的吉他伴奏，歌词直面死亡、信仰与救赎，如同一部音乐自传。
items.descriptionEn: American V: A Hundred Highways is a posthumous 2006 album by Johnny Cash, blending country, folk, and gospel. Its core feature is Cash's aged, gravelly voice paired with minimalist guitar, with lyrics confronting death, faith, and redemption, serving as a musical autobiography.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的大部分歌曲是Cash在妻子June Carter Cash去世后四个月内录制的，他强忍悲痛完成了这些作品。制作人Rick Rubin回忆，Cash常常在录音间隙默默流泪，但一旦开始演唱便展现出惊人的专注力。
items.storiesEn: Most of this album was recorded in the four months after Cash's wife June Carter Cash passed away, as he pushed through grief. Producer Rick Rubin recalled Cash often silently crying between takes but showing incredible focus once he began singing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Cash与Rubin合作的“美国”系列收官之作，巩固了Cash作为美国音乐象征的传奇地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album concludes the 'American' series collaboration with Rubin, solidifying Cash's legendary status as an icon of American music.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash（1932-2003），美国乡村音乐传奇，被称为“黑衣人”。以其低沉嗓音和黑色着装闻名，作品融合乡村、摇滚、福音，代表作《I Walk the Line》《Ring of Fire》，影响无数后辈音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash (1932-2003), American country music legend known as 'The Man in Black.' Famous for his deep voice and black attire, his work blends country, rock, and gospel. Hits include 'I Walk the Line' and 'Ring of Fire,' influencing countless musicians.

items.name: Waka/Jawaka
items.descriptionZh: 《Waka/Jawaka》是Frank Zappa在1972年发行的爵士摇滚专辑，风格融合了自由爵士、实验摇滚和放克。核心特色在于复杂的编曲、不和谐的即兴段落以及Zappa标志性的讽刺幽默，吉他演奏充满技术性爆裂感，堪称前卫音乐的狂想曲。
items.descriptionEn: Waka/Jawaka is a 1972 jazz-rock album by Frank Zappa, blending free jazz, experimental rock, and funk. Its core feature is complex arrangements, dissonant improvisation, and Zappa's signature satirical humor, with explosive technical guitar work, a rhapsody of avant-garde music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Zappa刚从一次舞台袭击中恢复，下巴骨折却坚持弹吉他。标题《Waka/Jawaka》源自《绿野仙踪》的虚构地名，而长达17分钟的器乐曲《Big Swifty》是乐队一镜到底即兴完成的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Zappa was recovering from a stage attack with a broken jaw but insisted on playing guitar. The title Waka/Jawaka comes from a fictional place in The Wizard of Oz, and the 17-minute instrumental 'Big Swifty' was improvised in one take by the band.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Zappa从摇滚转向爵士实验的关键作品，影响了后来前卫爵士摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marks Zappa's key transition from rock to jazz experimentation, influencing later avant-garde jazz-rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa（1940-1993），美国作曲家、吉他手，前卫摇滚与实验音乐巨匠。以复杂编曲、社会讽刺和反主流文化立场著称，作品横跨摇滚、爵士、古典等，代表作《Peaches en Regalia》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993), American composer and guitarist, a master of progressive rock and experimental music. Known for complex arrangements, social satire, and countercultural stance, his work spans rock, jazz, and classical. Notable work includes 'Peaches en Regalia.'

items.name: Zooropa
items.descriptionZh: 《Zooropa》是U2在1993年发行的实验摇滚专辑，风格融合了另类摇滚、电子舞曲和工业音乐。核心特色在于乐队对90年代欧洲消费文化和科技泛滥的讽刺，Bono以夸张的“The Fly”角色出演，吉他音效被大量数字处理，充满未来主义荒诞感。
items.descriptionEn: Zooropa is a 1993 experimental rock album by U2, blending alternative rock, electronic dance, and industrial music. Its core feature is the band's satire of 1990s European consumer culture and technology overload, with Bono performing as the exaggerated 'The Fly' character, and heavily digitally processed guitar sounds, creating a futuristic absurdity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本只是为“Zoo TV”巡演录制的EP，但乐队灵感爆发扩展为全长专辑。录制期间，Bono每天在都柏林录音室附近的酒吧即兴写词，而Edge尝试用一台老式采样器制造出类似广播故障的噪音效果。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as an EP for the 'Zoo TV' tour, the band's burst of inspiration turned it into a full album. During recording, Bono improvised lyrics daily at a pub near the Dublin studio, while Edge used an old sampler to create noise effects mimicking radio glitches.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得格莱美最佳另类专辑奖，并推动了另类摇滚与电子音乐的融合潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album won a Grammy for Best Alternative Album and helped drive the fusion of alternative rock and electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: U2成立于1976年爱尔兰都柏林，是世界上最成功的摇滚乐队之一。成员包括Bono（主唱）、The Edge（吉他）、Adam Clayton（贝斯）和Larry Mullen Jr.（鼓手）。以宏大的现场表演和社会政治主题闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 formed in Dublin, Ireland in 1976, one of the world's most successful rock bands. Members include Bono (vocals), The Edge (guitar), Adam Clayton (bass), and Larry Mullen Jr. (drums). Known for grand live performances and socio-political themes.

items.name: Best of The Beach Boys
items.descriptionZh: 这张精选集汇集了海滩男孩1960年代最经典的冲浪摇滚与和声作品，融合了阳光、青春与复杂的多声部编曲，展现了他们从简单流行到艺术探索的转变。
items.descriptionEn: This compilation gathers The Beach Boys' most iconic surf rock and harmonic masterpieces from the 1960s, blending sunshine, youth, and intricate multi-part arrangements, showcasing their evolution from simple pop to artistic exploration.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，布莱恩·威尔逊坚持使用创新的录音技术，如多层人声叠加和实验性混响，甚至为了追求完美效果，让乐队成员反复录制同一段和声数十次。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Brian Wilson insisted on innovative techniques such as multi-layered vocal stacking and experimental reverb, even making band members re-record the same harmony dozens of times for perfection.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集巩固了海滩男孩作为美国流行音乐先锋的地位，其和声与制作手法影响了后续数代音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation cemented The Beach Boys as pioneers of American pop music, with their harmonies and production techniques influencing generations of musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: 海滩男孩成立于1961年加州，以冲浪音乐和精致和声闻名。核心成员布莱恩·威尔逊是创作与制作灵魂，乐队在1960年代成为美国最畅销的流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1961 in California, The Beach Boys are renowned for surf music and refined harmonies. Brian Wilson is the creative and production core, making them one of America's best-selling pop groups in the 1960s.

items.name: The B-52's
items.descriptionZh: 这张同名处女作融合了新浪潮、冲浪摇滚与古怪幽默，以复古科幻美学、跳跃的吉他节奏和凯特·皮尔森独特的假声唱腔为标志，营造出充满活力的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled debut blends new wave, surf rock, and quirky humor, marked by retro sci-fi aesthetics, jangly guitar rhythms, and Kate Pierson's distinctive falsetto, creating a vibrant party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 乐队最初在雅典的一家地下室排练，录制时预算极低，吉他手里奇·威尔逊使用了一把廉价二手吉他，其独特的音色反而成了专辑的标志性声音。
items.storiesEn: The band originally rehearsed in a basement in Athens. Recording on a shoestring budget, guitarist Ricky Wilson used a cheap second-hand guitar, whose unique tone became the album's signature sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑定义了新浪潮的独特分支，影响了后来的独立摇滚和另类流行乐队，如Pixies和They Might Be Giants。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album defined a unique branch of new wave, influencing later indie rock and alternative pop bands like Pixies and They Might Be Giants.
items.artistIntroZh: The B-52's 成立于1976年佐治亚州雅典市，以其复古未来主义风格、古怪歌词和派对音乐著称。成员包括凯特·皮尔森、弗雷德·施奈德等，至今仍活跃于舞台。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1976 in Athens, Georgia, The B-52's are known for their retro-futuristic style, quirky lyrics, and party music. Members include Kate Pierson and Fred Schneider, still active on stage.

items.name: No World Order
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张前卫互动式专辑，融合了工业摇滚、电子和世界音乐元素。其核心特色是允许听众通过特殊播放器重新排列曲目顺序，挑战传统线性聆听体验。
items.descriptionEn: This is an avant-garde interactive album blending industrial rock, electronic, and world music. Its core feature allows listeners to reorder tracks via a special player, challenging traditional linear listening.
items.storiesZh: 朗德格伦开发了名为“No World Order”的CD-I交互系统，但当时技术过于超前，大多数听众无法体验完整互动功能，导致专辑商业失败。
items.storiesEn: Rundgren developed a CD-I interactive system called 'No World Order,' but the technology was too ahead of its time; most listeners couldn't experience full interactivity, leading to commercial failure.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是数字交互音乐的先驱，预见了流媒体时代用户自定义播放列表和随机播放文化的兴起。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a pioneer of digital interactive music, foreseeing the rise of user-customized playlists and shuffle culture in the streaming era.
items.artistIntroZh: 托德·朗德格伦是美国多乐器演奏家、制作人，以融合摇滚、流行、电子和前卫风格著称。他1970年代单飞，曾与乌托邦乐队合作，职业生涯跨越五十年。
items.artistIntroEn: Todd Rundgren is an American multi-instrumentalist and producer known for blending rock, pop, electronic, and avant-garde styles. He went solo in the 1970s, collaborated with Utopia, and has a career spanning five decades.

items.name: Wild Dances
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑融合了乌克兰民族音乐、流行舞曲和强劲的鼓点，以狂野的喀尔巴阡山文化为灵感。鲁斯兰娜的嘶吼式唱腔和传统服饰视觉冲击力极强。
items.descriptionEn: This album blends Ukrainian folk music, pop dance, and powerful drumbeats, inspired by wild Carpathian culture. Ruslana's throaty vocals and traditional costumes create a strong visual impact.
items.storiesZh: 鲁斯兰娜为了录制专辑，深入喀尔巴阡山区采风，学习当地胡楚尔族人的传统音乐和舞蹈，并亲自参与编曲，将古老的旋律与现代电子节拍结合。
items.storiesEn: To record the album, Ruslana traveled deep into the Carpathian mountains, learning traditional Hutsul music and dance, and personally arranged the fusion of ancient melodies with modern electronic beats.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让鲁斯兰娜赢得2004年欧洲歌唱大赛冠军，将乌克兰民间音乐推向全球舞台，并带动了东欧流行音乐的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won Ruslana the 2004 Eurovision Song Contest, bringing Ukrainian folk music to a global stage and sparking a revival of Eastern European pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲁斯兰娜·雷日奇科是乌克兰歌手、舞者和活动家，以融合民族元素与流行舞曲著称。她2004年赢得欧洲歌唱大赛后成为国际明星，并积极参与社会政治活动。
items.artistIntroEn: Ruslana Lyzhychko is a Ukrainian singer, dancer, and activist known for fusing ethnic elements with pop dance. After winning Eurovision 2004, she became an international star and actively engages in socio-political causes.

items.name: Beat the Boots
items.descriptionZh: 这是一套现场专辑合集，收录了弗兰克·扎帕及其乐队在不同时期的即兴演奏和实验性演出。风格涵盖爵士摇滚、前卫摇滚和自由即兴，充满荒诞幽默与复杂编曲。
items.descriptionEn: This is a collection of live albums capturing Frank Zappa and his bands' improvisations and experimental performances across different eras. Styles range from jazz rock and progressive rock to free improvisation, filled with absurd humor and complex arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 扎帕在1991年发行这套合辑时，亲自从数百场演出录音中挑选素材，并刻意保留现场失误和观众互动，以此对抗当时过度修饰的录音室作品。
items.storiesEn: When releasing this box set in 1991, Zappa personally selected material from hundreds of live recordings, deliberately preserving on-stage mistakes and audience interactions to counter the over-polished studio works of the time.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，以融合摇滚、爵士、古典和实验音乐著称。他领导发明之母乐队，一生发行超过60张专辑，以犀利社会评论和精湛技艺闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist known for blending rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music. He led The Mothers of Invention, released over 60 albums, and was renowned for sharp social commentary and virtuosity.

items.name: Fush Yu Mang
items.descriptionZh: 《Fush Yu Mang》是Smash Mouth的首张专辑，融合了斯卡、朋克和流行摇滚，充满阳光般的活力与幽默感。其核心特色是欢快的节奏、铜管乐器的运用以及主唱Steve Harwell沙哑而富有感染力的嗓音，营造出一种无忧无虑的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Fush Yu Mang is Smash Mouth's debut album, blending ska, punk, and pop rock with sunny energy and humor. Its core features are upbeat rhythms, brass instrumentation, and lead singer Steve Harwell's raspy, infectious vocals, creating a carefree party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队曾因预算紧张而睡在录音室地板上。主打歌《Walkin' on the Sun》的灵感来自主唱Harwell在洛杉矶看到的一个关于60年代反文化运动的电视节目，他即兴写下了歌词，没想到后来成为乐队最著名的单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band slept on the studio floor due to a tight budget. The lead single 'Walkin' on the Sun' was inspired by a TV show about 1960s counterculture that Harwell saw in Los Angeles; he improvised the lyrics, and it unexpectedly became one of the band's most famous hits.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在90年代末帮助复兴了斯卡朋克风格，并为Smash Mouth后来的主流成功奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped revive ska-punk in the late 1990s and laid the groundwork for Smash Mouth's subsequent mainstream success.
items.artistIntroZh: Smash Mouth是一支成立于1994年的美国摇滚乐队，以融合斯卡、朋克和流行元素的欢快曲风而闻名。他们凭借《All Star》等热门单曲成为90年代末至2000年代初的流行文化标志。
items.artistIntroEn: Smash Mouth is an American rock band formed in 1994, known for their upbeat fusion of ska, punk, and pop. They became pop culture icons in the late '90s and early 2000s with hits like 'All Star.'

items.name: Beauty and the Beat
items.descriptionZh: 《Beauty and the Beat》是The Go-Go's的首张专辑，也是全女性乐队独立创作并取得商业成功的里程碑。风格以新浪潮和流行朋克为主，旋律动听且充满青春叛逆气息，吉他riff清脆，鼓点紧凑，歌词直率地探讨爱情与生活。
items.descriptionEn: Beauty and the Beat is The Go-Go's debut album, a milestone for all-female bands writing their own material and achieving commercial success. Its style is new wave and pop punk, with catchy melodies, youthful rebellion, crisp guitar riffs, tight drumming, and straightforward lyrics about love and life.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队成员曾因创作分歧激烈争吵，但最终达成共识。主打歌《Our Lips Are Sealed》由吉他手Jane Wiedlin与The Specials的Terry Hall共同创作，灵感来自Wiedlin与一位控制欲极强的男友的关系，歌词巧妙表达了沉默的抵抗。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members had fierce creative disagreements but eventually reached a consensus. The lead single 'Our Lips Are Sealed' was co-written by guitarist Jane Wiedlin and The Specials' Terry Hall, inspired by Wiedlin's relationship with a controlling boyfriend; the lyrics cleverly express silent defiance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是史上首张由全女性乐队创作并登上Billboard专辑榜冠军的专辑，为后来的女权摇滚和Riot Grrrl运动铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: It was the first album by an all-female band to top the Billboard 200 chart, paving the way for feminist rock and the Riot Grrrl movement.
items.artistIntroZh: The Go-Go's是一支1978年成立于洛杉矶的美国全女性摇滚乐队，最初是朋克场景的一部分，后转向新浪潮流行。��们以独立精神、 catchy旋律和现场活力著称，是80年代最具影响力的女子乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Go-Go's are an American all-female rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1978, initially part of the punk scene before shifting to new wave pop. Known for their independent spirit, catchy melodies, and live energy, they are one of the most influential girl groups of the '80s.

items.name: By the Way
items.descriptionZh: 《By the Way》是Red Hot Chili Peppers的第八张录音室专辑，风格从之前的放克金属转向更旋律化、迷幻的另类摇滚。核心特色是Flea细腻的贝斯线、John Frusciante丰富的和声与吉他层次，以及Anthony Kiedis深情而内省的歌词，整体氛围温暖而富有实验性。
items.descriptionEn: By the Way is Red Hot Chili Peppers' eighth studio album, shifting from funk metal to more melodic, psychedelic alternative rock. Its core features are Flea's nuanced bass lines, John Frusciante's rich harmonies and layered guitars, and Anthony Kiedis's introspective lyrics, creating a warm and experimental atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 吉他手John Frusciante在录制期间沉迷于电子音乐和合成器，影响了专辑的音色。主打歌《By the Way》的副歌部分原本是一段即兴哼唱，Frusciante坚持将其保留，最终成为标志性段落。Flea曾开玩��说，这张专辑让他学会了如何“安静地弹贝斯”。
items.storiesEn: Guitarist John Frusciante became obsessed with electronic music and synthesizers during recording, influencing the album's sound. The chorus of the title track 'By the Way' was originally a spontaneous hum; Frusciante insisted on keeping it, and it became iconic. Flea joked that the album taught him how to 'play bass quietly.'
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers是一支1983年成立于洛杉矶的美国摇滚乐队，以融合放克、朋克和另类摇滚的独特风格闻名。他们以狂野的舞台表演、Flea的贝斯技巧和不断演变的音乐风格成为全球最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Red Hot Chili Peppers are an American rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1983, known for blending funk, punk, and alternative rock. With wild stage shows, Flea's bass virtuosity, and evolving sound, they became one of the world's most successful bands.

items.name: Fireball
items.descriptionZh: 《Fireball》是Deep Purple的第五张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从早期迷幻硬摇滚向更重、更即兴的硬摇滚风格过渡。核心特色是Jon Lord轰鸣的哈蒙德风琴、Ritchie Blackmore尖锐的吉他、Ian Gillan高亢的嗓音以及快速紧凑的节奏组，充满侵���性和技术性。
items.descriptionEn: Fireball is Deep Purple's fifth studio album, marking a transition from early psychedelic hard rock to a heavier, more improvisational style. Its core features are Jon Lord's roaring Hammond organ, Ritchie Blackmore's piercing guitar, Ian Gillan's soaring vocals, and the tight, fast rhythm section, full of aggression and technicality.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Fireball》的鼓点部分由Ian Paice在一小时内即兴创作完成，他后来称其为职业生涯中最满意的鼓点之一。录制过程中，乐队曾因对混音效果不满意而多次重录，Blackmore甚至用吉他砸坏了录音室的调音台。
items.storiesEn: The drum part for the title track 'Fireball' was improvised by Ian Paice in an hour; he later called it one of his career's most satisfying. During recording, the band re-recorded multiple times due to dissatisfaction with the mix, and Blackmore once smashed a studio console with his guitar.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Fireball》巩固了Deep Purple作为硬摇滚先驱的地位，并影响了后来重金属和速度金属的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Fireball solidified Deep Purple's status as hard rock pioneers and influenced the development of heavy metal and speed metal.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是一支1968年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，被认为是硬摇滚和重金属的奠基者之一。他们以精湛的乐器技巧、即兴演奏和经典阵容（Mark II）的化学反应著称，代表作包括《Smoke on the Water》。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple are a British rock band formed in London in 1968, regarded as pioneers of hard rock and heavy metal. Known for instrumental virtuosity, improvisation, and the chemistry of their classic Mark II lineup, they are famous for songs like 'Smoke on the Water.'

items.name: Parachutes
items.descriptionZh: 《Parachutes》是酷玩乐队的首张录音室专辑，于2000年7月发行。这张专辑以柔和、空灵的吉他旋律与主唱克里斯·马丁的脆弱嗓音为特色，融合了英伦摇滚与后摇滚元素。代表作《Yellow》与《Trouble》奠定了乐队忧郁而浪漫的基调，成为千禧年初另类摇滚的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Parachutes is Coldplay's debut studio album, released in July 2000. Featuring soft, ethereal guitar melodies and Chris Martin's fragile vocals, it blends Britpop with post-rock elements. Iconic tracks like Yellow and Trouble established the band's melancholic yet romantic tone, becoming a defining alternative rock work of the early 2000s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦与利物浦的多个简陋录音室，乐队当时几乎身无分文。成名曲《Yellow》的灵感来自克里斯·马丁某夜仰望星空时的瞬间感动，他即兴写下“Look at the stars”；而《Shiver》则源自他对另一位女歌手的暗恋。制作人肯·尼尔森用模拟磁带录制，刻意保留了大量环境杂音，反而造就了专辑特有的粗糙温暖质感。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in several modest studios in London and Liverpool, with the band nearly broke. 'Yellow' was inspired by Chris Martin gazing at the stars one night, leading to the spontaneous line 'Look at the stars'; 'Shiver' came from his crush on a female singer. Producer Ken Nelson used analog tape, intentionally preserving ambient noise, which gave the album its distinctive raw, warm texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Parachutes》在全球售出超过900万张，为酷玩乐队赢得2002年格莱美最佳另类音乐专辑奖。它成功将英伦摇滚的吉他传统与更温柔的独立情感结合，影响了后续如Keane、Snow Patrol等一大批英伦乐队，标志着2000年代英式忧郁摇滚的复兴起点。
items.historicalImpactEn: Parachutes sold over 9 million copies worldwide, winning Coldplay the 2002 Grammy for Best Alternative Music Album. It successfully merged Britpop guitar traditions with tender indie emotions, influencing a wave of later British bands like Keane and Snow Patrol, marking the revival of melancholic British rock in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 酷玩乐队成立于1996年的伦敦，由主唱克里斯·马丁、吉他手强尼·巴克兰、贝斯手盖·贝里曼和鼓手威尔·查平组成。他们从大学校园起步，凭借《Parachutes》迅速崛起为全球现象级乐队。以情感充沛的旋律与宏大的现场表演著称，至今已获七项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Coldplay formed in 1996 in London, comprising Chris Martin (vocals), Jonny Buckland (guitar), Guy Berryman (bass), and Will Champion (drums). Rising from university campuses, they became a global phenomenon with Parachutes. Known for emotionally charged melodies and grand live performances, they have won seven Grammy Awards to date.

items.name: A Hard Day's Night
items.descriptionZh: 《A Hard Day's Night》是披头士乐队的第三张录音室专辑，于1964年发行，同时也是同名电影的原声带。这张专辑全部由约翰·列侬和保罗·麦卡特尼原创，展现了乐队从早期流行摇滚向更成熟创作阶段的过渡。主打歌《A Hard Day's Night》以标志性的尖锐和弦开场，成为乐队早期最著名的金曲之一。
items.descriptionEn: A Hard Day's Night is The Beatles' third studio album, released in 1964, also serving as the soundtrack for their film of the same name. Featuring entirely original compositions by John Lennon and Paul McCartney, it marks the band's transition from early pop-rock to more mature songwriting. The title track opens with its iconic sharp chord, becoming one of their most famous early hits.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称来自林戈·斯塔尔的一句随口抱怨——在一次高强度拍摄后，他疲惫地说“It's been a hard day's night”（今天真是夜以继日的辛苦）。列侬和麦卡特尼当晚便以此为题写下了同名歌曲。影片在六周内拍完以配合唱片发行，开创了“电影与专辑同步营销”的先河。专辑中《And I Love Her》的吉他独奏部分，是乔治·哈里森首次展现古典弗拉门戈影响。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from a casual remark by Ringo Starr after an exhausting day of filming: 'It's been a hard day's night.' Lennon and McCartney wrote the title track that same evening. The film was shot in just six weeks to coincide with the album's release, pioneering the concept of simultaneous film-album marketing. The guitar solo on 'And I Love Her' marked George Harrison's first incorporation of classical flamenco influences.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《A Hard Day's Night》是史上首张完全由原创歌曲构成的披头士专辑，彻底改变了唱片业对“创作者”的认知。其同名电影被视为音乐纪录片的标杆，定义了“乐队电影”类型。专辑在英美两地均夺得排行榜冠军，巩固了披头士作为全球文化现象的地位，并激励了无数年轻人拿起乐器创作属于自己的歌曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: A Hard Day's Night was the first Beatles album to contain entirely original songs, fundamentally changing the music industry's view of artist-composers. Its film became a benchmark for music documentaries, defining the 'band movie' genre. Topping charts in both the UK and US, it cemented The Beatles as a global cultural phenomenon and inspired countless young people to pick up instruments and write their own songs.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士乐队于1960年在利物浦成立，成员包括约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔。他们被誉为史上最伟大、最具影响力的摇滚乐队，以惊人的创作速度与实验精神不断革新流行音乐。从早期的“披头士狂潮”到后期的艺术探索，他们在短短十年间彻底改变了世界音乐版图。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles formed in Liverpool in 1960, with members John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Widely regarded as the greatest and most influential rock band in history, they revolutionized popular music through astonishing creativity and experimentation. From early 'Beatlemania' to later avant-garde explorations, they transformed the global musical landscape in just ten years.

items.name: Waiting for the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《Waiting for the Sun》是The Doors的第三张录音室专辑，延续了迷幻摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚的风格，但更具实验性和黑暗诗意。核心特色是Jim Morrison低沉而神秘的嗓音、Ray Manzarek风琴的迷幻质感、以及乐队对死亡、政治和神秘主义的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Waiting for the Sun is The Doors' third studio album, continuing their psychedelic and blues rock style but with more experimentation and dark poetry. Its core features are Jim Morrison's deep, mysterious vocals, Ray Manzarek's psychedelic organ textures, and the band's exploration of death, politics, and mysticism.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制因Morrison的酗酒和行为问题而困难重重。主打歌《Hello, I Love You》的灵感来自Morrison在洛杉矶日落大道看到的一个女孩，但乐队成员曾因旋律与The Kinks的《All Day and All of the Night》相似而发生争执。吉他手Krieger后来承认了相似性。
items.storiesEn: Recording was plagued by Morrison's alcoholism and behavioral issues. The lead single 'Hello, I Love You' was inspired by a girl Morrison saw on Sunset Strip, but band members argued over its similarity to The Kinks' 'All Day and All of the Night'; guitarist Krieger later acknowledged the resemblance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是The Doors首张登上Billboard专辑榜冠军的专辑，巩固了他们在60年代末的巨星地位，并推动了迷幻摇滚的商业化。
items.historicalImpactEn: It was The Doors' first album to top the Billboard 200, cementing their superstar status in the late '60s and advancing the commercialization of psychedelic rock.
items.artistIntroZh: The Doors是一支1965年成立于洛杉矶的美国摇滚乐队，以Jim Morrison诗意的歌词、Ray Manzarek独特的风琴音色和融合迷幻、布鲁斯、爵士的风格闻名。他们是60年代最具争议和影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Doors are an American rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1965, known for Jim Morrison's poetic lyrics, Ray Manzarek's distinctive organ sound, and a blend of psychedelic, blues, and jazz. They are one of the most controversial and influential bands of the '60s.

items.name: Holy Dio: Tribute to Ronnie James Dio
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张向传奇重金属歌手Ronnie James Dio致敬的合辑，由多位金属界知名艺人演绎Dio的经典作品。风格横跨传统重金属、力量金属与前卫金属，充满了恢弘的吉他Riff与高亢的嗓音，展现了Dio音乐的永恒魅力。
items.descriptionEn: A tribute compilation honoring legendary heavy metal vocalist Ronnie James Dio, featuring performances by renowned metal artists. The style spans traditional heavy, power, and progressive metal, filled with majestic guitar riffs and soaring vocals, showcasing Dio's timeless appeal.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于1999年Dio的经典专辑《Holy Diver》获得白金销量后的致敬热潮。录制过程中，多位金属巨星如Yngwie Malmsteen和Doro Pesch都亲自参与，并特意保留了Dio原版歌曲的宏大叙事感。有趣的是，许多艺人在录音棚里即兴加入了向Dio致敬的手势和口号。
items.storiesEn: This album was born from the tribute wave following the platinum sales of Dio's classic 'Holy Diver' in 1999. During recording, metal icons like Yngwie Malmsteen and Doro Pesch personally participated, deliberately preserving the epic narrative feel of Dio's original songs. Interestingly, many artists spontaneously added Dio-honoring gestures and chants in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Dio逝世前最重要的致敬合辑之一，它巩固了Dio对重金属音乐不可磨灭的贡献，并激励了后来一代金属乐手。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the most significant tribute compilations before Dio's passing, it cemented his indelible contribution to heavy metal and inspired a generation of later metal musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: 多位艺术家合辑，包括Yngwie Malmsteen、Doro、Dokken等，每位都是各自领域的重金属传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: A compilation featuring multiple artists including Yngwie Malmsteen, Doro, Dokken, each a heavy metal legend in their own right.

items.name: Eliza Doolittle
items.descriptionZh: 英国歌手Eliza Doolittle的首张同名专辑，融合了流行、爵士与灵魂乐，风格轻快俏皮。她的声音甜美灵动，歌词充满少女的俏皮与生活观察，整体氛围如同伦敦午后的阳光般温暖惬意。
items.descriptionEn: The album was recorded in a small independent studio in East London, where Eliza often brought her pet dog. The producer revealed that many song ideas came from notes Eliza scribbled in cafes. The lead single 'Skinny Genes' was originally a joke about her ex-boyfriend but unexpectedly became a hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦东区的小型独立录音室，Eliza经常带着她的宠物狗一起进棚。制作人透露，很多歌曲的灵感来自Eliza在咖啡馆里随手写下的便条。主打歌《Skinny Genes》原本只是她调侃前男友的玩笑之作，却意外成为当年的热门单曲。
items.artistIntroZh: Eliza Doolittle（现名Eliza）是英国创作型女歌手，生于1988年。2010年出道即获BBC年度之声提名，以复古俏皮的流行曲风著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Eliza Doolittle (now known as Eliza) is a British singer-songwriter born in 1988. She debuted in 2010 with a BBC Sound of... nomination, known for her retro playful pop style.

items.name: Verschwende Deine Zeit
items.descriptionZh: 德国摇滚乐队Silbermond的第二张录音室专辑，风格以另类摇滚和流行摇滚为主，融合了德式抒情与力量感。歌词探讨青春、时间与自我反思，旋律朗朗上口，充满情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: The album title 'Verschwende Deine Zeit' (Waste Your Time) came from lead singer Stefanie's insight during a late-night walk. The band set up a temporary studio in a Berlin abandoned factory to capture a raw, authentic sound. Drummer Andreas injured his leg during recording but insisted on completing all drum tracks on one leg.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Verschwende Deine Zeit》（浪费你的时间）来源于主唱Stefanie在一次深夜散步中的感悟。录制时，乐队特意在柏林一座废弃工厂内搭建临时录音室，以捕捉粗糙而真实的声场。鼓手Andreas在录制期间意外摔伤，但坚持用单腿完成了所有鼓轨。
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在德国获得白金认证，成为2000年代德国另类摇滚的标志性作品之一，推动德语摇滚重回主流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved platinum status in Germany, becoming a landmark work of 2000s German alternative rock and helping push German-language rock back into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Silbermond是来自德国萨克森州的摇滚乐队，成立于1998年。主唱Stefanie Kloß以极具爆发力的嗓音闻名，乐队是当代德语摇滚的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Silbermond is a rock band from Saxony, Germany, formed in 1998. Lead singer Stefanie Kloß is known for her explosive vocals; the band is a representative of contemporary German-language rock.

items.name: Queen
items.descriptionZh: Queen的首张同名专辑，奠定了他们华丽摇滚与硬摇滚融合的独特风格。音乐充满戏剧性的编曲、复杂的和声与吉他独奏，展现了乐队早期的实验精神与非凡才华。
items.descriptionEn: Recorded at Trident Studios in 1972 with a very limited budget, many instruments were borrowed. Guitarist Brian May used his homemade guitar 'Red Special' for most tracks. Lead singer Freddie Mercury consumed plenty of honey and lemon water to soothe his throat while recording 'Keep Yourself Alive'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1972年的Trident Studios，当时乐队预算极其有限，许多乐器都是借来的。吉他手Brian May用他自制的吉他“Red Special”录制了大部分音轨。主唱Freddie Mercury在录制《Keep Yourself Alive》时，因为嗓子不适，喝了不少蜂蜜和柠檬水才完成。
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑宣告了Queen的诞生，为日后摇滚史上最伟大的乐队之一奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album announced the birth of Queen, laying the foundation for one of the greatest rock bands in history.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是英国传奇摇滚乐队，1970年成立于伦敦。成员包括Freddie Mercury、Brian May、Roger Taylor和John Deacon，以其独特的风格和震撼的现场表演闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a legendary British rock band formed in London in 1970. Members include Freddie Mercury, Brian May, Roger Taylor, and John Deacon, renowned for their unique style and electrifying live performances.

items.name: All Summer Long
items.descriptionZh: The Beach Boys的第七张录音室专辑，完美捕捉了1960年代美国冲浪文化的夏日精髓。风格以阳光流行和冲浪摇滚为主，和声甜美、节奏轻快，充满了无忧无虑的青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: During recording, Brian Wilson was experiencing creative anxiety but still insisted on adding complex harmonies. Interestingly, to create a real summer vibe, the band spread sand in the studio and played ocean wave sounds as background. The guitar solo on 'All Summer Long' was the result of Carl Wilson's spontaneous improvisation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Brian Wilson正经历创作焦虑，但他依然坚持为歌曲加入复杂的和声编排。有趣的是，为了营造真实的夏日氛围，乐队在录音棚里撒满了沙子，并播放海浪声的背景音。主打歌《All Summer Long》的吉他独奏是Carl Wilson一次即兴弹奏的成果。
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑定义了冲浪摇滚的黄金时代，成为美国战后青年文化中“夏日无忧”精神的象征。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the golden age of surf rock, becoming a symbol of the 'carefree summer' spirit in post-war American youth culture.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beach Boys是美国传奇冲浪摇滚乐队，1961年成立于加州。以Brian Wilson为核心，他们以精妙的和声与阳光流行风格影响了无数后来者。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys are an legendary American surf rock band formed in California in 1961. Centered around Brian Wilson, their intricate harmonies and sunny pop style have influenced countless artists.

items.name: Q608704
items.descriptionZh: 《Supertramp》是英国摇滚乐队Supertramp的首张同名专辑，融合了前卫摇滚与民谣元素，以诗意的歌词和复杂的编曲为特色。专辑整体氛围忧郁而梦幻，展现了乐队早期对艺术摇滚的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Supertramp is the debut eponymous album by the British rock band Supertramp, blending progressive rock with folk elements, characterized by poetic lyrics and intricate arrangements. The overall mood is melancholic and dreamy, showcasing the band's early exploration of art rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程并不顺利。乐队当时面临资金紧张和人员变动的困境，主唱兼键盘手Rick Davies和吉他手Roger Hodgson在创作上多次产生分歧。专辑封面由著名设计师Paul Wakefield设计，灵感来自乐队在伦敦街头流浪时的经历。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was fraught with difficulties. The band faced financial constraints and lineup changes, with vocalist/keyboardist Rick Davies and guitarist Roger Hodgson clashing creatively multiple times. The album cover was designed by renowned artist Paul Wakefield, inspired by the band's experiences wandering the streets of London.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Supertramp的起点，这张专辑奠定了他们后续艺术摇滚风格的基础，虽未取得商业成功，但被乐评人视为前卫摇滚的遗珠之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Supertramp's starting point, this album laid the foundation for their subsequent art rock style. Though not a commercial success, it is regarded by critics as a hidden gem of progressive rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Supertramp是一支成立于1969年的英国摇滚乐队，以精妙的旋律、复杂的编曲和哲学性的歌词著称。核心成员Rick Davies和Roger Hodgson共同创作了多首经典作品，乐队在70年代末达到巅峰。
items.artistIntroEn: Supertramp is a British rock band formed in 1969, known for their intricate melodies, complex arrangements, and philosophical lyrics. Core members Rick Davies and Roger Hodgson co-wrote many classic songs, with the band reaching its peak in the late 1970s.

items.name: The Greatest Story Ever Told
items.descriptionZh: 《The Greatest Story Ever Told》是美国说唱歌手David Banner的第四张录音室专辑，融合了南方嘻哈、灵魂乐和福音元素，主题深刻，探讨社会正义、种族与信仰。制作精良，情感充沛。
items.descriptionEn: The Greatest Story Ever Told is the fourth studio album by American rapper David Banner, blending Southern hip hop, soul, and gospel elements. The themes are profound, exploring social justice, race, and faith. The production is polished and emotionally charged.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，David Banner深受卡特里娜飓风的影响，他的家乡密西西比州遭受重创。这张专辑的许多歌曲都是在灾后重建的背景下创作的，他将愤怒与希望融入音乐，并邀请了多位福音歌手合作。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, David Banner was deeply affected by Hurricane Katrina, which devastated his home state of Mississippi. Many songs were created against the backdrop of post-disaster reconstruction, channeling anger and hope into the music, and he collaborated with several gospel singers.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是David Banner最具艺术野心的作品，在政治意识和音乐深度上为南方嘻哈树立了新标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely considered David Banner's most artistically ambitious work, this album set a new benchmark for Southern hip hop in terms of political awareness and musical depth.
items.artistIntroZh: David Banner是美国说唱歌手、制作人兼社会活动家，��强烈的社会意识和南方嘻哈风格闻名。他出生于密西西比州，音乐中常探讨种族、贫困和正义议题，同时活跃于慈善事业。
