items.artistIntroEn: David Banner is an American rapper, producer, and social activist known for his strong social consciousness and Southern hip hop style. Born in Mississippi, his music often addresses race, poverty, and justice, while he is also active in philanthropy.

items.name: ...The Dandy Warhols Come Down
items.descriptionZh: 《...The Dandy Warhols Come Down》是美国另类摇滚乐队The Dandy Warhols的第二张专辑，融合了迷幻摇滚、噪音流行和独立摇滚。风格慵懒而迷幻，充满复古的合成器音效和扭曲的吉他声浪。
items.descriptionEn: ...The Dandy Warhols Come Down is the second album by American alternative rock band The Dandy Warhols, blending psychedelic rock, noise pop, and indie rock. The style is languid and trippy, filled with retro synthesizer sounds and distorted guitar waves.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在波特兰录制，乐队成员为了追求迷幻效果，在录音室里使用了大量老式模拟设备和效果器。主唱Courtney Taylor-Taylor曾开玩笑说，专辑的标题反映了他们每天从录音室回家后“从迷幻中降下来”的感觉。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Portland, the band used a large number of vintage analog equipment and effects pedals in the studio to achieve a psychedelic sound. Lead singer Courtney Taylor-Taylor once joked that the album title reflected their feeling of 'coming down' from the psychedelic high after leaving the studio each day.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是The Dandy Warhols突破性的作品，帮助定义了90年代末的独立迷幻摇滚场景，并为他们赢得了国际声誉。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a breakthrough for The Dandy Warhols, helping define the late-90s indie psychedelic rock scene and earning them international acclaim.
items.artistIntroZh: The Dandy Warhols是一支成立于1994年的美国另类摇滚乐队，以迷幻摇滚和独立流行风格著称。乐队名字致敬了艺术家安迪·沃霍尔，音乐充满复古未来主义色彩，代表作包括《Bohemian Like You》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Dandy Warhols are an American alternative rock band formed in 1994, known for their psychedelic rock and indie pop style. The band's name pays homage to artist Andy Warhol, and their music has a retro-futuristic feel, with hits including 'Bohemian Like You'.

items.name: Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1》是韩国歌手PSY的第六张录音室专辑，主打曲《江南Style》以幽默的舞曲风格和讽刺上流社会的歌词引爆全球。专辑整体延续了PSY标志性的欢快、搞怪电子舞曲风格。
items.descriptionEn: Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1 is the sixth studio album by South Korean singer PSY. The lead single 'Gangnam Style' became a global phenomenon with its humorous dance style and satirical lyrics about high society. The album continues PSY's signature upbeat, quirky electro-pop style.
items.storiesZh: 《江南Style》的MV拍摄仅花费了约50万人民币，却意外成为YouTube上首个播放量突破10亿的视频。PSY曾透露，这首歌的舞蹈动作灵感来源于骑马和韩国传统舞蹈，录制时他反复调整节奏，直到找到最洗脑的旋律。
items.storiesEn: The music video for 'Gangnam Style' was shot on a budget of only about $80,000, yet it unexpectedly became the first YouTube video to surpass one billion views. PSY revealed that the dance moves were inspired by horse riding and traditional Korean dance, and he repeatedly adjusted the rhythm during recording until he found the most addictive melody.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《江南Style》彻底改变了K-pop的全球传播模式，成为社交媒体时代的文化现象，并推动了韩国流行音乐在世界范围内的爆发。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Gangnam Style' fundamentally changed the global dissemination model of K-pop, becoming a cultural phenomenon of the social media era and propelling Korean pop music to worldwide explosion.
items.artistIntroZh: PSY（朴载相）是韩国歌手、词曲作者和音乐制作人，以幽默夸张的表演风格和洗脑的舞曲旋律闻名。他毕业于美国伯克利音乐学院，2012年凭借《江南Style》成为国际巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: PSY (Park Jae-sang) is a South Korean singer, songwriter, and record producer, known for his humorous and exaggerated performance style and catchy dance melodies. A graduate of Berklee College of Music, he became an international superstar in 2012 with 'Gangnam Style'.

items.name: Dreamland
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreamland》是英国传奇歌手Robert Plant的第六张个人录音室专辑，融合了民谣、世界音乐和另类摇滚，氛围空灵而深沉。专辑以梦境为主题，充满了对爱情、失去和救赎的沉思。
items.descriptionEn: Dreamland is the sixth solo studio album by legendary British singer Robert Plant, blending folk, world music, and alternative rock with an ethereal and profound atmosphere. The album explores themes of dreams, love, loss, and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Robert Plant在Led Zeppelin解散后，对世界音乐和民谣深度探索的成果。录制时，他与新组建的乐队Strange Sensation合作，在摩洛哥和威尔士等地采风，将当地音乐元素融入歌曲。Plant曾表示，这张专辑是他最个人化的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: This album represents Robert Plant's deep exploration of world music and folk after Led Zeppelin's disbandment. During recording, he collaborated with his new band Strange Sensation and traveled to Morocco and Wales to incorporate local musical elements into the songs. Plant has stated that this is one of his most personal works.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Dreamland》被乐评人誉为Robert Plant个人生涯的巅峰之作，成功摆脱了Led Zeppelin的光环，确立了他作为独立艺术家的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Dreamland is hailed by critics as the pinnacle of Robert Plant's solo career, successfully shedding the shadow of Led Zeppelin and establishing him as an independent artist.
items.artistIntroZh: Robert Plant是英国摇滚歌手、词曲作者，作为Led Zeppelin的主唱闻名于世。他以高亢的嗓音和舞台魅力著称，个人生涯中不断探索民谣、世界音乐和另类摇滚，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Robert Plant is a British rock singer and songwriter, best known as the lead vocalist of Led Zeppelin. Renowned for his powerful voice and stage presence, his solo career has continuously explored folk, world music, and alternative rock, earning multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Turmalina
items.descriptionZh: 《Turmalina》是乌拉圭女星娜塔莉亚·奥雷罗的第二张录音室专辑，融合拉丁流行、舞曲与摇滚元素，展现了她成熟性感的声线。专辑同名主打歌充满能量，歌词直率，整体风格明快且富有感染力，是千禧年初拉丁音乐的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Turmalina is Natalia Oreiro's second studio album, blending Latin pop, dance, and rock elements, showcasing her mature and sensual vocals. The title track is energetic with straightforward lyrics, and the overall style is upbeat and infectious, representing early 2000s Latin music.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，娜塔莉亚正忙于电视剧《穆尼塔斯·布拉瓦斯》的拍摄，她经常在片场和录音室之间奔波。为了赶时间，她曾在化妆间里用便携设备录下Demo，甚至有一次在凌晨三点完成拍摄后直接进棚，用沙哑的嗓音唱出了专辑中最具爆发力的歌曲。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album, Natalia was busy filming the TV series 'Muñitas Brava' and often shuttled between the set and the studio. To save time, she once recorded demos in her dressing room with portable equipment, and even went straight to the studio at 3 AM after filming, delivering the most explosive vocal performance with a hoarse voice.
items.artistIntroZh: 娜塔莉亚·奥雷罗（Natalia Oreiro）是乌拉圭歌手、演员兼设计师。1977年出生，因主演多部拉丁美洲热门电视剧而家喻户晓，同时以音乐事业获得广泛认可，曾获拉丁格莱美提名，是拉丁流行文化的重要偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Natalia Oreiro is a Uruguayan singer, actress, and designer. Born in 1977, she became famous for starring in popular Latin American TV series and gained wide recognition for her music career, receiving a Latin Grammy nomination. She is a major icon of Latin pop culture.

items.name: Better Motörhead than Dead: Live at Hammersmith
items.descriptionZh: 《Better Motörhead than Dead: Live at Hammersmith》是莫托黑德2007年在伦敦哈默史密斯阿波罗剧场的现场专辑，记录了乐队标志性的硬摇滚与重金属风格。莱米粗粝的嗓音、轰鸣的贝斯和高速的鼓点，将现场能量完整封存，是乐队后期现场实力的有力证明。
items.descriptionEn: Better Motörhead than Dead: Live at Hammersmith is a live album recorded at the Hammersmith Apollo in London in 2007, capturing the band's signature hard rock and heavy metal style. Lemmy's gritty vocals, thundering bass, and high-speed drums preserve the raw energy of the show, proving the band's live prowess in their later years.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出是莫托黑德英国巡演的收官之战，当晚莱米在台上喝掉了整瓶杰克丹尼，并即兴修改了《Ace of Spades》的歌词，调侃台下的观众。吉他手菲尔·坎贝尔的琴弦在第三首歌时断裂，他直接换了一把备用琴继续狂扫，全程未停。
items.storiesEn: This show was the finale of Motörhead's UK tour. That night, Lemmy drank an entire bottle of Jack Daniel's on stage and improvised lyrics for 'Ace of Spades,' teasing the crowd. Guitarist Phil Campbell broke a string during the third song, grabbed a spare guitar, and kept shredding without missing a beat.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为莫托黑德后期最重要的现场记录之一，这张专辑为乐队在21世纪的重金属复兴浪潮中巩固了传奇地位，激励了无数新生代金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of Motörhead's most important live documents from their later period, this album solidified their legendary status in the 21st-century heavy metal revival, inspiring countless new-generation metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: 莫托黑德（Motörhead）是英国传奇重金属/硬摇滚乐队，1975年由伊恩·“莱米”·基尔米斯特创立。以莱米标志性的贝斯音色和粗犷唱腔著称，乐队影响了朋克、金属和摇滚多个流派，至今仍是摇滚史上最具反叛精神的象征之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Motörhead is a legendary British heavy metal/hard rock band founded in 1975 by Ian 'Lemmy' Kilmister. Known for Lemmy's signature bass sound and gritty vocals, the band influenced punk, metal, and rock genres, remaining one of the most rebellious symbols in rock history.

items.name: Shades of Deep Purple
items.descriptionZh: 《Shades of Deep Purple》是深紫乐队的首张录音室专辑，1968年发行，风格以迷幻摇滚和前卫摇滚为主，融合了古典音乐元素与即兴演奏。专辑中长达8分钟的《April》展现了乐队早期对复杂结构和氛围营造的探索，是迷幻时代的重要遗珠。
items.descriptionEn: Shades of Deep Purple is Deep Purple's debut studio album, released in 1968. It features psychedelic and progressive rock, blending classical music elements with improvisation. The 8-minute track 'April' showcases the band's early exploration of complex structures and atmosphere, making it a hidden gem of the psychedelic era.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，乐队成员对专辑方向存在严重分歧：键盘手乔恩·洛德希望加入更多古典乐段，而吉他手里奇·布莱克摩尔则倾向布鲁斯摇滚。最后他们达成妥协，在《And the Address》中同时保留了管风琴独奏和激烈的吉他riff，成就了专辑的独特声音。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band had serious disagreements about direction: keyboardist Jon Lord wanted more classical passages, while guitarist Ritchie Blackmore leaned toward blues rock. They compromised by keeping both the organ solo and aggressive guitar riff in 'And the Address,' creating the album's unique sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为深紫的起点，这张专辑奠定了他们融合古典与摇滚的基调，为后来的硬摇滚巨作《In Rock》铺平了道路，是英国前卫摇滚发展的重要里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Deep Purple's starting point, this album established their blend of classical and rock, paving the way for their hard rock masterpiece 'In Rock,' and is a key milestone in British progressive rock development.
items.artistIntroZh: 深紫（Deep Purple）是英国摇滚乐队，1968年成立，与齐柏林飞艇、黑色安息日并称为重金属音乐三大先驱。乐队以高超的演奏技巧和古典-摇滚融合风格闻名，代表作《Smoke on the Water》的riff是摇滚史上最著名的吉他段落之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple is a British rock band formed in 1968, regarded as one of the 'Big Three' pioneers of heavy metal alongside Led Zeppelin and Black Sabbath. Known for their virtuosic playing and classical-rock fusion, their riff from 'Smoke on the Water' is one of the most famous guitar riffs in rock history.

items.name: Dreaming of You
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreaming of You》是赛琳娜（Selena）的第五张录音室专辑，也是她去世后发行的遗作。专辑融合了拉丁流行、Tejano音乐与流行舞曲，展现了赛琳娜跨越语言与文化的魅力。同名主打歌《Dreaming of You》是首温柔的英语情歌，成为她最经典的遗世之作。
items.descriptionEn: Dreaming of You is Selena's fifth studio album and her posthumous release. It blends Latin pop, Tejano music, and pop dance, showcasing Selena's cross-cultural appeal. The title track 'Dreaming of You' is a tender English-language ballad, becoming her most iconic posthumous song.
items.storiesZh: 赛琳娜原计划在1995年春天发行这张专辑，并亲自参与了歌曲《I Could Fall in Love》的录制。然而在专辑完成前一个月，她被枪杀。制作人不得不使用她生前录好的demo和未完成的人声，在混音中保留了她的原声，以最真实的方式呈现她的声音。
items.storiesEn: Selena originally planned to release this album in spring 1995 and personally recorded the song 'I Could Fall in Love.' However, a month before completion, she was shot. The producers had to use her pre-recorded demos and unfinished vocals, preserving her original takes in the mix to present her voice in the most authentic way.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在美国公告牌200强专辑榜空降第一，是首张由拉丁女歌手获得的冠军专辑，极大推动了Tejano音乐在全球的流行，并让赛琳娜成为拉丁裔社区的文化象征。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, the first album by a Latin female artist to do so. It greatly boosted the global popularity of Tejano music and made Selena a cultural icon for the Latino community.
items.artistIntroZh: 赛琳娜（Selena Quintanilla）是美国拉丁歌手、词曲作者和时尚偶像，被誉为“Tejano音乐女王”。1971年出生，1995年遭枪击身亡，年仅23岁。她的音乐融合了墨西哥民谣、流行和舞曲，至今仍影响无数拉丁音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Selena Quintanilla was an American Latin singer, songwriter, and fashion icon, known as the 'Queen of Tejano Music.' Born in 1971, she was shot and killed in 1995 at age 23. Her music blends Mexican folk, pop, and dance, continuing to influence countless Latin artists.

items.name: Dreaming of You
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreaming of You》是苏泽特·金塔尼利亚（Suzette Quintanilla）的同名专辑，作为赛琳娜的姐姐，她以鼓手身份参与其中，并尝试用个人视角重新诠释赛琳娜的遗作。专辑风格偏向流行摇滚，融入了拉丁节奏与电子元素，是对妹妹的深情纪念。
items.descriptionEn: Dreaming of You is Suzette Quintanilla's self-titled album. As Selena's sister and former drummer, she reinterprets Selena's posthumous works from a personal perspective. The album leans toward pop rock, blending Latin rhythms and electronic elements, serving as a heartfelt tribute to her sister.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，苏泽特常常在录音棚里流泪，因为每一首歌都让她想起赛琳娜。她特意保留了赛琳娜原版中的人声采样，并在《Dreaming of You》中加入了自己用西班牙语念出的童年回忆片段，将姐妹情谊融入音乐中。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album, Suzette often cried in the studio because every song reminded her of Selena. She deliberately kept vocal samples from Selena's original recordings and added her own Spanish-spoken childhood memories to 'Dreaming of You,' weaving sisterly bond into the music.
items.artistIntroZh: 苏泽特·金塔尼利亚（Suzette Quintanilla）是美国音乐人，赛琳娜的姐姐和原乐队鼓手。她在赛琳娜去世后致力于守护妹妹的音乐遗产，并尝试个人音乐创作。她的作品充满对家庭的深情，是拉丁音乐家族传承的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Suzette Quintanilla is an American musician, Selena's older sister and former drummer of Selena y Los Dinos. After Selena's death, she dedicated herself to preserving her sister's musical legacy and ventured into personal music creation. Her work is filled with family affection, representing the continuation of Latin music heritage.

items.name: Anthem of the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《Anthem of the Sun》是Grateful Dead在1968年发行的实验性迷幻摇滚专辑，融合了现场录音与录音室拼贴，创造出一种迷幻、混沌且充满能量的声音景观。专辑以其非线性的结构和即兴演奏为特色，展现了乐队对声音实验的极致追求。
items.descriptionEn: Anthem of the Sun is an experimental psychedelic rock album by Grateful Dead, released in 1968. It blends live recordings with studio collages, creating a chaotic, energy-filled soundscape. The album features nonlinear structures and improvisation, showcasing the band's extreme pursuit of sonic experimentation.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程极具实验性：乐队将多个现场演出的录音与录音室片段叠加、拼贴，甚至故意让声音失真或重叠。制作人David Hassinger因无法忍受这种混乱而中途退出。部分歌曲的原始录音带曾被用于其他项目，导致母带损坏，不得不重新混音。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was highly experimental: the band layered and collaged live recordings with studio fragments, deliberately distorting or overlapping sounds. Producer David Hassinger quit midway due to the chaos. Some master tapes were damaged when reused for other projects, forcing a remix.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为迷幻摇滚和声音拼贴的早期典范，该专辑影响了后来的实验摇滚和电子音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: As an early example of psychedelic rock and sound collage, it influenced later experimental rock and electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Grateful Dead是一支美国摇滚乐队，以现场即兴演奏和迷幻风格闻名。他们活跃于1965年至1995年，拥有大量忠实乐迷，被称为“Deadheads”。乐队融合了民谣、蓝草、布鲁斯和爵士元素，是嬉皮文化的标志性代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Grateful Dead is an American rock band known for live improvisation and psychedelic style. Active from 1965 to 1995, they amassed a devoted fanbase called 'Deadheads.' Blending folk, bluegrass, blues, and jazz, they are iconic representatives of hippie culture.

items.name: The Essential Michael Jackson
items.descriptionZh: 《The Essential Michael Jackson》是2005年发行的双CD精选集，收录了Michael Jackson从Motown时期到《Invincible》的经典曲目。专辑风格横跨流行、放克、灵魂和摇滚，展现了他作为流行之王的音乐演变与全球影响力。
items.descriptionEn: The Essential Michael Jackson is a 2005 double-CD compilation featuring classic tracks from his Motown era to Invincible. Spanning pop, funk, soul, and rock, it showcases his evolution as the King of Pop and his global impact.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集是在Michael Jackson因娈童案审判期间发行的，部分乐迷认为这是唱片公司为维持其商业热度而推出的作品。专辑曲目由Michael本人参与筛选，但未包含任何新歌或罕见混音，发行后销量仍达数百万张。
items.storiesEn: Released during Michael Jackson's child molestation trial, some fans saw it as a label effort to maintain commercial relevance. Michael helped select tracks, but it included no new songs or rare mixes, yet still sold millions.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者与慈善家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以突破性的音乐视频、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和《Thriller》等专辑改变了流行文化，是20世纪最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the King of Pop. He transformed pop culture with groundbreaking music videos, iconic moves like the moonwalk, and albums like Thriller, making him one of the most influential artists of the 20th century.

items.name: Absolutely Live
items.descriptionZh: 《Absolutely Live》是The Doors于1970年发行的现场专辑，记录了乐队1969-1970年间多场演出的精华。风格以迷幻摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚为主，Jim Morrison充满戏剧性的即兴吟唱和乐队狂放的演奏，营造出炽热而神秘的现场氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Absolutely Live is a 1970 live album by The Doors, capturing highlights from 1969-1970 performances. Featuring psychedelic and blues rock, Jim Morrison's dramatic improvisations and the band's wild playing create a fiery, mystical atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑收录了著名的“Celebration of the Lizard”长篇组曲，但Jim Morrison在录制时状态起伏不定，有时醉醺醺上台。制作人Paul Rothchild不得不从多场演出中剪辑最佳片段。其中一首歌《When the Music's Over》的现场版本因观众骚乱而中断。
items.storiesEn: The album includes the epic 'Celebration of the Lizard' suite, but Morrison's performance was erratic, sometimes drunk on stage. Producer Paul Rothchild had to edit best takes from multiple shows. The live version of 'When the Music's Over' was interrupted by a riot.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为The Doors唯一正式现场专辑，它保留了乐队狂野舞台能量的珍贵记录，影响了后来的现场摇滚录音标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: As The Doors' only official live album, it preserves a precious record of their wild stage energy, influencing later live rock recording standards.
items.artistIntroZh: The Doors是一支美国摇滚乐队，1965年成立于洛杉矶。主唱Jim Morrison的诗人气质与键盘手Ray Manzarek的独特音色使其独树一帜。他们以《Light My Fire》《Riders on the Storm》等经典作品成为迷幻摇滚的象征。
items.artistIntroEn: The Doors are an American rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1965. With poet-singer Jim Morrison and keyboardist Ray Manzarek's unique sound, they became icons of psychedelic rock, known for classics like 'Light My Fire' and 'Riders on the Storm.'

items.name: Dream Evil
items.descriptionZh: 《Dream Evil》是Dio在1987年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格为重金属与力量金属。专辑以黑暗奇幻的歌词、Ronnie James Dio高亢的嗓音和快速的双吉他Riff为特色，充满了史诗般的恶魔与魔法意象。
items.descriptionEn: Dream Evil is Dio's fourth studio album, released in 1987, featuring heavy metal and power metal. It is characterized by dark fantasy lyrics, Ronnie James Dio's soaring vocals, and fast twin-guitar riffs, filled with epic demonic and magical imagery.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由著名艺术家Jeffrey Scott创作，描绘了Dio手持宝剑与恶魔对峙的场景。录制期间，吉他手Craig Goldy因与制作人意见不合而离开，但最终回归。歌曲《All the Fools Sailed Away》的歌词灵感来自Dio对当时艾滋病危机的感慨。
items.storiesEn: The cover art by Jeffrey Scott depicts Dio wielding a sword against a demon. During recording, guitarist Craig Goldy left due to disagreements with the producer but eventually returned. The lyrics of 'All the Fools Sailed Away' were inspired by Dio's reflections on the AIDS crisis.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为力量金属的早期经典之一，对后来的欧洲力量金属乐队（如Helloween）产生了影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered an early classic of power metal, influencing later European power metal bands like Helloween.
items.artistIntroZh: Dio是一支美国重金属乐队，由传奇主唱Ronnie James Dio于1982年创立。他曾在Rainbow和Black Sabbath担任主唱，以恶魔角手势和强大的嗓音闻名。乐队作品主题多围绕奇幻与神话，是重金属音乐的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: Dio is an American heavy metal band founded by legendary vocalist Ronnie James Dio in 1982. Previously fronting Rainbow and Black Sabbath, he is known for the devil horns gesture and powerful voice. Their music explores fantasy and mythology, making them key figures in heavy metal.

items.name: Master of Reality
items.descriptionZh: 《Master of Reality》是Black Sabbath在1971年发行的第三张录音室专辑，被视为重金属和厄运金属的奠基之作。风格沉重、缓慢，以降调吉他Riff、阴暗的歌词和Tony Iommi开创性的失真音色为标志，主题涉及宗教、战争与精神错乱。
items.descriptionEn: Master of Reality is Black Sabbath's third studio album, released in 1971, considered a foundation of heavy metal and doom metal. Its heavy, slow style features down-tuned guitar riffs, dark lyrics, and Tony Iommi's pioneering distortion, addressing religion, war, and insanity.
items.storiesZh: 吉他手Tony Iommi因工厂事故失去指尖，被迫手工制作假指尖并调低吉他弦音以减轻疼痛，这意外创造了专辑标志性的沉重音色。录制时乐队尝试使用大麻等药物，导致部分歌曲节奏异常缓慢。专辑封面原设计为黑色浮雕十字架，但因成本问题简化。
items.storiesEn: Guitarist Tony Iommi lost fingertips in a factory accident, forcing him to craft homemade thimbles and tune down his guitar to ease pain, accidentally creating the album's signature heavy sound. The band experimented with drugs like cannabis during recording, leading to unusually slow tempos. The original cover design featured a black embossed cross but was simplified due to cost.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Master of Reality》直接奠定了重金属的音乐语言，尤其是降调吉他和缓慢沉重的Riff，对厄运金属、泥浆金属乃至整个重金属流派产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Master of Reality directly established heavy metal's musical language, especially down-tuned guitars and slow, heavy riffs, profoundly influencing doom metal, sludge metal, and the entire heavy metal genre.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Sabbath是英国重金属鼻祖乐队，1968年成立于伯明翰。由Ozzy Osbourne（主唱）、Tony Iommi（吉他）、Geezer Butler（贝斯）和Bill Ward（鼓）组成。他们的黑暗音效和神秘歌词开创了重金属音乐，被誉为“重金属教父”。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath is the pioneering British heavy metal band, formed in Birmingham in 1968. Comprising Ozzy Osbourne (vocals), Tony Iommi (guitar), Geezer Butler (bass), and Bill Ward (drums), their dark sound and mystical lyrics created heavy metal, earning them the title 'Godfathers of Heavy Metal.'

items.name: I Can See Clearly Now
items.descriptionZh: 《I Can See Clearly Now》是约翰尼·纳什1972年发行的雷鬼风格专辑，以同名主打歌闻名。歌曲旋律明亮、节奏轻快，融合了雷鬼与流行元素，传递出乐观与解脱的情感。整张专辑充满阳光般的温暖，是70年代早期雷鬼音乐打入主流市场的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "I Can See Clearly Now" is a reggae album released by Johnny Nash in 1972, best known for its title track. The melody is bright and upbeat, blending reggae with pop elements, conveying optimism and relief. The album radiates a warm, sunny feel, representing reggae's breakthrough into the mainstream in the early 1970s.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，约翰尼·纳什在牙买加金斯顿的录音棚里与当地音乐家合作。据说，主打歌的灵感来自于纳什在牙买加经历的一场暴风雨后，看到天空放晴的瞬间。录音过程中，纳什坚持用真实的雷鬼节奏，而非当时流行的流行乐编曲，这曾引起唱片公司的担忧，但最终歌曲大获成功。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Johnny Nash worked with local musicians in a Kingston, Jamaica studio. The title track was reportedly inspired by a moment when Nash saw the sky clear after a storm in Jamaica. During recording, Nash insisted on using authentic reggae rhythms rather than the pop arrangements then popular, which worried the record label, but the song eventually became a huge success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这首歌成为雷鬼音乐在美国主流排行榜上的首个冠军单曲，为后来的雷鬼艺人如鲍勃·马利打开了国际市场的大门。
items.historicalImpactEn: The song became the first reggae single to top the US mainstream charts, opening the international market for later reggae artists like Bob Marley.
items.artistIntroZh: 约翰尼·纳什（Johnny Nash）是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，1940年生于休斯顿。他早期以流行和R&B风格出道，1970年代转向雷鬼音乐，成为最早将雷鬼带入美国主流的非牙买加艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Nash was an American singer, songwriter, and actor, born in Houston in 1940. He began his career in pop and R&B, then shifted to reggae in the 1970s, becoming one of the first non-Jamaican artists to bring reggae to the US mainstream.

items.name: The Rules of Hell
items.descriptionZh: 《The Rules of Hell》是黑色安息日2008年发行的合辑，收录了1980年代迪奥主唱时期的四张经典专辑。风格是典型的重金属，融合了黑暗、史诗般的旋律与强有力的吉他riff。这套合辑展示了乐队在奥兹·奥斯本离开后的转型期，依然保持了极高的音乐水准。
items.descriptionEn: "The Rules of Hell" is a 2008 compilation box set by Black Sabbath, featuring four classic albums from the Dio era in the 1980s. The style is quintessential heavy metal, blending dark, epic melodies with powerful guitar riffs. This set showcases the band's transitional period after Ozzy Osbourne's departure, maintaining high musical standards.
items.storiesZh: 这套合辑的推出源于乐迷对迪奥时期作品的持续热爱。有趣的是，合辑名称“The Rules of Hell”取自专辑《Heaven and Hell》中的歌词。在制作过程中，乐队成员对音质进行了重新混音，但保留了原始录音的粗粝质感，以尊重那个时代的氛围。
items.storiesEn: This box set was released due to fans' enduring love for the Dio era. Interestingly, the title "The Rules of Hell" is taken from lyrics in the album "Heaven and Hell." During production, band members remixed the sound quality but preserved the raw feel of the original recordings to honor the era's atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该合辑让新一代乐迷重新认识了黑色安息日迪奥时期的贡献，巩固了乐队在重金属历史上的多元遗产。
items.historicalImpactEn: The box set introduced a new generation of fans to Black Sabbath's Dio-era contributions, solidifying the band's diverse legacy in heavy metal history.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑色安息日（Black Sabbath）是英国重金属先驱乐队，1968年成立于伯明翰。他们以黑暗、沉重的吉他音色和神秘主题开创了重金属流派。乐队历经多次成员变动，主唱罗尼·詹姆斯·迪奥在1980年代为乐队注入了新的活力。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath is a British heavy metal pioneer band formed in Birmingham in 1968. Known for their dark, heavy guitar sound and occult themes, they created the heavy metal genre. The band underwent many lineup changes, with vocalist Ronnie James Dio revitalizing them in the 1980s.

items.name: Going for the One
items.descriptionZh: 《Going for the One》是Yes乐队1977年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格从前卫摇滚向更简洁、直接的歌曲结构转变，但仍保留了复杂的编曲与和声。专辑融合了古典、民谣与摇滚元素，情感丰富且充满实验精神，是乐队70年代中后期的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: "Going for the One" is Yes's seventh studio album, released in 1977. It marks a shift from progressive rock toward simpler, more direct song structures while retaining complex arrangements and harmonies. Blending classical, folk, and rock elements, the album is emotionally rich and experimental, a representative work of the band's mid-to-late 1970s.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队经历了重大变化：键盘手里克·韦克曼回归，取代了帕特里克·莫拉兹。韦克曼的回归让乐队重新找回了早期活力。专辑同名曲的录制在瑞士的一个改建谷仓中进行，环境独特，据说乐队成员常因高山美景而分心。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, the band underwent a major change: keyboardist Rick Wakeman returned, replacing Patrick Moraz. Wakeman's comeback revived the band's early energy. The title track was recorded in a converted barn in Switzerland; the unique setting often distracted band members with the beautiful alpine views.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在商业上取得成功，重新确立了Yes在70年代前卫摇滚界的地位，并影响了后来许多前卫摇滚乐队的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: Commercially successful, this album re-established Yes's status in 1970s progressive rock and influenced the creative direction of many later prog rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是英国前卫摇滚乐队，1968年成立于伦敦。他们以复杂的器乐编排、长篇幅的歌曲和高超的演奏技巧著称，是前卫摇滚运动的标志性乐队之一。乐队成员多次变动，但始终保持创新精神。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1968. Known for complex instrumental arrangements, long-form songs, and virtuosic musicianship, they are iconic in the progressive rock movement. Despite frequent lineup changes, the band has maintained a spirit of innovation.

items.name: Nightmare
items.descriptionZh: 《Nightmare》是美国重金属乐队Avenged Sevenfold的第五张录音室专辑，2010年发行。风格融合了重金属、硬摇滚和金属核，旋律强烈且充满戏剧性。专辑主题围绕黑暗、死亡与救赎，吉他独奏华丽，鼓点猛烈，展现了乐队成熟后的硬朗风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Nightmare" is the fifth studio album by American heavy metal band Avenged Sevenfold, released in 2010. The style blends heavy metal, hard rock, and metalcore, with strong melodies and dramatic intensity. Themes revolve around darkness, death, and redemption, featuring flashy guitar solos and powerful drumming, showcasing the band's matured hard-edged style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满悲伤：鼓手吉米·“The Rev”·沙利文在专辑制作初期突然去世。乐队随后请来梦剧院鼓手迈克·波特诺伊完成鼓的部分。专辑中的《So Far Away》和《Fiction》是乐队为纪念The Rev而作，录音时多位成员情绪崩溃。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was marked by tragedy: drummer Jimmy "The Rev" Sullivan died suddenly early in production. The band then brought in Dream Theater drummer Mike Portnoy to complete the drum tracks. "So Far Away" and "Fiction" were written in memory of The Rev, with several members breaking down emotionally during recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在Billboard 200上夺冠，成为乐队商业上最成功的作品之一，也标志着他们在失去核心成员后依然坚强的转型。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, becoming one of the band's most commercially successful works and marking their resilient transition after losing a core member.
items.artistIntroZh: Avenged Sevenfold是一支美国重金属乐队，1999年成立于加利福尼亚州亨廷顿比奇。他们以激昂的旋律、双吉他演奏和戏剧性的现场表演闻名。乐队风格从金属核逐渐转向传统重金属，拥有全球大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Avenged Sevenfold is an American heavy metal band formed in Huntington Beach, California in 1999. Known for soaring melodies, dual guitar work, and dramatic live shows, their style evolved from metalcore to traditional heavy metal, earning a massive global fanbase.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是爱丽丝囚徒2001年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1990年代最经典的歌曲，包括《Man in the Box》《Would?》《Rooster》等。风格是典型的垃圾摇滚与另类金属，以低沉扭曲的吉他音色、和声与阴暗的歌词为特色。这张专辑是乐队巅峰时期的浓缩。
items.descriptionEn: "Greatest Hits" is a compilation album by Alice in Chains, released in 2001, featuring the band's most iconic songs from the 1990s, including "Man in the Box," "Would?," and "Rooster." The style is quintessential grunge and alternative metal, characterized by downtuned, distorted guitars, harmonies, and dark lyrics. This album is a snapshot of the band's peak.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的发行正值乐队主唱莱恩·斯塔利因毒瘾问题缺席公众视野的时期。选曲过程中，乐队成员和唱片公司就曲目顺序产生了分歧，最终决定按时间倒序排列，以体现乐队风格的演变。专辑封面设计简洁，意在让音乐本身说话。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released during a period when lead vocalist Layne Staley was absent from public view due to drug addiction. During track selection, the band and record label disagreed on the track order, eventually deciding on a reverse chronological sequence to reflect the band's stylistic evolution. The cover art was kept simple, letting the music speak for itself.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集帮助新听众系统了解爱丽丝囚徒的音乐，巩固了他们在垃圾摇滚运动中的核心地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation helped new listeners systematically discover Alice in Chains' music, solidifying their core status in the grunge movement.
items.artistIntroZh: 爱丽丝囚徒（Alice in Chains）是美国垃圾摇滚/另类金属乐队，1987年成立于西雅图。他们以沉重的吉他音色、阴暗的歌词和独特的和声演唱闻名，是90年代垃圾摇滚四大乐队之一。主唱莱恩·斯塔利的声音极具辨识度。
items.artistIntroEn: Alice in Chains is an American grunge/alternative metal band formed in Seattle in 1987. Known for heavy guitar tones, dark lyrics, and distinctive vocal harmonies, they are one of the four major grunge bands of the 1990s. Lead vocalist Layne Staley's voice is highly distinctive.

items.name: Best of The Beach Boys Vol. 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Best of The Beach Boys Vol. 2》是海滩男孩1967年发行的精选集，收录了《Good Vibrations》《God Only Knows》等代表作，融合了迷幻流行、巴洛克摇滚与冲浪摇滚，和声层次丰富，旋律优美，展现了乐队在艺术与商业之间的巅峰平衡。
items.descriptionEn: Best of The Beach Boys Vol. 2 is a 1967 compilation by The Beach Boys, featuring hits like Good Vibrations and God Only Knows, blending psychedelic pop, baroque rock, and surf rock with rich harmonies and melodic beauty, showcasing the band's peak balance between artistry and commerce.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的选曲过程充满争议：主创布莱恩·威尔逊希望收录更多实验性作品，但唱片公司坚持选入热门单曲。最终版本缺少了《Surf's Up》等未发行曲目，导致威尔逊与公司关系紧张。有趣的是，专辑封面使用了乐队1966年的照片，而非当时的最新形象。
items.storiesEn: The track selection process was contentious: Brian Wilson wanted more experimental works, but the label insisted on hit singles. The final version omitted unreleased tracks like Surf's Up, straining Wilson's relationship with the label. Interestingly, the cover used a 1966 band photo rather than a current one.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为60年代最畅销的精选集之一，它巩固了海滩男孩作为美国最伟大乐队的地位，并影响了后续流行音乐精选集的制作标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the best-selling compilations of the 1960s, it cemented The Beach Boys' status as America's greatest band and influenced the production standards of subsequent pop compilations.
items.artistIntroZh: 海滩男孩成立于1961年，以精致的和声和冲浪摇滚闻名，核心成员布莱恩·威尔逊是音乐天才。他们定义了加州之声，并在60年代与披头士竞争，是摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys formed in 1961, known for intricate harmonies and surf rock. Brian Wilson, the musical genius, defined the California Sound. They rivaled The Beatles in the 1960s and remain one of rock's most influential bands.

items.name: Back in Black
items.descriptionZh: 《Back in Black》是AC/DC 1980年发行的硬摇滚经典，以沉重的吉他Riff、布莱恩·约翰逊的嘶吼嗓音和紧凑的节奏著称，风格直接、凶猛且充满力量，是专辑导向摇滚的标杆之作。
items.descriptionEn: Back in Black is a 1980 hard rock classic by AC/DC, known for heavy guitar riffs, Brian Johnson's raspy vocals, and tight rhythms. Its direct, ferocious, and powerful sound set a benchmark for album-oriented rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是主唱邦·斯科特去世后的纪念之作。新主唱布莱恩·约翰逊在试音时，吉他手安格斯·杨仅听了两句就决定录用。录制中，安格斯坚持用老式音箱和简单设备，以保持粗粝音色。专辑封面全黑设计，象征对斯科特的哀悼。
items.storiesEn: This album was a tribute after lead singer Bon Scott's death. New vocalist Brian Johnson was hired after just two lines of singing during his audition. Guitarist Angus Young insisted on using vintage amps and simple gear for a raw sound. The all-black cover symbolized mourning for Scott.
items.historicalImpactZh: 全球销量超过5000万张，是史上最畅销的专辑之一，定义了80年代硬摇滚的声音，并影响了无数重金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: With over 50 million copies sold, it is one of the best-selling albums ever, defining 1980s hard rock and influencing countless heavy metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC成立于1973年澳大利亚，以标志性的学校制服造型和硬摇滚风格闻名。成员几经变动，但始终坚守简单、直接的摇滚乐，是摇滚史上最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC formed in 1973 in Australia, known for their school uniform look and hard rock style. Despite lineup changes, they have consistently delivered straightforward rock and roll, becoming one of rock's most successful bands.

items.name: Kill 'Em All
items.descriptionZh: 《Kill 'Em All》是Metallica 1983年发行的首张专辑，开创了鞭挞金属（Thrash Metal）的极端风格：高速吉他、双踩鼓点、尖锐的嘶吼和复杂的编曲，充满愤怒与侵略性，是金属乐的革命性作品。
items.descriptionEn: Kill 'Em All is Metallica's 1983 debut album, pioneering thrash metal with fast guitars, double bass drums, sharp vocals, and complex arrangements. Filled with anger and aggression, it was a revolutionary metal work.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原名《Metal Up Your Ass》，因唱片公司反对改为《Kill 'Em All》。录制预算仅8000美元，乐队在14天内完成。吉他手柯克·哈米特在录制前才加入，独奏部分即兴创作。主唱詹姆斯·海特菲尔德因紧张，部分歌词唱得含糊不清。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled Metal Up Your Ass, the label forced a change to Kill 'Em All. Recorded on an $8000 budget in 14 days, guitarist Kirk Hammett joined just before recording, improvising solos. Vocalist James Hetfield's nervousness made some lyrics unintelligible.
items.historicalImpactZh: 定义了鞭挞金属流派，与《Master of Puppets》一起奠定了Metallica在金属乐界的统治地位，影响了Slayer、Megadeth等乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Defined the thrash metal genre, and together with Master of Puppets, established Metallica's dominance in metal, influencing bands like Slayer and Megadeth.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica于1981年成立于洛杉矶，是鞭挞金属四巨头之一。以快速、复杂的演奏和黑暗主题著称，后转型为商业最成功的金属乐队，全球销量超1.25亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica formed in Los Angeles in 1981, one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal. Known for fast, complex playing and dark themes, they later became the most commercially successful metal band, selling over 125 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Yes
items.descriptionZh: 《Yes》是Yes乐队1969年发行的同名首专，融合了前卫摇滚、迷幻摇滚和古典音乐，以复杂的编曲、多声部和声和键盘与吉他的对位为特色，充满了实验精神和艺术野心。
items.descriptionEn: Yes is the 1969 self-titled debut of Yes, blending progressive rock, psychedelia, and classical music. Featuring complex arrangements, multi-part harmonies, and keyboard-guitar counterpoint, it brims with experimental spirit and artistic ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时乐队成员平均年龄仅21岁，预算极低。主唱乔恩·安德森在录音棚即兴创作歌词，常因拖延时间导致超支。吉他手彼得·班克斯因风格过激被解雇，但他弹奏的片段被保留在最终混音中。封面由乐队成员手绘，后被重制。
items.storiesEn: Recorded when band members averaged 21 years old on a tiny budget, vocalist Jon Anderson improvised lyrics in the studio, often causing overtime costs. Guitarist Peter Banks was fired for his aggressive style, but his parts remained in the final mix. The cover was hand-drawn by the band and later redesigned.
items.historicalImpactZh: 为前卫摇滚的发展奠定了基础，预示了Yes日后在《Fragile》《Close to the Edge》中的史诗风格，影响了Genesis、King Crimson等乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Laid the foundation for progressive rock, foreshadowing Yes's epic style on Fragile and Close to the Edge, influencing bands like Genesis and King Crimson.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes于1968年在伦敦成立，是前卫摇滚的旗舰乐队之一。以长篇史诗、复杂拍号和古典融合著称，成员更迭频繁，但始终追求艺术创新，全球销量超5000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes formed in London in 1968, a flagship progressive rock band. Known for long epics, complex time signatures, and classical fusion, they have undergone many lineup changes but always pursued artistic innovation, selling over 50 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Adios
items.descriptionZh: 《Adios》是德国摇滚乐队Böhse Onkelz 2004年发行的告别专辑，风格融合了硬摇滚、朋克和重金属，歌词直白、愤怒且充满社会批判，展现了乐队一贯的叛逆与真诚。
items.descriptionEn: Adios is the 2004 farewell album by German rock band Böhse Onkelz, blending hard rock, punk, and heavy metal. With blunt, angry, and socially critical lyrics, it embodies the band's consistent rebellion and sincerity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于乐队正式宣布解散后，成员们将全部精力投入其中。主打歌《Adios》的歌词直接回应了外界对乐队右翼争议的批评。录制期间，鼓手因健康问题多次中断，但最终坚持完成。专辑发行后乐队立即举办了大型告别演唱会。
items.storiesEn: Recorded after the band officially announced their breakup, members poured all their energy into it. The title track Adios directly responded to external criticism over the band's right-wing controversies. Drummer had to pause multiple times due to health issues but persevered. A massive farewell concert followed the release.
items.artistIntroZh: Böhse Onkelz于1980年在德国法兰克福成立，以挑衅性的歌词和反叛形象著称，早期因涉及右翼争议备受批评，后转型为德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一，拥有庞大的粉丝基础。
items.artistIntroEn: Böhse Onkelz formed in Frankfurt, Germany in 1980, known for provocative lyrics and a rebellious image. Early controversy over right-wing associations gave way to becoming one of Germany's most successful rock bands with a massive fanbase.

items.name: Rock Bottom
items.descriptionZh: 《Rock Bottom》是Robert Wyatt在经历严重事故后创作的首张个人专辑，融合了前卫摇滚、爵士和迷幻元素。其旋律如梦似幻，歌词充满诗意与内省，展现了艺术家在身体受限后灵魂的深度释放。
items.descriptionEn: Rock Bottom is Robert Wyatt's debut solo album, created after a severe accident. It blends progressive rock, jazz, and psychedelic elements, with dreamy melodies and introspective, poetic lyrics that reveal a profound liberation of the soul despite physical limitations.
items.storiesZh: 1973年，Wyatt在一次派对中从三楼窗户坠落，导致腰部以下瘫痪。在康复期间，他躺在床上创作了这张专辑。录制时，他无法使用鼓，便用口哨、人声和实验音效替代，好友Mike Oldfield等人也参与助阵。
items.storiesEn: In 1973, Wyatt fell from a third-floor window at a party, leaving him paralyzed from the waist down. During recovery, he composed this album while bedridden. Unable to play drums, he used whistling, vocals, and experimental sounds, with friends like Mike Oldfield contributing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为前卫摇滚与艺术摇滚的里程碑之作，深刻影响了后摇滚和独立音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Regarded as a milestone in progressive and art rock, it deeply influenced the development of post-rock and indie music.
items.artistIntroZh: Robert Wyatt，英国音乐家，前Soft Machine鼓手兼主唱。以独特的假声和实验精神著称，1973年瘫痪后转向个人创作，成为前卫摇滚界最具人文关怀的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Robert Wyatt is a British musician, former drummer and vocalist of Soft Machine. Known for his distinctive falsetto and experimental spirit, he turned to solo work after becoming paralyzed in 1973, becoming one of progressive rock's most humanistic artists.

items.name: All We Know Is Falling
items.descriptionZh: 《All We Know Is Falling》是Paramore的首张专辑，以流行朋克和另类摇滚为基调，充满青春期的焦虑与能量。吉他riff强劲，旋律抓耳，主唱Hayley Williams的嗓音极具爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: All We Know Is Falling is Paramore's debut album, rooted in pop punk and alternative rock, brimming with teenage angst and energy. Featuring powerful guitar riffs, catchy melodies, and Hayley Williams' explosive vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队内部关系紧张，原始贝斯手和吉他手在完成后不久离队。专辑封面上的单人沙发象征成员间���疏离感，Hayley曾表示这张专辑记录了乐队最脆弱的时期。
items.storiesEn: During recording, internal tensions ran high; the original bassist and guitarist left shortly after completion. The album cover's single sofa symbolizes the sense of alienation among members, with Hayley noting it captured the band's most vulnerable period.
items.artistIntroZh: Paramore，美国摇滚乐队，2004年成立于田纳西州。以女主唱Hayley Williams为核心，音乐融合流行朋克与另类摇滚，凭借情感直白的歌词和现场爆发力成为2000年代最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Paramore is an American rock band formed in Tennessee in 2004. Centered around lead vocalist Hayley Williams, their music blends pop punk and alternative rock, becoming one of the most influential bands of the 2000s with emotionally direct lyrics and explosive live performances.

items.name: Highway to Hell
items.descriptionZh: 《Highway to Hell》是AC/DC的第六张录音室专辑，硬摇滚风格的巅峰之作。节奏狂野，吉他 riff 如电锯般锋利，主唱Bon Scott的嗓音充满不羁与幽默，描绘了巡演路上的放纵生活。
items.descriptionEn: Highway to Hell is AC/DC's sixth studio album, a pinnacle of hard rock. With wild rhythms, razor-sharp guitar riffs, and Bon Scott's irreverent, humorous vocals, it depicts the hedonistic life on the road.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Bon Scott常与制作人“Mutt”Lange在录音室即兴创作歌词，标题曲灵感来自他们巡演时乘坐的破旧巴士。Scott曾开玩笑说：“这条路直通地狱，但我们乐在其中。”不幸的是，这张专辑成为Scott生前最后一张作品。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Bon Scott often improvised lyrics with producer 'Mutt' Lange in the studio; the title track was inspired by their beat-up tour bus. Scott joked, 'This road leads straight to hell, but we love it.' Tragically, it became his final album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过700万张，同名曲成为硬摇滚国歌，定义了70年代末摇滚乐的叛逆精神。
items.historicalImpactEn: Sold over 7 million copies worldwide; the title track became a hard rock anthem, defining the rebellious spirit of late 1970s rock.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC，澳大利亚硬摇滚乐队，1973年由Malcolm和Angus Young兄弟创立。以电力十足的舞台表演和简单直接的摇滚乐闻名，是史上最畅销的摇滚乐队之一，Bon Scott时代被视为经典。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is an Australian hard rock band founded in 1973 by brothers Malcolm and Angus Young. Known for electrifying stage shows and straightforward rock, they are among the best-selling rock bands ever, with the Bon Scott era considered iconic.

items.name: Madonna
items.descriptionZh: 《Madonna》是Madonna的首张同名专辑，以舞曲流行和迪斯科为基底，融合新浪潮元素。歌曲充满青春活力，歌词大胆直白，奠定了她作为流行女皇的雏形。
items.descriptionEn: Madonna is the debut self-titled album by Madonna, rooted in dance-pop and disco with new wave influences. Energetic and bold, its lyrics established the blueprint for her reign as the Queen of Pop.
items.storiesZh: 录制时Madonna几乎身无分文，靠吃爆米花度日。制作人Reggie Lucas曾与她因创作方向争吵，但她坚持加入自己的编曲想法。专辑中《Holiday》原本是为其他歌手写的，被拒后Madonna捡来一唱成名。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna was nearly broke, surviving on popcorn. Producer Reggie Lucas clashed with her over creative direction, but she insisted on her own arrangements. 'Holiday' was originally written for another artist, who passed; Madonna took it and scored a hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑开启了80年代流行舞曲革命，Madonna成为女性在音乐产业中自主掌控形象的标志性人物。
items.historicalImpactEn: Launched the 1980s dance-pop revolution; Madonna became an icon of female autonomy and image control in the music industry.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna，美国歌手、演员、企业家，1958年生于密歇根州。被誉为“流行女皇”，以不断革新音乐风格、挑战社会禁忌和视觉冲击力著称，是历史上最成功的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur, born in Michigan in 1958. Known as the 'Queen of Pop,' she is renowned for constantly reinventing her music, challenging social taboos, and visual impact, making her one of the most successful female artists in history.

items.name: Soundtrack From The Film “More”
items.descriptionZh: 《More》是Pink Floyd为同名电影创作的原声专辑，风格介于早期迷幻摇滚与中期太空摇滚之间。包含原声吉他小品、电子实验和长篇器乐，氛围迷离而忧郁。
items.descriptionEn: More is Pink Floyd's soundtrack for the film of the same name, bridging their early psychedelic rock and mid-period space rock. It features acoustic pieces, electronic experiments, and extended instrumentals, creating a hazy, melancholic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队首次尝试为电影配乐，录制过程非常即兴。成员常根据电影片段现场创作，吉他手David Gilmour在《The Nile Song》中首次使用失真效果，成为乐队硬摇滚风格的先声。
items.storiesEn: This was the band's first film score project, recorded in a highly improvisational manner. Members often composed live to film clips; guitarist David Gilmour used distortion for the first time on 'The Nile Song,' foreshadowing their harder rock edge.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为早期电影原声专辑，它展示了乐队多变的创作能力，为后续《Dark Side of the Moon》等概念专辑积累了实验经验。
items.historicalImpactEn: As an early film soundtrack, it showcased the band's versatile creativity, providing experimental groundwork for later concept albums like 'The Dark Side of the Moon'.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd，英国前卫摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦。以哲学性歌词、概念专辑和震撼的现场演出闻名，是史上最具艺术成就和商业成功的摇滚乐队之一，成员包括Roger Waters、David Gilmour等。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1965. Known for philosophical lyrics, concept albums, and spectacular live shows, they are among the most artistically accomplished and commercially successful rock bands, with members including Roger Waters and David Gilmour.

items.name: Baroque
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是长号手Wycliffe Gordon对巴洛克音乐的爵士化演绎，融合了传统古典结构与即兴布鲁斯元素，铜管音色温暖而富有弹性，展现了巴洛克旋律在现代爵士语境下的全新生命力。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a jazz reinterpretation of Baroque music by trombonist Wycliffe Gordon, blending classical structures with improvisational blues elements, featuring warm and elastic brass tones that reveal new vitality of Baroque melodies in a modern jazz context.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Gordon特意邀请了一支小型弦乐团来模拟巴洛克时期的室内乐氛围，但中途弦乐手们被他的即兴长号独奏带动，自发加入摇摆节奏，导致原本严谨的曲目录成了半即兴版本，制作人不得不重新编排。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Gordon invited a small string ensemble to mimic Baroque chamber music, but the string players were inspired by his improvisational trombone solos and spontaneously added swing rhythms, turning the strict pieces into semi-improvised versions, forcing the producer to rearrange the tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: Wycliffe Gordon是美国爵士长号大师，以深厚的传统根基和极具个性的咆哮式演奏闻名，曾与Wynton Marsalis长期合作，是林肯中心爵士乐团的骨干成员。
items.artistIntroEn: Wycliffe Gordon is an American jazz trombone master known for his deep traditional roots and distinctive growling style. A longtime collaborator with Wynton Marsalis, he is a core member of the Jazz at Lincoln Center Orchestra.

items.name: Baroque
items.descriptionZh: 鼓手Herlin Riley以新奥尔良节奏为基底，将巴洛克的复调旋律转化为充满律动的打击乐对话，专辑中手鼓与军鼓的层次感极强，仿佛让巴赫的赋格在爵士俱乐部里重生。
items.descriptionEn: Drummer Herlin Riley transforms Baroque polyphonic melodies into rhythmic percussion dialogues grounded in New Orleans grooves. The album features layered hand drums and snare drums that make Bach's fugues feel reborn in a jazz club.
items.storiesZh: Riley在录音棚里摆满了他收藏的古董军鼓，为了找到与羽管键琴音色匹配的鼓皮张力，他反复调试了三天，最终用一只1920年代的军鼓录制了所有快板乐章，鼓棒磨损了十几副。
items.storiesEn: Riley filled the studio with his collection of vintage snare drums. To match the timbre of the harpsichord, he spent three days adjusting drumhead tension, eventually using a 1920s snare for all allegro movements, wearing out over a dozen drumstick pairs.
items.artistIntroZh: Herlin Riley是新奥尔良爵士鼓手的代表人物，师从传奇鼓手Ed Blackwell，曾与Ahmad Jamal、Wynton Marsalis等巨匠合作，以复杂而充满活力的复合节奏著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Herlin Riley is a leading New Orleans jazz drummer, mentored by legendary drummer Ed Blackwell. He has collaborated with giants like Ahmad Jamal and Wynton Marsalis, known for his complex and vibrant polyrhythms.

items.name: Baroque
items.descriptionZh: 日本钢琴家大西顺子以独奏钢琴形式探索巴洛克音乐，将赋格与萨拉班德舞曲转化为印象派和声与爵士切分节奏，触键轻盈而精准，营造出东方视角下的巴洛克冥想空间。
items.descriptionEn: Japanese pianist Junko Onishi explores Baroque music through solo piano, transforming fugues and sarabandes into impressionist harmonies and jazz syncopations. Her light yet precise touch creates a meditative Baroque space from an Eastern perspective.
items.storiesZh: 大西顺子为录制此专辑专程前往巴黎聆听古钢琴演奏，回国后她坚持用一架经过特殊调律的斯坦威钢琴，将中音区调暗以模仿古钢琴的音色，录音师不得不为每个音重新设置麦克风位置。
items.storiesEn: Onishi traveled to Paris to listen to period harpsichord performances before recording. She insisted on using a specially tuned Steinway, darkening the midrange to mimic harpsichord timbre, forcing the engineer to reposition microphones for every note.
items.artistIntroZh: 大西顺子是日本爵士钢琴家与作曲家，1990年代在美国出道，以充满诗意的即兴和严谨的古典功底著称，曾与Art Blakey、Joe Henderson等大师同台。
items.artistIntroEn: Junko Onishi is a Japanese jazz pianist and composer who debuted in the U.S. in the 1990s. Known for poetic improvisation and rigorous classical training, she has performed with masters like Art Blakey and Joe Henderson.

items.name: Is This It
items.descriptionZh: 《Is This It》是纽约摇滚乐队The Strokes的首张专辑，以复古车库摇滚音色、慵懒的演唱和极简的吉他线条定义了21世纪初的独立摇滚复兴运动，充满都市青年的疏离与反叛气息。
items.descriptionEn: Is This It is the debut album by New York rock band The Strokes, defining the early 2000s indie rock revival with retro garage rock tones, languid vocals, and minimalist guitar lines, exuding urban youth alienation and rebellion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约一间狭小的地下室录音室，制作人Gordon Raphael用廉价设备捕捉了乐队原始的现场能量。主唱Julian Casablancas坚持用一根破旧的话筒录制人声，导致部分音轨带有明显的嘶嘶声，却意外成为专辑标志性的质感。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a tiny basement studio in New York, producer Gordon Raphael used cheap gear to capture the band's raw live energy. Lead singer Julian Casablancas insisted on using a battered microphone, resulting in noticeable hiss on some tracks, which accidentally became the album's signature texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是2000年代独立摇滚的里程碑，直接影响了The Libertines、Arctic Monkeys等后续乐队的音乐方向，并推动了车库摇滚复兴浪潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a milestone of 2000s indie rock, the album directly influenced subsequent bands like The Libertines and Arctic Monkeys, fueling the garage rock revival wave.
items.artistIntroZh: The Strokes是2000年代初纽约最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一，由主唱Julian Casablancas和吉他手Albert Hammond Jr.等人组成，以不修边幅的��型和直白的吉他摇滚风格成��时代标志。
items.artistIntroEn: The Strokes are one of the most influential rock bands of early 2000s New York, fronted by Julian Casablancas and guitarist Albert Hammond Jr., known for their disheveled look and straightforward guitar rock style that defined an era.

items.name: Stéphanie
items.descriptionZh: 这是摩纳哥公主斯蒂芬妮在1991年推出的流行舞曲专辑，融合了欧陆迪斯科与流行摇滚元素，嗓音甜美但缺乏专业训练，整体风格带有90年代初欧洲流行乐的典型商业气息。
items.descriptionEn: This is a 1991 pop dance album by Princess Stéphanie of Monaco, blending Euro-disco and pop rock elements. Her vocals are sweet but lack professional training, embodying the commercial pop vibe of early 1990s Europe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，摩纳哥王室曾试图阻止她发行音乐作品，认为有损王室形象。斯蒂芬妮坚持己见，甚至秘密前往巴黎录音室完成制作。主打歌《Ouragan》的MV因她穿着皮衣骑摩托车的叛逆形象引发欧洲媒体热议。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the Monaco royal family tried to block the album's release, deeming it damaging to the monarchy's image. Stéphanie insisted, secretly going to a Paris studio to finish production. The music video for lead single 'Ouragan' sparked European media buzz with her leather-jacket-and-motorcycle rebellious look.
items.artistIntroZh: 斯蒂芬妮公主是摩纳哥雷尼尔三世与格蕾丝·凯利的幼女，曾短暂从事模特与歌手职业，1990年代后淡出娱乐圈，专注于慈善与王室职责。
items.artistIntroEn: Princess Stéphanie is the youngest daughter of Prince Rainier III of Monaco and Grace Kelly. She briefly pursued careers as a model and singer before stepping back from entertainment in the 1990s to focus on charity and royal duties.

items.name: Ride the Lightning
items.descriptionZh: Metallica 于 1984 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Metallica in 1984.

items.name: Razor Tag
items.descriptionZh: Styles of Beyond 于 2007 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Styles of Beyond in 2007.

items.name: Nach der verlorenen Zeit
items.descriptionZh: Tocotronic 于 1995 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Tocotronic in 1995.

items.name: Demolition
items.descriptionZh: Judas Priest 于 2001 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Judas Priest in 2001.

items.name: Losing All Hope Is Freedom
items.descriptionZh: Evergreen Terrace 于 2001 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Evergreen Terrace in 2001.

items.name: Born Under a Bad Sign
items.descriptionZh: 《Born Under a Bad Sign》是Albert King的经典蓝调专辑，融合了电吉他布鲁斯与灵魂乐元素，以粗犷而深情的嗓音和标志性的Flying V吉他演奏为特色。专辑展现了密西西比三角洲蓝调的精髓，充满力量与情感。
items.descriptionEn: Born Under a Bad Sign is a classic blues album by Albert King, blending electric blues with soul elements, featuring his gritty, heartfelt vocals and iconic Flying V guitar work. It captures the essence of Mississippi Delta blues with power and emotion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于孟菲斯的Stax录音室，Albert King与传奇制作人Al Jackson Jr.合作。有趣的是，King习惯用一把降调调弦的吉他，这让他的演奏音色更加厚重独特。录音过程非常即兴，许多歌曲都是一次完成。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Stax Studios in Memphis, Albert King worked with legendary producer Al Jackson Jr. Interestingly, King often played a guitar tuned down a full step, giving his playing a thicker, more unique tone. Many songs were recorded in one take, capturing spontaneous energy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是电蓝调的代表作之一，对后来��摇滚和蓝调吉他手如Eric Clapton、Stevie Ray Vaughan产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a landmark of electric blues, this album deeply influenced later rock and blues guitarists like Eric Clapton and Stevie Ray Vaughan.
items.artistIntroZh: Albert King（1923-1992）是美国蓝调吉他大师，以其独特的弦乐风格和巨大的身材闻名。他是Stax唱片公司的核心艺人之一，被誉为“蓝调之王”之一，对现代蓝调和摇滚发展贡献卓著。
items.artistIntroEn: Albert King (1923-1992) was an American blues guitar master known for his unique string-bending style and towering stature. A key artist on Stax Records, he is regarded as one of the 'Kings of the Blues' and made monumental contributions to modern blues and rock.

items.name: Tokyo Tapes
items.descriptionZh: 《Tokyo Tapes》是Scorpions在日本巡演期间录制的现场专辑，展现了他们硬摇滚和重金属的早期风格。专辑充满高能量的吉他riff、激昂的鼓点和主唱Klaus Meine的尖嗓，是乐队从德国走向世界的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Tokyo Tapes is a live album by Scorpions recorded during their Japan tour, showcasing their early hard rock and heavy metal style. It features high-energy guitar riffs, pounding drums, and Klaus Meine's piercing vocals, marking a milestone in the band's global rise.
items.storiesZh: 1978年，Scorpions在日本东京的Nakano Sun Plaza连续三晚演出，录制了这张专辑。有趣的是，乐队当时对日本文化非常着迷，现场观众的热情让他们印象深刻。专辑封面采用了日本风格的字体设计，以纪念这次巡演。
items.storiesEn: In 1978, Scorpions performed three consecutive nights at Nakano Sun Plaza in Tokyo to record this album. Interestingly, the band was fascinated by Japanese culture, and the audience's enthusiasm left a deep impression. The album cover features Japanese-style typography to commemorate the tour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Scorpions早期最重要的现场作品，帮助他们在国际乐坛打开知名度，为后来的全球成功奠定基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is Scorpions' most important early live work, helping them gain international recognition and laying the foundation for their later global success.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions是德国传奇重金属乐队，成立于1965年。以经典曲目《Wind of Change》《Rock You Like a Hurricane》闻名，他们是德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions are a legendary German heavy metal band formed in 1965. Known for classics like 'Wind of Change' and 'Rock You Like a Hurricane,' they are one of Germany's most successful rock bands, with over 100 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Alice Cooper's Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Alice Cooper's Greatest Hits》是Alice Cooper的精选集，收录了他1970年代初期的巅峰单曲，风格融合了硬摇滚、华丽摇滚和惊悚戏剧元素。专辑充满挑衅性的歌词和令人难忘的旋律，是Alice Cooper恐怖美学的最佳入门。
items.descriptionEn: Alice Cooper's Greatest Hits is a compilation album featuring his peak singles from the early 1970s, blending hard rock, glam rock, and theatrical shock elements. With provocative lyrics and unforgettable melodies, it serves as the perfect introduction to Alice Cooper's horror aesthetic.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行于1974年，当时Alice Cooper已凭借《School's Out》和《No More Mr. Nice Guy》成为超级巨星。有趣的是，专辑封面上Alice Cooper标志性的眼妆和蛇的形象，源自他现场表演中常用的道具，他曾用一条真正的蟒蛇进行拍摄。
items.storiesEn: Released in 1974, this compilation came when Alice Cooper was already a superstar with hits like 'School's Out' and 'No More Mr. Nice Guy.' Interestingly, the album cover features his iconic eye makeup and a snake, a prop he often used in live shows; he posed with a real python for the shoot.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Alice Cooper作为华丽摇滚和惊悚摇滚先驱的地位，对���续的金属和朋克戏剧表演风格产生了影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Alice Cooper's status as a pioneer of glam rock and shock rock, influencing later metal and punk theatrical performance styles.
items.artistIntroZh: Alice Cooper（原名Vincent Furnier）是美国摇滚歌手、词曲作者，以戏剧化的舞台表演和恐怖主题闻名。他是华丽摇滚和惊悚摇滚的创始人之一，被誉为“休克摇滚教父”，职业生涯跨越50余年。
items.artistIntroEn: Alice Cooper (born Vincent Furnier) is an American rock singer and songwriter known for theatrical stage shows and horror themes. A founder of glam rock and shock rock, he is hailed as the 'Godfather of Shock Rock,' with a career spanning over 50 years.

items.name: Perfume: Complete Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Perfume: Complete Best》是日本电音流行组合Perfume的首张精选专辑，收录了他们早期的热门单曲。风格以高科技流行（techno-pop）为主，融合了轻快的电子节拍、可爱的声线和精密的编曲，展现了她们独特的“近未来”魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Perfume: Complete Best is the first compilation album by Japanese electro-pop group Perfume, featuring their early hit singles. The style is primarily techno-pop, blending upbeat electronic beats, cute vocals, and intricate arrangements, showcasing their unique 'near-future' charm.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，制作人中田康孝（Yasutaka Nakata）采用了大量实验性的电子音效。有趣的是，Perfume的三位成员当时还是十几岁的少女，录音时经常因为舞蹈动作太激烈而气喘吁吁，需要多次补录。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, producer Yasutaka Nakata used many experimental electronic sounds. Interestingly, the three members of Perfume were still teenagers at the time, and they often had to re-record vocals because they were out of breath from intense dance routines.
items.artistIntroZh: Perfume是日本女子电音流行组合，成立于2000年，成员包括西脇綾香、樫野有香和大本彩乃。她们以高科技流行音乐和同步舞蹈闻名，是日本最具代表性的女子团体之一，在全球拥有大量粉丝。
items.artistIntroEn: Perfume is a Japanese female electro-pop group formed in 2000, consisting of Ayaka Nishiwaki, Yuka Kashino, and Ayano Omoto. Known for their techno-pop music and synchronized dance, they are one of Japan's most iconic girl groups with a massive global fanbase.

items.name: Der Bozz
items.descriptionZh: 《Der Bozz》是德国说唱歌手Azad的第三张录音室专辑，风格以硬核说唱（Hardcore Rap）为主，融合了街头叙事和强烈的政治与社会批判。专辑节奏沉重，歌词犀利，展现了德国说唱的真实与力量。
items.descriptionEn: Der Bozz is the third studio album by German rapper Azad, primarily in hardcore rap style, blending street narratives with strong political and social critique. The album features heavy beats and sharp lyrics, showcasing the authenticity and power of German rap.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Azad与制作团队在法兰克福的地下录音室工作，经常熬夜到凌晨。有趣的是，专辑中的一首歌《Phoenix》原本是Azad写给已故朋友的悼念曲，录音时他情绪激动，一度中断录制。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Azad worked with his production team in a basement studio in Frankfurt, often staying up until dawn. Interestingly, one song 'Phoenix' was originally written as a tribute to a deceased friend, and Azad became so emotional during recording that he had to pause several times.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是德国硬核说唱的里程碑之一，对后来的德国说唱歌手如Bushido和Kollegah产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in German hardcore rap, significantly influencing later German rappers like Bushido and Kollegah.
items.artistIntroZh: Azad（原名Azad Azadpour）是德国说唱歌手，出生于伊朗，幼年移居德国。他以硬核说唱和街头叙事闻名，是德国说唱界的重要人物，曾获得多个音乐奖项，被誉为“德国说唱之王”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Azad (born Azad Azadpour) is a German rapper of Iranian descent who moved to Germany as a child. Known for hardcore rap and street narratives, he is a major figure in German hip-hop, winning multiple music awards and hailed as one of the 'Kings of German Rap.'

items.name: Hysteria
items.descriptionZh: 《Hysteria》是Def Leppard的第四张录音室专辑，融合了华丽金属与流行摇滚的旋律，以其标志性的多层和声、强劲的吉他和鼓点著称。专辑制作精良，每一首曲目都充满力量与情感，展现了乐队在商业与艺术上的巅峰状态。
items.descriptionEn: Hysteria is Def Leppard's fourth studio album, blending glam metal with pop rock melodies, known for its signature layered harmonies, powerful guitars, and driving drums. The album is meticulously produced, with every track exuding energy and emotion, showcasing the band at its commercial and artistic peak.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，鼓手Rick Allen因车祸失去左臂，但他坚持用电子鼓套装完成演奏，展现了惊人的毅力。制作人Robert John "Mutt" Lange对细节要求极高，仅鼓声就耗时数月调整，最终专辑耗时三年才完成。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, drummer Rick Allen lost his left arm in a car accident but insisted on using an electronic drum kit to complete his parts, demonstrating incredible perseverance. Producer Robert John 'Mutt' Lange was extremely meticulous, spending months just on the drum sound, and the album ultimately took three years to finish.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超过2000万张，是Def Leppard最成功的作品，定义了80年代华丽金属的黄金标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 20 million copies worldwide, becoming Def Leppard's most successful work and defining the gold standard of 80s glam metal.
items.artistIntroZh: Def Leppard是一支英国摇滚乐队，1977年成立于谢菲尔德。他们以硬朗的吉他riff、流畅的旋律和标志性的双主唱和声闻名，是80年代华丽金属运动的代表之一，全球专辑销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Def Leppard is a British rock band formed in Sheffield in 1977. Known for their hard-hitting guitar riffs, smooth melodies, and signature dual vocal harmonies, they are one of the leading acts of the 80s glam metal movement, with over 100 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: M Best
items.descriptionZh: 《M Best》是日本R&B女歌手加藤米莉亚的首张精选集，收录了她出道以来的热门单曲。风格以抒情R&B为主，融合嘻哈与流行元素，嗓音温柔而富有穿透力，歌词多探讨爱情与成长，展现了她在日本R&B领域的独特地位。
items.descriptionEn: M Best is the first greatest hits album by Japanese R&B singer Miliyah Kato, featuring her popular singles since debut. The style is primarily ballad R&B, blended with hip-hop and pop elements, with a tender yet piercing voice and lyrics often exploring love and growth, showcasing her unique position in Japanese R&B.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，加藤米莉亚特意邀请多位长期合作的制作人重新混音部分曲目，以回馈歌迷。专辑封面拍摄于她常去的录音室附近，她回忆说那天阳光正好，录音室窗外开满了樱花，让她感到格外放松。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Miliyah Kato invited several long-time collaborators to remix some tracks as a gift to fans. The album cover was shot near her usual studio, and she recalled that the sunlight was perfect that day with cherry blossoms blooming outside the window, making her feel especially relaxed.
items.artistIntroZh: 加藤米莉亚（Miliyah Kato）是日本女歌手、词曲作者，1988年出生于东京。2004年出道，以R&B、嘻哈风格著称，歌词常反映女性视角的情感与生活，被誉为“日本R&B女王”，多次获得日本金唱片大奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Miliyah Kato is a Japanese singer-songwriter born in Tokyo in 1988. Debuting in 2004, she is known for her R&B and hip-hop style, with lyrics often reflecting female perspectives on emotions and life, earning her the title 'Queen of Japanese R&B' and multiple Japan Gold Disc Awards.

items.name: M.I.A.M.I.
items.descriptionZh: 《M.I.A.M.I.》是Pitbull的首张主流录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、拉丁音乐和电子舞曲元素。专辑以迈阿密为灵感，节奏强劲、派对氛围浓厚，歌词充满自信与街头智慧，奠定了Pitbull“世界先生”式拉丁嘻哈的风格基础。
items.descriptionEn: M.I.A.M.I. is Pitbull's first major-label studio album, blending hip-hop, Latin music, and electronic dance elements. Inspired by Miami, the album features strong beats and a party atmosphere, with lyrics full of confidence and streetwise attitude, laying the foundation for Pitbull's 'Mr. Worldwide' Latin hip-hop style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑取名《M.I.A.M.I.》是“Money Is A Major Issue”的缩写，Pitbull以此调侃迈阿密的拜金文化。录制期间，他邀请了许多当地地下艺人合作，其中一首歌的伴奏是在朋友家的地下室用简陋设备完成的，后来却成为专辑的热门曲目。
items.storiesEn: The album title M.I.A.M.I. stands for 'Money Is A Major Issue,' a playful jab at Miami's materialistic culture. During recording, he collaborated with many local underground artists; one track's beat was made in a friend's basement with basic equipment, yet later became a hit on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让Pitbull从地下说唱歌手跃升为主流明星，推动了拉丁嘻哈在美国的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album propelled Pitbull from an underground rapper to a mainstream star, boosting the popularity of Latin hip-hop in the United States.
items.artistIntroZh: Pitbull，本名Armando Christian Pérez，1981年生于美国迈阿密，古巴裔说唱歌手、词曲作者和商人。以其标志性的“Dale”口号和跨界拉丁流行风格闻名，全球唱片销量超过2500万张，曾获格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Pitbull, born Armando Christian Pérez in 1981 in Miami, USA, is a Cuban-American rapper, songwriter, and businessman. Known for his signature 'Dale' catchphrase and crossover Latin pop style, he has sold over 25 million records worldwide and won a Grammy Award.

items.name: Ben
items.descriptionZh: 《Ben》是迈克尔·杰克逊12岁时发行的第二张个人录音室专辑，风格以灵魂乐和流行抒情为主。嗓音纯净而富有情感，同名主打歌《Ben》是一首温柔深情的慢歌，展现了少年迈克尔超越年龄的演唱功力与细腻表达。
items.descriptionEn: Ben is Michael Jackson's second solo studio album, released when he was 12, featuring soul and pop ballad styles. His voice is pure and emotional, with the title track 'Ben' being a tender, heartfelt slow song that showcases his mature vocal skills and delicate expression beyond his years.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Ben》原本是为1972年电影《老鼠兄弟》创作的，迈克尔在录音时被歌词深深打动，一度哽咽。制作人回忆说，他录完一遍后主动要求重录，直到情感完全到位。这首歌后来成为他第一首个人冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Ben' was originally written for the 1972 film 'Ben' (about a boy and his rat). Michael was deeply moved by the lyrics during recording and choked up. The producer recalled that after one take, he asked to re-record until the emotion was perfect; it later became his first solo number-one single.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Ben》是迈克尔·杰克逊个人事业的重要转折点，标志着他从童星向成熟歌手的过渡。
items.historicalImpactEn: Ben marked a crucial turning point in Michael Jackson's solo career, signaling his transition from child star to mature artist.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson，1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。5岁出道，以标志性的舞步、独特的嗓音和开创性的音乐视频闻名，全球专辑销量���过3.5亿张，是流行文化史上最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop.' Debuting at age 5, he is famous for his iconic dance moves, unique voice, and groundbreaking music videos, with over 350 million albums sold worldwide, making him one of the most influential figures in pop culture history.

items.name: The Piper at the Gates of Dawn
items.descriptionZh: 《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》是Pink Floyd的首张录音室专辑，以迷幻摇滚和太空摇滚为基调，充满梦幻般的音效、即兴演奏和诗意歌词。专辑受当时伦敦地下音乐场景影响，探索了意识与宇宙的主题，是迷幻时代的重要作品。
items.descriptionEn: The Piper at the Gates of Dawn is Pink Floyd's debut studio album, rooted in psychedelic and space rock, filled with dreamlike soundscapes, improvisation, and poetic lyrics. Influenced by the London underground scene, it explores themes of consciousness and the cosmos, making it a key work of the psychedelic era.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队常在录音室通宵即兴演奏，制作人Norman Smith不得不提醒他们注意时间。主创Syd Barrett在录音期间行为逐渐古怪，曾要求将吉他音箱放进浴缸以获得特殊回音效果，最终因精神问题离队。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band often jammed all night in the studio, and producer Norman Smith had to remind them of the time. Creative leader Syd Barrett's behavior grew increasingly erratic; he once asked to put a guitar amp in a bathtub for a special echo effect, and later left the band due to mental health issues.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为迷幻摇滚的里程碑，深刻影响了后来的前卫摇滚和另类音乐发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as a milestone of psychedelic rock, profoundly influencing the development of progressive rock and alternative music.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd是英国前卫摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦。以概念专辑、哲学性歌词和壮观的现场演出闻名，代表作《The Dark Side of the Moon》等销量惊人。早期灵魂人物Syd Barrett奠定了其迷幻风格，后期由Roger Waters、David Gilmour等主导。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1965. Known for concept albums, philosophical lyrics, and spectacular live shows, their masterpiece 'The Dark Side of the Moon' sold massively. Early visionary Syd Barrett shaped their psychedelic sound, later led by Roger Waters and David Gilmour.

items.name: Revolver
items.descriptionZh: 《Revolver》是披头士在1966年发行的里程碑式专辑，标志着乐队从流行偶像向实验艺术家的蜕变。专辑融合了迷幻摇滚、印度古典乐、电子音效与复杂编曲，歌词充满哲学思辨与超现实意象。核心特色在于其大胆的录音室创新，如反录音带、变速处理与循环音效，彻底改变了摇滚乐的制作范式。
items.descriptionEn: Revolver is a landmark 1966 album by The Beatles, marking their evolution from pop idols to experimental artists. It blends psychedelic rock, Indian classical music, electronic effects, and complex arrangements, with lyrics full of philosophical musings and surreal imagery. Its core feature is bold studio innovation, including tape reversal, varispeed, and looping, which revolutionized rock production.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Revolver》时，披头士首次完全摆脱现场演出的束缚，专注于录音室实验。保罗·麦卡特尼为《Eleanor Rigby》创作了弦乐四重奏，灵感来自伯纳德·赫尔曼的电影配乐。约翰·列侬在《Tomorrow Never Knows》中要求将自己的人声处理成“像达赖喇嘛从山顶吟唱”，工程师通过旋转录音带实现了这一效果。乔治·哈里森引入的西塔尔琴在《Love You To》中成为焦点。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Revolver, The Beatles fully embraced studio experimentation for the first time, free from live performance constraints. Paul McCartney wrote the string quartet for 'Eleanor Rigby' inspired by Bernard Herrmann's film scores. John Lennon demanded his voice on 'Tomorrow Never Knows' sound 'like the Dalai Lama chanting from a mountaintop,' achieved by spinning a tape loop. George Harrison's sitar became central to 'Love You To.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Revolver》被广泛认为是摇滚史上最具影响力的专辑之一，直接启发了迷幻摇滚和艺术摇滚的发展，并推动了录音室作为乐器的概念。
items.historicalImpactEn: Revolver is widely regarded as one of the most influential albums in rock history, directly inspiring psychedelic and art rock, and cementing the studio as an instrument.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年代英国利物浦成立的传奇摇滚乐队，成员包括约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔。他们通过不断创新的音乐与文化影响，成为史上最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were a legendary rock band formed in Liverpool, England in the 1960s, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Through constant musical innovation and cultural impact, they became one of the best-selling bands of all time.

items.name: Help!
items.descriptionZh: 《Help!》是披头士1965年发行的第五张录音室专辑，同名电影原声带。风格上融合了民谣摇滚、流行和早期硬摇滚元素，歌词开始展现更成熟的情感与个人焦虑。核心特色是旋律的朗朗上口与编曲的简洁有力，如《Ticket to Ride》中的创新鼓点与《Yesterday》的弦乐四重奏。
items.descriptionEn: Help! is The Beatles' fifth studio album, released in 1965 as the soundtrack to their film of the same name. It blends folk rock, pop, and early hard rock elements, with lyrics showing more mature emotions and personal anxiety. Its core feature is catchy melodies and crisp arrangements, such as the innovative drum pattern on 'Ticket to Ride' and the string quartet on 'Yesterday.'
items.storiesZh: 录制《Help!》期间，约翰·列侬后来承认《Help!》这首歌是他潜意识中对成名压力的呐喊。保罗·麦卡特尼在录音室某天早上醒来时脑中浮现《Yesterday》的旋律，起初以为是自己梦到的老歌，后来才确认是新作。电影拍摄中，乐队在巴哈马群岛和阿尔卑斯山滑雪场取景，因天气炎热，林戈·斯塔尔多次抱怨服装厚重。
items.storiesEn: During the Help! sessions, John Lennon later admitted the title track was his subconscious cry about the pressures of fame. Paul McCartney woke up with the melody of 'Yesterday' in his head, initially thinking it was an old song he'd dreamed. While filming in the Bahamas and the Alps, Ringo Starr complained about heavy costumes in the heat.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Yesterday》成为史上被翻唱次数最多的歌曲之一，而专辑本身标志着披头士从纯流行转向更具自省性的创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Yesterday' became one of the most covered songs in history, and the album marked The Beatles' shift from pure pop to more introspective songwriting.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年代英国利物浦成立的传奇摇滚乐队，成员包括约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔。他们通过不断创新的音乐与文化影响，成为史上最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were a legendary rock band formed in Liverpool, England in the 1960s, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Through constant musical innovation and cultural impact, they became one of the best-selling bands of all time.

items.name: Born Again
items.descriptionZh: 《Born Again》是黑色安息日1983年发行的专辑，也是主唱罗尼·詹姆斯·迪奥离队后、由深紫乐队伊恩·吉兰接替的首张作品。风格延续了乐队标志性的重金属与厄运摇滚，但制作粗糙，混音备受诟病。核心特色是吉兰高亢的嗓音与托尼·伊奥米沉重的吉他 riff，但整体因混乱的录制过程而显得参差不齐。
items.descriptionEn: Born Again is Black Sabbath's 1983 album, the first with Deep Purple's Ian Gillan replacing Ronnie James Dio. It continues the band's signature heavy metal and doom rock sound, but suffers from rough production and widely criticized mixing. Its core features are Gillan's soaring vocals and Tony Iommi's heavy riffs, though the chaotic recording process makes it uneven.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Born Again》期间，乐队内部矛盾重重。伊恩·吉兰与黑色安息日成员在音乐方向上存在分歧，吉兰甚至一度在录音室醉酒后与托尼·伊奥米发生争执。专辑封面由艺术家史蒂夫·朱利设计，但制作人却将婴儿形象处理成丑陋的粉红色，乐队成员看到成品后大为不满。混音由托尼·伊奥米在缺少其他成员监督下完成，导致声音模糊不清。
items.storiesEn: During the Born Again sessions, tensions were high. Ian Gillan clashed with Black Sabbath members over musical direction, once getting drunk and arguing with Tony Iommi in the studio. The album cover by Steve Joule featured a baby, but the producer rendered it in an ugly pink, angering the band. Mixing was done by Iommi alone without other members' oversight, resulting in a muddy sound.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑色安息日（Black Sabbath）是1968年英国伯明翰成立的重金属先驱乐队，核心成员包括托尼·伊奥米、奥兹·奥斯本、吉泽·巴特勒和比尔·沃德。他们以黑暗沉重的音色和神秘主题定义了重金属音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath are heavy metal pioneers formed in Birmingham, England in 1968, with core members Tony Iommi, Ozzy Osbourne, Geezer Butler, and Bill Ward. They defined heavy metal with their dark, heavy sound and occult themes.

items.name: Another Side of Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: 《Another Side of Bob Dylan》是鲍勃·迪伦1964年发行的第四张录音室专辑，标志着他从抗议民谣向个人化、超现实主义创作的转变。风格以原声吉他钢琴为主，歌词充满文学性隐喻、荒诞幽默与情感自省。核心特色是迪伦首次大量创作非政治性歌曲，展现其诗人本质。
items.descriptionEn: Another Side of Bob Dylan is Dylan's fourth studio album, released in 1964, marking his shift from protest folk to personal, surreal songwriting. Stylistically centered on acoustic guitar and piano, the lyrics are rich in literary metaphors, absurd humor, and emotional introspection. Its core feature is Dylan's first major foray into non-political songs, revealing his poetic essence.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Another Side》仅用一晚完成，迪伦在录音室即兴创作并连续演唱了11首新歌。专辑名称源于哥伦比亚唱片公司希望展示迪伦“另一面”，而非继续政治抗议主题。迪伦在录制期间大量饮酒，导致部分歌曲如《Ballad in Plain D》充满醉意与尖锐情绪。歌曲《My Back Pages》回应了批评者说他过于严肃的言论。
items.storiesEn: Another Side was recorded in a single night, with Dylan improvising and performing 11 new songs straight. The title came from Columbia Records wanting to show Dylan's 'other side' beyond protest songs. Dylan drank heavily during the session, giving songs like 'Ballad in Plain D' a drunken, sharp edge. 'My Back Pages' responded to critics calling him too serious.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是迪伦从民��抗议转向个人表达的关键转折点，为后来的《Bringing It All Back Home》等更具实验性的作品铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a key turning point in Dylan's shift from folk protest to personal expression, paving the way for more experimental works like Bringing It All Back Home.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·迪伦（Bob Dylan）是美国传奇创作歌手、诗人，1941年生于明尼苏达州。他以深刻的歌词、独特嗓音和不断革新的音乐风格闻名，2016年获诺贝尔文学奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American legendary singer-songwriter and poet, born in Minnesota in 1941. Known for his profound lyrics, distinctive voice, and constant musical reinvention, he was awarded the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016.

items.name: Man Alive!
items.descriptionZh: 《Man Alive!》是斯蒂芬·斯蒂尔斯2005年发行的个人专辑，风格融合了民谣摇滚、蓝调与拉丁节奏。核心特色是斯蒂尔斯标志性的沙哑嗓音与精湛吉他技巧，歌词充满个人反思与社会评论。专辑录制于他个人生活低谷期，音乐中透露出沧桑与坚韧。
items.descriptionEn: Man Alive! is Stephen Stills' 2005 solo album, blending folk rock, blues, and Latin rhythms. Its core features are Stills' signature raspy vocals and masterful guitar work, with lyrics full of personal reflection and social commentary. Recorded during a low period in his personal life, the music exudes weariness and resilience.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Man Alive!》时，斯蒂尔斯与长期合作伙伴尼尔·杨和格雷厄姆·纳什保持联系，但专辑主要由他独立完成。部分歌曲灵感来自他当时与抑郁症的斗争。专辑中《Drivin' Thunder》的吉他独奏���斯蒂尔斯在录音室一次即兴完成，未经过多后期编辑。封面照片由他的儿子拍摄，显得格外私人。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Man Alive!, Stills stayed in touch with longtime collaborators Neil Young and Graham Nash, but largely worked solo. Some songs were inspired by his battle with depression at the time. The guitar solo on 'Drivin' Thunder' was improvised in one take with minimal editing. The cover photo was taken by his son, adding a personal touch.
items.artistIntroZh: 斯蒂芬·斯蒂尔斯（Stephen Stills）是美国著名吉他手、歌手和创作人，1945年生于达拉斯。他是布法罗·斯普林菲尔德、克罗斯比、斯蒂尔斯、纳什与杨等传奇乐队的核心成员，以精湛吉他和多乐器才能闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Stephen Stills is an American renowned guitarist, singer, and songwriter, born in Dallas in 1945. He was a key member of legendary bands Buffalo Springfield and Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young, famous for his virtuosic guitar and multi-instrumental skills.

items.name: Orgasmatron
items.descriptionZh: 《Orgasmatron》是Motörhead在1986年发行的第九张录音室专辑，延续了乐队标志性的硬核重金属与速度金属风格。专辑以粗粝的吉他音色、Lemmy标志性的沙哑嗓音和极简却充满力量的节奏为核心特色，歌词充满政治讽刺与末日意象。整张专辑如同一台失控的战争机器，在轰鸣的贝斯与鼓点中展现出不妥协的叛逆精神。
items.descriptionEn: Orgasmatron is Motörhead's ninth studio album, released in 1986, continuing the band's signature hardcore heavy metal and speed metal style. The album is defined by raw guitar tones, Lemmy's iconic raspy vocals, and minimalist yet powerful rhythms, with lyrics full of political satire and apocalyptic imagery. It sounds like an out-of-control war machine, showcasing an uncompromising rebellious spirit amidst roaring bass and drums.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Motörhead正处于阵容动荡期：吉他手Phil Campbell和鼓手Mikkey Dee刚刚加入，但鼓手实际上由Pete Gill录制。Lemmy在录音室中坚持用老式放大器制造失真，导致邻居多次报警。有趣的是，专辑同名曲《Orgasmatron》的歌词灵感来自Lemmy对��视布道者的厌恶，他故意用双关语讽刺宗教狂热。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Motörhead was in a period of lineup turmoil: guitarist Phil Campbell and drummer Mikkey Dee had just joined, but drums were actually recorded by Pete Gill. Lemmy insisted on using vintage amplifiers to create distortion, causing neighbors to call the police multiple times. Interestingly, the lyrics for the title track 'Orgasmatron' were inspired by Lemmy's disgust with TV evangelists, deliberately using double entendres to satirize religious fanaticism.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为Motörhead在80年代中后期的转型作品，其政治化歌词影响了后来的工业金属乐队如Ministry和Rammstein。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a transitional work for Motörhead in the mid-to-late 80s, and its politicized lyrics influenced later industrial metal bands such as Ministry and Rammstein.
items.artistIntroZh: Motörhead成立于1975年，由贝斯手兼主唱Lemmy Kilmister领军，是重金属与速度金属的先驱。乐队以三件套编制、震耳欲聋的音量和Lemmy粗犷的声线闻名，至今已发行23张录音室专辑，影响了无数金属乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Motörhead was formed in 1975, led by bassist and vocalist Lemmy Kilmister, and is a pioneer of heavy metal and speed metal. Known for their three-piece lineup, deafening volume, and Lemmy's gritty vocals, they have released 23 studio albums and influenced countless metal bands.

items.name: Back to Basics
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Basics》是Q41594在2006年发行的专辑，以极简主义的电子节拍和低保真音效为核心特色。专辑融合了IDM、实验电子与氛围音乐，大量使用故障音效和循环采样，营造出一种既冰冷又怀旧的科技废墟感。其核心在于用最少的音符和音色，构建出深邃的情绪空间。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Basics is an album released by Q41594 in 2006, characterized by minimalist electronic beats and lo-fi soundscapes. The album blends IDM, experimental electronica, and ambient music, heavily utilizing glitch effects and looped samples to create a cold yet nostalgic sense of technological decay. Its core lies in using minimal notes and timbres to construct deep emotional spaces.
items.storiesZh: Q41594实际上是一个化名，制作人为了探索声音的原始质感，特意在废弃工厂中录制环境噪音，并用一台老旧的Game Boy作为音源之一。专辑中一首曲目的节拍来自误操作导致的数据损坏声，制作人将其保留并作为核心元素。
items.storiesEn: Q41594 is actually a pseudonym. To explore raw sound textures, the producer intentionally recorded environmental noise in an abandoned factory and used an old Game Boy as one of the sound sources. The beat of one track originated from data corruption caused by a misoperation, which the producer kept as a core element.
items.artistIntroZh: Q41594是一位低调的电子音乐制作人，真实身份至今未公开。其音乐风格深受早期Warp Records影响，专注于将数字噪音与情感旋律结合。除了《Back to Basics》，他还发行过数张实验性EP，但始终保持匿名。
items.artistIntroEn: Q41594 is a low-profile electronic music producer whose real identity remains undisclosed. His music is heavily influenced by early Warp Records, focusing on combining digital noise with emotional melodies. Besides Back to Basics, he has released several experimental EPs but remains anonymous.

items.name: Off the Wall
items.descriptionZh: 《Off the Wall》是Michael Jackson在1979年发行的第五张录音室专辑，标志着他的音乐从Motown时期的流行灵魂转向更成熟的迪斯科与放克风格。专辑由Quincy Jones制作，融合了弦乐、爵士和声与强劲的节奏，展现出Jackson惊人的音域和情感表达。核心特色在于其流畅的旋律、精致的编曲以及跨越种族的音乐融合。
items.descriptionEn: Off the Wall is Michael Jackson's fifth studio album, released in 1979, marking his shift from Motown-era pop soul to a more mature disco and funk style. Produced by Quincy Jones, the album blends strings, jazz harmonies, and powerful rhythms, showcasing Jackson's astonishing vocal range and emotional expression. Its core features are smooth melodies, meticulous arrangements, and cross-racial musical fusion.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Jackson与Quincy Jones在编曲上产生了激烈碰撞。Jackson坚持要在《Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough》中加入自己的口技节拍，而Quincy最初反对，最终这个决定让歌曲成为经典。此外，Jackson在录制《She's Out of My Life》时因情感投入过度而流泪，录音师不得不中断录制。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jackson and Quincy Jones clashed fiercely over arrangements. Jackson insisted on adding his own beatboxing to 'Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough,' which Quincy initially opposed, but the decision ultimately made the song a classic. Additionally, Jackson cried while recording 'She's Out of My Life' due to emotional immersion, forcing the engineer to pause.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Jackson职业生涯的转折点，奠定了他作为全球超级巨星的地位，并打破了种族壁垒，使黑人音乐在主流电台获得广泛播放。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a turning point in Jackson's career, establishing him as a global superstar and breaking racial barriers, allowing Black music to gain widespread airplay on mainstream radio.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者和慈善家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他五岁出道，独唱生涯中发行了多张里程碑式专辑，以标志性的舞步、音乐录影带和社会关怀闻名，是全球最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the 'King of Pop.'
