He debuted at age five and released several landmark albums during his solo career, famous for his iconic dance moves, music videos, and social advocacy, making him one of the most influential artists globally.

items.name: The Red Hot Chili Peppers
items.descriptionZh: 《The Red Hot Chili Peppers》是Red Hot Chili Peppers在1984年发行的同名首张专辑，融合了朋克、放克和说唱元素，奠定了乐队早期狂野不羁的风格。专辑以快速的吉他节奏、Slap贝斯技巧和Anthony Kiedis的即兴说唱为核心，充满青春能量和街头气息。制作相对粗糙，但展现了乐队原始的爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: The Red Hot Chili Peppers is the self-titled debut album by Red Hot Chili Peppers, released in 1984, blending punk, funk, and rap elements, establishing the band's early wild and unrestrained style. The album features fast guitar riffs, slap bass techniques, and Anthony Kiedis's improvisational rapping, full of youthful energy and street vibe. The production is relatively raw, showcasing the band's explosive power.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队成员经常因创作分歧争吵，甚至一度在录音室大打出手。吉他手Jack Sherman与Kiedis关系紧张，导致专辑中部分吉他部分由Hillel Slovak（未参与录制）的朋友重新录制。最著名的趣事是：Kiedis在录制《True Men Don't Kill Coyotes》时，因过度兴奋而撞坏了录音室的麦克风支架。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members often argued over creative differences, even getting into physical fights in the studio. Guitarist Jack Sherman had a tense relationship with Kiedis, leading to some guitar parts being re-recorded by a friend of Hillel Slovak (who didn't participate). The most famous anecdote: Kiedis, while recording 'True Men Don't Kill Coyotes,' got so excited that he smashed the studio's microphone stand.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为乐队的首张专辑，它虽未获得商业成功，但为后续的《Freaky Styley》和《The Uplift Mofo Party Plan》奠定了基础，确立了放克摇滚的独特分支。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the band's debut, it didn't achieve commercial success but laid the groundwork for subsequent albums like Freaky Styley and The Uplift Mofo Party Plan, establishing a unique branch of funk rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers成立于1983年，是来自洛杉矶的另类摇滚乐队，以其独特的放克摇滚融合风格闻名。乐队经历多次成员更迭，但主唱Anthony Kiedis和贝斯手Flea始终是核心成员，至今已发行12张录音室专辑，全球销量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Red Hot Chili Peppers formed in 1983 in Los Angeles, known for their unique fusion of funk and alternative rock. Despite numerous lineup changes, vocalist Anthony Kiedis and bassist Flea have remained core members. They have released 12 studio albums, selling over 120 million copies worldwide.

items.name: Alternative 4
items.descriptionZh: 《Alternative 4》是Anathema在1998年发行的第五张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从死亡厄运金属向氛围摇滚和另类摇滚的彻底转型。专辑以柔和的吉他音色、钢琴和弦乐为特色，主唱Vincent Cavanagh的嗓音从低吼变为清嗓，歌词探讨失落���抑郁与存在主义。核心特色在于其忧郁的旋律和层层递进的情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: Alternative 4 is Anathema's fifth studio album, released in 1998, marking the band's complete transition from death-doom metal to atmospheric rock and alternative rock. The album features soft guitar tones, piano, and strings, with vocalist Vincent Cavanagh shifting from growls to clean vocals, exploring themes of loss, depression, and existentialism. Its core lies in melancholic melodies and layered emotional tension.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队内部对风格转变存在严重分歧。吉他手Danny Cavanagh（Vincent的哥哥）希望保留金属元素，而Vincent坚持走向更柔和的氛围音乐。最终，Danny在录制中途退出，导致专辑中部分吉他部分由客座乐手完成。专辑标题“Alternative 4”源自乐队对“第四种选择”的思考——既不回归金属，也不完全流行，而是寻找中间路径。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band was deeply divided over the stylistic shift. Guitarist Danny Cavanagh (Vincent's brother) wanted to retain metal elements, while Vincent insisted on a softer, atmospheric direction. Danny eventually left mid-recording, resulting in some guitar parts being played by session musicians. The album title 'Alternative 4' comes from the band's contemplation of a 'fourth choice'—neither returning to metal nor going fully pop, but finding a middle path.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为厄运金属向氛围摇滚转型的标杆作品，影响了后来的后摇滚和氛围金属乐队，如Katatonia和Opeth。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a benchmark for the transition from doom metal to atmospheric rock, influencing later post-rock and atmospheric metal bands such as Katatonia and Opeth.
items.artistIntroZh: Anathema成立于1990年，是英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，最初为死亡厄运金属风格，后逐渐转向氛围摇滚和前卫摇滚。乐队由Cavanagh兄弟（Vincent和Danny）主导，以其情感深刻的歌词和动态丰富的音乐著称，发行了11张录音室专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Anathema formed in 1990 in Liverpool, England, initially as a death-doom metal band before gradually evolving into atmospheric and progressive rock. Led by the Cavanagh brothers (Vincent and Danny), they are known for emotionally profound lyrics and dynamic music, having released 11 studio albums.

items.name: Always Outnumbered, Never Outgunned
items.descriptionZh: 《Always Outnumbered, Never Outgunned》是The Prodigy在2004年发行的第五张录音室专辑，延续了乐队标志性的电子朋克风格，融合了碎拍、工业摇滚和说唱元素。专辑充满攻击性的节奏和扭曲的合成器音色，展现了Liam Howlett对电子音乐边界的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Always Outnumbered, Never Outgunned is The Prodigy's fifth studio album, released in 2004. It continues the band's signature electronic punk style, blending breakbeats, industrial rock, and rap elements. The album features aggressive rhythms and distorted synth textures, showcasing Liam Howlett's exploration of electronic music boundaries.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于英国埃塞克斯的录音室，Liam Howlett几乎独自完成了所有创作和制作。期间他因过度劳累而住院，但坚持用笔记本电脑在医院继续编曲。专辑邀请了多位客座歌手，包括Oasis的Liam Gallagher和Kool Keith，但最终只有部分合作被收录。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at a studio in Essex, England, with Liam Howlett handling almost all writing and production alone. He was hospitalized due to overwork but continued arranging tracks on his laptop from the hospital. Multiple guest vocalists were invited, including Liam Gallagher of Oasis and Kool Keith, though only some collaborations made the final cut.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑发行首周登顶英国专辑榜，但被部分乐评认为创新性不及前作，标志着The Prodigy从巅峰期进入转型阶段。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the UK Albums Chart, but some critics felt it lacked the innovation of earlier works, marking The Prodigy's transition from their peak period.
items.artistIntroZh: The Prodigy是英国电子音乐先锋，由Liam Howlett于1990年创立。他们将硬核碎拍、朋克态度和俱乐部文化结合，创造了独特的电子朋克风格。乐队在全球售出超过2500万张唱片，是90年代最具影响力的电子团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Prodigy is a pioneering British electronic music group founded by Liam Howlett in 1990. They combined hardcore breakbeats, punk attitude, and rave culture to create a unique electronic punk style. With over 25 million records sold worldwide, they were one of the most influential electronic acts of the 1990s.

items.name: Temptation Box
items.descriptionZh: 《Temptation Box》是日本女子摇滚乐队Scandal在2010年��行的第二张录音室专辑，延续了她们青春活力的J-Pop摇滚风格。专辑以吉他驱动的旋律和清新的和声为特色，歌词多围绕少女的恋爱与成长主题，展现了乐队从校园走向主流市场的过渡。
items.descriptionEn: Temptation Box is the second studio album by Japanese all-female rock band Scandal, released in 2010. It continues their youthful J-Pop rock style, characterized by guitar-driven melodies and fresh harmonies. The lyrics focus on themes of teenage love and growth, marking the band's transition from school clubs to the mainstream.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，四位成员仍在高中就读，经常在放学后赶往录音室工作到深夜。主打歌《少女S》的MV拍摄于一个废弃的游乐园，成员们需要在凌晨3点开始化妆，但她们表示这段经历让团队更加团结。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, all four members were still in high school, often rushing to the studio after classes and working late into the night. The music video for lead single 'Shoujo S' was shot at an abandoned amusement park, with the members starting makeup at 3 AM. They later said this experience brought the team closer together.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑帮助Scandal确立了在日本女子摇滚乐队中的领先地位，并推动了她们首次亚洲巡演，为后来进军国际市场奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped establish Scandal as a leading all-female rock band in Japan and prompted their first Asia tour, laying groundwork for their later international expansion.
items.artistIntroZh: Scandal是日本大阪出身的四人女子摇滚乐队，2006年成立。成员包括HARUNA（主唱/吉他）、MAMI（吉他/主唱）、TOMOMI（贝斯/主唱）和RINA（鼓手/主唱）。她们以全员担任主唱和强烈的现场表现力著称，是日本最具国际知名度的女子摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Scandal is a four-piece all-female rock band from Osaka, Japan, formed in 2006. Members include HARUNA (vocals/guitar), MAMI (guitar/vocals), TOMOMI (bass/vocals), and RINA (drums/vocals). Known for all members sharing vocal duties and energetic live performances, they are one of Japan's most internationally recognized female rock bands.

items.name: Metallica
items.descriptionZh: 《Metallica》是金属乐队Metallica在1991年发行的同名专辑，通常被称为《黑色专辑》。这张专辑标志着乐队从鞭挞金属向更慢、更沉重、更商业化的硬摇滚风格转变。制作人Bob Rock带来了更为饱满的音场和精炼的编曲，使专辑兼具力量与旋律性。
items.descriptionEn: Metallica is the self-titled fifth studio album by the American heavy metal band Metallica, released in 1991 and commonly known as The Black Album. It marked a shift from thrash metal to a slower, heavier, and more commercial hard rock sound. Producer Bob Rock brought a fuller sound and refined arrangements, balancing power with melody.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程充满紧张。乐队与制作人Bob Rock在混音上产生严重分歧，鼓手Lars Ulrich要求鼓声像“推土机”，而James Hetfield为追求完美人声录制了数百次。专辑预算严重超支，从原定的65万美元飙升至100万美元。贝斯手Jason Newsted因压力过大一度崩溃。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was tense. The band clashed heavily with producer Bob Rock over mixing; drummer Lars Ulrich demanded the drums sound like 'a bulldozer,' while James Hetfield recorded hundreds of vocal takes for perfection. The budget ballooned from $650,000 to over $1 million. Bassist Jason Newsted broke down from stress at one point.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Metallica》是商业上最成功的金属专辑之一，全球销量超过3000万张，将金属乐带入主流视野，并影响了无数后续乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Metallica is one of the most commercially successful metal albums ever, with over 30 million copies sold worldwide. It brought heavy metal into the mainstream and influenced countless subsequent bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica是美国殿堂级重金属乐队，1981年成立于洛杉矶。乐队由鼓手Lars Ulrich和吉他手James Hetfield创立，以快速、技术性的鞭挞金属风格闻名。他们是金属乐史上最成功的乐队之一，全球唱片销量超过1.25亿张，荣获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica is an American heavy metal band formed in Los Angeles in 1981 by drummer Lars Ulrich and guitarist James Hetfield. Renowned for their fast, technical thrash metal style, they are one of the most successful metal bands in history, with over 125 million records sold worldwide and multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: The Final Frontier
items.descriptionZh: 《The Final Frontier》是英国重金属乐队Iron Maiden在2010年发行的第15张录音室专辑。专辑延续了乐队标志性的前卫重金属风格，融合了复杂的编曲、史诗般的吉他独奏和Bruce Dickinson高亢的嗓音。主题涉及外星生命、宇宙探索和人类困境，充满科幻色彩。
items.descriptionEn: The Final Frontier is the 15th studio album by British heavy metal band Iron Maiden, released in 2010. It continues their signature progressive heavy metal style, featuring complex arrangements, epic guitar solos, and Bruce Dickinson's soaring vocals. Themes explore alien life, space exploration, and human struggles, with a sci-fi atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴哈马的一个录音室，乐队成员住在同一栋别墅内，每天工作后一起游泳和烧烤。吉他手Adrian Smith回忆说，这种与世隔绝的环境让创作更加专注。专辑封面由长期合作的艺术家Derek Riggs创作，但这是他最后一次为Iron Maiden绘制封面。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at a studio in the Bahamas, with all band members living in the same villa, swimming and barbecuing together after work. Guitarist Adrian Smith recalled that the isolated environment fostered focused creativity. The cover art was created by longtime collaborator Derek Riggs, marking his final cover for Iron Maiden.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑获得了商业成功，在28个国家进入排行榜前十，但也被视为乐队在2000年代后期创作周期的一个阶段性总结。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved commercial success, charting in the top ten in 28 countries, but is also seen as a period summary of the band's late-2000s creative cycle.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是英国重金属传奇乐队，1975年由贝斯手Steve Harris创立。他们以复杂的编曲、双吉他独奏和吉祥物Eddie闻名。乐队在全球售出超过1亿张唱片，是重金属音乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一，被誉为新浪潮英国重金属运动的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a legendary British heavy metal band founded in 1975 by bassist Steve Harris. Known for complex arrangements, dual guitar solos, and mascot Eddie, they have sold over 100 million records worldwide. One of the most influential bands in heavy metal history, they are icons of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal movement.

items.name: Who's Next
items.descriptionZh: 《Who's Next》是英国摇滚乐队The Who在1971年发行的第五张录音室专辑，被公认为摇滚史上最伟大的专辑之一。专辑融合了硬摇滚、前卫摇滚和民谣元素，以强大的节奏部、Pete Townshend的吉他轰鸣和Roger Daltrey的嘶吼式演唱为特色，展现了乐队巅峰时期的创作力。
items.descriptionEn: Who's Next is the fifth studio album by British rock band The Who, released in 1971. Widely regarded as one of the greatest rock albums of all time, it blends hard rock, progressive rock, and folk elements. It features the powerful rhythm section, Pete Townshend's roaring guitar, and Roger Daltrey's screaming vocals, showcasing the band at their creative peak.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本是Pete Townshend构思的宏大多媒体项目《Lifehouse》的一部分，但因过于复杂被放弃。乐队转而将其中最佳曲目录制成一张常规专辑。录制时使用了当时革命性的低音合成器音序器，��《Baba O'Riley》中创造了标志性的电子音效。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally part of Pete Townshend's ambitious multimedia project 'Lifehouse,' which was abandoned due to its complexity. The band instead recorded the best songs as a conventional album. During recording, they used a revolutionary bass synthesizer sequencer, creating the iconic electronic sound in 'Baba O'Riley.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Who's Next》被《滚石》杂志列为史上最伟大500张专辑第13位，确立了The Who作为超级乐队的地位，其音乐和视觉风格影响了无数摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Who's Next was ranked No. 13 on Rolling Stone's list of the 500 Greatest Albums of All Time, cementing The Who's status as a supergroup. Its music and visual style influenced countless rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who是英国传奇摇滚乐队，1964年成立于伦敦。成员包括Pete Townshend（吉他）、Roger Daltrey（主唱）、John Entwistle（贝斯）和Keith Moon（鼓手）。他们以破坏乐器的舞台表演、摇滚歌剧和极具冲击力的音乐风格闻名，是摇滚乐史上最有影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who is a legendary English rock band formed in London in 1964. Members include Pete Townshend (guitar), Roger Daltrey (vocals), John Entwistle (bass), and Keith Moon (drums). Famous for their instrument-smashing stage antics, rock operas, and powerful music, they are one of the most influential bands in rock history.

items.name: Flick of the Switch
items.descriptionZh: 《Flick of the Switch》是AC/DC在1983年发行的专辑，风格回归早期硬摇滚的粗粝与直接。核心特色是极简的吉他 riff、邦·斯科特式的狂野嗓音（由布莱恩·约翰逊接替），以及不加修饰的录音质感，仿佛一场没有花哨的现场演出。
items.descriptionEn: "Flick of the Switch" is AC/DC's 1983 album that returns to the raw, straightforward hard rock of their early years. Its core features are minimalist guitar riffs, Brian Johnson's wild vocals reminiscent of Bon Scott, and an unpolished recording quality that feels like a no-frills live show.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，乐队刻意避免过度制作，选择在伦敦的录制室以“一次性”方式完成，许多歌曲只用两到三次就录好。吉他手安格斯·杨曾透露，他们甚至把录音设备搬到走廊里，只为捕捉更自然的回声。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band deliberately avoided over-production, choosing to complete the album in a London studio with a 'one-take' approach, with many songs finished in just two or three takes. Guitarist Angus Young once revealed they even moved recording equipment into the hallway to capture a more natural echo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为AC/DC在80年代商业低谷期的转折点，虽未大卖，但巩固了其硬摇滚阵地，影响了后来的车库摇滚复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a turning point in AC/DC's commercial slump of the 80s, the album, though not a huge seller, solidified their hard rock stance and influenced the later garage rock revival.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是1973年成立于澳大利亚的硬摇滚乐队，由杨氏兄弟领衔。以爆炸性的现场和经典 riff 闻名，代表专辑《Back in Black》全球销量超5000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is an Australian hard rock band formed in 1973, led by the Young brothers. Known for explosive live shows and iconic riffs, their landmark album "Back in Black" has sold over 50 million copies worldwide.

items.name: Sacred Heart
items.descriptionZh: 《Sacred Heart》是Dio在1985年发行的重金属专辑，融合了史诗般的旋律与黑暗奇幻主题。核心特色是罗尼·詹姆斯·迪奥标志性的高亢嗓音、键盘与吉他的华丽交织，以及围绕“神圣之心”的寓言式歌词。
items.descriptionEn: "Sacred Heart" is a 1985 heavy metal album by Dio, blending epic melodies with dark fantasy themes. Its core features are Ronnie James Dio's signature soaring vocals, ornate interplay between keyboards and guitar, and allegorical lyrics centered around the 'Sacred Heart.'
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，迪奥坚持在录音室营造神秘氛围，甚至点燃蜡烛和香薰。吉他手克雷格·戈尔德曾回忆，迪奥会要求全组在凌晨排练，以捕捉“午夜魔力”。专辑封面由著名艺术家设计，但迪奥认为原稿过于黑暗，要求修改。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dio insisted on creating a mystical atmosphere in the studio, even lighting candles and incense. Guitarist Craig Goldy recalled that Dio would demand the band rehearse at dawn to capture 'midnight magic.' The album cover was designed by a famous artist, but Dio found the original too dark and requested revisions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了力量金属的早期发展，其奇幻叙事和双吉他编曲成为后世金属乐队（如Blind Guardian）的模板。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album propelled the early development of power metal, with its fantasy narrative and dual-guitar arrangements serving as a template for later metal bands like Blind Guardian.
items.artistIntroZh: Dio是由前Rainbow、Black Sabbath主唱罗��·詹姆斯·迪奥于1982年组建的美国重金属乐队。以其歌剧式唱腔和恶魔角手势闻名，代表作品有《Holy Diver》。
items.artistIntroEn: Dio is an American heavy metal band formed in 1982 by former Rainbow and Black Sabbath vocalist Ronnie James Dio. Known for his operatic vocals and the 'devil horns' hand gesture, their代表作 is "Holy Diver."

items.name: In Through the Out Door
items.descriptionZh: 《In Through the Out Door》是Led Zeppelin在1979年发行的最后一张录音室专辑，风格转向流行化与实验性。核心特色是键盘主导的编曲、民谣与布鲁斯的融合，以及罗伯特·普兰特更细腻的演唱，体现了乐队对合成器与新浪潮的试探。
items.descriptionEn: "In Through the Out Door" is Led Zeppelin's final studio album, released in 1979, marking a shift toward pop and experimental sounds. Its core features are keyboard-driven arrangements, a blend of folk and blues, and Robert Plant's more delicate vocals, reflecting the band's tentative exploration of synthesizers and new wave.
items.storiesZh: 录制主要在ABBA的Polar Studios进行，因为吉米·佩奇认为那里有更好的音响。鼓手约翰·博纳姆在录音期间酗酒严重，导致部分歌曲的鼓点由佩奇和琼斯临时补录。专辑封面以可擦拭的棕色纸袋包装，内附六种不同图案，歌迷需用水擦拭才能看到隐藏画面。
items.storiesEn: Recording mainly took place at ABBA's Polar Studios, as Jimmy Page believed it had better acoustics. Drummer John Bonham's heavy drinking during sessions led to Page and Jones temporarily overdubbing some drum parts. The album cover came in a washable brown paper bag with six different inner sleeves; fans had to wipe with water to reveal hidden images.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Led Zeppelin的绝唱，它标志着乐队从硬摇滚向更广泛的音乐领域拓展，但约翰·博纳姆的离世使乐队戛然而止，也终结了70年代硬摇滚的黄金时代。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Led Zeppelin's swan song, it marked the band's expansion beyond hard rock into broader musical territory, but John Bonham's death abruptly ended the band, also closing the golden era of 70s hard rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Led Zeppelin是1968年成立的英国摇滚乐队，由吉米·佩奇、罗伯特·普兰特、约翰·保罗·琼斯和约翰·博纳姆组成。以重型吉他 riff、神秘歌词和传奇现场著称，全球销量超3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin is a British rock band formed in 1968, consisting of Jimmy Page, Robert Plant, John Paul Jones, and John Bonham. Renowned for heavy guitar riffs, mystical lyrics, and legendary live performances, they have sold over 300 million records worldwide.

items.name: Come
items.descriptionZh: 《Come》是Prince在1994年发行的专辑，风格融合了放克、灵魂乐与情色R&B。核心特色是Prince的低沉呻吟式演唱、迷幻的合成器音色以及直白露骨的性爱主题歌词，比以往作品更黑暗、更实验。
items.descriptionEn: "Come" is a 1994 album by Prince that blends funk, soul, and erotic R&B. Its core features are Prince's low, moaning vocals, psychedelic synth textures, and explicitly sexual lyrics, making it darker and more experimental than his previous work.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是Prince为与华纳兄弟唱片公司的合同纠纷而准备的“垃圾作品”，他故意收录大量未完成或粗糙的歌曲。录制时，Prince几乎独自完成所有乐器，仅用几天时间就录完了大部分内容。专辑发行后，他立刻将名字改为“符号”，以示抗议。
items.storiesEn: This album was originally intended by Prince as a 'throwaway' project to fulfill his contract with Warner Bros. during a dispute, deliberately including many unfinished or rough tracks. Recording almost entirely alone, Prince completed most of the songs in just a few days. After its release, he immediately changed his name to a symbol in protest.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince是美国传奇音乐人，以非凡的乐器才能、性别模糊的舞台形象和多产创作闻名。代表作《Purple Rain》奠定其流行巨星地位，一生获奖无数，包括7座格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince is an American legendary musician, known for his extraordinary instrumental skills, androgynous stage persona, and prolific songwriting. His masterpiece "Purple Rain" cemented his status as a pop superstar, and he won numerous awards, including seven Grammys.

items.name: Gimme Shelter
items.descriptionZh: 《Gimme Shelter》是The Rolling Stones在1971年发行的现场专辑，记录了1969年美国巡演。核心特色是混入的暴力骚乱片段（如阿尔塔蒙特音乐节悲剧），以及米克·贾格尔沙哑的嘶吼与基思·理查兹的尖锐吉他，充满末日预言般的紧张感。
items.descriptionEn: "Gimme Shelter" is a 1971 live album by The Rolling Stones, documenting their 1969 US tour. Its core features are intercut violence and riot footage (including the Altamont Free Concert tragedy), Mick Jagger's hoarse shouts, and Keith Richards' piercing guitar, creating an apocalyptic tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名取自同名歌曲，但录制中最大的故事是阿尔塔蒙特音乐会——安保“地狱天使”与观众冲突导致一人死亡。乐队在混音时特意保留了现场骚乱的尖叫声。此外，专辑收录了未发布的录音室歌曲《Brown Sugar》的原始版本，以及翻唱《Honky Tonk Women》的现场版。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from the song of the same name, but the biggest story is the Altamont concert—security 'Hell's Angels' clashed with the audience, resulting in one death. The band intentionally kept the screams of the riot in the mix. Additionally, the album includes an unreleased studio version of "Brown Sugar" and a live cover of "Honky Tonk Women."
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为摇滚史上最黑暗的现场录音之一，直接反映了60年代乌托邦理想的破灭，影响了后来朋克和金属的暴力美学。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of the darkest live recordings in rock history, it directly reflects the collapse of 60s utopian ideals and influenced the violent aesthetics of later punk and metal.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones是1962年成立的英国摇滚乐队，核心成员米克·贾格尔和基思·理查兹。以蓝调根基、叛逆形象和长达60年的音乐生涯著称，代表专辑《Exile on Main St.》被视为摇滚经典。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are a British rock band formed in 1962, with core members Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. Known for their blues roots, rebellious image, and six-decade career, their landmark album "Exile on Main St." is considered a rock classic.

items.name: FZ:OZ
items.descriptionZh: 《FZ:OZ》是弗兰克·扎帕于2002年去世后发行的现场专辑，收录了他在澳大利亚悉尼的演出。风格融合了摇滚、爵士、古典与实验音乐，充满复杂的节奏、讽刺的歌词和即兴演奏，展现扎帕独特的幽默感与高超的乐器技艺。
items.descriptionEn: FZ:OZ is a posthumous live album by Frank Zappa, released in 2002, featuring performances from his Sydney, Australia concerts. The style blends rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music, with complex rhythms, satirical lyrics, and improvisation, showcasing Zappa's unique humor and instrumental virtuosity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音素材来自扎帕1984年在悉尼的演出，但直到他去世后才由家族整理发布。扎帕曾因现场录音质量要求极高而多次重录部分段落，而悉尼观众对即兴段落的热烈反应让他特别满意。专辑中包含了长达22分钟的《Watermelon in Easter Hay》，是扎帕生前最爱的吉他独奏之一。
items.storiesEn: The album's recordings come from Zappa's 1984 Sydney shows but were not released until after his death when his family compiled them. Zappa was known for demanding high-quality live recordings and often re-recorded sections; he was especially pleased with the Sydney audience's enthusiastic response to the improvisational passages. The album includes a 22-minute version of 'Watermelon in Easter Hay,' one of Zappa's favorite guitar solos.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕（1940-1993）是美国多产的音乐家、作曲家和讽刺作家，以融合摇滚、爵士、古典和前卫音乐著称。他一生发行了60多张专辑，以复杂的编曲、尖锐的社会评论和现场即兴闻名，被誉为20世纪最具创新精神的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was a prolific American musician, composer, and satirist, known for blending rock, jazz, classical, and avant-garde music. He released over 60 albums in his lifetime, renowned for complex arrangements, sharp social commentary, and live improvisation, and is considered one of the most innovative musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Eaten Back to Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Eaten Back to Life》是美国死亡金属乐队Cannibal Corpse的首张录音室专辑，于1990年发行。风格以极端的死亡金属为主，特点是高速鼓点、低沉咆哮的人声和血腥暴力的歌词主题，奠定了乐队在极端金属界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Eaten Back to Life is the debut studio album by American death metal band Cannibal Corpse, released in 1990. The style is extreme death metal, characterized by fast drumming, low growling vocals, and graphic violent lyrics, establishing the band's place in the extreme metal scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队预算极低，仅用两周时间在纽约一家小型录音室完成。主唱Chris Barnes因过度用力演唱导致声带出血，但坚持完成录制。专辑封面因过于血腥被多家唱片店拒绝上架，乐队不得不手动修改部分封面以通过审查。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded on a very low budget in just two weeks at a small studio in New York. Vocalist Chris Barnes suffered vocal cord bleeding from the intense growling but pushed through to finish. The album's artwork was so graphic that many record stores refused to stock it, forcing the band to manually alter some covers to pass censorship.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是死亡金属流派的里程碑之一，直接影响了后来众多极端金属乐队，并帮助定义了90年代死亡金属的声音标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in death metal, directly influencing countless later extreme metal bands and helping define the sound of 1990s death metal.
items.artistIntroZh: Cannibal Corpse是1988年成立于美国纽约州布法罗的死亡金属乐队，以极端血腥的歌词和封面艺术闻名。他们是死亡金属领域最畅销的乐队之一，全球销量超过200万张，对极端金属文化影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Cannibal Corpse is a death metal band formed in Buffalo, New York, in 1988, famous for their extremely violent lyrics and album art. They are one of the best-selling death metal bands, with over 2 million albums sold worldwide, and have had a profound impact on extreme metal culture.

items.name: The Midsummer Station
items.descriptionZh: 《The Midsummer Station》是美国电子流行乐队Owl City的第四张录音室专辑，于2012年发行。风格以合成器流行和电子舞曲为主，旋律轻快、节奏明朗，融合了梦幻般的电子音效和治愈系歌词，主打单曲《Good Time》与Carly Rae Jepsen合作。
items.descriptionEn: The Midsummer Station is the fourth studio album by American electronic pop band Owl City, released in 2012. The style is synth-pop and electronic dance music, with upbeat melodies, bright rhythms, dreamy electronic textures, and uplifting lyrics. The lead single 'Good Time' features Carly Rae Jepsen.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感来自主唱Adam Young在明尼苏达州夏日夜晚的孤独感，他试图用音乐捕捉那种“夏夜未眠”的情绪。与Carly Rae Jepsen的合作纯属偶然——两人在社交媒体上互动后决定共同创作，结果《Good Time》成为全球热门单曲。专辑录制时，Adam几乎独自包办了所有乐器演奏。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Adam Young's feelings of loneliness on summer nights in Minnesota; he aimed to capture the mood of 'sleepless summer nights.' The collaboration with Carly Rae Jepsen happened by chance after they interacted on social media and decided to write together, resulting in the global hit 'Good Time.' Adam played almost all instruments on the album himself.
items.artistIntroZh: Owl City是美国电子流行音乐项目，由主创Adam Young于2007年创立。他以梦幻的合成器音色和治愈系歌词著称，2009年单曲《Fireflies》全球爆红，销量超过900万张。他的音乐常描绘星空、海洋和夏日意象。
items.artistIntroEn: Owl City is an American electronic pop project created by Adam Young in 2007. Known for dreamy synth textures and uplifting lyrics, he achieved global fame with the 2009 single 'Fireflies,' which sold over 9 million copies. His music often evokes imagery of stars, oceans, and summer.

items.name: Andorra
items.descriptionZh: 《Andorra》是加拿大电子音乐人Dan Snaith以Caribou为化名发行的第三张专辑，2007年面世。风格融合了迷幻流行、电子和独立摇滚，以温暖模拟合成器、复杂节奏和梦幻和声为特色，呈现出一种复古而前卫的声音景观。
items.descriptionEn: Andorra is the third album by Canadian electronic musician Dan Snaith under the alias Caribou, released in 2007. The style blends psychedelic pop, electronic, and indie rock, characterized by warm analog synthesizers, complex rhythms, and dreamy harmonies, creating a retro yet avant-garde soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Andorra》取自欧洲小国安道尔，但Snaith并未去过那里——他只是被这个国名的发音和神秘感吸引。录制过程中，他大量使用老式模拟合成器和磁带循环，故意制造一些“不完美”的声音瑕疵，以追求温暖的手工质感。专辑封面由他妻子设计。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Andorra' was taken from the small European country, but Snaith had never visited—he was simply drawn to the name's sound and mystique. During recording, he extensively used vintage analog synthesizers and tape loops, deliberately introducing 'imperfect' sonic artifacts to achieve a warm, handcrafted feel. The album cover was designed by his wife.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Andorra》被广泛认为是2000年代独立电子乐的经典之作，影响了随后一批独立电子音乐人，并帮助Caribou从实验电子转向更流行化的方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: Andorra is widely regarded as a classic of 2000s indie electronic music, influencing a wave of independent electronic artists and helping Caribou shift from experimental electronics toward a more pop-oriented direction.
items.artistIntroZh: Dan Snaith是加拿大音乐人、作曲家，以Caribou和Daphni两个艺名活动。他拥有数学博士学位，音乐风格横跨电子、独立摇滚和迷幻舞曲。其作品以精密的节奏编排和温暖的声音质感著称，多次获得加拿大朱诺奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Dan Snaith is a Canadian musician and composer active under the aliases Caribou and Daphni. He holds a PhD in mathematics, and his music spans electronic, indie rock, and psychedelic dance. Known for meticulous rhythmic arrangements and warm sonic textures, he has won multiple Juno Awards.

items.name: ABBA Live
items.descriptionZh: 《ABBA Live》是瑞典流行乐队ABBA于1986年发行的现场专辑，收录了他们1977年澳大利亚巡演和1979年英国巡演的演出录音。风格延续了ABBA标志性的流行、迪斯科和华丽摇滚，现场演绎比录音室版本更富有激情和即兴元素。
items.descriptionEn: ABBA Live is a live album by Swedish pop band ABBA, released in 1986, featuring recordings from their 1977 Australian tour and 1979 UK tour. The style continues ABBA's signature pop, disco, and glam rock, with live performances that are more energetic and improvisational than studio versions.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是ABBA解散后发行的首张现场作品，但乐队成员对是否发行存在分歧。部分录音母带因年代久远存在音质问题，制作人不得不进行大量修复。专辑中收录了《Dancing Queen》的现场版，当时观众合唱声震耳欲聋，乐队不得不暂停演奏。
items.storiesEn: This album was the first live release after ABBA's breakup, but members disagreed about its release. Some master tapes had audio quality issues due to age, requiring extensive restoration by producers. The live version of 'Dancing Queen' on the album features such loud audience singing that the band had to pause playing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为ABBA解散后唯一的官方现场专辑，它成为粉丝怀念乐队黄金时代的重要文献，也记录了70年代现场演出的独特氛围。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the only official live album after ABBA's breakup, it serves as an important document for fans to remember the band's golden era, capturing the unique atmosphere of 1970s live performances.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是1972年成立于瑞典斯德哥尔摩的流行乐队，由Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。他们以朗朗上口的旋律、华丽的和声和迪斯科节奏闻名，全球销量超过3.8亿张，是音乐史上最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a pop group formed in Stockholm, Sweden, in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for catchy melodies, lush harmonies, and disco rhythms, they have sold over 380 million records worldwide, making them one of the most successful bands in music history.

items.name: Stack-O-Tracks
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张特别的纯器乐专辑，将《Wild Honey》到《Friends》时期的歌曲伴奏重新混音并独立发行。它剔除了人声，让听众能专注于乐队细腻的器乐编排与和声结构，充满了加州阳光般的温暖与60年代末的迷幻色彩。
items.descriptionEn: A unique instrumental album that remixes and isolates the backing tracks from songs spanning 'Wild Honey' to 'Friends.' Stripping away the vocals allows listeners to focus on the band's intricate instrumental arrangements and harmonic structures, brimming with California sunshine warmth and late-60s psychedelic hues.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于一个实用主义想法：为歌迷提供卡拉OK伴奏。但制作人意外发现，去掉人声后，布莱恩·威尔逊复杂的编曲细节（如多轨键盘、贝斯线）反而更清晰。由于是纯伴奏版，最初销量惨淡，如今却成为研究乐队录音技术的珍贵文献。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from a practical idea: to provide karaoke backing tracks for fans. However, producers unexpectedly found that removing the vocals made Brian Wilson's complex arrangements (like multi-tracked keyboards and bass lines) clearer. Initially a commercial flop due to its instrumental nature, it has since become a valuable document for studying the band's recording techniques.
items.historicalImpactZh: 它是摇滚史上首批正式发行的纯伴奏专辑之一，为日后'伴奏版'或'人声分离版'专辑开创了先河。
items.historicalImpactEn: It was one of the first officially released all-instrumental backing track albums in rock history, pioneering the concept of 'instrumental' or 'vocal-free' editions.
items.artistIntroZh: 海滩男孩是20世纪60年代美国最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一，以其精妙的和声、冲浪摇滚风格及布莱恩·威尔逊天才般的录音室创新而闻名。他们用《Pet Sounds》等作品深刻影响了流行音乐的制作标准。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys are one of the most influential American rock bands of the 1960s, famed for their intricate harmonies, surf rock sound, and Brian Wilson's genius studio innovations. Albums like 'Pet Sounds' profoundly shaped pop music production standards.

items.name: All Hope Is Gone
items.descriptionZh: 这是Slipknot的第四张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从新金属向更纯粹、更极端的重金属转变。专辑充满了暴怒的吉他连复段、高速鼓点和主唱Corey Taylor撕裂般的咆哮，主题围绕愤怒、绝望与对宗教的质疑，整体氛围阴暗而沉重。
items.descriptionEn: The band's fourth studio album marks a shift from nu-metal to a purer, more extreme heavy metal sound. It is filled with furious guitar riffs, blast beats, and Corey Taylor's guttural screams, with themes revolving around anger, despair, and religious skepticism, creating a dark and heavy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队内部矛盾激化，吉他手Jim Root和主唱Corey Taylor的关系一度紧张。为了捕捉最原始的情绪，制作人Dave Fortman鼓励他们现场录音。专辑名称源自Corey Taylor在一场激烈争吵后写在墙上的涂鸦，直白地表达了他当时对世界的看法。
items.storiesEn: During recording, internal band tensions escalated, with guitarist Jim Root and vocalist Corey Taylor at odds. To capture raw emotion, producer Dave Fortman encouraged live recording. The album title originated from graffiti Corey wrote on a wall after a heated argument, bluntly expressing his worldview at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在Billboard 200夺冠，并成为Slipknot在商业上最成功的作品之一，巩固了他们作为现代重金属代表乐队的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, becoming one of Slipknot's most commercially successful works and solidifying their status as modern heavy metal icons.
items.artistIntroZh: Slipknot是一支来自美国爱荷华州的重金属乐队，以其九名成员统一佩戴恐怖面具、狂暴的现场表演和融合新金属、极端金属的暴力音乐风格著称。他们是21世纪最畅销的重金属乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Slipknot is an American heavy metal band from Iowa, known for its nine members wearing terrifying masks, chaotic live shows, and a violent sound blending nu-metal and extreme metal. They are one of the best-selling heavy metal bands of the 21st century.

items.name: Chapter V
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Trey Songz在R&B领域的成熟宣言，融合了当代R&B、嘻哈节奏和性感氛围。它以其流畅的情歌、派对圣歌和充满诱惑力的慢节奏曲目著称，展现了他在嗓音控制和情感表达上的游刃有余。
items.descriptionEn: This album is Trey Songz's mature declaration in R&B, blending contemporary R&B, hip-hop rhythms, and a sensual vibe. It is known for its smooth ballads, party anthems, and seductive slow jams, showcasing his effortless vocal control and emotional delivery.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制跨越了纽约、洛杉矶和亚特兰大，Trey Songz与多位顶级制作人合作。他透露，歌曲'Heart Attack'的灵感来源于一次真实的失恋经历，他在录音室里几乎崩溃，最终将那种心碎感完美地融入了歌声中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded across New York, LA, and Atlanta, with Trey Songz collaborating with top producers. He revealed that the song 'Heart Attack' was inspired by a real heartbreak; he nearly broke down in the studio, ultimately channeling that pain perfectly into his vocals.
items.artistIntroZh: Trey Songz（特雷·宋兹）是当代美国R&B歌手、词曲作者，以其性感的嗓音、迷人的外表和专辑《Trey Day》、《Ready》而闻名。他被誉为R&B界的'情歌王子'，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Trey Songz is a contemporary American R&B singer and songwriter, known for his sensual voice, charming looks, and albums like 'Trey Day' and 'Ready.' Often dubbed the 'Prince of R&B,' he has received multiple Grammy nominations.

items.name: Liverpool Sound Collage
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张实验性的拼贴音乐专辑，由保罗·麦卡特尼利用利物浦地区的声音采样（包括录音室对话、环境音和披头士早期录音片段）混合电子音乐和管弦乐元素创作而成。它充满了先锋艺术气息和怀旧情感。
items.descriptionEn: An experimental collage album created by Paul McCartney using sound samples from Liverpool, including studio chatter, ambient sounds, and early Beatles recordings, mixed with electronic music and orchestral elements. It is filled with avant-garde artistry and nostalgic sentiment.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的灵感来源于保罗·麦卡特尼参与的一个名为'利物浦之声'的艺术项目。他邀请披头士的早期鼓手Pete Best参与录制，并大量使用了披头士在洞穴俱乐部时期的录音片段。专辑中有一首曲目完全由披头士在录音室的笑声和对话剪辑而成。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by an art project called 'Liverpool Sound.' McCartney invited early Beatles drummer Pete Best to participate and heavily used recordings from the Beatles' Cavern Club days. One track is entirely edited from the Beatles' studio laughter and conversations.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑展示了采样技术在前数字时代的应用，并因其独特的音乐档案性质而受到评论界关注，但商业影响力有限。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album demonstrated sampling techniques in the pre-digital era and received critical attention for its unique archival nature, though its commercial impact was limited.
items.artistIntroZh: 保罗·麦卡特尼是传奇摇滚乐队披头士的成员之一，被誉为流行音乐史上最成功的作曲家和贝斯手之一。单飞后，他组建了Wings乐队，并持续进行个人创作，是音乐界的不老传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: Paul McCartney is a member of the legendary rock band The Beatles, hailed as one of the most successful songwriters and bassists in pop music history. Post-Beatles, he formed Wings and continues solo work, remaining an ageless legend in music.

items.name: Ritual de lo habitual
items.descriptionZh: 这是Jane's Addiction的首张主流厂牌专辑，也是另类摇滚史上的里程碑。它融合了硬摇滚、朋克、迷幻和世界音乐元素，主唱Perry Farrell妖冶的嗓音与Dave Navarro华丽的吉他交织，创造出一种狂野、神秘且充满仪式感的独特声音。
items.descriptionEn: Jane's Addiction's major-label debut and a milestone in alternative rock history. It blends hard rock, punk, psychedelia, and world music, with Perry Farrell's androgynous vocals weaving through Dave Navarro's ornate guitar work, creating a wild, mystical, and ritualistic sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队正处于创作巅峰，但内部关系紧张。制作人Dave Jerden回忆，他们经常在录音室里即兴创作到深夜。专辑封面是一尊由Perry Farrell设计的、融合了部落艺术和情色元素的雕塑，因过于露骨而被多家零售商拒绝销售。
items.storiesEn: Recording at their creative peak, the band had tense internal dynamics. Producer Dave Jerden recalled frequent late-night jam sessions. The album cover, a sculpture by Perry Farrell blending tribal art and eroticism, was so explicit that many retailers refused to stock it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑定义了90年代初的另类摇滚之声，直接影响了后来的涅槃、九寸钉等乐队。它是另类音乐打入主流市场的关键作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the early 90s alternative rock sound, directly influencing bands like Nirvana and Nine Inch Nails. It was a key work in bringing alternative music into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Jane's Addiction是80年代末至90年代初美国另类摇滚的先驱。他们由主唱Perry Farrell创立，以其狂放不羁的现场表演、融合多种风格的音乐以及一手创办Lollapalooza音乐节而闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Jane's Addiction is a pioneering American alternative rock band from the late 80s to early 90s. Founded by vocalist Perry Farrell, they are known for their wild live shows, genre-blending music, and founding the Lollapalooza festival.

items.name: Drama
items.descriptionZh: 《Drama》是Yes乐队在1980年发行的第十张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从经典前卫摇滚向更现代、更直接的声音转型。键盘与吉他的交织依然复杂，但节奏更加紧凑，人声部分由新主唱Trevor Horn带来更具流行感的演绎。整体风格硬朗而富有戏剧性，是乐队过渡期的独特见证。
items.descriptionEn: "Drama" is Yes's tenth studio album, released in 1980, marking a shift from classic prog rock to a more modern, direct sound. The interplay of keyboards and guitars remains complex, but the rhythms are tighter, and new vocalist Trevor Horn brings a pop-infused delivery. The style is hard-edged and dramatic, a unique testament to the band's transitional period.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Drama》时，原主唱Jon Anderson和键盘手Rick Wakeman已离队，乐队在压力下快速重组。新主唱Trevor Horn（后来成为著名制作人）和吉他手Trevor Rabin（未正式入队但贡献巨大）加入。有趣的是，Horn在录音时经常因追求完美而反复重录，甚至让鼓手Alan White在鼓房里连续敲打数小时，直到找到最合适的节奏。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Drama," original vocalist Jon Anderson and keyboardist Rick Wakeman had left, forcing the band to quickly regroup. New vocalist Trevor Horn (later a famous producer) and guitarist Trevor Rabin (not an official member but a major contributor) joined. Interestingly, Horn often demanded multiple retakes in pursuit of perfection, even making drummer Alan White play for hours in the drum booth until the right groove was found.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是Yes在80年代转型的关键作品，影响了后来前卫摇滚与流行摇滚的融合趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a key transitional work for Yes in the 1980s, influencing the later fusion of prog rock and pop rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是1968年成立于伦敦的英国前卫摇滚乐队，以其复杂的编曲、史诗般的歌曲结构和精湛的乐器演奏闻名。他们经历了多次成员变动，但始终是前卫摇滚领域的标杆，代表作包括《Close to the Edge》和《90125》。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes is an English progressive rock band formed in London in 1968, known for complex arrangements, epic song structures, and virtuosic musicianship. Despite numerous lineup changes, they remain a benchmark in prog rock, with classics like "Close to the Edge" and "90125."

items.name: Mother's Milk
items.descriptionZh: 《Mother's Milk》是Red Hot Chili Peppers在1989年发行的第四张录音室专辑，也是他们首次与制作人Michael Beinhorn合作，并引入吉他手John Frusciante后的作品。风格融合了放克、朋克和重金属，节奏狂放，歌词充满青春躁动。这张专辑为乐队后来的全球成功奠定了基础。
items.descriptionEn: "Mother's Milk" is the Red Hot Chili Peppers' fourth studio album, released in 1989, marking their first collaboration with producer Michael Beinhorn and the debut of guitarist John Frusciante. The style blends funk, punk, and heavy metal with wild rhythms and youthful, restless lyrics. This album laid the groundwork for the band's later global success.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，吉他手John Frusciante和贝斯手Flea经常在录音室里即兴对飙，许多歌曲的贝斯线都是Flea在凌晨灵感迸发时录下的。主唱Anthony Kiedis为了写出更真实的歌词，曾连续几天在洛杉矶街头游荡，观察街头生活。专辑封面上的牛奶瓶图案其实是Flea从超市买来后自己喷绘的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist John Frusciante and bassist Flea often engaged in impromptu jam sessions; many bass lines were recorded by Flea in the early morning when inspiration struck. To write more authentic lyrics, vocalist Anthony Kiedis wandered the streets of Los Angeles for days, observing street life. The album cover's milk bottle design was actually spray-painted by Flea himself after buying the bottles from a supermarket.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着RHCP从地下乐队走向主流的重要转折，影响了90年代另类摇滚和放克金属的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked a crucial turning point for RHCP from underground to mainstream, influencing the development of '90s alternative rock and funk metal.
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers是1983年成立于洛杉矶的美国摇滚乐队，以放克、朋克和另类摇滚的独特融合著称。他们的现场表演极具爆发力，成员经常赤膊上阵。乐队在全球售出超过1亿张唱片，是史上最成功的另类摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Red Hot Chili Peppers are an American rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1983, known for their unique fusion of funk, punk, and alternative rock. Their live performances are explosive, with members often performing shirtless. The band has sold over 100 million records worldwide, making them one of the most successful alternative rock bands ever.

items.name: Construction Time Again
items.descriptionZh: 《Construction Time Again》是Depeche Mode在1983年发行的第三张录音室专辑，标志着他们从早期合成器流行向更黑暗、更工业化的声音迈进。专辑大量使用采样和工业噪音，歌词关注社会与政治议题，如环境污染和劳工权益。这是一张充满实验精神且氛围阴郁的作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Construction Time Again" is Depeche Mode's third studio album, released in 1983, marking their shift from early synth-pop to a darker, more industrial sound. The album heavily features sampling and industrial noise, with lyrics tackling social and political issues like environmental pollution and labor rights. It is an experimental and moody work.
items.storiesZh: 为了录制专辑中的工业音效，乐队成员跑到伦敦的废铁厂和建筑工地，用录音机采集金属撞击、机器运转的声音。主唱Dave Gahan在录制《Everything Counts》时，因为歌词涉及商业腐败，一度被唱片公司要求修改，但他坚持保留原词。制作人Daniel Miller甚至用锤子敲击铁桶来制造节奏。
items.storiesEn: To capture industrial sounds for the album, band members visited scrapyards and construction sites in London, recording metal clashes and machinery noises with a tape recorder. Vocalist Dave Gahan was once asked by the record company to modify the lyrics of "Everything Counts" due to its critique of corporate corruption, but he insisted on keeping them. Producer Daniel Miller even used a hammer on a metal barrel to create rhythms.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了Depeche Mode工业电子风格的基础，对后来的电子音乐和工业摇滚产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album laid the foundation for Depeche Mode's industrial electronic style, profoundly influencing later electronic music and industrial rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是1980年成立于英国巴西尔登的电子乐队，以其阴郁的合成器音色和深刻的歌词闻名。他们是电子音乐商业化与艺术化结合的先驱，全球唱片销量超过1亿张，代表作包括《Personal Jesus》和《Enjoy the Silence》。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode are an electronic band formed in Basildon, England in 1980, known for their dark synth sounds and profound lyrics. They are pioneers in combining commercial and artistic electronic music, with over 100 million records sold worldwide, including classics like "Personal Jesus" and "Enjoy the Silence."

items.name: Greatest Hymns
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hymns》是当代基督教音乐团体Selah在2005年发行的赞美诗精选集。专辑以悠扬的钢琴、弦乐和纯净的和声重新演绎了多首传统赞美诗，风格温暖、庄重而充满灵性。主唱Todd Smith和Allison Krajewski的嗓音清澈动人，营造出宁静的敬拜氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Greatest Hymns" is a hymns compilation album by contemporary Christian music group Selah, released in 2005. It reinterprets traditional hymns with graceful piano, strings, and pure harmonies, creating a warm, solemn, and spiritual atmosphere. The clear voices of lead singers Todd Smith and Allison Krajewski evoke a peaceful worship experience.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Selah的成员们特意选择了一间乡村小教堂作为录音场地，以捕捉自然的声学效果。在一次录制《It Is Well with My Soul》时，窗外突然飞入一只鸽子，停在钢琴上静静听完整个段落，在场的所有工作人员都感到这是一次神圣的巧合。专辑中的合唱部分由当地教会唱诗班参与。
items.storiesEn: For this album, Selah specifically chose a small country church as the recording venue to capture natural acoustics. While recording "It Is Well with My Soul," a dove suddenly flew in through the window, landed on the piano, and stayed silently through the entire take—everyone present felt it was a divine coincidence. The choir parts were sung by a local church choir.
items.artistIntroZh: Selah是1997年成立的美国当代基督教音乐团体，以重新演绎传统赞美诗和创作灵性歌曲闻名。他们的音乐融合了福音、民谣和古典元素，多次获得格莱美提名。三位核心成员（Todd Smith、Allison Krajewski和Amy Perry）以和谐的人声和虔诚的演绎打动听众。
items.artistIntroEn: Selah is an American contemporary Christian music group formed in 1997, known for reimagining traditional hymns and creating spiritual songs. Their music blends gospel, folk, and classical elements, earning multiple Grammy nominations. The three core members (Todd Smith, Allison Krajewski, and Amy Perry) move listeners with harmonious vocals and devout performances.

items.name: Mistaken Identity
items.descriptionZh: 《Mistaken Identity》是Disco女王Donna Summer在1991年发行的第十一张录音室专辑，也是她回归流行舞曲风格的作品。专辑融合了House、R&B和流行元素，节奏强劲，旋律上口。Donna的嗓音依然充满力量，歌词探讨了身份认同与自我发现的主题。
items.descriptionEn: "Mistaken Identity" is Donna Summer's eleventh studio album, released in 1991, marking her return to pop dance music. The album blends house, R&B, and pop elements with strong beats and catchy melodies. Donna's voice remains powerful, and the lyrics explore themes of identity and self-discovery.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Donna Summer刚刚经历了一段低谷期，她将个人情感融入创作中。主打歌《Mistaken Identity》的歌词灵感来源于她一次在机场被粉丝误认的经历，她决定用幽默的方式处理这种尴尬。制作人Keith Diamond在录音室里用一台老式Roland TR-808鼓机打造了大部分节奏，Donna则坚持每首歌都要录满超过20遍人声才满意。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Donna Summer was emerging from a low period and poured her personal emotions into the work. The title track "Mistaken Identity" was inspired by an incident at an airport where a fan mistook her for someone else—she decided to handle the awkwardness with humor. Producer Keith Diamond used an old Roland TR-808 drum machine for most beats, while Donna insisted on recording over 20 vocal takes for each song until she was satisfied.
items.artistIntroZh: Donna Summer是1948年出生于波士顿的美国歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“Disco女王”。她在70年代以《Last Dance》《Hot Stuff》等金曲席卷全球，获得5项格莱美奖。她的音乐跨越Disco、R&B、摇滚和流行，是女性在舞曲音乐领域的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer (1948–2012) was an American singer and songwriter known as the "Queen of Disco." She dominated the global charts in the 1970s with hits like "Last Dance" and "Hot Stuff," winning five Grammy Awards. Her music spanned disco, R&B, rock, and pop, making her a pioneering female figure in dance music.

items.name: NEEI
items.descriptionZh: 《NEEI》是奥井雅美2000年发行的专辑，融合了J-Pop、摇滚与电子元素，展现了她高亢有力的嗓音和充满活力的编曲风格。专辑整体节奏紧凑，歌词多围绕自我成长与情感表达，是千禧年日本流行摇滚的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: NEEI is Masami Okui's 2000 album blending J-Pop, rock, and electronic elements, showcasing her powerful vocals and energetic arrangements. The album features tight rhythms and lyrics about self-growth and emotional expression, making it a representative J-pop rock work of the millennium.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，奥井雅美因过度劳累导致嗓音受损，但她坚持在录音室用冰水润喉完成所有主音轨。专辑同名曲《NEEI》的副歌部分曾录制了20多个版本，最终选用的版本是在凌晨突发灵感时一气呵成录制的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Masami Okui suffered vocal strain from overwork but insisted on finishing all lead tracks by drinking ice water to soothe her throat. The chorus of the title track 'NEEI' was recorded in over 20 versions, and the final take was captured in one go during a sudden burst of inspiration in the early morning.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美（Masami Okui）是日本著名歌手、作词家，1968年生于兵库县。自1990年代出道以来，她以高亢嗓音和充满力量的现场表演著称，曾为《秀逗魔导士》等动漫献唱，被誉为“动画歌曲女王”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a renowned Japanese singer and lyricist born in Hyogo Prefecture in 1968. Debuting in the 1990s, she is known for her powerful vocals and energetic live performances, contributing theme songs to anime like Slayers and earning the title 'Queen of Anison'.

items.name: Tattoo You
items.descriptionZh: 《Tattoo You》是滚石乐队1981年的经典专辑，融合了摇滚、布鲁斯和雷鬼风格，以粗犷的吉他 riff 和米克·贾格尔标志性的沙哑嗓音为特色。专辑既有硬朗的摇滚曲，也有柔情的抒情歌，展现了乐队成熟而多元的音乐面貌。
items.descriptionEn: Tattoo You is The Rolling Stones' 1981 classic album blending rock, blues, and reggae, characterized by gritty guitar riffs and Mick Jagger's iconic raspy vocals. The album balances hard-rocking tracks with tender ballads, showcasing the band's mature and diverse musicality.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑大部分歌曲源自过去未使用的录音片段，乐队在录音室重新整理和补录完成。主打歌《Start Me Up》��初以雷鬼风格录制，后来改为摇滚节奏，意外成为乐队最热门的单曲之一。贾格尔曾开玩笑说，专辑封面纹身样式是在伦敦一家小酒吧的餐巾纸上画出来的。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album's songs were compiled from previously unused recording sessions, with the band reworking and overdubbing in the studio. The lead single 'Start Me Up' was originally recorded as a reggae track before being reimagined as a rock anthem, unexpectedly becoming one of the band's biggest hits. Jagger joked that the tattoo-style album cover was sketched on a napkin at a small London pub.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tattoo You》是滚石乐队1980年代最成功的专辑之一，全球销量超过400万张，巩固了他们在后朋克时代的商业地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Tattoo You is one of The Rolling Stones' most successful albums of the 1980s, selling over 4 million copies worldwide and cementing their commercial relevance in the post-punk era.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队（The Rolling Stones）成立于1962年，是英国传奇摇滚乐队，核心成员包括米克·贾格尔、基思·理查兹等。他们以叛逆形象和布鲁斯摇滚风格闻名，是摇滚史上最具影响力和持久力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in 1962, are a legendary British rock band with core members Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. Known for their rebellious image and blues-rock sound, they are one of the most influential and enduring bands in rock history.

items.name: ...And Justice for All
items.descriptionZh: 《...And Justice for All》是金属乐队1988年的第四张专辑，以复杂编曲、快速节奏和政治批判歌词为特色。专辑风格极简而沉重，吉他音色尖锐，鼓点密集，展现了激流金属（Thrash Metal）的巅峰水准。
items.descriptionEn: ...And Justice for All is Metallica's fourth album (1988), featuring complex arrangements, fast tempos, and politically charged lyrics. The style is minimal yet heavy, with sharp guitar tones and dense drumming, representing the peak of thrash metal.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，贝斯手杰森·纽斯特德（Jason Newsted）的贝斯音轨被故意调低到几乎听不见，原因是乐队内部对新成员的不信任和制作人混音偏向吉他。专辑封面描绘的正义女神倒塌场景，灵感来自主唱詹姆斯·海特菲尔德对司法系统的失望。
items.storiesEn: During recording, bassist Jason Newsted's bass tracks were deliberately mixed nearly inaudible due to internal distrust of the new member and the producer's guitar-focused mix. The album cover depicting a collapsing Lady Justice was inspired by James Hetfield's disillusionment with the judicial system.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是激流金属的里程碑之作，尽管因贝斯音量问题引发争议，但其技术性和深度影响了整个重金属流派。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a thrash metal milestone; despite controversy over the bass mix, its technicality and depth influenced the entire heavy metal genre.
items.artistIntroZh: 金属乐队（Metallica）1981年成立于美国洛杉矶，由詹姆斯·海特菲尔德和拉尔斯·乌尔里希创立。他们是激流金属“四大天王”之一，以高速吉他、重型鼓点和批判性歌词闻名，全球销量过亿。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica, formed in Los Angeles in 1981 by James Hetfield and Lars Ulrich, is one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal, known for fast guitar work, heavy drumming, and critical lyrics, with over 100 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Born to Run
items.descriptionZh: 《Born to Run》是布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀1975年的第三张专辑，融合了摇滚、民谣和R&B，以史诗般的旋律、诗意的歌词和强烈的青春叛逆精神为特色。专辑充满公路电影般的画面感，被誉为“工人阶级的赞歌”。
items.descriptionEn: Born to Run is Bruce Springsteen's third album (1975), blending rock, folk, and R&B with epic melodies, poetic lyrics, and a fierce spirit of youthful rebellion. The album evokes road-movie imagery and is hailed as an 'anthem for the working class.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制历时14个月，斯普林斯汀对细节苛求到极致，仅《Born to Run》一首歌就录制了上百次。录音室费用高达5万美元，险些让哥伦比亚唱片公司放弃他。最终混音时，斯普林斯汀坚持在副歌中加入管弦乐，制作人认为太冒险，但结果大获成功。
items.storiesEn: The album took 14 months to record, with Springsteen obsessing over details—'Born to Run' alone was recorded hundreds of times. Studio costs reached $50,000, nearly causing Columbia Records to drop him. For the final mix, he insisted on adding orchestral strings to the chorus; the producer deemed it risky, but it proved a triumph.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Born to Run》让斯普林斯汀一跃成为国际巨星，被《滚石》杂志评为史上最伟大的专辑之一，确立了心脏摇滚（Heartland Rock）流派。
items.historicalImpactEn: Born to Run catapulted Springsteen to international stardom, was ranked among the greatest albums by Rolling Stone, and defined the heartland rock genre.
items.artistIntroZh: 布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀（Bruce Springsteen）1949年生于美国新泽西州，是著名歌手、词曲作者，以描绘蓝领生活的歌词和充满激情的现场表演著称，被称为“The Boss”。他获得20项格莱美奖，是摇滚名人堂成员。
items.artistIntroEn: Bruce Springsteen, born in New Jersey in 1949, is a renowned singer-songwriter known for lyrics depicting working-class life and electrifying live performances, earning the nickname 'The Boss.' He has won 20 Grammy Awards and is a Rock and Roll Hall of Fame inductee.

items.name: A Rush of Blood to the Head
items.descriptionZh: 《A Rush of Blood to the Head》是酷玩乐队2002年的第二张专辑，融合了另类摇滚、英伦流行和钢琴抒情风格。专辑以细腻的吉他音色、宏大的编曲和主唱克里斯·马丁富有穿透力的嗓音为特色，情感层次丰富，从内省到激昂。
items.descriptionEn: A Rush of Blood to the Head is Coldplay's second album (2002), blending alternative rock, Britpop, and piano-driven ballads. It features delicate guitar textures, grand arrangements, and Chris Martin's piercing vocals, with emotional depth ranging from introspection to soaring anthems.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制初期，乐队成员因压力大而频繁争吵，一度面临解散危机。某天深夜，马丁在录音室即兴弹出了《Clocks》的前奏钢琴和弦，其他成员加入后迅速完成编曲，这首歌后来成为乐队标志性曲目。专辑封面是燃烧的蜡烛，寓意“在黑暗中寻找光明”。
items.storiesEn: During early recording, band members frequently argued under pressure, nearly breaking up. One late night, Martin improvised the opening piano chords of 'Clocks' in the studio; other members joined in and quickly finished the arrangement, which later became the band's signature song. The album cover features a burning candle, symbolizing 'finding light in darkness.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超过1500万张，获得格莱美最佳另类专辑奖，巩固了酷玩乐队作为21世纪初最成功英伦乐队的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 15 million copies worldwide, won the Grammy for Best Alternative Album, and cemented Coldplay as the most successful British band of the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 酷玩乐队（Coldplay）1996年成立于英国伦敦，核心成员包括克里斯·马丁、强尼·巴克兰等。他们以旋律优美、情感真挚的另类摇滚风格闻名，是全球最畅销的乐队之一，拥有多首经典金曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Coldplay, formed in London in 1996, with core members Chris Martin and Jonny Buckland, is known for melodic, heartfelt alternative rock. They are one of the world's best-selling bands, with numerous classic hits.

items.name: I'm with You
items.descriptionZh: 《I'm with You》是Red Hot Chili Peppers在2011年发行的第十张录音室专辑，延续了乐队标志性的放克摇滚风格，同时融入了更多旋律化的流行元素。吉他手Josh Klinghoffer的加入为专辑注入了新鲜感，整体氛围温暖而充满活力。
items.descriptionEn: "I'm with You" is the tenth studio album by Red Hot Chili Peppers, released in 2011. It continues the band's signature funk rock style while incorporating more melodic pop elements. The addition of guitarist Josh Klinghoffer brings a fresh feel, with a warm and energetic overall atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，贝斯手Flea曾因个人原因短暂离队，但很快回归。吉他手Josh Klinghoffer在录制前仅加入乐队两年，他为了适应乐队的即兴创作风格，每天与Flea和 drummer Chad Smith进行长时间的 jam session。主唱Anthony Kiedis在歌词中反思了个人成长与衰老，部分灵感来自他戒除毒瘾后的生活。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, bassist Flea briefly left the band for personal reasons but quickly returned. Guitarist Josh Klinghoffer, who had only been in the band for two years before recording, held long jam sessions with Flea and drummer Chad Smith daily to adapt to the band's improvisational style. Vocalist Anthony Kiedis reflected on personal growth and aging in his lyrics, partly inspired by his post-addiction life.
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers是一支成立于1983年的美国摇滚乐队，以融合放克、朋克和另类摇滚而闻名。乐队成员包括主唱Anthony Kiedis、贝斯手Flea、鼓手Chad Smith和吉他手Josh Klinghoffer。他们以充满活力的现场表演和深刻歌词著称，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Red Hot Chili Peppers are an American rock band formed in 1983, known for blending funk, punk, and alternative rock. The lineup includes vocalist Anthony Kiedis, bassist Flea, drummer Chad Smith, and guitarist Josh Klinghoffer. Renowned for energetic live shows and introspective lyrics, they have sold over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: ATLiens
items.descriptionZh: 《ATLiens》是OutKast在1996年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了南方嘻哈、放克和灵魂乐，以迷幻的太空主题和深刻的歌词著称。专辑展现了二人组从青少年转向成熟的艺术蜕变，节奏流畅而富有实验性。
items.descriptionEn: "ATLiens" is the second studio album by OutKast, released in 1996. It blends Southern hip hop, funk, and soul, known for its psychedelic space theme and profound lyrics. The album marks the duo's artistic evolution from teenagers to maturity, with smooth, experimental rhythms.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，OutKast刚结束首张专辑《Southernplayalisticadillacmuzik》的巡演，二人决定在亚特兰大郊外的一个僻静录音室闭关创作。Big Boi和André 3000在录音室中大量使用即兴说唱，有时甚至整夜不睡。专辑标题“ATLiens”是“亚特兰大外星人”的缩写，灵感来自他们感觉自己在本土音乐圈中格格不入。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, OutKast had just finished touring for their debut album "Southernplayalisticadillacmuzik" and decided to lock themselves in a secluded studio outside Atlanta to create. Big Boi and André 3000 heavily used freestyle rapping in the studio, sometimes staying up all night. The album title "ATLiens" is short for "Atlanta aliens," inspired by their feeling of being outsiders in the local music scene.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《ATLiens》被公认为南方嘻哈的里程碑之作，拓宽了嘻哈音乐的题材��声音边界，影响了后来的Kendrick Lamar、Childish Gambino等艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: "ATLiens" is widely regarded as a milestone in Southern hip hop, expanding the thematic and sonic boundaries of the genre and influencing later artists like Kendrick Lamar and Childish Gambino.
items.artistIntroZh: OutKast是美国嘻哈二人组，由Big Boi（Antwan Patton）和André 3000（André Benjamin）组成，1992年成立于亚特兰大。他们以创新风格、社会意识歌词和多张经典专辑闻名，是史上最畅销的嘻哈团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: OutKast is an American hip hop duo formed in Atlanta in 1992, consisting of Big Boi (Antwan Patton) and André 3000 (André Benjamin). Known for their innovative style, socially conscious lyrics, and multiple classic albums, they are among the best-selling hip hop groups of all time.

items.name: Ten
items.descriptionZh: 《Ten》是Pearl Jam在1991年发行的首张录音室专辑，定义了90年代垃圾摇滚（grunge）的经典声音。专辑融合了硬摇滚、朋克和民谣元素，以Eddie Vedder深沉有力的嗓音和Mike McCready的吉他独奏为标志，情感充沛且充满愤怒与脆弱。
items.descriptionEn: "Ten" is the debut studio album by Pearl Jam, released in 1991, defining the classic sound of 1990s grunge. It blends hard rock, punk, and folk elements, marked by Eddie Vedder's deep, powerful vocals and Mike McCready's guitar solos, full of emotion, anger, and vulnerability.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队成员几乎身无分文，住在西雅图的一个破旧仓库里。Eddie Vedder的歌词很多来自他随身携带的笔记本，记录了他对童年创伤和社会不公的思考。吉他手Mike McCready在录制《Alive》的独奏时一次过，但后来他承认自己当时弹错了几个音符，只是效果意外地好。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band members were nearly penniless and lived in a run-down warehouse in Seattle. Many of Eddie Vedder's lyrics came from a notebook he carried, recording his thoughts on childhood trauma and social injustice. Guitarist Mike McCready nailed the solo for "Alive" in one take, but later admitted he played a few wrong notes—the result just happened to sound great.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Ten》是垃圾摇滚运动的核心专辑之一，与Nirvana的《Nevermind》共同将西雅图之声推向全球，销量超过1300万张，深刻影响了90年代摇滚乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Ten" is a cornerstone of the grunge movement, alongside Nirvana's "Nevermind," bringing the Seattle sound to the world. It has sold over 13 million copies and profoundly influenced 1990s rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: Pearl Jam是一支美国摇滚乐队，1990年成立于西雅图。成员包括主唱Eddie Vedder、吉他手Stone Gossard和Mike McCready、贝斯手Jeff Ament、鼓手Matt Cameron。他们是垃圾摇滚的代表乐队之一，以极具感染力的现场和关注社会议题的歌词著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Pearl Jam is an American rock band formed in Seattle in 1990. Members include vocalist Eddie Vedder, guitarists Stone Gossard and Mike McCready, bassist Jeff Ament, and drummer Matt Cameron. They are one of the defining bands of the grunge movement, known for powerful live performances and socially conscious lyrics.

items.name: No Code
items.descriptionZh: 《No Code》是Pearl Jam在1996年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格实验性极强，融合了另类摇滚、民谣、世界音乐和硬摇滚。与之前的作品相比，这张专辑更加内省和多元，展现了乐队不愿被标签化的决心。
items.descriptionEn: "No Code" is the fourth studio album by Pearl Jam, released in 1996. It is highly experimental, blending alternative rock, folk, world music, and hard rock. Compared to their earlier work, this album is more introspective and diverse, showcasing the band's determination to defy categorization.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Pearl Jam刻意远离商业压力，选择在自家录音室完成制作。Eddie Vedder在歌词中大量探索灵性和个人困惑，部分歌曲灵感来自他阅读的哲学书籍。鼓手Jack Irons（当时在队）为专辑带来了更复杂的节奏结构，但这也导致部分成员间出现创作分歧。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Pearl Jam deliberately distanced themselves from commercial pressure, choosing to produce it in their own studio. Eddie Vedder explored spirituality and personal confusion extensively in his lyrics, with some songs inspired by the philosophy books he was reading. Drummer Jack Irons (then in the band) brought more complex rhythmic structures, which also led to creative disagreements among members.
items.artistIntroZh: Pearl Jam是一支美国摇滚乐队，1990年成立于西雅图。成员包括主唱Eddie Vedder、吉他手Stone Gossard和Mike McCready、贝斯手Jeff Ament、鼓手Matt Cameron。他们是垃圾摇滚的代表乐队之一，以极具感染力的现场和关注社会议题的歌词著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Pearl Jam is an American rock band formed in Seattle in 1990. Members include vocalist Eddie Vedder, guitarists Stone Gossard and Mike McCready, bassist Jeff Ament, and drummer Matt Cameron. They are one of the defining bands of the grunge movement, known for powerful live performances and socially conscious lyrics.

items.name: A Matter of Life and Death
items.descriptionZh: 《A Matter of Life and Death》是Iron Maiden在2006年发行的第十四张录音室专辑，主题围绕战争、死亡和宗教信仰展开。音乐上延续了乐队标志性的双吉他旋律和史诗般的编曲，但更加沉重和阴暗，被认为是一张概念性强烈的金属杰作。
items.descriptionEn: "A Matter of Life and Death" is the fourteenth studio album by Iron Maiden, released in 2006, focusing on themes of war, death, and religious faith. Musically, it continues the band's signature twin-guitar melodies and epic arrangements, but is heavier and darker, considered a concept-driven metal masterpiece.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦的Sarm West Studios，制作人Kevin Shirley首次与乐队合作。主唱Bruce Dickinson在录制前刚完成个人独唱巡演，状态极佳。吉他手Adrian Smith和Dave Murray在创作《The Longest Day》时，参考了大量二战纪录片和士兵日记，力求歌词真实。专辑封面由长期合作艺术家Derek Riggs设计，但这是他最后一次为Iron Maiden创作封面。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Sarm West Studios in London, with producer Kevin Shirley working with the band for the first time. Vocalist Bruce Dickinson had just finished a solo tour before recording and was in top form. Guitarists Adrian Smith and Dave Murray referenced numerous WWII documentaries and soldier diaries while writing "The Longest Day" to ensure lyrical authenticity. The cover art was designed by longtime collaborator Derek Riggs, marking his final cover for Iron Maiden.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是一支英国重金属乐队，1975年成立于伦敦。成员包括主唱Bruce Dickinson、贝斯手Steve Harris、吉他手Dave Murray、Adrian Smith和Janick Gers，以及鼓手Nicko McBrain。他们以复杂的编曲、史诗般的歌词和标志性的吉祥物Eddie闻名，是全球最具影响力的重金属乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden are a British heavy metal band formed in London in 1975. The lineup includes vocalist Bruce Dickinson, bassist Steve Harris, guitarists Dave Murray, Adrian Smith, and Janick Gers, and drummer Nicko McBrain. Known for complex arrangements, epic lyrics, and their iconic mascot Eddie, they are one of the most influential heavy metal bands in the world.

items.name: Definitely Maybe
items.descriptionZh: 《Definitely Maybe》是Oasis的首张专辑，融合了英伦摇滚的粗粝与华丽，以慵懒又充满爆发力的吉他旋律和直白歌词定义了90年代英国青年文化。核心特色是反叛精神与朗朗上口的流行副歌的完美结合，充满青春躁动与街头诗意。
items.descriptionEn: Definitely Maybe is Oasis's debut album, blending gritty and glamorous Britpop with lazy yet explosive guitar riffs and straightforward lyrics that defined 90s British youth culture. Its core feature is the perfect fusion of rebellious spirit and catchy pop choruses, full of youthful restlessness and street poetry.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于蒙茅斯郡的Rockfield Studios，期间乐队成员酗酒狂欢不断。主唱Liam Gallagher曾因醉酒摔碎吉他，而吉他手Noel Gallagher则经常在凌晨灵感迸发时强行叫醒录音师。专辑封面在乐队成员位于伦敦的公寓拍摄，墙上贴满了名人照片，象征着他们的野心。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Rockfield Studios in Monmouthshire, with constant drinking and partying among band members. Liam Gallagher once smashed a guitar while drunk, and guitarist Noel Gallagher often woke up the engineer at dawn with sudden inspiration. The cover was shot at the band's London flat, with walls covered in celebrity photos to symbolize their ambition.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑以最快速度成为英国史上首张销量最高的出道专辑，彻底复兴了英伦摇滚，为90年代Britpop运动奠定基石。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album became the fastest-selling debut album in UK history, single-handedly reviving Britpop and laying the foundation for the 90s British music movement.
items.artistIntroZh: Oasis是1991年成立于曼彻斯特的英伦摇滚乐队，由Liam Gallagher（主唱）和Noel Gallagher（吉他/主创）兄弟领衔。他们以直白叛逆的歌词、标志性的吉他声浪和兄弟间的公开冲突闻名，是90年代全球最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Oasis is a Britpop band formed in Manchester in 1991, fronted by brothers Liam Gallagher (vocals) and Noel Gallagher (guitar/songwriter). Known for their blunt, rebellious lyrics, iconic guitar sound, and public sibling feuds, they became one of the most successful rock bands of the 1990s worldwide.

items.name: Lust for Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Lust for Life》是Iggy Pop的经典专辑，融合了朋克、硬摇滚和原始车库摇滚，充满狂躁的能量与黑暗的浪漫。核心特色是Iggy标志性的嘶吼与David Bowie制作的华丽摇滚质感，歌词探讨死亡、欲��与重生，如同一场失控的狂欢。
items.descriptionEn: Lust for Life is Iggy Pop's classic album, blending punk, hard rock, and raw garage rock with manic energy and dark romance. Its core feature is Iggy's signature snarl and David Bowie's glam rock production, with lyrics exploring death, desire, and rebirth, like an out-of-control carnival.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在柏林录制，是Iggy戒除毒瘾后的重生之作。制作人David Bowie为了鼓励他，特意将录音室布置成温馨的家庭氛围。同名主打歌的鼓点灵感来自军队进行曲，而Iggy在录制时因过于兴奋，曾跳上桌子即兴表演。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Berlin, the album marked Iggy's rebirth after overcoming heroin addiction. Producer David Bowie deliberately created a warm, homey studio atmosphere to encourage him. The drumbeat for the title track was inspired by a military march, and Iggy once jumped onto a table for an impromptu performance during recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 同名歌曲《Lust for Life》后来被广泛用于电影和广告，成为朋克文化的标志性 anthem，激励了无数后辈乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track Lust for Life was later widely used in films and advertisements, becoming an iconic punk anthem that inspired countless subsequent bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Iggy Pop，本名James Osterberg，美国摇滚歌手，被誉为“朋克教父”。他以狂野的舞台表演、赤裸上身的形象和嘶吼式唱腔闻名，曾是The Stooges乐队主唱，其个人作品深刻影响了朋克、另类摇滚和重金属音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Iggy Pop, born James Osterberg, is an American rock singer known as the 'Godfather of Punk.' Famous for his wild stage antics, shirtless appearance, and snarling vocals, he was the frontman of The Stooges, and his solo work deeply influenced punk, alternative rock, and heavy metal.

items.name: Music of the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《Music of the Sun》是Rihanna的首张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、舞厅音乐和加勒比流行节奏，充满阳光与热带风情。核心特色是Rihanna年轻清新的嗓音与雷鬼、舞厅节拍的结合，歌词围绕爱情、派对与夏日浪漫。
items.descriptionEn: Music of the Sun is Rihanna's debut studio album, blending R&B, dancehall, and Caribbean pop rhythms, full of sunshine and tropical vibes. Its core feature is Rihanna's youthful, fresh vocals combined with reggae and dancehall beats, with lyrics about love, parties, and summer romance.
items.storiesZh: Rihanna在15岁时被制作人Evan Rogers在巴巴多斯发现，随后飞往美国录制专辑。首支单曲《Pon de Replay》原本是为其他歌手准备的，但Rogers认为Rihanna的声音更适合。录制过程中，Rihanna因紧张多次重录，但最终效果充满自然活力。
items.storiesEn: Rihanna was discovered at age 15 in Barbados by producer Evan Rogers, then flew to the US to record the album. The lead single 'Pon de Replay' was originally intended for another artist, but Rogers felt Rihanna's voice was a better fit. During recording, Rihanna re-recorded many takes due to nerves, but the final result brims with natural energy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让Rihanna一炮而红，将舞厅音乐带入主流美国市场，并为她日后成为全球流行天后奠定基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album launched Rihanna's career, bringing dancehall music into the US mainstream and laying the foundation for her future status as a global pop superstar.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna，全名Robyn Rihanna Fenty，巴巴多斯歌手、演员及企业家。2005年以《Music of the Sun》出道，后凭借多首热门单曲成为全球最畅销女歌手之一。她以多变音乐风格、时尚影响力和Fenty Beauty品牌闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna, full name Robyn Rihanna Fenty, is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur. She debuted with Music of the Sun in 2005 and became one of the best-selling female artists globally with numerous hits. She is known for her versatile music style, fashion influence, and the Fenty Beauty brand.

items.name: Highway 61 Revisited
items.descriptionZh: 《Highway 61 Revisited》是Bob Dylan的第六张录音室专辑，标志着他从民谣向摇滚的彻底转型。核心特色是电吉他驱动的布鲁斯摇滚、超现实主义歌词和Dylan尖锐讽刺的嗓音，歌词充满文学性和社会批判，如《Like a Rolling Stone》开创了全新叙事方式。
items.descriptionEn: Highway 61 Revisited is Bob Dylan's sixth studio album, marking his complete shift from folk to rock. Its core features are electric guitar-driven blues rock, surrealistic lyrics, and Dylan's sharp, sarcastic vocals. The lyrics are highly literary and socially critical, with 'Like a Rolling Stone' pioneering a new narrative style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Dylan因在纽波特民谣音乐节上使用电吉他而遭民谣纯化论者嘘声，但他坚持己见。主打歌《Like a Rolling Stone》原长达20分钟，被剪辑成6分钟，成为当时最长��热门单曲。录音时，Dylan站在麦克风前即兴改写歌词，乐手们跟着他的节奏即兴演奏。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dylan faced boos from folk purists after using electric guitar at the Newport Folk Festival, but he persisted. The epic 'Like a a Rolling Stone' was originally 20 minutes long, then edited to 6 minutes, becoming the longest hit single at the time. Dylan improvised lyrics at the mic, with musicians following his lead.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑彻底改变了流行音乐的歌词标准，将诗歌与摇滚结合，被视为摇滚史上最伟大的专辑之一，直接影响了The Beatles等乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album revolutionized pop music's lyrical standards by merging poetry with rock, widely regarded as one of the greatest albums in rock history, directly influencing bands like The Beatles.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Dylan，美国创作歌手、诗人，诺贝尔文学奖得主。自1960年代出道以来，他以深刻的歌词、独特的嗓音和多变的音乐风格成为文化偶像，代表作包括《Blowin' in the Wind》和《Like a Rolling Stone》，被誉为“时代的声音”。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer-songwriter, poet, and Nobel laureate in Literature. Since the 1960s, he has become a cultural icon for his profound lyrics, distinctive voice, and ever-changing musical style. His classics include 'Blowin' in the Wind' and 'Like a Rolling Stone,' earning him the title 'Voice of a Generation.'

items.name: Death on the Road
items.descriptionZh: 《Death on the Road》是Iron Maiden的现场专辑，记录了2003年“Give Me Ed... 'Til I'm Dead”巡演中的演出。核心特色是乐队标志性的双吉他旋律、史诗般的歌曲结构和Bruce Dickinson高亢的嗓音，现场氛围炽烈，曲目涵盖乐队各时期经典。
items.descriptionEn: Death on the Road is Iron Maiden's live album, recorded during the 2003 'Give Me Ed... 'Til I'm Dead' tour. Its core features are the band's trademark dual-guitar harmonies, epic song structures, and Bruce Dickinson's soaring vocals, with a blazing live atmosphere and a setlist spanning the band's classic eras.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于德国多特蒙德的Westfalenhallen体育馆，当晚观众爆满，气氛狂热。主唱Bruce Dickinson在演唱《Hallowed Be Thy Name》时因舞台滑倒险些摔下，但迅速起身继续表演。吉他手Dave Murray在独奏时琴弦断裂，他即兴用单弦弹完，赢得观众欢呼。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Westfalenhallen in Dortmund, Germany, with a packed and frenzied crowd. During 'Hallowed Be Thy Name,' Bruce Dickinson slipped on stage and nearly fell, but quickly recovered and kept singing. Guitarist Dave Murray broke a string during his solo but improvised on a single string, earning a huge cheer.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是1975年成立于伦敦的英国重金属乐队，以吉祥物Eddie、复杂的编曲和史诗般的歌词闻名。他们是新浪潮重金属运动的领军者，全球销量超过1亿张，现场演出以高能量和戏剧性著称，主唱Bruce Dickinson的舞台魅力无人能及。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a British heavy metal band formed in London in 1975, famous for their mascot Eddie, complex arrangements, and epic lyrics. They are leaders of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal, with over 100 million records sold worldwide, known for high-energy, theatrical live shows and Bruce Dickinson's unmatched stage presence.

items.name: Bad
items.descriptionZh: 《Bad》是迈克尔·杰克逊1987年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格以流行、放克和摇滚为主，融合了当时最前沿的电子音效。专辑展现了杰克逊从温柔少年到成熟霸主的转型，制作精良，编曲复杂，充满戏剧性的节奏和标志性的嘶吼。核心特色在于其黑暗而华丽的主题，以及对名望、贫困和社会不平等的尖锐批判。
items.descriptionEn: Bad is Michael Jackson's seventh studio album, released in 1987, blending pop, funk, and rock with cutting-edge electronic sounds. It showcases Jackson's transformation from a gentle teen to a mature king, featuring intricate arrangements, dramatic rhythms, and iconic vocal yelps. Its core lies in dark, opulent themes and sharp critiques of fame, poverty, and social inequality.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Bad》时，杰克逊与制作人昆西·琼斯关系紧张，杰克逊希望更硬朗的声音，甚至一度解雇琼斯。专辑原定名为《Smooth Criminal》，后改为《Bad》。为了拍摄同名歌曲的MV，杰克逊在纽约地铁站深夜排练，并亲自设计舞蹈动作，包括著名的“反重力倾斜”。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Bad, tensions rose between Jackson and producer Quincy Jones; Jackson wanted a harder sound and even fired Jones temporarily. The album was initially titled Smooth Criminal before being changed to Bad. For the title track's music video, Jackson rehearsed late at night in New York subway stations and personally choreographed the iconic 'anti-gravity lean.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bad》是历史上首张连续产生五首冠军单曲的专辑，巩固了杰克逊作为流行之王的地位，并推动了MV作为艺术形式的商业价值。
items.historicalImpactEn: Bad is the first album in history to produce five consecutive number-one singles, cementing Jackson's status as the King of Pop and elevating the music video as a commercial art form.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（1958-2009），美国歌手、舞者、慈善家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和极具冲击力的舞台表演闻名，是全球最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the 'King of Pop.' Renowned for his distinctive voice, signature moves like the moonwalk, and electrifying stage presence, he remains one of the most influential artists worldwide.

items.name: Besoin
items.descriptionZh: 《Besoin》是摩纳哥公主斯蒂芬妮1986年发行的首张也是唯一一张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲和合成器流行为主。专辑充满80年代标志性的电子节拍和甜美旋律，歌词多围绕爱情与渴望。核心特色在于其皇室背景与流行音乐的跨界结合，展现了公主对音乐的热爱和冒险精神。
items.descriptionEn: Besoin is the debut and only studio album by Princess Stéphanie of Monaco, released in 1986, featuring pop dance and synth-pop. Filled with iconic 80s electronic beats and sweet melodies, the lyrics revolve around love and longing. Its core lies in the cross-boundary blend of royalty and pop music, showcasing the princess's passion for music and adventurous spirit.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Besoin》时，斯蒂芬妮公主亲自参与词曲创作，并邀请法国制作人Yves Roze操刀。专辑主打歌《Ouragan》成为法国热门单曲，但王室成员对公主涉足流行音乐颇有微词。斯蒂芬妮在采访中坦言，录制过程让她感到自由，暂时逃离了王室的责任。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Besoin, Princess Stéphanie co-wrote songs and worked with French producer Yves Roze. The lead single 'Ouragan' became a hit in France, but royal family members frowned upon her pop career. Stéphanie admitted in interviews that the recording process felt liberating, offering an escape from royal duties.
items.artistIntroZh: 斯蒂芬妮公主（1965年出生），摩纳哥王室成员，兰尼埃三世亲王之女。她曾短暂从事模特和歌手职业，1986年发行专辑《Besoin》后转向时尚和慈善事业，以其独立个性和非传统王室形象著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Princess Stéphanie (born 1965) is a member of the Monegasque royal family, daughter of Prince Rainier III. She briefly worked as a model and singer, releasing Besoin in 1986 before turning to fashion and charity, known for her independent spirit and non-traditional royal image.

items.name: Hot Buttered Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Buttered Soul》是艾萨克·海耶斯1969年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以灵魂乐、放克和迷幻为主，开创性地将长篇叙事和管弦乐编曲融入节奏蓝调。核心特色在于每首歌曲都长达十分钟以上，充满即兴独白和复杂的器乐段落，重新定义了灵魂乐的可能性。
items.descriptionEn: Hot Buttered Soul is Isaac Hayes' third studio album, released in 1969, blending soul, funk, and psychedelia. It pioneered long-form storytelling and orchestral arrangements in R&B, with each track exceeding ten minutes. Its core lies in extended improvisational monologues and complex instrumental passages, redefining soul music's possibilities.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Hot Buttered Soul》时，海耶斯大胆决定只收录四首歌曲，每首占据一整面黑胶。其中《By the Time I Get to Phoenix》长达18分钟，海耶斯在录音室即兴加入了一段关于失恋的独白。制作人曾担心电台不会播放，但专辑意外大获成功。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Hot Buttered Soul, Hayes boldly decided to include only four songs, each taking up an entire LP side. 'By the Time I Get to Phoenix' runs 18 minutes, with Hayes improvising a spoken-word monologue about heartbreak in the studio. Producers feared radio rejection, but the album became an unexpected hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Buttered Soul》被公认为灵魂乐和放克的里程碑，直接影响了70年代黑人音乐的长篇叙事风格，并为艾萨克·海耶斯赢得格莱美奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: Hot Buttered Soul is widely regarded as a landmark in soul and funk, directly influencing the long-form narrative style of 1970s Black music, and earned Isaac Hayes a Grammy Award.
items.artistIntroZh: 艾萨克·海耶斯（1942-2008），美国灵魂乐歌手、词曲作者、演员，以光头造型和低沉嗓音著称。他是Stax唱片的核心人物，代表作《Theme from Shaft》获奥斯卡奖，被誉为灵魂乐和放克音乐的革新者。
items.artistIntroEn: Isaac Hayes (1942-2008) was an American soul singer, songwriter, and actor, famous for his bald head and deep voice. A key figure at Stax Records, his 'Theme from Shaft' won an Oscar, and he is hailed as an innovator of soul and funk music.

items.name: Africa/Brass
items.descriptionZh: 《Africa/Brass》是约翰·柯川1961年发行的专辑，风格以硬波普、自由爵士和非洲节奏融合为主。核心特色在于首次大规模使用铜管和木管乐器，将非洲打击乐与爵士即兴结合，营造出宏大而原始的音响。专辑展现了柯川对精神性音乐的探索，是其早期向自由爵士转型的关键作品。
items.descriptionEn: Africa/Brass is a 1961 album by John Coltrane, blending hard bop, free jazz, and African rhythms. Its core lies in the unprecedented use of large brass and woodwind sections, merging African percussion with jazz improvisation to create a vast, primal sound. The album reflects Coltrane's spiritual exploration and marks his early shift toward free jazz.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Africa/Brass》时，柯川集结了一支包含21名乐手的大乐队，包括埃里克·杜菲和麦考伊·泰纳。由于预算紧张，录制仅用一天完成，但柯川对结果不满意，后来多次重录。专辑中的《Africa》一曲灵感来自柯川对非洲音乐的研究，他要求乐手模仿部落鼓声。
items.storiesEn: For Africa/Brass, Coltrane assembled a 21-piece big band including Eric Dolphy and McCoy Tyner. Due to budget constraints, recording was completed in one day, but Coltrane was dissatisfied and later re-recorded multiple takes. The track 'Africa' was inspired by his study of African music, with Coltrane asking musicians to mimic tribal drumming.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Africa/Brass》是柯川首次大规模试验自由爵士和世界音乐融合，对后来的爵士乐手探索非洲根源产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Africa/Brass was Coltrane's first major experiment with free jazz and world music fusion, deeply influencing later jazz musicians' exploration of African roots.
items.artistIntroZh: 约翰·柯川（1926-1967），美国爵士萨克斯手、作曲家，被誉为爵士史上最具创新精神的音乐家之一。他以其“音阶”式即兴和灵性追求闻名，代表作《A Love Supreme》是爵士经典，影响了无数后辈。
items.artistIntroEn: John Coltrane (1926-1967) was an American jazz saxophonist and composer, regarded as one of the most innovative musicians in jazz history. Famous for his 'sheets of sound' improvisation and spiritual quest, his masterpiece 'A Love Supreme' is a jazz classic, influencing countless successors.

items.name: Fresh Fruit for Rotting Vegetables
items.descriptionZh: 《Fresh Fruit for Rotting Vegetables》是死肯尼迪乐队1980年发行的首张专辑，风格以硬核朋克为主，融合了讽刺性歌词和极快的节奏。核心特色在于其尖锐的政治批判和黑色幽默，歌词涉及无政府主义、反战、环保和消费主义。专辑以粗糙的录音质感和爆发性的能量，定义了美国西海岸硬核朋克的声音。
items.descriptionEn: Fresh Fruit for Rotting Vegetables is the debut album by Dead Kennedys, released in 1980, featuring hardcore punk with satirical lyrics and breakneck tempos. Its core lies in sharp political critique and black humor, tackling anarchism, anti-war, environmentalism, and consumerism. With raw production and explosive energy, the album defined West Coast hardcore punk.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队预算仅有几千美元，在旧金山一间地下室录音棚完成。主唱杰洛·比夫拉在《California Über Alles》中模仿加州州长口音，讽刺其政策。专辑封面原计划使用一张腐烂水果照片，但因成本改用拼贴画。乐队因歌词争议多次被禁播。
items.storiesEn: Produced on a budget of just a few thousand dollars, the album was recorded in a basement studio in San Francisco. Vocalist Jello Biafra mimicked the California governor's accent on 'California Über Alles' to mock his policies. The cover was originally planned as a photo of rotting fruit but was replaced with a collage due to cost. The band faced radio bans over controversial lyrics.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Fresh Fruit for Rotting Vegetables》被视为硬核朋克的奠基之作，影响了整个朋克和另类摇滚场景，其政治激进立场成为朋克文化的标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: Fresh Fruit for Rotting Vegetables is considered a foundational hardcore punk album, influencing the entire punk and alternative rock scene, with its political radicalism becoming a benchmark for punk culture.
