Known for synth-driven dark pop, they are one of the most influential electronic bands globally, with over 100 million records sold.

items.name: (sic)nesses
items.descriptionZh: 《(sic)nesses》是Slipknot的首张现场专辑，录制于2009年他们在英国下载音乐节的压轴演出。专辑以极端的暴力美学、狂暴的鼓点、扭曲的吉他音色和多层人声为核心特色，完美捕捉了乐队现场表演的原始能量与混乱。这是一张献给铁杆乐迷的纯粹金属盛宴。
items.descriptionEn: (sic)nesses is Slipknot's first live album, recorded during their headlining set at the 2009 Download Festival in the UK. The album features extreme brutality, ferocious drumming, distorted guitar tones, and layered vocals, perfectly capturing the raw energy and chaos of the band's live performances. It is a pure metal feast for hardcore fans.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出是Slipknot当年唯一的英国演出，也是贝斯手保罗·格雷去世前最后一次大型现场录制。乐队在倾盆大雨中表演，舞台泥泞不堪，但乐迷热情高涨。录制过程中，鼓手乔伊·乔迪森的鼓台多次打滑，但他坚持完成了整场演出，成为专辑中最震撼的瞬间之一。
items.storiesEn: This show was Slipknot's only UK performance that year and the last major live recording before bassist Paul Gray's death. The band performed in pouring rain, with a muddy stage, but the fans were ecstatic. During recording, drummer Joey Jordison's drum riser slipped multiple times, yet he completed the entire set, creating one of the album's most powerful moments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得了格莱美最佳金属演奏奖提名，被视为Slipknot现场实力的巅峰记录，也是保罗·格雷生前最后的重要音乐遗产。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album earned a Grammy nomination for Best Metal Performance and is regarded as the pinnacle of Slipknot's live prowess, as well as Paul Gray's final significant musical legacy.
items.artistIntroZh: Slipknot是美国重金属乐队，1995年成立于爱荷华州得梅因。以九名成员佩戴恐怖面具、穿着连体工作服的统一形象闻名，音乐融合了新金属、死亡金属和硬核朋克元素。他们是21世纪最具商业成功和影响力的金属乐队之一，拥有大量狂热追随者。
items.artistIntroEn: Slipknot are an American heavy metal band formed in Des Moines, Iowa, in 1995. Known for their nine members wearing horror masks and matching jumpsuits, their music blends nu-metal, death metal, and hardcore punk. They are one of the most commercially successful and influential metal bands of the 21st century, with a massive cult following.

items.name: Urban Hymns
items.descriptionZh: 《Urban Hymns》是The Verve的第三张专辑，也是他们最成功的作品。专辑以宏大的弦乐编排、迷幻的吉他音效和主唱理查德·阿什克罗夫特充满灵魂的嗓音为核心特色，风格融合了英伦摇滚、迷幻和独立摇滚。歌曲探讨了爱情、失落与救赎，整体氛围既忧郁又振奋，充满史诗感。
items.descriptionEn: Urban Hymns is The Verve's third and most successful album. It features grand string arrangements, psychedelic guitar effects, and lead singer Richard Ashcroft's soulful vocals, blending Britpop, psychedelic, and indie rock. The songs explore love, loss, and redemption, creating an atmosphere that is both melancholic and uplifting, with an epic feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程充满波折。吉他手尼克·麦凯布在录制期间曾短暂离队，导致部分吉他部分由阿什克罗夫特和制作人完成。最著名的歌曲《Bitter Sweet Symphony》采样了滚石乐队的管弦乐版本，但版权纠纷让乐队几乎赔光版税，成为音乐界著名的法律案例。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was fraught with difficulties. Guitarist Nick McCabe briefly left the band during sessions, forcing Ashcroft and the producer to record some guitar parts. The most famous track, 'Bitter Sweet Symphony', sampled an orchestral version of a Rolling Stones song, but a copyright dispute cost the band nearly all royalties, becoming a famous legal case in music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bitter Sweet Symphony》成为1990年代最具代表性的歌曲之一，其弦乐采样引发的版权案改变了音乐采样法律。专辑本身被视为英伦摇滚后期的巅峰之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Bitter Sweet Symphony' became one of the most iconic songs of the 1990s, and its sampling copyright case changed music sampling law. The album itself is regarded as a late peak of Britpop.
items.artistIntroZh: The Verve是英国摇滚乐队，1990年成立于威根。核心成员包括主唱理查德·阿什克罗夫特、吉他手尼克·麦凯布、贝斯手西蒙·琼斯和鼓手彼得·萨利斯伯里。他们以迷幻摇滚和灵魂乐融合的风格著称，虽多次解散，但《Urban Hymns》使其成为英伦摇滚的标志性乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: The Verve are an English rock band formed in Wigan in 1990. Core members include vocalist Richard Ashcroft, guitarist Nick McCabe, bassist Simon Jones, and drummer Peter Salisbury. Known for blending psychedelic rock with soul, despite multiple breakups, 'Urban Hymns' made them iconic within Britpop.

items.name: Hotter than July
items.descriptionZh: 《Hotter than July》是Stevie Wonder在1980年发行的经典专辑，融合了放克、灵魂、流行和雷鬼元素。专辑以温暖明亮的夏日氛围著称，旋律流畅，节奏感强，歌词充满社会关怀与个人情感，展现了Stevie Wonder在音乐创作上的成熟与多元。
items.descriptionEn: Hotter than July is a classic 1980 album by Stevie Wonder, blending funk, soul, pop, and reggae. Known for its warm, sunny summer vibe, the album features smooth melodies, strong rhythms, and lyrics full of social consciousness and personal emotion, showcasing Stevie Wonder's mature and diverse musicality.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Stevie Wonder坚持使用现场乐队演奏，追求最自然的声音。其中一首歌《Happy Birthday》是为了推动马丁·路德·金的生日成为美国法定假日而创作，最终在1986年成功实现。专辑封面由著名摄影师拍摄，展现了Stevie Wonder在阳光下的愉悦神情。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Stevie Wonder insisted on using a live band to capture the most natural sound. One song, 'Happy Birthday,' was written to advocate for Martin Luther King Jr.'s birthday becoming a national holiday, which was finally achieved in 1986. The album cover, shot by a renowned photographer, captures Stevie's joyful expression in the sunlight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了马丁·路德·金纪念日的设立，成为音乐与社会运动结合的典范。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped establish Martin Luther King Jr. Day, becoming a model of music combined with social activism.
items.artistIntroZh: Stevie Wonder是美国盲人歌手、词曲作者及多乐器演奏家，被誉为音乐天才。自幼签约摩城唱片，他融合灵魂、放克、流行等风格，创作了无数经典，获得25项格莱美奖，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Stevie Wonder is an American blind singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist, hailed as a musical genius. Signed to Motown as a child, he blended soul, funk, and pop, creating countless classics, winning 25 Grammy Awards, and becoming one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: The Uplift Mofo Party Plan
items.descriptionZh: 《The Uplift Mofo Party Plan》是Red Hot Chili Peppers的第三张录音室专辑，也是乐队早期放克摇滚风格的巅峰之作。融合了激烈的放克贝斯线、朋克式的能量与说唱元素，专辑充满街头气息和青春叛逆，展现了乐队最原始、最狂野的一面。
items.descriptionEn: The Uplift Mofo Party Plan is the Red Hot Chili Peppers' third studio album, representing the peak of their early funk rock style. Blending aggressive funk bass lines, punk energy, and rap elements, the album is full of streetwise swagger and youthful rebellion, showcasing the band at its rawest and wildest.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是吉他手Hillel Slovak去世前参与的最后一张作品，录制过程充满混乱与激情。乐队成员当时沉迷于毒品，但依然在录音室里迸发出惊人的创造力。专辑名来自主唱Anthony Kiedis的涂鸦，意指一场提升精神的派对计划。
items.storiesEn: This is the last album featuring guitarist Hillel Slovak before his death. The recording was chaotic and passionate, with band members struggling with drug addiction yet still unleashing incredible creativity in the studio. The album title comes from a graffiti by frontman Anthony Kiedis, meaning a party plan to uplift the spirit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Red Hot Chili Peppers早期放克摇滚风格的奠基之作，对后来的另类摇滚和放克金属产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album laid the foundation for the Chili Peppers' early funk rock sound, deeply influencing later alternative rock and funk metal.
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers是一支美国摇滚乐队，成立于1983年，以融合放克、朋��和另类摇滚著称。他们以充满活力的现场表演、裸露上身的舞台形象和独特的贝斯旋律闻名，是90年代另类摇滚浪潮的代表之一，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: The Red Hot Chili Peppers are an American rock band formed in 1983, known for blending funk, punk, and alternative rock. Famous for their energetic live shows, shirtless stage presence, and distinctive bass lines, they are icons of the 1990s alternative rock wave, with over 100 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: The Best of R.E.M.
items.descriptionZh: 《The Best of R.E.M.》是R.E.M.在1991年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1982年至1991年间最具代表性的单曲。风格涵盖另类摇滚、民谣摇滚和学院摇滚，旋律优美，歌词诗意朦胧，展现了R.E.M.从地下独立乐队走向主流巨星的音乐历程。
items.descriptionEn: The Best of R.E.M. is a 1991 compilation album featuring the band's most representative singles from 1982 to 1991. Covering alternative rock, folk rock, and college rock, the songs are melodious with poetic, enigmatic lyrics, showcasing R.E.M.'s journey from underground indie band to mainstream superstars.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集原本是为了满足歌迷需求而发行，但乐队对曲目选择非常谨慎���主唱Michael Stipe亲自参与了选曲和混音，确保每首歌都能代表乐队不同时期的特色。专辑封面采用了模糊的摄影风格，呼应了R.E.M.一贯的神秘美学。
items.storiesEn: Originally released to meet fan demand, the band was very careful with track selection. Lead singer Michael Stipe personally participated in choosing songs and remixing, ensuring each track represented a different era. The cover art features a blurry photographic style, echoing R.E.M.'s signature mysterious aesthetic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集让更多听众系统性地了解R.E.M.的音乐，巩固了他们在另类摇滚史上的经典地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation introduced a wider audience to R.E.M.'s music systematically, cementing their classic status in alternative rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: R.E.M.是一支美国另类摇滚乐队，1980年成立于佐治亚州雅典市。他们以主唱Michael Stipe含混的唱腔、诗意的歌词和吉他手Peter Buck的锯齿状吉他音色著称，被公认为另类摇滚的先驱，影响了无数后来者。
items.artistIntroEn: R.E.M. is an American alternative rock band formed in Athens, Georgia in 1980. Known for lead singer Michael Stipe's mumbling vocals, poetic lyrics, and guitarist Peter Buck's jangly guitar sound, they are widely regarded as pioneers of alternative rock, influencing countless artists.

items.name: Joe's Menage
items.descriptionZh: 《Joe's Menage》是Frank Zappa在2008年发行的遗作专辑，属于他庞大的即兴演奏与实验音乐库。风格融合了爵士摇滚、前卫摇滚、自由即兴和喜剧元素，结构复杂，充满不和谐的旋律与幽默的对话采样，展现了Zappa独特的音乐荒诞主义。
items.descriptionEn: Joe's Menage is a posthumous album by Frank Zappa released in 2008, part of his vast archive of improvisational and experimental music. Blending jazz rock, progressive rock, free improvisation, and comedic elements, the music is complex, filled with dissonant melodies and humorous dialogue samples, showcasing Zappa's unique musical absurdism.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的素材来自Zappa在1970年代早期的录音带，由他的儿子Dweezil Zappa和遗孀Gail Zappa整理发行。其中包含大量未公开的即兴片段和录音室对话，记录了Zappa与乐队成员在排练时的幽默互动和音乐实验。
items.storiesEn: The album's material comes from Zappa's early 1970s tapes, compiled and released by his son Dweezil Zappa and widow Gail Zappa. It includes many previously unreleased improvisations and studio conversations, capturing Zappa's humorous interactions and musical experiments with band members during rehearsals.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa是美国作曲家、吉他手、乐队指挥和讽刺作家，以多产和跨风格创作闻名。他的作品涵盖摇滚、爵士、古典、电子音乐等，以复杂的节奏、不和谐音和尖锐的社会讽刺著称，被誉为20世纪最具独创性的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, bandleader, and satirist, known for his prolific and genre-defying work. His music spans rock, jazz, classical, and electronic, characterized by complex rhythms, dissonance, and sharp social satire. He is regarded as one of the most original musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Perfect Strangers
items.descriptionZh: 《Perfect Strangers》是Deep Purple在1984年发行的重组复出专辑，标志着经典阵容（Mark II）的回归。风格延续了硬摇滚和重金属的强劲传统，充满标志性的风琴音色、吉他Riff和高亢的嗓音，旋律宏大且富有戏剧性，是80年代重金属复兴的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Perfect Strangers is Deep Purple's 1984 reunion album, marking the return of the classic Mark II lineup. Continuing the powerful tradition of hard rock and heavy metal, the album features iconic organ sounds, guitar riffs, and soaring vocals, with grand, dramatic melodies. It is a landmark of the 1980s heavy metal revival.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制充满了久别重逢的喜悦。乐队成员在分开多年后重新聚在一起，仅用了几周时间就创作并录制完成。主打歌《Perfect Strangers》的Riff灵感来自吉他手Ritchie Blackmore的一次即兴弹奏，鼓手Ian Paice的鼓点则是在录音室一气呵成。
items.storiesEn: The recording was filled with the joy of reunion. After years apart, the band members came together and wrote and recorded the album in just a few weeks. The main riff of 'Perfect Strangers' came from guitarist Ritchie Blackmore's improvisation, while drummer Ian Paice laid down his tracks in one take in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑成功复兴了Deep Purple的职业生涯，并推动了80年代硬摇滚和重金属的回归浪潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album successfully revived Deep Purple's career and helped fuel the resurgence of hard rock and heavy metal in the 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是一支英国摇滚乐队，1968年成立，被誉为重金属和硬摇滚的先驱之一。他们以精湛的乐器演奏、Jon Lord的古典风琴和Ritchie Blackmore的吉他独奏著称，代表作《Smoke on the Water》是全球最著名的吉他Riff之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple is a British rock band formed in 1968, regarded as one of the pioneers of heavy metal and hard rock. Known for their virtuosic musicianship, Jon Lord's classical organ, and Ritchie Blackmore's guitar solos, their hit 'Smoke on the Water' features one of the most famous guitar riffs in the world.

items.name: Standard Coltrane
items.descriptionZh: 《Standard Coltrane》是约翰·柯川于1962年录制的一张标准曲专辑，展现了他对爵士经典的深情诠释。风格上以硬波普和调式爵士为主，柯川的萨克斯风演奏既保留了原曲的优雅，又注入了他独特的即兴灵性，整体氛围温暖而深邃。
items.descriptionEn: Standard Coltrane is a 1962 album of jazz standards by John Coltrane, showcasing his heartfelt interpretations of classics. Stylistically rooted in hard bop and modal jazz, Coltrane's saxophone playing retains the elegance of the originals while infusing his unique improvisational spirituality, creating a warm and profound atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于柯川事业转型期，他刚离开迈尔斯·戴维斯的乐队，开始探索个人风格。录音过程仅用两天完成，柯川与钢琴手麦考伊·泰纳、贝斯手吉米·加里森和鼓手埃尔文·琼斯配合默契，几乎未经过多排练。有趣的是，柯川特意选择了《My Favorite Things》等流行曲目，试图让爵士更贴近大众。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during Coltrane's transitional period, shortly after he left Miles Davis's band to explore his own style. The sessions were completed in just two days, with Coltrane and his quartet—McCoy Tyner on piano, Jimmy Garrison on bass, and Elvin Jones on drums—playing in seamless sync with minimal rehearsal. Interestingly, Coltrane chose popular tunes like 'My Favorite Things' to make jazz more accessible.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为柯川对爵士标准曲的权威演绎，影响后世无数爵士乐手，但因其保守选曲，未如他前卫作品般引发革命。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as Coltrane's authoritative take on jazz standards, influencing countless later musicians, though its conservative repertoire did not spark a revolution like his avant-garde works.
items.artistIntroZh: 约翰·柯川（John Coltrane，1926-1967）是美国爵士萨克斯风大师，硬波普与调式爵士先驱。他以高超技巧和灵性探索著称，代表作《A Love Supreme》被誉为爵士经典。柯川短暂一生彻底重塑了现代爵士乐的面貌。
items.artistIntroEn: John Coltrane (1926-1967) was an American jazz saxophonist and a pioneer of hard bop and modal jazz. Renowned for his technical mastery and spiritual exploration, his masterpiece 'A Love Supreme' is a jazz classic. Coltrane's brief life profoundly reshaped modern jazz.

items.name: (What's the Story) Morning Glory?
items.descriptionZh: 《(What's the Story) Morning Glory?》是绿洲乐队1995年发行的英伦摇滚巅峰之作，风格融合了披头士式的旋律与粗粝的吉他音墙。专辑充满青春叛逆与忧郁诗意，主打歌《Wonderwall》和《Don't Look Back in Anger》成为一代人的 anthem。
items.descriptionEn: (What's the Story) Morning Glory? is Oasis's 1995 Britpop masterpiece, blending Beatlesque melodies with a wall of gritty guitars. The album brims with youthful rebellion and melancholic poetry, with anthems like 'Wonderwall' and 'Don't Look Back in Anger' defining a generation.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，绿洲兄弟诺尔和利亚姆·加拉格尔的冲突达到白热化。一次混音时，利亚姆愤怒地砸碎录音室玻璃，诺尔则威胁退出乐队。专辑封面拍摄也充满戏剧性：摄影师在伦敦街头随机抓拍，却意外捕捉到两位路人的身影，成为经典。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the feud between Oasis brothers Noel and Liam Gallagher reached a boiling point. At one mixing session, Liam smashed a studio window in rage, while Noel threatened to quit the band. The album cover was also serendipitous: a photographer randomly snapped two passersby on a London street, creating an iconic image.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑定义了90年代英伦摇滚的黄金时代，全球销量超2200万张，直接引发与Blur的‘英伦摇滚大战’，影响Coldplay等后来乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the golden age of 1990s Britpop, selling over 22 million copies worldwide. It sparked the 'Britpop war' with Blur and influenced later bands like Coldplay.
items.artistIntroZh: 绿洲乐队（Oasis）成立于1991年，由诺尔·加拉格尔（主唱/吉他）和利亚姆·加拉格尔（主唱）兄弟领衔。他们是英伦摇滚最具争议的乐队之一，以直白歌词、响亮吉他和兄弟内斗闻名，代表作《Definitely Maybe》同样经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Oasis, formed in 1991, is led by brothers Noel (lead guitar/vocals) and Liam Gallagher (vocals). One of Britpop's most controversial bands, they are known for blunt lyrics, loud guitars, and sibling rivalry, with their debut 'Definitely Maybe' also a classic.

items.name: Diva: The Singles Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《Diva: The Singles Collection》是莎拉·布莱曼2006年发行的精选集，收录了她职业生涯的经典单曲。风格跨越古典跨界、流行和音乐剧，以其空灵高音和戏剧性演绎著称，宛如一场听觉上的华丽盛宴。
items.descriptionEn: Diva: The Singles Collection is a 2006 compilation by Sarah Brightman, featuring her career-defining singles. Spanning classical crossover, pop, and musical theatre, it is noted for her ethereal high notes and dramatic delivery, offering a sonic feast of elegance.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集源自莎拉与前夫安德鲁·劳埃德·韦伯合作时期的作品，但也包含她单飞后的热门曲。录制《Time to Say Goodbye》时，她与盲人歌手安德烈·波切利初次合作，两人虽语言不通，但音乐默契惊人，最终版本让全球听众落泪。
items.storiesEn: This compilation draws from Sarah's collaborations with ex-husband Andrew Lloyd Webber and her solo hits. During the recording of 'Time to Say Goodbye,' she first worked with blind tenor Andrea Bocelli; despite language barriers, their musical chemistry was astonishing, resulting in a tear-jerking global hit.
items.artistIntroZh: 莎拉·布莱曼（Sarah Brightman，1960年生）是英国跨界女高音，以月光般清澈的嗓音闻名。她因主演韦伯音乐剧《歌剧魅影》成名，后发展个人事业，将古典与流行融合，全球唱片销量超3000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Sarah Brightman (born 1960) is an English crossover soprano known for her moonlit-clear voice. She rose to fame starring in Webber's 'The Phantom of the Opera' and later built a solo career blending classical and pop, selling over 30 million records worldwide.

items.name: Tales from the Twilight World
items.descriptionZh: 《Tales from the Twilight World》是盲人守护者1990年发行的第三张专辑，奠定了他们力量金属与速度金属的风格。歌曲以奇幻文学和神话为主题，旋律激昂、双吉他交织，主唱汉斯·库尔施的尖嗓极具辨识度，充满史诗感。
items.descriptionEn: Tales from the Twilight World is Blind Guardian's third album (1990), cementing their power and speed metal style. Thematically rooted in fantasy literature and mythology, the album features soaring melodies, twin-guitar interplay, and Hansi Kürsch's distinctive high-pitched vocals, delivering epic grandeur.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队预算极其有限，只能在德国汉堡一间简陋地下室完成。由于隔音差，他们不得不等到深夜邻居入睡后才录制鼓声。主唱汉斯为模仿精灵般的嗓音，连续喝了几周蜂蜜水，结果录音时嗓子意外变沙哑，反而成就了独特质感。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded on a shoestring budget in a cramped basement in Hamburg, Germany. Due to poor soundproofing, they had to record drums late at night after neighbors slept. Vocalist Hansi drank honey water for weeks to achieve an elfin voice, but his throat ironically became hoarse during sessions, adding a unique texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是欧洲力量金属早期里程碑，影响了后来的烈焰邪神（Rhapsody of Fire）等乐队，但未突破主流市场。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is an early milestone in European power metal, influencing later bands like Rhapsody of Fire, though it remained underground in the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: 盲人守护者（Blind Guardian）1984年成立于德国，是力量金属的代表乐队。成员包括主唱汉斯·库尔施和吉他手安德烈·奥布里克。他们以托尔金等奇幻文学为灵感，以复杂编曲和合唱式副歌著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Blind Guardian, formed in 1984 in Germany, is a seminal power metal band featuring vocalist Hansi Kürsch and guitarist André Olbrich. Inspired by Tolkien and fantasy literature, they are known for complex arrangements and choral-style choruses.

items.name: 1000 km bis zum Meer
items.descriptionZh: 《1000 km bis zum Meer》是德国流行摇滚乐队Luxuslärm 2008年发行的首张专辑，风格融合流行摇滚、独立和少许电子元素。歌曲旋律朗朗上口，歌词充满青春与希望，主唱雅娜·帕拉斯基的嗓音温暖而富有感染力，整体明亮活泼。
items.descriptionEn: 1000 km bis zum Meer is the 2008 debut album by German pop-rock band Luxuslärm, blending pop-rock, indie, and slight electronic elements. The melodies are catchy, lyrics full of youth and hope, and lead singer Jana Pallaske's warm, infectious voice gives the album a bright, lively feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源自乐队一次公路旅行：他们驾车1000公里去波罗的海，途中灵感迸发，在沙滩上即兴写下了主打歌。录制时，吉他手米歇尔因紧张弹断了三根弦，鼓手则不小心把咖啡洒在调音台上，导致半天无法工作。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from a road trip: the band drove 1000 km to the Baltic Sea, where inspiration struck and they wrote the lead single on the beach. During recording, guitarist Michael broke three strings from nervousness, while the drummer accidentally spilled coffee on the mixing board, halting work for half a day.
items.artistIntroZh: Luxuslärm是德国流行摇滚乐队，2006年成立于哈根。主唱雅娜·帕拉斯基曾是演员，乐队以阳光积极的形象和现场活力著称，在德国青年群体中拥有大量粉丝，后因成员变动于2012年解散。
items.artistIntroEn: Luxuslärm was a German pop-rock band formed in Hagen in 2006. Lead singer Jana Pallaske was also an actress; the band was known for its sunny image and energetic live shows, gaining a large youth following in Germany before disbanding in 2012 due to member changes.

items.name: 1-800 Vindication
items.descriptionZh: 《1-800 Vindication》是丹麦死亡金属乐队Illdisposed的第六张录音室专辑，融合了旋律死亡金属与硬核元素，节奏凶猛且富有侵略性，同时加入了一些工业化的音效，展现出乐队在极端金属领域中的独特实验性。
items.descriptionEn: 1-800 Vindication is the sixth studio album by Danish death metal band Illdisposed, blending melodic death metal with hardcore elements. The sound is aggressive and rhythmic, with industrial touches that showcase the band's experimental edge in extreme metal.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队经历了一次严重的内部冲突，主唱Bo Summer一度因声带问题差点无法完成录制。最终他通过严格的声乐训练和调整唱法，才得以在录音棚中完成那些极具爆发力的嘶吼段落。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, the band faced a major internal conflict, and vocalist Bo Summer nearly couldn't finish the sessions due to vocal cord issues. He managed to complete the explosive growls only after rigorous vocal training and adjusting his technique.
items.artistIntroZh: Illdisposed成立于1991年，是丹麦最具代表性的死亡金属乐队之一。他们以旋律性与硬核风格的结合著称，作品常探讨社会阴暗面与个人挣扎，在欧洲极端金属圈拥有稳固的乐迷基础。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1991, Illdisposed is one of Denmark's most representative death metal bands. Known for blending melody with hardcore, their work often explores social darkness and personal struggle, earning a solid fanbase in the European extreme metal scene.

items.name: Led Zeppelin III
items.descriptionZh: 《Led Zeppelin III》是英国摇滚乐队Led Zeppelin的第三张专辑，风格从硬摇滚转向更原声的民谣摇滚，融合了蓝调、凯尔特音乐和迷幻元素。专辑以《Immigrant Song》等经典曲目闻名，展现了乐队多面的音乐才华。
items.descriptionEn: Led Zeppelin III is the third album by British rock band Led Zeppelin, shifting from hard rock to more acoustic folk-rock, blending blues, Celtic music, and psychedelic elements. Known for classics like 'Immigrant Song,' it showcases the band's versatile musicianship.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于一个偏远的乡村小屋，乐队成员在远离城市喧嚣的环境中即兴创作。吉他手Jimmy Page使用了一把特殊的吉他调弦，创造出独特的音色。专辑封面是一个旋转的轮盘，打开后隐藏着各种图像，设计极��创意。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a remote countryside cottage, the band improvised in a setting far from city noise. Guitarist Jimmy Page used a special guitar tuning to create unique sounds. The album cover features a spinning wheel that reveals hidden images when opened, a highly creative design.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着Led Zeppelin从硬摇滚向民谣摇滚的转型，影响了后来众多民谣摇滚和另类摇滚乐队，是70年代摇滚乐多元化的重要里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Led Zeppelin's shift from hard rock to folk-rock, influencing countless folk and alternative rock bands, and stands as a key milestone in the diversification of 1970s rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: Led Zeppelin成立于1968年，是摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。他们以创新性的硬摇滚、民谣和蓝调融合风格闻名，Jimmy Page的吉他、Robert Plant的嗓音和John Bonham的鼓技定义了70年代的摇滚之声。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1968, Led Zeppelin is one of the most influential rock bands in history. Known for their innovative fusion of hard rock, folk, and blues, Jimmy Page's guitar, Robert Plant's vocals, and John Bonham's drumming defined the sound of 1970s rock.

items.name: HoboSapiens
items.descriptionZh: 《HoboSapiens》是威尔士音乐人John Cale的第十二张个人专辑，融合了艺术摇滚、电子和实验音乐元素。专辑氛围阴暗而富有诗意，歌词充满超现实主义意象，Cale用低沉嗓音和复杂的编曲创造了一个迷离的声音世界。
items.descriptionEn: HoboSapiens is the twelfth solo album by Welsh musician John Cale, blending art rock, electronic, and experimental music. The mood is dark and poetic, with surreal lyrics. Cale's deep voice and complex arrangements create a dreamlike soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满了技术实验，Cale在录音棚中使用了大量当时新兴的数字音频工具，甚至将一些电脑程序错误和噪音融入编曲中。他曾在采访中笑称，这张专辑是他'与机器对话'的结果。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was full of technical experimentation. Cale used many emerging digital audio tools in the studio, even incorporating computer glitches and noise into the arrangements. He once joked in an interview that the album was the result of 'talking to machines.'
items.artistIntroZh: John Cale是威尔士音乐家、作曲家和制作人，Velvet Underground的创始成员之一。他以实验性的古典、摇滚和电子音乐融合闻名，个人作品常以先锋和前卫著称，对后朋克和独立音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: John Cale is a Welsh musician, composer, and producer, a founding member of the Velvet Underground. Known for blending experimental classical, rock, and electronic music, his solo work is often avant-garde and has deeply influenced post-punk and indie music.

items.name: The Single Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《The Single Collection》是芬兰摇滚乐队HIM的一张精选集，收录了他们早期至2002年的热门单曲。风格以黑暗浪漫的哥特摇滚为主，融合了金属和流行旋律，主唱Ville Valo的磁性嗓音是乐队的标志。
items.descriptionEn: The Single Collection is a compilation by Finnish rock band HIM, featuring their hit singles from early years up to 2002. The style is dark romantic gothic rock, blending metal with pop melodies, with vocalist Ville Valo's magnetic voice as the band's trademark.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的发行原本只是为满足乐迷需求，但乐队在选曲时发生了激烈争论——成员们对哪些单曲最能代表乐队各执一词。最终由制作人拍板决定，收录了包括《Join Me》和《Wicked Game》在内的经典曲目。
items.storiesEn: Originally a fan-demand release, the band had heated debates over which singles best represented them. The producer made the final call, including classics like 'Join Me' and 'Wicked Game,' much to the relief of the exhausted members.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM（原名His Infernal Majesty）成立于1991年，是芬兰最成功的摇滚乐队之一。他们以'爱情金属'（Love Metal）自创风格闻名，黑暗浪漫的歌词和主唱Ville Valo的独特形象使其在全球拥有大量忠实粉丝。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM (originally His Infernal Majesty) formed in 1991, one of Finland's most successful rock bands. Known for coining the term 'Love Metal,' their dark romantic lyrics and Ville Valo's unique image have earned a massive global following.

items.name: Transatlanticism
items.descriptionZh: 《Transatlanticism》是美国独立摇滚乐队Death Cab for Cutie的第四张录音室专辑，以其情感充沛的歌词和层次丰富的编曲著称。专辑融合了独立摇滚、情感核和民谣元素，主题围绕距离、时间和人际关系展开，氛围忧郁而美丽。
items.descriptionEn: Transatlanticism is the fourth studio album by American indie rock band Death Cab for Cutie, known for its emotionally charged lyrics and layered arrangements. Blending indie rock, emo, and folk, the album explores themes of distance, time, and relationships with a melancholic yet beautiful atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Transatlanticism》的创作灵感来自主唱Ben Gibbard的一段异地恋经历。录制时，乐队在鼓的部分反复录制了数十次，只为捕捉那种'海浪般'的节奏感。最终版本中的钢琴和吉他叠加了十多轨，营造出宏大的声场。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Transatlanticism' was inspired by Ben Gibbard's long-distance relationship. During recording, the band re-recorded the drums dozens of times to capture a 'wave-like' rhythm. The final version layers over ten tracks of piano and guitar to create a grand soundscape.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是2000年代独立摇滚的代表作之一，推动了情感化独立摇滚的流行，对后来的独立乐队如The National和Arcade Fire产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of the defining indie rock albums of the 2000s, it helped popularize emotional indie rock and influenced later bands like The National and Arcade Fire.
items.artistIntroZh: Death Cab for Cutie成立于1997年，是美国华盛顿州贝灵厄姆的独立摇滚乐队。主唱兼词曲作者Ben Gibbard以细腻的歌词和旋律著称，乐队风格从低保真逐渐演变为精致的独立摇滚，是21世纪初独立音乐界的重要力量。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1997, Death Cab for Cutie is an indie rock band from Bellingham, Washington. Lead singer and songwriter Ben Gibbard is known for his delicate lyrics and melodies. The band evolved from lo-fi to polished indie rock, becoming a key force in early 2000s indie music.

items.name: In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3
items.descriptionZh: 《In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3》是Coheed and Cambria的第三张录音室专辑，也是其概念故事“The Amory Wars”的核心篇章。风格上融合了前卫摇滚、后硬核与流行旋律，充满史诗般的编曲、复杂器乐和戏剧化的叙事张力。专辑以宏大主题和情感爆发力著称，是乐队艺术野心的巅峰体现。
items.descriptionEn: In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3 is Coheed and Cambria's third studio album and a core chapter of their conceptual saga 'The Amory Wars.' Blending progressive rock, post-hardcore, and pop melodies, it features epic arrangements, intricate instrumentation, and dramatic narrative tension, showcasing the band's artistic ambition at its peak.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约的Applehead Studios，制作人Michael Birnbaum和Chris Bittner与乐队共同打磨了极具层次感的声音。主唱Claudio Sanchez透露，专辑同名曲的灵感来源于一场噩梦，而鼓手Josh Eppard在录音期间因过度排练导致手腕受伤，不得不调整演奏方式。专辑封面由Claudio亲自设计，延续了漫画风格的世界观。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Applehead Studios in New York, producers Michael Birnbaum and Chris Bittner helped craft the album's layered sound. Vocalist Claudio Sanchez revealed the title track was inspired by a nightmare, while drummer Josh Eppard injured his wrist from over-practicing and had to adjust his playing style. Claudio designed the cover art himself, continuing the comic-inspired universe.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Coheed and Cambria在2000年代前卫摇滚复兴运动中的核心地位，影响了后续众多概念摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Coheed and Cambria's central role in the 2000s progressive rock revival, influencing numerous subsequent concept rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria成立于1995年，来自纽约，以主唱Claudio Sanchez创造的科幻漫画系列“The Amory Wars”为叙事核心。乐队以其高亢嗓音、复杂编曲和概念专辑闻名，是前卫摇滚与后硬核融合的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1995 in New York, Coheed and Cambria center their work on vocalist Claudio Sanchez's sci-fi comic series 'The Amory Wars.' Known for soaring vocals, complex arrangements, and concept albums, they are pioneers of blending progressive rock with post-hardcore.

items.name: Vs.
items.descriptionZh: 《Vs.》是Pearl Jam的第二张专辑，风格比首张更黑暗、更硬朗，融合了垃圾���滚、硬摇滚和朋克元素。歌词充满愤怒、焦虑与社会批判，音乐上则展现了更复杂的动态变化和即兴感。它被广泛认为是乐队最具攻击性和实验性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Vs. is Pearl Jam's second album, darker and harder-edged than their debut, blending grunge, hard rock, and punk. The lyrics are filled with anger, anxiety, and social critique, while the music showcases greater dynamic shifts and improvisation. It is widely regarded as one of the band's most aggressive and experimental works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队与制作人Brendan O'Brien首次合作，录音过程紧张而高效。主唱Eddie Vedder因对名声感到不适，在“Animal”等歌曲中直抒胸臆。鼓手Dave Abbruzzese的鼓点被刻意录制得更原始，甚至保留了一些失误。专辑封面是一只羔羊的剪影，象征脆弱与反抗，由Vedder设计。
items.storiesEn: Recording with producer Brendan O'Brien for the first time, the sessions were tense but efficient. Eddie Vedder channeled his discomfort with fame into raw tracks like 'Animal.' Drummer Dave Abbruzzese's parts were intentionally kept raw, with some mistakes left in. The cover, a lamb silhouette symbolizing vulnerability and defiance, was designed by Vedder.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Vs.》在发行首周即售出超过95万张，创下当时摇滚专辑的首周销售纪录，并推动了垃圾摇滚的商业高峰。
items.historicalImpactEn: Vs. sold over 950,000 copies in its first week, setting a record for rock albums at the time and fueling the commercial peak of grunge.
items.artistIntroZh: Pearl Jam成立于1990年，来自西雅图，是垃圾摇滚运动的标志性乐队之一。以Eddie Vedder深沉的嗓音和乐队对社会议题的关注而闻名，他们坚持艺术独立性，拥有大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1990 in Seattle, Pearl Jam is an iconic band of the grunge movement. Known for Eddie Vedder's deep vocals and their commitment to social issues and artistic independence, they maintain a massive dedicated fanbase.

items.name: No Prayer for the Dying
items.descriptionZh: 《No Prayer for the Dying》是Iron Maiden的第八张录音室专辑，风格回归更直接、更粗粝的重金属，减少了前作中的前卫元素。吉他音色更脏，整体氛围阴暗而原始，歌词涉及战争、宗教与死亡。这是乐队在1990年代转型期的过渡之作。
items.descriptionEn: No Prayer for the Dying is Iron Maiden's eighth studio album, marking a return to a more direct, rawer heavy metal sound with less progressive elements. The guitar tone is dirtier, the atmosphere darker and more primal, with lyrics about war, religion, and death. It represents a transitional period for the band in the early 1990s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在乐队主唱Bruce Dickinson的移动录音室“The Barn”中录制，位于英国乡村。制作人Martin Birch使用了更少的后期处理，追求现场感。Bruce Dickinson在录制期间因感冒导致嗓音沙哑，反而赋予了专辑独特的粗粝质感。吉他手Adrian Smith因不满风格转向而在专辑发行后离队。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in vocalist Bruce Dickinson's mobile studio 'The Barn' in the English countryside, producer Martin Birch minimized post-processing for a live feel. Dickinson's cold-induced hoarseness during recording gave the album its unique gritty texture. Guitarist Adrian Smith left the band after the album due to dissatisfaction with the stylistic shift.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着Iron Maiden从1980年代辉煌期进入探索期，虽然商业反响一般，但为后续的《Fear of the Dark》奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marked Iron Maiden's transition from their 1980s golden era into an experimental phase. Though commercially modest, it laid groundwork for the subsequent Fear of the Dark.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden成立于1975年���来自英国伦敦，是重金属音乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一。以标志性的吉祥物Eddie、双吉他旋律和Bruce Dickinson的高音演唱著称，作品常涉及历史、文学和神话。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1975 in London, Iron Maiden is one of the most influential heavy metal bands in history. Known for their mascot Eddie, twin-guitar harmonies, and Bruce Dickinson's soaring vocals, their work often explores history, literature, and mythology.

items.name: Lace Up
items.descriptionZh: 《Lace Up》是Machine Gun Kelly的首张录音室专辑，风格融合了说唱、流行朋克与电子元素。歌词充满街头叙事、青春叛逆与个人奋斗，节奏明快而富有攻击性。专辑展现了MGK从地下Battle MC向主流艺人转型的野心。
items.descriptionEn: Lace Up is Machine Gun Kelly's debut studio album, blending rap, pop-punk, and electronic elements. The lyrics are filled with street narratives, youthful rebellion, and personal struggle, with fast-paced, aggressive rhythms. The album showcases MGK's ambition to transition from an underground battle MC to a mainstream artist.
items.storiesZh: 专辑��制于MGK在克利夫兰的家乡，制作过程充满DIY精神。他邀请了许多地下说唱歌手合作，如Eminem的庇护艺人Yelawolf。主打歌“Wild Boy”最初只是一首即兴freestyle，后被制作成单曲并成为其突破之作。MGK在专辑中致敬了已故好友，情绪直白而激烈。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in MGK's hometown of Cleveland, the production was DIY in spirit. He collaborated with underground rappers like Eminem's protégé Yelawolf. The lead single 'Wild Boy' started as an impromptu freestyle and became his breakthrough. MGK paid tribute to deceased friends with raw, intense emotion.
items.artistIntroZh: Machine Gun Kelly（本名Colson Baker）出生于1990年，美国说唱歌手、歌手及演员。以其高速说唱、叛逆形象和跨界融合流行朋克而闻名，是2010年代后期说唱摇滚浪潮的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Machine Gun Kelly (born Colson Baker, 1990) is an American rapper, singer, and actor. Known for his rapid-fire flow, rebellious image, and fusion of rap with pop-punk, he is a key figure in the late 2010s rap-rock wave.

items.name: I Am Chipmunk
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am Chipmunk》是英国说唱歌手Chip（原名Chipmunk）的首张录音室专辑，风格以英式Grime和嘻哈为主，融合了流行旋律与街头感。歌词聚焦于个人成长、成功与生活挣扎，节奏紧凑而富有能量。专辑确立了Chip在英国说唱界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: I Am Chipmunk is the debut studio album by British rapper Chip (formerly Chipmunk), rooted in UK grime and hip-hop with pop melodies and street edge. The lyrics focus on personal growth, success, and life struggles, with tight, energetic beats. The album established Chip's place in the UK rap scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由多位制作人操刀，包括Mega和Maniac。Chip在录制时年仅18岁，但已通过mixtape积累了大量人气。主打歌“Chip Diddy Chip”的MV在伦敦东区拍摄，展现了街头文化。专辑中与T-Pain的合作曲目“Oopsy Daisy”成为英国热门单曲，帮助Chip打入主流市场。
items.storiesEn: Produced by multiple beatmakers including Mega and Maniac, Chip was only 18 during recording but had already built a strong mixtape following. The video for lead single 'Chip Diddy Chip' was shot in East London, showcasing street culture. The T-Pain collaboration 'Oopsy Daisy' became a UK hit, pushing Chip into the mainstream.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是英国Grime向流行市场成功跨界的重要案例，推动了新一代英国说唱歌手的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a key case of UK grime successfully crossing over into the pop market, helping to usher in a new generation of British rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Chip（原名Chipmunk）出生于1990年，英国说唱歌手，来自伦敦。是2000年代末英国Grime复兴的重要人物，以其流畅的flow和商业与地下风格的平衡而闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Chip (born 1990, formerly Chipmunk) is a British rapper from London. A key figure in the late 2000s UK grime revival, he is known for his smooth flow and balance between commercial and underground styles.

items.name: The Photo Album
items.descriptionZh: 《The Photo Album》是Death Cab for Cutie的第三张录音室专辑，融合了独立摇滚、低保真和情感摇滚元素。专辑以细腻的吉他旋律、内省的歌词和温暖的氛围著称，探讨了记忆、时间和人际关系的主题，展现了乐队从低保真向更成熟风格的过渡。
items.descriptionEn: The Photo Album is Death Cab for Cutie's third studio album, blending indie rock, lo-fi, and emo influences. Known for its intricate guitar melodies, introspective lyrics, and warm atmosphere, the album explores themes of memory, time, and relationships, marking the band's transition from lo-fi to a more polished sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于西雅图的Hall of Justice录音室，由Chris Walla制作。录制过程中，乐队成员经常在深夜即兴创作，其中歌曲《Styrofoam Plates》的歌词灵感来自主唱Ben Gibbard与父亲复杂的个人经历。专辑封面的照片是Gibbard在旧货店找到的，他将其扫描并用作艺术概念。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Hall of Justice in Seattle and produced by Chris Walla, the band often jammed late at night during sessions. The lyrics for 'Styrofoam Plates' were inspired by Ben Gibbard's complex personal relationship with his father. The album cover photo was found by Gibbard at a thrift store, which he scanned and used as the art concept.
items.artistIntroZh: Death Cab for Cutie是一支美国独立摇滚乐队，1997年成立于华盛顿州贝灵厄姆。以主唱Ben Gibbard的深情嗓音和诗意歌词闻名，乐队在2000年代成为独立音乐界的标杆，代表作包括《Transatlanticism》和《Plans》。
items.artistIntroEn: Death Cab for Cutie is an American indie rock band formed in Bellingham, Washington in 1997. Known for Ben Gibbard's emotive vocals and poetic lyrics, the band became a benchmark in indie music during the 2000s, with iconic albums like Transatlanticism and Plans.

items.name: Hot Rats
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Rats》是Frank Zappa的第二张个人专辑，也是他首次完全专注于器乐和爵士融合风格的作品。专辑融合了摇滚、爵士、放克和实验音乐，以复杂的编曲、精湛的即兴演奏和独特的音色著称，被认为是融合音乐史上的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Hot Rats is Frank Zappa's second solo album and his first entirely instrumental and jazz-fusion work. Blending rock, jazz, funk, and experimental music, it is renowned for its complex arrangements, virtuosic improvisation, and unique timbres, considered a milestone in fusion music history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于洛杉矶，Zappa邀请了多位顶尖乐手，包括小提琴手Don "Sugarcane" Harris和鼓手John Guerin。歌曲《Peaches en Regalia》的旋律是Zappa在开车时哼唱出来的，他迅速用录音机记下。专辑名称“Hot Rats”源自Zappa对当时音乐圈“冷鼠”现象的调侃。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Los Angeles, Zappa enlisted top musicians including violinist Don 'Sugarcane' Harris and drummer John Guerin. The melody for 'Peaches en Regalia' was hummed by Zappa while driving, which he quickly recorded on a tape machine. The album title 'Hot Rats' was a playful jab at the 'cool rat' trend in the music scene.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Rats》是爵士融合音乐的开创性作品，影响了无数后来的艺术家，包括Steely Dan和John Zorn。其标志性曲目《Peaches en Regalia》成为Zappa最著名的作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Hot Rats is a pioneering work in jazz fusion, influencing countless later artists such as Steely Dan and John Zorn. Its iconic track 'Peaches en Regalia' became one of Zappa's most famous compositions.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa是美国作曲家、吉他手和制作人，以实验性、讽刺性和技艺精湛的音乐著称。他在1960至1990年代创作了超过60张专辑，跨越摇滚、爵士、古典和电子音乐，是20世纪最具创新精神的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, and producer known for his experimental, satirical, and technically virtuosic music. He released over 60 albums from the 1960s to the 1990s, spanning rock, jazz, classical, and electronic music, and is regarded as one of the most innovative musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Rattle and Hum
items.descriptionZh: 《Rattle and Hum》是U2的第六张录音室专辑，混合了现场录音和录音室作品，风格融合了摇滚、布鲁斯、福音和根源音乐。专辑记录了乐队对美国音乐传统的探索，展现了从后朋克向更宏大、更具社会意识风格的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Rattle and Hum is U2's sixth studio album, mixing live recordings and studio tracks, blending rock, blues, gospel, and roots music. The album documents the band's exploration of American musical traditions, marking their shift from post-punk to a grander, more socially conscious sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于美国各地的现场演出和录音室，包括与布鲁斯传奇B.B. King的合作。在孟菲斯的Sun Studio录制《When Love Comes to Town》时，King即兴加入了一段吉他独奏，成为专辑亮点。电影版《Rattle and Hum》同步拍摄，记录了乐队的巡演和创作过程。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during live shows and in studios across the US, including a collaboration with blues legend B.B. King. While recording 'When Love Comes to Town' at Sun Studio in Memphis, King improvised a guitar solo that became a highlight. A companion film was shot simultaneously, documenting the band's tour and creative process.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Rattle and Hum》虽然商业上成功，但因其对美国文化的过度致敬而受到批评，被视为U2艺术上的一个转折点。它促使乐队后来转向更实验性的风格，如《Achtung Baby》。
items.historicalImpactEn: While commercially successful, Rattle and Hum was criticized for its over-reverence to American culture, marking a turning point in U2's artistry. It prompted the band to later adopt a more experimental sound, as seen in Achtung Baby.
items.artistIntroZh: U2是一支爱尔兰摇滚乐队，1976年成立于都柏林。由Bono、The Edge、Adam Clayton和Larry Mullen Jr.组成，以宏大的现场表演、社会政治主题和不断进化的音乐风格闻名，是全球最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 is an Irish rock band formed in Dublin in 1976, consisting of Bono, The Edge, Adam Clayton, and Larry Mullen Jr. Known for their grand live performances, socio-political themes, and evolving sound, they are one of the most successful rock bands in the world.

items.name: Atom Heart Mother
items.descriptionZh: 《Atom Heart Mother》是Pink Floyd的第五张录音室专辑，以实验性、前卫摇滚和迷幻音乐为特色。专辑由一首23分钟的同名组曲和四首独立的歌曲组成，融合了管弦乐、合唱团和电子音效，展现了乐队在概念音乐上的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Atom Heart Mother is Pink Floyd's fifth studio album, characterized by experimental, progressive rock, and psychedelic music. Featuring a 23-minute title suite and four separate songs, it blends orchestral, choral, and electronic elements, showcasing the band's exploration of conceptual music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名组曲的灵感来自乐队成员对古典音乐的尝试，他们邀请了作曲家Ron Geesin协助编曲。录制过程中，乐队在Abbey Road录音室与一个大型合唱团合作，但成员们对最终结果意见不一。专辑封面由Hipgnosis设计，一头奶牛在田野上的简单画面成为经典。
items.storiesEn: The title suite was inspired by the band's experiments with classical music, enlisting composer Ron Geesin for arrangement. During recording at Abbey Road, the band worked with a large choir, but members had mixed feelings about the result. The cover, designed by Hipgnosis, featuring a simple cow in a field, became iconic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Atom Heart Mother》是Pink Floyd早期实验性风格的代表，虽然乐队后来对其评价不高，但它为《The Dark Side of the Moon》等概念专辑奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: Atom Heart Mother represents Pink Floyd's early experimental phase, and while the band later downplayed it, it laid the groundwork for conceptual albums like The Dark Side of the Moon.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd是一支英国前卫摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦。以哲学性歌词、音乐实验和震撼的现场演出闻名，成员包括Roger Waters、David Gilmour、Nick Mason和Richard Wright。他们是历史上最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1965. Known for philosophical lyrics, musical experimentation, and spectacular live shows, the band included Roger Waters, David Gilmour, Nick Mason, and Richard Wright. They are one of the most influential rock bands in history.

items.name: Arrival
items.descriptionZh: 《Arrival》是ABBA的第四张录音室专辑，以流行、迪斯科和斯堪的纳维亚流行音乐风格著称。专辑充满了朗朗上口的旋律、华丽的和声和精致的制作，收录了多首全球热门歌曲，展现了ABBA在流行音乐巅峰时期的创作力。
items.descriptionEn: Arrival is ABBA's fourth studio album, known for its pop, disco, and Scandinavian pop style. Filled with catchy melodies, lush harmonies, and polished production, the album features multiple global hits, showcasing ABBA's creative peak in pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于斯德哥尔摩的Metronome录音室，制作人Björn Ulvaeus和Benny Andersson在创作《Dancing Queen》时，灵感来自乔治·麦考的迪斯科节奏。歌曲《Money, Money, Money》的歌词反映了乐队对税务压力的调侃。专辑封面在斯德哥尔摩的直升机上拍摄，成员们穿着标志性的华丽服装。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Metronome Studio in Stockholm, producers Björn Ulvaeus and Benny Andersson drew inspiration from George McCrae's disco beat for 'Dancing Queen.' The lyrics of 'Money, Money, Money' playfully reflected the band's tax pressures. The album cover was shot from a helicopter in Stockholm, with members in their iconic glamorous outfits.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Arrival》是ABBA商业上最成功的专辑之一，其中《Dancing Queen》成为1970年代迪斯科运动的标志性歌曲，并影响了后来的流行音乐制作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Arrival is one of ABBA's most commercially successful albums, with 'Dancing Queen' becoming an iconic track of the 1970s disco movement, influencing later pop music production.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是一支瑞典流行乐队，1972年成立于斯德哥尔摩，由Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。以和谐的男女对唱和精致制作闻名，他们是瑞典最成功的音乐输出之一，全球销量超过3.8亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop group formed in Stockholm in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for their harmonious male-female vocals and polished production, they are one of Sweden's most successful musical exports, with over 380 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Everything in Time
items.descriptionZh: 《Everything in Time》是No Doubt于2004年发行的精选与未发表曲目合辑，融合了斯卡、新浪潮与流行摇滚风格。专辑收录了乐队早期至巅峰时期的遗珠之作，展现了他们从地下斯卡场景向全球流行巨星转变的多元音乐轨迹。
items.descriptionEn: "Everything in Time" is a 2004 compilation by No Doubt featuring rare tracks and B-sides, blending ska, new wave, and pop rock. It showcases the band's evolution from underground ska scenes to global pop superstardom.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于乐队在整理旧录音带时发现的大量未公开素材。主唱格温·史蒂芬尼回忆，其中一首歌的demo是在巡演大巴上用简陋设备录制的，背景里还能听到队友打闹的笑声。乐队最终决定将这些“时间胶囊”集结成册，献给铁杆粉丝。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from a treasure trove of unreleased material found while the band was sorting through old tapes. Gwen Stefani recalled that one demo was recorded on a tour bus with basic equipment, with bandmates' laughter audible in the background. The band decided to compile these 'time capsules' for dedicated fans.
items.artistIntroZh: No Doubt是美国加州乐队，成立于1986年，以主唱格温·史蒂芬尼的独特嗓音和融合斯卡、朋克、流行元素的音乐风格闻名。1995年专辑《Tragic Kingdom》使其一跃成为国际巨星，至今仍是90年代流行文化的标志性符号。
items.artistIntroEn: No Doubt is a California band formed in 1986, known for Gwen Stefani's distinctive vocals and a fusion of ska, punk, and pop. Their 1995 album "Tragic Kingdom" catapulted them to international fame, making them iconic symbols of 1990s pop culture.

items.name: Blood of Angels
items.descriptionZh: 《Blood of Angels》是美国黑暗民谣/哥特音乐人Michelle Belanger于2006年发行的概念专辑，以暗黑氛围、中世纪吟唱和宗教意象为核心。作品充满神秘主义色彩，配以低沉的管弦乐与空灵女声，营造出如吸血鬼传说般的幽暗美学。
items.descriptionEn: "Blood of Angels" is a 2006 concept album by dark folk/gothic musician Michelle Belanger, centering on dark atmospheres, medieval chants, and religious imagery. It evokes a vampiric aesthetic with somber orchestration and ethereal vocals.
items.storiesZh: Belanger本人是知名的吸血鬼文化研究者与作家，这张专辑的灵感源自她研究欧洲民间传说时的亲身经历。她在录制期间曾在一座废弃城堡中过夜，据说当晚听到的脚步声和风声被直接采样进了专辑的序曲中。
items.storiesEn: Belanger, a renowned vampire culture researcher and author, drew inspiration from her fieldwork on European folklore. She spent a night in an abandoned castle during recording, and the footsteps and wind sounds she heard were sampled directly into the album's overture.
items.artistIntroZh: Michelle Belanger是美国作家、音乐人及吸血鬼亚文化权威，曾出版多部关于吸血鬼传说的书籍。她的音乐作品常融合哥特、暗潮与新世纪元素，以深邃的歌词和仪式感强烈的旋律著称，是小众黑暗音乐圈的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Michelle Belanger is an American author, musician, and authority on vampire subculture, having published several books on vampire lore. Her music blends gothic, darkwave, and new age elements, known for profound lyrics and ritualistic melodies, representing niche dark music circles.

items.name: Suicide Tuesday
items.descriptionZh: 《Suicide Tuesday》是英国电子摇滚乐队Hyper于2008年发行的专辑，融合了工业电子、硬核朋克与碎拍节奏。专辑以尖锐的合成器音色和撕裂感的人声为标志，主题围绕现代社会的精神焦虑与自我毁灭倾向，充���末日狂欢般的能量。
items.descriptionEn: "Suicide Tuesday" is a 2008 album by British electronic rock band Hyper, blending industrial electronica, hardcore punk, and breakbeats. Marked by sharp synth textures and raw vocals, it explores themes of spiritual anxiety and self-destruction in modern society with apocalyptic energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱因过度投入情绪一度失声三天。制作人不得不将他锁在录音棚里，要求他对着墙壁尖叫来释放压力——这段声音后来被处理成专辑第四首歌的底层音效。乐队笑称这是“用崩溃换来的艺术”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the lead singer lost his voice for three days due to emotional overload. The producer locked him in the studio and made him scream at the walls to release pressure—the sound was later processed into the underlying noise of the fourth track. The band joked it was 'art bought with a breakdown.'
items.artistIntroZh: Hyper是英国电子摇滚乐队，活跃于2000年代后期，以高能量现场和工业风格著称。他们将电子舞曲的节拍与朋克的叛逆精神结合，虽未进入主流视野，但在地下电子与摇滚跨界圈层拥有一批忠实追随者。
items.artistIntroEn: Hyper is a British electronic rock band active in the late 2000s, known for high-energy performances and industrial style. They combined dance beats with punk rebellion; while not mainstream, they gained a loyal following in underground electronic-rock crossover circles.

items.name: Perfect Symmetry
items.descriptionZh: 《Perfect Symmetry》是英国另类摇滚乐队Keane于2008年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格从早期的钢琴摇滚转向更丰富的合成器流行与艺术摇滚。专辑以明亮的旋律、宏大的编曲和充满希望的歌词为特色，展现了乐队音乐视野的拓展。
items.descriptionEn: "Perfect Symmetry" is the third studio album by British alternative rock band Keane, released in 2008. It marks a shift from piano rock to synth-pop and art rock, featuring bright melodies, grand arrangements, and hopeful lyrics, showcasing the band's expanded musical vision.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作过程异常艰难，乐队成员一度因方向分歧濒临解散。为了打破僵局，他们集体前往法国南部的一座乡村别墅，每天只做三件事：写歌、吃饭、看日落。最终在田园氛围中找到了“完美对称”的和谐感。
items.storiesEn: The album's creation was fraught with tension; the band nearly broke up over creative differences. To break the deadlock, they retreated to a rural villa in southern France, doing only three things daily: writing songs, eating, and watching sunsets. The pastoral atmosphere finally brought them 'perfect symmetry.'
items.artistIntroZh: Keane是英国三人另类摇滚乐队，成立于1995年，以不使用吉他的钢琴摇滚风格独树一帜。2004年首张专辑《Hopes and Fears》大获成功，获得全英音乐奖最佳专辑奖。他们的音乐以情感充沛的旋律和主唱Tom Chaplin的动人嗓音著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Keane is a British three-piece alternative rock band formed in 1995, distinct for their guitar-free piano rock. Their 2004 debut "Hopes and Fears" won the Brit Award for Best Album. They are known for emotionally charged melodies and lead singer Tom Chaplin's poignant voice.

items.name: Heroes
items.descriptionZh: 《Heroes》是David Bowie于1977年发行的专辑，是其“柏林三部曲”的第二部，融合了艺术摇滚、电子实验与氛围音乐。专辑以同名史诗级歌曲《Heroes》为核心，充满冷战时期的柏林忧郁与浪漫主义，展现了鲍伊最富实验精神的创作阶段。
items.descriptionEn: "Heroes" is David Bowie's 1977 album, the second in his 'Berlin Trilogy,' blending art rock, electronic experimentation, and ambient music. Centered on the epic title track, it captures Cold War-era Berlin's melancholy and romance, showcasing Bowie's most experimental phase.
items.storiesZh: 同名曲《Heroes》的灵感来自制作人Tony Visconti在柏林墙边目睹的一对情侣接吻的场景。鲍伊在录制时采用了独特的“三麦克风”技术：主唱站在离麦克风不同距离的位置，随着副歌推进逐渐后退，营造出空间感与情感张力。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Heroes" was inspired by producer Tony Visconti witnessing a couple kissing near the Berlin Wall. Bowie used a unique 'three-microphone' technique: he sang at varying distances from the mics, stepping back as the chorus built, creating spatial depth and emotional tension.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Heroes》被公认为20世纪最伟大的歌曲之一，其同名专辑深刻影响了后朋克、独立摇滚及电子音乐的发展。这首歌成为柏林乃至冷战时期自由与希望的象征，至今仍被广泛传唱与致敬。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Heroes" is considered one of the greatest songs of the 20th century. The album profoundly influenced post-punk, indie rock, and electronic music. The track became a symbol of freedom and hope in Cold War Berlin, still widely covered and revered.
items.artistIntroZh: David Bowie（1947-2016）是英国传奇摇滚音乐人、演员及文化偶像，以其不断创新的音乐风格和舞台人格著称。从华丽摇滚的Ziggy Stardust到柏林时期的实验探索，他一生重塑了流行音乐的边界，被誉为“摇滚变色龙”。
items.artistIntroEn: David Bowie (1947-2016) was a legendary British rock musician, actor, and cultural icon, known for his constantly evolving musical styles and stage personas. From glam rock's Ziggy Stardust to Berlin-era experimentation, he reshaped pop music's boundaries, hailed as the 'chameleon of rock.'

items.name: Jackson 5 Christmas Album
items.descriptionZh: 《Jackson 5 Christmas Album》是杰克逊五人组于1970年发行的圣诞专辑，融合了灵魂乐、流行和摩城音乐的欢快风格。核心特色是迈克尔·杰克逊稚嫩而充满活力的童声领唱，配合兄弟们的和声，赋予经典圣诞歌曲全新的青春气息，整体氛围温馨又动感。
items.descriptionEn: The Jackson 5 Christmas Album is a 1970 Christmas release blending soul, pop, and Motown cheer. Its core feature is Michael Jackson's youthful, energetic lead vocals with his brothers' harmonies, giving classic Christmas songs a fresh, lively feel, warm and groovy.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，年仅12岁的迈克尔·杰克逊对圣诞歌曲充满好奇，经常在录音间隙即兴模仿各种声音逗乐兄弟。制作人特意在编曲中加入更多铜管和打击乐，以突出孩子们的天真活力。专辑封面由摩城御用设计师设计，五兄弟穿着红色圣诞装，笑容灿烂。
items.storiesEn: During recording, 12-year-old Michael Jackson was fascinated by Christmas songs, often improvising sound effects between takes to amuse his brothers. The producer added extra brass and percussion to highlight the kids' exuberance. The cover, designed by Motown's in-house artist, shows the five brothers in red Christmas outfits, beaming.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是摩城唱片旗下最畅销的圣诞专辑之一，为后来众多流行歌手录制圣诞专辑树立了模板。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of Motown's best-selling Christmas albums, it set a template for later pop stars recording holiday records.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五人组（The Jackson 5）来自美国印第安纳州加里市，由杰克逊家族五兄弟组成：杰基、蒂托、杰梅因、马龙和迈克尔。他们在摩城唱片旗下以《I Want You Back》等金曲走红，是1970年代最成功的少年组合之一，迈克尔·杰克逊后来成为全球流行巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5, from Gary, Indiana, consisted of brothers Jackie, Tito, Jermaine, Marlon, and Michael. Signed to Motown, they became one of the most successful teen groups of the 1970s with hits like 'I Want You Back.' Michael later became a global pop icon.

items.name: Ignition
items.descriptionZh: 《Ignition》是美国朋克摇滚乐队The Offspring于1992年发行的第二张专辑，风格以硬核朋克为主，融合了旋律性副歌和讽刺性歌词。核心特色是高速的鼓点、扭曲的吉他和主唱德克斯特·霍兰德的嘶吼式演唱，奠定了乐队90年代早期朋克复兴的基调。
items.descriptionEn: Ignition is The Offspring's 1992 sophomore album, rooted in hardcore punk with melodic choruses and sarcastic lyrics. Its core features are fast drumming, distorted guitars, and Dexter Holland's shouty vocals, laying the groundwork for the band's early '90s punk revival sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在洛杉矶一家小录音室录制，预算仅2万美元。吉他手凯文·沃特斯在录制《Kick Him When He's Down》时，因过度用力拨弦导致手指流血，不得不缠着绷带完成录音。乐队曾担心专辑过于激进会被主流厂牌拒绝，但最终由独立厂牌Epitaph发行。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a small LA studio on a $20,000 budget, guitarist Kevin Waters' fingers bled during 'Kick Him When He's Down' from aggressive strumming, requiring bandages. The band feared the album was too aggressive for major labels, but indie label Epitaph released it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是90年代朋克复兴的关键作品之一，影响了后来众多流行朋克乐队，如Blink-182。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a key album of the '90s punk revival, it influenced later pop-punk bands like Blink-182.
items.artistIntroZh: The Offspring成立于1987年，来自美国加利福尼亚州橙县。主唱德克斯特·霍兰德和吉他手凯文·沃特斯是核心成员。他们以1994年的《Smash》专辑全球爆红，成为史上最畅销的独立厂牌专辑之一，作品充满对社会的讽刺和青春叛逆。
items.artistIntroEn: The Offspring formed in 1987 in Orange County, California. Core members are Dexter Holland (vocals) and Kevin Waters (guitar). Their 1994 album Smash became one of the best-selling indie-label albums ever, known for sarcastic social commentary and teenage rebellion.

items.name: Wrong Way Up
items.descriptionZh: 《Wrong Way Up》是威尔士音乐人约翰·凯尔于1990年发行的个人专辑，风格融合了艺术摇滚、前卫流行和实验元素。核心特色是凯尔标志性的低沉嗓音与不和谐弦乐编排，歌词充满超现实主义意象，整体氛围既忧郁又带有一丝怪诞的幽默。
items.descriptionEn: Wrong Way Up is John Cale's 1990 solo album blending art rock, avant-pop, and experimental sounds. Its core features are Cale's distinctive deep voice, dissonant string arrangements, and surreal lyrics, creating a melancholic yet wryly humorous atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，凯尔与长期合作者布莱恩·伊诺发生了创作分歧。伊诺原本参与制作，但因对歌曲方向意见不合而中途退出。凯尔独自完成混音，并调侃说这张专辑是“与一个讨厌你的人合作的结果”。最终专辑封面由凯尔自己设计，用了扭曲的公路照片。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Cale clashed with longtime collaborator Brian Eno, who quit mid-production due to creative differences. Cale finished mixing alone, joking it was 'the result of working with someone who hates you.' He designed the cover himself, using a distorted road photo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为凯尔个人风格成熟的标志，影响了90年代独立摇滚和艺术流行乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a milestone in Cale's solo career, it influenced '90s indie rock and art-pop.
items.artistIntroZh: 约翰·凯尔（John Cale）是威尔士音乐家、作曲家，以实验摇滚先驱身份闻名。他是地下丝绒乐队（The Velvet Underground）的创始成员之一，演奏中提琴、贝斯和键盘。个人作品横跨古典、前卫和摇滚，被誉为前卫音乐的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: John Cale is a Welsh musician and composer, known as a pioneer of experimental rock. A founding member of The Velvet Underground, he plays viola, bass, and keyboards. His solo work spans classical, avant-garde, and rock, making him a key figure in avant-garde music.

items.name: Wrong Way Up
items.descriptionZh: 《Wrong Way Up》是英国音乐人布莱恩·伊诺于1990年发行的专辑，风格融合了氛围音乐、艺术流行和电子实验。核心特色是伊诺标志性的空灵合成器音色、层层叠叠的和声，以及对“不完美”音效的偏爱，创造出既宁静又略带不安的听感。
items.descriptionEn: Wrong Way Up is Brian Eno's 1990 album blending ambient, art-pop, and electronic experimentation. Its core features are Eno's signature ethereal synth textures, layered harmonies, and a penchant for 'imperfect' sounds, creating a serene yet slightly unsettling listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是与约翰·凯尔合作的产物，但两人因创作理念冲突而分道扬镳。伊诺后来回忆说，凯尔希望歌曲更摇滚，而伊诺倾向于更抽象的氛围。最终伊诺保留了部分合作素材，并加入了自己录制的环境音，如流水声和金属碰撞声。
items.storiesEn: Originally a collaboration with John Cale, the project split due to creative clashes. Eno recalled Cale wanted rockier songs while Eno preferred abstract atmospheres. Eno kept some collaborative material and added field recordings like water flows and metal clangs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是伊诺从纯粹氛围音乐回归歌曲创作的重要作品，对90年代电子流行和独立音乐产生了影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: A key return to songwriting for Eno after pure ambient works, it influenced '90s electronic pop and indie music.
items.artistIntroZh: 布莱恩·伊诺（Brian Eno）是英国音乐家、制作人和视觉艺术家，被誉为氛围音乐之父。他曾是Roxy Music的成员，后以个人作品和与大卫·鲍伊、U2等合作闻名。他的音乐以环境音效和实验性著称，深刻影响了现代电子音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, producer, and visual artist, known as the father of ambient music. A former Roxy Music member, he is famous for solo works and collaborations with David Bowie and U2. His music emphasizes environmental sound and experimentation, deeply influencing modern electronic music.

items.name: Celebration Day
items.descriptionZh: 《Celebration Day》是英国摇滚乐队Led Zeppelin于2012年发行的现场专辑，记录了2007年他们在伦敦O2体育馆的纪念演唱会。风格是经典的硬摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚，核心特色是乐队三位原始成员（吉米·佩奇、罗伯特·普兰特、约翰·保罗·琼斯）与已故鼓手约翰·博纳姆之子杰森·博纳姆的完美配合，重现了巅峰时期的震撼力。
items.descriptionEn: Celebration Day is a 2012 live album by Led Zeppelin, documenting their 2007 tribute concert at London's O2 Arena. It features classic hard rock and blues-rock, with the three original members—Jimmy Page, Robert Plant, John Paul Jones—joined by late drummer John Bonham's son Jason Bonham, recreating their peak-era power.
items.storiesZh: 这场演唱会是为纪念大西洋唱片创始人艾哈迈德·厄特根而举办，门票抽签中仅200万申请者中的1.8万人有幸入场。杰森·博纳姆在演出前紧张到呕吐，但在《Stairway to Heaven》中完美演绎了父亲的鼓点。乐队在《Kashmir》中使用了巨型LED屏幕，营造出沙漠幻境效果。
items.storiesEn: The concert honored Atlantic Records founder Ahmet Ertegun; only 18,000 of 2 million ticket applicants got in. Jason Bonham was so nervous he vomited before the show but flawlessly played his father's drum parts on 'Stairway to Heaven.' The band used giant LED screens for a desert mirage effect during 'Kashmir.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是Led Zeppelin解散27年后的唯一一次完整重聚演出，被公认为摇滚史上最伟大的现场之一，也彻底终结了重组巡演的传闻。
items.historicalImpactEn: The band's only full reunion show 27 years after disbanding, it's hailed as one of rock's greatest live events, ending reunion tour speculation for good.
items.artistIntroZh: Led Zeppelin是英国传奇硬摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，成员包括吉米·佩奇（吉他）、罗伯特·普兰特（主唱）、约翰·保罗·琼斯（贝斯/键盘）和约翰·博纳姆���鼓手）。他们以《Stairway to Heaven》等史诗作品闻名，全球销量超过3亿张，是摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin is a legendary British hard rock band formed in 1968, featuring Jimmy Page (guitar), Robert Plant (vocals), John Paul Jones (bass/keyboards), and John Bonham (drums). Known for epics like 'Stairway to Heaven,' they sold over 300 million albums worldwide, one of rock's most influential acts.

items.name: Playing the Angel
items.descriptionZh: 《Playing the Angel》是Depeche Mode在2005年发行的第11张录音室专辑，风格融合了合成器流行、工业摇滚和暗黑电子。核心特色在于回归早期阴暗冷峻的电子音色，同时融入更具冲击力的吉他失真与主唱Dave Gahan深沉的嗓音，歌词探讨信仰、欲望与救赎。
items.descriptionEn: Playing the Angel is Depeche Mode's 11th studio album, blending synth-pop, industrial rock, and dark electronics. Its core features a return to the band's early cold electronic sound, combined with aggressive guitar distortion and Dave Gahan's deep vocals, exploring themes of faith, desire, and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，主唱Dave Gahan首次以创作人身份贡献了三首歌曲，打破了Martin Gore长期主导词曲的局面。为了捕捉更真实的现场感，乐队在录音室搭建了临时舞台，并使用了大量模拟合成器与老式磁带机。专辑名称源自一张被遗忘的素描，画中天使在弹奏乐器。
items.storiesEn: During recording, frontman Dave Gahan contributed three songs as a songwriter for the first time, breaking Martin Gore's long-held dominance. To capture a live feel, the band built a temporary stage in the studio and used many analog synthesizers and old tape machines. The album title came from a forgotten sketch of an angel playing an instrument.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是Depeche Mode在21世纪最具影响力的作品之一，重新确立了他们在电子摇滚领域的先锋地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered one of Depeche Mode's most influential works of the 21st century, reaffirming their pioneering status in electronic rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode成立于1980年的英国电子乐队，以合成器驱动的暗黑流行乐闻名。成员包括Dave Gahan、Martin Gore和Andy Fletcher，全球销量超过1亿张，是电子音乐史上最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is a British electronic band formed in 1980, known for synth-driven dark pop. Members include Dave Gahan, Martin Gore, and Andy Fletcher. With over 100 million records sold, they are one of the most successful electronic acts in history.

items.name: 12 X 5
items.descriptionZh: 《12 X 5》是The Rolling Stones在1964年发行的第二张美国专辑，风格以节奏蓝调、芝加哥布鲁斯和早期摇滚为主。核心特色是狂野的现场能量与翻唱经典的结合，展现了乐队从布鲁斯根源向原创转型的过渡期。
items.descriptionEn: 12 X 5 is The Rolling Stones' second US album, featuring R&B, Chicago blues, and early rock. Its core is a mix of wild live energy and classic covers, showcasing the band's transition from blues roots to original songwriting.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制仅用了短短几天，大部分歌曲在芝加哥的Chess Studios完成，那里是Muddy Waters等布鲁斯大师的圣地。乐队成员曾回忆，当时他们挤在狭小的控制室里，用一台老式磁带机录制，吉他手Brian Jones甚至即兴加入了口琴段落。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just a few days, mostly at Chess Studios in Chicago, the holy ground of blues legends like Muddy Waters. Band members recalled cramming into a tiny control room with an old tape machine; guitarist Brian Jones even improvised harmonica parts on the spot.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了滚石乐队在美国家喻户晓的地位，标志着英国入侵浪潮中布鲁斯摇滚的崛起。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented The Rolling Stones' fame in the US, marking the rise of blues rock in the British Invasion.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones成立于1962年的英国摇滚乐队，核���成员Mick Jagger和Keith Richards。他们以叛逆形象和布鲁斯摇滚风格著称，是全球最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一，活跃至今已超过60年。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are a British rock band formed in 1962, with core members Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. Known for their rebellious image and blues rock, they are one of the most influential rock bands globally, active for over 60 years.

items.name: A Real Dead One
items.descriptionZh: 《A Real Dead One》是Iron Maiden在1993年发行的现场专辑，收录了1982至1993年间多场演唱会的实况。风格是典型的重金属，核心特色在于曲目选择偏向早期冷门作品，以及乐队标志性的双吉他旋律和Bruce Dickinson高亢的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: A Real Dead One is a live album by Iron Maiden, featuring recordings from 1982 to 1993. It is classic heavy metal, with a focus on early, lesser-known songs, dual-guitar harmonies, and Bruce Dickinson's soaring vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源自歌迷对乐队早期作品‘不吉利’的玩笑称呼。录制时，乐队特意挑选了那些较少在现场演出的曲目，包括《The Number of the Beast》的罕见版本。由于录音来自不同年份和场馆，后期制作花了大量时间调整音质以保持一致性。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from fans' joking reference to the band's early songs as 'unlucky.' The band deliberately chose rarely performed tracks, including a rare version of The Number of the Beast. Since recordings came from different years and venues, post-production spent much time adjusting sound quality for consistency.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden成立于1975年的英国重金属乐队，以史诗般的歌曲、吉祥物Eddie和复杂的吉他编曲著称。主唱Bruce Dickinson和贝斯手Steve Harris是核心，全球销量超过1亿张，是新浪潮重金属运动的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a British heavy metal band formed in 1975, known for epic songs, mascot Eddie, and complex guitar work. Frontman Bruce Dickinson and bassist Steve Harris are core members. With over 100 million records sold, they represent the New Wave of British Heavy Metal.

items.name: Damn the Torpedoes
items.descriptionZh: 《Damn the Torpedoes》是Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers在1979年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格为心脏地带摇滚和流行摇滚。核心特色是简洁有力的吉他Riff、Petty沙哑的嗓音以及充满反抗精神的歌词，制作上追求清晰而有力的音色。
items.descriptionEn: Damn the Torpedoes is Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers' third studio album, blending heartland rock and pop rock. Its core features tight guitar riffs, Petty's raspy vocals, and defiant lyrics, with a clean, powerful production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程充满波折：Tom Petty因与前唱片公司MCA的法律纠纷，一度濒临破产，甚至申请了破产保护。乐队在录音室连续工作数周，制作人Jimmy Iovine坚持使用24轨录音机以捕捉动态。歌曲《Refugee》的副歌部分是在一次即兴排练中诞生的。
items.storiesEn: The recording was tumultuous: Tom Petty faced legal disputes with former label MCA, nearly went bankrupt, and even filed for bankruptcy protection. The band worked for weeks in the studio; producer Jimmy Iovine insisted on using a 24-track recorder for dynamics. The chorus of Refugee was born during an impromptu jam session.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Tom Petty商业上的突破，销量超过300万张，奠定了心脏地带摇滚在主流音乐中的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was Tom Petty's commercial breakthrough, selling over 3 million copies and cementing heartland rock's place in mainstream music.
items.artistIntroZh: Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers是一支美国摇滚乐队，成立于1976年，核心人物Tom Petty���独��的嗓音和经典歌曲闻名。乐队融合了民谣、布鲁斯和摇滚，是80年代美国摇滚的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers are an American rock band formed in 1976. Frontman Tom Petty is known for his distinctive voice and classic songs. Blending folk, blues, and rock, they were emblematic of 1980s American rock.

items.name: Counterparts
items.descriptionZh: 《Counterparts》是Rush在1993年发行的第15张录音室专辑，风格为前卫摇滚和硬摇滚。核心特色在于回归乐队早期硬摇滚的冲击力，同时保留前卫的复杂编曲，吉他音色更厚重，歌词探讨人际关系与内心冲突。
items.descriptionEn: Counterparts is Rush's 15th studio album, blending progressive rock and hard rock. Its core is a return to the band's early hard rock punch while retaining complex arrangements, with heavier guitar tones and lyrics exploring relationships and inner conflict.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队决定放弃使用键盘，回归吉他、贝斯和鼓的三件套配置。制作人Peter Collins鼓励他们即兴创作，许多歌曲的骨架来自排练时的偶然灵感。专辑封面上的两个对称人物，象征专辑主题‘对立与平衡’。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band decided to abandon keyboards, returning to a guitar, bass, and drums trio setup. Producer Peter Collins encouraged improvisation; many song skeletons came from casual jams. The album cover's two symmetrical figures symbolize the theme of 'opposites and balance.'
items.artistIntroZh: Rush是一支加拿大前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，成员包括Geddy Lee、Alex Lifeson和Neil Peart。他们以复杂的编曲、哲学歌词和精湛的演奏技巧闻名，是前卫摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rush is a Canadian progressive rock band formed in 1968, consisting of Geddy Lee, Alex Lifeson, and Neil Peart. Known for complex arrangements, philosophical lyrics, and virtuosic musicianship, they are one of the most influential prog rock bands in history.

items.name: The Boys
items.descriptionZh: 《The Boys》是少女时代首张正规韩语专辑，融合了流行、舞曲和电子元素，以强烈的合成器节拍和充满活力的旋律为特色。专辑展现了成员们成熟而自信的魅力，主打歌《The Boys》更以霸气十足的歌词和编舞成为K-Pop经典。
items.descriptionEn: ‘The Boys’ is Girls' Generation's first full-length Korean album, blending pop, dance, and electronic elements with powerful synth beats and energetic melodies. It showcases the members' mature and confident charm, with the title track becoming a K-pop classic through its bold lyrics and choreography.
items.storiesZh: 录制《The Boys》时，少女时代成员们为了呈现完美的群舞，每天练习超过10小时。主打歌的英文版本特意邀请了知名制作人Teddy Riley参与，这也是她们首次尝试进军国际市场。MV拍摄期间，成员们因高强度的舞蹈动作多次受伤，但仍坚持完成拍摄。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of ‘The Boys,’ the members practiced group choreography for over 10 hours daily to achieve perfection. The English version of the title track featured renowned producer Teddy Riley, marking their first attempt at the global market. During the MV shoot, several members sustained injuries from intense dance moves but persevered to finish filming.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助少女时代进一步巩固了在K-Pop界的顶尖地位，并在全球范围内掀起K-Pop热潮，为后续K-Pop女团国际化铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Girls' Generation's top status in K-pop and sparked a global K-pop wave, paving the way for future K-pop girl groups' international success.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代是韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的女子组合，由金泰妍、郑秀妍、李顺圭、黄美英、金孝渊、权俞利、崔秀英、林允儿、徐珠贤九名成员组成。她们以出色的唱跳实力和多样的音乐风格著称，被誉为“国民女团”。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, consisting of nine members: Taeyeon, Jessica, Sunny, Tiffany, Hyoyeon, Yuri, Sooyoung, Yoona, and Seohyun. Renowned for their exceptional singing and dancing skills and diverse music styles, they are often called the ‘Nation’s Girl Group.’

items.name: Black Ice
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Ice》是AC/DC第15张录音室专辑，回归了乐队标志性的硬摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚风格。专辑以厚重的吉他音墙、强劲的鼓点和布莱恩·约翰逊沙哑的嗓音为特色，充满了原始而充满活力的摇滚能量。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Black Ice’ is AC/DC's 15th studio album, returning to their signature hard rock and blues rock sound. It features thick guitar walls, powerful drumming, and Brian Johnson's raspy vocals, brimming with raw and energetic rock power.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于温哥华的一个地下室录音室，乐队刻意选择远离外界干扰的环境。制作人布伦丹·奥布莱恩要求乐队成员用模拟设备而非数字设备录制，以追求更温暖、更复古的音质。吉他手安格斯·杨在录制期间每天都会即兴独奏数小时，许多灵感被直接收入专辑。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a basement studio in Vancouver, chosen by the band to avoid outside distractions. Producer Brendan O'Brien insisted on using analog equipment instead of digital to achieve a warmer, vintage sound. Guitarist Angus Young improvised solos for hours each day during recording, with many ideas directly making it onto the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Black Ice》成为AC/DC自2000年以来最成功的商业专辑之一，在全球销量超过600万张，证明了传统硬摇滚在21世纪依然拥有强大的号召力。
items.historicalImpactEn: ‘Black Ice’ became one of AC/DC's most commercially successful albums since 2000, selling over 6 million copies worldwide, proving that traditional hard rock still holds strong appeal in the 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是1973年成立于澳大利亚悉尼的硬摇滚乐队，由安格斯·杨、马尔科姆·杨兄弟创立。乐队以标志性的校服造型、高压电般的舞台表演和简洁有力的摇滚乐闻名，是史上最畅销的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is a hard rock band formed in Sydney, Australia in 1973 by brothers Angus and Malcolm Young. Known for their iconic school uniform look, high-voltage stage performances, and straightforward rock sound, they are one of the best-selling rock bands of all time.

items.name: Erotica
items.descriptionZh: 《Erotica》是麦当娜第五张录音室专辑，以大胆的性主题和暗黑舞曲风格震惊世界。专辑融合了浩室、放克和R&B元素，歌词直白探讨欲望与权力，配合她低沉的念白式演唱，营造出冷艳而挑衅的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Erotica’ is Madonna's fifth studio album, shocking the world with its bold sexual themes and dark dance music style. Blending house, funk, and R&B, the lyrics bluntly explore desire and power, paired with her low, spoken-word vocals to create a cold, provocative atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑与《SEX》写真书同步发行，书中包含大量露骨照片，引发巨大争议。录制过程中，麦当娜与制作人谢普·佩蒂伯恩在纽约的录音室日夜工作，她坚持亲自参与每一轨的编曲。主打歌的MV因过于色情被多家电视台禁播，反而助长了专辑的话题性。
items.storiesEn: The album was released simultaneously with the ‘SEX’ photo book, which contained explicit images and sparked massive controversy. During recording, Madonna and producer Shep Pettibone worked day and night in a New York studio, with her insisting on participating in every track's arrangement. The music video for the title track was banned by many TV stations for being too erotic, ironically boosting the album's buzz.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Erotica》挑战了主流社会对女性性表达的禁忌，推动了流行音乐中性别议题的讨论，对后续许多流行女星的创作产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: ‘Erotica’ challenged mainstream taboos on female sexual expression, advancing discussions on gender issues in pop music and profoundly influencing many subsequent female pop stars.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜是美国流行天后、歌手、演员和企业家，被誉为“流行女王”。她以不��革新音乐风格和挑战社会常规著称，职业生涯跨越四十余年，是全球最具影响力的女性艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American pop icon, singer, actress, and entrepreneur known as the ‘Queen of Pop.’ Renowned for constantly reinventing her music style and challenging social norms, her career spans over four decades, making her one of the most influential female artists globally.

items.name: Frank
items.descriptionZh: 《Frank》是艾米·怀恩豪斯的首张录音室专辑，融合了爵士、灵魂和R&B风格，以她醇厚而充满情感的嗓音为核心。专辑歌词充满自传性，敏锐刻画了爱情与心碎，展现出超越年龄的成熟创作才华。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Frank’ is Amy Winehouse's debut studio album, blending jazz, soul, and R&B, centered on her rich, emotive voice. The lyrics are deeply autobiographical, sharply portraying love and heartbreak, showcasing a songwriting maturity far beyond her years.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时艾米年仅19岁，但她已展现出对老派爵士的深厚热爱。制作人萨拉姆·雷米回忆，艾米经常在录音室即兴改词，甚至��次录制中突然要求关掉所有乐器，只用清唱完成整首歌。专辑名《Frank》取自她祖父弗兰克，他曾在艾米童年时教她唱爵士歌曲。
items.storiesEn: Amy was only 19 during the album's recording, but she already showed a deep love for old-school jazz. Producer Salaam Remi recalled that Amy often improvised lyrics in the studio, once demanding all instruments be turned off so she could sing a whole song acapella. The album title ‘Frank’ comes from her grandfather Frank, who taught her jazz songs in her childhood.
items.artistIntroZh: 艾米·怀恩豪斯是英国灵魂乐和爵士歌手，以其独特的复古发型、浓重眼线和极具穿透力的嗓音闻名。她凭借专辑《Back to Black》获得多项格莱美奖，但于2011年因酒精中毒去世，年仅27岁。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse was a British soul and jazz singer known for her distinctive retro hairstyle, heavy eyeliner, and piercing voice. She won multiple Grammy Awards for her album ‘Back to Black,’ but tragically died of alcohol poisoning in 2011 at age 27.

items.name: Seconds Out
items.descriptionZh: 《Seconds Out》是创世纪乐队的第二张现场专辑，记录了乐队在1976-1977年巡演中的巅峰表现。专辑以复杂的前卫摇滚编曲、菲尔·柯林斯精湛的鼓技和彼得·加布里埃尔离队后新主唱柯林斯的转型为特色，堪称前卫摇滚现场录音的典范。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Seconds Out’ is Genesis's second live album, capturing the band at their peak during the 1976-1977 tour. Featuring complex progressive rock arrangements, Phil Collins' masterful drumming, and Collins' vocal transition after Peter Gabriel's departure, it stands as a quintessential progressive rock live recording.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴黎和格拉斯哥的多场演出。鼓手兼新主唱菲尔·柯林斯在台上同时担任两项任务，经常在唱完高难度段落后又立刻跳回鼓凳演奏复杂节奏。吉他手史蒂夫·哈克特在《Supper's Ready》的独奏中即兴发挥，这段录音后来被乐队一致认为是整场巡演的最佳版本。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded from multiple shows in Paris and Glasgow. Drummer and new lead vocalist Phil Collins juggled both roles on stage, often jumping back to his drum kit to play complex rhythms after singing demanding passages. Guitarist Steve Hackett improvised his solo on ‘Supper's Ready,’ which the band later unanimously considered the best version of the entire tour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张现场专辑成功展示了菲尔·柯林斯作为主唱和鼓手的双重才华，为创世纪乐队从艺术摇滚向更流行化的转型奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This live album successfully showcased Phil Collins' dual talents as both lead vocalist and drummer, laying the foundation for Genesis's transition from art rock toward a more pop-oriented sound.
items.artistIntroZh: 创世纪乐队是1967年成立于英国的前卫摇滚乐队，初始成员包括彼得·加布里埃尔、托尼·班克斯、迈克·卢瑟福、菲尔·柯林斯和史蒂夫·哈克特。他们以复杂的音乐结构和戏剧性的舞台表演著称，是前卫摇滚的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Genesis is a progressive rock band formed in England in 1967, with original members including Peter Gabriel, Tony Banks, Mike Rutherford, Phil Collins, and Steve Hackett. Known for complex musical structures and theatrical stage performances, they are one of the representative bands of progressive rock.

items.name: Led Zeppelin II
items.descriptionZh: 《Led Zeppelin II》是英国摇滚乐队Led Zeppelin的第二张专辑，以重摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚为核心，展现了乐队标志性的强劲吉他 riff 和震撼的鼓点。专辑融合了神秘歌词与即兴演奏，充满原始能量，奠定了硬摇滚的基石。
items.descriptionEn: Led Zeppelin II is the second album by the British rock band Led Zeppelin, centered on heavy rock and blues rock, showcasing the band's iconic powerful guitar riffs and thunderous drumming. It blends mystical lyrics with improvisation, full of raw energy, laying the foundation for hard rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在1969年乐队巡演期间录制，足迹遍布英美多家录音室，制作时间零碎但高效。吉他手Jimmy Page在《Whole Lotta Love》中使用了反向回响和相位效果，创造出了传奇般的音效。录制过程中，乐队成员常因即兴发挥而碰撞出火花，甚至将录音室设备推至极限。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during the band's 1969 tour, across multiple studios in the UK and US, with fragmented yet highly efficient sessions. Guitarist Jimmy Page used reverse echo and phasing effects on 'Whole Lotta Love,' creating a legendary sound. During recording, band members often sparked creativity through improvisation, pushing studio equipment to its limits.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为硬摇滚和重金属音乐的里程碑之作，全球销量超过1200万张，影响了无数后来的摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely regarded as a milestone in hard rock and heavy metal, selling over 12 million copies worldwide and influencing countless subsequent rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Led Zeppelin成立于1968年，由吉他手Jimmy Page、主唱Robert Plant、贝斯手John Paul Jones和鼓手John Bonham组成。他们以创新的音乐风格和震撼的现场表演闻名，成为摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin formed in 1968, consisting of guitarist Jimmy Page, vocalist Robert Plant, bassist John Paul Jones, and drummer John Bonham. Known for their innovative music and electrifying live performances, they became one of the most influential bands in rock history.

items.name: Lovesick Electric
items.descriptionZh: 《Lovesick Electric》是美国流行摇滚乐队Hot Chelle Rae的第二张录音室专辑，以流行摇滚和电力十足的旋律为核心，融合了青春活力与电子元素。专辑充满阳光气息的节奏和朗朗上口的副歌，展现了乐队对轻松流行风格的驾驭。
items.descriptionEn: Lovesick Electric is the second studio album by American pop rock band Hot Chelle Rae, centered on pop rock and electrifying melodies, blending youthful energy with electronic elements. The album features sunny rhythms and catchy choruses, showcasing the band's command of lighthearted pop styles.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员曾在一场演出后突发灵感，在后台用手机录制了《Tonight Tonight》的初始demo。这首歌后来成为专辑的主打单曲，并登顶公告牌热门100。制作过程中，他们尝试了多种合成器音效，以营造“电子情书”般的氛围。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band members got a burst of inspiration after a show and recorded the initial demo of 'Tonight Tonight' on a phone backstage. The song later became the album's lead single and topped the Billboard Hot 100. In the production, they experimented with various synthesizer sounds to create an 'electric love letter' atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Hot Chelle Rae于2005年在美国纳什维尔成立，由主唱Ryan Follese、吉他手Nash Overstreet、贝斯手Ian Keaggy和鼓手Jamie Follese组成。他们以活力四射的流行摇滚风格著称，代表作《Tonight Tonight》曾风靡全球。
items.artistIntroEn: Hot Chelle Rae formed in Nashville, USA in 2005, consisting of vocalist Ryan Follese, guitarist Nash Overstreet, bassist Ian Keaggy, and drummer Jamie Follese. Known for their energetic pop rock style, their hit 'Tonight Tonight' became a global sensation.

items.name: Runter mit den Spendierhosen
items.descriptionZh: 《Runter mit den Spendierhosen》是德国朋克摇滚乐队Die Ärzte的第七张录音室专辑，以激进朋克和讽刺幽默为核心。专辑歌词尖锐，直指社会消费主义和虚伪，音乐上融合了快节奏吉他与戏剧化的编曲，展现了乐队不羁的态度。
items.descriptionEn: Runter mit den Spendierhosen is the seventh studio album by German punk rock band Die Ärzte, centered on aggressive punk and satirical humor. The lyrics are sharp, targeting consumerism and hypocrisy in society, while the music blends fast-paced guitars with theatrical arrangements, showcasing the band's rebellious attitude.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题源自乐队成员在录音室的一句玩笑话，意为“脱掉那条炫耀的裤子”，后来成为专辑名。录制过程中，主唱Farin Urlaub因对鼓点要求极高，导致鼓手Bela B多次重录，两人为此激烈争论，但最终成就了专辑紧凑的节奏。
items.storiesEn: The album title originated from a joke among band members in the studio, meaning 'Take off those show-off pants,' which later became the album name. During recording, vocalist Farin Urlaub demanded perfection in drum beats, causing drummer Bela B to re-record multiple times, leading to heated arguments but ultimately resulting in the album's tight rhythms.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在德国获得白金销量认证，巩固了Die Ärzte作为德语朋克代表乐队的地位，并影响了后续的德语朋克场景。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved platinum sales certification in Germany, solidifying Die Ärzte's status as a representative German punk band and influencing the subsequent German punk scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Die Ärzte于1982年在柏林成立，由主唱兼吉他手Farin Urlaub、鼓手Bela B和贝斯手Rodrigo González组成。他们以幽默、讽刺的歌词和激烈的朋克音乐著称，是德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Die Ärzte formed in Berlin in 1982, consisting of vocalist/guitarist Farin Urlaub, drummer Bela B, and bassist Rodrigo González. Known for their humorous, satirical lyrics and intense punk music, they are one of the most successful rock bands in Germany.

items.name: Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume Two: No World for Tomorrow
items.descriptionZh: 《Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume Two: No World for Tomorrow》是美国前卫摇滚乐队Coheed and Cambria的第四张专辑，以史诗般的科幻概念和复杂编曲为核心。专辑融合了重金属、前卫摇滚和流行旋律，讲述了一个关于毁灭与救赎的宏大故事。
items.descriptionEn: Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume Two: No World for Tomorrow is the fourth album by American progressive rock band Coheed and Cambria, centered on epic sci-fi concepts and complex arrangements. It blends heavy metal, progressive rock, and pop melodies, telling a grand story of destruction and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约州的一间偏僻录音室，乐队成员曾因长时间高强度工作而情绪紧张。主唱Claudio Sanchez在创作时，将漫画系列《The Amory Wars》的情节融入歌词，甚至邀请了漫画画家参与封面设计。录制中，吉他手Travis Stever曾因即兴独奏被全票通过保留。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a remote studio in New York State, where band members experienced tension due to long, intense sessions.
