Vocalist Claudio Sanchez incorporated plotlines from his comic series 'The Amory Wars' into the lyrics and even invited a comic artist for the cover design. During recording, guitarist Travis Stever's improvised solo was unanimously approved to stay.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria于1995年在纽约成立，由主唱兼吉他手Claudio Sanchez、吉他手Travis Stever、贝斯手Zach Cooper和鼓手Josh Eppard组成。他们以概念专辑和科幻叙事闻名，在前卫摇滚界独树一帜。
items.artistIntroEn: Coheed and Cambria formed in New York in 1995, consisting of vocalist/guitarist Claudio Sanchez, guitarist Travis Stever, bassist Zach Cooper, and drummer Josh Eppard. Known for their concept albums and sci-fi narratives, they stand out in the progressive rock scene.

items.name: She Loves You
items.descriptionZh: 《She Loves You》是韩国歌手Joy的首张个人专辑，以甜美流行和复古风格为核心。专辑翻唱了经典老歌，融入现代编曲，展现了Joy清亮的嗓音和活泼魅力，充满了青春恋爱的甜蜜氛围。
items.descriptionEn: She Loves You is the debut solo album by South Korean singer Joy, centered on sweet pop and retro style. The album covers classic old songs with modern arrangements, showcasing Joy's clear vocals and lively charm, filled with a sweet, youthful love atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Joy特意向原唱者请教演唱技巧，并在录音室中尝试了多种音色以匹配每首歌曲的年代感。主打歌《She Loves You》的MV拍摄中，Joy因反复跳舞而扭伤脚��，但坚持完成拍摄，展现了敬业精神。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Joy specifically consulted the original singers for vocal tips and experimented with various tones in the studio to match each song's era. While filming the music video for the title track 'She Loves You,' Joy sprained her ankle from repeated dancing but insisted on finishing the shoot, demonstrating her professionalism.
items.artistIntroZh: Joy（本名朴秀荣）是韩国女子组合Red Velvet的成员，1996年出生。她以甜美的形象和多才多艺著称，除了音乐，还活跃于影视和综艺领域，是韩国娱乐圈的当红偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Joy (real name Park Soo-young) is a member of South Korean girl group Red Velvet, born in 1996. Known for her sweet image and versatility, she is also active in acting and variety shows, making her a popular idol in the Korean entertainment industry.

items.name: Strange Highways
items.descriptionZh: 《Strange Highways》是Dio在1993年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格偏向沉重、黑暗的硬摇滚与重金属。专辑以阴郁的吉他riff和Ronnie James Dio标志性的高亢嗓音为核心，歌词探讨了内心的挣扎与现实的残酷，整体氛围比前作更加粗粝和直接。
items.descriptionEn: Strange Highways is Dio's sixth studio album, released in 1993, featuring a heavier, darker hard rock and heavy metal style. Driven by gloomy guitar riffs and Ronnie James Dio's signature soaring vocals, the lyrics explore inner struggles and harsh realities, creating a rawer and more direct atmosphere than previous works.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Strange Highways》时，Dio与吉他手Tracy G首次合作，Tracy G带来了更现代、更激进的演奏风格，改变了乐队的声音。专辑在加州录制，期间Ronnie James Dio坚持使用模拟设备录音，以保留声音的原始质感。鼓手Vinny Appice回忆说，制作人Mike Fraser在混音时特意保留了多次即兴演奏的片段，让专辑听起来更具现场感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Strange Highways, Dio collaborated with guitarist Tracy G for the first time, whose modern and aggressive playing style shifted the band's sound. The album was recorded in California, with Ronnie James Dio insisting on using analog equipment to preserve the raw sound quality. Drummer Vinny Appice recalled that producer Mike Fraser intentionally kept several improvisational takes during mixing to give the album a more live feel.
items.artistIntroZh: Ronnie James Dio（1942-2010）是美国传奇重金属歌手，以其强大的嗓音和恶魔角手势闻名。他曾担任Rainbow、Black Sabbath的主唱，后组建个人乐队Dio，代表作有《Holy Diver》等。Dio的音乐影响了无数重金属乐队，被视为重金属音乐的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ronnie James Dio (1942-2010) was an American legendary heavy metal singer, known for his powerful vocals and the 'devil horns' hand gesture. He fronted Rainbow and Black Sabbath before forming his own band Dio, with classics like Holy Diver. Dio's music influenced countless metal bands and he is regarded as a pioneer of heavy metal.

items.name: Speak Now
items.descriptionZh: 《Speak Now》是Taylor Swift在2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以乡村流行和流行摇滚为主。专辑由Swift独自创作所有歌曲，歌词细腻���挚，讲述了她个人经历中的爱情、友情与成长故事，旋律朗朗上口，编曲丰富且充满叙事性。
items.descriptionEn: Speak Now is Taylor Swift's third studio album, released in 2010, blending country pop and pop rock. Swift wrote all songs alone, with heartfelt lyrics about love, friendship, and personal growth from her own experiences. The melodies are catchy, and the arrangements are rich and narrative-driven.
items.storiesZh: Taylor Swift在宣传《Speak Now》时透露，专辑名源于她在一次颁奖礼上本想上台发言却最终放弃的经历。录制过程中，她与制作人Nathan Chapman在纳什维尔的录音室里经常工作到深夜，有一次Swift在凌晨三点灵感突现，直接打电话叫Chapman回录音室录下Demo。专辑中《Dear John》一曲据传是关于她与John Mayer的恋情，Mayer后来表示对此感到不满。
items.storiesEn: Taylor Swift revealed during promotion that the album title Speak Now came from an experience where she wanted to speak up at an awards ceremony but held back. During recording, she and producer Nathan Chapman often worked late into the night in Nashville; once Swift got a burst of inspiration at 3 a.m. and called Chapman back to the studio to record a demo. The song 'Dear John' is rumored to be about her relationship with John Mayer, who later expressed displeasure about it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Speak Now》巩固了Taylor Swift作为创作型歌手的地位，首周销量超过百万张，使她成为当时唯一一位连续三张专辑首周销量破百万的女艺人。专辑中全由她独自创作的举动在流行乐坛引发热议，推动了女性创作歌手的自主权讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: Speak Now cemented Taylor Swift's status as a singer-songwriter, selling over a million copies in its first week, making her the only female artist at the time to have three consecutive albums debut with million-plus sales. The album's all-self-written nature sparked discussion in pop music, advancing the conversation about female artists' creative autonomy.
items.artistIntroZh: Taylor Swift（1989年生）是美国创作型歌手，以叙事性歌词和跨流派音乐风格闻名。她从乡村音乐起步，逐渐转向流行、民谣和另类音乐，获得多项格莱美奖。Swift是当代最具影响力的流行歌手之一，以与粉丝的亲密互动和商业成功著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Taylor Swift (born 1989) is an American singer-songwriter known for her narrative lyrics and genre-crossing music. Starting in country, she transitioned to pop, folk, and alternative, winning multiple Grammy Awards. Swift is one of the most influential pop artists of her era, famed for her close fan engagement and commercial success.

items.name: Bedtime Stories
items.descriptionZh: 《Bedtime Stories》是Madonna在1994年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格以R&B、流行和电子慢拍为主。专辑氛围柔和、内省，歌词探讨了爱与欲望的复杂性，相比她之前更具争议性的作品，这张专辑显得更为成熟和低调，融合了细腻的电子音色与灵魂乐元素。
items.descriptionEn: Bedtime Stories is Madonna's sixth studio album, released in 1994, featuring R&B, pop, and downtempo electronic styles. The album has a soft, introspective atmosphere, with lyrics exploring the complexities of love and desire. Compared to her earlier controversial work, this album is more mature and understated, blending delicate electronic textures with soul influences.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Bedtime Stories》时，Madonna与多位制作人合作，包括Dallas Austin、Babyface和Nellee Hooper。她特意要求减少之前的挑衅性形象，希望制作一张更私人、更安静的作品。在录音室里，Madonna经常与Babyface即兴创作歌词，其中《Take a Bow》的灵感来自一次深夜谈话。专辑封面由著名摄影师Steven Meisel拍摄，Madonna以复古金发造型出现，灵感来自老好莱坞电影。
items.storiesEn: For Bedtime Stories, Madonna collaborated with producers including Dallas Austin, Babyface, and Nellee Hooper. She deliberately toned down her provocative image to create a more personal and quiet work. In the studio, Madonna often improvised lyrics with Babyface; 'Take a Bow' was inspired by a late-night conversation. The album cover, shot by famed photographer Steven Meisel, featured Madonna in a retro blonde look inspired by old Hollywood films.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bedtime Stories》标志着Madonna从争议性形象向更成熟艺术方向的转型，影响了90年代中期流行音乐中R&B与电子融合的趋势。专辑中的《Take a Bow》成为她当时在Billboard Hot 100上占据冠军时间最长的单曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: Bedtime Stories marked Madonna's shift from a controversial image toward a more mature artistic direction, influencing the mid-90s trend of blending R&B with electronic pop. The single 'Take a Bow' became her longest-running number-one hit on the Billboard Hot 100 at the time.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（1958年生）是美国歌手、演员和企业家，被誉为“流行女王”。她以不断革新音乐风格和挑战社会规范著称，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》《Vogue》等。Madonna是史上最畅销的女歌手之一，对流行文化产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (born 1958) is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Renowned for constantly reinventing her music and challenging social norms, her hits include 'Like a Virgin' and 'Vogue.' She is one of the best-selling female artists of all time, with a profound impact on pop culture.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是Queen在1981年发行的精选辑，收录了乐队1974至1980年间最成功的单曲。风格涵盖硬摇滚、华丽摇滚、流行摇滚和歌剧摇滚，展现了Queen无与伦比的音乐多样性。这张专辑是乐队商业上最成功的作品之一，被誉为摇滚乐史上最伟大的精选集之一。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits is a compilation album by Queen, released in 1981, featuring their most successful singles from 1974 to 1980. The style spans hard rock, glam rock, pop rock, and operatic rock, showcasing Queen's unparalleled musical diversity. It is one of the band's most commercially successful releases and is considered one of the greatest greatest-hits albums in rock history.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑的曲目由乐队成员共同挑选，旨在呈现他们最受欢迎的作品。有趣的是，专辑中未包含《Bohemian Rhapsody》的原始版本，而是采用了其单曲混音版。专辑封面设计简洁，仅以乐队名和标题呈现，但后来成为经典视觉标识。在英国，《Greatest Hits》成为非官方销量最高的专辑之一，至今仍保持纪录。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist was selected by the band members to showcase their most popular songs. Interestingly, the album did not include the original version of 'Bohemian Rhapsody' but used its single edit. The cover art was simple, featuring only the band name and title, but later became an iconic visual. In the UK, Greatest Hits became one of the best-selling albums of all time, a record it still holds unofficially.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Greatest Hits》是英国历史上销量最高的专辑之一，截至2023年已售出超过700万张。它向新一代听众普及了Queen的音乐，巩固了乐队作为摇滚传奇的地位，并影响了后来无数精选辑的策划模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: Greatest Hits is one of the best-selling albums in UK history, with over 7 million copies sold as of 2023. It introduced Queen's music to new generations, cemented their legendary status, and influenced the curation model of countless subsequent compilations.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是英国摇滚乐队，1970年成立于伦敦，成员包括Freddie Mercury（主唱）、Brian May（吉他）、John Deacon（贝斯）和Roger Taylor（鼓）。他们以华丽的舞台表演、复杂的和声和融合多种音乐风格而闻名，代表作有《Bohemian Rhapsody》《We Will Rock You》等，是史上最伟大的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), John Deacon (bass), and Roger Taylor (drums). Known for their flamboyant stage shows, complex harmonies, and genre-blending music, their hits include 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'We Will Rock You.' They are regarded as one of the greatest rock bands of all time.

items.name: Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian
items.descriptionZh: 《Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian》是Johnny Cash在1964年发行的概念专辑，聚焦美国原住民的历史苦难与不公。风格以民谣和乡村为主，歌词沉重而富有抗议精神，Cash用叙事性的演唱讲述了原住民被迫迁徙、文化消亡等悲剧，是美国早期概念专辑的典范。
items.descriptionEn: Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian is a concept album by Johnny Cash, released in 1964, focusing on the historical suffering and injustice faced by Native Americans. Stylistically folk and country, the lyrics are heavy and protest-driven, with Cash's narrative vocals recounting tragedies like forced relocation and cultural erasure. It is an early example of the concept album in American music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来自Cash对原住民议题的长期关注。他邀请了原住民诗人兼活动家Peter LaFarge创作多首歌曲，包括著名的《The Ballad of Ira Hayes》。录制时，Cash坚持使用简单的编曲以突出歌词的力量。专辑发行后因政治敏感内容被许多乡村电台抵制，Cash在1965年通过公开信抗议，最终迫使电台播放专辑中的歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Cash's long-standing concern for Native American issues. He enlisted Native American poet and activist Peter LaFarge to write several songs, including the famous 'The Ballad of Ira Hayes.' During recording, Cash insisted on simple arrangements to highlight the lyrics' power. After release, many country radio stations boycotted the album for its politically sensitive content; in 1965, Cash published an open letter protesting, eventually forcing stations to play the songs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bitter Tears》是美国音乐史上最早明确为原住民发声的商业专辑之一，挑战了乡村音乐界的保守立场。它推动了乡村音乐中政治抗议主题的合法化，并影响了后来如Steve Earle等艺术家的社会意识创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Bitter Tears is one of the earliest commercial albums in American music to explicitly advocate for Native Americans, challenging the conservative stance of country music. It helped legitimize political protest themes in country music and influenced socially conscious artists like Steve Earle.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash（1932-2003）是美国传奇乡村歌手和词曲作者，以低沉的声音和黑色着装闻名。他的音乐融合了乡村、摇滚、民谣和福音，代表作包括《I Walk the Line》《Ring of Fire》等。Cash被称为“黑衣人”，是美国音乐史上最具影响力的艺术家之一，也是社会正义的积极倡导者。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash (1932-2003) was an American legendary country singer and songwriter, known for his deep voice and all-black attire. His music blended country, rock, folk, and gospel, with hits including 'I Walk the Line' and 'Ring of Fire.' Called 'The Man in Black,' he is one of the most influential artists in American music history and an active advocate for social justice.

items.name: Back to Black
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Black》是艾米·怀恩豪斯的第二张也是最后一张录音室专辑，融合了灵魂、节奏蓝调和爵士风格，带有浓郁的1960年代摩城与女子团体音乐色彩。专辑以直白、自传式的歌词描绘了爱情、心碎与成瘾，搭配复古而饱满的编曲，展现了怀恩豪斯独特的烟酒嗓与情感张力，成为21世纪最具标志性的灵魂乐作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Black is Amy Winehouse's second and final studio album, blending soul, R&B, and jazz with a strong 1960s Motown and girl-group influence. With brutally honest, autobiographical lyrics about love, heartbreak, and addiction, paired with lush retro arrangements, the album showcases Winehouse's distinctive, smoky voice and emotional intensity, becoming one of the most iconic soul records of the 21st century.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，艾米正深陷与布莱克·菲尔德-西维尔的感情纠葛，这段痛苦的关系直接催生了《Rehab》《You Know I'm No Good》等歌曲。制作人马克·罗森在纽约的录音室中，刻意使用老式麦克风和模拟设备，营造出复古音色。艾米经常在录音时即兴修改歌词，甚至一边喝酒一边演唱，这种真实的状态反而让专辑充满了破碎而动人的力量。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Amy was deeply entangled in her tumultuous relationship with Blake Fielder-Civil, which directly inspired songs like 'Rehab' and 'You Know I'm No Good.' Producer Mark Ronson deliberately used vintage microphones and analog equipment in a New York studio to create a retro sound. Amy often improvised lyrics during sessions and sometimes sang while drinking, but this raw authenticity gave the album its heartbreaking power.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑斩获2008年格莱美年度专辑、最佳流行演唱专辑等五项大奖，并推动英国灵魂乐复兴浪潮，影响了阿黛尔、杜瓦·利帕等后辈歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won five Grammy Awards in 2008, including Album of the Year and Best Pop Vocal Album, and sparked a British soul revival, influencing artists like Adele and Dua Lipa.
items.artistIntroZh: 艾米·怀恩豪斯（1983-2011）是英国灵魂乐与爵士歌手，以其标志性的蜂巢发型、烟熏眼妆和沙哑嗓音闻名。她以直击人心的歌词和复古音乐风格成为21世纪初最具影响力的女歌手之一，但个人生活中的成瘾问题导致其于27岁英年早逝。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse (1983–2011) was a British soul and jazz singer known for her signature beehive hairstyle, heavy eyeliner, and raspy contralto voice. With brutally honest lyrics and a retro musical style, she became one of the most influential female artists of the early 2000s, but struggled with addiction and died tragically at age 27.

items.descriptionZh: 《1999》是王子的第五张录音室专辑，标志着其从放克向合成器流行与电子舞曲的转型。专辑以冷战核威胁为暗黑背景，却用欢快的节奏、假声演唱和复杂的多轨编曲营造出派对氛围，探讨了死亡、享乐与末日狂欢的主题。这张双LP专辑是王子商业突破的起点，也成为80年代流行音乐的重要里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: 1999 is Prince's fifth studio album, marking his transition from funk to synth-pop and electronic dance music. Set against the dark backdrop of Cold War nuclear anxiety, the album uses upbeat rhythms, falsetto vocals, and complex multi-track arrangements to create a party atmosphere while exploring themes of death, hedonism, and apocalyptic revelry. This double-LP was Prince's commercial breakthrough and a landmark of 1980s pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《1999》的制作几乎全由王子一人完成，他在明尼阿波利斯家中的录音室里，用Linn LM-1鼓机编程出标志性的节拍。录制过程中，王子对细节极度偏执，曾连续工作48小时不休息。专辑封面原本计划使用更前卫的太空主题，但最终选择了这张简洁而充满未来感的紫色与黑色肖像。
items.storiesEn: The title track '1999' was almost entirely produced by Prince alone in his home studio in Minneapolis, where he programmed the iconic beat using a Linn LM-1 drum machine. Prince was notoriously obsessive during recording, once working for 48 hours straight without sleep. The album cover was originally planned to feature a more avant-garde space theme, but the final simple purple-and-black portrait was chosen instead.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑首次将合成器放克与末日主题结合，影响了迈克尔·杰克逊的《Thriller》之后的流行乐走向，并确立了王子作为独立音乐人的全能形象。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album pioneered the fusion of synth-funk with apocalyptic themes, influencing pop music after Michael Jackson's Thriller and cementing Prince's image as a self-contained musical genius.
items.artistIntroZh: 王子（1958-2016）是美国歌手、词曲作者、多乐器演奏家，以其华丽的中性装扮、惊人的假声和融合放克、摇滚、流行、R&B的跨界风格著称。他创作了《Purple Rain》《When Doves Cry》等经典，是80年代最具创造力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (1958–2016) was an American singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist known for his flamboyant androgynous style, soaring falsetto, and genre-blending fusion of funk, rock, pop, and R&B. He created classics like 'Purple Rain' and 'When Doves Cry,' and was one of the most innovative musicians of the 1980s.

items.name: Greatest Hits II
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits II》是皇后乐队1991年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1980年代至1990年代初期的热门单曲，包括《Radio Ga Ga》《I Want to Break Free》《The Show Must Go On》等。这张专辑是对皇后乐队后期辉煌的集中展示，风格横跨摇滚、流行、歌剧摇滚与舞曲，以其华丽的和声、精湛的吉他solo和主唱弗雷迪·默丘里极具戏剧性的表演而闻名。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits II is a compilation album by Queen, released in 1991, featuring the band's hit singles from the 1980s to early 1990s, including 'Radio Ga Ga,' 'I Want to Break Free,' and 'The Show Must Go On.' It showcases Queen's later-era brilliance, spanning rock, pop, operatic rock, and dance music, known for its lavish harmonies, virtuosic guitar solos, and Freddie Mercury's theatrical vocals.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，弗雷迪·默丘里已因艾滋病病情严重，几乎无法行走。但他坚持在录音室为《The Show Must Go On》录制 vocals，甚至一次性完成，震撼了所有工作人员。专辑封面使用了乐队1986年《A Kind of Magic》时期的经典合影，但特意选用了黑白照片，以呼应默丘里健康状况的沉重氛围。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Freddie Mercury was severely ill with AIDS and could barely walk. Yet he insisted on recording vocals for 'The Show Must Go On' in one take, stunning the entire crew. The album cover used a classic band photo from the 1986 A Kind of Magic era, but deliberately in black and white, reflecting the somber mood of Mercury's declining health.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在英国销量超过400万张，是英国历史上最畅销的精选集之一，并在弗雷迪去世后进一步巩固了皇后乐队作为全球摇滚传奇的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 4 million copies in the UK, becoming one of the best-selling compilation albums in British history, and cemented Queen's status as global rock legends after Freddie Mercury's death.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队是1970年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由主唱弗雷迪·默丘里、吉他手布莱恩·梅、鼓手罗杰·泰勒和贝斯手约翰·迪肯组成。他们以史诗般的演唱会、多元化的音乐风格和《Bohemian Rhapsody》等经典作品闻名，是史上最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), Roger Taylor (drums), and John Deacon (bass). Known for their epic live shows, diverse musical style, and classics like 'Bohemian Rhapsody,' they are one of the best-selling bands in history.

items.name: Funhouse
items.descriptionZh: 《Funhouse》是粉红佳人的第五张录音室专辑，延续了她标志性的流行摇滚风格，融合了流行、摇滚、R&B与舞曲元素。专辑以马戏团和游乐场为隐喻，探讨了婚姻破裂、自我重建与女性力量的主题，歌词大胆直白，充满挑衅与自嘲。制作上大量使用吉他 riff、电子节拍和管弦乐编排，展现了粉红佳人的爆发力与脆弱感。
items.descriptionEn: Funhouse is Pink's fifth studio album, continuing her signature pop-rock style with elements of pop, rock, R&B, and dance music. Using circus and carnival metaphors, the album explores themes of marital breakdown, self-reinvention, and female empowerment, with bold, confrontational, and self-deprecating lyrics. The production features heavy guitar riffs, electronic beats, and orchestral arrangements, showcasing Pink's explosive energy and vulnerability.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，粉红佳人正与丈夫凯里·哈特经历婚姻危机，她将愤怒与悲伤直接转化为创作素材。主打歌《So What》的歌词“我不想再当你的老婆”是在一次争吵后即兴写下的。录制时，她坚持要加入真实的马戏团音效，包括小丑笑声和动物叫声，甚至请来马戏团演员在录音室里即兴表演，以捕捉那种混乱而自由的气氛。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Pink was going through a marital crisis with husband Carey Hart, channeling her anger and sadness directly into songwriting. The lyrics of lead single 'So What' ('I'm gonna start a fight / I'm gonna be a bitch') were improvised after a fight. She insisted on adding real circus sound effects, including clown laughs and animal noises, and even brought circus performers into the studio to improvise, capturing the chaotic, liberating atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: 粉红佳人（本名阿莱莎·贝丝·摩尔）是美国歌手、词曲作者，以其沙哑的嗓音、叛逆的形象和杂技般的现场表演闻名。她于2000年出道，凭借《Get the Party Started》《Just Like a Pill》等歌曲成为全球流行巨星，并多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink (born Alecia Beth Moore) is an American singer and songwriter known for her raspy voice, rebellious image, and acrobatic live performances. She debuted in 2000 and became a global pop superstar with hits like 'Get the Party Started' and 'Just Like a Pill,' winning multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: In Time: The Best of R.E.M. 1988–2003
items.descriptionZh: 《In Time: The Best of R.E.M. 1988–2003》是美国另类摇滚乐队R.E.M.的精选集，收录了他们从1988年《Green》到2003年《In Time》期间的热门单曲，包括《Losing My Religion》《Everybody Hurts》《Man on the Moon》等。这张专辑展现了R.E.M.从独立地下乐队向主流摇滚巨星的转型过程，风格融合了民谣摇滚、另类摇滚与流行旋律，以迈克尔·斯泰普模糊而富有诗意的歌词和彼得·巴克标志性的吉他音色著称。
items.descriptionEn: In Time: The Best of R.E.M. 1988–2003 is a compilation album by American alternative rock band R.E.M., featuring hit singles from their 1988 album Green through 2003's In Time, including 'Losing My Religion,' 'Everybody Hurts,' and 'Man on the Moon.' It captures R.E.M.'s transition from indie underground darlings to mainstream rock giants, blending folk-rock, alternative rock, and pop melodies, with Michael Stipe's cryptic, poetic lyrics and Peter Buck's signature jangly guitar sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集原本计划在2000年发行，但乐队成员坚持要等到他们觉得作品储备足够“有代表性”时才推出。专辑中收录了两首新歌《Bad Day》和《Animal���，其中《Bad Day》的副歌部分其实来自1990年《Out of Time》时期的废弃demo。乐队在制作时特意邀请了长期合作的制作人斯科特·利特，并使用了模拟磁带录制，以保持音色的温暖与统一。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was originally planned for 2000, but the band insisted on waiting until they felt their catalog was 'representative' enough. Two new songs, 'Bad Day' and 'Animal,' were included; the chorus of 'Bad Day' actually came from a discarded demo from the 1990 Out of Time sessions. The band worked with longtime producer Scott Litt and used analog tape to maintain a warm, cohesive sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集是R.E.M.商业上最成功的合集之一，标志着他们从80年代独立先锋到90年代主流文化符号的完成，并影响了Radiohead、Coldplay等后辈乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The compilation was one of R.E.M.'s most commercially successful collections, marking their evolution from 1980s indie pioneers to 1990s mainstream cultural icons, and influenced later bands like Radiohead and Coldplay.
items.artistIntroZh: R.E.M.是1980年在美国佐治亚州雅典成立的另类摇滚乐队，成员包括主唱迈克尔·斯泰普、吉他手彼得·巴克、贝斯手迈克·米尔斯和鼓手比尔·贝里。他们以模糊的歌词、吉他的清脆音色和独立精神著称，是另类摇滚从地下走向主流的奠基者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: R.E.M. is an American alternative rock band formed in Athens, Georgia, in 1980, consisting of Michael Stipe (vocals), Peter Buck (guitar), Mike Mills (bass), and Bill Berry (drums). Known for their cryptic lyrics, jangly guitar sound, and indie ethos, they were pioneers in bringing alternative rock from the underground to the mainstream.

items.name: Tripping the Live Fantastic
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是保罗·麦卡特尼在1990年世界巡演中录制的现场精选，收录了披头士经典与个人热门作品。风格上融合了摇滚、流行与即兴演奏，展现了麦卡特尼作为表演大师的舞台魅力。核心特色在于其庞大的曲目量（超过30首）和现场互动的热烈氛围。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a live compilation from Paul McCartney's 1990 world tour, featuring Beatles classics and solo hits. Stylistically, it blends rock, pop, and improvisation, showcasing McCartney's mastery as a live performer. Its core feature lies in the extensive setlist (over 30 songs) and the electrifying crowd interaction.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，麦卡特尼坚持使用移动录音车捕捉每一场演出的原声，以确保音质的现场感。巡演中有一场在巴西的演出吸引了超过18万观众，创下当时单人演唱会观众人数纪录。麦卡特尼在后台常即兴弹奏钢琴，这些片段也被收入专辑。
items.storiesEn: During recording, McCartney insisted on using a mobile recording truck to capture the raw sound of each show, ensuring an authentic live feel. One concert in Brazil drew over 180,000 fans, setting a record for a solo artist at the time. McCartney often improvised on the piano backstage, and some of these snippets were included in the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为麦卡特尼90年代最具代表性的现场专辑，它重新定义了现场录音的标准，并激励了后续艺术家发行大型巡演实况专辑。
items.historicalImpactEn: As McCartney's most iconic live album of the 1990s, it redefined live recording standards and inspired subsequent artists to release extensive tour compilations.
items.artistIntroZh: 保罗·麦卡特尼，英国音乐人、前披头士成员，被誉为流行音乐史上最成功的作曲家和贝斯手之一。其职业生涯跨越六十年，作品涵盖摇滚、古典与电子音乐，曾获18座格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Paul McCartney is a British musician and former Beatle, widely regarded as one of the most successful songwriters and bassists in pop history. His six-decade career spans rock, classical, and electronic music, earning 18 Grammy Awards.

items.name: Skillet
items.descriptionZh: 这是美国基督教摇滚乐队Skillet的同名首张专辑，风格以另类摇滚和硬摇滚为主，融合了电子元素与富有感染力的旋律。核心特色在于其充满信仰主题的歌词与强劲��吉他编曲，奠定了乐队早期严肃而富有张力的基调。
items.descriptionEn: This is the self-titled debut album by American Christian rock band Skillet, featuring alternative and hard rock with electronic elements and infectious melodies. Its core feature lies in faith-driven lyrics and powerful guitar arrangements, establishing the band's early serious and intense tone.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队主唱约翰·库珀还是大学生，预算极为有限，大部分录音在简陋的地下室完成。鼓手肯·斯特芬斯曾因设备故障不得不临时借用其他乐队的鼓组，这段经历后来成为乐队早期巡演的经典笑谈。
items.storiesEn: When recording, frontman John Cooper was still a college student with a very limited budget; most of the album was recorded in a makeshift basement studio. Drummer Ken Steffens once had to borrow a drum kit from another band due to equipment failure, later becoming a classic anecdote from the band's early tours.
items.artistIntroZh: Skillet是美国基督教摇滚乐队，1996年成立于田纳西州孟菲斯。由主唱兼贝斯手约翰·库珀领导，他们以富有爆发力的现场和融合电子、交响元素的硬摇滚风格闻名，全球销量超过1000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Skillet is an American Christian rock band formed in Memphis, Tennessee in 1996. Led by vocalist/bassist John Cooper, they are known for explosive live shows and a hard rock style fused with electronic and symphonic elements, selling over 10 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Afterglow
items.descriptionZh: 这是英国美国超级乐队Black Country Communion的第二张录音室专辑，风格深受70年代经典摇滚影响，融合了布鲁斯、硬摇滚与前卫元素。核心特色在于吉他手乔·博纳马萨的炽热独奏与格伦·休斯极具爆发力的灵魂嗓音，营造出复古而宏大的声音景观。
items.descriptionEn: This is the second studio album by the Anglo-American supergroup Black Country Communion, heavily influenced by 1970s classic rock, blending blues, hard rock, and progressive elements. Its core features Joe Bonamassa's fiery guitar solos and Glenn Hughes' explosive soulful vocals, creating a vintage yet grand sonic landscape.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在加州的一个老式录音室录制，乐队成员刻意使用复古模拟设备以捕捉70年代的温暖音色。录制期间，鼓手杰森·伯纳姆曾因节奏分歧与制作人凯文·雪莉即兴掰手腕，最终用一场即兴Jam解决了问题。休斯在录制《The Outsider》时一度激动落泪。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at a vintage studio in California, where the band deliberately used analog gear to capture a warm 1970s sound. During sessions, drummer Jason Bonham and producer Kevin Shirley once settled a tempo dispute with an impromptu arm-wrestling match, ultimately resolving it through a jam session. Hughes broke down in tears while recording 'The Outsider.'
items.artistIntroZh: Black Country Communion是一支英美超级乐队，2010年由吉他手乔·博纳马萨、主唱兼贝斯手格伦·休斯、鼓手杰森·伯纳姆和键盘手德里克·谢里尼安组建。他们以复兴70年代硬摇滚美学而著称，共发行四张专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Country Communion is an Anglo-American supergroup formed in 2010 by guitarist Joe Bonamassa, vocalist/bassist Glenn Hughes, drummer Jason Bonham, and keyboardist Derek Sherinian. They are celebrated for reviving 1970s hard rock aesthetics, releasing four albums.

items.name: Invincible
items.descriptionZh: 这是迈克尔·杰克逊的最后一张个人录音室专辑，风格以流行、R&B和舞曲为主，融合了嘻哈与拉丁元素。核心特色在于其宏大的制作规模与杰克逊标志性的嗓音，但专辑因与索尼唱片的纠纷而缺乏宣传，显得低调而悲壮。
items.descriptionEn: This is Michael Jackson's final studio album, blending pop, R&B, and dance music with hip-hop and Latin influences. Its core feature is the grandiose production and Jackson's iconic vocals, yet it remains a subdued and poignant work due to a dispute with Sony Music that limited promotion.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，杰克逊与制作人罗德尼·杰金斯在纽约的录音室里连续工作36小时打磨《Unbreakable》的鼓点。专辑原定名为《Maverick》，后因商标问题改为《Invincible》。杰克逊曾计划拍摄一部关于专辑创作的纪录片，但最终未能完成。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jackson and producer Rodney Jerkins worked 36 consecutive hours in a New York studio perfecting the drum track for 'Unbreakable.' The album was originally titled 'Maverick' but was changed due to trademark issues. Jackson planned a documentary about the album's creation, but it was never completed.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管商业表现不及预期，但《Invincible》被后世视为杰克逊对2000年代流行音乐的最后一搏，其制作水准影响了后续R&B与流行专辑的混音标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: Despite underperforming commercially, 'Invincible' is seen as Jackson's final push into 2000s pop music, with its production standards influencing subsequent R&B and pop mixing benchmarks.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊，美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。其音乐融合流行、摇滚与灵魂，开创了现代MV与舞台表演的范式。职业生涯获得13项格莱美奖，全球专辑销量超过4亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop.' His music fused pop, rock, and soul, pioneering modern music videos and stage performance. He won 13 Grammy Awards and sold over 400 million records worldwide.

items.name: All That You Can't Leave Behind
items.descriptionZh: 这是爱尔兰摇滚乐队U2的第十张录音室专辑，标志着他们从90年代实验电子风格回归到更直接的吉他摇滚。核心特色在于其充满人文关怀的歌词与简洁有力的编曲，主题围绕失去、希望与救赎，被誉为乐队新世纪的艺术复兴之作。
items.descriptionEn: This is U2's tenth studio album, marking a return from 1990s experimental electronic sounds to more direct guitar-driven rock. Its core features humanistic lyrics and concise, powerful arrangements, exploring themes of loss, hope, and redemption, hailed as the band's artistic renaissance for the new century.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，乐队在都柏林与法国南部之间来回奔波，主唱波诺曾因歌词卡壳在录音室墙上乱涂乱画，这些涂鸦后来被设计成专辑内页图案。专辑首支单曲《Beautiful Day》的副歌是在录制最后时刻才灵光一现完成的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band shuttled between Dublin and the south of France. Frontman Bono once scribbled frustrated lyrics on the studio walls, and those doodles later became album booklet artwork. The chorus of the first single 'Beautiful Day' was only completed in a last-minute burst of inspiration.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑帮助U2重返商业与评论巅峰，获得7项格莱美奖，并开启了乐队在21世纪初的全球统治地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album restored U2 to commercial and critical peak, winning 7 Grammy Awards and launching the band's global dominance in the early 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: U2是爱尔兰都柏林出身的摇滚乐队，成立于1976年。由波诺、The Edge、亚当·克莱顿和小拉里·马伦组成，他们以宏大的现场演出和政治社会议题著称，全球唱片销量超过1.7亿张，获得22项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 is a rock band from Dublin, Ireland, formed in 1976. Comprising Bono, The Edge, Adam Clayton, and Larry Mullen Jr., they are known for grand live performances and political/social commentary, selling over 170 million records worldwide and winning 22 Grammy Awards.

items.name: Meddle
items.descriptionZh: 《Meddle》是平克·弗洛伊德在1971年发行的录音室专辑，风格介于迷幻摇滚与前卫摇滚之间。核心特色在于其史诗般的23分钟长曲《Echoes》，融合了实验音效、太空氛围与细腻的旋律结构，标志着乐队在后西德·巴雷特时代找到了新的艺术方向。
items.descriptionEn: Meddle is Pink Floyd's 1971 studio album, blending psychedelic and progressive rock. Its core feature is the epic 23-minute track 'Echoes', combining experimental soundscapes, spacey atmospheres, and intricate melodic structures, marking the band's new artistic direction post-Syd Barrett.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，乐队在艾比路录音室进行了大量即兴实验。为了寻找新声音，他们用钢琴弦和麦克风制造出类似鲸鱼叫声的效果，最终成为《Echoes》的标志性音色。大卫·吉尔摩还曾将一把吉他浸入水中录制，尽管这个尝试未被采用。
items.storiesEn: During recording at Abbey Road, the band engaged in extensive improvisation. To find new sounds, they used piano strings and microphones to create whale-like calls, which became iconic in 'Echoes'. David Gilmour once submerged a guitar in water for recording, though the result was not used.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Meddle》被视为平克·弗洛伊德从迷幻摇滚向《月之暗面》时期前卫摇滚转型的关键过渡作品，对后续概念专辑的创作产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Meddle is considered a crucial transitional work from psychedelic to progressive rock, paving the way for 'The Dark Side of the Moon' and profoundly influencing future concept albums.
items.artistIntroZh: 平克·弗洛伊德（Pink Floyd）是1965年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，以其哲学化的歌词、前卫的声音实验和震撼的现场演出闻名。成员包括罗杰·沃特斯、大卫·吉尔摩、尼克·梅森和理查德·赖特，是史上最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd, formed in London in 1965, is a British rock band known for philosophical lyrics, sonic experimentation, and spectacular live shows. Members include Roger Waters, David Gilmour, Nick Mason, and Richard Wright, making them one of the best-selling bands in history.

items.name: R.E.D.
items.descriptionZh: 《R.E.D.》是美国R&B歌手尼欧的第五张录音室专辑，发行于2012年。风格以当代R&B和流行舞曲为主，融合了电子和嘻哈元素。核���特色在于其双面性：前半部分展现派对氛围，后半部分回归深情慢歌，体现“真实、感性、决心”的主题。
items.descriptionEn: R.E.D. is Ne-Yo's fifth studio album, released in 2012. Blending contemporary R&B, pop, and dance with electronic and hip-hop elements, its core feature is duality: upbeat party tracks in the first half and heartfelt ballads in the second, reflecting 'Real, Emotional, Determined'.
items.storiesZh: 尼欧在录制期间经历了创作瓶颈，一度撕毁所有已有歌曲重新开始。专辑名《R.E.D.》是他名字的缩写（Shaffer Chimere Smith的中间名），也代表三种情绪状态。为了寻找灵感，他专门前往牙买加进行短期闭关创作。
items.storiesEn: Ne-Yo faced creative block during recording, tearing up all existing songs to start over. The album title 'R.E.D.' abbreviates his middle name (Shaffer Chimere Smith) and represents three emotional states. He traveled to Jamaica for a short creative retreat to find inspiration.
items.artistIntroZh: 尼欧（Ne-Yo），本名谢弗·奇米尔·史密斯，1979年生于美国阿肯色州，是格莱美获奖R&B歌手、词曲作者和制作��。以流畅的嗓音和浪漫的叙事风格著称，代表作包括《So Sick》和《Miss Independent》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ne-Yo, born Shaffer Chimere Smith in 1979 in Arkansas, is a Grammy-winning R&B singer, songwriter, and producer. Known for his smooth vocals and romantic storytelling, his hits include 'So Sick' and 'Miss Independent'.

items.name: Pearls of Passion
items.descriptionZh: 《Pearls of Passion》是瑞典流行摇滚组合罗克塞特的瑞典语首张专辑，1986年发行。风格以轻快的流行摇滚和合成器流行为主，充满80年代标志性的电子鼓点和明亮旋律。核心特色是青春活力的声线配合朗朗上口的副歌，奠定了他们后来的流行曲风。
items.descriptionEn: Pearls of Passion is Roxette's Swedish debut album, released in 1986. Featuring upbeat pop-rock and synth-pop with iconic 80s electronic drums and bright melodies, its core feature is youthful vocals paired with catchy choruses, laying the foundation for their later pop sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑最初仅在瑞典和加拿大发行，国际反响有限。有趣的是，主唱玛丽·弗雷德里克森当时已经怀有身孕，但她坚持完成了全部录音和宣传演出。专辑中的单曲《Neverending Love》成为他们在瑞典的第一首热门歌曲。
items.storiesEn: Initially released only in Sweden and Canada with limited international impact. Interestingly, lead singer Marie Fredriksson was pregnant during recording but insisted on completing all sessions and promotional shows. The single 'Neverending Love' became their first hit in Sweden.
items.artistIntroZh: 罗克塞特（Roxette）是1986年成立于瑞典的流行摇滚双人组合，由佩尔·格斯勒和玛丽·弗雷德里克森组成。以《It Must Have Been Love》和《Listen to Your Heart》等全球热门歌曲闻名，是90年代最成功的北欧音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Roxette is a Swedish pop-rock duo formed in 1986 by Per Gessle and Marie Fredriksson. Known for global hits like 'It Must Have Been Love' and 'Listen to Your Heart', they are among the most successful Nordic music acts of the 1990s.

items.name: Снова в СССР
items.descriptionZh: 《Снова в СССР》（俄语意为“重回苏联”）是保罗·麦卡特尼1988年发行的实验性翻唱专辑，仅通过苏联官方渠道销售。风格以摇滚乐和布鲁斯为主，融合了早期猫王和查克·贝里的复古元素。核心特色是粗糙直接的现场感录音，展现麦卡特尼对摇滚根源的致敬。
items.descriptionEn: Back in the USSR is Paul McCartney's 1988 experimental cover album, sold exclusively through Soviet state channels. Featuring rock and blues with retro elements from Elvis and Chuck Berry, its core feature is a raw, live-in-studio feel, showcasing McCartney's tribute to rock roots.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于麦卡特尼对苏联文化的兴趣。他在伦敦录制了20首经典摇滚翻唱曲目，仅用几天时间完成。专辑封面采用苏联国旗配色，内页印有俄文歌词。由于仅限苏联发行，西方乐迷多年后通过非法进口才得以听到。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from McCartney's interest in Soviet culture. He recorded 20 classic rock covers in London in just a few days. The cover used Soviet flag colors with Russian lyrics inside. Exclusively released in the USSR, Western fans only accessed it through illegal imports years later.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是冷战时期罕见的西方音乐家直接在苏联发行作品的案例，在文化外交上具有象征意义，促进了东西方音乐交流。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a rare case of a Western musician releasing work directly in the USSR during the Cold War, symbolically promoting cultural diplomacy and East-West musical exchange.
items.artistIntroZh: 保罗·麦卡��尼（Paul McCartney），1942年生于英国利物浦，是披头士乐队贝斯手和主唱之一。作为史上最成功的音乐人之一，他以其旋律天才和多元创作闻名，个人生涯同样辉煌，拥有多张经典专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Paul McCartney, born in 1942 in Liverpool, is a bassist and vocalist of The Beatles. One of the most successful musicians in history, he is renowned for melodic genius and diverse creativity, with a brilliant solo career featuring multiple classic albums.

items.name: Live Licks
items.descriptionZh: 《Live Licks》是滚石乐队2004年发行的双CD现场专辑，收录了2002-2003年“Licks”世界巡演的精华。风格覆盖布鲁斯摇滚、硬摇滚和乡村摇滚，核心特色是乐队标志性的粗粝能量和即兴演奏，收录了从60年代经典到新作的多首曲目。
items.descriptionEn: Live Licks is a double CD live album by The Rolling Stones, released in 2004, capturing highlights from the 2002-2003 'Licks' world tour. Spanning blues rock, hard rock, and country rock, its core feature is the band's signature raw energy and improvisation, spanning classics from the 60s to new material.
items.storiesZh: 巡演期间，乐队在波士顿芬威球场演出时，米克·贾格尔因舞台湿滑摔倒，但他立即爬起来继续演唱，观众爆发出热烈欢呼。专辑中收录了这场演出的部分录音。此外，吉他手基思·理查兹在彩排时即兴改编了多首老歌的桥段。
items.storiesEn: During the tour at Boston's Fenway Park, Mick Jagger slipped on a wet stage but immediately got up and continued singing, drawing a huge cheer from the crowd. Parts of that show are included. Guitarist Keith Richards also improvised new bridges for several old songs during rehearsals.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队（The Rolling Stones）是1962年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由米克·贾格尔和基思·理查兹领衔。以叛逆形象和布鲁斯根基闻名，被誉为“世界上最伟大的摇滚乐队”，持续活跃超过六十年，影响了几代音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in London in 1962, are led by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. Known for their rebellious image and blues roots, they are hailed as 'the greatest rock and roll band in the world', active for over six decades and influencing generations of musicians.

items.name: We Can't Dance
items.descriptionZh: 《We Can't Dance》是Genesis在1991年发行的第14张录音室专辑，融合了前卫摇滚与流行摇滚风格。专辑以电子合成器、复杂的节奏编排和菲尔·柯林斯标志性的嗓音为特色，旋律流畅且富有戏剧性。歌曲主题涵盖社会批判、人际关系与人生反思，整体氛围既深沉又充满张力，展现了乐队在商业与艺术间的平衡。
items.descriptionEn: We Can't Dance is Genesis's 14th studio album (1991), blending progressive rock with pop rock. Featuring synthesizers, complex rhythms, and Phil Collins's iconic vocals, the album's melodies are smooth yet dramatic. Themes range from social critique to personal reflection, balancing commercial appeal with artistic depth.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队成员因创作分歧产生紧张关系，吉他手迈克·卢瑟福和键盘手托尼·班克斯主导了大部分编曲。菲尔·柯林斯同时忙于个人巡演，导致录音时间分散。专辑同名曲《We Can't Dance》的灵感来源于柯林斯对现代社交尴尬的观察，而《I Can't Dance》则戏仿了当时流行的牛仔裤广告。
items.storiesEn: During recording, tensions arose due to creative differences, with Mike Rutherford and Tony Banks dominating arrangements. Phil Collins was simultaneously touring solo, fragmenting studio time. The title track was inspired by Collins's observations of modern social awkwardness, while 'I Can't Dance' parodied contemporary jeans commercials.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国专辑榜夺冠，全球销量超700万张，是Genesis商业上最成功的作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Topped the UK Albums Chart, sold over 7 million copies worldwide, becoming one of Genesis's most commercially successful albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Genesis成立于1967年，是英国前卫摇滚的奠基者之一。历经彼得·盖布瑞尔和菲尔·柯林斯两代主唱，乐队从艺术摇滚转向流行摇滚，以复杂的编曲和戏剧性表演闻名。1990年代后，成员各自发展，但乐队影响力持久。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1967, Genesis is a pioneering British progressive rock band. Under Phil Collins and earlier Peter Gabriel, they evolved from art rock to pop rock, known for complex arrangements and theatrical performances. Members pursued solo careers post-1990s, but the band's legacy endures.

items.name: Aerial
items.descriptionZh: 《Aerial》是Kate Bush在2005年发行的双碟概念专辑，融合了艺术流行、民谣和实验音乐。专辑分为《A Sea of Honey���和《A Sky of Honey》两部���，以自然、时间与人类情感为主题。Bush的嗓音空灵多变，编曲精致且充满意象，钢琴、弦乐与电子音效交织，营造出梦幻般的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Aerial is Kate Bush's 2005 double concept album, blending art pop, folk, and experimental music. Split into 'A Sea of Honey' and 'A Sky of Honey', it explores nature, time, and human emotion. Bush's ethereal vocals and intricate arrangements weave piano, strings, and electronics into a dreamlike soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑距离Bush上一张作品《The Red Shoes》已有12年，期间她专注于家庭生活。录制在自家乡村工作室完成，Bush亲自担任制作人。她使用大量自然采样，如鸟鸣和雨声，来增强专辑的沉浸感。长曲《Aerial》的创作灵感来自她儿子出生后对天空的日常观察。
items.storiesEn: This album came 12 years after Bush's previous work, The Red Shoes, during which she focused on family life. Recorded in her home studio, Bush self-produced, incorporating natural samples like bird songs and rain. The epic track 'Aerial' was inspired by her daily sky-watching after her son's birth.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑获英国水星奖提名，被多家媒体评为2000年代最佳专辑之一，巩固了Bush作为独立艺术家的传奇地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Nominated for the Mercury Prize, ranked among the best albums of the 2000s by multiple outlets, cementing Bush's legendary status as an independent artist.
items.artistIntroZh: Kate Bush是英国创作型歌手，以独特的嗓音、戏剧化的舞台表演和融合多种音乐元素的实验精神著称。1978年凭借《Wuthering Heights》一鸣惊人，此后不断突破艺术边界，成为影响深远的女性音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Kate Bush is a British singer-songwriter known for her unique voice, theatrical performances, and experimental fusion of genres. She burst onto the scene with 'Wuthering Heights' in 1978, continuously pushing artistic boundaries as a highly influential female musician.

items.name: 30: Very Best of
items.descriptionZh: 《30: Very Best of》是Deep Purple在1998年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1968-1998年间的30首经典曲目，涵盖硬摇滚、重金属和前卫摇滚风格。专辑以标志性的吉他Riff、管风琴独奏和嘶吼式演唱为特色，展现了乐队从早期迷幻摇滚到重型摇滚的演变历程。
items.descriptionEn: 30: Very Best of is a 1998 compilation by Deep Purple, featuring 30 classics from 1968 to 1998. Spanning hard rock, heavy metal, and progressive rock, it showcases iconic guitar riffs, organ solos, and raspy vocals, tracing the band's evolution from psychedelic to heavy rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集由乐队成员亲自参与选曲，旨在庆祝乐队成立30周年。选曲过程中，吉他手里奇·布莱克摩尔对早期作品提出异议，但最终妥协。专辑封面设计采用了乐队标志性的火焰图案，由长期合作艺术家完成。发行后，乐队因选曲遗漏《Child in Time》等热门曲目引发争议。
items.storiesEn: The band members personally selected tracks for this 30th anniversary compilation. Guitarist Ritchie Blackmore objected to early works but eventually compromised. The cover used the band's iconic flame motif, designed by a long-time collaborator. Its release sparked controversy over missing hits like 'Child in Time'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在全球多国获得金唱片认证，是Deep Purple最畅销的精选集之一，帮助新一代听众了解乐队历史。
items.historicalImpactEn: Certified gold in multiple countries, it became one of Deep Purple's best-selling compilations, introducing their legacy to new generations.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是英国硬摇滚先驱，1968年成立，与Led Zeppelin、Black Sabbath并称重金属三大鼻祖。以吉他手布莱克摩尔和键盘手乔恩·洛德的对抗性演奏闻名，代表作《Smoke on the Water》是摇滚史上最著名的Riff之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1968, Deep Purple is a pioneering British hard rock band, considered alongside Led Zeppelin and Black Sabbath as heavy metal's founding fathers. Known for the dynamic interplay between guitarist Blackmore and keyboardist Jon Lord, their 'Smoke on the Water' boasts one of rock's most famous riffs.

items.name: In My Lifetime, Vol. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《In My Lifetime, Vol. 1》是Jay-Z在1997年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了东海岸嘻哈、硬核说唱和灵魂乐采样。专辑以街头叙事为主，歌词描绘毒品交易、贫困与成功渴望，节奏紧凑且制作精良。Jay-Z的flow流畅多变，展现了他作为词匠的自信与野心。
items.descriptionEn: In My Lifetime, Vol. 1 is Jay-Z's 1997 second studio album, blending East Coast hip-hop, hardcore rap, and soul samples. It features street narratives on drug trade, poverty, and ambition, with tight beats and polished production. Jay-Z's versatile flow showcases his lyrical confidence and ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Jay-Z与��作人DJ Premier、Puff Daddy等人合作。主打曲《Who You Wit II》的采样来自灵魂歌手Al Green，但因版权问题延迟发行。Jay-Z在《Imaginary Player》中首次尝试更复杂的韵脚结构，预示了他未来的风格转变。专辑名源于他对自己职业生涯的阶段性总结。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jay-Z collaborated with producers DJ Premier and Puff Daddy. The lead single 'Who You Wit II' sampled soul singer Al Green but faced clearance delays. On 'Imaginary Player', Jay-Z experimented with complex rhyme schemes, foreshadowing his stylistic evolution. The title reflects a career checkpoint.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在公告牌专辑榜排名第三，巩固了Jay-Z在嘻哈界的地位，但销量不及前作，促使他调整商业策略。
items.historicalImpactEn: Peaked at No. 3 on the Billboard 200, solidifying Jay-Z's hip-hop status, though lower sales than his debut prompted a shift in his commercial approach.
items.artistIntroZh: Jay-Z是美国嘻哈巨头，1969年生于纽约布鲁克林，从街头毒贩转型为说唱歌手兼企业家。1996年出道，以精妙的双关语和叙事能力著称，后创立Roc-A-Fella唱片公司，成为全球最富有的嘻哈艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jay-Z is an American hip-hop mogul, born in Brooklyn in 1969, who rose from drug dealer to rapper and entrepreneur. Debuting in 1996, he is known for clever wordplay and storytelling, later founding Roc-A-Fella Records and becoming one of the world's wealthiest hip-hop artists.

items.name: American IV: The Man Comes Around
items.descriptionZh: 《American IV: The Man Comes Around》是Johnny Cash在2002年发行的第四张也是最后一张《American》系列专辑，风格以乡村、民谣和福音为主，辅以简约的吉他伴奏。Cash用低沉沧桑的嗓音翻唱了Nine Inch Nails的《Hurt》等歌曲，充满对生命、死亡与救赎的沉思，氛围哀婉而庄重。
items.descriptionEn: American IV: The Man Comes Around is Johnny Cash's 2002 fourth and final 'American' album, blending country, folk, and gospel with sparse guitar arrangements. Cash's deep, weathered voice covers songs like Nine Inch Nails' 'Hurt', reflecting on life, death, and redemption, creating a somber yet dignified atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由制作人Rick Rubin操刀，录制时Cash已年迈体弱，但他坚持在自家客厅录制，以捕捉最真实的情感。翻唱《Hurt》时，Cash的演绎让原唱Trent Reznor感动落泪。标题曲《The Man Comes Around》是Cash根据圣经启示录创作的原创歌曲，录制前他坚持要求全体工作人员保持肃静。
items.storiesEn: Produced by Rick Rubin, the frail Cash insisted on recording in his living room to capture raw emotion. His cover of 'Hurt' moved original artist Trent Reznor to tears. The title track, an original based on the Book of Revelation, required complete silence from the crew during recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑获格莱美最佳乡村专辑奖，《Hurt》的MV成��经典，Cash在去世前完成了最后的文化遗产，重新定义了翻唱艺术。
items.historicalImpactEn: Won Grammy for Best Country Album; the 'Hurt' video became iconic. Cash completed his final cultural legacy before death, redefining the art of covers.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash是美国乡村音乐传奇，1932年生于阿肯色州，以低沉嗓音和黑衣形象闻名。他融合乡村、摇滚和福音，创作了《I Walk the Line》等经典，晚年与制作人Rick Rubin合作焕发新生，被誉为'黑衣人'。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American country music legend, born in Arkansas in 1932, known for his deep voice and all-black attire. Blending country, rock, and gospel, he created classics like 'I Walk the Line'. His late-career collaboration with Rick Rubin revitalized his legacy, earning him the title 'The Man in Black'.

items.name: Genesis Archive 2: 1976–1992
items.descriptionZh: 《Genesis Archive 2: 1976–1992》是Genesis乐队的第二张精选档案集，收录了乐队从1976年至1992年的稀有录音、B面曲目和现场版本。风格横跨前卫摇滚与流行摇滚，展现了乐队从Phil Collins主唱时期到商业巅峰的演变历程。核心特色在于其丰富的未发行素材，为乐迷提供了深入了解乐队创作过程的窗口。
items.descriptionEn: Genesis Archive 2: 1976–1992 is a compilation album featuring rare recordings, B-sides, and live versions from the band's career between 1976 and 1992. Spanning progressive rock to pop rock, it showcases the band's evolution during Phil Collins' era and their commercial peak, with a focus on previously unreleased material.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的策划耗时多年，乐队成员从私人收藏中翻出了大量磁带和录音室废弃片段。有趣的是，Phil Collins在整理素材时发现了一首1978年录制的未完成曲目，最终决定以原始粗糙状态收录，保留了当年排练时的即兴对话和笑声。
items.storiesEn: The compilation took years to plan, with band members digging through personal archives for tapes and studio outtakes. Interestingly, Phil Collins discovered an unfinished track from 1978, which was included in its raw state, preserving the improvisational chatter and laughter from the rehearsal.
items.artistIntroZh: Genesis是英国前卫摇滚和流行摇滚的标志性乐队，成立于1967年。经历多次成员变动后，主唱兼鼓手Phil Collins带领乐队在80年代取得全球商业成功，代表作包括《Invisible Touch》和《We Can't Dance》。
items.artistIntroEn: Genesis is an iconic British band known for progressive and pop rock, formed in 1967. After several lineup changes, drummer and vocalist Phil Collins led them to global commercial success in the 1980s with hits like 'Invisible Touch' and 'We Can't Dance'.

items.name: Made in Heaven
items.descriptionZh: 《Made in Heaven》是Queen乐队的第15张也是最后一张录音室专辑，于1995年发行。这张专辑融合了华丽摇滚、歌剧摇滚和流行摇滚，核心特色是主唱Freddie Mercury在去世前录制的最后一批人声，经过乐队成员后期精心制作完成，充满深情与告别意味。
items.descriptionEn: Made in Heaven is Queen's 15th and final studio album, released in 1995. Blending glam rock, operatic rock, and pop rock, its core feature is Freddie Mercury's final vocal recordings, posthumously completed by the band, creating a poignant and farewell-like atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的大部分歌曲是Freddie Mercury在1991年去世前于瑞士蒙特勒的录音室录制的。为了完成专辑，Brian May、Roger Taylor和John Deacon在1993年至1995年间反复聆听这些磁带，甚至用上了当年录制《Bohemian Rhapsody》时的多轨技术来叠加和声，仿佛Freddie从未离开。
items.storiesEn: Most of the songs were recorded by Freddie Mercury in his Montreux studio before his death in 1991. To complete the album, Brian May, Roger Taylor, and John Deacon spent 1993–1995 revisiting the tapes, even using multi-track techniques from 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to layer harmonies, as if Freddie had never left.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Made in Heaven》不仅是Queen的绝唱，也是摇滚史上最动人的告别专辑之一，全球销量超过2000万张，巩固了乐队作为不朽传奇的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Made in Heaven is not only Queen's final statement but also one of rock's most moving farewell albums, selling over 20 million copies worldwide and cementing the band's legacy as legends.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是英国传奇摇滚乐��，成立于1970年，由主唱Freddie Mercury、吉他手Brian May、鼓手Roger Taylor和贝斯手John Deacon组成。以华丽舞台风格和经典作品《Bohemian Rhapsody》闻名，是全球最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a legendary British rock band formed in 1970, comprising Freddie Mercury, Brian May, Roger Taylor, and John Deacon. Known for their flamboyant stage presence and classic 'Bohemian Rhapsody', they are among the best-selling bands globally.

items.name: Something to Remember
items.descriptionZh: 《Something to Remember》是美国歌手Madonna在1995年发行的情歌精选集，风格以成人抒情、流行和民谣为主。核心特色是收录了多首电影主题曲和罕见混音版本，展现了Madonna在舞曲之外细腻动人的一面，被乐迷称为她的“抒情诗专辑”。
items.descriptionEn: Something to Remember is a 1995 compilation of ballads by Madonna, focusing on adult contemporary, pop, and folk. Its core feature includes film themes and rare remixes, showcasing Madonna's tender side beyond dance music, often called her 'ballad album' by fans.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于Madonna对90年代初舞曲过度商业化的反思。她亲自从1984年至1995年的作品中挑选了16首抒情歌曲，并特意重新录制了《I Want You》（与Massive Attack合作）作为主打曲。录制时，她坚持在录音室用老式模拟设备，追求温暖的人声质感。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from Madonna's reflection on the over-commercialization of dance music in the early '90s. She personally selected 16 ballads from 1984–1995 and re-recorded 'I Want You' (with Massive Attack) as the lead single. During recording, she insisted on using vintage analog equipment for a warm vocal texture.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna是美国歌手、演员和流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行女王”。自1982年出道以来，她以不断创新的音乐风格和挑战社会禁忌的形象影响了全球流行音乐，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》和《Vogue》。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and pop culture icon known as the 'Queen of Pop'. Since her debut in 1982, she has influenced global pop music with her innovative styles and boundary-pushing image, with hits like 'Like a Virgin' and 'Vogue'.

items.name: Alice in Chains
items.descriptionZh: 《Alice in Chains》是美国摇滚乐队Alice in Chains的第三张录音室专辑，1995年发行，风格融合了另类金属、垃圾摇滚和原声元素。核心特色是其阴暗、沉重的氛围和主唱Layne Staley标志性的嘶吼与多声部和声，被视为乐队艺术上的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: Alice in Chains is the third studio album by the American rock band, released in 1995, blending alternative metal, grunge, and acoustic elements. Its core features are a dark, heavy atmosphere and Layne Staley's signature wails and multi-part harmonies, considered the band's artistic peak.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战。Layne Staley当时正深陷药物成瘾，录音时经常迟到或状态不佳。吉他手Jerry Cantrell不得不独自完成大部分吉他部分，并在录音室搭建临时床铺以应对Staley的缺席。尽管如此，专辑中70%的歌词由Cantrell创作，Staley则贡献了最令人心碎的演唱。
items.storiesEn: The recording was fraught with challenges. Layne Staley was deep in drug addiction, often late or in poor condition. Guitarist Jerry Cantrell had to record most guitar parts alone and set up a makeshift bed in the studio for Staley's absences. Despite this, 70% of the lyrics were written by Cantrell, while Staley delivered his most heartbreaking vocals.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是垃圾摇滚时代最后一张伟大的作品，对后来的另类金属和核类音乐产生了深远影响，被《滚石》��志评为“90年代最佳金属专辑”之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered the last great grunge-era album, it deeply influenced later alternative metal and nu-metal, and was named one of the 'Best Metal Albums of the '90s' by Rolling Stone.
items.artistIntroZh: Alice in Chains是1987年成立于西雅图的美国摇滚乐队，与Nirvana、Pearl Jam等并称垃圾摇滚四大巨头。以黑暗沉重的吉他音色和主唱Layne Staley的独特嗓音闻名，代表作有《Man in the Box》和《Rooster》。
items.artistIntroEn: Alice in Chains is an American rock band formed in Seattle in 1987, one of the 'Big Four' of grunge alongside Nirvana and Pearl Jam. Known for their dark, heavy guitar sound and Layne Staley's distinctive vocals, with hits like 'Man in the Box' and 'Rooster'.

items.name: Live at Donington
items.descriptionZh: 《Live at Donington》是英国重金属乐队Iron Maiden在1993年发行的现场专辑，记录了1992年8月22日在英国多宁顿公园音乐节的演出。风格是典型的重金属和速度金属，核心特色是乐队巅峰时期的狂热现场能量，以及经典曲目如《Fear of the Dark》的万人合唱。
items.descriptionEn: Live at Donington is a live album by Iron Maiden, released in 1993, recording their performance at the Donington Park festival on August 22, 1992. Featuring classic heavy and speed metal, its core is the band's peak live energy and crowd singalongs on tracks like 'Fear of the Dark'.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出是Iron Maiden在更换主唱Bruce Dickinson之前的最后一场大型英国演唱会。当晚下着倾盆大雨，但8万名乐迷依然狂热。吉他手Dave Murray在演奏《The Number of the Beast》时因湿滑的舞台滑倒，但立刻爬起来继续弹奏，成为乐迷口中的经典瞬间。
items.storiesEn: This show was Iron Maiden's last major UK concert before the departure of vocalist Bruce Dickinson. It poured rain that night, but 80,000 fans remained ecstatic. Guitarist Dave Murray slipped on the wet stage during 'The Number of the Beast' but immediately got up and kept playing, becoming a legendary moment among fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张现场专辑是Iron Maiden在Bruce Dickinson首次离开前的巅峰见证，被公认为重金属现场录音的经典范本，对后来的现场专辑制作产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This live album is a testament to Iron Maiden's peak before Bruce Dickinson's first departure, widely regarded as a classic heavy metal live recording and influential on later live album productions.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是英国重金属乐队的代表，成立于1975年，以复杂的编曲、史诗般的歌词和吉祥物Eddie闻名。主唱Bruce Dickinson的舞台表现力和乐队标志性的双吉他旋律使其成为全球最畅销的重金属乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a pioneering British heavy metal band formed in 1975, known for complex compositions, epic lyrics, and mascot Eddie. With Bruce Dickinson's stage presence and twin-guitar harmonies, they are among the best-selling heavy metal bands worldwide.

items.name: Transformer
items.descriptionZh: 《Transformer》是Lou Reed在David Bowie和Mick Ronson协助下打造的华丽摇滚经典。专辑融合了艺术摇滚、民谣与颓废诗意，以细腻的叙事描绘纽约地下世界的边缘人物，风格既冷峻又感性，是70年代摇滚史上最具文学气质的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Transformer is a glam rock classic crafted by Lou Reed with the help of David Bowie and Mick Ronson. Blending art rock, folk, and decadent poetry, it paints a delicate narrative of New York's underground fringe figures, with a style both cool and emotional—one of the most literary works in 1970s rock history.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，David Bowie和Mick Ronson常与Lou Reed在录音室即兴碰撞灵感。Reed曾坚持要保留一些粗糙的演唱瑕疵，认为那更真实。专辑封面的黑白造型由摄影师Mick Rock拍摄，Reed涂着黑色眼线、穿着皮夹克，奠定了华丽摇滚的视觉符号。
items.storiesEn: During recording, David Bowie and Mick Ronson often improvised with Lou Reed in the studio. Reed insisted on keeping some vocal imperfections, believing they added authenticity. The album's black-and-white cover, shot by photographer Mick Rock, featured Reed in black eyeliner and leather jacket, establishing a visual icon of glam rock.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Transformer》确立了华丽摇滚的美学标准，其中《Walk on the Wild Side》因其对跨性别者的描写成为文化里程碑，影响后世无数音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Transformer set the aesthetic standard for glam rock, with 'Walk on the Wild Side' becoming a cultural milestone for its depiction of transgender individuals, influencing countless musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Lou Reed是美国摇滚歌手、词曲作者，地下丝绒乐队核心成员。他以冷峻、诗意的歌词和反叛精神著称，作品常探讨城市边缘生活。个人生涯中，他不断突破音乐风格，被誉为“朋克教父”。
items.artistIntroEn: Lou Reed was an American rock singer-songwriter and core member of The Velvet Underground. Known for his cool, poetic lyrics and rebellious spirit, his work often explored urban fringe life. Throughout his solo career, he constantly pushed musical boundaries, earning the title 'Godfather of Punk.'

items.name: Led Zeppelin IV
items.descriptionZh: 《Led Zeppelin IV》是Led Zeppelin最畅销、最具影响力的专辑。它将硬摇滚、民谣、布鲁斯和神秘主义完美融合，以史诗般的编曲和Robert Plant的嘶吼式演唱定义了70年代摇滚乐的巅峰。专辑从极静到极爆的��态反差令人震撼。
items.descriptionEn: Led Zeppelin IV is the band's best-selling and most influential album. It perfectly merges hard rock, folk, blues, and mysticism, defining the peak of 1970s rock with epic arrangements and Robert Plant's wailing vocals. The dynamic contrast from quiet to explosive is stunning.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于英国赫特福德郡一栋名为“Headley Grange”的古老宅邸，乐队用移动录音车现场录制，追求自然混响。《Stairway to Heaven》的吉他独奏是Jimmy Page在壁炉旁即兴弹奏而成。专辑封面没有乐队名字，而是用神秘挂画象征符号。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Headley Grange, an old mansion in Hertfordshire, England, using a mobile recording truck to capture natural reverb. Jimmy Page improvised the guitar solo for 'Stairway to Heaven' by the fireplace. The cover features no band name, only a mysterious painting symbolizing esoteric themes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑定义了硬摇滚和重金属的模板，《Stairway to Heaven》成为摇滚史上播放次数最多的歌曲之一，影响了几代音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the template for hard rock and heavy metal. 'Stairway to Heaven' became one of the most played songs in rock history, influencing generations of musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Led Zeppelin是英国传奇摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，成员包括Jimmy Page、Robert Plant、John Paul Jones和John Bonham。他们以重型吉他音色、神秘歌词和即兴现场闻名，是硬摇滚和重金属的奠基者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Led Zeppelin is a legendary English rock band formed in 1968, consisting of Jimmy Page, Robert Plant, John Paul Jones, and John Bonham. Known for heavy guitar riffs, mystical lyrics, and improvisational live shows, they are pioneers of hard rock and heavy metal.

items.name: It's a Man's World
items.descriptionZh: 《It's a Man's World》是Anastacia向经典灵魂乐致敬的翻唱专辑。她以极具爆发力的嗓音重新诠释了男人主导的摇滚和灵魂金曲，融合了现代流行、R&B与福音元素，风格华丽而深情，展现了她作为女性歌手的独立宣言。
items.descriptionEn: It's a Man's World is Anastacia's tribute cover album to classic soul. With her explosive vocals, she reinterprets male-dominated rock and soul classics, blending modern pop, R&B, and gospel elements. The style is lavish and heartfelt, serving as a declaration of independence as a female singer.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Anastacia曾与制作人Glen Ballard在录音室激烈讨论编曲方向，她坚持要保留原曲的情感内核而非单纯炫技。她翻唱《You Can't Always Get What You Want》时，特意邀请了一支福音合唱团，试图营造教堂般的圣洁氛围。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Anastacia had intense discussions with producer Glen Ballard about arrangement direction, insisting on preserving the emotional core of the original songs rather than mere showmanship. For her cover of 'You Can't Always Get What You Want,' she specially invited a gospel choir to create a church-like sacred atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Anastacia是美国歌手兼词曲作者，以强劲的嗓音和跨界的流行摇滚风格闻名。她曾战胜癌症并重返舞台，被誉为“灵魂摇滚天后”。她的音乐融合了流行、摇滚、R&B和灵魂乐，全球销量超过3000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Anastacia is an American singer-songwriter known for her powerful voice and crossover pop-rock style. After overcoming cancer, she returned to the stage, earning the title 'Soul Rock Diva.' Her music blends pop, rock, R&B, and soul, with over 30 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: The Way We Walk, Volume One: The Shorts
items.descriptionZh: 《The Way We Walk, Volume One: The Shorts》是Genesis的现场专辑，收录了他们1992年巡演中的短曲目。风格以流行摇滚和前卫摇滚为主，融合了Phil Collins的鼓点与Tony Banks的键盘，现场氛围热烈，展现了乐队在舞台上的精湛技艺与互动魅力。
items.descriptionEn: The Way We Walk, Volume One: The Shorts is a live album by Genesis, featuring short songs from their 1992 tour. The style is primarily pop rock and progressive rock, blending Phil Collins' drumming with Tony Banks' keyboards. The live atmosphere is electrifying, showcasing the band's virtuosity and onstage chemistry.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Phil Collins在台上经常即兴加入幽默独白，与观众互动。一次演出中，吉他手Mike Rutherford的吉他突然断弦，他边弹边换弦，观众反而欢呼。专辑名“The Shorts”指收录的是较短曲目，而第二卷则收录长篇史诗曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Phil Collins often improvised humorous monologues on stage, interacting with the audience. At one show, guitarist Mike Rutherford's guitar string broke mid-song; he replaced it while playing, and the crowd cheered. The album title 'The Shorts' refers to shorter songs, while a second volume featured epic-length tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: Genesis是英国传奇前卫摇滚乐队，1967年成立，经历多次成员变动，核心成员包括Peter Gabriel（早期主唱）和Phil Collins（后期主唱/鼓手）。他们从艺术摇滚转向流行摇滚，成为80年代最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Genesis is a legendary English progressive rock band formed in 1967. With several lineup changes, core members included Peter Gabriel (early vocalist) and Phil Collins (later vocalist/drummer). They transitioned from art rock to pop rock, becoming one of the most successful bands of the 1980s.

items.name: The Immaculate Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《The Immaculate Collection》是Madonna的首张精选集，收录了她1983至1990年间的15首冠军单曲和两首新歌。风格横跨流行舞曲、电子和成人抒情，制作精良，堪称80年代流行音乐的缩影。它不仅是舞池的圣典，也是流行文化符号的集大成者。
items.descriptionEn: The Immaculate Collection is Madonna's first greatest hits album, featuring 15 chart-topping singles from 1983 to 1990 plus two new songs. Spanning pop dance, electronic, and adult contemporary, it is impeccably produced and serves as a microcosm of 1980s pop music. It is both a dancefloor bible and a culmination of pop culture symbols.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Immaculate”是Madonna的创意，她认为自己的音乐生涯如同“纯洁无瑕”的奇迹。录制新歌《Justify My Love》时，她与Lenny Kravitz在录音室通宵创作，歌词灵感来自一本情色小说。专辑的音乐录影带因情色内容被MTV禁播，反而引发更大关注。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Immaculate' was Madonna's idea, viewing her career as a 'pure' miracle. While recording the new song 'Justify My Love,' she and Lenny Kravitz worked overnight in the studio, with lyrics inspired by an erotic novel. The music video was banned by MTV for its sexual content, which ironically drew even more attention.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Immaculate Collection》是史上最畅销的精选集之一，重新定义了精选专辑的制作标准，并确认了Madonna作为流行女皇的不可撼动地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Immaculate Collection is one of the best-selling greatest hits albums of all time, redefining the standard for compilation albums and cementing Madonna's unshakable status as the Queen of Pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna是美国歌手、演员及文化偶像，被誉为“流行女皇”。她以不断革新音乐风格、挑战社会禁忌和极具视觉冲击的表演闻名，是80年代以来全球最具影响力的女性音乐人之一，唱片销量超过3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and cultural icon known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Renowned for constantly reinventing her musical style, challenging social taboos, and delivering visually stunning performances, she is one of the most influential female musicians globally since the 1980s, with over 300 million records sold.

items.name: In the Middle of Nowhere
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Middle of Nowhere》是Modern Talking在1986年发行的第三张录音室专辑，延续了其标志性的欧陆迪斯科风格。专辑以合成器为主导，旋律优美且节奏明快，充满了80年代特有的电子舞曲氛围。核心特色在于其朗朗上口的副歌和浪漫的歌词主题，如热门单曲《Brother Louie》展现了乐队对流行旋律的精准把控。
items.descriptionEn: In the Middle of Nowhere is Modern Talking's third studio album, released in 1986, continuing their signature Euro-disco style. Dominated by synthesizers, the album features catchy melodies and upbeat rhythms, embodying the electronic dance vibe of the 80s. Its core lies in memorable choruses and romantic lyrics, with hits like Brother Louie showcasing the duo's mastery of pop hooks.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Thomas Anders和制作人Dieter Bohlen的合作关系已出现裂痕。据传，两人在录音室中因创作方向争执不断，但《Brother Louie》的意外全球成功暂时掩盖了矛盾。这首歌在德国录制时几乎是一次完成，Bohlen后来回忆说，他们甚至没预料到它会成为国际热门。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, tensions between vocalist Thomas Anders and producer Dieter Bohlen were already surfacing. Reportedly, they clashed frequently over creative direction in the studio, but the unexpected global success of Brother Louie temporarily masked the rift. The song was recorded almost in one take in Germany, with Bohlen later recalling they never anticipated it becoming an international hit.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是由Thomas Anders和Dieter Bohlen组成的德国双人组合，成立于1983年。他们以欧陆迪斯科风格风靡全球，在80年代创造了多首冠军单曲，如《You're My Heart, You're My Soul》。尽管内部矛盾导致多次解散重组，他们仍是欧洲流行音乐史上最成功的组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German duo formed in 1983 by Thomas Anders and Dieter Bohlen. Known for their Euro-disco sound, they achieved global fame with numerous chart-topping singles in the 80s, including You're My Heart, You're My Soul. Despite internal conflicts leading to multiple breakups and reunions, they remain one of Europe's most successful pop acts.

items.name: Morbid Visions
items.descriptionZh: 《Morbid Visions》是巴西重金属乐队Sepultura的首张录音室专辑，1986年发行。风格以死亡金属和黑金属为根基，融合了原始暴戾的吉他Riff与高速鼓点，营造出黑暗、邪恶的氛围。核心特色在于其粗糙的制作质感和极端的侵略性，为南美极端金属场景奠定了基石。
items.descriptionEn: Morbid Visions is the debut studio album by Brazilian heavy metal band Sepultura, released in 1986. Rooted in death and black metal, it blends raw, violent guitar riffs with fast drumming to create a dark, evil atmosphere. Its core lies in its lo-fi production and extreme aggression, laying the groundwork for South American extreme metal.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在巴西圣保罗的一家简陋录音室录制，预算极低。乐队成员当时年仅15至17岁，录音过程中因设备故障频发，鼓手Igor Cavalera不得不借用朋友的旧鼓组。主唱Max Cavalera在录制时因紧张多次破音，但制作人坚持保留这些“瑕疵”，认为它们增添了专辑的原始能量。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a cheap studio in São Paulo, Brazil, on a minimal budget. Band members were only 15 to 17 years old at the time, and frequent equipment malfunctions forced drummer Igor Cavalera to borrow an old kit from a friend. Vocalist Max Cavalera cracked his voice multiple times due to nervousness, but the producer insisted on keeping those 'flaws,' believing they added to the album's raw energy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Morbid Visions》被公认为巴西极端金属的奠基之作，影响了后续无数南美金属乐队。它证明了在资源匮乏的条件下，依然可以创造出具有全球影响力的重型音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: Morbid Visions is widely regarded as the foundational work of Brazilian extreme metal, influencing countless subsequent South American metal bands. It proved that globally impactful heavy music could be created under resource-scarce conditions.
items.artistIntroZh: Sepultura是1984年成立于巴西贝洛奥里藏特的重金属乐队，由Max和Igor Cavalera兄弟创立。他们从死亡金属起步，逐渐融入硬核、部落元素，成为全球最知名的南美金属乐队之一。尽管阵容多次变动，其早期作品至今仍被奉为极端金属经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Sepultura is a heavy metal band formed in Belo Horizonte, Brazil, in 1984 by brothers Max and Igor Cavalera. Starting with death metal, they later incorporated hardcore and tribal elements, becoming one of the most famous South American metal bands. Despite numerous lineup changes, their early work remains classic in extreme metal.

items.name: Memento Mori
items.descriptionZh: 《Memento Mori》是美国另��金属乐队Flyleaf的第三张录音室专辑，2009年发行。风格融合了另类金属、硬摇滚和福音元素，主唱Lacey Sturm极具爆发力的嗓音与阴暗的吉他旋律形成鲜明对比。核心特色在于其情感深度和主题——直面死亡、信仰与救赎，营造出沉重而内省的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Memento Mori is the third studio album by American alternative metal band Flyleaf, released in 2009. Blending alternative metal, hard rock, and gospel elements, it contrasts Lacey Sturm's explosive vocals with dark guitar melodies. Its core lies in emotional depth and themes confronting death, faith, and redemption, creating a heavy, introspective atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Memento Mori》（拉丁语“记住你终有一死”）源于主唱Lacey Sturm在巡演巴士上的一次濒死体验。她因哮喘发作几乎窒息，之后决定将生命无常的主题融入音乐。录制期间，乐队在纳什维尔的录音室中尝试了更多实验性编曲，包括使用教堂管风琴，以增强神圣与黑暗的对比。
items.storiesEn: The album title Memento Mori (Latin for 'remember you must die') stemmed from lead singer Lacey Sturm's near-death experience on a tour bus, where she nearly suffocated from an asthma attack. She then decided to weave themes of life's fragility into the music. During recording, the band experimented with more arrangements in a Nashville studio, including church organs, to heighten the contrast between sacred and dark.
items.artistIntroZh: Flyleaf成立于2002年，来自美国德克萨斯州，以女主唱Lacey Sturm的独特嗓音和富含基督教隐喻的歌词著称。他们的音乐在另类金属场景中独树一帜，首张专辑即获白金销量。Sturm于2012年离队追求个人信仰事业，但乐队至今仍活跃。
items.artistIntroEn: Flyleaf formed in 2002 in Texas, USA, known for lead vocalist Lacey Sturm's distinctive voice and lyrics rich in Christian metaphor. Their music stood out in the alternative metal scene, with their debut album achieving platinum status. Sturm left the band in 2012 to pursue personal faith-based projects, but the band remains active.

items.name: Absolute Greatest
items.descriptionZh: 《Absolute Greatest》是英国摇滚乐队Queen在2009年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1974至1995年间最具代表性的20首金曲。风格横跨华丽摇滚、硬摇滚、歌剧摇滚和流行，核心特色在于其无可挑剔的曲目编排——从《Bohemian Rhapsody》的史诗感《We Will Rock You》的体育场能量，全面展现了Queen的多元魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Absolute Greatest is a 2009 compilation by British rock band Queen, featuring 20 of their most iconic hits from 1974 to 1995. Spanning glam rock, hard rock, opera rock, and pop, its core lies in impeccable track sequencing—from the epic Bohemian Rhapsody to the stadium energy of We Will Rock You—showcasing Queen's diverse brilliance.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集是乐队在吉他手Brian May和鼓手Roger Taylor的监督下重新制作的。有趣的是，他们发现原始母带中《Bohemian Rhapsody》的某些部分因年代久远而轻微磁化，不得不使用数字技术修复。May在采访中笑称，这就像给老照片上色，需要小心翼翼不破坏原作的灵魂。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was remastered under the supervision of guitarist Brian May and drummer Roger Taylor. Interestingly, they discovered that parts of the original master tapes for Bohemian Rhapsody had become slightly demagnetized over time, requiring digital restoration. May joked in an interview that it was like coloring old photos—needing care not to ruin the original soul.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Queen最畅销的精选集之一，《Absolute Greatest》让新一代听众重新认识了乐队跨越时代的创造力，巩固了他们作为20世纪最伟大���滚乐队之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of Queen's best-selling compilations, Absolute Greatest introduced a new generation to the band's timeless creativity, cementing their status as one of the 20th century's greatest rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是1970年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由Freddie Mercury（主唱）、Brian May（吉他）、John Deacon（贝斯）和Roger Taylor（鼓）组成。他们以戏剧化的舞台表演、复杂的和声和音乐多样性著称，代表作《Bohemian Rhapsody》被誉为摇滚史上最伟大的歌曲之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in London in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), John Deacon (bass), and Roger Taylor (drums). Known for theatrical performances, complex harmonies, and musical diversity, their masterpiece Bohemian Rhapsody is hailed as one of rock's greatest songs.

items.name: GRRR!
items.descriptionZh: 《GRRR!》是英国摇滚乐队The Rolling Stones在2012年发行的精选集，为纪念乐队成立50周年而作。专辑收录了1963至2012年间50首经典曲目，风格涵盖布鲁斯摇滚、硬摇滚和节奏蓝调。核心特色在于其跨度之大——从早期翻唱《Not Fade Away》到新单曲《Doom and Gloom》，完整呈现了乐队半世纪的进化史。
items.descriptionEn: GRRR! is a 2012 compilation by The Rolling Stones, celebrating the band's 50th anniversary. It features 50 tracks from 1963 to 2012, spanning blues rock, hard rock, and R&B. Its core lies in its vast range—from early covers like Not Fade Away to new single Doom and Gloom—offering a complete half-century evolution.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《GRRR!》灵感来自乐队标志性的舌头logo和早期歌曲《(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction》中Mick Jagger的咆哮。为录制新歌《Doom and Gloom》和《One More Shot》，乐队在巴黎的录音室重聚。吉他手Keith Richards回忆说，他们只用了三天就完成了新曲，仿佛回到了60年代的创作状态。
items.storiesEn: The title GRRR! was inspired by the band's iconic tongue logo and Mick Jagger's growl in early hits like (I Can't Get No) Satisfaction. To record new tracks Doom and Gloom and One More Shot, the band reunited at a Paris studio. Guitarist Keith Richards recalled they finished the new songs in just three days, as if back in their 60s creative prime.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为乐队50周年的权威选集，《GRRR!》不仅刷新了精选集的商业纪录，更通过新曲证明了The Rolling Stones在21世纪依然拥有强大的创作活力。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the band's definitive 50th-anniversary anthology, GRRR! not only set sales records for compilations but also proved The Rolling Stones' enduring creative vitality in the 21st century through new material.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones是1962年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由Mick Jagger（主唱）和Keith Richards（吉他）领衔。他们以叛逆形象、布鲁斯根基���现场爆发力著称，与The Beatles并称为英伦入侵的两极。至今已发行30多张录音室专辑，是全球史上最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are an English rock band formed in London in 1962, led by Mick Jagger (vocals) and Keith Richards (guitar). Known for their rebellious image, blues roots, and explosive live performances, they are considered one of the two poles of the British Invasion alongside The Beatles. With over 30 studio albums, they remain one of the most influential rock bands in history.

items.name: Encore
items.descriptionZh: 《Encore》是Eminem于2004年发行的第五张录音室专辑，延续了他一贯的硬核说唱风格，同时融入了更多政治讽刺和黑色幽默。专辑以戏剧化的叙事和犀利的歌词著称，展现了Eminem对名声、家庭和社会的复杂思考。
items.descriptionEn: Encore is Eminem's fifth studio album released in 2004, continuing his signature hardcore rap style while incorporating more political satire and dark humor. The album is known for its theatrical storytelling and sharp lyrics, reflecting Eminem's complex thoughts on fame, family, and society.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Encore》时，Eminem正处于药物依赖的困扰中，这导致部分歌曲的创作过程充满混乱。专辑原计划更早发行，但因Eminem对内容反复修改而推迟。其中《Mockingbird》是他写给女儿Hailie的感人作品，灵感来自一次深夜通话。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Encore, Eminem was struggling with drug dependency, which made the creative process for some songs chaotic. The album was originally scheduled for an earlier release but was delayed due to Eminem's constant revisions. 'Mockingbird' is a heartfelt track written for his daughter Hailie, inspired by a late-night phone call.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管评价两极分化，但《Encore》首周销量超过44万张，巩固了Eminem在2000年代中期的商业统治地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Despite mixed reviews, Encore sold over 440,000 copies in its first week, cementing Eminem's commercial dominance in the mid-2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，以技术精湛的押韵和直白的情感表达闻名。他于1999年凭借《The Slim Shady LP》爆红，成为史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一，获得15项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper and producer known for his technical rhyme schemes and raw emotional expression. He rose to fame with 'The Slim Shady LP' in 1999, becoming one of the best-selling rappers of all time with 15 Grammy Awards.

items.name: Loud
items.descriptionZh: 《Loud》是Rihanna于2010年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合了流行、舞厅雷鬼和R&B风格。专辑以强劲的节拍和自信的声线为特色，展现了Rihanna从青涩少女向成熟时尚偶像的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Loud is Rihanna's fifth studio album released in 2010, blending pop, dancehall reggae, and R&B. The album features powerful beats and a confident vocal delivery, marking Rihanna's transformation from a teenage star into a mature fashion icon.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Rihanna与制作人Stargate在加勒比海度假地完成了多首歌曲，灵感来自海岛的轻松氛围。主打歌《Only Girl (In The World)》最初是为其他歌手创作的，但Rihanna听到后坚持要唱，并在一天内完成了录制。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Rihanna and producer Stargate completed several songs at a Caribbean resort, inspired by the island's relaxed vibe. The lead single 'Only Girl (In The World)' was originally written for another artist, but Rihanna insisted on recording it and finished the vocals in one day.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Loud》全球销量超过800万张，帮助Rihanna确立为2010年代初期最具商业影响力的流行女歌手之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Loud sold over 8 million copies worldwide, helping establish Rihanna as one of the most commercially influential pop female artists of the early 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna（本名Robyn Fenty）是巴巴多斯歌手、演员和企业家，2005年以单曲《Pon de Replay》出道。她以多变的音乐风格和时尚��响力著称，拥有9项格莱美奖，并创立了美妆品牌Fenty Beauty。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna (born Robyn Fenty) is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur who debuted with 'Pon de Replay' in 2005. Known for her versatile music style and fashion influence, she has won 9 Grammy Awards and founded the cosmetics brand Fenty Beauty.

items.name: King Animal
items.descriptionZh: 《King Animal》是Soundgarden于2012年发行的第六张录音室专辑，也是他们时隔16年后的回归之作。专辑延续了乐队标志性的另类金属和垃圾摇滚风格，融合了沉重的吉他音色和Chris Cornell标志性的嘶吼嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: King Animal is Soundgarden's sixth studio album released in 2012, marking their return after a 16-year hiatus. The album continues the band's signature alternative metal and grunge style, blending heavy guitar riffs with Chris Cornell's iconic wailing vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的录制过程充满怀旧情绪，乐队成员在多年后重新聚首，最初只是尝试创作几首新歌，但灵感不断涌现，最终完成了整张专辑。主打歌《Been Away Too Long》的歌词直接回应了乐队长达十多年的休眠期。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was filled with nostalgia as band members reunited after years apart. Initially just experimenting with a few new songs, creative inspiration kept flowing, resulting in a full album. The lead single 'Been Away Too Long' directly addresses the band's decade-long hiatus.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为垃圾摇滚时代标志性乐队的回归之作，《King Animal》证明Soundgarden依然保持着创作力，但未能重现90年代的商业辉煌。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the comeback album of a grunge-era iconic band, King Animal proved Soundgarden still had creative power, though it didn't replicate their 1990s commercial success.
items.artistIntroZh: Soundgarden是一支美国摇滚乐队，1984年成立于西雅图，是垃圾摇滚运动的先驱之一。乐队以黑暗、沉重的音色和Chris Cornell的宽音域嗓音著称，1994年专辑《Superunknown》使其获得全球声誉。
items.artistIntroEn: Soundgarden is an American rock band formed in Seattle in 1984, pioneers of the grunge movement. Known for their dark, heavy sound and Chris Cornell's wide vocal range, they gained global fame with their 1994 album 'Superunknown'.

items.name: ¡Dos!
items.descriptionZh: 《¡Dos!》是Green Day于2012年发行的三部曲专辑中的第二部，风格偏向车库摇滚和流行朋克。专辑以简洁的编曲和直白的歌词为特点，展现了乐队更轻松、即兴的一面。
items.descriptionEn: ¡Dos! is the second album in Green Day's 2012 trilogy, leaning toward garage rock and pop punk. The album features stripped-down arrangements and straightforward lyrics, showcasing a looser, more improvisational side of the band.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队主唱Billie Joe Armstrong曾因酗酒问题进入康复中心，导致部分后期工作延迟。歌曲《Stray Heart》的灵感来自Billie Joe在洛杉矶一家酒吧偶遇一位街头艺人时的即兴旋律。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, frontman Billie Joe Armstrong entered rehab for alcohol issues, delaying some post-production work. The song 'Stray Heart' was inspired by a melody Billie Joe improvised after encountering a street performer at a Los Angeles bar.
items.artistIntroZh: Green Day是一支美国朋克摇滚乐队，1987年成立于加州伯克利。他们以1994年的专辑《Dookie》引领了90年代朋克复兴浪潮，获得多项格莱美奖，是史上最畅销的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Green Day is an American punk rock band formed in Berkeley, California in 1987. They led the 1990s punk revival with their 1994 album 'Dookie', have won multiple Grammy Awards, and are among the best-selling rock bands of all time.

items.descriptionZh: 《1》是The Beatles于2000年发行的精选集，收录了1962年至1970年间在英国和美国排行榜上获得第一名的27首单曲。专辑以纯粹的流行旋律和时代印记为特色，是乐队辉煌生涯的浓缩精华。
items.descriptionEn: 1 is a compilation album by The Beatles released in 2000, featuring 27 singles that reached number one on the UK and US charts between 1962 and 1970. The album showcases pure pop melodies and a time capsule of the band's glorious career.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的曲目顺序并非按时间排列，而是由制作人George Martin和乐队成员Paul McCartney、Ringo Starr共同精心编排，以创造最佳的听觉体验。封面设计采用了经典的苹果标志，但将数字“1”以金色浮雕形式呈现。
items.storiesEn: The track order was not chronological but carefully curated by producer George Martin and band members Paul McCartney and Ringo Starr to create the best listening experience. The cover features the classic Apple logo with the number '1' embossed in gold.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《1》成为21世纪初最畅销的专辑之一，全球销量超过3100万张，向新一代听众介绍了The Beatles的经典作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: 1 became one of the best-selling albums of the early 21st century, selling over 31 million copies worldwide and introducing The Beatles' classics to a new generation.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beatles是一支英国摇滚乐队，1960年成立于利物浦，被公认为音乐史上最具影响力和商业成功的乐队。成员包括John Lennon、Paul McCartney、George Harrison和Ringo Starr，他们革新了流行音乐的创作和录音方式。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were an English rock band formed in Liverpool in 1960, widely regarded as the most influential and commercially successful band in music history. Members included John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr, revolutionizing pop music songwriting and recording.

items.name: Uneasy Listening Vol. 1 & 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Uneasy Listening Vol. 1 & 2》是芬兰摇滚乐队HIM在2006年发行的两张合辑，收录了乐队早期至中期的B面曲、混音版本和罕见录音。风格融合了哥特摇滚、另类金属与流行旋律，以阴暗浪漫的歌词和主唱Ville Valo低沉沙哑的嗓音为核心特色，呈现出一种“爱与死亡”交织的独特听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Uneasy Listening Vol. 1 & 2" is a compilation by Finnish rock band HIM, released in 2006, featuring B-sides, remixes, and rare recordings from their early to mid-career. The style blends gothic rock, alternative metal, and pop melodies, characterized by dark romantic lyrics and Ville Valo's deep, husky vocals, creating a unique auditory experience of love and death.
