items.storiesZh: 这两张专辑的选曲过程颇为有趣：乐队从大量未发行的录音中挑选，其中许多曲目原本只作为单曲B面在日本或欧洲限量发行。Vol. 1侧重混音和另类版本，而Vol. 2则收录了更原始、未加工的录音。录制时，主唱Ville Valo曾开玩笑说，这些歌像是“乐队衣柜里翻出的旧情书”，充满了意外和怀旧感。
items.storiesEn: The selection process for these two albums was intriguing: the band picked from a large archive of unreleased recordings, many of which were originally limited-edition B-sides in Japan or Europe. Vol. 1 focuses on remixes and alternate versions, while Vol. 2 features rawer, unpolished tracks. During recording, frontman Ville Valo joked that these songs were like 'old love letters found in the band's closet,' full of surprises and nostalgia.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM是1991年成立于芬兰赫尔辛基的摇滚乐队，主唱Ville Valo以其独特嗓音和浪漫哥特风格闻名。乐队在90年代末至2000年代初获得国际成功，代表作《Join Me in Death》等奠定了他们在全球摇滚界的地位。HIM于2017年解散，但其音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM is a rock band formed in Helsinki, Finland, in 1991, known for frontman Ville Valo's distinctive voice and romantic gothic style. They achieved international success in the late 1990s and early 2000s, with hits like 'Join Me in Death' cementing their place in global rock. HIM disbanded in 2017, but their music remains influential.

items.name: Barrett
items.descriptionZh: 《Barrett》是平克·弗洛伊德创始人之一Syd Barrett在1970年发行的第二张个人专辑。风格以迷幻民谣和实验摇滚为主，充满即兴的吉他、不规则的旋律和孩童般天真的歌词。专辑录制于他精神健康恶化时期，音乐既是才华的流露，也是内心混乱的映射，呈现出一种脆弱而迷人的美感。
items.descriptionEn: "Barrett" is the second solo album by Syd Barrett, a founder of Pink Floyd, released in 1970. The style is primarily psychedelic folk and experimental rock, featuring improvisational guitar, irregular melodies, and childlike lyrics. Recorded during a period of worsening mental health, the music reflects both his genius and inner turmoil, creating a fragile yet captivating beauty.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Barrett的状态极不稳定，有时会突然离席或拒绝演唱。制作人David Gilmour（平克·弗洛伊德吉他手）和鼓手Jerry Shirley不得不通过鼓励和耐心引导他完成录音。有一首名为《Effervescing Elephant》的歌曲，Barrett坚持用高亢童声演唱，录音室里所有人都被这种纯真与破碎交织的表演所打动。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Barrett's condition was highly unstable; he would sometimes abruptly leave or refuse to sing. Producer David Gilmour (Pink Floyd guitarist) and drummer Jerry Shirley had to encourage and patiently guide him through the sessions. One song, 'Effervescing Elephant,' Barrett insisted on singing in a high-pitched childlike voice, moving everyone in the studio with its blend of innocence and fragility.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Barrett》是Syd Barrett音乐生涯的绝唱，虽商业反响平平，但后来被公认为迷幻音乐的重要文献，对独立音乐和另类摇滚产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Barrett" is Syd Barrett's final musical statement. Though commercially underwhelming, it is later recognized as a key document of psychedelic music, profoundly influencing indie and alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Syd Barrett（1946-2006）是英国音乐家、画家，平克·弗洛伊德的创始成员和主创。他以迷幻吉他、诗意歌词和先锋实验精神著称，但因精神疾病于1968年离队。个人专辑《The Madcap Laughs》和《Barrett》成为传奇，他被视为摇滚史上最具悲剧色彩的天才之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Syd Barrett (1946-2006) was a British musician and painter, founding member and creative force of Pink Floyd. Known for his psychedelic guitar, poetic lyrics, and experimental spirit, he left the band in 1968 due to mental illness. His solo albums 'The Madcap Laughs' and 'Barrett' are legendary, making him one of rock's most tragic geniuses.

items.name: Waiting to Exhale (soundtrack)
items.descriptionZh: 《Waiting to Exhale》原声带发行于1995年，由多位R&B和灵魂乐艺术家共同演绎，包括Whitney Houston、Toni Braxton、Aaliyah等。专辑以女性情感为主题，融合了90年代新杰克摇摆、成人当代和福音元素，旋律流畅且充满力量感，完美呼应了电影中四位女性自我觉醒与相互扶持的故事。
items.descriptionEn: The soundtrack for 'Waiting to Exhale,' released in 1995, features multiple R&B and soul artists including Whitney Houston, Toni Braxton, and Aaliyah. Themed around female emotions, it blends 90s new jack swing, adult contemporary, and gospel elements with smooth, powerful melodies, perfectly echoing the film's story of four women's self-awakening and mutual support.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Babyface几乎包办了专辑所有词曲创作，并邀请了多位天后级歌手录制。有趣的是，Whitney Houston录制的《Exhale (Shoop Shoop)》原本只是Demo，但因效果惊艳被直接采用。此外，Toni Braxton的《Let It Flow》原本是为她个人专辑准备的，Babyface说服她让给原声带，最终成为经典。
items.storiesEn: Producer Babyface wrote nearly all the songs and invited several diva-level singers to record. Interestingly, Whitney Houston's 'Exhale (Shoop Shoop)' was originally just a demo but was used as-is due to its stunning quality. Also, Toni Braxton's 'Let It Flow' was originally intended for her own album; Babyface convinced her to contribute it to the soundtrack, and it became a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声带是史上最成功的电影原声带之一，全球销量超700万张，并推动了90年代R&B女性叙事的主流化，对后续女性题材电影音乐产生了示范效应。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of the best-selling film soundtracks ever, with over 7 million copies sold worldwide, it propelled the mainstreaming of female R&B narratives in the 1990s and set a benchmark for future female-centric film music.
items.artistIntroZh: 本专辑由多位艺术家共同演绎，核心人物包括Whitney Houston（美国传奇流行天后，代表作《I Will Always Love You》）和Toni Braxton（R&B天后，以低音嗓音和情歌著称）。制作人Babyface是90年代R&B界金牌制作人，塑造了该年代众多经典女声作品。
items.artistIntroEn: This album features multiple artists, including Whitney Houston (American pop legend, known for 'I Will Always Love You') and Toni Braxton (R&B diva famous for her deep voice and ballads). Producer Babyface was a gold-standard R&B producer of the 1990s, shaping many classic female vocal works of the era.

items.name: Confessions on a Dance Floor
items.descriptionZh: 《Confessions on a Dance Floor》是Madonna在2005年发行的第十张录音室专辑，风格回归舞曲根源，融合迪斯科、电子和流行元素。专辑采用无间断混音结构，每首歌无缝衔接，营造出连续派对氛围。歌词探讨自我解放、忏悔与重生，是Madonna对舞曲文化的一次深情致敬。
items.descriptionEn: "Confessions on a Dance Floor" is Madonna's tenth studio album, released in 2005, returning to her dance roots with a fusion of disco, electronic, and pop elements. The album features a continuous mix structure, with each track seamlessly blending into the next, creating an uninterrupted party atmosphere. Lyrically, it explores self-liberation, confession, and rebirth, a heartfelt tribute to dance culture.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Madonna与制作人Stuart Price在伦敦的录音室里几乎夜夜工作到凌晨，有时灵感来了就即兴改变编曲。专辑的第一首歌《Hung Up》采样了ABBA的《Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!》，Madonna亲自致电ABBA成员请求许可，对方被她的诚意打动，这是ABBA首次允许采样其作品。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna and producer Stuart Price often worked until dawn in a London studio, sometimes improvising arrangement changes on the spot. The opening track 'Hung Up' samples ABBA's 'Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!'; Madonna personally called ABBA members for permission, and they were moved by her sincerity—this marked ABBA's first-ever sample clearance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超1200万张，是Madonna商业复兴的标志，也带动了2000年代中期迪斯科复兴风潮，影响了Lady Gaga等后辈艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling over 12 million copies worldwide, the album marked Madonna's commercial resurgence and sparked a mid-2000s disco revival, influencing later artists like Lady Gaga.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（1958年出生）是美国歌手、演员、企业家，被誉为“流行女王”。自1980年代出道以来，她不断重塑音乐和视觉风格，推动了流行文化的边界。代表作包括《Like a Virgin》《Ray of Light》等，是全球最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (born 1958) is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Since her debut in the 1980s, she has continuously reinvented her music and visual style, pushing the boundaries of pop culture. Her hits include 'Like a Virgin' and 'Ray of Light,' making her one of the most influential female musicians globally.

items.name: Best of the Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Best of the Best》是Frank Sinatra在2011年发行的精选专辑，收录了他从1940年代至1980年代最具代表性的经典作品，如《My Way》《New York, New York》《Fly Me to the Moon》等。风格横跨大乐队爵士、传统流行和摇摆乐，展现了Sinatra无与伦比的演唱技巧和舞台魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Best of the Best" is a 2011 compilation album by Frank Sinatra, featuring his most iconic works from the 1940s to the 1980s, such as 'My Way,' 'New York, New York,' and 'Fly Me to the Moon.' The style spans big band jazz, traditional pop, and swing, showcasing Sinatra's unparalleled vocal technique and stage charisma.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的曲目由Sinatra家族遗产管理方精心挑选，旨在呈现他整个职业生涯的巅峰。有趣的是，《My Way》的录制过程并不顺利：Sinatra最初不喜欢这首歌的歌词，认为太自恋，但最终在制作人劝说下录制，结果成为他最具标志性的歌曲之一。专辑封面使用了1960年代经典照片，致敬他的黄金时代。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist was carefully curated by Sinatra's estate to represent the peaks of his career. Interestingly, the recording of 'My Way' was initially rocky: Sinatra disliked the lyrics, finding them too narcissistic, but eventually recorded it after persuasion from his producer—it became one of his most iconic songs. The album cover uses a classic 1960s photo, paying homage to his golden era.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Sinatra（1915-1998）是美国歌手、演员，20世纪最伟大的流行音乐人之一。他以丝绒般的嗓音和精准的 phrasing 闻名，开创了“摇摆乐”时代，代表作《My Way》成为跨世代经典。他共获得11项格莱美奖，是娱乐界永恒的传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra (1915-1998) was an American singer and actor, one of the greatest popular musicians of the 20th century. Known for his velvety voice and precise phrasing, he pioneered the swing era, and 'My Way' became a cross-generational classic. He won 11 Grammy Awards and remains an eternal legend in entertainment.

items.name: Global Warming
items.descriptionZh: 《Global Warming》是Pitbull在2012年发行的第七张录音室专辑，融合了拉丁流行、嘻哈和电子舞曲元素。专辑以派对氛围和全球化主题为核心，邀请克里斯蒂娜·阿奎莱拉、亚瑟小子等巨星助阵，节奏强劲、旋律洗脑，展现了Pitbull标志性的热情与活力。
items.descriptionEn: "Global Warming" is Pitbull's seventh studio album released in 2012, blending Latin pop, hip-hop, and electronic dance music. Centered on party vibes and global themes, it features collaborations with Christina Aguilera, Usher, and others, delivering infectious beats and high energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Pitbull与克里斯蒂娜·阿奎莱拉合作了热门单曲《Feel This Moment》。据说阿奎莱拉在录音棚即兴发挥了一段高音，让Pitbull当场惊叹。此外，专辑名《Global Warming》原定是《Global Meltdown》，但团队认为前者更具积极寓意。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Pitbull worked with Christina Aguilera on the hit "Feel This Moment." It's said she improvised a high note in the studio, leaving Pitbull amazed. The album was originally titled "Global Meltdown" but the team felt "Global Warming" had a more positive vibe.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过100万张，单曲《Feel This Moment》在多个国家进入前十，巩固了Pitbull作为国际舞曲巨星的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 1 million copies worldwide, with the single "Feel This Moment" reaching top 10 in multiple countries, solidifying Pitbull's status as an international dance-pop star.
items.artistIntroZh: Pitbull（原名Armando Christian Pérez），美国说唱歌手、词曲作者和商人，以融合拉丁节奏与嘻哈的派对音乐闻名。他出生于古巴移民家庭，凭借《Give Me Everything》等热单成为全球巨星，并涉足演艺和品牌代言。
items.artistIntroEn: Pitbull (Armando Christian Pérez) is an American rapper, songwriter, and entrepreneur known for his party anthems blending Latin rhythms with hip-hop. Born to Cuban immigrants, he rose to global fame with hits like "Give Me Everything," also venturing into acting and endorsements.

items.name: The Freddie Mercury Album
items.descriptionZh: 《The Freddie Mercury Album》是1992年发行的精选集，收录了Freddie Mercury个人生涯中的经典作品，包括《Barcelona》和《Living on My Own》。风格横跨摇滚、歌剧和流行，展现了他作为全能艺术家的非凡魅力，是对其传奇生涯的深情致敬。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1992, "The Freddie Mercury Album" compiles classics from Freddie Mercury's solo career, including "Barcelona" and "Living on My Own." Spanning rock, opera, and pop, it showcases his extraordinary versatility and serves as a heartfelt tribute to his legendary legacy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中《Barcelona》是Freddie与女高音Montserrat Caballé的合作，最初是为1992年巴塞罗那奥运会创作的主题曲。录制时，两人在录音棚里即兴飙高音，Freddie甚至开玩笑说‘这比Queen的演唱会还难’。专辑发行时，距他去世仅一年，成为歌迷的珍贵纪念。
items.storiesEn: The track "Barcelona" was a collaboration with soprano Montserrat Caballé, originally intended as the anthem for the 1992 Olympics. During recording, they improvised high notes, with Freddie joking, "This is harder than a Queen show." Released a year after his death, it became a cherished keepsake for fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国和欧洲多国夺冠，进一步巩固了Freddie Mercury作为摇滚史上最伟大主唱之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album topped charts in the UK and several European countries, further cementing Freddie Mercury's status as one of rock's greatest frontmen.
items.artistIntroZh: Freddie Mercury（原名Farrokh Bulsara），英国歌手、词曲作者，Queen乐队主唱。他以惊人的四音域嗓音、华丽的舞台表演和经典作品《Bohemian Rhapsody》闻名，被誉为史上最伟大的摇滚歌手之一，1991年因艾滋病去世。
items.artistIntroEn: Freddie Mercury (Farrokh Bulsara) was a British singer and songwriter, lead vocalist of Queen. Renowned for his four-octave voice, flamboyant stage presence, and classics like "Bohemian Rhapsody," he is considered one of the greatest rock singers ever. He died of AIDS in 1991.

items.name: 100,000,000 Bon Jovi Fans Can't Be Wrong
items.descriptionZh: 《100,000,000 Bon Jovi Fans Can't Be Wrong》是Bon Jovi在2004年发行的精选集，包含四张CD共50首歌曲，涵盖未发行曲目、B面和现场录音。风格以硬摇滚和流行摇滚为主，展现了乐队从80年代到2000年代初的创作广度，是对忠实乐迷的豪华回馈。
items.descriptionEn: "100,000,000 Bon Jovi Fans Can't Be Wrong" is a 2004 box set by Bon Jovi, featuring 50 tracks across 4 CDs, including unreleased songs, B-sides, and live recordings. Rooted in hard rock and pop rock, it showcases the band's creative range from the '80s to early 2000s, a lavish gift for loyal fans.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源自乐队核心Jon Bon Jovi的一句玩笑话：‘一亿邦乔维乐迷不可能都错’。录制时，乐队从仓库翻出多年未公开的磁带，其中一首《Love Ain't Nothing But a Four Letter Word》是Jon在1993年写完后遗忘的。制作人笑称这是‘考古式录音’。
items.storiesEn: The title came from Jon Bon Jovi's joke: "100 million Bon Jovi fans can't be wrong." During production, the band dug up long-forgotten tapes from storage. One track, "Love Ain't Nothing But a Four Letter Word," was written in 1993 and then forgotten. The producer called it "archaeological recording."
items.historicalImpactZh: 该套装获得了美国唱片业协会白金认证，证明了Bon Jovi在乐迷中的持久影响力。
items.historicalImpactEn: The box set earned Platinum certification from the RIAA, proving Bon Jovi's enduring influence among fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Bon Jovi是一支美国摇滚乐队，1983年成立于新泽西，主唱Jon Bon Jovi为核心。以《Livin' on a Prayer》《It's My Life》等金曲闻名，融合硬摇滚与流行旋律，全球销量超过1.3亿张，是史上最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Bon Jovi is an American rock band formed in New Jersey in 1983, fronted by Jon Bon Jovi. Known for hits like "Livin' on a Prayer" and "It's My Life," they blend hard rock with pop melodies, selling over 130 million albums worldwide, making them one of rock's most successful acts.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是ABBA在1975年发行的首张精选集，收录了《SOS》《Mamma Mia》等早期经典。风格以瑞典流行和迪斯���为主，旋律优美、和声精致，是ABBA音乐黄金期的浓缩，也是他们走向国际市场的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Greatest Hits" is ABBA's first compilation album, released in 1975, featuring early classics like "SOS" and "Mamma Mia." With Swedish pop and disco influences, its melodic harmonies capture ABBA's golden era, marking their breakthrough into the international market.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，ABBA的成员关系正经历微妙变化，但他们在录音棚里依然默契十足。据说《SOS》的吉他即兴段是Björn在吃早餐时哼出来的。专辑封面由摄影师Lars Falck拍摄，他让四人站在雪地里，结果拍完大家都冻得直跺脚。
items.storiesEn: During recording, ABBA's members were navigating subtle relationship changes but remained tight in the studio. The guitar riff for "SOS" was reportedly hummed by Björn over breakfast. Photographer Lars Falck shot the cover in snow, leaving everyone stomping their feet from cold afterward.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国排行榜上停留了超过500周，是英国历史上最畅销的专辑之一，确立了ABBA作为全球流行文化符号的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album spent over 500 weeks on the UK charts, becoming one of the best-selling albums in British history and cementing ABBA as a global pop culture icon.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典流行乐队，1972年成立，由Agnetha、Björn、Benny和Anni-Frid组成。以《Dancing Queen》等迪斯科金曲闻名，和声华丽、旋律上口，全球销量超过4亿张，是瑞典最成功的音乐出口，2010年入选摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop band formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha, Björn, Benny, and Anni-Frid. Known for disco hits like "Dancing Queen," their lush harmonies and catchy melodies have sold over 400 million records worldwide, making them Sweden's biggest musical export and Rock & Roll Hall of Fame inductees (2010).

items.name: Achtung Baby
items.descriptionZh: 《Achtung Baby》是U2在1991年发行的第七张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从后朋克转向另类摇滚和电子实验风格。专辑融合工业噪音、舞曲节奏和迷幻元素，歌词探讨爱情、信仰与政治，被誉为U2最具艺术突破性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Achtung Baby" is U2's seventh studio album, released in 1991, marking a shift from post-punk to alternative rock with electronic experimentation. Blending industrial noise, dance beats, and psychedelic elements, its lyrics explore love, faith, and politics, hailed as one of U2's most artistically groundbreaking works.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程充满紧张与创意碰撞。乐队在柏林Hansa录音棚工作，因风格分歧几乎解散。关键转折点发生在某天吉他手The Edge即兴弹出一段旋律，Bono立刻填词，诞生了经典《One》。录音棚里大家相拥而泣，团队重拾信心。
items.storiesEn: Recording was tense and creative. At Berlin's Hansa Studios, the band nearly split over stylistic differences. The turning point came when guitarist The Edge improvised a riff; Bono quickly wrote lyrics, birthing the classic "One." The team embraced, crying in the studio, restoring their confidence.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1800万张，获格莱美奖，单曲《One》被《滚石》评为史上最伟大歌曲之一，深刻影响了90年代另类摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 18 million copies worldwide, won a Grammy, and "One" was named one of the greatest songs ever by Rolling Stone, profoundly influencing '90s alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: U2是一支爱尔兰摇滚乐队，1976年成立于都柏林，成员包括Bono、The Edge、Adam Clayton和Larry Mullen Jr.。以社会政治主题、宏大现场演出和《With or Without You》等经典闻名，全球销量超1.7亿张，是史上最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 is an Irish rock band formed in Dublin in 1976, consisting of Bono, The Edge, Adam Clayton, and Larry Mullen Jr. Known for socio-political themes, epic live shows, and classics like "With or Without You," they have sold over 170 million records, ranking among the most successful bands ever.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 这张精选集收录了Red Hot Chili Peppers在1991年至2002年间最成功的单曲，融合了放克摇滚、朋克和另类摇滚，节奏强劲、旋律抓耳，展现了乐队标志性的跳跃贝斯线和激情演唱。
items.descriptionEn: This greatest hits compilation features the band's most successful singles from 1991 to 2002, blending funk rock, punk, and alternative rock with driving rhythms, catchy melodies, and signature slap bass lines.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由著名街头艺术家Shepard Fairey设计，他曾为奥巴马创作“希望”海报。录制期间，吉他手John Frusciante正处于创作巅峰，但他在2002年巡演后短暂离队，这张精选集成为他第一次离队前的完美总结。
items.storiesEn: The cover was designed by renowned street artist Shepard Fairey, who later created Obama's 'Hope' poster. During this period, guitarist John Frusciante was at his creative peak but briefly left after the 2002 tour, making this compilation a perfect summary of his first era.
items.historicalImpactZh: 全球销量超过1300万张，是21世纪初最成功的摇滚精选集之一，巩固了乐队在另类摇滚史上的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Sold over 13 million copies worldwide, one of the most successful rock compilations of the early 2000s, cementing the band's legacy in alternative rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: Red Hot Chili Peppers成立于1983年洛杉矶，以放克摇滚、朋克和说唱融合著称。乐队成员多次更迭，但主唱Anthony Kiedis和贝斯手Flea始终是核心，他们的现场表演充满能量与即兴。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in Los Angeles in 1983, Red Hot Chili Peppers are known for blending funk rock, punk, and rap. Despite numerous lineup changes, vocalist Anthony Kiedis and bassist Flea have remained core members, delivering energetic and improvisational live performances.

items.name: Volts
items.descriptionZh: 《Volts》是AC/DC的罕见混音专辑，收录了乐队经典曲目的重新编排版本，风格偏向电子摇滚和实验性音效，节奏更厚重，人声处理更具空间感，展现了硬摇滚的另一面。
items.descriptionEn: Volts is a rare remix album featuring reworked versions of AC/DC's classic tracks, leaning toward electronic rock and experimental sounds with heavier rhythms and spatial vocal treatments, showing a different side of hard rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑最初是1997年《Bonfire》套装的一部分，仅作为限量版发行，并未单独上市。混音师利用多轨原始录音，加入了额外���吉他叠录和电子效果，但乐队后来对此类实验持保留态度，因此专辑极其稀有。
items.storiesEn: Originally part of the 1997 'Bonfire' box set, it was released only as a limited edition and never sold separately. The remixers used multi-track original recordings, adding extra guitar overdubs and electronic effects, but the band later expressed reservations about such experiments, making the album extremely rare.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是1973年成立于澳大利亚悉尼的硬摇滚乐队，由Malcolm和Angus Young兄弟创立。以简单直接的强力和弦、Angus的校服造型和标志性舞台表演闻名，专辑《Back in Black》是史上最畅销的摇滚专辑之一。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is a hard rock band formed in Sydney, Australia in 1973 by brothers Malcolm and Angus Young. Known for straightforward power chords, Angus's schoolboy uniform, and iconic stage antics, their album 'Back in Black' is one of the best-selling rock albums of all time.

items.name: Unapologetic
items.descriptionZh: 《Unapologetic》是Rihanna的第七张录音室专辑，融合流行、R&B、舞曲和雷鬼，歌词大胆直白，探讨爱情、争议与自我解放。制作精良，旋律上口，是2010年代流行女王的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Unapologetic is Rihanna's seventh studio album, blending pop, R&B, dance, and reggae with bold, direct lyrics exploring love, controversy, and self-liberation. Well-produced with catchy melodies, it's a defining work of the 2010s pop queen.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Rihanna与Chris Brown短暂复合，引发巨大争议。主打歌《Diamonds》由Sia创作，原本是为自己专辑准备的，但Rihanna听到后坚持要唱。专辑封面由Rihanna本人用手机拍摄，展现了她随性的一面。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Rihanna briefly reconciled with Chris Brown, sparking major controversy. The lead single 'Diamonds' was written by Sia for her own album, but Rihanna insisted on recording it after hearing it. The album cover was taken by Rihanna herself with a phone, showing her casual side.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周空降Billboard 200冠军，是Rihanna首张冠军专辑，并凭借《Diamonds》在全球获得巨大成功，巩固了她作为流行天后的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, Rihanna's first chart-topping album, and achieved global success with 'Diamonds', solidifying her status as a pop diva.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna出生于巴巴多斯，2005年凭借《Pon de Replay》出道，迅速成为全球流行偶像。她以多变的音乐风格、大胆的时尚选择和商业帝国闻名，是21世纪最畅销的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Born in Barbados, Rihanna debuted in 2005 with 'Pon de Replay' and quickly became a global pop icon. Known for her versatile music style, bold fashion choices, and business empire, she is one of the best-selling artists of the 21st century.

items.name: D-Sides
items.descriptionZh: 《D-Sides》是Gorillaz的B面与混音合集，收录了《Demon Days》时期未收录曲目及多首混音，风格涵盖另类摇滚、电子、嘻哈和世界音乐，实验性强，氛围迷幻。
items.descriptionEn: D-Sides is a collection of B-sides and remixes from the Gorillaz 'Demon Days' era, featuring unreleased tracks and various remixes. The style spans alternative rock, electronic, hip-hop, and world music, with strong experimental and psychedelic vibes.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本只是为铁杆粉丝准备的限量发行，但后来因需求量大而广泛上市。其中《68 State》是一首关于美国各州的幽默说唱，而《Hong Kong》则是乐队在香港现场录制的，灵感来自当地夜市。
items.storiesEn: Originally intended as a limited release for hardcore fans, it was later widely released due to high demand. '68 State' is a humorous rap about U.S. states, while 'Hong Kong' was recorded live in Hong Kong, inspired by local night markets.
items.artistIntroZh: Gorillaz是2000年由Damon Albarn和漫画家Jamie Hewlett创立的虚拟乐队，成员由四个动画角色组成。音乐融合多种流派，以概念专辑和多媒体项目闻名，是虚拟乐队文化的开创者。
items.artistIntroEn: Gorillaz is a virtual band created in 2000 by Damon Albarn and cartoonist Jamie Hewlett, consisting of four animated characters. Their music blends multiple genres, and they are known for concept albums and multimedia projects, pioneering virtual band culture.

items.name: Year Zero Remixed
items.descriptionZh: 《Year Zero Remixed》是Nine Inch Nails对2007年概念专辑《Year Zero》的官方混音版，由多位电子、工业音乐人重新诠释，保留了原作的 dystopian 主题，加入了更强烈的电子节拍和噪音实验。
items.descriptionEn: Year Zero Remixed is the official remix album of Nine Inch Nails' 2007 concept album 'Year Zero', reinterpreted by various electronic and industrial artists. It retains the original dystopian themes while adding stronger electronic beats and noise experiments.
items.storiesZh: Trent Reznor在完成《Year Zero》后，邀请多位音乐人自由混音，并给予完全创作自由。混音版中收录了Saul Williams、Puscifer等艺术家的版本，其中一些混音在巡演中被用作开场曲。专辑还附带了隐藏的ARG线索。
items.storiesEn: After completing 'Year Zero', Trent Reznor invited various musicians to freely remix the tracks, giving them complete creative freedom. The remix album features versions by Saul Williams, Puscifer, and others, some of which were used as openers on tour. The album also included hidden ARG clues.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为《Year Zero》跨媒体项目的一部分，这张混音专辑进一步扩展了专辑的反乌托邦世界观，推动了工业音乐与电子音乐的跨界实验。
items.historicalImpactEn: As part of the 'Year Zero' transmedia project, this remix album further expanded the album's dystopian world-building and pushed the crossover experiment between industrial and electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Nine Inch Nails由Trent Reznor于1988年在美国俄亥俄州创立，是工业摇滚的代表乐队。Reznor是核心创作人，音乐风格阴暗、实验，融合电子、噪音和摇滚，多次获得格莱美奖，并为多部电影配乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Nine Inch Nails was founded by Trent Reznor in 1988 in Ohio, USA, and is a representative industrial rock band. Reznor is the primary creative force, known for dark, experimental music blending electronic, noise, and rock. He has won multiple Grammy Awards and scored several films.

items.name: Missundaztood
items.descriptionZh: 《Missundaztood》是Pink的第二张录音室专辑，风格从早期的R&B转向流行摇滚与朋克元素，展现了她叛逆、直率的个性。歌词大胆探讨了家庭矛盾、自我认同与社会议题，充满情感冲击力。
items.descriptionEn: "Missundaztood" is Pink's second studio album, shifting from early R&B to pop rock and punk influences, showcasing her rebellious and straightforward personality. The lyrics boldly explore family conflicts, self-identity, and social issues, delivering strong emotional impact.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Pink与制作人Linda Perry合作紧密，两人在洛杉矶的录音室里经常即兴创作。有一次，Pink因为情绪激动在录音时摔坏了麦克风，但这一片段被保留下来，成为了歌曲《Don't Let Me Get Me》中的真实情感瞬间。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Pink worked closely with producer Linda Perry, often improvising in a Los Angeles studio. One time, Pink smashed a microphone in frustration during a session, but the moment was kept and became a raw emotional highlight in the song "Don't Let Me Get Me."
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张��辑标志���Pink从商业流行歌手转型为具有个人风格的摇滚偶像，影响了2000年代初期女性流行摇滚的走向。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Pink's transformation from a commercial pop singer to a rock icon with a distinct style, influencing the direction of female pop rock in the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink（原名Alecia Beth Moore），美国歌手、词曲作者，以大胆的舞台表演和反叛形象著称。她的音乐融合流行、摇滚与R&B，多次获得格莱美奖，是全球最具影响力的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink (born Alecia Beth Moore) is an American singer and songwriter known for her bold stage presence and rebellious image. Her music blends pop, rock, and R&B, and she has won multiple Grammy Awards, making her one of the most influential female artists globally.

items.name: Rarities 1971–2003
items.descriptionZh: 《Rarities 1971–2003》是滚石乐队的一张精选合辑，收录了1971年至2003年间未发行或罕见的录音室作品、现场版本和B面曲目。风格横跨经典摇滚、布鲁斯与乡村，展现了乐队多变的音乐探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Rarities 1971–2003" is a compilation album by The Rolling Stones, featuring unreleased or rare studio recordings, live versions, and B-sides from 1971 to 2003. The style spans classic rock, blues, and country, showcasing the band's diverse musical exploration.
items.storiesZh: 合辑中的许多曲目是从乐队庞大的私人档案中挖掘出来的，包括一首1973年录制的未发行歌曲《Tops》，原本计划用于专辑《Goats Head Soup》但最终被搁置。吉他手Keith Richards在整理磁带时发现了这段录音，感叹“像是找到了丢失的宝藏”。
items.storiesEn: Many tracks were unearthed from the band's vast private archives, including an unreleased 1973 song "Tops," originally planned for the album "Goats Head Soup" but shelved. Guitarist Keith Richards discovered the tape while organizing, calling it "like finding lost treasure."
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队（The Rolling Stones）成立于1962年，是英国传奇摇滚乐队，以硬朗的布鲁斯摇滚风格和叛逆形象闻名。主唱Mick Jagger与吉他手Keith Richards的创作组合定义了数代摇滚乐，至今仍在全球巡演。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in 1962, are a legendary British rock band known for their hard-driving blues-rock style and rebellious image. The songwriting duo of Mick Jagger and Keith Richards has defined generations of rock music, and the band continues to tour globally.

items.name: A Night at the Opera
items.descriptionZh: 《A Night at the Opera》是Queen的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了前卫摇滚、歌剧、硬摇滚与民谣，以华丽的多声部编曲和实验性制作著称。专辑中的《Bohemian Rhapsody》成为摇滚史上最具标志性的歌曲之一。
items.descriptionEn: "A Night at the Opera" is Queen's fourth studio album, blending progressive rock, opera, hard rock, and folk, known for its lavish multi-part arrangements and experimental production. The song "Bohemian Rhapsody" became one of the most iconic tracks in rock history.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Bohemian Rhapsody》时，乐队使用了超过180个独立音轨，由于当时模拟录音技术的限制，磁带经过多次叠加后几乎透明。制作人Roy Thomas Baker回忆说，工程师们不得不反复倒带检查，生怕磁带断裂。
items.storiesEn: Recording "Bohemian Rhapsody" involved over 180 separate tracks; due to analog limitations, the tape became nearly transparent after multiple overdubs. Producer Roy Thomas Baker recalled engineers constantly rewinding to check, fearing the tape would break.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是Queen的巅峰之作，重新定义了摇滚专辑的艺���可能性，特别是《Bohemian Rhapsody》打破了单曲结构与商业常规，成为文化符号。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as Queen's masterpiece, this album redefined the artistic possibilities of a rock album. "Bohemian Rhapsody" broke single structure and commercial norms, becoming a cultural icon.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen是英国摇滚乐队，1970年成立，由主唱Freddie Mercury、吉他手Brian May、鼓手Roger Taylor和贝斯手John Deacon组成。他们以华丽的舞台表演、复杂的和声与跨流派创新闻名，全球销量超过3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen is a British rock band formed in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), Roger Taylor (drums), and John Deacon (bass). Known for spectacular live shows, complex harmonies, and genre-crossing innovation, they have sold over 300 million records worldwide.

items.name: Dangerous
items.descriptionZh: 《Dangerous》是Michael Jackson的第八张录音室专辑，融合了流行、R&B、新杰克摇摆舞曲与工业音乐元素。专辑制作精良，歌词涉及社会正义、爱情与个人反思，展现了Jackson音乐上的成熟与野心。
items.descriptionEn: "Dangerous" is Michael Jackson's eighth studio album, blending pop, R&B, new jack swing, and industrial music elements. Meticulously produced, the lyrics address social justice, love, and personal reflection, showcasing Jackson's musical maturity and ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的《Black or White》MV因包含种族融合与暴力转换镜头引发争议，Jackson不得不重新剪辑。此外，他与制作人Teddy Riley在录音室经常工作到凌晨，有一次因为过度疲劳，Jackson在沙发上睡着，Riley则继续调音直到天亮。
items.storiesEn: The video for "Black or White" sparked controversy for its racial fusion and violent morphing scenes, forcing Jackson to re-edit. He and producer Teddy Riley often worked until dawn; once, Jackson fell asleep on the couch while Riley continued tweaking the mix until morning.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Dangerous》巩固了Jackson作为流行之王的地位，其音乐录影带和制作水准对1990年代流行音乐产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Dangerous" solidified Jackson's status as the King of Pop, and its music videos and production standards profoundly influenced 1990s pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009），美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行之王”。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和突破性的音乐录影带改变了流行文化，是史上最畅销的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer and dancer known as the "King of Pop." With his distinctive voice, iconic dance moves (like the moonwalk), and groundbreaking music videos, he transformed pop culture and remains one of the best-selling artists of all time.

items.name: Girl on Fire
items.descriptionZh: 《Girl on Fire》是Alicia Keys的第五张录音室专辑，风格以R&B、灵魂乐为主，融入流行与嘻哈元素。专辑主题围绕女性力量、自我重生与爱情，歌声充满感染力与韧性，展现了Keys作为创作歌手的深度。
items.descriptionEn: "Girl on Fire" is Alicia Keys' fifth studio album, primarily R&B and soul, infused with pop and hip-hop elements. The album's themes revolve around female empowerment, personal rebirth, and love, with vocals that are both powerful and resilient, showcasing Keys' depth as a singer-songwriter.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Girl on Fire》最初灵感来自Keys的儿子Egypt，她希望创作一首鼓励女性勇敢追梦的歌。录制时，Keys坚持用一架老旧的立式钢琴录音，因为她觉得那种略微失真的音色更能传递情感。制作人Swizz Beatz后来笑称这架钢琴“比我们俩加起来还老”。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Girl on Fire" was inspired by Keys' son Egypt; she wanted to create an anthem encouraging women to pursue their dreams. During recording, Keys insisted on using an old upright piano, believing its slightly distorted tone conveyed more emotion. Producer Swizz Beatz later joked the piano was "older than both of us combined."
items.artistIntroZh: Alicia Keys，美国R&B歌手、钢琴家、词曲作者，生于1981年。她以融合古典钢琴与灵魂乐的独特风格闻名，首张专辑《Songs in A Minor》即获五座格莱美奖。她也是社会活动家，致力于女性权益与教育公益。
items.artistIntroEn: Alicia Keys is an American R&B singer, pianist, and songwriter, born in 1981. Known for blending classical piano with soul music, her debut album "Songs in A Minor" won five Grammy Awards. She is also an activist, advocating for women's rights and education.

items.name: Hypnotize
items.descriptionZh: 《Hypnotize》是System of a Down的第五张录音室专辑，延续了乐队标志性的重金属与另类摇滚风格，融合政治讽刺与超现实主义歌词。专辑节奏紧凑，旋律抓耳，吉他Riff充满攻击性，主唱Serj Tankian的嘶吼与清嗓交替，营造出狂乱而富有张力的听感。
items.descriptionEn: Hypnotize is System of a Down's fifth studio album, continuing their signature blend of heavy metal and alternative rock with politically charged and surreal lyrics. The album features tight rhythms, catchy melodies, aggressive guitar riffs, and Serj Tankian's dynamic vocal shifts between screams and clean singing, creating a chaotic yet compelling sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑与《Mezmerize》原本计划作为一张双碟专辑发行，但最终拆分为两张独立专辑，分别在2005年5月和11月发布。录制过程充满实验性，乐队成员经常即兴创作，甚至将排练时的玩笑片段融入正式曲目。
items.storiesEn: This album was originally planned as a double-disc set with Mezmerize, but was split into two separate releases in May and November 2005. The recording sessions were highly experimental, with band members often improvising and even incorporating jokes from rehearsals into final tracks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为乐队解散前的最后一张专辑，它巩固了SOAD在政治金属领域的地位，并影响了后来的新金属和另类摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the band's final album before their hiatus, it solidified SOAD's legacy in political metal and influenced later nu-metal and alternative rock acts.
items.artistIntroZh: System of a Down是一支美国重金属乐队，成立于1994年，以反战、反独裁的歌词和融合亚美尼亚民族音乐元素著称。成员包括Serj Tankian（主唱）、Daron Malakian（吉他手）、Shavo Odadjian（贝斯手）和John Dolmayan（鼓手）。
items.artistIntroEn: System of a Down is an American heavy metal band formed in 1994, known for anti-war, anti-authoritarian lyrics and incorporation of Armenian folk music. Members include Serj Tankian (vocals), Daron Malakian (guitar), Shavo Odadjian (bass), and John Dolmayan (drums).

items.name: Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set
items.descriptionZh: 《Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set》是Metallica于2004年发行的限量黑胶套装，收录了乐队前五张录音室专辑的重制版。盒装设计精美，包含独家艺术印刷品和纪念品，音质经过重新母带处理，专为收藏家和黑胶爱好者打造。
items.descriptionEn: The Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set is a 2004 release by Metallica, featuring remastered vinyl editions of their first five studio albums. The box set boasts exquisite packaging, exclusive art prints, and memorabilia, with audio remastered specifically for vinyl enthusiasts and collectors.
items.storiesZh: 这套盒装仅发行了5000套，每套都有独立编号。制作过程中，乐队亲自监督了黑胶母盘的切割，以确保最佳音质。由于需求极高，发行后迅速售罄，如今在二手市场价值不菲。
items.storiesEn: Only 5,000 numbered copies were produced, each individually numbered. The band personally supervised the vinyl mastering to ensure optimal sound quality. Due to high demand, the set sold out immediately upon release and now commands high prices on the secondary market.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica是美国殿堂级重金属乐队，1981年成立于洛杉矶，是激流金属“四巨头”之一。成员包括James Hetfield（主唱/吉他手）、Lars Ulrich（鼓手）、Kirk Hammett（主音吉他手）和Robert Trujillo（贝斯手）。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica is an American heavy metal band formed in Los Angeles in 1981, one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal. Members include James Hetfield (vocals/guitar), Lars Ulrich (drums), Kirk Hammett (lead guitar), and Robert Trujillo (bass).

items.name: A Collection of Great Dance Songs
items.descriptionZh: 《A Collection of Great Dance Songs》是Pink Floyd于1981年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1970年代至1980年代初期的热门单曲，如《Another Brick in the Wall, Part 2》和《Money》。专辑名称虽有“舞曲”二字，但实际风格以前卫摇滚和迷幻摇滚为主，节奏舒缓而富有意境。
items.descriptionEn: A Collection of Great Dance Songs is a 1981 compilation by Pink Floyd, featuring hit singles from the 1970s and early 1980s, including 'Another Brick in the Wall, Part 2' and 'Money'. Despite the title, the music is primarily progressive and psychedelic rock, known for its atmospheric and laid-back grooves.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称颇具讽刺意味，因为Pink Floyd的音乐并不以舞曲著称。实际上，这个标题是唱片公司为了商业推广而起的噱头。专辑中《Money》的版本经过重新混音，加入了新的萨克斯独奏。
items.storiesEn: The album title was ironically chosen by the record label for commercial appeal, as Pink Floyd's music is not dance-oriented. The version of 'Money' on this compilation was remixed with a new saxophone solo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集帮助Pink Floyd在1980年代初期维持了商业热度，为新专辑《The Final Cut》的发行铺垫了市场基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation helped maintain Pink Floyd's commercial momentum in the early 1980s, paving the way for their next album, The Final Cut.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd是英国前卫摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦，以概念专辑、哲学歌词和宏大的现场演出闻名。核心成员包括Roger Waters（贝斯手/主唱）、David Gilmour（吉他手/主唱）、Nick Mason（鼓手）和Richard Wright（键盘手）。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is an English progressive rock band formed in London in 1965, renowned for concept albums, philosophical lyrics, and grandiose live shows. Core members include Roger Waters (bass/vocals), David Gilmour (guitar/vocals), Nick Mason (drums), and Richard Wright (keyboards).

items.name: For Those About to Rock We Salute You
items.descriptionZh: 《For Those About to Rock We Salute You》是AC/DC的第八张录音室专辑，延续了乐队标志性的硬摇滚风格，充满力量感的吉他Riff、粗粝的嗓音和直白的歌词。专辑同名曲以炮声开场，成为乐队现场演出的经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: For Those About to Rock We Salute You is AC/DC's eighth studio album, maintaining their signature hard rock sound with powerful guitar riffs, gritty vocals, and straightforward lyrics. The title track opens with cannon fire and became a staple of the band's live performances.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Brian Johnson曾因过度用嗓导致声带受损，但依然坚持完成录制。同名曲中使用的加农炮声效是在录音室用真炮录制，后期经过处理以增强冲击力。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead singer Brian Johnson strained his vocal cords but continued to finish the album. The cannon sound effects on the title track were recorded using real cannons in the studio, then processed for maximum impact.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在全球销量超过700万张，巩固了AC/DC在硬摇滚领域的王者地位，同名曲成为摇滚史上最经典的安可曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 7 million copies worldwide, cementing AC/DC's status as hard rock royalty, and the title track became one of rock's most iconic encore songs.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是澳大利亚硬摇滚乐队，1973年成立于悉尼，以电力十足的舞台表演和简洁有力的摇滚乐著称。成员包括Angus Young（主音吉他手）、Brian Johnson（主唱）、Cliff Williams（贝斯手）和Phil Rudd（鼓手）。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is an Australian hard rock band formed in Sydney in 1973, famous for electrifying live shows and no-frills rock music. Members include Angus Young (lead guitar), Brian Johnson (vocals), Cliff Williams (bass), and Phil Rudd (drums).

items.name: Garage Inc.
items.descriptionZh: 《Garage Inc.》是Metallica于1998年发行的翻唱专辑，收录了乐队多年来录制的各类翻唱作品，涵盖朋克、硬摇滚、重金属等多种风格。专辑分为CD1和CD2，CD1为新录制的翻唱，CD2为早期B面曲和现场录音合集。
items.descriptionEn: Garage Inc. is a 1998 cover album by Metallica, compiling their cover songs recorded over the years across punk, hard rock, and heavy metal genres. The album is split into two discs: CD1 features newly recorded covers, while CD2 collects early B-sides and live recordings.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Metallica邀请了多位原曲作者参与，例如与Mercyful Fate的King Diamond合作翻唱《Mercyful Fate》组曲。乐队还专门租用了一间旧车库作为录音棚，以还原原始的音质氛围。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Metallica invited several original songwriters to participate, such as collaborating with King Diamond of Mercyful Fate on a medley of his songs. The band also rented an old garage as their studio to recreate an authentic raw sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑展示了Metallica广泛的音乐品味，影响了后来的金属乐队更频繁地通过翻唱向经典致敬。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album showcased Metallica's broad musical influences and encouraged later metal bands to pay homage to classics through covers.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica是美国殿堂级重金属乐队，1981年成立于洛杉矶，是激流金属“四巨头”之一。成员包括James Hetfield（主唱/吉他手）、Lars Ulrich（鼓手）、Kirk Hammett（主音吉他手）和Robert Trujillo（贝斯手）。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica is an American heavy metal band formed in Los Angeles in 1981, one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal. Members include James Hetfield (vocals/guitar), Lars Ulrich (drums), Kirk Hammett (lead guitar), and Robert Trujillo (bass).

items.name: Soundtrack to the Apocalypse
items.descriptionZh: 《Soundtrack to the Apocalypse》是Slayer于2003年发行的豪华精选集，涵盖乐队1986至2003年的经典曲目、未发行Demo及现场录音。风格以极速鞭击金属为核心，充满暴戾的吉他Riff、双踩鼓点和狂怒嘶吼，呈现末日般的压迫感。这套四CD盒装不仅是乐迷的收藏圣经，更是Slayer黑暗美学的终极总结。
items.descriptionEn: Soundtrack to the Apocalypse is a deluxe compilation by Slayer, released in 2003, covering classic tracks from 1986 to 2003, unreleased demos, and live recordings. Its core style is thrash metal at breakneck speed, filled with vicious guitar riffs, double-bass drumming, and furious vocals, delivering an apocalyptic sense of oppression. This four-CD box set is not only a collector's bible for fans but also the ultimate summary of Slayer's dark aesthetics.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，乐队从多年档案中挑选素材，发现了一批1980年代未公开的排练录音，其中包含一首从未正式发行的歌曲《War Ensemble》的原始版本。由于素材跨度极大，混音工程师不得不使用不同年代的设备来统一音质，甚至修复了一台1985年的老式磁���机。
items.storiesEn: During the production, the band dug through years of archives and discovered a batch of unreleased rehearsal tapes from the 1980s, including an early version of 'War Ensemble' that had never been officially issued. Due to the vast time span of the material, the mixing engineer had to use equipment from different eras to unify the sound quality, even restoring a vintage tape machine from 1985.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为鞭击金属史上最全面的精选集之一，它巩固了Slayer在极端金属领域的传奇地位，并为后续金属乐队的档案整理提供了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the most comprehensive compilations in thrash metal history, it cemented Slayer's legendary status in extreme metal and set a benchmark for archival releases by subsequent metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Slayer成立于1981年，是美国鞭击金属四巨头之一。以极速、暴力和黑暗主题著称，专辑《Reign in Blood》被视为流派里程碑。乐队历经多次成员更迭，但始终保持着极端的音乐风格，影响了无数金属乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1981, Slayer is one of the 'Big Four' of American thrash metal. Known for their speed, brutality, and dark themes, their album 'Reign in Blood' is considered a milestone of the genre. Despite multiple lineup changes, they have maintained an extreme musical style, influencing countless metal bands.

items.name: Take a Look in the Mirror
items.descriptionZh: 《Take a Look in the Mirror》是Korn于2003年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格延续了新金属标志性的沉重七弦吉他、嘻哈节奏和失真贝斯，但更注重旋律性与情绪爆发。歌词深入主唱Jonathan Davis的内心挣扎，探讨自我审视、成瘾与痛苦。专辑整体氛围阴暗而直接，是Korn中期转型的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: Take a Look in the Mirror is Korn's sixth studio album, released in 2003. It continues the nu-metal hallmarks of heavy seven-string guitar, hip-hop-influenced rhythms, and distorted bass, but with a greater emphasis on melody and emotional outburst. The lyrics delve into Jonathan Davis's inner struggles, exploring self-examination, addiction, and pain. The overall atmosphere is dark and direct, representing a mid-career transition for Korn.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队在洛杉矶的录音棚里尝试了前所未有的即兴创作方式——他们关掉所有灯光，只靠直觉演奏，最终催生了专辑中最阴郁的歌曲《Did My Time》。此外，主唱Jonathan Davis在录制《Break Some Off》时因情绪失控砸坏了麦克风，这个破损的录音反而被保留在最终版本中。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band experimented with an unprecedented improvisation method in a Los Angeles studio: they turned off all the lights and played purely by instinct, which gave birth to the album's darkest track, 'Did My Time.' Additionally, while recording 'Break Some Off,' frontman Jonathan Davis smashed a microphone in a fit of emotion, and the damaged recording was kept in the final version.
items.artistIntroZh: Korn成立于1993年，是美国新金属流派的开创者之一。他们以七弦吉他的沉重音色、独特节拍和Jonathan Davis充满痛苦的唱腔闻名，首张同名专辑奠定了新金属的基础。乐队至今活跃，持续影响另类摇滚与金属场景。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1993, Korn is one of the pioneers of the nu-metal genre. Known for the heavy sound of seven-string guitars, distinctive rhythms, and Jonathan Davis's anguished vocals, their self-titled debut album laid the foundation for nu-metal. The band remains active, continuing to influence alternative rock and metal scenes.

items.name: Steal This Album!
items.descriptionZh: 《Steal This Album!》是System of a Down于2002年发行的第三张专辑，风格融合另类金属、硬核朋克和亚美尼亚民族音乐。歌词充满政治讽刺、反战情绪和社会批判，音乐上则疯狂切换节奏与情绪，从狂暴嘶吼到优美旋律无缝衔接。专辑名称源自一次网络泄露事件，乐队决定将泄露曲目录制后正式发行。
items.descriptionEn: Steal This Album! is System of a Down's third album, released in 2002. Its style blends alternative metal, hardcore punk, and Armenian folk music. The lyrics are filled with political satire, anti-war sentiment, and social critique, while the music wildly shifts between tempo and mood, seamlessly transitioning from狂暴 screams to melodic passages. The album title stems from an online leak incident; the band decided to re-record the leaked tracks and release them officially.
items.storiesZh: 2002年初，专辑的Demo版本意外从制作人Rick Rubin的录音室泄露到互联网上，粉丝疯狂下载。乐队起初愤怒，但随后决定将这批未完成作品重新打磨，并故意取名为《Steal This Album!》作为对盗版行为的反讽。录制时，主唱Serj Tankian还因不满混音效果，在凌晨三点独自重录了整首《Mr. Jack》。
items.storiesEn: In early 2002, demo versions of the album accidentally leaked onto the internet from producer Rick Rubin's studio, causing a frenzy among fans. The band was initially furious but then decided to polish the unfinished tracks and deliberately named the album 'Steal This Album!' as an ironic response to piracy. During recording, frontman Serj Tankian, dissatisfied with the mix of 'Mr. Jack,' re-recorded the entire track alone at 3 a.m.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑名称和发行策略成为音乐界对抗网络泄露的经典案例，启发了其他乐队将意外泄露转化为营销机遇。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album's title and release strategy became a classic case of the music industry countering online leaks, inspiring other bands to turn accidental leaks into marketing opportunities.
items.artistIntroZh: System of a Down成立于1994年，由四位亚美尼亚裔美国音乐家组成。他们的音乐以独特的政治性和实验性著称，融合重金属、朋克和民族元素。2005年专辑《Mezmerize》和《Hypnotize》均获得格莱美奖，乐队至今拥有全球大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1994, System of a Down consists of four Armenian-American musicians. Their music is known for its distinct political edge and experimental nature, blending heavy metal, punk, and folk elements. Their 2005 albums 'Mezmerize' and 'Hypnotize' both won Grammy Awards, and the band maintains a massive global fanbase.

items.name: Bridge
items.descriptionZh: 《Bridge》是日本女子流行组合Speed于2003年发行的第四张原创专辑，风格以J-Pop、舞曲和节奏蓝调为主，融合了电子元素和青春活力的声线。专辑延续了她们标志性的快节奏流行舞曲，同时加入更多成熟的情感表达，展现了成员从少女向成年过渡的成长轨迹。
items.descriptionEn: Bridge is the fourth original album by Japanese girl group Speed, released in 2003. Its style is primarily J-Pop, dance, and R&B, incorporating electronic elements and youthful, energetic vocals. The album continues their signature upbeat dance-pop while adding more mature emotional expression, showcasing the members' transition from teenagers to adulthood.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，成员们首次尝试了独立作词，其中岛袋宽子为歌曲《One More Dream》写下了关于友情与离别的歌词，灵感来自她与即将毕业的中学同学的相处经历。专辑标题《Bridge》由全体成员投票选出，象征她们与粉丝之间的情感连接。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the members tried writing lyrics independently for the first time. Hiroko Shimabukuro penned the lyrics for 'One More Dream' about friendship and parting, inspired by her experiences with classmates who were about to graduate. The album title 'Bridge' was chosen by a vote among all members, symbolizing the emotional connection between them and their fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Speed解散前的最后一张原创专辑，《Bridge》被视为她们辉煌生涯的总结，对2000年代初的日本女子偶像组合产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the last original album before Speed's disbandment, 'Bridge' is regarded as a summary of their glorious career, exerting a profound influence on Japanese girl idol groups in the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Speed成立于1995年，是日本最具代表性的女子流行组合之一。由岛袋宽子、今井绘理子、上原多香子和新垣仁绘四人组成，以强劲的舞蹈和朗朗上口的旋律走红。1997年单曲《White Love》创下百万销量，乐队于2000年暂停活动，但至今仍被视为J-Pop黄金时代的象征。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1995, Speed is one of Japan's most iconic girl pop groups. Comprising Hiroko Shimabukuro, Eriko Imai, Takako Uehara, and Hitoe Arakaki, they rose to fame with powerful dance routines and catchy melodies. Their 1997 single 'White Love' sold over a million copies. The group went on hiatus in 2000 but remains a symbol of J-Pop's golden era.

items.name: One Touch
items.descriptionZh: 《One Touch》是英国女子组合Sugababes于2000年发行的首张专辑，风格融合当代节奏蓝调、流行、灵魂和2-step garage。专辑以青少年视角探讨人际关系、自我认同和成长困惑，声线融合了三位成员各具特色的音色——从Siobhan Donaghy的尖锐到Mutya Buena的醇厚。制作精良，被认为是英国流行灵魂乐复兴的先声。
items.descriptionEn: One Touch is the debut album by British girl group Sugababes, released in 2000. Its style blends contemporary R&B, pop, soul, and 2-step garage. The album explores relationships, self-identity, and growing pains from a teenage perspective, fusing the distinctive voices of the three members—from Siobhan Donaghy's sharp tone to Mutya Buena's rich warmth. Well-crafted, it is regarded as a precursor to the UK's pop-soul revival.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，三位成员年龄仅16至17岁，制作人Cameron McVey（前Massive Attack成员）特意营造了轻松的录音环境，让她们在写作业的间隙录唱。主打歌《Overload》的创作灵感来自成员们对校园生活的厌倦，她们用手机录下即兴哼唱，最终成为专辑最具辨识度的旋律。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the three members were only 16 to 17 years old. Producer Cameron McVey (former member of Massive Attack) intentionally created a relaxed studio environment, allowing them to record vocals between doing homework. The lead single 'Overload' was inspired by the members' boredom with school life; they recorded impromptu humming on their mobile phones, which eventually became the album's most recognizable melody.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《One Touch》被广泛认为是英国流行音乐复兴的重要里程碑，影响了后来如Little Mix等女子组合的音乐方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: One Touch is widely regarded as a key milestone in the revival of British pop music, influencing the musical direction of later girl groups such as Little Mix.
items.artistIntroZh: Sugababes成立于1998年，最初由Siobhan Donaghy、Mutya Buena和Keisha Buchanan三人组成。她们以独特的声线融合和成熟的R&B风格打破传统偶像模式，成为英国最成功的女子组合之一。尽管成员多次变动，但首张专辑《One Touch》至今被视为经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Sugababes were formed in 1998, originally consisting of Siobhan Donaghy, Mutya Buena, and Keisha Buchanan. Known for their unique vocal blend and mature R&B style, they broke the traditional girl group mold and became one of the UK's most successful acts. Despite numerous lineup changes, their debut album 'One Touch' remains a classic.

items.name: Q197623
items.descriptionZh: 《Nox Arcana》是Nox Arcana乐队2006年发行的同名专辑，融合了哥特式暗黑氛围、古典交响与电子合成器，营造出神秘而阴郁的中世纪奇幻世界。核心特色在于其电影般的叙事感，每首曲目都仿佛带领听众穿越幽灵古堡或迷雾森林。
items.descriptionEn: "Nox Arcana" is a 2006 self-titled album by Nox Arcana, blending gothic dark ambience, classical symphonics, and electronic synthesizers to create a mysterious, melancholic medieval fantasy world. Its core feature is cinematic storytelling, with each track guiding listeners through haunted castles or misty forests.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，乐队主创Joseph Vargo和William Piotrowski经常在深夜的录音室里点燃蜡烛，营造与音乐相符的诡异氛围。有一次，录音设备突然无故发出怪声，他们笑称是“幽灵调音师”来访，这段插曲后来被收录为专辑的隐藏音轨。
items.storiesEn: During recording, main creators Joseph Vargo and William Piotrowski often lit candles in the studio at midnight to match the eerie mood. Once, recording equipment suddenly emitted strange noises without reason; they joked it was a "ghost tuner" visiting, and later included this incident as a hidden track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为暗黑氛围音乐流派的代表作之一，影响了后续众多哥特与奇幻主题的游戏及影视配乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a landmark in dark ambient music, influencing many subsequent gothic and fantasy-themed game and film scores.
items.artistIntroZh: Nox Arcana由美国艺术家Joseph Vargo创立，以暗黑哥特风格闻名。乐队擅长将古典音乐、电子音效与神秘叙事结合，作品常围绕吸血鬼、幽灵船等传说主题，拥有大量全球范围内的暗黑文化爱好者。
items.artistIntroEn: Nox Arcana was founded by American artist Joseph Vargo, known for dark gothic style. The band excels at blending classical music, electronic effects, and mysterious narratives, often centering on legends like vampires and ghost ships, with a large global fan base in dark culture.

items.name: Girls' Generation II – Girls & Peace
items.descriptionZh: 《Girls' Generation II – Girls & Peace》是韩国女子组合少女时代2012年发行的日语专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合了电子、R&B和轻快的J-pop元素。核心特色是充满活力的节奏、甜美而有力的和声，以及展现成员个性魅力的多首主打歌。
items.descriptionEn: "Girls' Generation II – Girls & Peace" is a 2012 Japanese album by Girls' Generation, primarily pop dance with electronic, R&B, and upbeat J-pop elements. Its core features are energetic rhythms, sweet yet powerful harmonies, and multiple lead tracks showcasing each member's charm.
items.storiesZh: 录制主打歌《PAPARAZZI》时，成员们在录音棚里反复练习日语发音，尤其是“papapaparazzi”部分。为了达到完美同步，她们录制了数十遍，中间休息时还即兴玩起了“谁唱得最像机器人”的游戏，笑声不断。
items.storiesEn: While recording the lead track "PAPARAZZI," members repeatedly practiced Japanese pronunciation, especially the "papapaparazzi" part. To achieve perfect synchronization, they recorded dozens of takes, and during breaks improvised a game of "who sounds most like a robot," filling the studio with laughter.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是少女时代在日本市场的里程碑，助力她们成为首个在Oricon专辑榜夺冠的韩国女子组合，推动了K-pop在日本的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a milestone for Girls' Generation in Japan, making them the first Korean girl group to top the Oricon album chart, boosting K-pop's popularity in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代是韩国SM娱乐2007年推出的女子组合，由泰妍、Jessica等八名成员组成（后为八人）。她们以“国民女团”著称，凭借《Gee》《Genie》等神曲风靡亚洲，是K-pop第二代代表团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, originally with nine members (later eight). Known as the "National Girl Group," they dominated Asia with hits like "Gee" and "Genie," representing the second generation of K-pop.

items.name: Circus
items.descriptionZh: 《Circus》是美国流行天后布兰妮·斯皮尔斯2008年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合了电子、R&B和合成器流行。核心特色是马戏团主题的奇幻氛围，歌词探讨名声、自由与个人重生，节奏强劲且充满戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: "Circus" is Britney Spears' sixth studio album released in 2008, primarily pop dance with electronic, R&B, and synth-pop elements. Its core feature is a circus-themed fantasy atmosphere, with lyrics exploring fame, freedom, and personal rebirth, driven by powerful beats and theatrical flair.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，布兰妮正处于个人生活动荡期。制作人透露，她经常在录音棚里一边嚼口香糖一边即兴哼唱旋律，有时会突然跳起舞来。其中一首歌《Womanizer》的副歌部分，她坚持要录上20多遍，直到每个转音都“像奶油一样顺滑”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Britney was going through personal turmoil. Producers revealed she often chewed gum while improvising melodies in the studio, sometimes suddenly breaking into dance. For the chorus of "Womanizer," she insisted on over 20 takes until every vocal run was "as smooth as butter."
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑首周销量超50万张，帮助布兰妮从低谷中强势回归，并巩固了她作为2000年代流行符号的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 500,000 copies in its first week, marking a strong comeback for Britney from a low point and cementing her status as a 2000s pop icon.
items.artistIntroZh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯是美国流行歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行公主”。1998年凭借《...Baby One More Time》一炮而红，以性感形象和动感舞曲定义了千禧年流行文化，是史上最具影响力的女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American pop singer and dancer, known as the "Princess of Pop." She skyrocketed to fame in 1998 with "...Baby One More Time," defining millennial pop culture with her sexy image and energetic dance tracks, becoming one of the most influential female artists ever.

items.name: (An Imitation) Blood Orange
items.descriptionZh: 《(An Imitation) Blood Orange》是日本摇滚乐队Mr. Children 2012年发行的专辑，风格融合了流行摇滚、民谣和电子元素。核心特色是诗意的歌词探讨“模仿与真实”的哲学命题，旋律优美而富有层次，编曲细腻且充满实验性。
items.descriptionEn: "(An Imitation) Blood Orange" is a 2012 album by Japanese rock band Mr. Children, blending pop rock, folk, and electronic elements. Its core feature is poetic lyrics exploring the philosophical theme of "imitation vs. reality," with beautiful, layered melodies and intricate, experimental arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源自主唱樱井和寿在录音室里吃血橙时，突然想到“模仿”这个词。他即兴写下了歌词，乐队成员随后用一把老式吉他录制了demo。有趣的是，录音时一只野猫溜进棚里，趴在混音台旁听完了整首歌，被大家戏称为“第一位听众”。
items.storiesEn: The album title came when lead vocalist Kazutoshi Sakurai was eating a blood orange in the studio and suddenly thought of the word "imitation." He improvised lyrics, and the band recorded a demo with an old guitar. Interestingly, a stray cat slipped into the studio, lay by the mixing board, and listened to the whole song, jokingly called the "first listener."
items.artistIntroZh: Mr. Children是日本殿堂级摇滚乐队，1988年出道，由樱井和寿（主唱）、田原健一（吉他）、中川敬辅（贝斯）和铃木英哉（鼓）组成。他们以深刻歌词和多样曲风著称，是日本史上销量最高的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mr. Children is a legendary Japanese rock band formed in 1988, consisting of Kazutoshi Sakurai (vocals), Kenichi Tahara (guitar), Keisuke Nakagawa (bass), and Hideya Suzuki (drums). Known for profound lyrics and diverse styles, they are one of the best-selling bands in Japanese history.

items.name: Whatever
items.descriptionZh: 《Whatever》是美国流行摇滚乐队Hot Chelle Rae 2011年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚、流行朋克和电子舞曲为主。核心特色是轻松愉悦的夏日氛围、 catchy的吉他riff和充满活力的青春主题，主打歌《Tonight Tonight》成为全球热单。
items.descriptionEn: "Whatever" is the second studio album by American pop rock band Hot Chelle Rae, released in 2011, blending pop rock, pop punk, and electronic dance. Its core features are a carefree summer vibe, catchy guitar riffs, and energetic youthful themes, with lead single "Tonight Tonight" becoming a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Tonight Tonight》时，主唱Ryan Follese在录音棚里即兴加入了一句“Na na na”的哼唱，原本只是玩笑，但制作人觉得“太有记忆点”，最终保留为副歌标志性段落。乐队成员回忆，录完那天他们直接在棚里开了一场迷你派对庆祝。
items.storiesEn: While recording "Tonight Tonight," lead vocalist Ryan Follese improvised a "Na na na" chant as a joke, but the producer found it "too catchy" and kept it as the chorus's signature hook. Band members recalled throwing a mini party in the studio right after finishing the track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tonight Tonight》成为2011年夏季国歌之一，帮助Hot Chelle Rae获得格莱美提名，并推动了流行朋克与电子元素的融合趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Tonight Tonight" became one of the anthems of summer 2011, earning Hot Chelle Rae a Grammy nomination and promoting the fusion of pop punk with electronic elements.
items.artistIntroZh: Hot Chelle Rae是一支美国流行摇滚乐队，2005年成立于纳什维尔，由Ryan Follese（主唱/吉他）、Nash Overstreet（吉他/和声）、Ian Keaggy（贝斯）和Jamie Follese（鼓）组成。他们以阳光活力的现场表演和热门单曲闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Hot Chelle Rae is an American pop rock band formed in Nashville in 2005, consisting of Ryan Follese (vocals/guitar), Nash Overstreet (guitar/vocals), Ian Keaggy (bass), and Jamie Follese (drums). Known for sunny, energetic live shows and hit singles.

items.name: Thriller
items.descriptionZh: 《Thriller》是迈克尔·杰克逊1982年发行的第六张录音室专辑，融合流行、放克、摇滚与迪斯科，以极致的制作水准和跨类型创新定义了80年代流行音乐。专辑中的每一首歌曲都具备单曲潜力，从《Billie Jean》的律动到《Thriller》的恐怖主题MV，展现了音乐与视觉艺术的完美结合。
items.descriptionEn: Thriller is Michael Jackson's sixth studio album (1982), blending pop, funk, rock, and disco with meticulous production that defined 1980s pop music. Every track radiates hit potential, from the groove of 'Billie Jean' to the horror-themed music video of 'Thriller,' showcasing a seamless fusion of music and visual artistry.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，制作人昆西·琼斯要求杰克逊重录《Billie Jean》的人声多达91次，直到达到完美的呼吸控制。专辑同名曲《Thriller》的MV由约翰·兰迪斯执导，耗资50万美元，打破了种族与媒介界限，成为第一个进入美国国家电影登记局的音乐录影带。
items.storiesEn: During recording, producer Quincy Jones had Michael Jackson re-record the vocals for 'Billie Jean' 91 times to achieve perfect breath control. The music video for 'Thriller,' directed by John Landis, cost $500,000 and broke racial and media barriers, becoming the first music video inducted into the U.S. National Film Registry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Thriller》是史上销量最高的专辑之一（超1亿张），彻底改变了音乐产业，将MV从宣传工具提升为艺术形式，并打破了MTV的种族隔离。
items.historicalImpactEn: Thriller is one of the best-selling albums of all time (over 100 million copies), revolutionizing the music industry by elevating music videos into an art form and breaking MTV's racial segregation.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者兼慈善家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以独特的嗓音、标志性的月球漫步舞步和跨越种族与文化的巨大影响力，成为20世纪最具象征意义的音乐偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958–2009) was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist known as the 'King of Pop.' With his distinctive voice, iconic moonwalk dance, and immense cross-cultural influence, he became one of the most emblematic music icons of the 20th century.

items.name: The Wall
items.descriptionZh: 《The Wall》是平克·弗洛伊德1979年发行的概念双专辑，以摇滚歌剧形式讲述一个名为Pink的主角从童年创伤到��我封闭的心理旅程。音���融合前卫摇滚、迷幻与管弦乐，充满象征性的音效设计，整体氛围压抑而宏大。
items.descriptionEn: The Wall is a 1979 double concept album by Pink Floyd, presented as a rock opera tracing the psychological journey of protagonist Pink from childhood trauma to self-imposed isolation. The music blends progressive rock, psychedelia, and orchestral elements with symbolic sound design, creating a claustrophobic yet grandiose atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的创作灵感源于主唱罗杰·沃特斯对二战创伤和明星身份的疏离感。录制时，乐队成员关系紧张，鼓手尼克·梅森曾因意见不合离队。专辑中的《Another Brick in the Wall, Part 2》因加入儿童合唱团而引发争议，却意外成为全球热门单曲。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Roger Waters' experiences with WWII trauma and the alienation of fame. During recording, band tensions ran high; drummer Nick Mason once left due to creative disagreements. 'Another Brick in the Wall, Part 2' sparked controversy for including a children's choir but unexpectedly became a global hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Wall》是史上最畅销的双专辑之一，其巡演舞台设计（包括巨型充气墙）重新定义了现场演出标准，专辑主题对后世心理摇滚和概念专辑影响深远。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Wall is one of the best-selling double albums ever; its tour stage design (including a giant inflatable wall) redefined live performance standards, and its themes profoundly influenced later psychological rock and concept albums.
items.artistIntroZh: 平克·弗洛伊德是1965年成立于伦敦的英国前卫摇滚乐队，以哲学性歌词、实验性音效和宏大概念专辑闻名。核心成员包括罗杰·沃特斯、大卫·吉尔摩、尼克·梅森和理查德·赖特，是摇滚史上最具艺术深度的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a British progressive rock band formed in London in 1965, renowned for philosophical lyrics, experimental soundscapes, and grand concept albums. Core members include Roger Waters, David Gilmour, Nick Mason, and Richard Wright, making them one of rock's most artistically profound groups.

items.name: The Visitors
items.descriptionZh: 《The Visitors》是ABBA 1981年发行的第八张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从流行舞曲向更成熟、阴郁风格的转型。专辑融合合成器流行、民谣与艺术摇滚，歌词探讨冷战焦虑、离婚与孤独，制作上采用了当时先进的数字录音技术。
items.descriptionEn: The Visitors is ABBA's eighth studio album (1981), marking a shift from upbeat pop to a more mature, melancholic style. Blending synth-pop, folk, and art rock, its lyrics explore Cold War anxiety, divorce, and loneliness, while the production utilized cutting-edge digital recording technology.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队成员的两段婚姻同时破裂，紧张气氛渗透到音乐中。主打歌《The Visitors》的歌词暗指克格勃监视，但实际灵感来自乐队经纪人Stig Anderson对盗版的愤怒。专辑封面由著名摄影师Lars Larsson拍摄，捕捉了成员之间疏离的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: During recording, both marriages within the band were collapsing, and the tension seeped into the music. The title track 'The Visitors' was rumored to reference KGB surveillance, but was actually inspired by manager Stig Anderson's anger over piracy. The cover, shot by Lars Larsson, captured the members' emotional distance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Visitors》是ABBA最后一张原创录音室专辑，其数字录音技术开创了80年代流行音乐制作先河，对合成器流行和后ABBA时代的瑞典音乐产业影响显著。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Visitors was ABBA's final original studio album; its digital recording techniques pioneered 1980s pop production and significantly influenced synth-pop and Sweden's post-ABBA music industry.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是1972年成立的瑞典流行乐队，由阿格妮莎·福斯克格、比约恩·乌尔韦斯、本尼·安德森和安妮-弗里德·林格斯塔德组成。他们以华丽的和声、 catchy的旋律和色彩鲜艳的服装风靡全球，是欧洲流行音乐最成功的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for lush harmonies, catchy melodies, and flamboyant costumes, they became global icons and one of Europe's most successful pop acts.

items.name: Made in Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《Made in Japan》是Deep Purple 1972年在日本大阪和东京三场演出的现场录音，1973年发行。专辑以硬摇滚和重金属为基础，融合即兴演奏与古典影响，展现了乐队巅峰时期的惊人技术。吉他手Ritchie Blackmore的独奏和Jon Lord的键盘表现尤为突出。
items.descriptionEn: Made in Japan is a live album recorded during three shows in Osaka and Tokyo in 1972, released in 1973. Rooted in hard rock and heavy metal, it blends improvisation with classical influences, showcasing the band's peak technical prowess. Guitarist Ritchie Blackmore's solos and Jon Lord's keyboard work are especially outstanding.
items.storiesZh: 录制前，乐队对日本观众的安静感到不安，但演出开始后观众爆发出巨大热情。专辑中《Smoke on the Water》的现场版本因即兴延长至7分钟，成为经典。由于当时日本唱片公司对现场录音经验不足，部分混音由乐队在伦敦紧急完成。
items.storiesEn: Before the shows, the band was uneasy about the quiet Japanese audience, but the crowd erupted with enthusiasm once the music started. The live version of 'Smoke on the Water' was extended to 7 minutes with improvisation, becoming iconic. Due to the Japanese label's inexperience with live recordings, some mixing was hastily done by the band in London.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Made in Japan》被公认为史上最伟大的现场专辑之一，重新定义了现场录音的标准，并对后世重金属和硬摇滚现场专辑产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Made in Japan is widely regarded as one of the greatest live albums ever, redefining live recording standards and profoundly influencing later heavy metal and hard rock live albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是1968年成立的英国摇滚乐队，被认为是重金属和硬摇滚的先驱之一。经典阵容包括Ritchie Blackmore（吉他）、Ian Gillan（主唱）、Jon Lord（键盘）、Roger Glover（贝斯）和Ian Paice（鼓），以技术精湛和即兴能力著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple is a British rock band formed in 1968, considered a pioneer of heavy metal and hard rock. The classic lineup includes Ritchie Blackmore (guitar), Ian Gillan (vocals), Jon Lord (keyboards), Roger Glover (bass), and Ian Paice (drums), renowned for technical skill and improvisation.

items.name: Concerto for Group and Orchestra
items.descriptionZh: 《Concerto for Group and Orchestra》是Deep Purple 1969年在皇家阿尔伯特音乐厅与皇家爱乐乐团合作演出的现场专辑，由Jon Lord创作。作品融合古典交响乐与摇滚乐队，分为三个乐章，展现了前卫摇滚与古典跨界的大胆尝试。
items.descriptionEn: Concerto for Group and Orchestra is a live album recorded at the Royal Albert Hall in 1969, featuring Deep Purple with the Royal Philharmonic Orchestra, composed by Jon Lord. The work merges classical symphony with rock band in three movements, representing a bold experiment in progressive rock and classical crossover.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出是古典与摇滚的首次大型合作，筹备期间乐团成员对摇滚乐队持怀疑态度。演出当天，指挥Malcolm Arnold因紧张而手抖，但Jon Lord即兴调整了部分乐段。后台冲突不断，但演出结束后全体起立鼓掌。
items.storiesEn: This concert was the first major collaboration between classical and rock; during preparations, orchestra members were skeptical of the rock band. On the day, conductor Malcolm Arnold's hands trembled with nerves, but Jon Lord improvised adjustments to some passages. Backstage tensions ran high, but the performance ended with a standing ovation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是摇滚与古典融合的里程碑，启发了后来的交响金属和跨界音乐运动，证明了摇滚乐可以具备严肃的艺术性。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a landmark in rock-classical fusion, inspiring later symphonic metal and crossover movements, proving that rock music could possess serious artistic legitimacy.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是1968年成立的英国摇滚乐队，以硬摇滚和重金属闻名。Jon Lord（键盘手）是古典音乐出身，其创作《Concerto for Group and Orchestra》体现了乐队对艺术边界的大胆探索，也展示了成员在古典与摇滚领域的双重才华。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple, formed in 1968, is a British rock band famous for hard rock and heavy metal. Keyboardist Jon Lord, classically trained, composed 'Concerto for Group and Orchestra,' reflecting the band's bold artistic exploration and their dual talents in classical and rock domains.

items.name: T.N.T.
items.descriptionZh: AC/DC的第二张录音室专辑，以硬朗的布鲁斯摇滚和原始能量著称。吉他riff粗粝有力，主唱Bon Scott的嘶吼充满街头痞气。专辑同名曲《T.N.T.》成为乐队早期经典，奠定了他们直白、狂野的风格基调。
items.descriptionEn: AC/DC's second studio album, known for its hard-driving blues rock and raw energy. The guitar riffs are gritty and powerful, with Bon Scott's snarling vocals full of streetwise swagger. The title track 'T.N.T.' became an early classic, establishing the band's straightforward, wild style.
items.storiesZh: 录制于1975年，仅用十天完成。当时乐队预算紧张，录音室条件简陋，但反而成就了粗粝的音色。据说吉他手Angus Young在录音时经常穿着校服即兴演奏，而Bon Scott会在录音间隙喝啤酒讲笑话，氛围轻松却高效。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1975 and completed in just ten days. The band had a tight budget and primitive studio conditions, which inadvertently created the gritty sound. It's said that guitarist Angus Young often improvised in his school uniform, while Bon Scott would drink beer and tell jokes between takes, creating a relaxed yet efficient atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为AC/DC早期代表作，推动了硬摇滚和朋克精神的融合，影响了后来的金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: As an early AC/DC classic, it helped fuse hard rock with punk attitude, influencing later metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: AC/DC是澳大利亚传奇硬摇滚乐队，由Malcolm和Angus Young兄弟创立。以标志性的校服造型和电力十足的舞台表演闻名，在全球售出超过2亿张唱片，是摇滚史上最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: AC/DC is a legendary Australian hard rock band founded by brothers Malcolm and Angus Young. Known for their iconic school uniform look and electrifying live shows, they have sold over 200 million records worldwide, making them one of the most successful rock bands in history.

items.name: Rarities
items.descriptionZh: 一张披头士的罕见录音合集，收录了1963至1969年间的未发行曲目、单曲B面和混音版本。风格跨度从早期摇滚到迷幻实验，展现了乐队创作演变的隐秘角落，是乐迷挖掘宝藏的必备专辑。
items.descriptionEn: A compilation of rare Beatles recordings, featuring unreleased tracks, B-sides, and alternate mixes from 1963 to 1969. The style ranges from early rock 'n' roll to psychedelic experimentation, revealing hidden corners of the band's creative evolution—a treasure trove for fans.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的曲目来自全球各地的单曲和EP，很多是首次以专辑形式发行。其中《Across the Universe》的原始混音版录音时，John Lennon曾要求加入冥想咒语，而Paul McCartney在《Helter Skelter》中故意制造混乱的吉他反馈声。
items.storiesEn: The tracks were sourced from singles and EPs worldwide, many released on album for the first time. During the original mix of 'Across the Universe,' John Lennon insisted on adding meditation chants, while Paul McCartney deliberately created chaotic guitar feedback on 'Helter Skelter.'
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年代来自英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，成员为John Lennon、Paul McCartney、George Harrison和Ringo Starr。他们革新了流行音乐，是史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were a rock band from Liverpool, England, formed in the 1960s, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. They revolutionized popular music and remain one of the most influential bands in history.

items.name: The Diary of Alicia Keys
items.descriptionZh: Alicia Keys的第二张录音室专辑，融合R&B、灵魂乐和爵士钢琴元素。歌词深刻探讨爱情、自我觉醒与女性力量，制作精致且情感饱满。主打歌《You Don't Know My Name》和《If I Ain't Got You》成为2000年代经典。
items.descriptionEn: Alicia Keys' second studio album, blending R&B, soul, and jazz piano. The lyrics delve into love, self-awakening, and female empowerment, with polished production and rich emotion. Hits like 'You Don't Know My Name' and 'If I Ain't Got You' became 2000s classics.
items.storiesZh: Alicia Keys在专辑中首次尝试大量钢琴创作，并亲自参与制作。录制《Diary》时，她坚持使用老式麦克风捕捉温暖音色。专辑名源于她随身携带的日记本，歌词灵感多来自真实情感经历，包括一段让她心碎的恋情。
items.storiesEn: Alicia Keys wrote most of the songs on piano and co-produced the album. She insisted on using vintage microphones to capture a warm sound while recording 'Diary.' The album title came from her personal journal, and lyrics were inspired by real emotional experiences, including a heartbreaking romance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Alicia Keys作为当代R&B女王的地位，并影响了后续灵魂乐歌手的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Alicia Keys as the queen of contemporary R&B and influenced the direction of later soul singers.
items.artistIntroZh: Alicia Keys是美国歌手、钢琴家和演员，以融合古典钢琴的R&B风格闻名。出生于纽约，16岁签约唱片公司，至今获得15项格莱美奖，是当代最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Alicia Keys is an American singer, pianist, and actress, known for blending classical piano with R&B. Born in New York, she signed her first record deal at 16 and has won 15 Grammy Awards, making her one of the most influential female musicians of her time.

items.name: Lioness: Hidden Treasures
items.descriptionZh: Amy Winehouse的遗作合集，收录她生前未完成的录音和Demo。风格以灵魂、爵士和雷鬼为主，嗓音依旧充满撕裂般的真情实感。专辑由制作人Mark Ronson和Salaam Remi整理完成，是歌迷最后的礼物。
items.descriptionEn: A posthumous compilation of Amy Winehouse's unfinished recordings and demos. The style is rooted in soul, jazz, and reggae, with her voice still raw with emotional intensity. Compiled by producers Mark Ronson and Salaam Remi, it's a final gift to fans.
items.storiesZh: 这些曲目来自2002至2011年间多次录音室session，部分只是粗略的草稿。制作人发现了一盘磁带，里面Amy用手机录下的《Body and Soul》片段，后来与Tony Bennett完成二重唱。专辑封面使用了Amy最爱的狮子纹身图案。
items.storiesEn: The tracks came from studio sessions between 2002 and 2011, some just rough sketches. Producers found a cassette with Amy's cellphone recording of 'Body and Soul,' later finished as a duet with Tony Bennett. The album cover features Amy's favorite lion tattoo design.
items.artistIntroZh: Amy Winehouse是英国灵魂乐和爵士歌手，以标志性的蜂巢发型和沙哑嗓音闻名。2006年专辑《Back to Black》让她成为全球巨星，但个人生活与酒精药物斗争导致她2011年去世，年仅27岁。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse was a British soul and jazz singer, known for her iconic beehive hairstyle and raspy voice. Her 2006 album 'Back to Black' made her a global star, but struggles with alcohol and drugs led to her death in 2011 at age 27.

items.name: Rubber Soul
items.descriptionZh: 披头士的第六张录音室专辑，标志着他们从流行偶像向艺术家的转型。民谣摇滚为基础，融合了印度西塔琴和迷幻元素，歌词更具深度和诗意。John Lennon称其为“��们的民谣专辑”，展现了全新的成熟面貌。
items.descriptionEn: The Beatles' sixth studio album, marking their transition from pop idols to artists. Rooted in folk rock, it incorporates Indian sitar and psychedelic elements, with deeper, more poetic lyrics. John Lennon called it 'our folk album,' showcasing a new maturity.
items.storiesZh: 录制于1965年，乐队在短短一个月内完成，因为要赶圣诞节档期。George Harrison首次使用西塔琴，灵感来自拍摄电影《Help!》时接触的印度文化。Paul McCartney在《Michelle》中用法语演唱，实际上他只会几句，但效果惊艳。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1965, the band finished it in just one month to meet the Christmas release. George Harrison first used the sitar, inspired by Indian culture encountered while filming 'Help!' Paul McCartney sang in French on 'Michelle,' though he only knew a few phrases—yet the effect was stunning.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为披头士艺术转折点，直接启发了迷幻摇滚和民谣摇滚的兴起，影响了后续无数音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered the Beatles' artistic turning point, it directly inspired the rise of psychedelic and folk rock, influencing countless musicians thereafter.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年代来自英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，成员为John Lennon、Paul McCartney、George Harrison和Ringo Starr。他们革新了流行音乐，是史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were a rock band from Liverpool, England, formed in the 1960s, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. They revolutionized popular music and remain one of the most influential bands in history.

items.name: My Generation
items.descriptionZh: 《My Generation》是The Who的首张专辑，融合了硬摇滚、节奏蓝调和流行元素，以充满爆发力的吉他、鼓点和叛逆的歌词为核心特色。专辑展现了英国青年一代的困惑与反叛，尤其是同名曲《My Generation》以口吃式唱腔和狂野的器乐演奏成为标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: My Generation is The Who's debut album, blending hard rock, R&B, and pop with explosive guitar, drumming, and rebellious lyrics. It captures the confusion and defiance of British youth, with the title track's stuttering vocals and wild instrumentation becoming iconic.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，吉他手Pete Townshend因不满录音效果，曾愤怒地砸碎吉他，这一行为后来成为乐队现场表演的标志性动作。鼓手Keith Moon在录音室尝试用双底鼓录制，但当时技术有限，不得不通过叠加录音完成，意外创造出更厚重的鼓声。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist Pete Townshend smashed his guitar in frustration over the sound, a move that later became a trademark of their live shows. Drummer Keith Moon tried using double bass drums but had to rely on overdubbing due to technical limits, accidentally creating a heavier drum sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑定义了英国硬摇滚和朋克摇滚的雏形，影响后世无数乐队，如Sex Pistols和Green Day。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album defined early British hard rock and punk rock, influencing countless bands like Sex Pistols and Green Day.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who成立于1964年，由主唱Roger Daltrey、吉他手Pete Townshend、贝斯手John Entwistle和鼓手Keith Moon组成。他们以破坏乐器的舞台表演和概念性摇滚歌剧闻名，是英国摇滚史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who formed in 1964, consisting of Roger Daltrey (vocals), Pete Townshend (guitar), John Entwistle (bass), and Keith Moon (drums). Known for destroying instruments on stage and pioneering rock operas, they are one of the most influential bands in British rock history.

items.name: Big Boi and Dre Present… Outkast
items.descriptionZh: 《Big Boi and Dre Present… Outkast》是OutKast的首张专辑，融合了南方嘻哈、放克和灵魂乐，以流畅的节奏、幽默的歌词和双人组的默契互动为核心特色。专辑打破了东海岸和西海岸嘻哈的垄断，展现了亚特兰大独特的音乐风貌。
items.descriptionEn: Big Boi and Dre Present… Outkast is OutKast's debut album, blending Southern hip-hop, funk, and soul with smooth rhythms, witty lyrics, and the duo's seamless chemistry. It broke the East Coast-West Coast hip-hop dominance, showcasing Atlanta's unique sound.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，成员Big Boi和André 3000因风格分歧多次争吵，但最终决定保留各自特色，形成互补。专辑中《Player's Ball》原本是首快节奏舞曲，但在制作人帮助下改为慢板，意外成为热门单曲，为OutKast打开了知名度。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Big Boi and André 3000 clashed over style differences but ultimately decided to keep their distinct approaches, creating a complementary dynamic. The track 'Player's Ball' was originally a fast dance number but was reworked into a slow jam with the producer's help, unexpectedly becoming a hit that launched OutKast's fame.
items.artistIntroZh: OutKast成立于1992年，由Big Boi（Antwan Patton）和André 3000（André Benjamin）组成。他们以创新性的南方嘻哈风格、实验性编曲和深刻的社会观察著称，是史上最成功的嘻哈二人组之一，曾获得六项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: OutKast formed in 1992, consisting of Big Boi (Antwan Patton) and André 3000 (André Benjamin). Known for innovative Southern hip-hop, experimental arrangements, and sharp social commentary, they are one of the most successful hip-hop duos ever, winning six Grammy Awards.

items.name: Beatles for Sale
items.descriptionZh: 《Beatles for Sale》是The Beatles的第四张录音室专辑，风格以民谣摇滚和乡村摇滚为主，融合了轻快的旋律和忧郁的歌词。专辑反映了乐队从早期流行偶像向更成熟、更具艺术性的方向过渡，展现了约翰·列侬和保罗·麦卡特尼的创作深度。
items.descriptionEn: Beatles for Sale is The Beatles' fourth studio album, leaning toward folk rock and country rock with catchy melodies and melancholic lyrics. It marks the band's transition from early pop idols to a more mature, artistic direction, showcasing John Lennon and Paul McCartney's songwriting depth.
items.storiesZh: 录制时间紧迫，乐队不得不在一周内完成大部分歌曲，导致部分成员感到疲惫。乔治·哈里森在《I'll Be Back》中尝试了12弦吉他，但录音时因走音被迫重录多次。专辑封面由罗伯特·弗里曼拍摄，原本想营造秋日氛围，但成员因寒冷显得表情僵硬。
items.storiesEn: With a tight schedule, the band recorded most songs in just one week, leaving some members exhausted. George Harrison experimented with a 12-string guitar on 'I'll Be Back' but had to re-record multiple times due to tuning issues. The cover photo by Robert Freeman aimed for an autumn feel, but the members looked stiff due to the cold weather.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beatles是1960年成立于利物浦的英国摇滚乐队，成员包括约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔。他们被誉为史上最伟大的乐队，以创新性的音乐创作、文化影响力和社会变革推动而闻名，彻底改变了流行音乐的面貌。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were an English rock band formed in Liverpool in 1960, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Widely regarded as the greatest band of all time, they revolutionized pop music with innovative songwriting, cultural influence, and social change.

items.name: At the Beeb
items.descriptionZh: 《At the Beeb》是Queen的现场专辑，收录了乐队1973年至1977年间为BBC广播节目录制的演出。风格以硬摇滚和华丽摇滚为主，展现了Queen早期未经修饰的原始能量和弗雷迪·默丘里极具爆发力的嗓音，是了解乐队早期舞台魅力的珍贵资料。
items.descriptionEn: At the Beeb is a live album by Queen, featuring BBC radio performances from 1973 to 1977. It captures the raw energy of early Queen with hard rock and glam rock, showcasing Freddie Mercury's explosive vocals and the band's unpolished stage presence, offering a rare glimpse into their early live power.
items.storiesZh: 这些录音原本是BBC存档资料，直到1989年才被整理发行。录制《Keep Yourself Alive》时，弗雷迪·默丘里因感冒嗓音沙哑，但效果反而更显粗粝有力。吉他手布莱恩·梅在《Son and Daughter》中使用了自制吉他“Red Special”，其独特音色让BBC工程师印象深刻。
items.storiesEn: These recordings were originally BBC archive material and weren't released until 1989. During 'Keep Yourself Alive,' Freddie Mercury had a cold, making his voice hoarse, but the result sounded even grittier and more powerful. Guitarist Brian May used his homemade guitar 'Red Special' on 'Son and Daughter,' its unique tone impressing BBC engineers.
items.artistIntroZh: Queen成立于1970年，由主唱弗雷迪·默丘里、吉他手布莱恩·梅、贝斯手约翰·迪肯和鼓手罗杰·泰勒组成。他们以华丽的舞台表演、复杂的和声和多样化���音乐风格著称，代表作包括《Bohemian Rhapsody》和《We Will Rock You》，是全球最畅销的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen formed in 1970, consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), John Deacon (bass), and Roger Taylor (drums). Known for extravagant stage shows, complex harmonies, and genre-defying music, with hits like 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'We Will Rock You,' they are among the best-selling bands worldwide.

items.name: Let It Bleed
items.descriptionZh: 《Let It Bleed》是The Rolling Stones的第八张录音室专辑，风格融合了布鲁斯摇滚、乡村摇滚和福音音乐，以黑暗、颓废的歌词和复杂的编曲为核心特色。专辑反映了60年代末的社会动荡，是乐队从布鲁斯根源向更宏大声音转型的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Let It Bleed is The Rolling Stones' eighth studio album, blending blues rock, country rock, and gospel with dark, decadent lyrics and intricate arrangements. It reflects the late-60s social turmoil and marks the band's transition from blues roots to a grander, more layered sound.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，吉他手布莱恩·琼斯因毒瘾和与乐队矛盾逐渐边缘化，大部分吉他由新任吉他手米克·泰勒完成。专辑同名曲《Let It Bleed》的歌词灵感来自米克·贾格尔对当时政治腐败的讽刺。录制《You Can't Always Get What You Want》时，贾格尔邀请了伦敦社区合唱团参与，营造出教堂般的庄严感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist Brian Jones became increasingly marginalized due to drug addiction and band conflicts, with most guitar parts played by new member Mick Taylor.
