The title track 'Let It Bleed' was inspired by Mick Jagger's sarcastic take on political corruption. For 'You Can't Always Get What You Want,' Jagger invited a London community choir to create a church-like solemn atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为滚石乐队黄金时代的巅峰之作，与《Exile on Main St.》齐名，深刻影响了后来的摇滚和另类音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered the peak of The Rolling Stones' golden era, alongside 'Exile on Main St.,' it profoundly influenced later rock and alternative music.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones成立于1962年，由主唱米克·贾格尔、吉他手基思·理查兹、吉他手布莱恩·琼斯（后由米克·泰勒接替）、贝斯手比尔·怀曼和鼓手查理·沃茨组成。他们以布鲁斯摇滚、叛逆形象和持久的创作力著称，是摇滚史上最长寿和最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones formed in 1962, consisting of Mick Jagger (vocals), Keith Richards (guitar), Brian Jones (guitar, later replaced by Mick Taylor), Bill Wyman (bass), and Charlie Watts (drums). Known for blues rock, rebellious image, and enduring creativity, they are one of the longest-lasting and most influential bands in rock history.

items.name: Live!
items.descriptionZh: 《Live!》是鲍勃·马利与哭泣者乐队1975年在伦敦的现场录音专辑，融合了雷鬼、斯卡和摇滚风格，充满了激情与反抗精神。核心特色在于马利极具感染力的舞台表现和乐队默契的即兴演奏，将政治呐喊与灵魂律动完美结合。
items.descriptionEn: "Live!" is a 1975 live album by Bob Marley & The Wailers recorded in London, blending reggae, ska, and rock with passionate energy and rebellious spirit. Its core feature is Marley's electrifying stage presence and the band's tight improvisation, merging political protest with soulful groove.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于伦敦的Lyceum剧院，当时马利刚从一次暗杀中幸存。演出中，他因激动而赤脚跳舞，甚至划伤了脚，但依然坚持唱完整场。台下观众的热情几乎掀翻屋顶，马利在《No Woman, No Cry》中即兴加入的感人独白成为经典。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at London's Lyceum Theatre, this album came shortly after Marley survived an assassination attempt. During the show, he danced barefoot, cutting his foot, but performed the entire set. The crowd's fervor was overwhelming; Marley's impromptu heartfelt monologue in "No Woman, No Cry" became iconic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张现场专辑被公认为史上最伟大的雷鬼现场录音之一，巩固了鲍勃·马利作为全球文化偶像的地位，推动了雷鬼音乐在世界范围内的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: This live album is widely regarded as one of the greatest reggae live recordings ever, cementing Bob Marley's status as a global cultural icon and propelling reggae music worldwide.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·马利（1945-1981）是牙买加雷鬼音乐的先驱和全球象征，以充满社会意识的歌词和富有感染力的旋律闻名。他与哭泣者乐队一起，将雷鬼从加勒比小岛带到世界舞台，成为反抗压迫与呼唤和平的代言人。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley (1945-1981) was a Jamaican reggae pioneer and global symbol, known for socially conscious lyrics and infectious melodies. With The Wailers, he brought reggae from the Caribbean to the world stage, becoming an icon of resistance and peace.

items.name: El Camino
items.descriptionZh: 《El Camino》是黑键乐队2011年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格以粗粝的蓝调摇滚为主，融合了车库摇滚和流行旋律。核心特色是极简的吉他riff、强劲的鼓点和朗朗上口的副歌，充满复古又摩登的公路旅行气息。
items.descriptionEn: "El Camino" is the sixth studio album by The Black Keys, released in 2011, characterized by gritty blues-rock blended with garage rock and pop melodies. Its core features are minimalist guitar riffs, powerful drumbeats, and catchy choruses, evoking a retro yet modern road-trip vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制在田纳西州纳什维尔的一个老房子里，制作人Danger Mouse带来了很多创意碰撞。主唱Dan Auerbach曾开玩笑说，他们故意把吉他调得很低，因为“听起来更酷”。主打歌《Lonely Boy》的MV中，一位保安即兴狂舞的画面意外走红，成为网络迷因。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in an old house in Nashville, Tennessee, producer Danger Mouse sparked many creative clashes. Lead singer Dan Auerbach joked they tuned guitars low because "it sounds cooler." The music video for "Lonely Boy" featuring a security guard's impromptu dance went viral, becoming an internet meme.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑键乐队成立于2001年，由Dan Auerbach（主唱/吉他）和Patrick Carney（鼓手）组成。他们以极简的二人配置和粗犷的蓝调摇滚风格著称，是21世纪复兴车库摇滚和蓝调摇滚的代表乐队之一，曾多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: The Black Keys formed in 2001, consisting of Dan Auerbach (vocals/guitar) and Patrick Carney (drums). Known for their minimalist duo setup and raw blues-rock sound, they are key figures in reviving garage and blues rock in the 21st century, winning multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Beggars Banquet
items.descriptionZh: 《Beggars Banquet》是滚石乐队1968年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格回归根源，融合了蓝调、乡村和民谣摇滚。核心特色是讽刺性的歌词、原声吉他与口琴的质朴搭配，以及对社会动荡的深刻反思，被视为乐队艺术转型的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Beggars Banquet" is the seventh studio album by The Rolling Stones, released in 1968, marking a return to roots with blues, country, and folk-rock. Its core features are cynical lyrics, acoustic guitar and harmonica arrangements, and deep reflection on social turmoil, considered a milestone in the band's artistic evolution.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原定名为《恶魔般的祈祷》，但唱片公司因封面争议推迟发行。最终封面采用简洁的请柬式设计，内页却是一张脏乱的厕所涂鸦照片。录制期间，乐队成员关系紧张，吉他手Brian Jones因毒瘾问题参与度很低，这成为他参与的最后一张完整专辑。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled "Devil's Prayer," the album was delayed due to cover art disputes. The final cover was a simple invitation-style design, but the inner sleeve featured a photo of a graffiti-covered toilet. Recording was tense; guitarist Brian Jones, struggling with addiction, had minimal involvement, making this his last full album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是滚石乐队从迷幻摇滚回归根源的转折点，开启了他们70年代的黄金时期，也对后来的乡村摇滚和另类摇滚产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a turning point for The Rolling Stones, marking their return to roots from psychedelic rock, ushering in their golden era in the 1970s, and influencing later country rock and alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队成立于1962年，是英国最伟大的摇滚乐队之一，以叛逆形象和蓝调根基著称。主唱米克·贾格尔和吉他手基思·理查兹的创作组合定义了摇滚乐的硬朗与性感，乐队至今活跃，影响了几代音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in 1962, are one of Britain's greatest rock bands, known for rebellious image and blues roots. The songwriting duo of Mick Jagger and Keith Richards defined rock's grit and sensuality; the band remains active, influencing generations of musicians.

items.name: Curtain Call: The Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Curtain Call: The Hits》是埃米纳姆2005年发行���精选集，收录了他职业生涯前期的热门单曲，风格以硬核说唱为主，融合了幽默、暴力和自省。核心特色是极致的文字游戏、愤怒的宣泄和深刻的情感张力，展现了说唱巨星的全面才华。
items.descriptionEn: "Curtain Call: The Hits" is a 2005 greatest hits compilation by Eminem, featuring his early career hits, characterized by hardcore rap blended with humor, violence, and introspection. Its core features are masterful wordplay, cathartic anger, and deep emotional tension, showcasing the rapper's comprehensive talent.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集原本计划在2004年发行，但埃米纳姆坚持要加入新歌《When I'm Gone》，这首歌是他写给女儿海莉的深情告白，录制时他一度情绪失控。专辑名字源自他舞台上的“谢幕”概念，暗示他可能隐退，但后来证明只是阶段性总结。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned for 2004, Eminem insisted on including the new song "When I'm Gone," a heartfelt confession to his daughter Hailie, during which he broke down emotionally. The album title references his "curtain call" stage concept, hinting at retirement, but later proved to be a phase summary.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集成为21世��最畅销的说唱精选集之一，巩固了埃米纳姆作为白人说唱巨星的地位，并让更多主流听众接触到硬核说唱。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation became one of the best-selling rap greatest hits of the 21st century, solidifying Eminem's status as a white rap superstar and introducing hardcore rap to a wider mainstream audience.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃米纳姆（本名马歇尔·马瑟斯，1972年出生）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，以技术精湛的押韵、争议性内容和自传式叙事闻名。他是史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一，获得15项格莱美奖，被誉为“说唱之神”。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers, 1972) is an American rapper and producer known for technically intricate rhymes, controversial content, and autobiographical storytelling. He is one of the best-selling rappers of all time, with 15 Grammy Awards, hailed as the "Rap God."

items.name: ¡Tré!
items.descriptionZh: 《¡Tré!》是绿日乐队2012年发行的专辑，也是“¡Uno! ¡Dos! ¡Tré!”三部曲的终章，风格以流行朋克和强力流行为主，融合了民谣和力量民谣元素。核心特色是旋律性强、编曲丰富，歌词探讨了成长、幻灭和救赎。
items.descriptionEn: "¡Tré!" is a 2012 album by Green Day, the final chapter of the "¡Uno! ¡Dos! ¡Tré!" trilogy, blending pop punk and power pop with folk and power ballad elements. Its core features are strong melodies, rich arrangements, and lyrics exploring growth, disillusionment, and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于2012年初，乐队在短短几个月内完成了三部曲共37首歌的创作。主唱比利·乔·阿姆斯特朗当时正经历婚姻危机和酒精成瘾，专辑中的《Dirty Rotten Bastards》和《The Forgotten》反映了他内心的挣扎。录制过程充满压力，但乐队成员认为这是他们最自由的创作时期。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in early 2012, the band completed 37 songs for the trilogy in just a few months. Frontman Billie Joe Armstrong was struggling with marital issues and alcohol addiction; tracks like "Dirty Rotten Bastards" and "The Forgotten" reflect his inner turmoil. The process was stressful, but the band considered it their most liberating creative period.
items.artistIntroZh: 绿日乐队成立于1987年，是美国最成功的朋克摇滚乐队之一，由比利·乔·阿姆斯特朗（主唱/吉他）、迈克·迪恩特（贝斯）和特雷·库尔（鼓手）组成。他们以朗朗上口的旋律和政治讽刺歌词著称，1994年的《Dookie��推动了朋克复兴。
items.artistIntroEn: Green Day formed in 1987, one of America's most successful punk rock bands, consisting of Billie Joe Armstrong (vocals/guitar), Mike Dirnt (bass), and Tré Cool (drums). Known for catchy melodies and politically charged lyrics, their 1994 album "Dookie" sparked the punk revival.

items.name: Their Satanic Majesties Request
items.descriptionZh: 《Their Satanic Majesties Request》是滚石乐队1967年发行的迷幻摇滚专辑，以华丽的编曲、实验性的音效和超现实主义封面闻名。专辑融合了西塔琴、合成器和弦乐，展现了乐队对迷幻文化的探索，但也被视为对披头士《Sgt. Pepper》的回应。
items.descriptionEn: 'Their Satanic Majesties Request' is a 1967 psychedelic rock album by The Rolling Stones, known for its lavish arrangements, experimental sound effects, and surreal cover art. It blends sitar, synthesizers, and strings, reflecting the band's exploration of psychedelic culture, though often seen as a response to The Beatles' 'Sgt. Pepper'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员因毒品指控和内部矛盾陷入混乱。封面采用3D立体照片，每张唱片附赠一张3D眼镜，但制作成本高昂。标题源自英国护照上的文字“Her Britannic Majesty requests”，被乐队戏谑修改。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members were in turmoil due to drug charges and internal conflicts. The cover featured a 3D lenticular photo, with each copy including 3D glasses, but production costs were high. The title parodies the phrase 'Her Britannic Majesty requests' from British passports.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是滚石乐队唯一一张纯迷幻风格作品，虽商业反响不及预期，但影响了后期迷幻摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This is the Stones' only pure psychedelic album; though commercially underwhelming, it influenced later psychedelic rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队成立于1962年，是英国最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。以米克·贾格尔和基思·理查兹为核心，他们以蓝调摇滚、硬摇滚风格和叛逆形象著称，持续活跃超过六十年。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1962, The Rolling Stones are one of the most influential rock bands from the UK. Led by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards, they are known for blues rock, hard rock, and a rebellious image, remaining active for over six decades.

items.name: A Nice Pair
items.descriptionZh: 《A Nice Pair》是平克·弗洛伊德1973年发行的合辑，将前两张专辑《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》和《A Saucerful of Secrets》打包，封面采用双面设计，充满超现实幽默。风格从早期西德·巴雷特的迷幻摇滚过渡到乐队后来的太空摇滚。
items.descriptionEn: 'A Nice Pair' is a 1973 compilation by Pink Floyd, bundling their first two albums 'The Piper at the Gates of Dawn' and 'A Saucerful of Secrets'. The cover features a double-sided design with surreal humor, reflecting the transition from Syd Barrett's psychedelic rock to the band's later space rock.
items.storiesZh: 封面由Storm Thorgerson设计，双面各展示一对“好东西”：正面是性感女郎和香烟，背面是牛眼和灯泡。因封面争议，美国版本被迫修改。专辑名源自乐队开玩笑称这两张专辑是“一对好搭档”。
items.storiesEn: The cover was designed by Storm Thorgerson, showing 'nice pairs' on each side: a sexy woman and cigarettes on the front, a cow's eye and a light bulb on the back. The US version had to be altered due to controversy. The title came from the band joking that the two albums were 'a nice pair'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为早期作品合集，它帮助新听众了解平克·弗洛伊德的演变，但本身并非开创性作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a compilation of early works, it helped new listeners understand Pink Floyd's evolution, but is not a groundbreaking release itself.
items.artistIntroZh: 平克·弗洛伊德成立于1965年，英国前卫摇滚传奇。以哲学性歌词、概念专辑和壮观现场演出闻名���代表作《The Dark Side of the Moon》销量超过4500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd, formed in 1965, are legendary British progressive rock artists. Known for philosophical lyrics, concept albums, and spectacular live shows, their masterpiece 'The Dark Side of the Moon' has sold over 45 million copies.

items.name: Flash Gordon – Original Soundtrack Music by Queen
items.descriptionZh: 《Flash Gordon》是皇后乐队1980年为电影《飞侠哥顿》创作的原声专辑，风格融合硬摇滚、合成器流行和管弦乐。专辑充满戏剧性和英雄主义色彩，是乐队首次完全为电影配乐的作品，展现了弗雷迪·默丘里的华丽嗓音和乐队多变的编曲能力。
items.descriptionEn: 'Flash Gordon' is Queen's 1980 soundtrack for the film 'Flash Gordon', blending hard rock, synth-pop, and orchestral music. Dramatic and heroic, it's the band's first full film score, showcasing Freddie Mercury's flamboyant vocals and the band's versatile arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 乐队在录制时大量使用合成器，甚至将吉他声通过合成器变形。弗雷迪·默丘里在录音棚里模仿电影台词，即兴创作人声片段。专辑发行后，乐队因不满电影票房而一度拒绝参与后续宣传。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band heavily used synthesizers, even processing guitar sounds through them. Freddie Mercury improvised vocal snippets mimicking movie lines. After release, the band was initially reluctant to promote it due to the film's disappointing box office.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是皇后乐队唯一一张纯原声专辑，为后来摇滚乐队参与电影配乐提供了范例。
items.historicalImpactEn: This is Queen's only pure soundtrack album, setting an example for rock bands to venture into film scoring.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队成立于1970年，英国摇滚巨星。以弗雷迪·默丘里为核心，融合摇滚、歌剧和流行，代表作《Bohemian Rhapsody》成为文化符号，全球销量超过3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen, formed in 1970, are British rock superstars. Led by Freddie Mercury, they blend rock, opera, and pop. Their iconic 'Bohemian Rhapsody' became a cultural phenomenon, with global sales exceeding 300 million records.

items.name: A Quick One
items.descriptionZh: 《A Quick One》是The Who 1966年发行的第二张专辑，风格以硬朗的节奏蓝调和流行摇滚为主，包含乐队第一首迷你歌剧《A Quick One, While He's Away》。专辑展现了皮特·汤申德的创作野心和乐队狂暴的现场能量。
items.descriptionEn: 'A Quick One' is The Who's second album, released in 1966, featuring hard-driving R&B and pop rock, including their first mini-opera 'A Quick One, While He's Away'. It showcases Pete Townshend's songwriting ambition and the band's explosive live energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，鼓手基思·穆恩因酗酒问题多次缺席，部分鼓点由制作人代打。迷你歌剧的创作灵感来自汤申德想证明自己也能写长篇作品。专辑原名《Happy Jack》，后因美国市场要求改名。
items.storiesEn: During recording, drummer Keith Moon frequently missed sessions due to drinking, with the producer playing some drum parts. The mini-opera was inspired by Townshend's desire to prove he could write long-form pieces. The album was originally titled 'Happy Jack' but renamed for the US market.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的迷你歌剧《A Quick One, While He's Away》被认为是摇滚歌剧的雏形，直接影响了后来的《Tommy》。
items.historicalImpactEn: The mini-opera 'A Quick One, While He's Away' is considered a precursor to rock opera, directly influencing later works like 'Tommy'.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who成立于1964年，英国摇滚传奇。以破坏乐器的舞台表演和摇滚歌剧闻名，代表作《My Generation》成为叛逆青年的圣歌，乐队在摇滚史上占据重要地位。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who, formed in 1964, are British rock legends. Known for destroying instruments on stage and rock operas, their anthem 'My Generation' became a rallying cry for rebellious youth, securing their place in rock history.

items.name: Street Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Street Life》是The Crusaders 1979年发行的融合爵士专辑，融合放克、灵魂和节奏蓝调。以标志性的钢琴、萨克斯和强劲的节奏组为特色，专辑同名曲《Street Life》成为跨界热门，展现了乐队流畅的旋律和精湛的即兴演奏。
items.descriptionEn: 'Street Life' is a 1979 fusion jazz album by The Crusaders, blending funk, soul, and R&B. Featuring signature piano, saxophone, and a tight rhythm section, the title track 'Street Life' became a crossover hit, showcasing the band's smooth melodies and expert improvisation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲原本是一段即兴演奏，后来加入歌词和兰迪·克劳福德的演唱成为经典。录制时，乐队在洛杉矶录音棚连续工作数周，每天只睡几小时。萨克斯手威尔顿·费尔德用一支老式萨克斯录制，音色温暖独特。
items.storiesEn: The title track started as a jam session, later adding lyrics and vocals by Randy Crawford to become a classic. The band recorded for weeks in a Los Angeles studio, sleeping only a few hours daily. Saxophonist Wilton Felder used an vintage saxophone, giving the track its warm, unique tone.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Street Life》是融合爵士商业上的巅峰之作，帮助推广了爵士放克风格，影响了后来的酸性爵士和嘻哈音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Street Life' represents the commercial peak of fusion jazz, helping popularize jazz-funk and influencing later acid jazz and hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: The Crusaders成立于1960年，美国融合爵士先驱。以休斯顿为基地，由键盘手乔·桑普尔和萨克斯手威尔顿·费尔德领衔，作品融合爵士、放克和灵魂，是70年代最成功的爵士团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1960, The Crusaders are American fusion jazz pioneers. Based in Houston and led by keyboardist Joe Sample and saxophonist Wilton Felder, their music blends jazz, funk, and soul, making them one of the most successful jazz groups of the 1970s.

items.name: A Collection of Beatles Oldies
items.descriptionZh: 《A Collection of Beatles Oldies》是披头士于1966年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1963至1966年间多首经典单曲和B面曲目，风格横跨早期摇滚、流行与迷幻初探，核心特色在于呈现乐队从青春偶像向艺术实验转型的过渡期精华。
items.descriptionEn: A Collection of Beatles Oldies is a 1966 compilation by The Beatles, featuring classic singles and B-sides from 1963 to 1966. Spanning early rock, pop, and early psychedelic experiments, it captures the band's transition from teen idols to artistic innovators.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的标题原本是乐队对发行商的一种调侃，因为当时他们正忙于录音室创新，无暇整理旧作。专辑封面由设计师罗伯特·弗里曼操刀，采用拼贴风格，但披头士成员并未参与选曲，导致部分热门歌曲如《Help!》意外缺失，令歌迷又爱又憾。
items.storiesEn: The album title was a playful jab at the record label, as the band was too busy with studio innovations to compile old hits. Designer Robert Freeman created a collage-style cover, but the Beatles didn't participate in track selection, leading to the notable omission of hits like 'Help!', which both delighted and disappointed fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为披头士首张官方精选集，它为后来的“老歌合辑”模式树立了商业与艺术标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the Beatles' first official compilation, it set a commercial and artistic benchmark for the 'greatest hits' format.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年成立于利物浦的英国摇滚乐队，由约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔组成。他们以惊人的创作力与实验精神改变了流行音乐的面貌，被誉为史上最伟大的乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles, formed in Liverpool in 1960, consisted of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Their extraordinary creativity and experimental spirit transformed popular music, earning them the title of the greatest band in history.

items.name: Michael
items.descriptionZh: 《Michael》是迈克尔·杰克逊2010年发行的遗作专辑，融合流行、R&B与舞曲元素，核心特色在于保留了他标志性的嗓音与编曲风格，但制作上由多位当代制作人后期加工完成，呈现一种新旧交织的听感。
items.descriptionEn: Michael is a 2010 posthumous album by Michael Jackson, blending pop, R&B, and dance. Its core feature is Jackson's iconic vocals and arrangements, but with post-production by contemporary producers, creating a blend of old and new.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中部分歌曲的原始录音来自2000年代后期，杰克逊当时在朋友家中用简陋设备录制。由于他去世后这些录音未完成，制作人不得不补录乐器与和声，引发部分歌迷对歌曲真实性的争议，尤其是《Breaking News》一曲的署名问题曾闹上法庭。
items.storiesEn: Some tracks originated from late-2000s demos recorded by Jackson at a friend's house with basic equipment. After his death, producers had to add instruments and backing vocals, sparking controversy among fans about authenticity. The track 'Breaking News' even led to legal disputes over vocal attribution.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson，1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者与流行文化符号，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以突破性的音乐录像带、标志性的舞步和慈善事业闻名，专辑《Thriller》至今仍是全球销量最高的专辑之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and pop culture icon known as the 'King of Pop'. Renowned for groundbreaking music videos, signature dance moves, and philanthropy, his album 'Thriller' remains one of the best-selling albums worldwide.

items.name: Oh, by the Way
items.descriptionZh: 《Oh, by the Way》是平克·弗洛伊德2007年发行的双CD精选集，收录了乐队从《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》到《The Division Bell》的经典曲目，风格涵盖迷幻摇滚、前卫摇滚与概念专辑精华，核心特色在于以非编年顺序呈现音乐旅程的流动性。
items.descriptionEn: Oh, by the Way is a 2007 double-CD compilation by Pink Floyd, featuring classics from 'The Piper at the Gates of Dawn' to 'The Division Bell'. Spanning psychedelic and progressive rock, its core feature is a non-chronological flow that emphasizes the band's musical journey.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Oh, by the Way”取自平克·弗洛伊德成员之间的一种随性调侃，暗示这是一张“顺便”推出的精选集。但实际上，乐队与唱片公司精心挑选了26首曲目，并重新制作了母带。有趣的是，专辑内页设计模仿了早期演出海报的复古风格，向1960年代的伦敦地下音乐场景致敬。
items.storiesEn: The title 'Oh, by the Way' was a casual phrase among band members, suggesting a 'by the way' compilation. In reality, the band and label carefully selected 26 tracks and remastered them. The booklet design mimicked 1960s underground London concert posters as a tribute to the band's early days.
items.artistIntroZh: 平克·弗洛伊德（Pink Floyd）是1965年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，以哲学性歌词、概念专辑与震撼的现场演出闻名。成员包括罗杰·沃特斯、大卫·吉尔摩、尼克·梅森等，代表作《The Dark Side of the Moon》是史上最畅销专辑之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd, formed in London in 1965, is a British rock band known for philosophical lyrics, concept albums, and spectacular live shows. Members include Roger Waters, David Gilmour, and Nick Mason. Their album 'The Dark Side of the Moon' is one of the best-selling of all time.

items.name: More Hot Rocks (Big Hits & Fazed Cookies)
items.descriptionZh: 《More Hot Rocks (Big Hits & Fazed Cookies)》是滚石乐队1972年发行的双张精选集，延续了《Hot Rocks》的成功，收录了1964至1971年间的热门单曲与罕见B面曲目，风格以硬摇滚、布鲁斯摇滚为主，核心特色在于展现了乐队从节奏布鲁斯根源向叛逆摇滚偶像的蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: More Hot Rocks (Big Hits & Fazed Cookies) is a 1972 double compilation by The Rolling Stones, following the success of 'Hot Rocks'. It features hits and rare B-sides from 1964 to 1971, primarily hard rock and blues rock, showcasing the band's evolution from R&B roots to rebellious rock icons.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的副标题“Fazed Cookies”是乐队对当时社会现象的幽默暗讽，意指被毒品文化“击晕”的一代。选曲过程中，乐队成员对是否收录早期翻唱曲目产生分歧，最终决定保留《Time Is on My Side》等经典，以平衡商业与艺术。封面设计采用迷幻字体，呼应了专辑名称中的“Fazed”。
items.storiesEn: The subtitle 'Fazed Cookies' was a humorous nod to the drug-influenced generation. During track selection, band members disagreed on including early covers, but eventually kept classics like 'Time Is on My Side' for balance. The cover featured psychedelic fonts to match the 'Fazed' theme.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了滚石乐队在1970年代精选集市场的霸主地位，与《Hot Rocks》共同成为摇滚乐收藏的入门必选。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented the Rolling Stones' dominance in the 1970s compilation market, becoming an essential rock collection alongside 'Hot Rocks'.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队（The Rolling Stones）是1962年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，由米克·贾格尔、基思·理查兹等核心成员组成。他们以狂野的舞台形象、布鲁斯根基与反叛精神著称，被誉为“世界上最伟大的摇滚乐队”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones, formed in London in 1962, are a British rock band fronted by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. Known for wild stage presence, blues roots, and rebellious attitude, they are hailed as one of the 'greatest rock and roll bands in the world'.

items.name: Lizard
items.descriptionZh: 《Lizard》是King Crimson于1970年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以前卫摇滚、爵士融合与古典交响元素为特色，核心在于其复杂的编曲、诗歌般的歌词以及充满神秘色彩的管弦乐段落，被视为乐队早期最具实验性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Lizard is King Crimson's third studio album, released in 1970. Its style blends progressive rock, jazz fusion, and classical orchestration, featuring complex arrangements, poetic lyrics, and mysterious orchestral passages. It is considered one of the band's most experimental early works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队内部动荡不安，原成员伊恩·麦克唐纳和迈克尔·吉尔斯在录制中途离队，迫使罗伯特·弗里普紧急招募新乐手。专辑同名曲《Lizard》长达23分钟，其中管弦乐部分由弗里普与作曲家凯斯·蒂皮特合作完成，但排练时间极短，导致录音现场充满紧张与即兴碰撞。
items.storiesEn: During recording, internal turmoil led to the departure of Ian McDonald and Michael Giles mid-session, forcing Robert Fripp to recruit new players. The 23-minute title track 'Lizard' featured orchestration by Fripp and composer Keith Tippett, but with minimal rehearsal, the sessions were tense and improvisational.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Lizard》虽然商业反响平平，但因其大胆的融合实验被视为前卫摇滚发展史上的里程碑，影响了后来的实验与金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though commercially modest, 'Lizard' is regarded as a milestone in progressive rock for its bold fusion experiments, influencing later experimental and metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: King Crimson是1968年成立于伦敦的英国前卫摇滚乐队，由吉他手罗伯特·弗里普创立并持续领导。他们以复杂的编曲、古典与爵士融合以及不断变动的成员阵容著称，代表作《In the Court of the Crimson King》开创了前卫摇滚时代。
items.artistIntroEn: King Crimson, formed in London in 1968, is a British progressive rock band founded and led by guitarist Robert Fripp. Known for complex arrangements, classical-jazz fusion, and ever-changing lineups, their debut 'In the Court of the Crimson King' pioneered the progressive rock era.

items.name: Someday My Prince Will Come
items.descriptionZh: 《Someday My Prince Will Come》是迈尔斯·戴维斯六重奏1961年的专辑，风格融合了硬波普与调式爵士。核心特色在于其优雅而松弛的节奏，以及戴维斯标志性的弱音小号，营造出一种梦幻般的氛围。专辑同名曲改编自迪士尼经典，展现了爵士乐对流行文化的独特诠释。
items.descriptionEn: Someday My Prince Will Come is a 1961 album by the Miles Davis Sextet, blending hard bop with modal jazz. Its core feature lies in its elegant, relaxed groove and Davis's signature muted trumpet, creating a dreamy atmosphere. The title track, a Disney classic reinterpretation, showcases jazz's unique take on pop culture.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，迈尔斯·戴维斯正处于阵容调整期。萨克斯手约翰·科尔特兰即将离队，而新成员韦恩·肖特尚未完全融入。录音中，戴维斯特意让科尔特兰独奏了大部分曲目，作为告别礼。有趣的是，专辑同名曲的录制只用了两遍就完成，戴维斯对第一遍的即兴表现极为满意。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Miles Davis was in a period of lineup transition. Saxophonist John Coltrane was about to leave, while new member Wayne Shorter had not yet fully integrated. Davis deliberately let Coltrane solo on most tracks as a farewell gesture. Interestingly, the title track was completed in just two takes, as Davis was extremely satisfied with his improvisation on the first.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈尔斯·戴维斯（1926-1991）是美国爵士乐巨匠，被誉为“爵士变色龙”。他不断引领音乐潮流，从冷爵士到调式爵士再到融合爵士，始终站在创新前沿。其小号演奏以细腻、内敛而充满情感著称，对后世音乐家影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz giant known as the 'jazz chameleon.' He constantly led musical trends, from cool jazz to modal jazz to fusion, always at the forefront of innovation. His trumpet playing was known for its subtlety, restraint, and emotional depth, profoundly influencing generations of musicians.

items.name: G Sides
items.descriptionZh: 《G Sides》是虚拟乐队Gorillaz在2001年发行的B面曲合集，风格融合了另类摇滚、嘻哈、雷鬼和电子音乐。核心特色在于其古怪、低保真的音质，以及主唱2D慵懒的嗓音，呈现出一种颓废而有趣的街头氛围。
items.descriptionEn: G Sides is a B-side compilation by the virtual band Gorillaz, released in 2001. Its style blends alternative rock, hip-hop, reggae, and electronic music. The core feature is its quirky, lo-fi sound and lead singer 2D's lazy vocals, creating a decadent yet playful street atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的曲目大多来自《Gorillaz》同名专辑的录制废案。制作人Danger Mouse和成员Damon Albarn在录音室里即兴创作了大量小样，其中许多因过于实验性而被搁置。后来他们将这些零散的录音整理成《G Sides》，甚至包括一首纯器乐版《Clint Eastwood》的早期雏形。
items.storiesEn: Most tracks on this album came from outtakes during the recording of Gorillaz's self-titled debut. Producer Danger Mouse and member Damon Albarn improvised numerous demos in the studio, many of which were shelved for being too experimental. They later compiled these fragments into G Sides, even including an early instrumental version of 'Clint Eastwood.'
items.artistIntroZh: Gorillaz是一支由Damon Albarn和漫画家Jamie Hewlett于1998年创立的虚拟乐队。乐队由四个动画角色组成，音乐风格��变，融合了摇滚、嘻哈、电子和世界音乐。他们以打破音乐与视觉艺术界限而闻名，是全球最成功的虚拟乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Gorillaz is a virtual band founded in 1998 by Damon Albarn and cartoonist Jamie Hewlett. The band consists of four animated characters, with music that blends rock, hip-hop, electronic, and world music. Known for breaking boundaries between music and visual art, they are the most successful virtual band globally.

items.name: Relayer
items.descriptionZh: 《Relayer》是Yes在1974年发行的前卫摇滚专辑，风格以复杂的长篇史诗结构、不和谐的爵士融合段落和狂野的合成器音效为特色。核心在于其戏剧化的动态变化，从宁静的民谣瞬间到暴烈的摇滚爆发，展现乐队极致的编曲野心。
items.descriptionEn: Relayer is a 1974 progressive rock album by Yes, characterized by complex long-form epics, dissonant jazz-fusion passages, and wild synthesizer sounds. Its core lies in dramatic dynamic shifts, from serene folk moments to explosive rock outbursts, showcasing the band's ultimate compositional ambition.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Relayer》时，Yes正处于人员动荡期。键盘手Rick Wakeman离队，新成员Patrick Moraz临时加入。Moraz的瑞士背景给音乐带来了欧洲古典乐的严谨感，但乐队内部因音乐理念不同频繁争吵。专辑同名曲《The Gates of Delirium》的结尾部分，吉他手Steve Howe和Moraz几乎在录音室里打起来。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Relayer, Yes was in a period of personnel turmoil. Keyboardist Rick Wakeman had left, and new member Patrick Moraz joined temporarily. Moraz's Swiss background brought a European classical rigor, but internal conflicts over musical direction were frequent. At the end of the title track 'The Gates of Delirium,' guitarist Steve Howe and Moraz nearly came to blows in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Relayer》被视为Yes在1970年代前卫摇滚巅峰期的最后一张杰作，其复杂的结构影响了后来的数学摇滚和后摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Relayer is regarded as the last masterpiece of Yes's 1970s progressive rock peak, with its complex structures influencing later math rock and post-rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是1968年成立的英国前卫摇滚乐队，以其复杂的编曲、高超的演奏技巧和哲学性歌词著称。乐队核心成员包括Jon Anderson（主唱）、Steve Howe（吉他）和Chris Squire（贝斯）。他们是前卫摇滚黄金时代的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes is a British progressive rock band formed in 1968, known for complex arrangements, virtuosic musicianship, and philosophical lyrics. Core members include Jon Anderson (vocals), Steve Howe (guitar), and Chris Squire (bass). They are icons of the golden age of progressive rock.

items.name: London Calling
items.descriptionZh: 《London Calling》是英国朋克乐队The Clash在1979年发行的双专辑，风格融合了朋克、雷鬼、摇滚、斯卡和节奏蓝调。核心特色在于其政治化的歌词、粗粝的吉他音色和充满能量的表演，被誉为朋克摇滚的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: London Calling is a 1979 double album by the British punk band The Clash, blending punk, reggae, rock, ska, and R&B. Its core features are politically charged lyrics, gritty guitar tones, and energetic performances, widely hailed as the pinnacle of punk rock.
items.storiesZh: 录制《London Calling》时，乐队预算紧张，只能在一间狭小的录音室里工作。制作人Guy Stevens酗酒成性，经常在控制室里摔椅子，但正是这种混乱激发了乐队的愤怒能量。专辑封面模仿了猫王首张专辑的设计，但贝斯手Paul Simonon砸吉他的瞬间是摄影师抓拍的，并非刻意安排。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of London Calling, the band had a tight budget and worked in a cramped studio. Producer Guy Stevens was a heavy drinker who often threw chairs in the control room, but this chaos fueled the band's raw energy. The album cover mimicked Elvis Presley's debut, but bassist Paul Simonon smashing his guitar was a spontaneous moment captured by the photographer, not staged.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《London Calling》被《滚石》杂志评为1980年代最佳专辑，并入选格莱美名人堂。它打破了朋克音乐的界限，证明了朋克可以承载社会批判和音乐多样性。
items.historicalImpactEn: London Calling was named the best album of the 1980s by Rolling Stone and inducted into the Grammy Hall of Fame. It broke the boundaries of punk, proving punk could carry social critique and musical diversity.
items.artistIntroZh: The Clash是1976年成立的英国朋克乐队，成员包括Joe Strummer、Mick Jones、Paul Simonon和Topper Headon。他们以激进的政治立场、融合多种音乐风格而闻名，被誉为“唯一重要的朋克乐队”。
items.artistIntroEn: The Clash is a British punk band formed in 1976, consisting of Joe Strummer, Mick Jones, Paul Simonon, and Topper Headon. Known for their radical political stance and fusion of multiple genres, they are hailed as 'the only band that matters.'

items.name: Tales from Topographic Oceans
items.descriptionZh: 《Tales from Topographic Oceans》是Yes在1973年发行的双专辑，风格是极端的前卫摇滚，由四首超长史诗组成。核心特色在于其神秘主义歌词、复杂的多乐章结构和大量使用穆格合成器，营造出宏大而晦涩的宇宙叙事感。
items.descriptionEn: Tales from Topographic Oceans is a 1973 double album by Yes, featuring extreme progressive rock with four long epics. Its core features are mystical lyrics, complex multi-movement structures, and extensive use of Moog synthesizers, creating a grand, obscure cosmic narrative.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来源于主唱Jon Anderson阅读的一本关于印度教神秘主义的书。录制过程中，乐队内部矛盾激化，吉他手Steve Howe认为音乐过于冗长，键盘手Rick Wakeman则在巡演中公开批评专辑，甚至穿着印有“这不值得”的T恤上台。录音耗时近半年，预算严重超支。
items.storiesEn: The album's inspiration came from a book on Hindu mysticism read by vocalist Jon Anderson. During recording, internal conflicts escalated: guitarist Steve Howe found the music too lengthy, while keyboardist Rick Wakeman publicly criticized the album on tour, even wearing a T-shirt reading 'It's not worth it' on stage. Recording took nearly six months and severely exceeded budget.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tales from Topographic Oceans》是前��摇滚史上最具争议的专辑之一，它推动了前卫摇滚的极端化，但也因其冗长和自命不凡而成为批评的靶子，标志着前卫摇滚从巅峰走向分化的转折点。
items.historicalImpactEn: Tales from Topographic Oceans is one of the most controversial albums in progressive rock history. It pushed the genre to its extreme but also became a target for criticism due to its length and pretentiousness, marking a turning point from peak to fragmentation.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes是1968年成立的英国前卫摇滚乐队，以其复杂的编曲、高超的演奏技巧和哲学性歌词著称。乐队核心成员包括Jon Anderson（主唱）、Steve Howe（吉他）和Chris Squire（贝斯）。他们是前卫摇滚黄金时代的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes is a British progressive rock band formed in 1968, known for complex arrangements, virtuosic musicianship, and philosophical lyrics. Core members include Jon Anderson (vocals), Steve Howe (guitar), and Chris Squire (bass). They are icons of the golden age of progressive rock.

items.name: Time Out
items.descriptionZh: 《Time Out》是戴夫·布鲁贝克四重奏于1959年发行的爵士乐里程碑专辑，以非传统拍号（如5/4、9/8、7/4）为核心特色，融合古典与爵士元素，创造出既复杂又悦耳的节奏实验。专辑封面由艺术家尼尔·藤田设计，以抽象几何图案呼应音乐的创新性，被誉为“酷爵士”与“西海岸爵士”的典范。
items.descriptionEn: Time Out is a milestone jazz album by The Dave Brubeck Quartet, released in 1959, featuring unconventional time signatures (5/4, 9/8, 7/4) as its core. It blends classical and jazz elements into complex yet melodic rhythmic experiments. The cover art by Neil Fujita uses abstract geometric patterns to mirror the music's innovation, making it a quintessential example of cool jazz and West Coast jazz.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，布鲁贝克坚持使用非标准拍号，但唱片公司担心销量不佳。单曲《Take Five》由中音萨克斯手保罗·戴斯蒙德创作，因采用罕见的5/4拍而成为史上最畅销的爵士单曲之一。乐队在录制时曾因节奏复杂多次NG，最终靠默契配合完成。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Brubeck insisted on using non-standard time signatures despite the label's concerns about poor sales. The single 'Take Five,' composed by alto saxophonist Paul Desmond in rare 5/4 time, became one of the best-selling jazz singles ever. The band endured multiple takes due to rhythmic complexity before nailing it through seamless chemistry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Time Out》是首张销量突破百万的爵士专辑，彻底改变了爵士乐对节奏的认知，并推动了非传统拍号在流行音乐中的普及。
items.historicalImpactEn: Time Out was the first jazz album to sell over a million copies, permanently shifting jazz's rhythmic conventions and popularizing non-traditional time signatures in popular music.
items.artistIntroZh: 戴夫·布鲁贝克（1920-2012）是美国爵士钢琴家、作曲家，以复杂节奏与古典爵士融合著称。他于1951年组建戴夫·布鲁贝克四重奏，成员包括保罗·戴斯蒙德（中音萨克斯）、尤金·赖特（贝斯）和乔·莫雷洛（鼓），以学院派实验精神影响了后世无数音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Dave Brubeck (1920–2012) was an American jazz pianist and composer known for complex rhythms and classical-jazz fusion. He formed the Dave Brubeck Quartet in 1951 with Paul Desmond (alto sax), Eugene Wright (bass), and Joe Morello (drums), influencing countless musicians with their academic experimentalism.

items.name: The Who Sell Out
items.descriptionZh: 《The Who Sell Out》是英国摇滚乐队The Who于1967年发行的概念专辑，以模仿电台广告和伪商业广播形式贯穿全碟，讽刺消费主义。音乐风格融合硬摇滚、迷幻流行和艺术摇滚，歌曲之间插入虚构的广告片段，充满戏谑与反叛精神。
items.descriptionEn: The Who Sell Out is a 1967 concept album by British rock band The Who, structured as a parody of radio commercials and pseudo-commercial broadcasts to satirize consumerism. Its music blends hard rock, psychedelic pop, and art rock, with fictional ad jingles inserted between songs, brimming with mockery and rebellious spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面展示乐队成员为虚构产品代言：皮特·汤森德涂除臭剂、罗杰·达特里抱着巨大除臭剂瓶、基思·穆恩展示烤豆广告。录制时，乐队为模拟电台效果，专门录制了虚假广告语和电台呼号，甚至请来专业广告配音员。
items.storiesEn: The album cover shows band members endorsing fictional products: Pete Townshend applying deodorant, Roger Daltrey holding a giant deodorant bottle, and Keith Moon posing with a baked beans ad. During recording, the band created fake ad jingles and station IDs to mimic radio broadcasts, even hiring professional voice actors.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是摇滚史上最早的概念专辑之一，开创了将广告与音乐结合的讽刺形式，深刻影响了后来的“商业反讽”摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of rock's earliest concept albums, it pioneered the satirical fusion of advertising and music, deeply influencing later 'commercial irony' rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Who是1964年成立于伦敦的英国摇滚乐队，核心成员包括罗杰·达特里（主唱）、皮特·汤森德（吉他）、约翰·恩特维斯托（贝斯）和基思·穆恩（鼓）。以破坏乐器的舞台表演、强力和弦和摇滚歌剧闻名，是“英伦入侵”代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Who, formed in London in 1964, includes Roger Daltrey (vocals), Pete Townshend (guitar), John Entwistle (bass), and Keith Moon (drums). Known for instrument-smashing stage antics, power chords, and rock operas, they are icons of the British Invasion.

items.name: EleKtrik: Live in Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《EleKtrik: Live in Japan》是前卫摇滚乐队King Crimson于2003年发行的现场专辑，收录了在日本巡演期间的表演。风格延续了乐队标志性的复杂编排、金属质感吉他、实验性电子音效和即兴段落，展现了双鼓手阵容的强劲节奏与罗伯特·弗里普的精准吉他控制。
items.descriptionEn: EleKtrik: Live in Japan is a 2003 live album by progressive rock band King Crimson, capturing performances from their Japan tour. It continues the band's signature complex arrangements, metallic guitar textures, experimental electronics, and improvisational passages, showcasing the powerful dual-drummer lineup and Robert Fripp's precise guitar control.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，King Crimson正处于双鼓手阵容（帕特·马斯特洛托和加文·哈里森）时期，演出中两位鼓手经常进行即兴对飙。罗伯特·弗里普在演出中使用了“新标准调弦法”，并大量依赖现场循环效果器，营造出层层叠加的声场。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during King Crimson's dual-drummer era (Pat Mastelotto and Gavin Harrison), the shows often featured improvisational drum duels. Robert Fripp employed his 'New Standard Tuning' and heavily relied on live looping effects to create layered soundscapes.
items.artistIntroZh: King Crimson是一支1968年成立于伦敦的前卫摇滚乐队，由吉他手罗伯特·弗里普创立并持续领导。乐队以不断变化的阵容、复杂的作曲、实验性音景和对摇滚边界的突破闻名，被誉为前卫摇滚的奠基者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: King Crimson is a progressive rock band founded in London in 1968 by guitarist Robert Fripp, who has remained its sole constant member. Renowned for ever-changing lineups, complex compositions, experimental soundscapes, and pushing rock boundaries, they are considered pioneers of progressive rock.

items.name: ISouljaBoyTellem
items.descriptionZh: 《ISouljaBoyTellem》是美国说唱歌手Soulja Boy于2008年发行的第二张录音室专辑，延续了他标志性的“叮当舞曲”风格，融合了嘻哈、电子和舞曲元素。专辑以简单重复的副歌、808鼓机和网络文化影响为特色，主打单曲《Kiss Me Thru the Phone》风靡一时。
items.descriptionEn: ISouljaBoyTellem is the second studio album by American rapper Soulja Boy, released in 2008. It continues his signature 'ringtone rap' style, blending hip-hop, electronic, and dance elements. Featuring simple repetitive hooks, 808 drum machines, and internet culture influences, the lead single 'Kiss Me Thru the Phone' became a massive hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源于Soulja Boy的粉丝群体自称为“Soulja Boy Tell 'Em”，意为“Soulja Boy告诉他���”。录制时，他大量使用自家卧室录音室和简单软件，许多歌曲灵感来自网络聊天和短信文化。《Kiss Me Thru the Phone》的副歌灵感来自他当时与异地恋女友的通话经历。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from Soulja Boy's fanbase calling themselves 'Soulja Boy Tell 'Em.' He recorded much of it in his home bedroom studio using simple software, with many songs inspired by online chat and texting culture. The chorus of 'Kiss Me Thru the Phone' was inspired by his long-distance relationship calls.
items.historicalImpactZh: Soulja Boy凭借此专辑巩固了“网络说唱”先驱地位，推动了DIY音乐制作和社交媒体营销在嘻哈界的普及。
items.historicalImpactEn: Soulja Boy cemented his status as a pioneer of 'internet rap' with this album, advancing DIY music production and social media marketing in hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Soulja Boy（本名DeAndre Cortez Way，1990年出生）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，以2007年单曲《Crank That (Soulja Boy)》爆红。他因通过MySpace和YouTube推广音乐、开创“叮当舞曲”风潮而成为网络时代嘻哈偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Soulja Boy (born DeAndre Cortez Way, 1990) is an American rapper and producer who exploded with his 2007 single 'Crank That (Soulja Boy).' He became an internet-era hip-hop icon by promoting music via MySpace and YouTube and pioneering the 'ringtone rap' trend.

items.name: Past Future
items.descriptionZh: 《Past Future》是日本天后安室奈美惠于2009年发行的原创专辑，以电子舞曲、R&B和流行曲风为主，融合了前卫的合成器音效和强劲的节拍。专辑主题围绕“过去与未来”的对比，探讨成长与自我重塑，展现了安室从少女偶像向成熟艺术家的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Past Future is a 2009 original album by Japanese pop diva Namie Amuro, featuring electronic dance, R&B, and pop styles with avant-garde synth textures and powerful beats. Themed around the contrast of 'past and future,' it explores growth and self-reinvention, marking Amuro's transition from teen idol to mature artist.
items.storiesZh: 安室奈美惠在录制此专辑时，正值她事业转型期，她亲自参与了选曲和制作方向，希望打破以往偶像形象。主打歌《Dr.》的编曲融合了电子与摇滚元素，MV中她以冷艳造型示人，引发热议。专辑名《Past Future》取自她巡回演唱会概念，寓意“从过去走向未来”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Amuro was at a career turning point and personally involved in track selection and production direction to break away from her idol image. The lead track 'Dr.' blended electronic and rock elements, and its music video featuring her cool, glamorous look sparked buzz. The album title Past Future was taken from her tour concept, symbolizing moving from past to future.
items.artistIntroZh: 安室奈美惠（1977年出生）是日本流行天后，1990年代以“安室现象”席卷亚洲，被誉为“冲绳的奇迹”。她以多变的音乐风格（从流行、R&B到电子舞曲）、精湛的舞台表演和时尚影响力著称，是日本音乐史上最成功的女性歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Namie Amuro (born 1977) is a Japanese pop icon who took Asia by storm in the 1990s with the 'Amura phenomenon,' hailed as the 'Miracle from Okinawa.' Known for her versatile music (pop, R&B, EDM), dazzling stage performances, and fashion influence, she is one of Japan's best-selling female artists ever.

items.name: Single Collection: Hotchpotch
items.descriptionZh: 《Single Collection: Hotchpotch》是坂本真绫的首张精选集，收录了她1996年至1999年间发行的单曲，包括与菅野洋子合作的经典作品。风格以J-Pop为主，融合了电子、民谣和管弦乐元素，展现了她在动画歌曲领域的独特嗓音与青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: Single Collection: Hotchpotch is Maaya Sakamoto's first compilation album, featuring singles from 1996 to 1999, including iconic collaborations with Yoko Kanno. The style is primarily J-Pop, blending electronic, folk, and orchestral elements, showcasing her unique voice and youthful energy in anime songs.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的标题“Hotchpotch”意为“大杂烩”，象征其收录曲目的多样性。录制过程中，坂本真绫年仅19岁，菅野洋子亲自指导她演绎不同风格的歌曲，甚至为了某首快歌让她反复练习气息控制，最终成就了专辑中充满活力的声音表现。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Hotchpotch' means 'mixture', reflecting the diversity of its tracks. During recording, Maaya Sakamoto was only 19, and Yoko Kanno personally guided her through different styles. For an upbeat song, she had Sakamoto repeatedly practice breath control, resulting in the energetic vocal performance on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集巩固了坂本真绫作为90年代末日本动画歌姬的地位，并为后来的声优歌手跨界发展树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation solidified Maaya Sakamoto's status as a late-90s anime song diva and set a benchmark for voice actors transitioning into singing careers.
items.artistIntroZh: 坂本真绫（1980年出生）是日本歌手、声优和演员。8岁起为动画配音，1996年以单曲《约束はいらない》出道，与作曲家菅野洋子长期合作。她以清澈的嗓音和情感丰富的演绎著称，代表作包括《机动战士高达SEED DESTINY》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Maaya Sakamoto (born 1980) is a Japanese singer, voice actress, and actress. She began voice acting at age 8 and debuted as a singer in 1996 with 'Yakusoku wa Iranai', collaborating extensively with composer Yoko Kanno. Known for her clear voice and emotional delivery, she is famous for works like 'Mobile Suit Gundam SEED DESTINY'.

items.name: Kerplunk
items.descriptionZh: 《Kerplunk》是绿日乐队的第二张录音室专辑，风格以朋克摇滚为主，融合了流行旋律和冲浪摇滚元素。专辑整体充满青春叛逆气息��歌词探讨了无聊、爱情和社会疏离感，奠定了乐队早期标志性的��节奏与能量。
items.descriptionEn: Kerplunk is Green Day's second studio album, featuring punk rock with pop melodies and surf rock elements. The album exudes youthful rebellion, with lyrics exploring boredom, love, and social alienation, establishing the band's early signature fast pace and energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于明尼阿波利斯的一家小型录音室，预算仅2万美元。鼓手约翰·基夫迈耶（Al Sobrante）在录制后不久便离队，但专辑中仍保留了他的部分。主唱比利·乔·阿姆斯特朗曾回忆，录制时他们常因设备故障而即兴调整，反而增添了原始感。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small Minneapolis studio on a budget of only $20,000. Drummer John Kiffmeyer (Al Sobrante) left shortly after recording, but his parts remain. Lead singer Billie Joe Armstrong recalled that equipment malfunctions often forced improvisation, adding to the raw feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Kerplunk》是绿日从地下朋克场景走向主流的关键一步，其独立发行的成功吸引了主流厂牌关注，为后来的《Dookie》铺平道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: Kerplunk was a crucial step for Green Day from the underground punk scene to mainstream success; its independent success attracted major label attention, paving the way for 'Dookie'.
items.artistIntroZh: 绿日乐队（1987年成立）是美国朋克摇滚乐队，由主唱比利·乔·阿姆斯特朗、贝斯手迈克·迪恩特和鼓手特雷·库尔组成。他们以旋律化朋克和反叛歌词闻名，1994年专辑《Dookie》使其成为全球巨星，累计销量超7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Green Day (formed 1987) is an American punk rock band consisting of Billie Joe Armstrong (vocals/guitar), Mike Dirnt (bass), and Tré Cool (drums). Known for melodic punk and rebellious lyrics, their 1994 album 'Dookie' made them global superstars, with over 75 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Hunky Dory
items.descriptionZh: 《Hunky Dory》是大卫·鲍伊的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了艺术摇滚、民谣和流行，歌词充满超现实主义与哲学思考。专辑以钢琴驱动的旋律为主，展现了鲍伊从早期民谣向华丽摇滚转型的过渡，被誉为其艺术巅峰的开端。
items.descriptionEn: Hunky Dory is David Bowie's fourth studio album, blending art rock, folk, and pop with surrealistic and philosophical lyrics. Driven by piano melodies, it marks Bowie's transition from early folk to glam rock, hailed as the beginning of his artistic peak.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦的Trident Studios，鲍伊在创作时深受安迪·沃霍尔和尼采影响。主打歌《Changes》的钢琴部分由里克·韦克曼演奏，鲍伊曾开玩��说这首歌差点被剪掉，因为唱片公司觉得太实验。录制期间，鲍伊还即兴为《Life on Mars?》创作了歌词，灵感来自一幅画。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Trident Studios in London, Bowie was heavily influenced by Andy Warhol and Nietzsche during creation. The piano on 'Changes' was played by Rick Wakeman; Bowie joked the song was almost cut for being too experimental. He improvised lyrics for 'Life on Mars?' inspired by a painting during sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hunky Dory》被公认为大卫·鲍伊最具影响力的早期专辑之一，其创新性和艺术深度为70年代华丽摇滚运动奠定了基础，并影响了无数后来者。
items.historicalImpactEn: Hunky Dory is widely regarded as one of David Bowie's most influential early albums, whose innovation and artistic depth laid the groundwork for the 1970s glam rock movement and influenced countless artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 大卫·鲍伊（1947-2016）是英国摇滚音乐家、演员和艺术家，以不断重塑音乐风格和舞台形象著称。从1960年代出道至2016年去世，他推出了《Space Oddity》《Heroes》等经典，是流行文化偶像，被誉为“摇滚变色龙”。
items.artistIntroEn: David Bowie (1947-2016) was a British rock musician, actor, and artist, known for constantly reinventing his music and stage persona. From his 1960s debut to his death in 2016, he produced classics like 'Space Oddity' and 'Heroes', becoming a pop culture icon and the 'chameleon of rock'.

items.name: A Day at the Races
items.descriptionZh: 《A Day at the Races》是皇后乐队的第五张录音室专辑，风格延续了前作《A Night at the Opera》的华丽摇滚与歌剧摇滚，但更注重整体性和声乐编排。专辑融合了硬摇滚、福音和流行，歌词充满戏剧性和幽默感。
items.descriptionEn: A Day at the Races is Queen's fifth studio album, continuing the glam and opera rock of 'A Night at the Opera' but with greater emphasis on cohesion and vocal arrangements. It blends hard rock, gospel, and pop, with dramatic and humorous lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于全球多个录音室，包括伦敦、洛杉矶和慕尼黑。制作期间，乐队成员因创作分歧激烈争论，尤其是弗雷迪·默丘里和布莱恩·梅在歌曲《Somebody to Love》的编曲上反复修改。鼓手罗杰·泰勒曾开玩笑说，这张专辑是“我们最昂贵的争吵”。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded across multiple studios worldwide, including London, Los Angeles, and Munich. During production, band members had heated creative disagreements, especially Freddie Mercury and Brian May over the arrangement of 'Somebody to Love'. Drummer Roger Taylor joked it was 'our most expensive argument'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管未达到前作的高度，《A Day at the Races》仍被视为皇后乐队艺术探索的重要一环，其复杂的和声和制作技术影响了后续摇滚歌剧的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though not reaching the heights of its predecessor, 'A Day at the Races' is seen as a key part of Queen's artistic exploration; its complex harmonies and production techniques influenced later rock opera developments.
items.artistIntroZh: 皇后乐队（1970年成立）是英国摇滚乐队，由弗雷迪·默丘里（主唱）、布莱恩·梅（吉他）、约翰·迪肯（贝斯）和罗杰·泰勒（鼓手）组成。他们以多元风格和宏大现场表演闻名，代表作《Bohemian Rhapsody》成为摇滚史经典，全球销量超3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Queen (formed 1970) is a British rock band consisting of Freddie Mercury (vocals), Brian May (guitar), John Deacon (bass), and Roger Taylor (drums). Known for diverse styles and grand live performances, their 'Bohemian Rhapsody' is a rock classic; they have sold over 300 million records worldwide.

items.name: Stillmatic
items.descriptionZh: 《Stillmatic》是纳斯（Nas）的第五张录音室专辑，风格以东海岸嘻哈为主，融合了灵魂乐采样和硬核说唱。专辑主题涉及街头生活、种族不平等和自我救赎，以其深刻的歌词和叙事性著称，被视为纳斯职业生涯的复兴之作。
items.descriptionEn: Stillmatic is Nas's fifth studio album, primarily East Coast hip-hop with soul samples and hardcore rap. Themes include street life, racial inequality, and redemption, known for its profound lyrics and storytelling, regarded as a career revival for Nas.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约的多个录音室，纳斯在创作时正处于与Jay-Z的经典嘻哈对决中。主打歌《Ether》直接回应了Jay-Z的挑衅，录制时纳斯情绪激昂，几乎一气呵成。制作人Large Professor回忆，纳斯为了打磨歌词，经常在录音室熬夜到凌晨。
items.storiesEn: Recorded across several New York studios, Nas was in the midst of his classic hip-hop feud with Jay-Z. The lead single 'Ether' directly responded to Jay-Z's taunts; Nas recorded it with intense emotion, nearly in one take. Producer Large Professor recalled Nas often stayed in the studio until dawn refining lyrics.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Stillmatic》重新确立了纳斯在嘻哈界的地位，其单曲《Ether》成为diss曲目经典，影响了说唱对决文化。专辑也被视为东海岸嘻哈复兴的标志之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Stillmatic reestablished Nas's status in hip-hop; its single 'Ether' became a classic diss track, influencing rap battle culture. The album is also seen as a marker of East Coast hip-hop revival.
items.artistIntroZh: 纳斯（Nas，1973年出生）是美国说唱歌手和词曲作者，1994年以首张专辑《Illmatic》出道，被誉为东海岸嘻哈的巅峰之作。他以复杂的押韵和街头叙事闻名，职业生涯跨越30年，被公认为史上最伟大的说唱歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas (born 1973) is an American rapper and songwriter, debuting in 1994 with 'Illmatic', hailed as a peak of East Coast hip-hop. Known for complex rhymes and street narratives, his career spans 30 years, widely regarded as one of the greatest rappers of all time.

items.name: Razorblade Romance
items.descriptionZh: 《Razorblade Romance》是芬兰乐队HIM的第二张录音室专辑，融合了哥特摇滚、重金属和流行旋律，呈现出一种浪漫而阴暗的独特风格。主唱Ville Valo低沉性感的嗓音与流畅的吉他旋律相得益彰，专辑中的情歌既充满爱意又带着一丝忧郁，堪称“爱情金属”流派的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: Razorblade Romance is the second studio album by Finnish band HIM, blending gothic rock, heavy metal, and pop melodies to create a uniquely romantic yet dark style. Vocalist Ville Valo's deep, seductive voice complements the smooth guitar riffs, with love songs that are both passionate and melancholic, making it a quintessential example of the 'love metal' genre.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队曾因唱片公司内部变动而面临资金短缺，但成员们坚持在赫尔辛基一间地下室里完成大部分录音。主唱Ville Valo回忆说，他们经常在深夜录制，因为白天要打工维持生计。专辑封面上的心形图案最初被公司认为过于阴郁，但最终成为乐队的标志性符号。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, the band faced financial shortages due to internal changes at their record label, but they persisted in finishing most of the sessions in a basement in Helsinki. Ville Valo recalled that they often recorded late at night because they had to work day jobs to make ends meet. The heart-shaped logo on the cover was initially deemed too gloomy by the label, but it later became the band's iconic symbol.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了‘爱情金属’流派的流行，影响了后续许多哥特摇滚和另类金属乐队，并在欧洲多国获得金唱片认证。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album popularized the 'love metal' genre, influencing many subsequent gothic rock and alternative metal bands, and achieved gold record status in several European countries.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM是1991年成立于芬兰赫尔辛基的摇滚乐队，以主唱Ville Valo为核心。他们的音乐融合了哥特摇滚、重金属和流行元素，被称为‘爱情金属’。乐队在2000年代初期获得国际声誉，代表作包括《Join Me in Death》和《Wings of a Butterfly》。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM is a rock band formed in Helsinki, Finland in 1991, centered around vocalist Ville Valo. Their music blends gothic rock, heavy metal, and pop, often termed 'love metal.' They gained international fame in the early 2000s, with hits like 'Join Me in Death' and 'Wings of a Butterfly.'

items.name: Zuhältertape Volume 3
items.descriptionZh: 《Zuhältertape Volume 3》是德国说唱歌手Kollegah的第三张混音带，以其复杂的双关语、夸耀的街头叙事和硬核的嘻哈节拍著称。专辑延续了‘皮条客’主题，歌词充满挑衅和黑色幽默，制作上大量使用合成器和重低音，展现了德国说唱在2000年代末期的成熟面貌。
items.descriptionEn: Zuhältertape Volume 3 is the third mixtape by German rapper Kollegah, known for its complex wordplay, boastful street narratives, and hardcore hip-hop beats. Continuing the 'pimp' theme, the lyrics are provocative and darkly humorous, while the production heavily features synthesizers and heavy bass, showcasing the maturity of German rap in the late 2000s.
items.storiesZh: Kollegah在录制这张混音带时，曾因法律纠纷一度中断创作。他后来透露，部分歌词是在监狱中构思的，出狱后他马上进入录音室连续工作72小时完成了最终版本。专辑中一首歌的采样来自一部德国黑帮电影，但未获得版权许可，导致发行后不得不修改。
items.storiesEn: Kollegah's recording of this mixtape was interrupted by legal troubles. He later revealed that some lyrics were conceived in prison, and after his release, he immediately entered the studio and worked for 72 hours straight to complete the final version. One track sampled a German gangster film without proper clearance, forcing a revision after release.
items.artistIntroZh: Kollegah（本名Felix Blume）是德国著名说唱歌手，以复杂的押韵技巧和挑衅性的‘皮条客’形象闻名。他于2000年代中期出道，迅速成为德国嘻哈界最具争议和商业成功的艺人之一，多次获得德国嘻哈奖项。
items.artistIntroEn: Kollegah (born Felix Blume) is a prominent German rapper known for his complex rhyme schemes and provocative 'pimp' persona. Debuting in the mid-2000s, he quickly became one of the most controversial and commercially successful figures in German hip-hop, winning multiple German hip-hop awards.

items.name: Dive
items.descriptionZh: 《Dive》是日本歌手坂本真绫的第二张录音室专辑，风格以流行和电子为主，融合了爵士和民谣元素。专辑由菅野洋子担任主要制作人，旋律优美且充满梦幻感，歌词多探讨成长与自我发现。坂本真绫清澈透明的嗓音为整张专辑增添了空灵的气质。
items.descriptionEn: Dive is the second studio album by Japanese singer Maaya Sakamoto, primarily pop and electronic with jazz and folk elements. Produced mainly by Yoko Kanno, the melodies are beautiful and dreamy, with lyrics exploring growth and self-discovery. Sakamoto's clear, ethereal voice adds an airy quality to the album.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，坂本真绫年仅18岁，正在高中就读，因此录音时间常安排在放学后。菅野洋子为了配合她的声线，特意调整了编曲的调性。专辑同名曲《Dive》原本是为一部动画创作的，但因故未被采用，最终收录进专辑中成为隐藏曲目。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Maaya Sakamoto was only 18 and still in high school, so sessions were often scheduled after school. Yoko Kanno adjusted the key of several arrangements to suit her voice. The title track 'Dive' was originally written for an anime but was ultimately not used; it was included as a hidden track on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为坂本真绫音乐生涯的重要转折点，确立了她与菅野洋子长期合作的基础，并对90年代末日本流行/电子跨界音乐产生了一定影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a turning point in Maaya Sakamoto's career, establishing her long-term collaboration with Yoko Kanno and influencing the pop-electronic crossover scene in late 90s Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: 坂本真绫是日本歌手、声优和演员，1980年出生于东京。她8岁开始配音，1996年以歌手身份出道，与作曲家菅野洋子的合作广受赞誉。她的音乐风格多变，嗓音清亮，代表作包括《奇迹之海》和《白金》。
items.artistIntroEn: Maaya Sakamoto is a Japanese singer, voice actress, and actress born in Tokyo in 1980. She began voice acting at age 8 and debuted as a singer in 1996. Her collaboration with composer Yoko Kanno is widely acclaimed. Known for her clear voice and versatile style, her hits include 'The Garden of Everything' and 'Platinum.'

items.name: Please Myself
items.descriptionZh: 《Please Myself》是香港歌手王菲的第八张粤语专辑，也是她首张全创作专辑（词曲均由王菲本人包办）。风格以另类流行和梦幻流行为主，融合了电子和摇滚元素，展现出她早期对独立音乐的探索。专辑中的歌曲充满个人色彩，歌词直白而感性，预示了她后来更为前卫的音乐方向。
items.descriptionEn: Please Myself is the eighth Cantonese album by Hong Kong singer Faye Wong and her first fully self-written album (both lyrics and music). Stylistically alternative pop and dream pop with electronic and rock elements, it showcases her early exploration of independent music. The songs are deeply personal, with candid and emotive lyrics, foreshadowing her later avant-garde direction.
items.storiesZh: 王菲在录制这张专辑时，正经历与音乐人窦唯的热恋，两人在录音室里经常即兴合作。专辑中的《冷战》和《诱惑我》都是在凌晨录制完成的，王菲要求关掉所有灯光，仅靠蜡烛照明以营造氛围。她曾开玩笑说，这张专辑是‘写给自己的情书’。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Faye Wong was in a passionate relationship with musician Dou Wei, and the two often improvised together in the studio. Tracks like 'Cold War' and 'Tempt Me' were recorded in the early morning hours, with all lights turned off and only candles for atmosphere. She once jokingly called this album 'a love letter to myself.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为王菲首张全创作专辑，它标志着她从主流偶像向独立创作歌手的转型，对90年代中后期华语流行音乐产生了深远的启发。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Faye Wong's first fully self-written album, it marked her transition from mainstream idol to independent singer-songwriter, deeply inspiring the Chinese pop music scene in the mid-to-late 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲是中国香港著名歌手和演员，1969年出生于北京。她以空灵的嗓音和多变的音乐风格闻名，从粤语流行到另类摇滚均有涉猎。她是华语乐坛最具影响力的女歌手之一，代表作包括《容易受伤的女人》和《红豆》。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong is a renowned Hong Kong singer and actress, born in Beijing in 1969. Famous for her ethereal voice and versatile musical style, ranging from Cantopop to alternative rock, she is one of the most influential female artists in Chinese music, with hits like 'The Vulnerable Woman' and 'Red Bean.'

items.name: The Frank Zappa AAAFNRAAA Birthday Bundle
items.descriptionZh: 《The Frank Zappa AAAFNRAAA Birthday Bundle》是美国作曲家Frank Zappa逝世后发行的纪念合辑，包含现场录音、未发表曲目和排练片段。风格涵盖摇滚、爵士、古典和实验音乐，展现了他无与伦比的创作广度。这套专辑以数字形式发行，旨在庆祝他的生日，是Zappa粉丝的珍贵资料库。
items.descriptionEn: The Frank Zappa AAAFNRAAA Birthday Bundle is a posthumous commemorative compilation by American composer Frank Zappa, featuring live recordings, unreleased tracks, and rehearsal snippets. The style spans rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music, showcasing his unparalleled creative range. Released digitally to celebrate his birthday, it is a valuable archive for Zappa fans.
items.storiesZh: 这套专辑的素材来自Zappa家族档案库，其中包括一盘1974年失而复得的录音带，上面标注着‘不要擦除’。Zappa的儿子Dweezil在整理时发现这些录音未经任何后期处理，保留了原始瑕疵和即兴对话。专辑名中的‘AAAFNRAAA’是Zappa自创的缩写，意为‘绝对荒谬的生日快乐’。
items.storiesEn: The material came from the Zappa family archives, including a long-lost 1974 tape labeled 'Do Not Erase.' Zappa's son Dweezil discovered these recordings unmastered, preserving raw flaws and improvisational chatter. The acronym 'AAAFNRAAA' in the title is Zappa's own creation, standing for 'Absolutely Absurdly Awful F***ing Nonsensical Ridiculous Absurd Anniversary.'
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，1940年出生于巴尔的摩。他以融合摇滚、爵士、古典和实验音乐而闻名，作品充满复杂的编曲和尖锐的社会讽刺。他是20世纪最具原创性的音乐家之一，代表作包括《Hot Rats》和《Joe's Garage》。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist born in Baltimore in 1940. Known for blending rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music, his work features complex arrangements and sharp social satire. He is one of the most original musicians of the 20th century, with seminal works like 'Hot Rats' and 'Joe's Garage.'

items.name: Philly '76
items.descriptionZh: 《Philly '76》是弗兰克·扎帕于2009年发行的现场专辑，记录了他1976年在费城的演出。风格融合了爵士摇滚、实验摇滚和即兴演奏，展现了扎帕标志性的复杂编曲与讽刺幽默。核心特色是乐队的高超技艺和扎帕独特的吉他独奏。
items.descriptionEn: Philly '76 is a live album by Frank Zappa released in 2009, capturing his 1976 performance in Philadelphia. Blending jazz-rock, experimental rock, and improvisation, it showcases Zappa's signature complex arrangements and satirical humor, highlighted by virtuosic musicianship and distinctive guitar solos.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音源自在费城“光谱剧院”的演出，当时扎帕的乐队正处于黄金时期。有趣的是，扎帕曾因对现场录音质量不满意而搁置多年，直到2009年才由他的遗孀盖尔·扎帕整理发行。录音中包含了大量即兴段落，体现了乐队成员之间的默契互动。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at the Spectrum in Philadelphia during Zappa's band's prime. Interestingly, Zappa shelved the tapes for years due to dissatisfaction with the sound quality, until his widow Gail Zappa released them in 2009. The recording features extensive improvisation, reflecting the tight interplay among band members.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕（1940-1993）是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，以其跨风格的音乐实验、社会讽刺和精湛的吉他演奏闻名。他发行了60多张专辑，从摇滚、爵士到古典和电子音乐，被誉为20世纪最具创新精神的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist, known for his cross-genre musical experiments, social satire, and virtuosic guitar playing. With over 60 albums spanning rock, jazz, classical, and electronic music, he is regarded as one of the most innovative musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Everything Is Healing Nicely
items.descriptionZh: 《Everything Is Healing Nicely》是弗兰克·扎帕于1999年发行的器乐专辑，主要基于他1991年在布拉格的演出录音。风格以复杂的前卫摇滚和现代古典融合为主，突出管弦乐与摇滚乐队的结合。核心特色是扎帕对旋律与节奏的精密控制。
items.descriptionEn: Everything Is Healing Nicely is an instrumental album by Frank Zappa released in 1999, largely based on his 1991 performance in Prague. Blending progressive rock and modern classical, it highlights the fusion of orchestral and rock elements, with Zappa's meticulous control over melody and rhythm as its core feature.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的素材来自扎帕在捷克斯洛伐克天鹅绒革命后的首次演出，当时他与布拉格交响乐团合作。录制过程中，扎帕对乐团的排练要求极为严格，甚至亲自指挥。有趣的是，专辑标题源于扎帕在排练时对乐团成员说的玩笑话：“一切都在好转。”
items.storiesEn: The album's material comes from Zappa's first performance after the Velvet Revolution in Czechoslovakia, with the Prague Symphony Orchestra. During rehearsals, Zappa was extremely demanding, even conducting himself. Amusingly, the title stems from a joke he told the orchestra: 'Everything is healing nicely.'
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕（1940-1993）是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，以其跨风格的音乐实验、社会讽刺和精湛的吉他演奏闻名。他发行了60多张专辑，从摇滚、爵士到古典和电子音乐，被誉为20世纪最具创新精神的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist, known for his cross-genre musical experiments, social satire, and virtuosic guitar playing. With over 60 albums spanning rock, jazz, classical, and electronic music, he is regarded as one of the most innovative musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Show Your Love
items.descriptionZh: 《Show Your Love》是蔡依林于2000年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲和R&B为主，并融入了电子元素。核心特色是蔡依林从少女偶像向实力歌手的转型，专辑中的快歌如《Show Your Love》展现了她的唱跳实力，慢歌则突出了情感表达。
items.descriptionEn: Show Your Love is Jolin Tsai's fourth studio album, released in 2000, featuring pop dance and R&B with electronic influences. It marks her transition from a teen idol to a serious artist, with upbeat tracks like the title song showcasing her singing and dancing skills, while ballads highlight emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，蔡依林年仅20岁，但她已开始积极参与选曲和制作方向。专辑同名主打歌《Show Your Love》翻唱自韩国歌手朴志胤的歌曲，蔡依林在录音室反复练习韩语发音和舞蹈动作，力求完美。专辑发行后，她在台湾举办了首场大型个人演唱会。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, 20-year-old Jolin Tsai actively participated in song selection and production direction. The title track 'Show Your Love' is a cover of a song by Korean singer Park Ji-yoon; Jolin practiced Korean pronunciation and dance moves repeatedly in the studio. After its release, she held her first major solo concert in Taiwan.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助蔡依林巩固了在华语乐坛的地位，为她后续转型为“流行天后”奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped solidify Jolin Tsai's position in the Mandopop scene, laying the groundwork for her later transformation into a 'pop diva'.
items.artistIntroZh: 蔡依林（1980年生）是华语流行歌手、演员和企业家，被誉为“亚洲流行天后”。她以多变的音乐风格、精湛的舞蹈和不断突破的形象著称，自1999年出道以来，发行了多张畅销专辑，获得无数奖项，是华语乐坛最具影响力的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jolin Tsai (born 1980) is a Mandopop singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known as the 'Asian Pop Diva.' Renowned for her versatile music style, exceptional dance skills, and ever-evolving image, she has released numerous hit albums since her 1999 debut, winning countless awards and becoming one of the most influential female artists in Chinese music.

items.name: Wind & Wuthering
items.descriptionZh: 《Wind & Wuthering》是英国前卫摇滚乐队创世纪于1976年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格延续了乐队标志性的复杂编曲、诗意歌词和交响摇滚。核心特色是吉他手史蒂夫·哈克特离队前的最后一张专辑，音乐充满戏剧性和氛围感。
items.descriptionEn: Wind & Wuthering is the eighth studio album by British progressive rock band Genesis, released in 1976. It continues their signature complex arrangements, poetic lyrics, and symphonic rock. Notably, it is guitarist Steve Hackett's final album with the band, featuring dramatic and atmospheric compositions.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称和概念受艾米莉·勃朗特的小说《呼啸山庄》启发，标题中的“Wuthering”即源于此。录制过程中，乐队内部已出现分歧，吉他手史蒂夫·哈克特因创作理念不合决定离队。尽管如此，专辑中如《One for the Vine》等曲目展现了乐队在彼得·加布里埃尔离开后仍保持的高水准。
items.storiesEn: The album title and concept were inspired by Emily Brontë's novel Wuthering Heights. During recording, internal tensions grew, leading guitarist Steve Hackett to leave due to creative differences. Despite this, tracks like 'One for the Vine' showcase the band's high standard even after Peter Gabriel's departure.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是创世纪乐队早期前卫摇滚风格的巅峰之一，也被视为吉他手史蒂夫·哈克特在乐队中的告别之作，对后续前卫摇滚乐队产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album represents one of the peaks of Genesis's early progressive rock style and serves as guitarist Steve Hackett's farewell, profoundly influencing subsequent progressive rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: 创世纪乐队（Genesis）成立于1967年，是英国最具影响力的前卫摇滚乐队之一。早期以复杂编曲和戏剧性表演著称，成员包括彼得·加布里埃尔、菲尔·柯林斯等。乐队历经多次风格转变，从艺术摇滚到流行摇滚，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Genesis, formed in 1967, is one of the most influential British progressive rock bands. Known for complex arrangements and theatrical performances, members included Peter Gabriel and Phil Collins. The band evolved from art rock to pop rock, selling over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: Satanic Rites
items.descriptionZh: 《Satanic Rites》是瑞士极端金属乐队地狱之锤于1983年发行的首张EP，风格为原始黑金属和死亡金属的雏形。核心特色是极度粗糙的音质、暴烈的鼓点和邪恶的氛围，被视为早期极端金属的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Satanic Rites is the debut EP by Swiss extreme metal band Hellhammer, released in 1983. It features raw black metal and proto-death metal, characterized by extremely lo-fi production, aggressive drumming, and an evil atmosphere, considered a milestone in early extreme metal.
items.storiesZh: 这张EP在极低预算下录制，乐队成员当时只有十几岁。录音条件简陋到鼓手甚至用纸板箱代替部分鼓皮。尽管音质粗糙，但EP中的《Messiah》等歌曲后来成为黑金属经典。乐队仅存在两年，但成员后来组建了更著名的凯尔特冰霜乐队。
items.storiesEn: The EP was recorded on a shoestring budget by teenage band members. The recording conditions were so primitive that the drummer used cardboard boxes to replace some drum heads. Despite the raw sound, tracks like 'Messiah' later became black metal classics. The band lasted only two years, but members later formed the more famous Celtic Frost.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张EP对第二波黑金属浪潮（如Mayhem、Burzum）产生了直接而深远的影响，被誉为极端金属的奠基之作之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This EP had a direct and profound influence on the second wave of black metal (e.g., Mayhem, Burzum) and is hailed as a foundational work of extreme metal.
items.artistIntroZh: 地狱之锤（Hellhammer）是瑞士极端金属乐队，活跃于1982-1984年。他们以原始、暴戾的音乐风格著称，虽然只发行了一张EP和一张合辑，但影响了整个黑金属和死亡金属流派。乐队解散后，核心成员汤姆·加布里埃尔·费舍尔（Tom Gabriel Fischer）组建了凯尔特冰霜。
items.artistIntroEn: Hellhammer was a Swiss extreme metal band active from 1982 to 1984. Known for their raw, violent sound, they released only one EP and a compilation but influenced the entire black and death metal genres. After disbanding, core member Tom Gabriel Fischer formed Celtic Frost.

items.name: Music Machine
items.descriptionZh: 《Music Machine》是瑞典流行乐队Melody Club的第二张专辑，融合了合成器流行与新浪潮元素，旋律轻快、节奏明快，充满复古未来感的电子音色。专辑以 catchy 的副歌和精致的编曲著称，呈现出一种无忧无虑的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Music Machine is the second album by Swedish pop band Melody Club, blending synth-pop and new wave with upbeat melodies, driving rhythms, and retro-futuristic electronic textures. Known for its catchy choruses and polished arrangements, it exudes a carefree party vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于斯德哥尔摩的乡间别墅，乐队成员经常在录音间隙去附近的湖边游泳。主唱Kristofer Östergren回忆说，他们曾因半夜灵感突现，用厨房锅具当打击乐器录制了一段节奏，最终被用在了专辑的某首B面曲中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a countryside villa near Stockholm, where band members often took breaks to swim in a nearby lake. Lead singer Kristofer Östergren recalled a late-night burst of inspiration when they used kitchen pots as percussion, which ended up on a B-side track.
items.artistIntroZh: Melody Club成立于2000年的瑞典韦克舍，由主唱Kristofer Östergren和吉他手Erik Stenemo领衔。他们的音乐深受80年代合成器流行影响，以色彩鲜明的舞台形象和朗朗上口的旋律在斯堪的纳维亚地区获得成功。
items.artistIntroEn: Melody Club formed in 2000 in Växjö, Sweden, led by vocalist Kristofer Östergren and guitarist Erik Stenemo. Influenced by 80s synth-pop, they achieved success in Scandinavia with colorful stage personas and infectious melodies.

items.name: John Wesley Harding
items.descriptionZh: 《John Wesley Harding》是Bob Dylan从民谣摇滚转向乡村和叙事民谣的关键专辑。风格简约内省，以原声吉他、口琴和低沉的歌声为主，歌词充满圣经隐喻和超现实意象，整体氛围冷静而神秘。
items.descriptionEn: John Wesley Harding marks Bob Dylan's shift from folk-rock to country and narrative folk. Stripped-down and introspective, it features acoustic guitar, harmonica, and low-key vocals, with lyrics rich in biblical allegory and surreal imagery, creating a calm yet mysterious atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纳什维尔，仅用了两次三小时的 sessions 完成。Dylan坚持让乐手即兴演奏，拒绝过度排练。有趣的是，专辑封面上的四棵树据说是Dylan亲自挑选的，象征着他当时对自然和简单生活的向往。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Nashville in just two three-hour sessions, Dylan insisted on improvisation and minimal rehearsal. Interestingly, the four trees on the album cover were reportedly chosen by Dylan himself, symbolizing his longing for nature and simplicity at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为Dylan艺术转型的里程碑，影响了后来的乡村摇滚和另类乡村运动，如Uncle Tupelo和Wilco。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a milestone in Dylan's artistic evolution, it influenced later country-rock and alt-country movements, including Uncle Tupelo and Wilco.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Dylan，美国创作歌手、诺贝尔文学奖得主，自1960年代起定义了民谣和摇滚的歌词深度。他以诗意的文本、独特的嗓音和不断变化的音乐风格闻名，是当代流行文化最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan, American singer-songwriter and Nobel laureate in literature, has defined lyrical depth in folk and rock since the 1960s. Known for poetic texts, distinctive voice, and ever-changing musical styles, he is one of the most influential figures in popular culture.

items.name: America
items.descriptionZh: 《America》是美国民谣摇滚乐队America的首张同名专辑，以柔和的和声、原声吉他和轻快的旋律为特色，融合了民谣、乡村和软摇滚元素。歌曲充满对公路旅行、爱情和自由的向往，营造出温暖怀旧的加州阳光氛围。
items.descriptionEn: America is the self-titled debut album by the folk-rock band America, featuring soft harmonies, acoustic guitars, and breezy melodies blending folk, country, and soft rock. The songs evoke road trips, love, and freedom, creating a warm, nostalgic California sunshine vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦的Trident Studios，制作人是传奇的George Martin。乐队成员当时住在伦敦一间小公寓里，每天挤地铁去录音棚。Martin曾开玩笑说他们的和声“太像鸟叫”，但最终这些和声成了专辑的标志性声音。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Trident Studios in London with legendary producer George Martin, the band lived in a tiny London apartment and commuted by tube. Martin once joked their harmonies sounded 'too much like bird calls,' but those harmonies became the album's signature sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑诞生了经典单曲《A Horse with No Name》，成为1970年代民谣摇滚的代表作，帮助定义了软摇滚流派。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album produced the classic single 'A Horse with No Name,' a defining folk-rock anthem of the 1970s that helped shape the soft rock genre.
items.artistIntroZh: America是一支英国出生的美国民谣摇滚乐队，由Dewey Bunnell、Gerry Beckley和Dan Peek于1970年成立。他们的标志性三声部和声与旋律天赋使他们在1970年代获得巨大成功，多张专辑获得白金销量。
items.artistIntroEn: America is a British-born American folk-rock band formed in 1970 by Dewey Bunnell, Gerry Beckley, and Dan Peek. Their signature three-part harmonies and melodic gifts brought them massive success in the 1970s, with multiple platinum albums.

items.name: Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour
items.descriptionZh: 《Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour》是韩国女子组合少女时代于2010年发行的现场专辑，记录了她们首次亚洲巡演的实况。风格以流行舞曲为主，融合R&B和电子元素，展现了成员们精湛的唱跳实力和充满活力的舞台魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour is a live album by South Korean girl group Girls' Generation, released in 2010 to document their first Asia tour. Featuring pop dance tracks with R&B and electronic elements, it showcases the members' powerful vocals, choreography, and energetic stage presence.
items.storiesZh: 巡演首尔站时，成员Sunny在演唱《Kissing You》时不小心踩到裙摆差点摔倒，但迅速即兴转了个圈化解尴尬，粉丝们以为是编舞的一部分。后台视频显示其他成员在侧台笑得直不起腰。
items.storiesEn: During the Seoul show, member Sunny nearly tripped on her dress while performing 'Kissing You' but quickly improvised a spin, making fans think it was choreographed. Backstage footage showed other members doubled over laughing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着K-pop女子组合大规模亚洲巡演的开端，为后来少女时代成为全球现象级女团奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked the beginning of large-scale Asian tours for K-pop girl groups, laying the groundwork for Girls' Generation's rise as a global phenomenon.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代是韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的八人女子组合（原九人），以整齐的刀群舞、甜美的外貌和多样的音乐风格著称。她们被誉为“国民女团”，是K-pop第二代领军团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is an eight-member (originally nine) South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007. Known for synchronized choreography, sweet visuals, and versatile music, they are called the 'Nation's Girl Group' and led the second generation of K-pop.

items.name: The Ever Popular Tortured Artist Effect
items.descriptionZh: 《The Ever Popular Tortured Artist Effect》是Todd Rundgren的第八张录音室专辑，风格融合了流行、摇滚、灵魂和实验音乐。专辑以讽刺和自嘲的口吻探讨艺术家的痛苦与商业成功之间的矛盾，编曲精致且充满幽默感。
items.descriptionEn: The Ever Popular Tortured Artist Effect is Todd Rundgren's eighth studio album, blending pop, rock, soul, and experimental music. With irony and self-deprecation, it explores the conflict between artistic suffering and commercial success, featuring intricate arrangements and wit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题灵感来自Rundgren对当时音乐产业中“痛苦艺术家”形象的嘲讽。录制过程中，他故意在混音时加入一些“错误”的音效，比如椅子嘎吱声和咳嗽声，以打破完美主义的假象。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by Rundgren's mockery of the 'tortured artist' trope in the music industry. During recording, he deliberately added 'mistakes' like chair squeaks and coughs to the mix, shattering the illusion of perfectionism.
items.artistIntroZh: Todd Rundgren是美国多乐器演奏家、歌手、词曲作者和唱片制作人，以其在流行、摇滚和电子音乐领域的创新而闻名。他制作了多张经典专辑，如Bat Out of Hell，并是早期个人电脑音乐制作的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: Todd Rundgren is an American multi-instrumentalist, singer, songwriter, and record producer known for innovations in pop, rock, and electronic music. He produced classics like Bat Out of Hell and was a pioneer of early computer-based music production.

_meta.note: Accurate dates from Wikidata. Notable artists prioritized.
